text:
Title: Definitely worth it.
Review: Installed easily with the tools sent with this battery. Been using my computer a few days now and no issues. I'm glad I didn't buy an Apple OEM battery for 3 times the cost.

Title: I bought 2
Review: I received it and put my jewelry in it, right away.  I had more jewelry than would fit, so I ordered another one.  They are sturdy.  Jewelry easy to view.  Take up little room.

Title: small light brown elastics
Review: I have short hair, medium thick.  I purchased these to keep my hair out of my face and they work.  They don't pull hair when removed.  Good for thin to medium hair - could use in thick hair, but with less easy.  Having said this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Great top
Review: Great color and fabric, great fabric  and washed great.

Title: Works best for curling hair
Review: Versatile hair styling tool, can straighten or curl hair with simple change of attachments. I typically have to straighten my hair every morning so I was excited to use this. I honestly didn't care for it as much as my regular 2 inch ceramic straightener. It took me a lot longer than usual since this surface was a little smaller than what I am used to. I feel this would probably be better used as a curling tool, but just my opinion. Well made and will last for years.

Title: Right size for kids Kindle
Review: After I received the butterfly bag I was not sure if my great niece's Kindle with the big rubber protector would fit. But it fits perfectly in this bag.

Title: Basic Cream shadow
Review: This was a nice color that just didn’t work with my fair skin. I’m not sure what makes this different for “mature” skin. It’s a cream shadow like other cream shadows I’ve tried. Doesn’t make it bad- just a good cream shadow. It is a very tiny container but you don’t need much. On darker skin I think it would be gorgeous.

Title: Just average...below average scent Review: I wanted to like this much more than I did, especially considering how its priced higher than similar products. The fragrance is very cacao, and it doesn't moisturize for very long.
I've barely noticed the gradual tan and find I get a much nicer tan result with the more fairly priced gradual tanners.
That being said, it doesn't yellow/orange fair skin and doesn't seem to stain fabric.

Title: My trusty sidekick
Review: Whenever I need to capture some action footage and i'm worried I may damage my good camera, I use this little guy. You really have to kick it in the arse to get the white balance set. But once it's set, she's a beaut'. Don't recommend it at all for low light. The color reproduction is in par with its price range. Also, don't rely on the audio unless your in an acoustically treated environment. The mic is not true stereo. The manual zoom function (on the lcd screen) gets skiddish on high speed turns. It's still reliable for 720p HD footage and can make your action cut scenes look good when you push the camera to its limits. It'll always be my in the pocket action shooter.

Title: Didnt last
Review: Super bummed out didn't last at all! Lifting and nails popping off super irritated since I wasnt able to return

Title: Excellent Product
Review: Good hair spray.  Works!

Title: Too thick a texture for me,covers a scar on ankle, and acouple of age spots on my hands. Review: First I want to say, I was surprised when I received this, as it is such a small container!
I’m not a women that uses allot of blending brushes, and do not have long finger nails, although have manicures
Every week. This is the size of a eye shadow container, and is hard to get the pad of my finger to get the foundation out. I Have thin fingers.

I don’t wear heavy makeup, but this does cover nice when I use it right over my day face cream, It moves around better.
I have a darker scar near my ankle, and it covered good, and the couple of age marks on my hands also.
Although the color on me looks peachy compared to the color on my screen that looks more like a flat brownish!
I’m fair with blue eyes, lite hair.

I’m a fan of Bobbie Brown makeup in a tube, and sometimes revlon pump, For me those are lighter in texture and I'm guessing that is What I like..

Title: DSL FILTER
Review: Well, it did not end the buzzing on my landline phone. I had such high hopes. ATT has this horrid buzzing on the landline and I have not found one filter that will even quiet it even a little.

Title: Didn't exactly fit
Review: It didn't exactly fit, there was a little plastic tab on the unit that was not on the stock one. I had to cut the tab off to get it to fit in my PlayStation 3, but once I had done that it fit and worked perfectly fine

Title: scrunchie fitbit band
Review: Initially I purchased the solid black - it pilled and was really awful. My Mom wanted to try so I ordered her the black flower print she wanted and it was much better so I bought one myself.  If you have a VERY small wrist you'll like the small size.  If you have a normal size wrist you'll prefer your circulation in the "large" size.  I do like to pull it on and off easily, no clasps.

Title: Phone charger
Review: They only last for a couple of weeks then it stops working. All five “chargers”!!!!!

Title: Terrible how they made the soles
Review: I thought these would be great outdoor garden shoes. But the soles are not made to walk on any rocks. The rocks constantly get caught and the push the the bottom of the shoe. Plus getting the rocks out takes plyars

Title: Cute. Cheap. You get what you pay for. Review: Shoes are warm and cute.
Shoe pinches wide feet and thick ankles.
Fortunate zipper design still allows somewhat comfortable wear, but decreases support. Shoes are not as skid resistant as I had hoped.

Title: Great socks, but not really no-show
Review: Another great quality product from Under Armour. I am deducting one star simply because to me these are not 'no-show' socks (when my husband had them on I certainly can see them when he wears sneakers). That said, these are well made and I love the colors. My husband likes Under Armour better than any other athletic sock on the market today because they last after repeated wearings and washings.

Title: Simply nonsense
Review: Absolute nonsense and a waste of money. This is for people obsessed with any sort of gadget. USELESS!!

Title: Great quality
Review: This sounds great and does a great job of filtering out backgroound noises.. My co-workers say I sound much better and clearer. So happy with this purchase!

Title: Generously-sized buff puffs that create copious suds but I do not like the texture & they are $$$ Review: Mesh buff puffs are the only thing I use in the shower besides a back brush. I love them because they generate a lot of suds and they provide good coverage during showering. These are large-sized and similar to the ones I buy at Walmart for $ 2 each with the exception that they feel more like a cloth than the typical mesh. There are three puffs and they work like any other large mesh loofah I regularly use but they do not feel the same.

Also, the current price of $9.99 comes to a pricey $3.33 each puff. I love the attractiveness of these but not the price or the texture. Only time will tell how long they will last.

Title: I love these, they hold up to a lot of ...
Review: I love these, they hold up to a lot of wear, including me washing them by accident in the washing machine. They have 2 sets of the the poertion that goes in the ear,so you can get a good fit. They are comfortable and a great price

Title: Lighter spots appeared on the screen when dark background. Less then a month old!!!!!!!
Review: Don’t think it’s normal or if this vendor has less quality tech

Title: Easy
Review: Worth the money

Title: Love them
Review: Adorable! Comfortable! Light and love them!

Title: Didn't like the material
Review: Cute but didn't like the dry fit material

Title: Needs To Be Reapplied
Review: The color is a darker, but pretty shade of lipstick. The picture in the description is pretty accurate. My teenage daughter has to wear a similar color for color guard performances, so she is excited to have this.  It doesn't really look metallic, but for her performances, that's fine. It doesn't last very long and has to be reapplied frequently to maintain the intensity. Overall, it's an average, decent, drug store quality lip product.

Title: Not good Review: Too hard to program.
I ended up buying a easier times, do I wasted my money on that one.

Title: Meh
Review: I wish they were bigger and smelled stronger.

Title: Just okay
Review: Not as cool as i would have liked.  a bit disappointing.

Title: Super cute, but causes my feet to sweat/smell more ...
Review: Super cute, but causes my feet to sweat/smell more than any other pair of shoes I own- even with half-socks.

Title: Smells horrible and made me itch
Review: I can try to get past the smell of this product, especially if it will work. But last night when I applied it to my upper legs after I showered, within a couple of minutes I began to itch. I waited a couple minutes to see if it would stop and it got worse. I removed my pants and my legs were getting red blotches. I jumped back into the shower and scrubbed this lotion off. Honestly I can’t imagine any product smelling this bad and that makes me wonder if I was sent an old container.

Title: Decent basic wired buds
Review: Basic wired earbuds, a step up from what you would get on an airplane to watch their movies with. Good bass, decent treble. To be honest, most of my earbuds now are Bluetooth and wireless so I will not have a longterm use for these, but will keep them around to use with my laptop or my old school ipod. Not sure what the price of these are (web page is currently showing as unavailable), so I can't comment on the value. Recommend these if you are in the market for a set of wired buds.

Title: outlet extender with USB ports
Review: I needed an outlet extender with USB ports and decided to try this one.  It's really easy to install - if I can do it, anyone can.  Comes with a stabilizer screw that I highly recommend you install so that you can easily unplug stuff without pulling the extender out.  It also has a soft light frame around the front side - comes on when dark.  Very handy for under then cupboards where it can be dark.  The only "down" side is how far it sticks out from the wall - a good 2 1/2" or more just eyeballing it.  So, if you've got room for that, this is a great option.

Title: Not cozy, cheesy. Review: I bought this from good reviews that was sent to me from the huff post!
These pj are not warm and cozy, there a cheesy fabric that is cold to wear, and clingy.
I thought I ordered the black bottoms with the white top, the bottom was navy with bright pink
Poke-dots The color pink looked like it was running into the navy blue! Not a good look.
I thought I would give this away, but Nobody wanted it.
I’m 5’1, 117 lbs, ordered med. size is ok.
I’m returning this.

Title: Love these so much I got 2 pairs
Review: Very comfortable, light weight, quick drying, slightly stretchy. I like to wear these around town, to do yoga, and to hike in the sun & heat. I feel even cooler than I would wearing shorts.

Title: not as advertised
Review: These shoes run true to size - but you better be CERTAIN about your sizing (see below).  They are comfortable. The two straps allow some adjustment in comfort.  That's all I can say that is positive.  In my opinion, after receiving them and putting them on...the wide strapping makes them look almost orthotic in a not so great way - just my personal opinion.  Something less of a personal opinion - They advertise as "leather."  I ordered the black (no print) - the are NOT leather.  They are some type of faux leather - a petroleum or similar based faux leather - so there is an odor.  Disappointing to say the least.  Now, you might consider returning them right?  However, there is a 20% "restocking" fee.  Really?  When you aren't selling what you say you're selling.  That's BS.  This brand is available elsewhere and I would recommend shopping for them elsewhere.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful - however, I will probably donate these.

Title: Cheap quality
Review: The material is very cheap. Also shiny.

Title: Another great pair of Aravon sandals.
Review: Aravon are my favorite brand. Sandals are comfortable and great for walking.

Title: Didn't work on my stereo, had to return it.
Review: Didn't work on my stereo.  Sure looks like the one I broke and fits like it should but sounds muffled.  Either it's defective or it's the wrong size.

Title: Pass
Review: I don't care for these because they have attending see to tickle my cheeks Right by the eyes were they rub. They come loose constantly as well so I have to take my glasses off to tighten those little rubber holders

Title: Cute but way too big
Review: Cute shoes; extremely disappointed they weren’t even close to fitting.  They were too long and too wide (especially for shoes advertised as extra narrow)!  Sadly I’m stuck with them since they have to be mailed to China as opposed to Amazon.

Title: Just an average product, really. Review: I wanted to like this more, but its lacking in a few areas:
1. The fragrance is kind of blah, I prefer something fresher and cleaner scented
2. It didn't really do anything exrra to prevent hair breakage/loss
3. It also didn't really leave the softness that I like in a leave in product.

That being said, it didn't weigh down fine-textured hair or make it look greasy

Title: My favorite colored-hair shampoo and conditioner!!!
Review: The scent is fresh like apples and the lather is nice without being stripping to the hair. The conditioner replenishes whatever the shampoo removes and did I say I love the scent?? ☺️ Good sizes for the price....

Title: Great purchase!
Review: Excellent product. Great customer service.

Title: Works ok
Review: This is a decent nose hair trimmer. Doesn’t come with a battery. Requires 1 AA battery. Seemed to remove nose hair well. Felt like it tugged on bit but overall seems effective.

Title: Top too big to match bottom
Review: Top was way too big to match size of bottoms. The shirts were fine. Extremely large armholes. Large bottoms fit fine.  Typically I wear a large top and bottom. I returned.

Title: Dried out my skin
Review: I added this toning mist to my routine about a year ago. I prefer to change products every once in a while so that my skin doesn't get too accustomed to a particular product. I thought it was great for a long time. I had noticed that I was getting dry patches on my face, but I thought it was just part of the aging process. When I started removing products from my routine to determine if the dryness was caused by a product, I deduced that this toner was drying my skin. I've tossed the last unopened bottle I had in a drawer. I didn't even want to give it to a friend to try.

Title: Moisturizing but greasy, greasy, greasy & takes about 30 minutes to absorb Review: This gets 2.4 stars from me. This is very moisturizing but it is super greasy and takes about 30 minutes to absorb into my skin. I wish it had a fragrance because fragrance free does not mean it does not smell. It smells like Vaseline to me and I do not like that smell which is why I wish there was a nice perfume to this.

My hands felt very soft after using this cream, so I loved the results. I just hate that greasy feeling that takes a long time to dissipate. Note that it is a very thick cream perfect for use in the winter months.

Title: Runs very small, difficult to clean/wash
Review: So I’m a 9, sometimes a 9.5. The 9-10 size sounded perfect. Nope. Get a size up. They also dirty VERY easily but what are you gonna do about that

Title: I washed it and it frayed and it cannot be fixed
Review: Would not buy it again it’s a piece of crap

Title: Horrible craftsmanship @@@@ Great Stones
Review: I was so excited to order these earrings because I had just gotten a beautiful Blue Topaz and Diamond ring for my 20th anniversary.  However, I open then and the stems and claps are so thin you could barely hold them and one of the stems was actually stretched out of shape.  If you are looking for great stones that you want to have set this is your item.

Title: Didn't work.
Review: Didn't work.  Right out of the box it barely worked.  Got it hooked up to the WiFi but the speaker didn't work.  You couldn't hear anyone answer the door bell.  On the app side, you couldn't hear anyone at the door bell.  I have two outdoor cameras of Netvue and they work just fine.  Maybe this is defective?

Title: Very comfortable to stand in but not that comfortable to walk in Review: When I first tried these on I was impressed. However, after walking a little bit with these, I would never purchase them again.

LIKES
- They are very comfortable to stand in because it feels like I am standing on a soft cushion of air.

DISLIKES
- When I walk with them I feel like I have to exert a lot of foot muscle strength just to keep them on my feet and my feet get tired.

- The arch support is good but not great.

- Because they feel airy, it feels like these will wear out rapidly.

- They make my feet sweat like clogs.

- The red color I ordered comes off on my feet and/or socks

In summary, I would not purchase them again had I known what it would feel like to wear them for a few blocks. They claim that these are machine washable but what good is that if the color runs. They are very comfortable as slippers but not really good for me for outside wear.

Title: I tried.
Review: I received this as a gift from my parents. I regarded their gesture so thoughtful that I replaced it when it stopped working after 4 months of light use. I don't want a refund. My thought, my fantasy, is that I can physically put this device in the hands of one of its designers and watch as they toil to no avail as I have. I can think of no better punishment for the people who got away with calling this a tablet. Setting them on "fire", while slightly ironic, would not compare to the agony one would experience operating this device for one day without being able to experience the gratification that one would feel using it as target practice. TO THE CONSUMER: CAVEAT EMPTOR. A $50 IPAD IS A SMASHABLE PAPERWEIGHT. I gave it two stars because I feel guilty about telling my parents how much it is really worth.

Title: Great product!
Review: This will be good for keeping batteries stored for future use.

Title: Great hold, great smell, not your Grandfather's Old Spice!
Review: I got this for my son (age 35) to use. He typically likes to use some kind of gel in his hair to help maintain the slightly spikey look he likes his hair to have. He was reluctant at first, thinking Old Spice was something his grandfather used to use. He was pleasantly surprised. It smelled great, was easy to apply and his hair held well all day without any stickiness. This would make a great stocking stuffer for Christmas (in fact, I already ordered another set for that very reason). Highly recommend.

Title: Not so great
Review: Sent back were not made good and I do alot of walking ...

Title: cheap
Review: hard to crank to fit your phone real janky

Title: Anti-bacterial wax that is not as softening as the Therabath wax Review: I purchased a [[ASIN:B0047RWN3E Therabath Professional Paraffin Bath]] a couple of years ago and use to purchase the this [[ASIN:B000FEKMQI Lavender Harmony Therabath Paraffin Wax Refill]] for it. Those wax refills are six one-pound packages of tiny wax beads in a light lavender.

However, recently I decided to buy 12 pounds of this MAS208 Lavender wax that is anti-bacterial because I was unable to find the Therabath refills. This wax is a deep purple, has a nice lavender fragrance, and the bars are mostly solid except for some liquid (about one tablespoon's worth) in each package.

Although the wax is similar, I am actually not impressed with the results because my hands do not feel as soft as with the other wax. After trying this, I would not buy it again if I can find the other wax since Therabath wax makes my hands doubly soft.

Title: Two decent-sized bars; produces light lather; cleanses well; not exfoliating Review: There are two 5-ounce bars of soap in this package. At the current price of $18, that comes to an expensive $9 per bar.

There are two different scents. The fig leaves and white musk bar doesn't smell great to me. However, I like the fresh citron and driftwood fragranced one. That is the bar I tried. It produced a light lather, cleansed well, but did not feel exfoliating at all.

After having tried these, I do not feel they are any more special than store-bought soap. Therefore, paying a premium for them seems foolish.

Title: Perfect!
Review: I work in a hospital and am on my feet all day.  These are comfortable while also being supportive. They look great too.

Title: Soft
Review: I tend to go barefoot as long as I can, but once the weather gets cold, I'm a slipper kind of girl. These slippers run a little small. I wear a size 10W women's shoe. My heel hangs off the back of these. I was also expecting them to be super comfortable with a squishy foot bed, but there's no padding or cushion at all. It's like walking on the floor. The furry part of the slipper is very soft. I like the way the look. They're just not the comfy/cozy slippers I need.

Title: White, not shiny mettalic
Review: It is not shiny metallic, just white vinyl. I will use it.

Title: Great quality sulfate free shampoo!
Review: Really nice, sulfate free shampoo. I love the fragrance (lavender and vanilla) and the way it smooths my hair. It contains aloe, argan oil, shea butter and jojoba, so it is great for my hair as well. I typically get keratin treaments several times a year to help defrizz my hair and this sulfate free shampoo is a great way to maintain between treatments. Highly recommend!

Title: BEWARE, pretty but not practical Review: although the watch looks nice if you look closely at the face, there is no way this watch can support the functions on the face. Plus, the months and days are so close together you cant tell if its December or July. And it only points to 3 of the 7 days of the week. Watch came without any directions, etc. when I wrote manufacturer...no response

As nice as the watch looks, its a piece of junk if the functions can be accessed.

Title: blah
Review: Doesn't fit at all as expected. Runs smaller.

Title: Great buy and good price.  Just do it!
Review: Warm and cozy.  They feel great and will definitely order more.

Title: Self harm sticker not cool
Review: Not only are these tiny, there was one which showed a woman with a knife on her wrist.

Title: Hydrating but have no idea if it works; HATE the burnt coffee smell Review: I am surprised at so many 5-star reviews. I tried this on my face and neck and it felt hydrating. It did not feel cooling to me and I have no idea if it calms sensitive skin. Initially, I thought it had a nice fragrance but after a few minutes, it smelled like burnt coffee. The odor is so repulsive to me, that I had to wash my face and neck to remove it. Even then the odor lingered. I absolutely HATE this due to the odor.

The current price is $32, which is expensive, especially if one can't use this.

Title: very good for the first few months Review: Have used these for about 4 months now. The price i beleive is fair, was advertised as a tough working boot, i normally work 12 hour days sometimes longer than that. in these four months of use it feels loose now. I tighten them almost as much as possible and they seem ok, maybe not as comfortable as qhen they were new.
When they were new out of the box i found they were better than most other boots i have used. (before i used ariats and timberland pro)

Title: Really nice daily facial serum!
Review: I really like this RevitaPearl system. I have been using serums for over 20 years now and I am always looking for something new to change up my beauty regimen. This serum had ingredients that my other serums don't, so I was anxious to try it. I love the way it is applied with a dropper type head, it allows me to apply it easily to my face in the right spots and in the right amount. This is light and absorbs quickly into my skin. After using this daily for two weeks, I can say my skin looks glowing and healthier. Also, the skin around my eyes in noticeably plumper which makes the wrinkles appear less. Highly recommend for daily use for every skin type.

Title: Nice product,  not as loose fitting as I would have liked.
Review: This product was not as oversized as I expected.  I order a larger size for the comfort and still not super loose.

Title: Returned
Review: Returned. Poor quality. Flimsy.

Title: Pretty good
Review: My 11 year old is on the small side and these were slightly too big but she can still wear them. We also cut off the button on the front so it doesn’t show through shirts.

Title: Necklace
Review: I like this necklace set. But it came apart first day.

Title: What's the big deal? Review: this player is ok, but not nearly worth $500. i'm hoping the price will be justified in longevity.

also, it's no better than other players at locating where you left off. apparently blu-rays either have this feature or not, so the player doesn't matter. nor is the picture noticeably better than my other blu-ray player.

i suppose it's better at pulling in the web, but i only use that for netflix, and that looks the same here as it does on my TIVO.

also, it's really bulky, and i see no reason for that.

so unless, it has something you can't live without, i don't recomment it. seems like total hype to me.

Title: Great.
Review: Easy way to handle a pony, making it look classy at the same time.  Really liked.  Good fabric.

Title: Didn't last
Review: Very comfortable but lasted 3 months! ..get what you pay for

Title: Like a car-wash sponge; big & difficult to work with; definitely not exfoliating Review: After trying this, I am definitely not a fan. I prefer my mesh $2 buff puff over this any day.

First of all, this sponge is large and thick like a car-wash sponge. This makes it difficult to work with. Also, it is somewhat soft, so it is not exfoliating - though I prefer soft over scratchy. In addition, when using soap on this sponge is does not lather up like it does with my buff puff.

In summary, I personally do not care for this set of sponges. However, if a sponge like this is something one likes, then this is as functional as any other of its kind, just don't expect it to act like a loofah.

Title: Brush applicator is lousy and the blue is not rich in color Review: I have blue eyes and always used the Maybelline Royal Blue Mascara that I can no longer find in stores and which is way too expensive on Amazon. As a result, I decided to buy this mascara and I am very disappointed.

The mascara is not a deep rich blue like I expected. It also goes on very light and the applicator is horrendous. The brush head is a thick and thin twisting spiral that makes it practically impossible to apply a generous helping of mascara. In addition, the mascara almost seems dried out in the tube.

Overall, I'm very disappointed.

Title: Runs small, nice colar
Review: Returned

Title: REALLY EASY TO PUT ON MY MINI-I-PAD
Review: I got this and immediately took out the directions. I cleaned my mini I-Pad's screen with the enclosed things with which to clean it.  After cleaning the screen, I placed the screen protector on the I-pad and it was very easy to get it placed on the screen without having to do much adjustment.  I'm very pleased with this screen protector.

Title: THE SMELL! Doesn't look safe to wear on face or hair!
Review: This product looked all fun and games until I opened it... first of all I am not sure why I bought it in the first place but I assume I thought it would be fun to use on my hair, and I am wondering now anyone know what kind of effect alcohol has on hair? Because this product smells very strongly of alcohol, I doubt you can put this anywhere near your face the smell is obnoxiously strong alcohol I almost feel as if you were putting actual alcohol on your face, I don't even want to imagine what would happen if GOD FORBID this got into your eyes. I can only imagine if you actually wear this product on your hair how difficult it must be to remove and then there is no way it is not getting into your eyes if you do... and it smells so strong that I'm sure it's dangerous... I am sad because the gel looks amazing and it is very glittery but ...there is just no way I am using this.

Title: works well Review: I love the Amope and so these are the perfect accompanying purchase of course. If you're on the fence, honestly, this file really works. As opposed to the dozens of other things I have tried. These happened to be cheaper than I could purchase locally too.
UPDATE 7/20/2015.... A couple of observations...The handheld machine itself does stop spinning if you apply too much pressure... but I consider this a safety thing. You don't want to accidentally injury yourself with too much pressure. After months of use, still my favorite "home" callus remover.

Title: Not For Me
Review: These bands are not as thick as others that I have gotten. They're actually quite thin and similar to a regular hair band in appearance except for the coils. I have thick, coarse hair that goes just past my shoulders. After trying these out, I have decided that these bands are not for me. They stretch well, but to hold my hair up, I have to go 3 times around my ponytail and that's still not enough to hold my hair securely. I'm afraid to go around a 4th time out of fear that it will break. They go back to their original shape quickly. I'm going to give these to my daughter. Her hair isn't as thick as mine. She also wears pig tails sometimes and they might work better with that style.

Title: Great full service hair clipper kit
Review: This is a really high quality clipper set. I got this during the 2020 pandemic and thought I would try to give my two grandsons haircuts. To be honest, I never gave a haircut before so I was a little nervous (luckily they are only ages 3 and 6). I was amazed how easy this was to use. Their hair came out neat and even and I really had no difficulty at all. In fact, my daughter in law asked if she could bring them back to my house when they need their next trim, lol. Anyway, I highly recommend keeping a set like this in your home, you may find it comes in handy. I can see using this for a man's neck trim between cuts which helps save money and extends the time between salon visits.

Title: It works, but... Review: This mouse is fine, but nothing special. The small USB transceiver is nice. It's out of the way and won't catch on anything. The mouse itself tracks on just about anything and is very reliable. The battery compartment is easy to access, no hassle replacing the single battery. I comes with a brand name battery uninstalled which is very nice. No software to install these days, the old Vista machine recognizes it without issue.

However, it's too lightweight for my tastes. The “click” feels cheap to me and the scroll wheel is stiff. I have an older Logitech wireless mouse that has the larger USB transceiver and the batteries are a hassle to change, but it feels solid and works great. To be fair, this is a “Mobile Mouse”, so maybe lightweight should have been expected. I just didn't realize how much I would dislike the weight difference.

I won't send this Microsoft mouse back, but I wouldn't buy it again. I haven't had any problems with this mouse, it's just personal preference. I'll just use the Microsoft as a travel mouse. I suppose it's also possible that operation becomes smoother with use, but I'm in no hurry to use this mouse.

Title: wireless noise cancelling bose over ear headphones
Review: They work great and paired with everything I wanted them to.  Came with a spray on ear cover cleaner I wasn't expecting.  I've tried so many ear 'pods' and they just won't stay in my ears.  So, back to the over the ear Bose.  Wireless is awesome.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: works well smells awful
Review: doesnt smell very good but works well

Title: Easy to use, works amazing!
Review: This is a super easy to use eyebrow trimmer razor. With two blades, it is easy to use and style your brows at the same time. I love the LED light which helps me to see what I am doing while using a magnifying mirror. Takes only minutes to use, you get a perfect spa brow trim and contouring is a breeze. Saves me loads of money from getting my brows done at the salon monthly. Highly recommend.

Title: Scent too strong for me
Review: Comes well sealed. Hard to get lotion out through little hole on top of bottle. Feels nice and moisturizing on my hand. Smells nice but too strong for me.

Title: Update Review: Incredible. I've heard sounds I never heard before. Skynyd's "Free Bird" is now a totally new song for me.

UPDATE : They only lasted about three months.

Title: Looks like a jailhouse PJ top Review: The fit is as expected on me (snug because I ordered a large instead of XL). This would be perfect with leggings except that it looks like a pajama top with jailhouse stripes. I will be using it for bed because the color and design are not appropriate as a blouse.

I love the feel of the fabric. It also stretches to fit. It is made in China of 50% polyester, 45% rayon, and 5% spandex. It machine washes well in a lingerie bag and I air dry it.

This would have been a fine top if the look were not so "pajama-like." It is an utter disappointment as designed.

UPDATE Nov 3, 2019 - I washed this top and it came out very wrinkly. I had to dry it on low in order to get the wrinkles out and it looks fine. However, after the first wash it does not look as good as when it was new but it does not matter to me since I am using this as a PJ top.

Title: It’s ok
Review: The facial brush is perfect but the body brush is much too soft. It barely removed the deodorant from my underarms after multiple times back and forth. I had to go in afterwards with a wash cloth. But I’m keeping it, as I do like the facial brush.

Title: Not worth aggravation!
Review: One ear bud refused to play sound. Discovered this was extremely common. Spent a half hour troubleshooting, when I could’ve been working on my current novel. Tried every fix suggested online in multiple forums and videos. I have NOT had this problem with $20 cheap wireless buds and certainly not with $200 Bose. I’d sworn off Beats years ago due to bad quality, but gave them another try.  I regret it. It’s not worth the aggravation, let alone the hassle of returning defective earbuds. No excuse at this price.

Title: Love the strong fragrance, face feels smooth but not hydrated nor clean Review: This dispenses as a light and airy foam. As per the instructions, I applied this to my dry face morning and night and let it sit for a minute before rinsing with warm water. My face felt smooth but not hydrated or clean. I found it weird to let it dry and wait before rinsing off. Also, there is no sudsing action. It dries almost to an invisible film.

I absolutely love the strong frangrance but do not feel this did much for my face. Although I did not use this to remove make-up, I still felt like I needed to wash my face with soap.

Note that my box arrived smashed up and damaged so be aware of that possiblity if buying as a gift.

This claims to be vegan, GMO free, eco friendly, and is a woman owned enterprise.

In summary, perhaps this will work for someone else but I do not see any purpose for this in my daily routine. I do love the fragrance and how smooth my face feels after using this but I still feel unclean and have to wash my face after. I also love how easy it dispenses but wish the foam had a thicker body feel than light and airy as a feather.

Title: Not too sure about these...
Review: ... they seem to pull on the skin under my eyes and I definitely don't need that!  I'm going to see if putting some moisturizer on my face before I use them will help; if not, I'll donate them because someone might like them better than I do. The cold feels good, but that's about it.

Title: Ok
Review: Not the quality of more expensive bolsters.  A little too squishy.  But not bad. Average

Title: Very sticky!
Review: I feel like I have glue on my lips! Horribly sticky! Yuk!

Title: So so not so great
Review: They work great but stretch out after a couple uses so they don't last long

Title: Fake!
Review: Fake Uggs. Stay away from these. Compared them to ones ordered online to make sure and these were cheap material and the inside wore through after two wears. Waste of money.

Title: snowflake shirt
Review: I believed I was purchased a women's shirt, this is clearly sized for a man, so while I sized up (because of the cotton content) - it is HUGE.  Very disappointed.  The sleeves are 4 to 6" too long.  The body is like a tunic on me and I am not a small person - 5'7" - 38DDD.  Just swims on me.  The snowflake is print is really sticky...  Overall, I would not purchased this again.

Title: NOT RELIABLE Review: Sometimes this charges and a lot of the time it doesn't. It shocks me that after leaving it on the pad overnight it doesn't charge.
This is unacceptable

Title: Nice, middle weight pull-over shirt
Review: Love it.  Runs a bit on the small side - but not overly so

Title: Om
Review: This is a very soft outfit but is built kind of funny the arms are super short and it feels Uncomfortable and does not look well being so oddly shaped.

Title: Fits great!
Review: After all the reviews, I was scared it wouldn't fit. I am in between xl/2x. The 2x fit well, little loose just like I like it.

Title: This did not heat up much, did not curl my eyelashes !! Review: I like the idea of this heated eye lash curler.
I did notice this did not heated up very much, as I have another heat eyelash curlier, although not like this one, That does heat up, and curl my eyelashes.
I put this on the underneath of my lashes once I saw the tempeture on the handle.
This a Kimairay heat curler would work better if it heated up properly.
Did I get a damaged heated eyelash curler!!!

This is Not a battery run, you have to plug in the USB cord that comes with this.
I would rather have a plug in. Make sure you keep your USB cord with this. As sometimes other ones do not fit.
Did not come with the plug.

Title: Pantyhose Smelled Strongly of Mildew!
Review: This box of stockings had the strongest odor of mildew. I washed them twice in a fine scented liqiud detergent and they still smell of mildew. I still can't believe that the odor wouldn't wash out of them. Do not buy these. They were stored in a place that was very damp. For health reasons I wouldn't recommend purchasing these.

Title: Overall positive Review: I really didn’t know what to rate this dress. Overall, I think it is a positive purchase.

I am 5’4” and weight about 170 lbs. I have a 43” bust. I did use the sizing chart to choose my size. I purchased a 2XL. Remember these are not sized for the USA. The dress definitely fit well.

I love the colors. I ordered the multicolored tie die dress with a flounce. The colors are very vibrant.

The fabric is 95% rayon and 5% spandex. It does have a stretch. The fabric seems a bit “swimsuit/dance costume “ to me. The hem and the flounce are finished by a serger stitch. Washing instructions say to wash with dark colors, separately; drip dry; low iron.

The waistband had elastic. When worn, there are just the gathers one would have with elastic. It definitely needs worn with a belt.

This would make a good clubbing outfit. It would definitely dry quickly if it gets wet.

Title: Works great
Review: So far, picks up radar real well. Remember, the law must have it on before it will pick up

Title: Great, great shoes!
Review: Absolutely love them. Very comfortable, fits true to size.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Love it!

Review: this is a good product but it's expensive and the shade medium, was too dark for my brows???!!!! does include cool little tweezers and other brow shaping tools!

Title: Am not crazy about the fragrance, color of suds, or price but this is cleansing Review: I am not crazy about the fragrance, color of the suds, or the price tag for a large 7 ounce bar of soap. However, this is cleansing but is not spectacular enough for me to ever order this again.

The current price of $24 for this bar of soap is insane in my opinion. I would not expect to pay more than $7 for this.

Review: Super cute but they run really small. I returned them and they aren’t in stock anymore. So bummed!

Title: I love this bag
Review: I love this bag. I bought it to be more organized, and it really has worked. It has a place for everything. I have a spot for my work phone and personal phone and for my sunglasses and personal glasses along with all the other random stuff I carry. Highly recommend.

Title: Soft and warm turtleneck; has a lot of static cling and shows lint easily (SEE UPDATE) Review: I really like this turtleneck and am surprised it fits me perfectly. For years, I have been ordering clothing items and the women's sizes never seem to fit me. I take a large to extra-large in women's but rarely are the clothes true to size. This large fits, so I am ecstatic.

What I love about this sweater is that it is warm, thick, soft, and very comfortable. What I do not like is that it picks up lint super easily and is prone to static cling.

This is made of 50% Merino Wool and 50% Acrylic and is from China. I wash this in a lingerie bag but hang dry it.

I would have given this 5 stars if the static cling and lint pick-up was not so prevalent.

UPDATE March 7, 2019 - I have worn this about three times now and noticed that it pills up a bit and there is now a string hanging out on the right arm. I do not like this as much as I did before. See photo.

Title: Made for ipod, ipad & iphone
Review: Warning!  These are only for ipad, iphone, or ipod.  Does not say this in the listing.  Ordered on Prime Day, waited for sometime to order them.  I received today and when I opened the box, it says on the box made for ipad, iphone & ipod.  Disappointed.  Can't say how they work, didn't open because don't have anything they will work with.  I will be returning them.

When loading, it just didn't seem to hold as much as I had wanted.  I have a bunch of different kinds and sized USBs and it filled up quick.  There are pockets for some other things, not sure what.  Would rather more for USBs.  It could be just a little thicker and it could close.  At least I have some organization instead of a baggie of USBs.

Title: Inferior wireless speeds after 18 months of use Review: I got this router about 18 months ago. At first I liked it but lately I noticed that the download speed on my wireless devices connected to the router were about half what they used to be. I tried rebooting the router and checking for new firmware, etc. but none of that worked. So I swapped out the Buffalo for an older router that i used to use and the speeds went back to normal. So I guess it's the fault of the router. I still get good speeds when connected to the router via Ethernet. The problem is only with the router.

If I were more technically inclined perhaps I would know how to fix this. But as it stands now I am only giving it three stars.

Title: 6 month review: I give it a 7 out of 10
Review: I like the sound quality. It was better than my previous Sony Vaio. It’s not the best material. The keys make a sound when I type. I’m used to silent keys so it’s a little annoying. I like the touch screen and the updated Bluetooth function and overall technology with the laptop. The battery life is solid. Not the best but not the worst. I like that it’s lightweight. The camera is good, also not the best quality. I’m used to Dell laptops. I can’t say it’s as good.

At first I thought they were super thin, but then I realized that it was just one half of one. Now that I'm aware of that, I am more careful taking one out of the package. They seem to be decent. They don't fall apart when using them.

Title: Lavendar spray too strong for me.
Review: It's hard to review this accurately, since opinions on scents are so subjective. But I found the dry body mist to be too strong for me. The lavendar felt overpowering, and was not "soft" or "light" at all. It's also hard with this kind of mist to not get your bathroom floor covered with it, so be careful of slipping after you spray! Just not the product for me.

Title: The buttons scrape after about a month of use
Review: Glad I got an ergonomic. However, I wish I had spent the extra $20 for a better quality keyboard.

Title: Great quality and fit!
Review: Very sturdy and well made. My AirPods fit snugly into the case and the cases latching button is magnetic and closes easily and is very secure. The charging light is visible as there is an opening for it built into the case so you can see when it is light up red or green and the charging port is accessible so you don’t have to remove them to charge them. They clasp onto my purse sturdily and I have no worries about them becoming dislodged from my purse and getting lost. If you want to use a different clasp it’s interchangeable with one of your choosing of the same size. Great quality for a great price. HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!

Title: Great Sandals!
Review: I have plantar fasciitis and these sandals were a great find!  They provide the perfect amount of arch support, are super comfortable from the moment I put them on, and I love them!  You can't beat the price either.  Comparable slide sandals like these go for up to $100 or more on other sites.  These are really great sandals!

Review: I like everything except that they do roll down some. :)

Title: Smells like tangerine; no English on bottle except front; not as volumizing as expected Review: This shampoo is from Korea and the label on the back is in a foreign language. The label that says shampoo on the front is the only English on the bottle.

The shampoo smells nice, lathers well, but feels moisturizing to me. I expected it to be a little more cleansing. When my hair dried, it was not as volumized as expected. I have short to medium fine curly hair and my curls were a bit subdued after using this.

This shampoo is not bad but is not one I would buy for the current price of $24 for $16.9 ounces.

Title: Nice fragrance but no shine; I'm not seeing any results
Review: I really wanted to love this but I am not seeing any results. I sprayed this onto my dry hair as per the directions.  I love the fragrance but there is absolutely no shine or protection (whatever that means). I would have rated this 5 stars if I saw a change or at least some illumination to my hair, but nothing. I even sprayed more on and still nothing.

Title: daughter likes it, but...
Review: My daughter wear small size. I read other customers reviews and decided to order a large size. The shirt overall fits ok, but the sleeve is a bit tight... so if you're not a skinny little Chinese girl, you need to buy 3 sizes up.

Title: travel size dry shampoo Review: I really love this brand and recently tried to travel with my regular size. A NO GO through all TSA's. Got through one end of the trip, stolen at the end. Grrrr.... So... What I was told is that the regular sized product is not allowed, but the travel size would be. I just wish that Batiste would make ALL the colors in a travel version. I prefer the blonde. However, I will make do with this for the travel size. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE: Ok... so they do make the blonde in a travel size... but purchased outside of Amazon...

Title: Very cheap feeling set of basic brushes that are functional Review: These brushes look and feel cheap but they do the job. There are three brushes in this set. The round one is good for blow-drying and curling and the other two are decent detanglers. They all work wet or dry. I have short to medium fine curly hair and the plastic hair brush goes through my curly hair easily.

These are not spectacular and they are nothing special, but for the current price of $11.99 one gets three brushes at $4 each.

Title: Basic, lightweight vent brush with nice curve that molds to my head and is good for blow drying Review: This is a basic and lightweight vent brush that has a nice curve to it that molds to my head. It is also great for "displaying" the hair outward for blow drying. The handle also has ridges on it which provides me with a good grip.  Included in the package are two hair clips that are just okay. 

This brush is cheaply made but functional. I do not feel this is worth more than $3.99. At the current price of $9.99, it is way overpriced in my opinion. Although I like this brush, its price is the reason I lowered my rating from 4 to 3 stars.

Title: Very nice sunglasses
Review: These are very nice sunglasses. You need to get these. You will not be sorry.

Title: Overall I like the mouse and keyboard
Review: Overall I like the mouse and keyboard. I gave it three stars cause the range isn't that great. I sometimes use it 5-7 feet away and it doesn't work that well. My original keyboard and mouse have a better range.

Review: Horrible and extremely unflattering

Title: No glove love
Review: Nice leather but not stitched to correct finger size. Bought the medium and large sizes and nobody has that long of a pinky finger!

Title: Another great Dove soap!!!
Review: I have always loved Dove products and this new soap is no exception. My skin is left feeling clean and refreshed after using. Unlike other soaps I have used, Dove always leaves my skin feeling softer and moisturized (instead of dry). I love that this is unscented because as a person who loves to use body lotions and occasional perfumes, I don't have to worry about conflicting scents. Highly recommend this bar soap to everyone.

Title: Sticky
Review: This is similar to matte liquid lipstick, but it feels sticky and never fully dries down. If it isn’t going to dry, I’d just prefer to use a typical lipstick rather than a liquid version. The color was fine and I like the shape of the applicator. But I don’t like how the lipstick felt and I didn’t like how it wore.

Title: braided like fitbit charge 4 band
Review: I purchased some 'smooth' adjustable elastic bands and a couple of these braided 'like' bands.  The smooth bands won't stay adjusted - slip out all the time and have to be re-adjusted.  The thicker, more textured bands are much easier to adjust and stay adjusted - so far so good.  Time will tell. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All my reviews reflect my personal experience with the reviewed item and I receive NO free products or discounts that are available to all shoppers.

Title: Nothing to write home about Review: The scent, nonexistent.
The price, too much.
I wouldn't recommend this.

Title: Great little top!
Review: Love this top! With the weather starting to get colder I find this top to be just what I need. I typically wear a tank top underneath, just for color contrast, but it is thick enough to be worn without. I bought both the white & red (which looks more like mauve) & I love both. The white is a little see through, but still love it.

Title: It don’t stay on at all
Review: It’s not good at all. Waste of money…

Title: "No display is a key missing feature." Review: As the title suggests, "No display is a key missing feature"...a close second, for someone with "Man-Hands" (large paws), such as moi, is the diminutive size of the remote. I stand VERY tempted to secure a normal-sized, universal, replacement.
ALSO, take note that this sled is NOT an "Instant On" device. Everything take a few seconds of waiting...saves electrical current, though!

Title: Worth the cost.
Review: Great speeds.

Title: Where have you been all my life?
Review: I have suffered from rough and calloused feet since I was in my teens. Most of my jobs have involved me being on my feet for most of the day and, on top of that. I love to run and take extended walks. I do try to get professional pedicures but the only seem to last me for a day or two and then I am back to the cracked and rough heels and soles of my feet. This callus remover is super easy to use and I am able to do my feet on my own. My feet look salon fresh now every day (I finish them off with a really good body butter). Highly recommend this to anyone with rough feet.

Title: OK Review: Ordered these as I am a fan of keeping black tees as my go to basics. Was not impressed with them (especially as not particularly cheap). Washed on hand wash and dried on a clothes horse and the quality is terrible. Lost their shape and look as if they are ten years old already after only one wash. There is a logo at bottom of the tee too which makes it look cheap and tacky. Would not wear to the gym as material not breathable.

Will not be ordering again.

Title: Not as expected Review: Fine for a typical face wipe, maybe, though they only do a mediocre job at cleaning off the skin at all (oil, dirt, makeup). Then, claiming the benefits of charcoal seems a stretch. My first thought was these wipes are very, very white, so any charcoal content at all must be minimal at best since there is no whitening agent, such as titanium dioxide, listed in the ingredients. Of course, if the charcoal went through a bleaching stage, that would negate the Number 1 benefit charcoal can offer: detox. Aside from all that, the wipes are fairly soft, smell more like a face wash than the near-odorless scent of standard wipes, especially charcoal since deodorizing is another benefit.
If held up against a standard baby wipe, these are nice and soft - though the fabric pulls and begins to shed quickly (I wouldn’t recommend the other uses standard baby wipes are often used for). The price would be great if these were as claimed, but too expensive when compared to a standard wipe. Overall I’d say these are not as advertised and less than ideal for a standard wipe. I will not be buying these again.

Title: Way too small!
Review: These must be for children. I ordered a 4-5x and when I opened the bag, they were like a small ! The material is nice and soft though.

Title: everything you want - many too many choices.
Review: too many trimmers and makes storing this product bulky.  I am not sure we need all the various clippers, and it may have been better if they were built into the clipper.  As a product overall, it worked nicely and gave an even cut.  If you like to cut your man's hair at home, this product works, and in reality there are only a few 'lengths' we work with and short no 1 is really the only we use.  so you can get rid of the rest.

Title: Comfort
Review: Comfortable!

Title: Great overall travel bag! Could not do better for the price!
Review: i love Travelpro and almost exclusively use their bags for my travel (business and pleasure). I bought this bag for use on a recent cruise and found I was able to fit everything I needed into it. Convenient pockets for storing cosmetics and lingerie, I fit all my clothes (shoes at the bottom, pants and shirts next, and even a few dresses I left on hangers neatly folded fit comfortably and the clothing came out of the bag on the ship without wrinkles. This bag is big enough and expands for lots of storage. I will be looking to buy the 20 inch smaller version to companion this on my trip to Europe this fall. No complaints, great bag (wheels on the base work perfect and are not defective as other reviewers have complained).

Title: Don't buy your grandfather's deodorant
Review: I made a mistake and bought two cans of this. This is the original Right Guard from the era of black and white television. It isn't even an antiperspirant. It comes out of the can in this large cloud instead of being directed where you aim it, and it smells somewhere between rubbing alcohol and a doctor's office. If you want the most old-fashioned aerosol deodorant you can find then buy this. Otherwise there are better options.

Title: 12 plug powerstrip
Review: I bought this to replace a tangle of cords and 3 old powerstrips.  Works perfectly.  The outer plug ins work for the items that have the box plugs. The center strip for the cords that are normal.  I have slots available and it's some much neater. It is just as pictured.. a dark gray with a dark gray cord, approx 6' ft cord.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. And I hope this info has helped you in some way.

The badger brush is a bit rough, meaning it has coarse bristles. I did expect a softer brush. Nevertheless, this set works as shown but it just does not blow me away with the quality.

Review: I am 5'7" ... 38DDD and usually wear a 14/16 - or 0x/1x.  As with most button down blouses... it was too small across the bust.  I have this problem frequently but felt that "Roamans" might be a good option as they are a plus size retailer.  However... not so much. Title: Really, really nice spa package gift set!
Review: This is a great gift package, would be wonderful for Mother's Day or even as a special teacher. It comes with a really nice reusable bag and a pair of comfy warm slippers. It also has nice lavender bath essentials and a nice moisturizer. I particularly love the body scrub, not too strong, but makes my skin feel amazing! I highly recommend this for everyone whether as a treat for yourself or a gift for someone you care about.

Title: OPI nail strengthner
Review: I have a hard time finding this locally - so I order it.  This is the only thing that helps my nails.  Had gel nails for about 20 years and after the pandemic - no more.  So I am trying to recover my poor, old nails.  After about a year.  I think there is hope.  I miss the pretty, strong gels, but I'm over it now.  If you can't get this locally, I can recommend a try.  Be patient.  It takes time to recoup damaged, abused nails. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
