Review: It was broke within 2 days just by brushing my daughters hair.

Title: Great but too expensive
Review: I’ve always liked everything about this soap except the hefty price...

Title: White is a little see-through, but overall amazing! Review: This dress was perfectly lightweight and long enough to keep me comfortable and I didn't feel like I needed to pull it down. That being said, don't wear it with a backpack. That I did have issues with, fortunately, I was wearing a bathing suit underneath. I'm 5'5, 140lbs and almost all legs so this fit me very well.

The white part was a little see-through. Fortunately, it was only in the chest region and I was wearing a hot pink and black strapless bra. I think I was wear a nude or black one I wouldn't notice and I honestly don't think anyone did notice other than me. This was awesome to wear on the the cruise ship and was lighweight enough that I barely felt the heat.

Title: Useless and waste of money Review: The fabric is very soft, I love the color. However, as a hairband, it is not functional. Inside the fabric is a very very thin wire, very flimsy. It does not stay on my head no matter how tight I twist it. It's a waste of my time to return it... I will use it to fasten cables...

Definitely learned my lesson. NEVER buy an item with 0 reviews!

Title: Can't Even Hold An iPhone 8
Review: Magnet isn't strong enough to hold smaller iPhones. Not worth the money.

Title: Beautiful shower caps but they are too small for adults; more kid-sized Review: I am utterly disappointed in these caps. In the package are two kitty designed shower caps. The Amazon site says these are for women and kids; however, they are too small for adults. It fits plastered around my head with no room for tucking all my hair in. Note that I have a small head and take all my adult hats in a small.

These caps are beautiful with a nice kitty design and a double layer construction. Unfortunately, I cannot use them. If it were not for the small size, I would have given these 5 stars.

These are made in China.

Title: cord sleeves
Review: If you have cords, you need these.  In fact, I will be purchasing more.  Easy to use ( I thought it might be a bit tricky)... so much better blend into the wall than a stark, black cord.  I only ordered one pack of the longer set... I recommend purchasing one of the shorter and 2 of the longer set (only 2 per pack of the longer set), depending on how many cords you have to hide. I chose the ivory color which is a bit yellow.. but that worked for my walls. They are sort of a foamy feel... cushioning the cords and lots of stretch for quite a few cords in one sleeve.  LOVE these. End the tangled, knotted mess.  I will, of course, update my review should new info be useful.  Further, I do NOT receive compensation of ANY kind for my reviews.

Title: Easy to store and easy to use
Review: Just threw away 2 ladies electric shavers. 1 battery operated and 1 rechargeable. The rechargeable was inconvenient to keep charging and on hand because the stand was large and the cord was bulky. The other used too many batteries. The charging stand for the new Panasonic plugs directly into an outlet and the shaver sits on top of it. Easy to store and easy to use. Works beautifully.

Title: still leaves my hair feeling heavy.
Review: the conditioner still leaves a heavy residual on my hair - even though the formula has changed to reduce this heaviness.  the scent is a lot LESS strong, which I like.  However, I am still not a fan of the GF product in this instant.

Title: Great toiletry bag, holds a lot!
Review: This is a really nice toiletry bag. Although I haven't used it for traveling yet due to covid, I am using it in my linen closet to store my extra cosmetics and supplies. It is small yet room and carries a lot of stuff. Quality made, the zippers can definitely hold up to a lot of wear and tear. I can't wait to begin travel again and be able to use this. It will definitely protect my clothing and make an easy hanging tool in my hotel and cruise ship closets. Highly recommend!

Title: Great quality
Review: Great quality great price. No issues

Title: DO NOT BUY THIS DRESS
Review: We ordered this dress due to how it is represented in the pictures and the fact that it can be custom made to your size. Well, the dress arrived 2 days ago and it was horrible. It was not sewn together where the red fabric meets the lace, the red roses are made out of some cheap fabric and despite being given accurate size dimensions my daughter was swimming in the dress. Do not be fooled by the rave reviews about, there is a reason this so called "amazing" dress is so cheap, because it is just taht...CHEAP!!!

Title: Junk
Review: I can only assume that most of the positive reviews are referring to a different product than the Uncle Milton 3D Star Theater that I got. There is no wide angle starry background as shown in the video.  There is no AC adapter or an input for one. There is no open tray feature or a way to change the one disc (I assume) inside it. It came with English instructions and a supplementary instruction sheet that was in Arabic I think. The images are marginally viewable on a white surface 3 to 5 feet away in a completely dark room. You have to rotate across the images manually of which there are only 8.  The optics are poor the images are blurry even after focusing. The light is extremely dim. And it rattles.  Very poor product. Definitely returning this one for a refund.

Title: Unnecessary purchase if purchasing applicator
Review: The applicator comes with 2 pads. There is no need for any more, especially for one person.

Title: Use your own thoughts Review: Personally i think it's a good idea but after getting it and seeing
how its built and the Weight of the Camera to go on it, i would not
Trust the Adhesive, ONLY the screw on feature.
just my 2 cents though.

Title: Heart is attractive but chain is so thin that it knots easily
Review: The pendant itself is really attractive. Unfortunately, the 18" chain is so thin that it knots easily. It almost knotted taking it out of the box. Also, since the chain is not comparable to the pendant in size, this gets lost on my neck. It is a tiny, pretty heart with a barely there chain that makes it look like a heart decal is stuck to my neck.

Title: Hypoallergenic earing
Review: I still have a reaction from these earings, I'm very sensitive

Title: Good, potent cable, but a little stiff with the braidng. Review: This is a pretty good cable in that it can charge up to 3A using USB-A and USB-C, but the braiding on it is super stiff. It's not that flexible, so it doesn't work well with tight areas or if you've got the cable connected to a narrow port.
Still, for the actual charging and syncing it works well.

Title: Smells like old lemon but soak is soothing; feels tingly; I use as a hand soak Review: This lemon and ginger epsom salt has a slightly unpleasant lemon fragrance that smells old to me. I used 1/4 cup to about 8 cups of warm water to soak my hands to reduce swelling and aches. This worked well and was soothing. Of course, since my hands are always in water, the essential oil and epsom salt in this provides a tingly or slightly burning feel---like rubbing salt in a wound. However, that should not be typical if one does not have such raw hands.

There are about two to four servings in this 15-ounce package depending on how much is used. They recommend no more than half a cup for a full standard size bath for the first use.

The current price of $7.99 is pricey but competitive.

Title: Too Thick, not natural looking for me. Review: The compact is nice, but not great looking, with a sponge underneath.

This said, Light weight to medium coverage.
I’m light, blue eyes, and it did not say the color, and this shade is white, and is too thick of a coverage for me. I’m also a older women, and do not need to put thick make-up over my face.
Maybe I’m just use to wearing Bobbi Brown liquid that is sheer, and looks more natural.

That said, Bobbi Brown does not made my make up anymore, and I am looking for something else to replace it,
and this Honest makeup is not for me.

Title: My top 3 favorite costumes to own
Review: Fits like a glove! Comfortable! Great quality! Easy to put on!

Title: This really doesn't do much shaping. I would call it lightweight. Review: If you don't have much to hold in, then this would be great for you. I would probably need at least a medium weight fabric for this to support, my baby flab.

It's easy to put on and the fabric is soft. It fits as expected.

Title: Ripped!
Review: Wore one time and socks started ripping!

Title: Okay
Review: This lip serum is really thick and not what I consider to be a serum. I thought serums were more liquidy - but that's just from my personal experience. It is very thick and a bit difficult to get out of the tube. I find that I have to squeeze really hard to dispense it. That actually surprised me a bit because it's summer in Atlanta and my solid coconut oil is pretty much liquid right now. It has a very faint, almost medicinal scent. I haven't noticed any changes yet in my 50 plus lips, but I will continue using it.

Title: Good buy
Review: I like the size. Works good. Havent figured out motion detection yet. Really good night vision. Wasn't happy with the fact you have to purchase extra recording monthly

Title: Male or female plugs on RCA end
Review: Had to return wrong plugs on RCA end

Title: USB C adapters Review: Ok.. when I purchased my brand new samsung S10+ - I was blissfully unaware that my micro usb cords would be useless... Of course I own a million micro usb cords. Solution?? These adapters. SAVED! I did buy some actual usb C cords... just in case... but only a few. The adapters work perfectly for charging.. however they do become unattached if you yank on them - the micro cord from the adapter... there is an interesting little lobster claw/hook clasp dangling from the adapter... I just attached the hook to the cord that I am using... if it becomes unattached... it will stay on the cord... especially if you coil cords you are using. In any case... unless you want to reinvest in a bunch of new cords, these adapters will save you a bit as they are reasonably priced in my opinion. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE: 4/5/2019 I am back for another pack... these are lifesavers and so I want them everywhere! Super happy with these.

Title: You need one of these.
Review: I love this product. I have 3 of these and have given some away as gifts. We lose power here with each storm. So I got one for the computer, and one for the TV. This tower shut right off and the TV was not damaged. Well worth the money.

Title: Runs small
Review: This ran a bit small and the fabric was cheap. I got it on sale for around $13-$15 I believe and it was still too much to be worth keeping.

Title: Perfect for fall and winter wear!
Review: Really nice tunic top with hoodie, perfect for the colder weather. I live in northern Florida and I am always looking for warm tops that I can use during fall/winter/spring evening wear. This tunic is a perfect fit (I am 5'7" 160 lbs and I got a size large), it's soft and attractive, long enough to look great with leggings and is light enough to wear in 60 degree temperatures and also warm enough to wear in days and evenings colder than that. I really love this tunic and highly recommend!

Title: I washing wishing they would stand out a bit more
Review: This don’t look like pirate pants more like MC Hammer baggy pants. There isn’t much of a taper. I was expecting them to look more authentic but they really don’t standout that much. The fit is good and they are comfortable. No pockets.

Title: This is the foundation I have been waiting for!
Review: I have used a lot of makeup and foundations over my life. I honestly can say that, by far, for the money this Revlon PhotoReady foundation is some of the best I have ever used. It applies easily and smoothly, covering all my skin imperfections. The vitamin E and pear oil moisturizes my skin and, however it works, truly leaves my skin softer and radiant. The first night I wore this out to dinner I received a lot of compliments (something I have never received before when it comes to any makeup). I highly recommend this foundation for all ages and skin types. Just perfect!

Title: Poor volume.
Review: This ieGeek DVD player is replacing my old Sony.  It is okay but my big issue is the sound...at Max volume, none of us can hear it very well while riding in the car.  May have to buy another one with bigger speakers/better sound.  Also, this maybe 2 hour battery life is one quarter of my old one.

Title: Pretty Good Liner Socks With Tight Elastic Tops Review: These GALIVA WOMEN'S COTTON LIGHTWEIGHT NO SHOW LINER SOCKS (3 Pairs) are pretty good liner socks. The rubberized inner heel works exactly as advertised, to hold the liners in place so they don't slip down into my shoes. (I tried them with Oxford-style walking shoes, which is a tough test of liners.) However, after an hour or so, the elastic band around the top of the liners cut into my heels, making the socks uncomfortable to wear.

The medium size fits my size 8 foot snugly, which is good in liner socks, but not when the socks have such strong elastic tops. Probably the large size would fit me better. The socks don't wick away moisture as well as I'd like, but the rubberized heel and superior "no show" cut of these liners make up for a lot. For the above reasons, I rate these socks at 3 stars ("It's okay" on the official Amazon scale).

Title: Great sports Bra Review: It is always difficult for me to find sports bras. They usually don’t come in my size, cause chafing, are difficult to get off and on, etc. This bra is none of that. I liked that it came in nude so it can be worn with any color top. It is cut like a regular bra. It is easy to get on and off. You don’t have to fight it. You put it on as your regular bra.

I am busty. I wore it while running. There was no movement. The bra stayed in place.

This bra is probably as good as any I have tried. It is also a good price.

Title: Okay product but I would like a fly style.
Review: Needs a fly for me

Title: Five Stars
Review: Recommend the seller and the product.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Very hard to use need to send back

Title: Like Pureology & the scent, but I do not notice a difference using this! Review: I have allot of Pureology products and love them, but this one I didn’t notice much difference on my towel dry wet hair!
I wash my hair everyday in the shower, and blow it dry..I have been using this for a few days, and I like the scent.
My hair is shorter then my shoulders, and semi thick with a blonde weave, and I’m older.
I have been using Pureology , and my hair it is in good condition.
But I’m trying to figure out what this does for my blonde hair!!!

3 star,

Title: I guess all of these wallflower jeans have defects. ... Review: I guess all of these wallflower jeans have defects. I bought a second style because the first had the missing thread across the front leg defect. These also have a defect. The left leg twists so that the inside seam rotates to the front of my leg.

These must be seconds.

Title: Great!
Review: This product is great!

Title: Okay, but not great
Review: This clear Otterbox case is easy to hold and see. It fits my iPad mini and was fairly easy to install. My issues are the poor fit around the volume  control and even the home button is poorly supported. I would not purchase this case version again, and I do not recommend it. My Ipad’s home buttons' smooth function is now compromised after trying this cover for a couple of weeks.

Title: Shampoo, Cruelty Free Mystic Botanicals Color Protect, with Pea & Quinoa Protein, 8 Ounces
Review: Sulfate & Paraben Free.  If it weren't for the overwhelming chemical odor this would be a great product. I don't know the science why Amla Extract, Quinoa Protein and Pea Extract provide maximum color protection.  Mango and Shea Butter for moisture makes sense. Coconut Oil adds shine is a given. Really interesting company I am glad I had the chance to try the product.

Title: SERVICEABLE HEADPHONES FOR THE PRICE
Review: I've had these headphones for 2 years now up to the date of this review. Inexpensive and adequate but obviously not for the audiophile! Light so they don't hurt your ears after long wear. Dynamic range is within it's price range. A reasonable value for a knock around set of headphones. The vinyl coating over the ear covers has worn off on both sides and the covering flakes off onto you when you wear them. I guess it might have been affected by how I must put them on and off. Still using them and they still provide adequate sound.

Title: Great way to organize Review: These make great organizers!

They come in a variety of sizes, are durable & well worth the money.

I will definitely be buying more to take when I travel.

I highly recommend.

Title: Three Stars
Review: like

Title: Meh. Not as soft as I thought it would be.
Review: I mainly got this for the fact it was described as soft. I have sensitive, dry skin, and this just... didn’t cut it. It’s not the worst, but it’s definitely not what I would describe as soft.

Title: Well made zipties
Review: Pretty sturdy zipties! Great value for the price.  The same sturdy plastic ones that I got at home depot, these were maybe a bit cheaper too.

Title: Listing specifically what it dose
Review: Beed 1 in 2 out. Description didn't say it was 2 in 1 out

Title: Lightly moisturizing for a body butter; smells nice; color is off-putting Review: This review is for the Olive Body Butter by Delon. When I think of body butter, I think incredibly moisturizing and thick. This is moisturizing but it only lightly moisturizes. The cream is also on the thin side. It absorbs easily and makes my skin feel great. I love the subtly sweet scent. Unfortunately, the greenish gray color is off-putting. Also, the current price of $27.99 is outrageous for one jar. The Amazon site says the price is for three jars and if that is correct, then the price is more reasonable at $9.33 each. It is possible that reviewers only receive one jar but the review site does not say that, so I cannot be sure a purchaser will receive one container or three.

I personally would only purchase this if the price were about $4 per jar. If the color was better and the cream thicker, then I would pay up to $8 per 6.9 ounce container.

Title: doesn't fit Kindle keyboard Review: This does not fit the Kindle Keyboard-not even close. That should be somewhere in the product details as it says it fits the Touch and Kindles-kind of vague. When reviewers say this item smells, they are not kidding. I usually like weird smells; so i thought this wouldn't be an issue for me. The smell is unpleasant and strong.

The item is flimsy and feels cheap. It may be worth about $10.00 but $29.00 is ridiculous.

Title: The dress is cute but VERY thin
Review: Even with an undershirt, this dress is too thin.  I don't recommend it. I only gave it two stars because it is cute.  I would compare it to something from the Dollar store, only this is thinner.  After washing, the color stayed nice. I was hoping with a little shrinkage that it would not be so thin, but it's the same.

Title: Perfection for dry hands and skin
Review: This is wonderful for dry skin and is very healing. If you don’t want to keep a giant tub on your nightstand, I just got a small plastic container and placed some of that in the baby container so it can sit on my nightstand now without have the huge tub.

Title: Works great. Helps keep cords together
Review: Works great. It really does help keep cords together. Makes the cords all look in order.

Title: Easy, quick, non greasy and very moisturizing. Boyfriend LOVES it and he hates any lotions Review: Great, non greasy spray that dries almost instantly. I have NO idea how they took aquaphor and made it into a dry spray that doesn’t leave your skin greasy but they did it. Even my boyfriend loves it. Word of caution- if you do this after a shower stand on a towel
So the overspray doesn’t leave your tub/floor slick as ice. You will fall next time you get in the tub if you’re not careful.

Title: Not worth the buy
Review: Leaves you with oddly shaped butt

Title: Not what I expected.
Review: Very cheap

Title: Mirror Men Lady Led Digital sport watch
Review: I like the watch the color is what i wanted & the band is perfect because i love to wear men watches.

Title: Four Stars
Review: Nice

Title: This suit looks terrible on because of the massive bra cups which looks more like an obstruction Review: I admit that I do not have the body for a bathing suit anymore; however, this otherwise colorful and attractive tankini is made horrible by the awful bra cups.

The bottoms are like shorts and have a tiny pocket on the left waistband to hold a key or perhaps some folded cash. The top drapes over the bottoms but in a form fitting sort of way. I would have preferred a looser drape. However, the bra cups are horrendous. It feels like someone took two cereal bowls and inserted them into the cloth. My chest is super large to begin with and wearing this creates a massive obstruction in front of me.  In fact the white of the cup lining sometimes even pops up above the bra line. The top is absolutely hideous and there is no way I am wearing this suit.

Title: Love them but.....
Review: I love the fact that these are all cotton. I am a nurse and I need breathable undergarments and these are perfect. They ride high on the hips so they don't slouch during the day. My ONLY issues is they need to be a little bigger (ordered XL) because they are a bit tight around the waist. Will be buying more.

Title: Smells nice but is nothing special compared to my regular shampoo also $$$$$$ Review: This shampoo smells nice. It dispenses in creamy white iridescent like ribbons--almost like a cream rinse. It lathers okay but not great but does still clean well. It did relax my curls a bit.

After using this, I do not see any special results. To me, this is not worth the $58 price tag.

Title: Missing magnet
Review: I've had a few pairs and love them, this set was missing magnets.

Title: Don’t buy this crap
Review: Crappy and faded super fast

Title: doubled sided abalone necklace
Review: The pendant is made up of small squares of highly polished abalone - I chose the double sided pendant.  Because of the nature of the chain, you can set at different lengths. At full length the pendant falls below my bust line - so it's long. I am disappointed that the wire frame on the back side is lopsided... and that the chain is really junky looking and feeling.  I'm going to look for a better chain.  Even though the pendant is wrapped in the junky wire, I think a nice chain will distract from that.  On the piece I received it has lots of green which is what I wanted - but each piece will be different because shells are unique.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  I have included some pics and I hope they are helpful to you.

Title: No thank you
Review: Horrible smell. Reminds me of those cleaning blocks you put in the back of your toilet to clean with each flush. Its unfortunate,  going by the reviews I was sold. Not to mention it broke me out on my wrist and behind my ears.

Title: Great hand moisturizers, one of the best around today
Review: I keep these in the office and find myself applying this multiple times a day to my dry,aging hands. I love Pre de Province products. Moisturizing, easy to apply and quick absorbing, this hand cream is great. I love the variety of fragrances, too. My favorite is the lavender, but all of them are lightly fragranced and will not interfere with any perfumes or other scents you may use. The size of these makes it perfect for traveling and a little goes a long way. Highly recommend!

Title: Nice products, great packaging
Review: This is a great gift set of products designed for the optimal care of your skin. I love the serum and the moisturizer and they both work extremely well on my overly dry skin. This comes in a great gift box and would make a great gift for the woman in your life. I deducted a star simply because of the price. I feel that for the money you could get larger sizes of comparable products (toners and serums are typically lower in price). But, as a gift set, this is great and would be sure to impress someone for the holidays.

Title: Fragrance unpleasant.  Exfoliation and moisturizing good.
Review: This has a kind of rotten citrus scent I find off-putting.  Others might like it.  I thought it would have a strong orange smell and it does not.  That said, I DO like that my hands are smooth and moisturized so I'll try another fragrance.

Title: This is a great product. My husband and son both have used ...
Review: This is a great product. My husband and son both have used it for many years. They've tried other brands but this is by far the best, the hold and condition it leaves their hair is he best. And the price was great!!

Title: Noise Canceling Is Useless Outdoors
Review: I bought these headphones from an Amazon vendor and am glad I did because I didn't have to pay Amazon's price - $25 higher at the time.  However, if I had to do it again, I wouldn't buy them.  I use my iPod while commuting on public transportation and thought these headphones would be a good replacement for another pair of Sony noise-canceling headphones I had been using for 3 years.  However, when I'm outdoors and have the noise-canceling function turned on, any wind is magnified tremendously.  The function is virtually useless outdoors.  I've resorted to turning the feature off and turning up the volume.  The only other complaint I have with this product is that they're not portable enough.  I may be wrong, but I thought the product features indicated they were foldable - they're not.  This makes carrying them around a little tougher than foldable headphones.  Again, I'm glad I didn't pay full price for these things.

Title: Long printer cable
Review: Long printer cable

Title: Putty is a daily part of my son's regimine!
Review: This is a fabulous hair aid. My son has hair that is a little longer on the top than it is on the sides and he always uses some kind of control gel to keep his hair in place. He absolutely loves this Head & Shoulders product. It is strong, but it is barely noticeable in his hair (leaving his hair natural looking). It has basically an odorless formula and it doesn't flake at all after hours on his hair. To top it all off, it helps keep his scalp moisturized and helps minimize dandruff. He highly recommends this for anyone who is looking for a strong control and also is trying to reduce dandruff.

Title: Cleans and lathers well but tea tree oil smell is overpowering Review: First, it is unclear how many ounces this is. The bottle and box are marked 500ml or 17.6 fluid ounces. However, 500ml is equivalent to 16.9 ounces. That is what the Amazon site says, so I assume it is 16.9 ounces and not 17.6.

In general I like tea tree oil for its antiseptic properties and its use in some beauty products. However, this shampoo smells like straight tea tree oil and it is so overpowering to me, that this is the only reason I rated this 3 stars.

I washed my hair with this and it lathered moderately and cleaned well. My hair looked great after it dried. If the shampoo smelled a little less strong, I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: Primer
Review: Didn’t work well for me it’s messy slides all over the place seems to have somewhat of a glitter tone too it. My shadow smear right in with this product instead of sitting on top of it

Title: Absolutely Love It
Review: Love it. Put batteries in and it works instantly..  No code needed..

Title: Not the best make up bag but I guess for the price it's fine.
Review: I honestly do not think this make up bag is completely worth the money I mean it's alright but it's a little smaller than I expected and the bigger part of it is kinda small even as a travel size for example I think this is a miss for me but it does look alright like the picture just a little smaller than I expected also the material is not great I think.

Title: Feels like crisco lard
Review: This is suppose to be mon greasy but it feels like I spread Crisco Lard all over my arms. Washed off it was so gross.

Title: Comparable to salon treatments!
Review: I have been getting microdermabrasions at spas/salons for almost 10 years now. As I am now entering retirement, and will need to keep a close eye on finances, I know that self-care may have to take a hit (and not go quite as often as I had been). I was anxious to try this and I was not disappointed. I can now do what the salons did in the privacy of my own home and I can own one for the equivalent of 2-3 times the cost of a salon treatment. I still will go for professional treatments but maybe only once a quarter and I will be using this bi-weekly in between. It works well and my skin feels almost as good as a professional treatment. Highly recommend!

Title: Good protection but falls off
Review: Cool design and easy to put on but the top and bottom barely clip on making them pop off if you grad it wrong. This would be good for an older child but 9 year old using it almost makes more risk of it falling off and dropping. Keyboard protector is excellent.

Title: She love it.
Review: My daughter use for her laptop for college ... She love it ...

Title: Surprisingly disappointing Review: As a long-time wearer of Wacoal bras, I was really excited to receive this in the mail. However, I found myself so disappointed in this bra that I sent it back to Amazon. I think I am going to spend the extra $20 to get the other model bra mentioned in other reviews! Here are the problems I had with the bra:

Material: It feels much more cheap than my other Wacoal bras. Also, there is a little ring on each bra strap that attaches it to the band, and I don't have much confidence that it will hold together.

Band: There are only 2 hook-and-eye closures on the back of the bra (I wear a 32DD). This feels insufficient compared to my other Wacoals.

Sizing: The bra, for me, runs larger than expected. Every single one of my Wacoal bras is a 32DD, and the cup size on this model is too big. I have not lost weight as I immediately put on a different Wacoal bra in the same size, and it still fits perfectly.

I am a huge proponent of Wacoal bras - just not this particular model.

Title: Doesn’t meet my tweezer expectations
Review: They don’t grip very well at all. The only redeeming quality is the wee little flashlight. Once the battery burns out I presume I’ll toss them in the trash.

Title: Disappointed
Review: Giving as a gift and was surprised how cheap this looks. This is supposed to be leather? Very plain.

Title: No
Review: No

Title: Very good sound.
Review: I am very pleased, look good, high quality.

Title: great deal
Review: worth every penny and then some

Title: Lightweight shirt
Review: Nice lightweight, quick drying shirt. The one issue is that the fabric is so lightweight, one little snag and you have a dime sized hole.

Title: pass
Review: If I could give less I would

Title: Diss Review: 🙁. Disappointed the price has gone down lots🙁. Also I find it big for my living room and the sound could be better, for the price I paid.
The base is so loud I only use it when company comes over.
I actually thought I could hear the YV in other rooms of my house with the sound bar but 🙁 not🙁
Also cannot connect my iPad Pro my iphoneX to the sound bar

Title: this storage worked great.
Review: This storage held so many memories and files that could be needed in the future.  Of course, they now have much smaller hard drives to hold your extra stuff, not to mention the cloud.  It served it's purpose

Title: I had the wrong understanding about what is involved wit ...
Review: I had the wrong understanding about what is involved wit this device. I keep getting charges and am unable to watch any movies using the device. Please advise.  Further more, there was no pamphlet on usage or listing what I am buying.

Title: Great lower priced glasses, good eye protection
Review: These are a nice, reasonably priced pair of sunglasses with 100% UV protection. They come in a nice box to make it perfect for gift giving. Like anything else, you probably get what you pay for. Not that these are that cheaply made but I keep wondering if excessive wear and tear might eventually loosen one of the arms off (they give a little too much). Outside of that, they look great on and, like I said, for the price it's a great way to protect your eyes.

Title: Interesting Fabric
Review: I will start with the good - the fabric is really thin and light weight, but it's also soft. I'm a tactile kind of person and found the fabric to be very interesting. It has a lot of stretch and give to it. It's mostly seam free. There is one in the rear center, but you're not going to get the typical panty line on the sides and cheeks. The bad - sizing didn't work for me. I wear a size 14 pants, and a size 7 - 8 undies (large - extra large depending on the brand). These didn't provide enough cheek coverage for my liking. In all fairness, one of the pictures provided for the product showed an accurate cheek coverage picture. That's just not going to work for me.

Title: Color is too light for my liking, but it is a great eyeliner
Review: I usually love Oreal products. I found this grey eyeliner a little too light for my liking around my eyes (which is why I am deducting 1 star). It is easy to apply and it did last for an entire evening. L'Oreal makes a safe eye product, not tested on laboratory animals. Just keep in mind, if you are looking for a stronger contrast in your eye wear, go darker than this color. Other than that, I recommend L'Oreal for all your makeup needs.

Title: Great for music/podcasts and receiving calls
Review: Works flawlessly! Great for music/podcasts and receiving calls. The microphone isn't set up that close to my face but still captures my voice clearly.

Title: Returning these
Review: Too small and opening is wide in the front

Title: Too big!!
Review: Sadly, these pants are not what I expected! Very cheaply made and much too long!

Title: Challenging
Review: Nice looking but really difficult directions or rather pictures that expect you to tune in to setting this thing up. Instead of steps in words there are pictures..initially more complicated than it could be. Everybody out there isn't a millennial

Title: It's a velcro pain in the neck but does protect the kindle.
Review: I have NO idea why it doesn't show I purchased this in 2022 along with a 2022 Kindle Fire (my 2010 one broke).  Anyway - the kindle fits just fine but it so hard to open - it's got some kind of velcro closure.  I'm also having problems getting the Fire to fit in the right direction - seems like whichever way I put it in, everything is upside down.  I am not unhappy with this but not particularly impressed.  Really wanted a bright purple or lime green cover - I like my electronics to be fun looking.  Getting tired of them all staying gray or black.

Title: Good value.
Review: Warranty on Samsung tv.  Covers the tv for 3 years for up to $175.00.  Good value.

Title: Thin but firm
Review: I needed a sock that was thin but firm in terms of support.  These do the job nicely.  I will certainly be ordering more.

Title: Thick hot material
Review: Loved the cat face on front! Nice thick material but here in South Florida, it was too thick and hot yo wear.

Title: Inexpensive, well made, super thin
Review: This in an inexpensive choice in slim wallets. If you are in the market for one, then this is for you. It is super thin, not a lot of room for any bulk and it does have the RFID blocking feature. My husband found this as a great alternative to one of his more substantial wallets when we were recently traveling. This probably won't make it as an everyday wallet in your wardrobe (because I am sure you would need more room for money and cards), but it's a great cheap alternative when you want to go slim.

Title: These are nice!
Review: Great stocking stuffers! These will make great stocking stuffers for the men I find it hard to buy for! Great quality and nice finish.

Title: Problem finding the correct replacement is almost certain.
Review: Finding the right replacement is Hell! Not good specific identification of my shaver. I had to order three and I still am not certain I have the correct replacement. Never again.

Title: Great way for the little ones to get in the holiday spirit!
Review: I have two grandsons ages 3 and 6 and these were a big hit this past St. Patrick's Day. Colorful and easy to put on and remove, they are a great way for the little ones to celebrate the holiday. We even had some left over that we dropped off to the day care for the littlest one which made several of the other children thrilled to apply and wear. For the money, this is a great way for them to celebrate. Highly recommend!

Title: Only 3 stars because the crouch was unraveling after one wash
Review: Only 3 stars because the crouch was unraveling after one wash.  I would recommend these but for the price there should have been no unraveling.  They are comfortable and fit well.

Title: Comfortable
Review: The socks stretched just enough around my calves to fit snug but comfortable and they are warm without being heavy and hot I will buy more

Title: Price is a little high for this product
Review: So, so. Ok for wallet

Title: If you like flakes, you'll like this stuff.
Review: Flakes should be the name of this stuff. I used literally less than a dime size for my hair line,  I have good mixed race hair. This stuff flakes terribly.

Title: Meh
Review: Not as big as I thought it would be. Not sure if I can wear this... will try with a longer tank top under it.

Title: High crown
Review: Fits well, nice looking

Title: Nice case for the price
Review: I agree with most of the other reviews on here. The case is really quite nice, well made quality leather and fits the ipod snugly. Makes a beautiful, classy appearance to the eye. Only complaint is the fact that you have to remove the ipod from the case (which is not an easy task) every time you want to connect it to your computer. I haven't been as daring as everyone else in trying to 'doctor' up the case (by slicing through the leather) and don't think I will try it. I will use it as is.

Title: sally hansen xtreme wear
Review: I purchased this in white to use as a french tip.  The liquid is a pretty good thickness for that purpose - not too thick or too thin.  As for wear... I'm gonna say that I don't really think it lasts any better than any other polish you double coat... but just my opinion.  The white is a bright white - not yellowish at all.  Also good for a french tip.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Best Headphones in the Fifties price range!
Review: I've bought these headphones three times because I love them so much and overuse them and find ways to break the plug to where I can't use my warranty. The sound and bass are awesome. Hands down my favorite headphones in this price bracket.

Title: Ouch!
Review: Very poorly made tools. Sharp edges that actually cut the skin.  Maybe try a different brand.

Title: Like the Face Cream!
Review: I like the derma Geek face cream more than I do the serum. The serum was over drying in my opinion. I like my face to feel soft and supple after applying my skincare. This serum made me want to go slather on more moisturizer after. Maybe it was a tightening effect or something. I do have sensitive skin and it didn't irritate me in any way. So I like the face cream, but feeling meh about the serum.

Title: they were amazed The dress is also very comfortable Review: I wore this dress to my niece's graduation. I received so many compliments. When I told them Amazon, they were amazed
The dress is also very comfortable.

Title: Soft and nonslip! Perfect
Review: I looked for months trying to find a booty with non skid soles and these are PERFECT! They have a rubber sole, so my sister won't be falling in these. They are very soft, too The only problem is they don't have any support, but we will buy inserts

Title: Numbers don't work, returning immediately
Review: Purchased for my 10 year old son for his school laptop and he was excited about using it.  Immediately plugged and and noticed that most of the number keys at the top didn't work at all or only when you pressed extremely hard.  Returning this immediately and very disappointed. Looks cool if it actually works though.

Title: Perfect for working out
Review: Great fit, sound quality, and app support. These earbuds are a little worse off in the ANC department, as I've tried the Elite Active 4's, and I feel like the bass is also a bit lacking. Still, they're great for working out, and they stay in your ears even while running, which is a plus! Would definitely recommend.

Title: Nice tunic, fits well and looks great
Review: Nicely made tunic. I am 5'7" about 160 lbs and got the large size and it fits perfect (might even be a little loose). Color is a deep rich black and I have washed it twice and the color held up well (no fading). Seems like a good quality, stitching is tight and this should last for years with good care. Very flattering on me and I have received several compliments wearing it.

Title: Three Stars
Review: It looked okay, but the camera was faulty: had to return item :(

Title: Soft and compfy
Review: This is a lovely red. Was a little expensive but I'm keeping it.

Title: Volumn of fire 7 tablet
Review: The fire picture is very clear but the volumn at its highest point is not very loud.

Title: Basic Pants
Review: My daughter is a fan of sweatpants. As far as fit, these fit well. She's 5'7" and weighs about 145 pounds. She usually wears mediums in women's sweatpants. The length is good on her. The legs are a little wider than she prefers, but that's just a personal preference. The shape is not very flattering.  The material is a cotton polyester blend and is just okay. There are a lot of sweatpants out there with softer fabrics. They're not bad pants and will be fine for lounging around at home or for exercising, but she says she won't wear them out of the house.

Title: Love it! Comfortable and ergonomic Review: Started off with a wrist hurting due to using a trackpad. Started using this mouse and no more pain!

I love it! It's comfortable and the wireless works fantastic!

Title: New York lipstain
Review: Eh.  This isn't really a lip "stain" at all... As reported my other reviewers, it doesn't last more than maybe 30 minutes IF you don't eat or drink or otherwise touch your lips - including "smooching"... disappointing. I am fair skinned... in case that matters... It does have a rather funky smell too.  Those two issues make it a no go for me.  I tried the pink and the endless spice color.  The spice was darker... but didn't last any longer or better than the pink. Still searching for a stain that actually works.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Great makeup remover aid
Review: I have been using this ICREOS device for several weeks now nightly. I really like the way it helps remove my makeup and deep cleans my large pores. I used it once with a mask I had and it did appear to work well and it actually felt really good (I am assuming that the moisturizing was driven deeper into my skin than it would have been had I not been using it). My primary review here is as a makeup remover and I think it works well and left my skin soft and clean.

Title: Works well enough Review: This was purchased for one reason. That would be to transport digital files that needs to be printed. Since I don't have a printer, I have to take any documents that needs to be printed to a local print/business center. This allows me to store the documents on the thumb drive, and therefore print what needs to be done.

I however would not normally recommend 1GB to anyone - especially in a means of storage of files or media. Since a novel can typically store on 2MB (about 500 novels) on this thumb drive - this in itself is overkill. The drive works well enough, but does seem a little slow. If you were to want to transfer media, you might have to wait a little longer.

Title: These work well within a campground Review: We used these walkie-talkies while at the campground. The kids were on the golf cart while we were at the camper. We had no problems communicating with each other. There were lots of trees and campers, but they still work fine. The land was flat, we didn't try in the mountains.
we only have flat land here.

Title: Great gift
Review: Was a Gift send to my grandson he is super smart he loves it.

Title: Silly me
Review: I can't fault the product for me buying the wrong one.  I have a ROKU TV and this remote is for a ROKU box. No worries. I bought my Mom the box and now she has 2 remotes. I did order the TV remote and all is working well now.  Sometimes you just have to LOL and go with it. Hope this saves someone from making the same mistake I did.

Title: One Star Review: can not change to photo tray to print pictures
will try to get help from Amazon
Don't buy this printer

Title: Double Din Car Stereo GPS Navigation for Car 6.2 Inch Touch Screen
Review: this item was gift; friend likes it so far; still testing. . . . .likes the knob controls . . . .

Title: Remote stopped working after 3 months
Review: Was working fine but the remote stopped working after 3 months of little use.  A new remote cost nearly as much as the new stick.

Title: Perfect to turn any headset into a set I can use with my c charging port.
Review: I loved that I could change a headset that came installed in a jacket I purchased into a set I can use with my phone that doesn't have a female jack port. My phone is the c charging port for headphones so this works great. I do remove the extension before washing the jacket. But the sound quality is great. Very happy with this purchase!

Title: Not what I call compression shorts
Review: Totally disappointed, not really compression shots like the others I use to play tennis

Title: Woeks and looks just like the original
Review: This looks and works just like the original remote, which I found after buying this one lol. Glad to have a spare

Title: Fell apart after 3 weeks
Review: I’ve bought these at the grocery store for half the price. I was busy and didn’t have time so I paid extra for this. It broke after 3 weeks and the sand side for your heels on your feet popped out of the holder. Waste of money!

Title: Three Stars
Review: Tight fit for my note 5

Title: navy nylon shrug
Review: I am 5'7"... 38E/F and usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x.  I purchased the 2x and 3x because I wanted a really loose fit and was HOPING it would come closer together over my bust area.  No such luck - it doesn't even make it half way across.  It's just not going to work the way I had hoped.  It is a lighter navy which was also disappointing.  I was happy for it to be a nylon like material - for the draping- but it will snag easily.  It washed and dried (on hand wash cycle and laid flat in dryer closet) - but was still wrinkly - eh.  I wanted it to work, but it just will not.

Title: Very Small
Review: I was excited for this eye contour palette. It says that it's great for widening eyes which is something I need. The palette is a little on the small size. The size of the whole thing isn't bad, but the size of the actual shadows is way too small. My eye shadow brushes can fit in the larger, eyelid base color, but not in the smaller colors. The size is great for carrying in your purse. The pigmentation of the colors is okay. You do have to apply a lot and build upon it to achieve the desired look. There are instructions on the back of the palette, but I found it easier to read it online because it's so small. I wasn't really able to achieve the wide eyes that I was wanting.

Title: Seems no better than my regular shampoo Review: This shampoo smells okay and lathers and cleans well. However, my hair did not feel or look extra moisturized. I did not feel my scalp or hair was more hydrated than other store brand shampoos like Mane and Tail, Pantene Pro V, etc. In fact, I would say it was more on the dry side, almost as if I used a detergent like Suave to clean my hair.

I have short to medium fine curly hair and this did not weigh down my curls, so that is a plus. At the current price of $39.99, this is an expensive shampoo for comparable or less than comparable results. I did look this up online and Walmart sells this same 12 ounce bottle for $8.74 so I'm unsure of why it is over four times the price on Amazon for one 12-ounce bottle.

Title: Does feel soothing for dry eyes, and itchiness. Does not last long. Review: My eyes at times get Very itchy, and drops usually burn my eyes, except for one brand that does not.
The La Roche Posay does help the feel of dryness , and itchy eyes, but does not last for more then
A hour.
This is Not in place of a eye cream for under your eyes to prevent wrinkles, its just in place of eye drops I think.
Or if you have itchy eyes using this does relieve that itchiness, and for awhile the feeling of dry eyes.
Does sooth your eyes for a short time.

Says to use morning, and evening.
For instructions you have to tare the box open, as its printed on the inside of the Box.
For the price of $24.99 I would think the instructions would be printed on a little paper, and inserted inside the box.

The lid on the top is open-close. you turn it a little, then this pumps out a bit of the eye cream.
Very good idea, as it keeps the applicator Clean from germs, and safe to travel with.

I do not see if this was tested on animals or not, and if the box is biodegradable!?

Title: Not for small faces
Review: [[VIDEOID:1ae6472135d5ca39a3b98e3e35afbe3f]] Cute fabric but the fit isn't great for small faces. (I'm 5'1, and have to buy "petite" glasses because regular glasses are too big for my face) Even if I tried to fold it up, it still hangs off the bottom of my face. The position of the ear strap folds my ear down a lot and is annoying. No way to reposition where it doesnt do that (I have had success repositioning other masks for a less bent ear). If i loosen it a lot for the ear, but then the fit in the face is even worse. I was hoping for a cute filter pocket mask with a good fit, as I've been able to find for my husband, and while I adore the fabric, the fit isn't what I was hoping for.

Title: gel scraper
Review: I have to admit I was skeptical of this tool, but it works GREAT after you've soaked the gel with acetone.

Title: Ok, but wasn’t as impressive as I was anticipating
Review: Pretty cool cheap solution for looking at the moon. I have had the opportunity to use some amazingly powerful telephoto lenses that did a much better job, but those were thousands of dollars. This is a very cheap telescope and isn’t going to wow you with clarity. Strapping you’re smartphone to it is hard and once again  doesn’t help much. That being said looking at the moon is pretty cool. I really can’t ding it to much for quality. Some of the cheapest glass lenses are 4 times the cost of this. The instructions are very helpful but it’s easy enough to figure out. The laser site didn’t work at first on mine, noticed when i pushed the battery cover it started work so I had to tape the battery tighter and it started working. Overall a decent value telescope. if you’re excepting more you’ll need to look elsewhere.

Title: Not a Fan
Review: I will start with the positives. It doesn't irritate my sensitive skin. It rinses well. I like the dispenser which involves twisting the cap and then squeezing. Though it does take a few trial and errors to get the correct amount dispensed. Now the things I didn't like. It does not foam at all. I personally like some foaming action. The smell - it reminds me of some art supply from my childhood. I don't care for the scent at all. The scent is important to me. It needs to have no scent or something pleasant. This was neither. I realize scent is a personal thing and what smells good to me may not smell good to someone else.

Title: Long battery life, kinda fall out of your ears sometimes Review: I had to swap to the marshmallow earbuds for them to stay in my ears while I worked out. Sometimes the side with the buttons gets caught on my shoulder and pushes out of my ear, so that's a little annoying.

The battery lasts for about a week of gym use. (2 hours a day, so 14, 15 hours)

I like the accessories it came with--lots of different options cuz everyone is special and ears are snowflakes.

Title: Too Small for Today’s Larger Frames
Review: I was very disappointed with these cases. Although very attractive (more colorful than what’s shown on site) they’re too small for any of my glasses!

Title: Did not like
Review: I did not like the material at all, very uncomfortable and made me itch.

Title: Simple and not fully compatible with LG sound controls
Review: This device did not enable sound volume control to pass from my TV to my speakers in order use my TV remote, as described. A waste of time and money.

Title: Glitches
Review: I got this mouse because I left my good mouse at a friend's house, who I won't see for a month. I guess you get what you pay for because I've been working for about 2 hours and I've had to take the battery out to reset 5 times. The mouse icon just stops moving. At first I thought it happened when I was typing and went to move it again and it went to sleep, because the light went off. But it just stops mid move on a screen. It's almost better to just use the laptop track pad. I would not recommend

Title: Great old school Shelf System
Review: Great for school dorms or apartments, this Panasonic SC-AKX14 stereo delivers great bass and sound quality. It's attractive and sizable (not compact) and would impress most of the younger set. I think this would make a great present this Christmas to students in college as it would truly rock (especially given its strong wattage) the dorm house. I called this 'old school' because it reminds me a bit of the old boom boxes they used to have around. Of course, with today's MP3 players with their compact sizes and use of wireless speakers, the need for a CD player of this size might be slight outdated. However, it's sound is impressive and reasonably priced for the quality.

Title: As described!
Review: Great works well and as described!!

Title: Love the feel & pockets but very long for me
Review: These are nice, comfy, have pockets and draw string. Very long in the legs, about four inches more than expected for size ordered. If you have a 36" inseam, these are for you.

Title: Great glycolic acid and exfoliator combination product
Review: I have been using glycolic acid on my face for several years now at the recommendation of my dermatologist. When I saw this Necessity product I decided to try it as they called it an exfoliator gel. I have been also using exfoliating products separately so to be able to get both products in one single application was intriguing for me. I have been using this for almost a month now and I can say that my skin is noticeably smoother and softer and the time of my nightly regimen has been dramatically reduced. I will continue to use and purchase this Necessity product after this initial gel bottle is gone. Great, convenient product.

Title: cuticle pusher
Review: It was supposed to be "dual sided"... Nope.  Just one side - curved and edged and the bottom round end - no possible use.  So, I didn't get what I ordered.  It works but it's not great.

Title: Horrible
Review: I did not receive item for free so this is an honest review. These are horrible! The blades looked sharp enough and I have years of experience using a razor to tame my thick curly hair but one swipe with this hurt like h#@@! Not only did it hurt, the one little section I managed to suffer through is now super frizzy and split. Not recommended.

Title: I really like this stuff
Review: I originally got this product elsewhere.  This was my third bottle.  It is smooth.  Creates an easy shave.  Not sticky post use.  I didn’t notice a scent.  I do wish it were a bit less expensive.

Title: No Just no
Review: No. Don't bother. No communication and not worth it.

Title: Stop wasting $$ on disposable batteries.
Review: I bought these chargers to supply batteries for my grandkids walkie talkies. They eat up 4 AAA batteries in 24 hours.  The chargers work great, but we ended up ditching the walkie talkies for self charging ones.  You can't go wrong on these chargers. Batteries are ridiculously expensive now days.

Title: Cheap wig I got a refund on it
Review: Very cheaply made

Title: Not too good.
Review: This is not as pictured. I thought I would be getting the natural tone just like the picture. I got a dark mocha. I think it was made for darker skin. It does do on smooth and very creamy on my hand. I used a kleenex to wipe it off and it got on everything. Im guessing it might smear onto clothing if it touched it.

Title: must try. better than silicone products
Review: I have tried many serum that claim to repair your hair. This product has actually improved my color treated hair. I will buy this again when I run out. It does not leave your greasy. It is weightless on fine hair

Title: Exactly as described
Review: As described.

Title: BUY THIS THANG
Review: yes.. so good.  just buy it. my favorite feature is it auto connects and remembers my devices.

Title: Love the Scent
Review: Always a fan of Madonna and the smell is fabulous and will buy again!!!

Title: The 1/8" jack has stopped making a good connection with my iPad's female jack so the headphones ...
Review: The 1/8" jack has stopped making a good connection with my iPad's female jack so the headphones are virtually worthless now.

Title: A+ would work with again
Review: Item as described. Fast shipping

Title: Damaged
Review: They broke in speaker output and cost me money to get the piece out of my computer..

Title: Great overnight cream!
Review: I usually do not use a product which is classified as a 'night cream' mainly because when I have in the past, they tend to be super greasy/thick and I get the cream all over my pillow. This Odacite is really nice. It is light and absorbs quickly into my skin. I love the light floral fragrance. Having used this nightly for almost three weeks now, I can say I see a noticeable improvement in the dryness of my skin. It is supple and super smooth when I wake up int he morning. This cream is a bit expensive for me so unless the price drops a bit (it's over $100 now), I am not sure if I will be repurchasing. However, I can recommend it!

Title: Came to me defective.
Review: I have had buffalo ministations before that were good, and everyone knows that 1 out of 100 products off the manufacturing line (cars, computers, anything that is made) is defective. I will try again due to having had good experiences before.

Title: Runs small, nice designs
Review: I ordered the largest man's size possible and could not get them over my feet - and I take a 10 in men's shoes. The sock designs are very nice but the sock runs very small.

Title: FOR HAIR - Produces mild lather; a bit oily; argan smells the best; dislike the juniper Review: There are three bars of soap in this set (argan, juniper tar, and coconut oil. The juniper tar bar smells absolutely awful--like burnt cigarettes to me. The coconut is okay but the argan is the best. I really like the fragrance of that bar. These bars produce a mild lather but are a bit oily. As a result they are moisturizing.

Note that I use them on my body as I hate these for the hair. These are rated for the hair only but do not say that on the Amazon site.

The current price of $16.99 comes to $5.66 per bar, which is competitively priced. If these were for the body and smelled better, they would have gotten about 4.5 stars from me.

Title: Absolutely adorable
Review: Love SAKKAS!!! Always the best dresses and very pleased with this one!!! Thank you!!!

Title: I can count on this product!
Review: I can count on this product to be good every time I buy it.  I like that it is hexane and preservative-free.  It soothes dry hands and lips like no other product.

Title: It's just ok
Review: If you are looking for something cheap to get you by or to carry around as not afraid to loose, then this is ok. To look amazing, not so much.

Title: Skip This
Review: Looks good, long enough for the place I wanted to use it but .... it doesn't work

Title: Comfy and easy to use!
Review: I really like these wireless earphones. They are very comfortable and have great sound. The controls are really nice. I love how you can skip a song just by pressing on it twice. This is great for working out because you dont have to stop at all! You can even control the volume from the earphones too. I would highly recommend these!!

Title: Made my white hair darker, Not silver, Not a fan. Review: My hair is growing out natural after years of dyes, and weaves. Its white, silver and a little salt and pepper on the sides and back ( so far!)
This did not do much for my hair like Pureology for blonde hair does .. It actually made my hair it a bit dark!
I use Pureology for blonde, it’s purple, and I use the Conditioner. It makes my hair Silver, and shinny.

My husband Does mens hair Beverly hills, and my daughter does hair in the film industry.
So I got this whole sale and not from Amazon, which I love.

I, or my family has Nothing to do with Pureology

Title: Fuzzy facing foot too
Review: Very comfortable but...“cush” unfortunately flattens down just like much less exensive shoes.

Title: Mesh, not cotton
Review: This description is misleading. I thought I was ordering cotton panties, and instead they are mesh. It all depends on which button you click above. If you want cotton, make sure you don't inadvertently choose mesh. The two types should be listed separately in my opinion. The mesh panties are OK if you want mesh panties, which I don't. So they will go to Goodwill. Very disappointed that the description wasn't accurate.

Title: Eh, it’s ok
Review: Not strong and doesn’t smell like vanilla until it sits for a while

Title: Happy kid
Review: I bought this for my son. He says he loves it. I hear it blaring from his bathroom daily.

Title: Cute Cut Out Straps
Review: My daughter is 17 and likes wearing 2 piece swimsuits. This one has cute cut out straps which she really liked. She wears mediums in women's tops and this fits okay, but when she stretches or reaches up, it rides up a little. The top is not adjustable either. The white material seems to be thick enough, but the pads are clearly visible which she did not like at all. One thought would be to remove the pads, but she doesn't feel comfortable doing that with her D cup size.

Title: Great for the money!
Review: Great sandals for knocking around in.  They are comfortable.  They do run just a bid on the large side.

Title: terribly disapointedIt h
Review: It has a weird smell.  Not at all what I wanted.  It doesn't last long.  Someone said they paid 6 dollars.  Ha.  I paid 15 on sale. It's not worth it

Title: Not made well, legs are wide at the bottom, and curl up, stick out. Review: When I tried these NYDG crop pants on for the first time they looked, and fit great, and were a 5 star.
Then I washed them in cold water , and put them in the dryer.
Now The bottom keeps curling up, the slit on the side is sticking out, and these have shrunk , although loose in the waist!
The bottom is too wide, and looks goofy!

I have to say, I have other pants from this company. Long jeans to the ankle (pale pink), tighter slimmer fitting leg, and love them .
I think these are over priced., and Not made well, or did I get a bad pair!!!
I'm 5'3, 130 lbs. have long slim legs for my hight. I wear a size 10.

Title: odd cut
Review: This is comfortable but it flares in an unflattering way at the bottom. I'll need to tailor it somehow.

Title: Way to small
Review: Runs very small all over

Title: NOT true to size at all!!!!!!
Review: Size is NOT true......It was at least 2 sizes too small

Title: wahl balding clipper
Review: Husband likes a tight shaved head... this is as good as you can get without an actual razor blade.  It is stubble free? No.  There is stubble but it's very short and fairly smooth.  I didn't get a before and after pic which would have been best to show this - however, I feel it is clear to say that there is still a very low cut stubble.  I don't believe you could get closer with an electric razor without using an actual razor blade. Now, if you don't have much hair on top, it will probably feel smoother.  My husband actually still has quite a lot of hair.  He just prefers it to be really short. It's not too noisy, but does heat up some so take care to use as quickly as possible. It is easier to hold than some of the older and larger Wahl clippers in my opinion. There are replacement blades, but you have to look hard to find them.  I actually read the questions section to find them through an amazon link.  Having said all of this I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Perfect for our cruise & beyond.
Review: I would definitely recommend this for a cruise or a bedside table. We are continuing to use it at our charging station.

Title: logitech keys to go
Review: So... this is the second one of these I have purchased... the first one at Best Buy and I thought it was defective.  However, after trying this exact same one here, it failed to link with any one of 6 devices.  To name a few, Samsung Galaxy 7 cell, Samsung tablet, Iphone 6, various others, all blue tooth enabled.  Not a single one "located" the keyboard.  Since NO instructions come with the keyboard, I googled and Youtubed.  No use.  To be honest, I am not sure how the other reviewers got this to hook up! It shouldn't be that hard, turn it on, the blue tooth light flashes and you should be able to "scan" on your device and find the keyboard. I thought there may have been a trick, but apparently not.  It's a shame because the cloth covering and size were perfect.  I really wanted it to work. As I tried this on a wide range of blue tooth enabled devices, both android and apple, and not a single one could "find" the keyboard I cannot recommend this keyboard and I returned it.

This complex is great and contains all you need to combat aging and fine lines. It goes on easily and absorbs readily to give your skin what you need. Highly recommend for all skin types.

Title: Runs very small. X Large is like a Medium! Maroon, not red. Review: I did not recieved a Red shirt, this is a Maroon shirt with white or silver lines going through it, and a X Large which is usually
Too big for my husband.
But being this is supposed to be a winter shirt, I figured he might wear a shirt under this.
The shirt was Too Tight. Its more of a size Medium, and is Not soft, and Not comfortable.

I expected a warm nice looking casual shirt for after the gym, or for going to the movies, hunging out.
Instead to me it looks like a older mans shirt from the 70s or 80s, or its the color and Synthetic material.
If it fit my husband he could wear this around the house at least.

I bought this for the scent, and its just not there. So I will not buy this again.

That said , the lotions has a nice texture, and is somewhat thick..

Review: Balm is soft and mushy and you end up with more on your lips than you want. The fragrance is way too strong and it kind of burns your lips. Will not buy again.

Title: embroidered biboveralls
Review: I am 5'7"  38DDD and usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x. After reading other reviews, I sized up. While these seem to run a bit on the smaller size body wise, they are insanely too long.  I should have noticed the model in the ad looks to be wearing really tall heels... of course, I will not be wearing heels with bid overalls - although that is a bold choice.  I am going to have them hemmed, which is reducing most of the bottom leg embroidery - but they are a good 4" too long and I'm not short!  I think it will look better than folding/rolling them up.  Also, the straps are odd because you the adjustable part of the strap isn't long enough.  You will want to adjust them up, but you end up going into the wider  part of the strap and then it folds and looks really odd.  Eh.  These are interesting, but honestly, I probably won't wear them that often and I am paying an extra $25 to have them hemmed and the straps fixed so they be adjusted a bit less awkwardly.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful and I hope my review was helpful to you.

Title: derby hat
Review: Horribly disappointed.  I ignored other reviews that report the same as I am.  Completely crushed, unrecoverable.  I did attempt to steam correct, no luck.  Arrived with one thin piece of brown paper that I assume was supposed to be inside the hat, it was outside the hat further crushing the design - particularly the side flower area.  No way to recover it.  Colors are off from the photos, but I was expecting that - they are never exact.  The pink is hot the orange less so - I was sort of hoping for more of a coral but it's flat orange.  All in all it ends up looking like a $1.99 costume hat.  I was thinking that the barrel crush was just the packing, however, it appears the sewing is part of the problem and it is actually lower one side!  I've said it before - but it's junk.  It needed to packed in a box and properly paper stuffed in order to be viable.  I wish I would not have ignored other reviews reporting their experience with crushed items.  Went right into the trash.  Hoping to save others the disappointment.  I have also provided photos to prove my thoughts.

Title: mothers day gift for mom
Review: I purchased this for my mom, who has been an IPAD user for years... she "borrowed" mine a few weeks ago and in order to retrieve MY Kindle, I purchased her one!  She LOVES it.  Go Mom!  One person at a time, I will convert the world to Kindle!  :)  I think one of the best things about the Fire is the ease of use.  I had one that was a first gen.  I now own the bigger HDX.  It's just a huge improvement from the first gen version for some small and some bigger reasons. The power button AND volume buttons are so convenient.  I haven't used the camera a lot yet, but I will.  If you're sitting on the fence, go ahead.  Jump in.  I am pretty confident you'll love it too.

Isotoner really wrote the book on comfort and slippers... a good brand... however they really need to consider WHERE they are having the slippers made.  Slippers SHOULD run a little large because that is how slippers are worn!

I actually use this in shower/tub... but it would work as hand wash, of course! It's hard to describe the scent... the best I can say is that it is slightly woodsy?  I like light, clean scents and this is perfect for me.  But everyone likes something different.  Would be five stars if the price was more reasonable.  *sigh*  I always update if there are any issues.

Title: Love these slippers!

Quality made, these slippers certainly can keep your feet warm during the cold winter months. I got the pink color in a size 9 and they fit my feet perfectly.  For the money, these copy cat slippers look and feel just like the much more expensive brand. I highly recommend these. They also come in a cute bag (not a box) and it is perfect for storing them as well.

Title: This DVD player does not respond well to the remote control.
Review: The remote control was very complicated and it came with only a general sketch that didn't explain what each button does.  When I called Sony, they wanted $5 to get tech support.  Even with fresh batteries, the remote had a mind of it's own.  If I tapped Episodes, it would go to features.  When I tapped play all, it switched to something else.  No more Sony for me.  The worst was when I tried to get more specific directions and found none on line.  I am not willing to pay for tech support for a brand new DVD player.

Title: So so
Review: I was expecting a better quality print.

Title: Beautiful Watch
Review: This OLEV timepiece is stunning.  I originally purchased for my husband, but I will be keeping this one for  myself.  The diamonds just lit up my wrist.  The quality speaks for itself.  The Roman Numerals on the face give it a sense of nostalgia and beauty.  To my surprise the watch came with two tools, so I can adjust the size without trying to find a jeweler or watch repair shop.  Living in Florida, I love the fact that it is waterproof up to 30 meters.  With the trends allowing larger jewelry pieces, this will be a main staple in my wardrobe.  I would definitely recommend this watch as a gift for someone else or for yourself.

Title: Too small. Definitely size up 2x on band AND cup.
Review: I had ordered this twice now, once in the past and once recently. And both times the sizing was wrong. I did two sizes up on the cup size since the first time it was way off. But the second time the band was way too small. I was insanely annoyed. I think that the bra is definitely no bounce and would be GREAT if you find your size. Personally, not going to bother a third time.

Title: Not  good "gaming" laptop
Review: I bought this as a replacement for my 1200 dollar helios 300 that was 4 years old. I thought the technology would've improved that a 800 dollar new laptop would perform better then a 4 year old 1200 dollar computer. I was wrong. I averaged 60 fps with major lag spikes in teamfights in League of legends a 10+ year old game. I expected 120+ with the screen at 144hz. But it wasn't the screen holding me back it was the gpu, I guess. Also had poor performance in Dota 2. I wouldn't recommend this laptop. Also the volume on the speakers never rose over 50% it seemed. I couldn't hear the other players voices in dota 2 with everything on max. It was the computer, my note 20 is faster, clearer, battery stronger, and a smoother experience in League of Legend wild rift. So if you don't mind dying everytime there are more the 1 thing going on like single player games, go ahead and get this. But if you want to be frustrated every time you play, go ahead and get this "gaming" laptop. I didn't even try any of the AAA games, so maybe it's just the games I play. SMITE, DOTA 2 LOL PALADINS

Review: To be honest, I really do not see much if any difference when I use this polarizer versus my normal polarizer.  It works well, but the warming effect really does not show up strongly enough to really affect the images.

Title: Great facial moisturizer for men
Review: I have been stressing to my 30 something year old son for years now how important it is to take care of his skin. I think now that he is getting older, he is finally beginning to understand. He has been using this for almost 3 weeks now and he loves it. When he gets out of the shower and dries, he does his usual shave routine and finishes it by applying some of this moisturizer. He says it applies lightly, absorbs quickly and has barely any fragrance which means it won't conflict with anything else he uses on his face. He says his skin has felt smoother, softer and better than it ever has. I have already bought him another bottle for a stocking stuff for Christmas since he seems to like it so much. Highly recommend.

Title: So, so
Review: Have had some pesky problems with this which require restarts to correct. Certainly a good product but sometimes a bit of a hassle. Compared to my wife's larger Kindle it seems much slower than it should be.

Title: Keys stopped working otherwise exceptional Review: Purchased October 2017 for use with Android Phone. Design and footprint absolutely wonderful. Easy to carry, keys easy to use (yes, there is a placement issue for touch typists). The BK03 was a go to accessory whenever I traveled -- didn't need to bring a laptop for writing long E-mails or editing documents on the fly.

Suddenly in September 2018 some of the keys stopped working. Tried unpairing and re-pairing the device...tried pairing it to other phones and tablets...nada. Not much assistance from iClever. So the keyboard is kaput after about a year. As I purchased the keyboard on a discount, I'd say it was worth the price. Will I replace it? Probably not for the full retail Amazon price. It's a shame too, this is probably the best BT keyboard "ive used with my smart phone -- just not durable over time.

Review: These jeans are very tight.  Other than the jeans being too small, they wash well and didn't lose color.  I can't say much more on them because they didn't fit.

Title: Okay
Review: I have tried several different hair trimmers for removal of facial hair. This one is just okay. It does come with a battery, which I do appreciate. It also comes with 2 different blades, one for facial hair and the other for eye brows. It just doesn't seem to work as well as some of the other trimmers that I have tried. It's not bad, it's just that there are others that are much better.

Title: Nice for watching/listening on your phone.
Review: I read that this could hold up to 11 lbs...I dont know of any phones weighing that much. I thought it was metal but it is a hard plastic but it feels pretty sturdy. I have my phone in an otter box and its a bit thick, but it sits in this stand pretty good for just watching anything and listening to music. However, while its in the stand, you really cant text on your phone because it gets knocked over lol. If you want to use it for watching and listening then it works good for that. I cant see a tablet on it at all.
