Title: Spacious bi-fold wallet but this anthracite black shows all scratches Review: This is a bi-fold wallet with a removable ID window. On the left fold there is room for three credit cards and behind that bank of slots is a removable leather ID pocket that can hold one ID and two credit cards on the back side. On the right side is room for four more credit cards and one more behind that. This means 11 cards can be stored inside. There is also a double billfold.

The front of the wallet has a nice lion's head embossing on it.

The wallet also comes with RFID protection to protect the credit cards from scanners. However, I have no way of verifying if this works or not.

It also comes in an attractive giftable box.

In summary, the slots in this wallet allow for the easy retrieval of all cards. I do not care for this anthracite black  leather because it shows every scratch and finger pass on leather. The wallet is also thinner than some other men's wallets. I have no idea how much this will cost but if it is priced in the $10.99 range, then that would be reasonable as long as one does not mind how this style shows every blemish.

Title: This is a terrific eyebrow pencil!!
Review: I have dirty blonde hair and I am a woman in her 60's with ever more thinning/graying brows. I typically go for eyebrow tinting every two to three weeks to try to mask the gray. It honestly looks great for about a week and then the gray begins to reappear. I have been looking for a good eyebrow pencil that can help me and typical pencil type ones just don't seem to do the trick. This is a great brow pencil. It's not a pointy tip, it's a slanted on which makes it super easy to totally cover my brows and mask the thinning. The handy brush is great, too, to evenly distribute the crayon. This lasts all day and makes my brows look absolutely great between tintings. Highly recommend!

Title: Uniquely disappointing, sophisticated, expensive gadget
Review: Excellent connectivity and convenience with Apple products. Battery life is mediocre for phone calls. Compared to AirPods these are more comfortable, provide “better” isolation from external noise, stay in ear a little better. Sound quality is where the AirPod Pro fails. The improved bass from better ear canal seal washes out low definition midrange and treble. Are these worth the price, not if sound quality matters. These are good for short phone calls, audio books, and podcasts. There are better alternatives for sound quality.

Title: This did not leave my hair soft and conditioned as much as I expected Review: After washing my hair, I massaged a generous 25-cent-sized amount into my wet hair. The conditioner is very, very thick and smells like cinnamon. The cinnamon aroma reminded me of those fragrant pine cones sold at stores during the holidays which have an intense and almost headache-producing scent. There is no fragrance of ginger or honey. Nevertheless, I actually liked the cinnamon smell but wish it were just a little less intense.

I rinsed out this conditioner and after my hair dried, I found it was not as soft as usual when I use a product such as this. It is just okay but not something I would order again. The fragrance is too strong, the lotion too thick, and the results not soft enough for my taste. I cannot attest to its strengthening abilities.

Title: a little missleading

Title: Thin if using a ½ sheet; thick if not; great for toner
Review: There are 40 double sheets in this set. One sheet can be separated into two at the perforation but then it is too thin, in my opinion. I use each double as one sheet to apply toner. These work well but I still prefer my cotton rounds a tad better. Insofar as the claims that this saves water, I do not believe it nor understand that. In addition, the current price of $8.99 ($9.99 minus 10%) comes to almost $.23 cents per double sheet which is a bit pricey.

Title: Great variety of brushes for an excellent price!
Review: This is a great,economically priced,set of brushes. I keep them in my overnight bag as a nice way to travel without having to take my more expensive home makeup brushes, but I could just as easily use these at home. Lots of versatility and a variety of sizes. With this set you have something for every one of your makeup needs. They are well made, durable and easy to clean. What's not to like? Perfect for me.

Title: Nice decorative scrunchies but a bit pricey for what this is
Review: There are three pretty polka dot organza scrunchies in this set along with a few bobby pins, and three black elastic hair ties. The ribbons are really pretty and well made and they hold well. I can see someone wearing this to an elegant affair as long as they have a complementary outfit.  However, the current price of $19.99 is a bit outrageous for this. Right now with the 42% coupon, it can be purchased for $11.59 but I still consider that pricey. This is the only reason I rated this 3 stars. If this sold for $9 or under this would have received 5 stars from me.

I have adhesive allergies so I was excited to try these. I will say that the liner really stains too (meaning your skin). So carefully apply. I will really enjoy using these for fun. I do not apply daily - they are really for fun. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE: Just a note... the liner is fairly difficult to remove - even with makeup remover..

Title: Dirty and Broken
Review: These Airpods were clearly used.  I didn't pay for refurbished Airpods and even if I had, they would have worked.  These didn't work at all.  Well, one did.  But only one.  Really disappointed.

Title: Really hoped it lived up to the hype.
Review: I really tried to like this luxuriously intense hair conditioner.  What I didn’t like about it was it’s texture, and the fraegrance.  It may be personal, but I felt nauseous and even after the hair dried, I really didn’t like the smell.  Effect on hair was okay, but within one day, my hair felt heavy and I needed to wash it again.  I tried it couple of times, but it really didn’t change my first experience.

Title: Longest battery life ever
Review: Battery life is still awesome but suddenly the sound cuts out on the left.  I can't believe the wire or connection has weakened since I haven't coiled or manhandled these at all.  Not only that but the first time a call came through, there was an ear splitting sound before the call announced.  The headset would also disconnect itself after calls interrupted the audio and the buttons simply wouldn't respond. Tried turning it off and had to plug to charge to have it reset. The buttons often glitched and I had to use phone controls.  I am so disappointed that these are no longer functioning, they didn't last long.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Just as described fits great

Title: My hair felt conditioned and looked styled after using this; I did not lose my curls but...
Review: I have fine short to medium-length hair. After shampooing and finishing my shower, I towel dried my hair. Once my hair was damp and not soaking wet, I then sprayed this all over my head and combed it through. I let my hair air dry and it looked and felt conditioned and had a sheen to it. Also, this did not weigh down my curls. I had almost full body but that was only on the day it was applied. The next day my hair did not feel conditioned; instead it felt dry. I had to apply it again to my dry hair for my hair to feel somewhat moisturized. To me this works nearly perfect on my locks the first day or evening it is applied (4.5 stars); however, the next day my hair felt dry (1 star). Therefore, this will work if I wash my hair daily and apply this to my damp hair. However, the next day my hair feels dry even though it is still easy to comb through it. Overall, it gets 2.5 stars from me rounded up to 3 stars.

Title: Did nothing to improve FM reception for my Bosw Wave Music System Review: I purchased this for my [[ASIN:B011IH6MBO Bose Wave Music System IV - Espresso Black]] to increase reception of the FM stations and also to try to tune into some stations that were just out of reach.

I plugged this into the FM antenna port on the Bose and no matter how I or my boyfriend manipulated this FM antenna, it did nothing to increase reception of the FM stations. Unfortunately, this antenna purchase was useless for me. Had it worked I would have rated this five stars because the wire is sturdy and the adapter fits perfectly.

UPDATE 10/1/2015 - I decided to return this for a refund. This must be defective since everyone else rates this high; however, no matter what my boyfriend and I did, this would not work.

Title: Screw backs too small
Review: The screw backs are EXTREMELY  small, not at all user friendly.  I couldn't use the backings, I had to use other backs that one could manuever enough to wear the earrings.  I wouldn't purchase this again, there was no need to make the backing as small as they are.  However, the earring itself is lovely which is why I gave this 2 stars.

Title: Slightly misleading Review: I guess when I bought this I thought it would connect to a regular USB port charger. Imagine my surprise when I learned it is not USB compatible. Now I have to buy a special charger for $20 to use this. So far still sitting in delivery envelope while I figure out whether or not to return it.

Can't rate its performance because, that's right, no way to use it.

Title: Granddaughter
Review: The colors are magnificent!  My granddaughter loves this case.

Title: The frumpiest top there ever was
Review: The “top” part and “peplum” part are two different materials. Very uncomfortable and fits awkward.

Title: Great quality but thought I was getting both a silver and a gold , 2 compacts as shown
Review: The photo and advertising , and the fact that the manufacturer doesn’t let you choose either silver or gold ,led me to believe I would receive both the silver and the gold . My mistake . Regardless, these are high quality and bigger than I expected, fitting in the palm of my hand perfectly . Overall very happy with this purchase.

Title: Color is pretty
Review: Comfortable house dress.

Title: Didn’t Work For Me
Review: Sounded great when I ordered it, but it would not work on my desktop computer that runs Windows 7. I don’t know why. The computer would not recognize this external hard drive. Maybe tech support would have given me some answers, but I chose to return this item. My rating simply reflects what I’ve written here. This device might be just what someone else needs, and work great for them. So don’t take my one star rating as the norm for this device. Could be it doesn’t work on an older computer like mine.

Title: 5.11 Tactical Men's Taclite Pro Work Pants, Lightweight Poly-Cotton Ripstop Fabric, Style 74273
Review: love these pants . . . .perfect fit. . . .good price . . . .whatever your waist size is. . . .I get the loose fit unless your pretty slim, then you have other fits and sizes available to choose from for you . . . can be used as everyday wear or wear as casual night out . . . . goes with many other casual wear . . . .

Title: Nice brush but the angled “stamping” end is awkward to use
Review: The current price of $29 is outrageous for this brush. It is a nice brush and a great idea; however, the stamping end is awkward to use. The bristles are soft and they do not fall out. I love the blending end of the brush. The stamping end, however, requires the brush be positioned at the exact outward angle (see photo) to "stamp" an angled dose of powder on the lid and then work inward to blend. Other than the awkwardness to use and the high price, this is a nice brush.

Title: Thick stretchy easy slid on pants, wide short leg at the bottom. Review: The material is thick, Smooth, and stretchy.
The pants just glid on. Do not have to Pull up like jeans, although there too big on me.
A size 8 or 10 would have fit me much better. My daughter is heavier then me, and they seem to fit her, although not her style.
The rise is short, but the waist is high with 3 large hooks at the waist. This comes to my belly button.

I’m 5’2, and the bottom of the legs comes shorter on me then the model, and sticks out wide and funny!
I do have long legs for my height, but if you have short or stocky legs these will not be flattering .

Title: Metallic colors do not show up good, plastic bag . Review: Large plastic looking makeup bag.

All the metallic colors in the pictues is not what I recieved, or mine is different!
It will show a little bit of the colors if you move the bag the right way, or its basically white. The inside is white plastic.
This bag is big and square with the only zipper is at the top, it zips just, ok.

This bag looks like it was a give away if you bought a certain about if there products.
Not a fan that cover girl is written on ithis, or this bag.

Title: Snug
Review: I didn’t put this in the dryer and it was still a bit snug on my husband compared to how this size generally fits him.

Title: Perfect spray for me!
Review: I get keratin treatments at my salon several times a year, so I am always looking for products that can help prolong the treatment. This spray is great. During my styling after washing and partially drying, I spray this on and continue with my routine. My hair looks noticeably smoother and feels softer and brings the keratin to life again in my hair. Highly recommend whether you use it like I do or if you are looking for a great way to have your hair looking its best at all times.

Title: Love it
Review: My favorite oil

Title: Soft and sweet!
Review: Cute dress and a great deal. Very soft and comfortable! Fun with the bits of glitter and sparkle! Very happy with this for my gal!

Title: Three Stars
Review: Not a deep purple like pictured

Title: rose face cream
Review: purchased as a christmas stocking gift for my mom - she loved it so much I purchased one for myself.  Smells good (very,very light rose petal?) - feels nice - moisturizes.  I think it's a lovely face cream.  I don't know if its a miracle cream or anything, but it's nice to find something I don't have a negative reaction to... My skin isn't really super sensitive.. but some creams are not good for me.  This one is great.  I keep buying for my Mom and myself.  I never hesitate to update my review should new info seem useful.

Title: Nice mid range monitor
Review: This is being installed mainly for a security camera.  The quality is nice for a midrange monitor.  I have no problems with it. The color is great and picture looks nice.

Title: I guess you truly get what you pay for
Review: I typically use Thrive mascara which has fibers in it to give the appearance of longer lashes (almost like you had extensions put on). When I saw this, I was hoping it would be good as the other mascara is super expensive ($35). I was really disappointed. First, it is really thick and gooey. I found my lashes sticking together and instead of really lengthening, they just became fuller. Next, I found it easily smudged and left me with some circles under my eyes after only a couple of hours. I guess, for the $10 price, it might work in a pinch to give you thicker lashes but I won't be using it again.

Title: A Great tablet... except the charging connector
Review: I am happy with the size and display of this 8" Fire tablet. The reason I gave it 3 stars is because I am already having issues with the charging connector. Sometimes it works, sometimes not. I had purchased a Fire HDX 8.9" 32 gb for $500 and it quit charging at 22 months. Now it is junk. Why can't Amazon solve this issue?!

Title: Amazing EarPods
Review: These are so amazing I will proble buy another pair.

Title: Good fit, not high rise, comfortable
Review: I have a 25" waist and 32" hips and ordered the xs, which fits well - very stretchy, doesn't dig in, etc. I did not find them to be particularly high rise, maybe the style changed? They fit like normal thongs and are comfortable, they do have seams but they don't show under my leggings so I don't mind. They were comfortable and dry on my 3 mile run.

Title: Strong smelling soap w/good lather; cleanses well but smells falsely like tea tree oil or eucalyptus Review: I love men's deodorants, colognes, soaps, etc. There are three bars of strong-smelling soap in this package. The soap smells a lot like tea tree oil or eucalyptus oil even though there is none of that in the ingredients. I suspect it is the strong peppermint oil that is giving the bars their overall aroma.

This soap lathers and cleanses well. It is not my favorite due to the fragrance. It is not at all what I expect of peppermint.

The ingredients are coconut oil, canola oil, soybean oil, organic shea butter, water, sodium hydroxide lye, olive pomace oil, sunflower oil, goat's milk, ground oatmeal, peppermint leaves, and fragrance.

The current price of $25.19 ($27.99 minus 10%) comes to a pricey $8.40 per bar.

Title: Sugar scrub heaven!
Review: Amazing sugar scrub!

Title: Really nice cleanser for every day use, packed with nutrients
Review: I have myself on a daily beauty regimen of washing my face at least twice daily (and then applying serums and moisturizers/creams). I was looking for a good facial cleanser and, when I saw this had Vitamin C and retinol I had to try it. I have been using this exclusively for over two weeks now. I can see the difference in my skin mainly from a glowy healthy appearance. Light fragrance, it cleanses my skin and supplies nutrients. I highly recommend this to everyone who is looking to keep their skin healthy and youthful.

Title: Great Fan! I’m a FAN!
Review: Light weight, quiet and totally awesome!!! It doesn’t come with a charging base, but the cord ends in a USB so you can plug it into a phone charger or portable charger. Anything with USB! It’s  so light and works great! It’s really quiet also!!!

Title: julep oxygen nail therapy
Review: After nearly 20 years of wearing gel/acrylic nails, I need to stop.  I have tried a whole range of different products.  All claiming to help strengthen weak nails.  This one really seems to help.  I it doesn't "peel" up after only a day or two - which has been the issue for me with other products.  It seems to really adhere to the nail bed. I am older and as we age your nails change and are less strong.  So, I don't expect to have the nails I had in my 20's - 56 now.  I have been using this product for about 6 weeks and I continue to see improvement.  Now, honestly, part of this is due to the fact that I am out growing the torture of the gels, but I don't think I could have survived without this.  Also, my first purchase of this product was not from Amazon.  If you are looking for a way to help your nails be a little stronger, I would recommend this product. You will be able to see how it works after the first use.  Further, I had similar positive effects with other Julep products, like the smoothing base coat ( good for the age ridges I have - minimizes them nicely.)  I always update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Backpack Straps Not far Enough Apart Review: The weakest part about this is the backpack feature. This is a narrow case, and the 2 straps to hold the backpack on your back are not far enough apart to easily get the backpack on your back. I am not an extra wide person at all. It's too much trouble and not smooth and comfy to squeeze my arms into the backpack straps.

As a case to carry with the neck strap or the handle, this is a good, small case. The zippers open and close easily. It will hold a laptop and tablets just fine.

Title: OVERPRICED, poor Quality
Review: Flimsy fabric with design printed by SUBLIMATION, not screenprinting, hence the print job is fragile. Very poor job and VERY EXPENSIVE.

Title: WAY TOO SMALL
Review: This product was easily 2 sizes too small. I ordered a large and it looks more like a child’s large.

Title: Good fit, visible color Review: I like the shirt, it stands out when we're biking or running after dark.
It wicks away the sweat even in the Florida humidity.
this shirt is a lose fit vs a body tight fit. I prefer them this way.
down side is it snags somewhat easily. I expected a more smooth polyester type shirt like have from ASICS in the past.

It washed up nicely, no shrinking and doesn't hold the odor as our mountain hardware shirts do. Florida water has a bit to do with this.
The price (sale) was worth it allowing me to snag a few pair of their shorts which are great match.

Title: Dead after one day but Seller made good Review: UPDATE: I contacted the seller and he sent me another pair, not even asking for the defective ones back. Haven't had time to try them out because we only needed them for a trip we were taking. Still, worth an upgrade to three stars for seller's support. I would recommend you buy these early so you can make sure they work if you plan to use them for a trip.
We bought these for a three day road trip to communicate between cars. The worked exactly one day and after recharging the second day only one worked. We are moving so I have no printer to send these walkie-talkies back. I read where others had the same issue but I took a chance hoping it was one that was a lemon. Well mine was a lemon too, so be aware you are taking a chance when you buy these. If you are planning to use it for a trip or a cruise, I would definitely look elsewhere.

Title: Hydrates my face and neck; has a nice orange fragrance; doesn't soak into my skin all the way Review: I use this on my face and neck and avoid the eye area even though the packaging does not say to do this. It dispenses easily; just twist the cap and squeeze. I actually do not like the dispensing mechanism because I store this cap down and any residue on the cap wears off onto the surface it comes in contact with it. I would have preferred a pump dispenser.

My face and neck felt smooth and hydrated after using this; however, the cream did not fully soak into my skin. I used no more than a cherry-sized dollop (as recommended) for my face and neck combined and even after 30 minutes, my face was still a bit tacky.

In addition to the above, I feel the current price of $45 is a bit much for what this is. My Oil of Olay is a lot cheaper and does a little better job. I will continue to use this until it is finished but this will not be my go to moisturizing product even though it is hydrating and smells citrusy orange.

Title: Very stretchy Review: At first, this seemed like a nice shirt, but after wearing it a while, I disliked how stretchy tight the material fit. The material does not ‘breathe’.
I’m donating vs returning it because I wore it. I do not recommend this shirt.

Title: Great deal great quality
Review: Better than expected

Title: Has a slick consistency I don’t care for but cleans well; okay scent; vegan
Review: At $14.92 for 8.45 ounces, this hand wash is expensive. I used a generous amount on my hands and it has a slick consistency to it, which I do not care for. However, it lathers reasonably well and cleans gently. This is not for me but for those who are looking for a vegan cleanser, then this might fit the bill.

Title: Three Stars
Review: I like the color.

Title: See through
Review: They’re very soft shorts but extremely see through, I can see a freckle on my hip in these. Wish they were thicker because they’re very soft stretchy shorts.

Title: Not crazy for the gel consistency but does hydrate; did cause some redness in my face Review: A little goes a long way with this mask and that is good, as this is a very small jar. I applied this on my face and neck (avoiding my eye area) and rubbed it in until it dried. It did feel a little tacky but not too bad. The directions say to leave this on overnight. There is no way to tell that this is applied as it dries clear.

I did wash it off in the morning as instructed and my face was hydrated; however, parts of it were also slightly red. Therefore, this does irritate my skin a bit. I obviously will not be using this again but I do not feel this is a bad product. Besides the slight irritation I got, I personally do not care for the gel-like consistency; I much prefer creams.

Title: 2 pair were ripped on the seam after ONE wash
Review: This is a simple product but unfortunately 2 out of 6 pair were torn at the elastic band area immediately after one wash, and another pair stretched the band in one wash so it was no longer able to get back to the size, leaving me with 3 pairs for the proposed price of 6. boo!

Title: Cute!
Review: These are very cute and my daughter is thrilled

Title: I sent it back.
Review: The edges curled........would not lay flat.  I sent it back.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Very Comfortable

Title: These slippers are super comfy and toasty to the toes!
Review: Slippers are warm and cozy.  Will order more.

Title: Cheaply made
Review: I have a MacBook Air and I would like to have a keyboard cover so I won’t spill water on it and ruin my computer, cause I did it several times before. This one is very cheaply made and I don’t think the overall quality is as good. The feeling of using this cover to type feels strange and it’s uncomfortable to use it. But for preventing my MacBook to be broken from water damage I guess this is what I have to do

Title: Not near as good as it should be
Review: Not near as smooth as other mise from Logitech have been. The scroll wheel is a bit jurky and noisy. I was hoping for better than it is. It will do for now. Come on Logitech your or you were so much better than this

Title: Shane Rocks
Review: Love this! My daughter adores you Shane!!!

Title: Shoes are too tight!
Review: They were very narrow and I have skinny feet!

Title: Five Stars
Review: Works as promised.

Title: Great moisturizing lip gloss!
Review: Really nice lip gloss. I love the Short Change color. I put it on in the morning before I go to work and it does seem to last for a couple of hours before I need to reapply. Nice and shiny, your lips will look great when you have this Exhibitionist gloss on. Also find this to be great at moisturizing as my lips feel much softer and smoother since I have been using this in the cold weather for the past few weeks. Highly recommend.

Title: Cute but big
Review: Super cute but a bit big. My child is 2.5 months old and these socks go up to his knees. They seemed to stay on pulled all the way up though which was nice since most baby socks seem to fall off. These are good for under pants or maybe for girls but would look weird/wouldn’t work if he were wearing shorts.

Title: Buy it!
Review: I gained weight during COVID and had to attend a Quinceañera. It was just fitted enough, and looked great with shapewear. I am 5’4, 240, 44DDD boobies. I got the XXL. The material is a little thick but I think it helps to be slimming.

Title: Mid rise
Review: Comfortable at a bargain price

Title: Not worth it
Review: Not impressed and to me, this looks much bigger than the photo.

Title: Too pale to make an impact; good for toning down other brash lip colors
Review: Unfortunately, I am like a hummingbird attracted to color. This is too pale to even show that I have lipstick on with this color.  It is good to use to tone down other bold or brash lip colors but personally, this is not for me. Considering I have pale skin, I am surprised it does not show more.

Title: MilitarySheild
Review: I only gave it 3 stars be because when I put it on my nook it didn't go on as well as it did on my son's nook. Its alot cheaper than zagg.

Title: Great little outfit.
Review: This will be great come the cooler fall months. Happy with the material soft , yet has structure to it.

Title: galaxy tab charger
Review: opened it up, plugged it in to my galaxy tab S2 and... it didn't work.  Trash can city.  Would not purchase again.

Title: Bad product
Review: It worked for a bit and then it just wouldn’t move ni matter if I charged it. Not happy

Title: Defective. Don't buy
Review: Horrible. Some of the outlets don't work.

Title: Not for me
Review: Not size to fit...order two sizes larger...

Title: broke after 1 month
Review: I liked the sandal, fit nicely but after wearing a month on and off depending on my day the plastic triangle broke so I could no longer wear them, it's a shame because it now turns out it's a waist of money as they cannot be repaired and I had to throw them out.  OUCH.

Title: Don’t buy this product!!
Review: I would not recommend this product. There is hardly any product in the container, seems very dry.

Title: Blown speaker
Review: Ive bought 4 pairs of these and the left speaker keeps blowing out, there junk, they last about 3 months.

Title: Great quality vest, good for fall
Review: I got this in a size large (I am 5'7" and a 38C) and it fits perfectly for me. Well made and warm, perfect for cooler fall data without the bulk of a full coat or jacket. I like the length of it as well as it rides on my lower hips almost covering my butt. A quality lightweight vest at a good cost. Highly recommend.

Title: Not good
Review: These do not work unless you are within 20 yards in a quiet room. Very disappointed, no option for return...

Title: Really bright and great to have around!
Review: Great vanity mirror and a really nice size. It works off batteries and packs a punch when it comes to lighting (almost scary to see my skin that close up, lol). Not sure if I would travel with this (it's a little big for packing in a suitcase for my taste), but it's great for use in my bedroom when I want to finish up makeup applications (while my husband uses the bathroom). I also really like it for eyebrow tweezing as I can find little hairs I had never seen without this close up lighting available before.Highly recommend and I could see this as a great stocking stuffer/gift for the holidays for the person in your life who has everything.

Title: Great way to scrub and exfoliate!
Review: I have been using scrubs in the shower for the past few years. I have really dry, crepey skin and scrubs really help. I wasn't sure what to expect when I saw these cubes, couldn't figure out if I would be able to control it in the shower (trying to get it onto my legs and arms). I was pleasantly surprised, however, to see how easy it was.  As I begin to use it the cube stays in the palm of my hand and begins to 'melt' slowly as I moved it up and down my arms and legs. There was plenty to go around and it was super easy to use. My skin felt amazing after just one use. I really did like the fragrance, too. I will be buying a few more of these for myself and also as stocking stuffers for my two daughter-in-laws (a unique gift). Highly recommend!

Title: Cute
Review: Great slip on sandal

Title: Works kinda
Review: This worked with my 32bit windows XP but not with my 64bit. I was dissapointed since this was my second adapter I tried out. Bought the TP-link TL-WDN3200, worked like a charm (what ever that means) for my 64 bit

Title: Thin and see through
Review: Thin and see through.  Wish I'd have got a darker color so that it maybe isnt as see through.  Im 5'1" and 165lbs.  Xl fit ok.

Title: Was not sewed good, had a two inch hole. Review: This is a lite weight bag, good for flying.
Has enough pockets for me, as I do not wear allot of make-up etc.
This is not big enough to hold a bottle.

I wanted to use this for our motor home, and it would have worked out, but the larger
Zipper pocket on the bottom was Not sewn good, and the sewer left out Two inches that did not get sewed down! Big Hole.
Where is Quality Control?
This is cheesy looking also.

Title: Works much better than a typical money belt
Review: Great item to have when traveling. I typically have used a money belt, but I find it awkward when trying to get cash out (or passport) on the go. This easily slips into my shirt and allows me easy access to get to the contents. I am so glad I purchased this for my next trip!

Title: to small
Review: runs really small

Title: Size doesn't fit
Review: So hard to shop for these items on amazon - size was off but easy return policy. Also hard when bra size is like 44B because the bras lose their attractiveness in style and look.

Title: Bad stuff!!
Review: The reviews spoke highly of this, I'm here to say for me this was absolute hell!!! Completely broke my face out badly!! Less than 24 hours after using this, my face broke out badly it burned it was horrible. Battery acid would've been better probably!!

Title: Already Broken
Review: Two of the earrings were broken

Title: The liquid is ORANGE; YUCK; I’m so turned off I won’t put this on my face Review: This is the first time I ordered a face product for review that I absolutely refuse to try on my face and I have tried some smelly and nasty creams. Had I known the solution was orange and very liquidy, I would have NEVER ordered it. I actually thought it was the color of the bottle. SURPRISE!

I put it in my hand ready to put on my face but the color was an incredible turn off. I rubbed it into my palm and it left a slight tangerine tinge to my skin that I had to wash off with soap and water. My palm did not feel moisturized either while it was on.

No matter how good this might be, there is no way I would ever use such a colored serum. The $44.99 price is also outrageous for this watery colored solution.

Title: Perfect for gift giving!
Review: This is a super nice lavender bath set for women. It includes everything you need for a terrific home spa day. I love the lavender scent which is full bodied in the bath but very light on your body so you get a full aromatherapy feeling when bathing. My skin felt super moisturized after my first 'treatment' and my legs especially (which have a tendency to be super dry) feel smooth and silky. I love the reusable gift box this set comes in. Would make a great and very thoughtful gift for a teacher, parent, friend. Highly recommend!

Title: The pump does not work so it is impossible to dispense the product correctly
Review: There is nothing that irks me more than not being able to get the product out of the bottle as designed. I tried pumping for about five minutes and when nothing would come out, I opened the top. I do not see how this solution can pump from that little nub that goes into the bottle. Nevertheless, I did squeeze some out to try it. It is moisturizing to my eyelids and under the eye but I do not like the smell. This would have received 3 stars if the pump worked.

Title: This little keyboard works great Review: This keyboard works great and fits the Ipad Pro 11 2nd generation perfectly.

The reason for 4 stars is the keyboard is held in place magnetically, it seems to hold ok. I would feel more secure if it had something else holding it in place. Other than that, it's great!

Title: Garbage
Review: so tight my 14 year old couldn't even get on her feet . Garbage.

Title: it works but not long enough
Review: It works but could last longer I get an hour

Title: Not worth the cost
Review: This is my second tablet but by far, my least favorite. The sound quality is terrible, you are forced to use ear buds and even the case is a total pain as it collapses constantly.  I truly hate it. I thought there would be a learning curve but I'm no further ahead as when I purchased it. It has a quirky noise, like some type of alert that is annoying as I can't figure out how to stop it. I am truly very disappointed and think this is a colossal waste of money.

Title: Sheer beach cover up. Review: Sheer caftan beach cover up is to wear over your bathing suit.
The design looks like it is gold dots, but the design is little punched in tiny gold out-lined holes.
I would wash this in a zipper laundry bag, as other clothes in the washer could get caught in the holes, and rip this. Or hand wash it.
The color is white, and the material has white small threads weaved in, which looks good.

This slips over your head, with a large V neck opening.
The cover-up measures about 34 inches long from the shoulders to the bottom, and about 39 inces wide. Size. Medium.

The shape is Square, and wide.
It looks like it is a large peice of material that is folded over, with the large hole in the middle to put over your head.
For the sleeves there part of the Width of the material, and sewed down about 10 inches, from the top,and about 5 inches from the side, which is
What makes the sleeves also.
The sides hang longer then the front and back

I’m 5’2, and this comes to my knee’s.
I think this is over price.
3 1/2 stars

Title: Too big& no smaller size to order. (5But I like it)
Review: I ordered the smallest size the 16& it stretches soooo much. The length is great, covers my fupa. The bust is good, it holds everything in. Just too big around the middle but it's kind of clingy so I'll keep it.

Title: Almost impossible to open once folded; otherwise, they work for both eyebrows and eyelashes Review: At the current price of $11.99 for six folding eyebrow / eyelash combs, that comes to $2 each, which I consider expensive. The combs work well and are comfortable to use but the problem is that it is almost impossible to unfold the comb once folded. The reason is that the head of the comb sometimes goes too far down in the handle and there is nothing to grip on to. I had to use a tool to release the head. If the comb is not pressed down far, then it is easier to unfold. I am very disappointed because of this. If it had a silicone grip, perhaps that would make these better.

I was going to rate these five stars because they can be used to both separate eyelashes that have mascara on them or used for the eyebrows. I would use these for both. If one is not going to fold these, then the work.

Title: Love it!
Review: I don't know why I didn't think of buying one of these before. I live out in the country and it is pitch dark by 4 pm. Using this, I'm able to walk my dog back to his pen and stack firewood on the porch after dark. Hands are free and the lighting is great. I find I use the bright setting more than the low setting for walking outdoors. I like the fact that this item came with 3 AAA batteries and installation is easy. I really love this item and will consider giving this as a gift in the future.

Title: Cleans well; lather and fragrance just okay; too expensive Review: I love fragrance and this soap does not smell anything in the way of citrus. It has an okay aroma that I can't even describe but nothing I really like. Also, it lathers just okay but it does clean well. It also comes with a net bag that can be used for washing if I put the soap inside. I personally prefer to use it without the net.

At the current price of $19 ($22 minus $3 coupon), this is way too expensive for what it is. I would not even purchase it for $6 because I'm not crazy about the scent or the suds. It works but is not for me.

Title: Great while it lasted
Review: The speaker blew out within over a year of use.

Title: 😔
Review: 😔

Title: Almost works
Review: I've used this dock quite a bit over the past few months, but today I ran into an issue that renders it useless to me. An 8TB drive that was partitioned on another PC as a GPT partition, shows up when inserted into this dock as a GPT Protected Partition, meaning it's inaccessible. Another dock I have reads the disk with no issues when plugged in to the same USB port. Whatever the cause, it's a problem I can't work around, so this dock just became trash. Others may not run into this problem, but I can't recommend this dock.

Title: Love them
Review: Tunes are coming through and that’s all I care about. Sounds good 👍

Title: Comfy, soft and warm!
Review: Super soft and roomy, this will be a great sweatshirt to have this fall/winter. It fits me great (a little loose so not hugging my tummy) and it looks great with a pair of jeans. Also super warm, so it will definitely be a great sweatshirt for me to use during the cooler nights. I will be buying a couple of more to alternate colors. Highly recommend this fleece sweatshirt for everyone.

Title: Don’t waste your money
Review: Doesn’t even go 20 yards

Title: Stopped working after 2 times! Review: Stopped working after 2 showers
It was great at first then it stopped working after two showers. I was going to send it back but missed the deadline. This is cheap- don’t waste your money.

Title: Similar to the Tile locator Review: This is specifically made for iPhone 6/6s. It also comes with a case. You have to be within 150 feet of the item in order for it to be detected. In order for this to work, you have to use the case provided or the pixie needs to attach to your current case. I love my current case so I didn’t not opt to use the included case. The pixie that comes to attach to your current phone case is bulky and not very secretive.
My phone paired easily. When opening the app, it shows the location of the item where the pixie was last updated. The pixie is very similar to the Tile locator, but I prefer the look of the Tile moreso.

Title: Excellent product
Review: I've been using this for years and I love it.  I think it makes me look younger and rested.

Title: Cute but hurt my daughters feet
Review: At first I really liked these but then the inside mesh area seam/where the stitching meets messed up my daughters foot pretty badly. Won't be putting them on her again. Wouldn't recommend at all but maybe its just her pair...Sad because they are useful and pretty cute but not worth the tore up feet

Title: Easy to install, Quality is questionable
Review: Easy to install and provides more than enough extras than you need to install it but the extras make sure the install is perfect. My issue is I’ve only used this screen protector for about 2 weeks and already have multiple big scratches all over the screen. Almost positive I did not do anything that should cause the type of scratches I have. The only thing I use on the screen is the Apple Pencil so that would be the only culprit. Other than that, I enjoy the screen protector and the is has a good privacy angle especially when the screen brightness is around 50%.

Title: It does not fit an IPad Air 1st generation.
Review: returned

Title: Great product
Review: Great product

Title: This didn't work for me
Review: I tried using this to touch up my roots  it didn't look right.  It might be because I still have a lot of dark hair mixed in with the gray, but it didn't cover my roots.  It might work better on someone who is completely gray.

Title: husband now a believer
Review: My husband has poo pooed my Kindle for years.  He travels a lot... and decided he wanted to try one.  He LOVES it.  The 8HD is the perfect size for travel... easy to stow, easy pull out...easy to use - even for him.  :)  He buys audio books and likes to stream movies.  We did go for the 16GB so he could store a movie or two.  So far, he is a fan.  I actually own 3, my husband's is #4.  I haven't had one day of trouble with a single one.The pricing is SO amazing, if you've been just thinking about one, it is definitely easier to consider!  I say do it.  I always update with any issues.

Title: Overall good quality.
Review: The legs fit a little snug and are longer than other brands. That is the classic fit I suppose. Overall good quality.

Title: Style rec’d differs from what I ordered; these are loose and thick Review: I ordered the black socks style and I received the navy socks. These are made of 91% Acrylic, 8% Polyester, and 1% Spandex. They are thick, warm, and loose. They feel comfortable but since they are so thick, I have to wear them with my large boots. Overall, I like these socks but the style one orders may not be the one received.

I do not feel these socks should cost more than $10 and the prices on Amazon are all over the place depending on style.

UPDATE: After more washing these socks have strings that pull apart inside. I personally do not like that so I lowered this from 3 to 2 stars.

Title: Too cheesy sleazy for a child
Review: Was dress was way too short and it all just looked cheaply like most Halloween costumes at a box office store like Walmart but it just didn’t seem appropriate

Title: Pretty, but way too small
Review: These socks look great but run really small. I used mine as a Christmas stocking over the fireplace

Title: Make good house slippers
Review: I have flat feet so these were perfect, they are also warm and have a good grip.  I wear these as house sleepers because my feet get very cold in regular slippers.  I also have to let the dog out and don't have to worry about slipping.  Was a good buy and will buy more when I need them.

Title: Disappointed.
Review: Looking for high gloss and got peeling within a day. It's turned my nail bed an unusual color as well. My nails look horrible using this.

Title: I was only able to get it to work sporadically
Review: I bought this to use on my iPad Pro and it works fine at first but eventually stops working every time. It does the exact same on everything I've tried it on, so I don't know if its me or the cable.  It's not the only one I haven't been able to get to work properly.

Title: Don’t pay full price Review: I didn’t pay the price these dresses are currently listed for. I don’t recall what I paid, though.

The quality of the fabric is not good. It has a sheen to it on the outside. The fabric is a bit stiff. The motif seemed okay. The cut of the garment is a bit off. It just doesn’t fit well. The sleeves were way to long for me.

I ordered a large, which was probably the best size for me. The length of the dress was good, but the sleeves too long.

Title: Yeeea
Review: I brought a swimsuit from Shein and for $13 it fit Great, but I’m a 44DDD and the bust area did not give the support I needed. My mom actually suggested getting something like this to pair with the suit and I’m glad she did. It worked Great for what I needed it for. (See before and after pic). I haven’t actually gone swimming yet due to Covid-19, but will update the review once I do that.  I wouldn’t necessarily recommend this tube top alone as a swimsuit but under what I have, it seems as if it will work just fine. Fast Prime shipping considering the coronovirus as well. Great product!

Title: Irritates My Eyes
Review: I am always looking for good, gentle face cleansers. This one sounded promising. It has a light, refreshing citrus scent to it which smells very nice. It doesn't produce much of a lather which I don't mind. It didn't irritate my skin which is somewhat sensitive. However, it did irritate my eyes. I did not get any of the product into my eyes, but I did get it near my eyes. It caused some stinging (not burning) and I did have to blot my eyes with a towel before I could continue with my shower.

Title: Works and fits my phone
Review: I got a set of 2 for less than the price of  1 in the big box stores. I have only used it for 2,days but it fits my phone and charges quickly.

Title: Don't know why I didn't get one of these years ...
Review: Don't know why I didn't get one of these years ago..it's saving me $9 a month rental fee i was paying Comcast

Title: C+
Review: Smaller then exspected

Title: Ok for a repeater, disappointing for streaming media.
Review: This was a simple enough device to setup on my home network, however I am very disappointed with the transfer speeds of this device. This was intended to host a sub-network for work and my printers and other wireless devices. Due to the speeds of this I have reverted back to using the routers built-in wireless features. If your looking for a relay device than this will work. I am not impressed with the speeds of this model for what I would like to do.

Title: Battery life is excelent
Review: Runs smooth and fast. I might add the one negative is the sound is not very loud with all the way up and even with hearing aids or with head set on

Title: Great value pack of three bras!
Review: These are a great value. Three bras that are really well made and are very attractive on. They are considered full coverage but still show cleavage. I love the way these fit and look on me (I wear a 38C and they fit me perfectly). I highly recommend these reasonably priced bras in a value pack.

Title: Great quality earrings, really cute design!
Review: Absolutely love these earrings. I have been wearing them several days a week since I received them and have got loads of compliments. These are a perfect size, hang well in my ears. They are substantial, but not heavy and well made. They are really attractive, too, and look like they should cost a lot more than they do. These would make a great gift for someone you love or just to by for yourself. I highly recommend them!

Title: “Snail Secretion Filtrate” Biopelle Tensage Intensive Serum 50, 10 ct. Review: It really works! I used every day, twice a day for 5 days and my 50 year old skin is noticeably smoother and softer. The packaging is attractive. The tubes took a moment to figure out how they work. The serum goes on and feels like a liquid gel that doesn't absorb right away. Your skin is shiney once it dries and feels tight not soft nor sticky. Very interesting and no tingle.

Luckily I didn't find out til after that the product is “Snail Secretion Filtrate”, that info lowered my enjoyment of the product from a 5 star to a 0 star. I'll keep my wrinkles, thanks.

Title: 5 stars for the first 6 months, its worth the money though! Review: This would be a 5 star, after a while the product wears down. I bought this product about 6 months ago and since then it's worked great! I like in the country (like woods and farm fields for miles) and commute bout an hour, to the city for work and school. It works VERY well. However just recently the wires have started to wear and tear. So my music comes in and out and I gotta fiddle with it a lot so music comes out of all my speakers/:
For as cheap as it is. I can say I got well over my money's worth!!! I recommend it if you're looking for something cheap. But it will break eventually. Just treat it well!

Title: DO NOT BUY
Review: very small, itchy, little scratchy, not worth it at all.

Title: Good quality
Review: Perfect

Title: Moisturizes well; not too greasy; absorbs in a few minutes; not crazy about spicy aroma Review: This body oil absorbs in a few minutes. It moisturizes well and is not too greasy. However, I am not crazy about the spicy aroma.

The current price of $35 is very pricey for this 8.75 fluid ounce pump bottle.

Title: Loreal Paris makeup mascara
Review: Eh.  I am always up to try something that is supposed to make your natural lashes look like more.  It did lengthen my lashes, but didn't really make a great impact. Further, it was clumpy.  And flaked off.  Overall -  BLAH.  Not worth the extra step of the white prep and then the black clumpy mascara.

Title: Good socks
Review: Seamless and think but with all the excess material inside my child with sensory issues will not wear them so defeats the purpose I feel. Nice and thick though.

Title: Long Term Life is Questionable; Seagate not good quality drives now
Review: The first one of these I got was DOA, but Seagate replaced it quickly for me at no charge, other than my cost to ship it back to them.  Seagate gives a 2-year warranty on their products and from what I understand that's because the expected life of their drives is only two years.  I have had too many failures with Seagate drives, although a drive from any manufacturer can fail and I have had other manufacturer's drives fail too.  I think my inclination now is not to buy Seagate any more.  There are better brands out there, but the bargain priced drives in any brand are usually the cheaper, less reliable ones.  You get what you pay for.  Just be aware that anything you put on a drive from ANY manufacturer should be regularly backed up in another location.  These days you probably want to buy 1TB and above anyway and not a 500GB, although it depends on how much storage you really think you might need.

Title: Nice quality BUT not a shirt for Big Guys!
Review: Size runs really small.

Title: Ended up liking it Review: When I first took the shirt out of the bag, I was thinking “Oh great, an oversized tshirt”. It looked too large.

I loved the color (green). It was perfect for what I wanted. The material is good quality. It has a very light sheen and an attractive weave. It was a tad large and I am keeping it, but I think a smaller size would work. I ordered an XL. I am 5’4” and about 170 lb. I wear a 38DDD bra.

I wore it today with Christmas leggings. It worked well.

Title: Five Stars
Review: really good shoe. . . .looking forward to purchase another pair in a different color

Title: Rose gold Micheal Kors watch
Review: Perfect :0)

Title: C type USB charging cords
Review: To be honest - I purchased these because they are gold colored cords that matched my phone and car... they work great!

Title: kiss clasp coin purse
Review: Says that it is black leather... might be.  The closure is a silver colored material that is sharp in certain areas - which is disappointing.  But the worst is the SMELL.  It is horrible.  I've put it out in the sun for 2 days, used Febreeze and nothing can cut the smell.  It's an old musty smell. I'm afraid anything coming near it is going to pick up the stink. Horrible.  So - in the trash it goes - not worth the effort to return.

Title: Purple ones don’t stick, but others work ok
Review: I almost gave this product one star because the first color I tried was the purple one and they don’t stick at all and I was so disappointed. I even tried 3 of them. I tried pressing really hard with the included tool and couldn’t get it to stick at all and watched several you tube videos to try and figure out what I was doing wrong. Then I tried the other colors and got them to stick and then you press and file the ends and then pull off the excess and it worked decently. But I found it a bit difficult for me and my daughters would definitely need help doing it themselves. I also found the applicators unnecessary and would have preferred just having them put them on sheets of plastic to pull off. I like the idea of these and maybe with more practice I can get them to work better. They were easy to peel off after putting on yet seems like they stayed in place really well until I was ready to remove them. Love the idea these though.

Title: Pretty clips in three interesting patterns; minor clip-face imperfections Review: These clips stay put in my hair and hold well. They are easy to open with one hand. There are also extra teeth (see photo)on the inside to grip my hair. Except for the leopard-like pattern, the other patterns are not easily matched with outfits.  Also, if one looks at the clips real close, there are minor imperfections in the glue that holds the pattern on; at least that is what I think it is (see close-up photo of polka-dot one.)

The current price of $9.99 comes to an expensive $3.33 per clip.

Title: Very POORLY made!!!!!!
Review: Very poorly made.....Ripped apart while trying to put on headphones!!!!

Title: Runs small, order up
Review: Cute, but runs small so order up

Title: The only Advantage is that you don't have to use Bluetooth.
Review: The sound quality is muffled as though you are under water. The headphones feel a little bit sick and bulky around the ears and the headband is non-adjustable, so I'm me it's it's a little wide. There is no noise cancellation as you can hear everything in the environment around you and the sound from the headphones seems to diminish overtime in comparison to your environment. There is no volume adjustment control only a stop-start button on the microphone attachment. Does down my microphone attachment does not work (tried it on my phone & game controller).  The only Advantage is that you don't have to use Bluetooth, everything else about these headphones is trash!

Title: Medium-weight cream that is moisturizing and has a nice scent but doesn’t absorb well
Review: I like the pump on this cream. I just press the top and it dispenses upward. Then I scoop the cream from the top to apply. The fragrance is lightly perfume-like and pleasant. It is medium weight so that it is perfect for fall, winter, and spring. However, even though it is moisturizing, it doesn't absorb fully. My face still felt tacky even 15 minutes after application and it never fully absorbed.

Title: Great reasonably priced razor that performs like more expensive brands!
Review: This is a great wet/dry razor at a great cost. My husband has typically used a Remington razor on and off for the past 5 years and has even opted for standard non-electric razors when he was attempting to get an even closer shave. When I saw this Braun I thought I would let him try it and I am happy to say he is thrilled. He now has one of his closest shaves ever and he loves that he is able to use it in or out of the shower and that it keeps his skin feeling optimal, soft and smooth. This unit fits ergonomically in his hand and the rotating head makes it easy to manuever around some of the most delicate areas on his face. As I mentioned, he is thrilled with the way this razor performs and I know he will be using this for years to come.

Title: Difficult to Apply
Review: I found this eyeliner to be difficult to apply. The brush was good enough - a mix of firm/flexible, but it holds a lot of product which comes off unevenly when applying it. When playing around with it, I was able to get a thin line at my lower lashes, but I couldn't get a smooth line at all  instead I kept getting a choppy line. It requires precision which I'm not good at with eyeliner. While it didn't sting or burn my eyes, I did notice that my eyes were a bit sensitive to the liquid eyeliner. It came off easily with eye makeup remover.

Title: Can’t do anything with them
Review: Not crazy about these. I think they work but they are so large and cumbersome it’s hard to do anything when you have them on your fingers.

Title: Not worth the price tag.
Review: Bottle arrived broke and the cream scent does not last very long wears off quick also not worth the price tag it has will not buy again.

Title: This is not a typical mask; it rolls on thin, is fragrant, & smoothing but I prefer exfoliating masks to this type Review: NUXE is a French brand. I buy and use several NUXE products (such as [[ASIN:B000E1EWT0 NUXE Contour des Yeux Prodigieux Anti-Fatigue Moisturizing Eye Cream, 0.5 fl. oz.]] which I love) but this one is not for me.

This is a fragrant anti-aging mask. I just turned the cap to on and rolled on a thin film of clear "serum" on my face and neck, waited 10 minutes, and removed it. My face smelled great because the product is fragrant and my skin felt soft but not plump as specified. Personally, I prefer exfoliating masks to this type. I'm glad I got the opportunity to try this but it was not for me.

One big negative is that it is hard to find the English instructions on the tube and box (both inside and out). The best instructions are on the inside of the box.

If I were the type that preferred a super light mask that feels almost not there and has no exfoliating properties, then I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: Nice fabric Review: The top is made of a nice fabric. It is soft and doesn’t wrinkle real easily. I got the brown. It isn’t really brown, but maybe a taupe. I did like the color. It isn’t the best as far as construction. Some of the seams were off.

The top was also a bit large for me. I followed the size chart. I ordered a 2xl. I weigh about 175 lb. I wear a 36 DDD.

Review: Great value, very giftable

Review: Thought this was the full charger. The description can be misleading if you don't read carefully. I should say I was looking at aseveral options and maybe didn't read careful enough, but still . . .

Title: Like dirt, Literally
Review: This is the worst product I think I have ever tried is stuffed into the cap like dirt, the color is so unnatural it was horrific.

Title: Great Belt
Review: Love this belt. Bought it in 3 colors!!

Title: Works as designed, but not easy to install
Review: To be honest, I had a lot of difficulty getting this Screen Protector installed on my Ipad 3. I am not sure if it was me or not, although I do some other reviews here where others have said the same thing. That said, once it was on I can say that the protection and clarity of the protector is great. I do have a tendency to mess up screens with my fingerprints and this does relieve me of that. I think there are a few glare factors here, though, which is why I rated this as a 4 and not a 5 star product (in combination with the difficulty of application).

Title: Bigger than expected
Review: When these arrived, they were all chirping and playing a tune. My IT friend stated that was a very poor sign of two things; one they had likely been activated before, and two, who knew when the battery was new?? These are set to last maybe 1 year and you throw them away. They were not sealed or protected in any way that would suggest they were new. Lastly, they were much larger than I expected. I would compare them to a 50 cent piece (even though they are square) - where other brands I looked at indicate size of a quarter. I did return these.

Title: One Star
Review: Trash!

Title: Beautiful
Review: I can only give it 2 stars it took weeks from wherever it came from. Quality is not good I got a blister for the first time where it was sewed it was rough and it is though to put this shoe on wit the elestic backstrap. I actually blame Amazon because they should tell the good customer like me that it comes from  country which is not an American or EU country. I did not send them back because it is a hassle. Nice shoe but do not recommend it buy these in Walmart. I am a great lover of Amazon but they have to change this happens to me often with China products I would never buy them if I would know it come from such a company they do not care sizing and bad material.

Title: blonde metal free ponies
Review: I love love love these.  They are just the right "blonde" color - meaning they are not brown. It's kind of a beige color in my opinion - I see a very very slight pink tinge (my opinion). No tearing or pulling out hair as there are no metal pieces.  They are thin - but not too thin and not the super thick ponies either - so you can use in more ways - different hair styles.  I find them the "just right" place.  You get a whole bunch of them too (100) - which is good because with all elastic - eventually, with time and heavy use, they lose a bit of their stretch.  This batch will last me a looooong time.

Title: Cheap look, cheap fit, cheap wear
Review: limp as a dishrag that has been used too many times.  So sorry I bought this blouse.  fabric is not linen, don't know what it is, but quality is not up to the usual minibee standard.  I have lots of other blouses from them too.  Will think a couple of times before I purchase another, carefully read the reviews and then consider if it is worth taking the chance.

Title: Soft comfortable leggings that are see-through and lack any tummy control Review: These leggings are true to size. They feel soft and comfortable and are made of a slinky feeling material. However, they are see-through and there is absolutely no tummy control. There is a one-inch elastic band for the top of the waist that sort of floats in the high-waistband pictured. The small elastic band actually helps accentuate any tummy bump.

These wash well in the washer in a lingerie bag but I hang them to dry.

Note that if these were not see-through and it did not highlight my stomach but instead offered the control it claims, then I would have given this five stars. I do love that the leg part comes past my ankles and not above the ankles like most leggings of this type.

Title: The best collagen boosting treatment on the market!!
Review: This Doctor Babor product is absolutely amazing! It goes on super lightly and is absorbed quickly into my skin. I recently used this with my microneedling machine as a serum and my skin looks healthier and younger than it has in years. My crow's feet have been greatly diminished and my cheeks just are radiant. This price is typically out of my price range, so I am using it sparingly, but I do have all intentions of purchasing another because of how my skin looks. I highly recommend this collagen boosting treatment for everyone!

Title: OPI red polish
Review: In these days of NO mani/pedis... I thought I would like to polish my own nails for the holidays.  This is a terrific holiday red.  And typical, high quality OPI polish.  While I will never get a job as a nail tech, I managed to have pretty red nails - as long as you didn't look too close.  Painting red nails is a bit of skill!  But if you're going to do it, always use OPI.

Title: Noticed no difference
Review: I have used this cream for a while and it is moisturizing, but I did not notice any difference in the firming and toning part. It probably just does not work for me, but I will continue to finish this tube.

Title: Too fragrant, causes breakout.
Review: Too many fragrance chemicals, caused skin breakout.

Title: NOT 100% cotton
Review: 45% and 55% Written in Chinese so I’m not sure what the materials are.

Title: Strong disposable DRY tissues; must use soap & water for these to work; they smell & are $$$ Review: There is one box of 50 tissues (a.k.a. dry wipes). These are stronger than regular facial tissues and are a tiny bit padded. One side is more exfoliating than the other. They are also a generously sized 10"x11" and not 10" x 12" which means they are 1" shorter than advertised and the reason I took off one star. I use these with soap but I can also use these with toner or a facial scrub and they work well. They are useless dry unless one is using this to sop up moisture. They are durable so it seems a shame to throw them away when done. They can be re-used to a certain extent.

The current price of $13.01 ($13.99 minus 7%) comes to a super expensive $.26 cents per tissue which is the reason I took off another star. Besides the sizing being wrong and the expensive price, I do not like the smell of these when wet.

Title: Soft and comfy
Review: I’m very happy with this soft and  comfy top.  Looks great with jeans and leggings.  Will be ordering more.  It’s a bit lightweight so I wear with tank tops…cute.

Title: Smell not as strong
Review: Normally I love Tom's deodorant because it's long lasting, and this one is, but I am disappointed in the lemongrass smell and it seems to smell worse as the time goes on. The best description is an incredible light lemon smell mixed with herbs. I was hoping for something more strong lemony and this is not.

Title: A little underwhelmed. Started pilling within hours! Review: I know of Merrell. It's a brand that makes high quality things, which was why I was surprised with these socks.

The good: the blue color of these is vibrant and the socks fit as expected.

The bad: they were pilling after only a few hours of wear (around the house, no-less!) See the pics to see what I'm referring to. Obviously not the end of the world, but if it's pilling after a couple hours around the house, I'm not sure about its long-term durability.

Title: Good hair removal device
Review: This is a good (not great) hair removal device. Super easy to use (instructions are clear), the device is simple to maneuver. I have been using it for well over a month by now and I still see some hair growth, so not sure how great it works compared to another device which I had used a few months ago on my legs. I can recommend, but not fully, depends on your hair growth and what part of your body you are using it (in my case, underarms).

Title: beach cover up
Review: I purchased this with the intention of hemming it to a shirt length... I may still... however, if you are busty (I am NOT dolly - but am a 38DDD) it is kinda tight across the chest... I was hoping for a little looser fit across the chest area.  It is a filmy chiffon type material.  I intended to wear a spaghetti strap top underneath.  Also the pic shows a kind of red and white print... but here are purple flowers that are MUCH more visible in person, in case that matters to you.  I still like the print.. just wish it were bit looser on top.  Hope this was helpful to you in some way.

Title: Nice shoe
Review: Shoes nice, made well,fit great, color didn't mstch dress.

Title: heel gel socks
Review: Can't possibly fit over any normal size adult foot!  They are sooo tight you can't put them on!  I am sad because I really like to support Made In the USA products with heart and soul.  I have average size adult feet for a female, size 8 normal width.  However, this product cannot be sold to adults as wearable.  Dang it.  I cannot recommend purchasing these.  :(

Title: Long scarf that is best worn outside outerwear due to the tick pompoms
Review: This scarf is long, comfortable to wear, and wraps two times around my neck. The pompoms on bottom make it impossible to use this under a coat or sweater. This is a scarf that has to be used outside outerwear. Also the pompoms feel and look like dyed human hair in various colors of brunette to burnt orange.

Title: Something is different this time.
Review: This is my second order of Gellen UV Builder Gel. The first order was fine but the second order will not stick to my nails. I have tried different bonders, thicker coats, thinner coats, but no matter what i do the gel just falls off within a couple hours. Not sure what is different with this order but I will be trying another brand next time.

Title: Micro usb fabric wrapped cables
Review: These are GREAT.  Don't tangle and a length for every use and convenience.  I( travel a lot so I end up needed a variety of lengths depending on what I'm doing at the moment.  These are great and travel with me in my " cord organizer" pouch. (If you travel, or just like to be tidy - I highly recommend the organizer pouches).  The fabric wrapped cords generally seem to last longer and stand up to coiling and uncoiling in my personal opinion.  I would definitely buy these again if I needed them.

Title: Not as advertised
Review: Says 2 In a pack.  Only 1 arrived

Title: Too small in boob area
Review: I really like this dress and was very disappointed when I tried to put it on. The boob and shoulder Areas Are way too small. I got the 4X because I wanted it to be very loose and flowy because that's how I like them. Too bad I can't where  now.

Title: These look like theyre for Review: These look like theyre for...how do I say this?....older women .
They're kind of geriatric/orthopaedic looking, even with the shimmer

Title: Charged and ready to go
Review: I purposely held on to these for several weeks after I got them to see if they truly were fully charged and ready to go, as advertised.  Indeed they were fully charged and I tried them in a lighted mirror and then in a flashlight.  I use the flashlight quite often and so far the batteries seem to be holding up quite well.  I have not yet needed to recharge them.  They seem to be quality batteries and will save having to use disposable ones, which cost more in the long run.  I may buy some more next time I need batteries.

Title: Love these!
Review: Comfy and cute.

Title: Four Stars
Review: I don't use the polishing feature, but the unit assists filing toe nails.

Title: Strong synthetic brush head rips out hair as it detangle; brush head is somewhat easy to clean Review: There is one large brush in the box but the plastic tines are super strong and rigid. As a result, this has a tendency to rip out my hair as it detangles. Nevertheless, this is easy to hold. Note that I have fine short to medium curly hair but the nylon bristles on this brush are way too rough for even that length of hair.

I do like that the brush base can be removed from the handle and disassembled so that the brush can be cleaned. This is its best feature.

The current price of $3.50 (6.99 minus 50%) is reasonable but after trying this, it is not a brush I would use. It is best for a person with very short hair since the stiff tines will rip out the tangles in longer hair.

Title: Good buy
Review: Works as expected, holding up good, no issues, good buy

Title: Read the poor reviews first.
Review: Got it, the pattern was very cute. But the snaps! Ugh! You don't have to touch it. They just pop open. I didn't heed my own title.

Title: Looks like a piece of old fruit cake; it’s oily but moisturizing but I threw it out Review: This reminds me of a lump of date nut bread or a piece of old fruit cake. It feels slimy / oily in my hands, particularly when wet. It is moisturizing. I do not care for the earthy smell nor how this feels during use. I really thought I would like this soap but I do not. It also stains my washcloth a chocolate brown that looks like skid marks on underwear.

The current price of $7.99 would have been on the high side of competitively priced. I will only be using this for my hands because I just do not care for this highly unattractive bar of soap. The only redeeming quality is its moisturizing effects.

UPDATE: I tried using this for my hands only and hated it. It colored my white sink a tea stain brown and became slimy. It is almost like washing with dirt. I threw it out and I do not like to waste anything but I cannot stand this soap no matter how moisturizing. Therefore, I lowered my ranking from 2 to 1 star.

Title: ABSOLUTE RUBBISH
Review: Before I started anything more, vendor refunded promptly that said both nail clippers broke first use the scissors are small, painful to grip and do dull they don't even cut. Find better quality

Title: laptop bag
Review: This a useful, canvas laptop bag.  Has a suitcase stripe on the back to slide the bag on the handle of your suitcase (game changer - trust me) and a shoulder strap/handle. Fits my 14" wide laptop perfectly with plenty of room for the cord, mouse, pad and my tablet too.  I am very happy with it.  It's a plain black.  Sometimes I get out my silver and gold sharpie pens and stencils designs on the them to make them more personal.  Haven't done that yet - but the bag is canvas and would be perfect for the stenciling.

Review: Fit as expected, didn't come with a padding/lining like shown in the photo. Returned

Title: Moisturizing, not-exactly scentless soap with decent but slippery lather Review: Although this soap is supposedly scentless, it is not exactly without an aroma. It smells a little bit like Castille soap, which I am not crazy about. However, it lathers and cleans well and also feels moisturizing but the suds are a bit slick.

The current price of $9.87 is expensive for one bar but it is competitively priced.

Review: Besides the product arriving with the corner broken off, it would NOT have fit on my 13 inch MacBook Air laptop. I held it up to my laptop and it was way smaller. Almost seemed like the size of a large iPad.

Title: I wanted to love these sandals
Review: I wanted to love these sandals. I liked the design and the straps hold them to your feet so they don't make that constant slapping noise that flip flops usually make. And as far as flip flops go, they are comfortable. But the issue is that for some reason, they don't hold to my feet right so they are constantly getting pushed out the back and I'm having to stop every so often to scoot my foot back in it. It's frequent enough that I don't even really consider wearing them for anything that would take more than an hour, its that annoying to have to constantly readjust them.

Title: Don't buy if sold by woot
Review: I bought this thinking it was me, but I'm pretty sure it was refurbished even though it wasn't stated on the page. One of the ear buds died out and i haven't had that issue with soundcore. IF IT'S SOLD BY WOOT DO NOT GET IT, IT'S REFURBISHED ITEMS.

Title: Eh I wouldn't buy it again
Review: This is a really pretty case but it's a pain to get the ipad in and out of the case and it doesn't really stand up because it's kind of poorly designed.

Title: Cheap feeling clips that only hold on one side Review: There are four blinged out clips in this package. The clips look and feel super cheap. Also, they do not hold my hair well at all. They either hold on the left or right side of the clip but not on both sides and I cannot explain why. I used this on the back of my hair and when I seated it fully, the tip side of the clip provided no hold even though there are teeth throughout. I then tried the tip end only and that gripped onto my hair. I tried all the clips and they are all like this.

At the current price of $9.58, this comes to a very expensive $2.40 per clip. I do not like these at all. It feels and performs like I got this from the dollar store.

Title: Comfortable Outfit, Right Fit?
Review: It's comfortable and roomy but maybe a bit too big for me.  I also am unsure about the stripes direction.  Do I look like a jail bird?  I might restrict this outfit to around the house.  A thinner woman might be more comfortable wearing it.  It's comfortable I'll give it that.  How do I look?
