Title: Gave it as a gift to my great niece to put her new Kindle Fire for kids ...
Review: Gave it as a gift to my great niece to put her new Kindle Fire for kids in it. She already had Kindle in a rubber cover but it fits all of it and her charger. She loves it.

Title: Great little boom box Review: This is fantastic for taking out working in the yard or camping, easy to transport, decent battery life and does bluetooth or sd card. Perfect for the price.

Update 6 months in... battery is now subpar. You can barley get a couple of hours out of it, I tend to charge it now multiple times a week and I only use it to listen to music while cooking for an hour or two. I stopped taking it camping, since I can't charge on the road. Well... I guess it needs to stay home and hooked up all the time now. Still good sound for the size, but isn't that portable anymore.

Title: One of the two pairs of Danskin Now pants I ...
Review: One of the two pairs of Danskin Now pants I purchased had an unsewn seam (5” long) in the back of the pants, which was pointed out while I was wearing them.  Massive fail in quality control!  I have purchased multiple pairs of Danskin pants in the past.  Will not purchase any more.

Title: Works
Review: Great serum to add to my daytime routine after using Clindamycin. I have sensitive, combo, acne prone skin. Nice scent. No complaints.

Title: Great facial wash for men!
Review: My husband has never been a 'metro-sexual' male, but I am finding as he is getting older he is taking skin care seriously. This is a great face wash and he loves using it either before he shaves or at night before he goes to bed. He loves the great light tropical smell (coconut) and I like that it contains oils for moisturizing and vitamin E. The name Schick gives him confidence too that this is made for me (not girly-girly).  He really loves this wash!

Title: Runs Big, long, and boxy cut. Review: The blouse looked good till I tried it on.!
I ordered the medium 5’2, 125 lbs. white, this looks big and boxy shapeless if you let it hang over wearing jeans. I look heavy, this is not flattering.

It’s long, came to the top of my legs and I’m not stocky . If you notice in the picture she has it , that tucked
In look, so it’s hard to tell how long and frumpy this really looks. I think it only looks good tucked in All around , but since it’s so long that’s allot of bulky material to tuck in!

The long sleeves are see threw , that is ok, the shirt is Not see threw it’s lined, and a nice pattern to the material.
If you want to hide your butt and body this shirt will do it.

Title: Reading
Review: I love this kindle and even more that I can read outside.

Title: Great Brand of Zinc Oxide Sunscreens
Review: This sunscreen is fantastic. A lot of zinc oxide sunscreens are greasy or chalky but this has a great consistency - it's thick and rubs in well. I prefer not to use chemical sunscreens because they don't block the full UV spectrum.

Title: SD Card Not Received Review: I received a photive Original LP-E8 Battery, but the Transcend Card was not included but the status reads it's been RECEIVED.
Per the online guidelines, it reads that some packages can read "RECEIVED" but come a day later, but the battery was already received and this card has still not arrived. Therefore, at this time not pleased at all, although this seems a bit unusual to occur with Amazon, I am afraid of where my money went.

Title: gift

Title: Limited use
Review: It's good as soon as you put it on, but it doesn't last very long at all.  That's while playing tennis in hot weather.  It may suffice for other sports.

Title: Great dress for summer
Review: Super cute dress for summer! (Baby doll style hides any problems in the middle!) make sure you get the right size for your chest measurement- I bought 5 different ones! With some strappy wedge sandals you are good to go! (Might be a bit short for tall gals.)

Title: Colorful, spacious wallet; holds many cards; zipper can be sticky Review: This is an attractive tri-color (light pink/white/beige) wallet that is perfect for summer. It is not leather but instead made of the typical cheap faux leather materials Americans have become use to. The front fold-out section includes six credit card slots (one of which is a full ID slot). Behind that are two full sized billfold slots. Opposite that section is room for another six cards. The zippered section contains a double billfold. As long as the billfold is full enough that the zipper does not collapse in on itself, then the zipper opens and closes smoothly. However, if the billfold is not full, the zipper is sticky. The tassel is a nice touch but can get caught on things found in an ordinary purse.

In the pictures I attached, a blue plastic film covers the clasp and should be removed to expose the rather imperfect golden embellishment. I have since removed it (see last photo).

Overall, this is a decent wallet for the price. It feels cheap but is functional and holds a lot. The zipper is sticky if the billfold is not full.

Title: Top heavy
Review: They are great little lights if you can get them to stand up. They are a little top-heavy and can easily fall over. I don't think the base is wide enough for them. Doesn't need to be any taller but does need to open further so the base is wider.

Title: Soft and spacious leather wallet but mine arrived with imperfections Review: This is made of 100% leather and it certainly smells like it. However, it feels like it is made of PU leather. It is very soft and has one billfold, a mesh ID window and room for four more cards behind that. It also has room for eight cards in the centerfold.  In total, there are enough slots for 13 cards if we include the ID window.

At the current price of $48, one is paying for the Calvin Klein name. However, at that price, this wallet should have arrived in perfect condition. Instead, there are scratches and imperfections on the front of the one I received (see last two photos).  

It comes in a giftable box as shown in the first photo.

Overall, I like the wallet but I do not love it due to the plasticky feel and the imperfections.

Title: More of a decorating bow than a ponytail holder Review: These bows are gorgeous with the electric pink color full of glitter. However, they are as stiff as cardboard or hard plastic. Although they can be used as a ponytail holder, they are more suited to a package topper or some sort of "breast cancer" decoration than something for the hair. They are not only big, but the stiffness makes it difficult to apply. I was able to get this on my head but then I have short-to-medium-length hair.

The current price of $10.99 for four bows comes to $2.75 each which is very reasonable. Personally, I do not feel these are suitable for what they are being advertised for simply because of the incredible stiffness of the bows.

Title: Wow
Review: This was my first pair of Sketchers and I honestly only got them because they were on sale for $20!!But they are Sooooooooo Comfortable!  I’m normally a 9. They fit true to size. No complaints! And this won’t be my last pair!

Today is my second time wearing them though and the thigh just ripped, that's literally never happened to me before. Cheap

Review: Poor design

Title: Ratty, see-through, thin, ugly pinkish brown pullover sweater Review: I own their [[ASIN:B07TTQ6PS3 Actloe Women Open Front Hooded Long Sleeve Fleece Cardigan]] which I really like. Therefore, I am incredibly surprised at how ratty, thin, see-through, and ugly this pinkish brown pullover is. It has no warmth and is really unattractive. It is still useful in that it can be worn over something else. However, I personally hate this. Their cardigan I mentioned above is thin but at least it looks nice and feels warm, super soft, and comfortable.

This sweater looks like it has been worn for years and is on its last leg. I am so utterly disappointed.

I attached three pictures. The first photo is how shrink wrapped it is for shipment and the last two photos show the see-through quality and what they call a "brown" color that looks like a washed-out pink to me.

Title: good and cheap
Review: Had for about a month now. Still running strong and keeping my twc ultimate internet on all 8 of my houses devices. Goes through three rooms and I'll lose just a small fraction of speed (10mbps loss for a ranch style house).

Review: They work for a week and then they are not comparable anymore

Title: Salon quality for home use
Review: I have owned several microneedling devices over the years, but I can say this is one of the best. Easy to use, easy to maneuver,easy to change out heads to customize the treatment. I love the way my skin feels a couple of days after treatment. I used to get this done in the salon years ago, but this Dr. Pen does the trick just as well. For the price of the device, I used to pay far more for a single treatment in the salon. Highly recommend for all people and all skin types.

Title: Good quality
Review: Looks great..fits well

Title: High quality and works very well. Review: This is much higher quality than expected. Doesn't sag like other long extension mounts I've used.
It's a bit difficult to extend and retract, but I think that's a good thing so it's not flopping all over.
Highly Recommended!

Title: That was fine for two days - then started using tuner again ...
Review: Bought this model at Target in August 2015 - nearly exactly two months to the day in October the disc player stopped functioning correctly. At first all was well. Then listened to radio for about two weeks and went back to CD player and it would play a disc for about 1 minute then stop playing. Reinserted discs..tried all different play modes to no avail. Then unplugged the unit from the wall and replugged and it started working again. That was fine for two days - then started using tuner again for a few days. Then went back to CD player and it was doing the same things again only now it won't work no matter what I do. It might play and entire CD up toward the end and then just suddenly stop playing for no apparent reason. From there it all goes downhill no matter what. Going to take it back to Target.

Title: Another great Vichy facial care product!
Review: This is a really nice serum at much less a cost than that on other quality products. I love Vichy products in general and this serum is no exception. Goes on easily, absorbs quickly and I see a definite brightness in my skin and complexion after just using for less than a month now. I highly recommend Vichy for all your skin care needs. Don't spend hundreds of dollars when you spend less than $50 and get the same results!

Title: Card
Review: Dull and definitely no with the money !

Title: Meh. Not great, but does work Review: Well, I'm not impressed by this unit. It works and is fine for basic stuff like a kids movie night in the back yard. As a alternative to a regular television, keep looking.

The bluetooth is only for external speakers not for streaming from a phone or tablet. You can mirror cast via WiFi though. Unfortunately, I wanted to use this in an outdoor setting with no WiFi. We ended up downloading the show to an SD card instead.

The picture quality is not 4K or really high definition by the time you download and replay from a card. It's tolerable for an outside gathering certainly, but not as an every day viewing option.

The included screen is pretty flimsy, but it does work. I would expect to see this in the hundred to hundred fifty dollars range at the most

Title: Not great Review: Ordered these as I am a fan of keeping vests as my go to basics. Was not impressed with them (especially as not particularly cheap). Washed on hand wash and dried on a clothes horse and the quality is terrible. Lost their shape and look as if they are ten years old already after only one wash.

Also the straps are way to long and end up exposing my chest unless I keep pulling them up. Not impressed at all with sizing or quality.

Review: The eyeglass holder is attractive. But it doesn’t feel sturdy - the size of the beads is much smaller than pictured. Also, the lanyards that hold the arms of the glasses loosen easily.

Title: Kinda hurts, but okay overall
Review: They lose audio for like .5 seconds, every 20 minutes, I also thought the ear shape would be useful but it actually hurts my ear somewhat, If i use for more than an hour

Title: Hat is too small; gloves will stretch to size; scarf is itchy
Review: This is a gorgeous hat, glove, and scarf set until I tried it on. First of all, the hat is small. I have a small head and it fits over my head but feels like it is going to pop up. I do love the fleece lining inside. Second, the gloves are on the small side but they will stretch to fit. I love how the fingertips are touch screen enabled (i.e. three conductive fingertips) for use with a smartphone or tablet. The scarf is long and generous and overall very nice, except it itches me. This set is thick and definitely deep winter warm. The current price of $25.85 is even competitive; however, this set does not work for me due to the small hat size and the itchy gloves and scarf. The Amazon site says this is made of acrylic and polyester. I suspect the itchiness comes from the acrylic.

I  have not traveled so I dont know about it coming apart to pack it.  I do think it is sturdy but if you you dont open it all the way up it will not stay at the height you want it to be at.

Title: awkward
Review: I gave the swimsuit 3 stars for the "hold you in" part... BUT... the way the skirt and waist are sewn, when you have it on, it looks like the skirt is longer on one hip than the other... It's an optical illision, but it is... awkward looking.  That's the best way I could describe it.  If you are one of those tiny size 2 people, it may be less awkward.  I also found that the deep dip in the back was not flattering if you have ANY back fat, as most humans over 30 do. Listen, at $160, I expect the suit to fit well and look well made.  All in all, I was disappointed and am returning the suit.

Title: Application takes forever!!
Review: I really wanted this to work due to COVID and my desperation to cover up my dark roots. The problem is they give you a teeny tiny brush to apply the powder. I don’t have that many hours in the day to do this. Try Rootflage instead- it comes with a fluffy powder brush and a smaller brush. I bought both. If they made this with a bigger brush it might work better. The color seemed to work well. The problem was the application.

Title: not for large cranium - tight fit
Review: light and does its job, but if you have a large cranium then this is a 'tight' fit that was challenging to lock in the closest button and it felt tight around the head. i was glad when it came off - it needed extra 2 inches all round.  other major brands are more generous with the material .

Title: Runs small get a size up
Review: This runs small. It's super soft and really cute I just ordered wrong.  I gave it to my mom and she loves it. She wore it with jeans and some cute black booties.

Title: Great man's moisturizer, fragrance free and leaves skin super smooth
Review: This is a great man's moisturizing cream. Goes on smoothly, absorbs quickly into the skin and is fragrance free. My husband applies this after shaving in the morning and his skin is silky smooth and, to me, looks healthier than ever. I did ask him about how the caffeine worked and if his skin felt 'energized, and he told me he could find no discernible difference in his skin to support the 'energize' claim fo this cream. I am deducting one star from this review due to the price factor. I mean, for half the price of $24 I would have him use Nivea and I am sure he would see the same result for less.

Title: Just wish the cord was a little longer
Review: These work well but it's terribly inconvenient to try and find a place to plug them in with a short cords. I realize that exact length of the actual Fitbit ones but I have told them to I am unhappy with the length of the cord

Title: Three Stars
Review: They are ok but leave nails alittle ragged.  Does not leave a smooth finish.

Title: Was built ighter than my smaller stand was.
Review: Too light weight for me.

Title: Mild lather & hydrating; scents uninspiring; reminds me of Castile laundry soap bars Review: There are a variety of three large bars of soap in this package (vanilla coconut & oats, peppermint coconut & lavender, and coconut ginger & lime). All the soaps smell pretty much the same to me and do not have the aroma of the name. I can't describe the smell except to say that these bars remind me of Castile laundry soap bars.

I tried the vanilla coconut & oats and the bar is slippery to hold. The lather is moderate but it is hydrating. I feel clean using this but am not crazy about the aroma.

At the current price of $29.95, this comes to $9.98 per bar which is on the high side of competitively priced. Each bar is 7 ounces (200 grams), so they are large but it is still expensive.

Title: Adequate support
Review: This bra does an adequate job of providing support.  It is just as effective as much higher priced wire-free bras.

Title: Looks cheap

Title: Excellent product

Title: Reliable and easy to use
Review: Update:  so, a little over a year later, this device does not hold a charge very long anymore. I’d be lucky if it lasts a couple of hours. I’m actually surprised it lasted this long but  i’d say I got my moneys worth out of it! I use this product on my GL1500 Honda Goldwing. Since my iPhone 7 does not have a headphone jack, I bought this so I can plug my auxiliary cable out of my radio into this device and I am able to stream all of my stuff from my phone via the Bluetooth feature. I bought this particular brand because it was a little cheaper than the Griffin brand, but it is basically the same thing and so far the battery life seems pretty good for such a small device. It seems to last about 3 to 4 hours before needing a recharge. I use it for music and GPS.

Title: It frees up your hands.
Review: I read my kindle a lot and this pillow helps my hands.  Also use it with my tablet.  It does just what I wanted it to do

Title: Cheap plastic crap
Review: It’s been here for less than one week and it’s broken already. It worked fine twice, and then upon trying to use this the third time the sound was different. Then noticed that the top head part with the mesh that touches skin wouldn’t stay on, and thus would NOT work. The clip that is supposed to hold that part in place is missing. The razor hasn’t even finished using up its first charge yet. I’m disgusted. I’d rather buy another brand since I’ve noticed that this is a repeated problem for other customers, as well. Zero stars more likely.

Title: Runs small, so order up
Review: Ordered 2x, but fits like an xl and its a silky material, so you know those are smaller, too. Order up

Title: Cheesy, not sure this ia real, and chips dyed! Review: This is big..I do not believe this is a real crystal, More of a type of Glass, Plastic maybe!
I live in the moubtains in California, and do have crystals in the ground here. I also have been collecting different crystals from
Around the world for many years.

Title: fitbit 3 perforated bands
Review: I purchased these after market bands because the 'large' I got with my fitbit 3 was WAY too big.  It's amazing how much better 1" less in the band fits.  It comes with three colors.  The only thing I am not really super happy about is the silver tone buckle - I am nervous about nickle content as it is an allergy thing for me. The original is black and matches the band. You get 3 full bands, One black... one gray.. and one light aqua blue - it's more of a very light gray blue.  They are a rubbery ? silicone like? material. Smooth, no sharp edges.  They attached easily. So far, so good.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Convenient
Review: What a great idea!  My Nook has a micro port, and I had to get my glasses to see which way the connector went in.  Now I don’t even have to look.

Title: Natural lava pumice stone
Review: I purchased this because I wanted a natural pumice stone.  Works great. It is black - natural pumice. The curve is helpful when going around your heels and rounder parts of your foot.  I just hope it's not from the big island - that's super bad luck. :)  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All of my reviews reflect my honest, personal experience with the reviewed item - your experience may be different. I am not influenced by any outside source. I receive/accept NO free products or discounts that are not available to all shoppers- ever. For some reason our shopper ranks are no longer visible - so, to give you a little more info about me, I am a top 50 reviewer (#30 the highest rank achieved). Those numbers used to fluctuate over time - up and down but I noticed that they stopped updating regularly - perhaps to phase them out.  I've been doing reviews for over 25 years with Amazon - nearly 6,000 reviews, viewed over 50,000 times, nearly 24,000 likes.

Title: Great brush with nice handle grip but I do not care for the rubber tire smell Review: This brush has mostly boar bristles interspersed with nylon bristles. It is generously sized and the silicon-like handle feels great in my hands and keeps it from slipping. I have short to medium-length curly hair and this glided through my hair easily. The bristles are sturdy and the combination of boar and nylon functions well together. My major disappointment is the rubber tire smell. That smell is offensive to me. Other than this, this brush works great.

The current price of $15.99 is on the high side of competitively priced for this brush.

Review: This was a pretty good case for the money. Buy it's quite a bit louder than I expected.

Title: Not good for a close shave; only works on hairs about ¼” or more Review: At the current price of $30.99 I expected a bitter razor. This set includes one trimmer with base, two double-sided guide combs (9mm/12mm and 3mm/6mm). a brush to clean the razor, one USB power cord for charging, and a user guide.

After charging this for several hours, the clippers by themselves work only if the hairs are about 1/4" or more. The on/off button has to be "press held" to operate this razor. What I do not like is that I kept accidentally turning off the unit during use because the on/off button is right where one would hold the razor when cutting. This is a big negative to me.

The head can easily be pushed off for cleaning and then snapped back in place.

In summary, I expected this razor to cut closer without the combs, so this is a bit disappointing. I also did not expect that it would keep shutting off during use due to the placement of the on/off button.

Title: A great camera
Review: Problem is, it's supposed to be able to link with my phone. It doesn't

Title: Soft and warm
Review: Great toddler slippers!

Title: Purchased one month ago, they work. Hard plastic compared to Apple Original cord.
Review: I like that it works.

Title: The calf opening measurement is a bit deceiving Review: The boot overall was very good, and I can tell it would be a warm boot. I actually did not buy this because the calf measurement ended up quite deceiving.

I have very wide calves, about 19" and I thought THIS IS IT, I FOUND THE BOOT! But it's the 20" opening plus the removable liner (8mm x2 is approximately .62", so slightly larger than 1/2" SMALLER for the opening. Also, the 20" is not what was measured, it's slightly smaller, so I could not fit my calf in with the liner.

Well, why not take the liner out? Turns out, you NEED the liner for the proper fit for your FEET. If you take the liner out, you would need multiple layers of socks to fit the boot right AND your ankle support is basically nonexistent.

Overall, I think the boot is a good boot, good price too, not sure about durability. But I feel like the specifications are slightly deceiving as they are presented.

Title: Order a size up other than that these are nice jeans!!
Review: These run a little small my son wears a 10 in all other brands except this brand. They are nice jeans but order 1 size maybe even 2 sizes up.

Title: Overall cute and useful
Review: Writing on the shirt doesn’t make sense. Hat is wayyyy too big. Shirt and shorts are very soft and comfortable for my little guy to wear. I ordered 12 month for my 7 month old, they fit him now but there is also some growing room

Title: Too pink and too drying for me; needs a lip gloss
Review: Based on the photo, I expected this to be redder with a bit of a glisten. However, this is way too hot pink for me. It also feels very drying. It also did not glide on my lips easily as some other lipsticks due, so from this perspective, this truly is a crayon. The only way this works for me is if I tone it down with another color and pair it with a lip gloss.

Title: However I noticed the corners of the screen are never in focus like the center is no matter what we tried
Review: For the price this works well. My friends and I used it a lot during my deployment. However I noticed the corners of the screen are never in focus like the center is no matter what we tried. For the price I have more then got my use from it.

Title: Serums is incredibly hydrating & absorbs quickly but dispensing eyedropper is horrible Review: After using a toner, I applied this to my face and neck. It absorbed quickly and left my face and neck incredibly hydrated. I absolutely love the results. However, it is super difficult to get the product out of the container. The eyedropper does not suck up the fluid and I had to try about five times just to get enough for one application. I will have to hit this against my palm to dispense the product. For $36.95, the package it comes in should work flawlessly. This is the only reason I rated this 3 stars. If I have difficulty getting to the product, it is not worth much to me.

Note that everything except for the directions and one other sentence are in written Korean.

Title: It's good if your buying new ones every 4 months
Review: I bought a blur set from this company because it was Amazon's choice and had good reviews.  However after about 4 months having it it died and will no longer turn on. Also the battery life I'd about 8 hours at best. I have had different earbuds that lasted for a whole 24 hours before needing charing

Title: Clogs razor; takes forever to wash off; it's terrible; went right in the garbage
Review: Even though the tube is sealed, it leaks all over the cap during shipment (see photo). This goes on like cold cream without any lather. I tried this under my nose and on my chin and it gave me a wonderfully close shave and tingled. HOWEVER, it went right in the garbage because the shave cream DOES NOT WASH OFF the razor. I had to replace my razor blade after using this cream for 30 seconds. It's horrible, horrible, horrible. What good is a close shave if the razor gets clogged after first use. I ordered this for my boyfriend but wanted to try this first. There was no way I was going to give this to him. I actually spent 15 minutes trying to get the shave cream out of the cap and I still could not get it off. It just would not rinse off. This is not worth it at any price. If it worked, $9.99 for 4.2 ounces is expensive anyway but at least one could somewhat justify the price. Into the garbage it went.

Title: Nice gift package of winter necessities!
Review: I have been using Nivea products for years and you can always depend on the name for a good solid quality product at a reasonable price. I love this gift pack, it is great for a stocking stuffer during the holidays. It containers hand moisturizer and lip balm, so great to have during the colder winter season that is so drying on the skin. The hand moisturizer is my favorite. Goes on thick and creamy but absorbs quickly. My hands feel soft and smooth and definitely better looking than they did a month ago since I have been using this. I do wish the gift packaging was a little more 'elaborate' but, the products are great. Highly recommend!

Title: Not as described
Review: Does not work with a bluray player eventhough it claims to in the item description.....What a waste of time...Description needs updating!

Title: Generous Cut, Great Hood, Unattractive Sleeve Graphic, Not Very Warm Review: This women’s UNDER ARMOUR RIVAL FLEECE SPORTSTYLE HOODIE (Lc Sleeve Graphic; Medium) fits me (size 12) beautifully. It’s generously cut, but not “oversized”, so it fits over other clothing even when zipped. The big hood is especially nice--it’s NOT one of those afterthoughts that pulls at your shoulders when you wear it up.

The fabric is a cotton/polyester blend that isn’t very warm, despite the brushed fleece interior. The garment is the right weight for cool summer nights or fall days. It’s well made, as you would expect from Under Armour.

I really do NOT like the Under Armour graphic on the right sleeve. It probably makes the wearer more visible to cars, because the printing is bright white. However, I see the graphic out of the corner of my eye, and keep thinking that I’ve spilled something on the sleeve.

As a design element, the small “Under Armour” identifier that repeats from shoulder to wrist isn’t at all attractive. I’d like this garment much better if it had a great big “Under Armour” logo splashed across the front.

Title: It Works!!
Review: I had a cold sore for the past 7 months that would not go away. It was very small but would just not go away. I tried Abreva, Herpecin-L, oragel for cold sores, the Mederma cold sore patch, lip clear lysine+, alcohol, peroxide, And lysine tabs. I was at the end of my rope and was just going to get a prescription. UNTIL I tried this. I applied alcohol, this lip product and took the lysine pills 3 times a day and it was gone within a few days. It is Very moisturizing and lasts a long time on the lips before you need to reapply. I especially like that I can apply it at night and it is still thick on my lips the next morning. If does not slide off. Good value for the money and flavor. Buy it!

Title: Wonderful wet/dry razor! Would make a great holiday present for the man in your life!
Review: This is my husband's new favorite razor. He originally said to me that he really didn't need this, but after reading all the positive reviews, he was sold. This shaves closer than his old Remington and holds a charge longer than any razor he has owned and used. The LED display is clear and bright and easy to read. He also loves the low battery indicator and the pop up trimmer (somethings his old razor didn't have). If you are on the fence to switching from a standard non-electric razor to an electric, this is the model to pick. You will never return to a standard or disposable razor again. Couldn't be happier.

Title: Unique Style

As much as I like the look of it, I was disappointed in the quality. The containers are not very stable. When I first held it, I thought that the pieces might be removable because some of them flexed and moved a bit. Also, it doesn't completely lay flat. It should be okay if you are keeping it on a flat surface and don't move it much.

Title: Joint and muscle bath salts
Review: Smells really nice... but.. the bottle is super small.  You might be able to squeeze 2 tubs out of it.  Eh.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Very comfortable, lightweight, and durable. I wear glasses when I play golf and these are perfect.

Title: Doesn’t have a clean aroma; leaves a pink ring but works like a bath bomb Review: [[VIDEOID:1a96241d8bd9f03d06e12a7c205e7bc0]] For $9 for one bath bomb, this should smell like heaven. However, it does not have a clean aroma at all; smells like dirty dishes to me. It fizzes nicely but does not last long. The bomb dissolves to reveal a cheap plastic ring young children love.

I used this in my foot bath and my feet felt like I only soaked them in water. When emptying my foot bath, which is where I used this, it left a pink ring around the tub. I personally do not care for this. I do feel, however, young girls might but it is neither fragrant nor is the surprise alluring.

It's pretty enough.. and it adjusts for size easily by removing pieces without any special tools...but once we removed enough fitter pieces it was just too hard to use.  We moved on to stretch bands (no closures) and some regular style watch like bands. If you are really dexterous, I'm sure you'd like this band it just didn't work for us.

Title: Runs big

Title: Nice facial cleansing brush but needs a few improvements
Review: I used to go for facials a minimum of 2-3 times a month and occasionally a microderm. Now that I am retired (April19), I have had to cut back to only once a month (to save some money). So, when I saw this cleansing tool by Revlon, I thought it could be a great alternative to expensive facials and be able to stimulate collagen and cleanse my face. For positives, this is easy to hold and maneuver, brushes are easy to exchange out and it is small and portable (great if I travel). For negatives, the speeds don't really go fast enough for me to get a really good cleansing and the battery doesn't hold a charge for more than two days worth of use. I also think that having to replace the brush heads is eventually going to get expensive if I do it regularly (like they recommend). Anyway, it's a nice brush but they have somethings they could improve.

Title: Fan basically does nothing but still a great display
Review: Let’s get this straight, I bought this item as a laptop stand first and a laptop cooler second. My new desk came with a full desk mouse pad and I couldn’t just keep my laptop sitting on that. I loved the rgb lights and went with this one immediately. The build quality is good, but as the title says, the fan does practically nothing. It works it’s not broken it’s just so weak there’s almost no air pushed out. So if you want something to actually cool your laptop, this probably isn’t the product for you.

Title: Yikes. What you see is definitely not what you get. Review: Terrible, Low Quality material. Would have returned it but I already washed it. Material is much thinner than it appears in photo and would probably only keep you warm if you sat in a sauna. The photo material looks like a thick polyester material you would HOPE is inner lined with fleece. Keep dreaming.

The outer material is actually a cheap cotton tee shirt-like material with an abrasive texture on inside that mimics sweats but not quite.

After two washings, the hood ties are already fraying apart at the knotted ends and have almost completely faded, even while using Cheer color guard. They definitely overpriced this product for the quality you receive. Don't bother.

Title: Suits My Needs, Some Quality Issues
Review: I needed a surge protector that would fit in a specific space, would sit flat on the floor (some narrow ones tend to roll or twist) and would accommodate several large power packs. This fit my needs perfectly. I have my laptop, phone charger, tablet and a desk lamp plugged in without any crowding. The reason for three stars instead of four or five is one of the sliders that close off the plug area just fell off  a week after it was delivered and I couldn't for the life of me get it back on. I swapped a plug around so it wasn't any big deal but I was a bit disappointed that it would begin falling apart so soon after purchase.

Title: Very fine oil. Improvement around mouth. Review: I have been using Mario Badescu Rose Hips Nourishing Oil for only a few days.
I’m older, although my skin is more on the oily side. I do use moisturizers & eye cream everyday, but this is the first for a oil for me.

I notice this goes right into the skin so fast, I wondered where the oil went too, My fingers or face!
That said, for me by the end of the day, my face is more oily, and feels heavy.
I Do not notice that my face broke out, which is a good sign.

This bottle is very small, and there are other ingredients fillers in this besides the Rose Hips.
Not sure its worth the money !!!

If I notice a improvement in my skin I will be back for a Up-Date.

I have a UP-DATE, in a short time.
I have been using this around my mouth, upper lip etc. I notice the little lines are not
looking as bad. I think this is starting to improve that area around my mouth.

Title: Nike shorts
Review: These shorts run very small, so disappointed, don’t buy.

Title: So soft!
Review: My husband loves it and so do I!

Title: A little goes a long way
Review: I have been using serums for years now. This OxygenCeuticals Couperose serum is really nice. Enriched with collagen, it goes on easily and is absorbed quickly in my skin. After using this exclusively for almost 2 weeks now, I can say that my skin is noticeably smoother, healthier and has a glow it hasn't had in a long time. If I had a problem with anything at all it would be the price, but you only need a small pea size amount for a full application. At this rate, I should have enough to last me for at least 3-4 months. Highly recommend!

Title: Cute top Review: What a cute tunic. I ordered the green in a large. The green is sort of a forest green. It is a nice color. The material is nice. It has a good feel and thickness.

I am 5’4” and weight about 174 lbs. I am busty. The large fit perfectly. The cut is flattering.

Review: We returned the boots and got something else.

Title: You may want multiple pairs Review: I needed a new pair of gloves and found these. They are attractive. They fit me well and have some stretch. They can be worn for a variety of events.

I thought I lost my pair, so bought my second pair. I now have a spare pair.

I later purchased a white coat, so I noticed I could get the same style in cream\white. I purchased them, of course!

Title: Hawaiian tropic spf 30
Review: I always buy this brand when I know I am gonna have some sun wherever I may be going.  Works really well.  Doesn't feel sticky or greasy.  Pleasantly lightly scented.  I recommend it.

Title: What a beautiful TV. The price was fair
Review: What a beautiful TV.  The price was fair.  I original ordered a smaller model, but since it was backordered, the seller offered me this model at the same price as the less expensive model.

Title: Wish it worked better
Review: I've had nothing but problems with this extender.  I'll first start off by saying I do work in an IT field, so it's not lack of expertise in the area.  The device just fails to deliver.  I've mainly used it as a repeater in attempts to give a better signal to an outdoor camera but all too often the camera will lose connection to the device.  I've tried numerous devices through it and the connection / speeds have always been spotty.  Granted I could try running an ethernet cable to the device in attempts to create a better environment for it to succeed in but that was not the intent of it's use from the beginning.  All of these devices, including the outdoor camera, maintain better signals and connections to my WiFi router without the extender in the mix.  I, personally, would steer clear of this device unless I'm just unlucky and have a poor performing unit.

Title: I only have 1 issues.
Review: Love the colors, texture, and  Everything about them...  My only issue I had was the fact they would unravel and fray really bad..

Title: Really Nice Swim Shoes
Review: These shoes were super for summer time at the pool!  Our local pool has a very rough bottom so I was able to swim with these and they were so comfy I forgot they were even on.

Title: Poor quality, stopped working
Review: After a few months of use the contact pins failed and would no longer charge. Could have damaged device. Good idea but too poorly made and designed to use safety.

Title: Too big of a brush to be useful to me; also too expensive
Review: This brush is way too big. It reminds me of a paddle brush.  I have short to medium length fine curly hair. This goes through my hair fine but I find it awkard to use. Also the current price of $18.99 is too expensive for this even though some of the bristles are boar. The handle is also cheap feeling.

Title: too much dye!
Review: this product has too much unhealthy dye and chemicals in it.  i do not recommend.

Title: Excellent sound quality, great home theater system!
Review: I already have a Bose system (worth about $1500) that I use in my living room. I was looking for a system for use in my family room with a new 3D television I had bought around Super Bowl time. I got the Sony BDV-N7100W system and I can honestly say that at about a third of the price of the Bose, the Sony excels with sound quality. I love the wireless speakers and have them spread out over about a 25 ft. area. The sound is incredible with strong lows and highs. The 3D Blu-ray player is also flawless in quality and completes my home theater system to a T. My teenage sons absolutely love this system and are spending more time now in the family room than the living room (solely for the reason on using the Sony). For the price, this Sony system can not be beat. The quality is wonderful, it's attractive and compact. Not a bad thing to say about the system, go for it.

Title: Clip broke
Review: These are a great way to add some personality to your bags and I loved it so much but unfortunately the clip broke on both the straps I ordered. The strap itself if so well made and I can see it lasting years but the clip is not the same quality and so unfortunately I will not be ordering any more.

Title: Pretty to tie up wet hair but not terribly absorbent; I prefer the thinner Turbie Twist brand to this one
Review: This turban is not as absorbent as I expected. I purchased this in Home Goods for under $6 in emerald green. The turban is plush, wraps easily around my hair, and ties well with the loop and button. I was disappointed with its absorbency, however. It almost reminded me of waxed paper in the way it felt like it resisted water. Although, this is a beautiful turban, I won't be purchasing another one. I prefer the thinner and more absorbent [[ASIN:B00OJ7784G Turbie Twist Microfiber Hair Towel]] over this.

Title: Great priced and great moisturizer!!!
Review: This is a great skin care product that is very reasonably priced (especially when compared with the more expensive brands). It is light and absorbs quickly and is non-greasy. In fact, I was very impressed at how quickly my skin 'drank' this up and my arms (in particular) feel amazingly soft and smooth. I am now using this as my go-to after shower full body moisturizer. Very light fragrance, it will not overpower any other perfumes or lotions you might use. This is the best $5 or so you will ever spend and you will find it quickly becomes an every day product in your home as well!

Title: Five Stars
Review: Cute and cuddly robe. This sells for $36 at the Disney store, I got it for $4.60!!!!!! Thanks Amazon!!!!

Title: love these shoes
Review: Great shoes. Nice ensoles. Very comfortable at a great price

Title: AmazonBasics Wireless Keyboard and Mouse Combo - Full Size - US Layout (QWERTY)
Review: Keyboard measures 18.3 by 7.3 by 0.8 inches. First wireless keyboard for me and the setup instructions were basic. There is no power switch for the keyboard. You put the mouse dongle into your computer, make sure Bluetooth is set to 'on',  and it will 'pair'. Why I am giving the gorgeous keyboard 3 stars is that the keys are 'sticky.' I am not one who pounds their keyboard and that is what you have to do. For the oldsters out there it is 'stickier' than an electric typewriter. I find myself tapping the keys and missing letters. The stickiest is the space bar. Final analysis is that it is usable just not as responsive as I am used to with the wired keyboards I have used.

Title: Just okay
Review: I’ve used jewelry tattoos before but wanted different designs than my usual brand. These were just okay. They come off a Much Too Easily. My old brand would take about 2 days, even while showering. This brand has a clear film that transfers with the gold or silver design and it just doesn’t look as great, although I liked the designs. I wouldn’t purchase again.

Title: Ugly rips.
Review: Rips in odd placement so bending your knees is very uncomfortable and they’re also not flattering.

Title: Seem to be good quality; no failures yet
Review: I have only burned about 4 of these DVDs before writing this review, but so far, no problems with any of them.  Over the years I have bought a lot of different brands of DVDs and CDs, but found sometimes there a bad one in the pack and also that some of them fail after a few years.  For that reason, I now usually only buy a few top brands.  I thought it was worth trying the Amazon brand disks, even if they aren't one of the brands that I normally buy.  From the looks of them, they appear to be made by a top manufacturer with acceptable quality and I fully expect them to last for a number of years.  Time will tell, but I think these are worth a try.  Note that the price is not the best price you can get.  This is only a pack of 30 and you can get a pack of 50 for about the same price with some other top brands.

Title: Slips at the Heel
Review: These are really cute and I want to love them, but they slip at the heel in my regular size.

Title: Helps those pesky hang nails
Review: I’ve got this oil in dropper bottles scattered around the house and just apply it willie nilly all day and night. Keeps the cuticles soft.

Title: Perfect
Review: Soft, warm for in house wearing during the cold months.  I can even wear them on non-snowy days to take the dog in the yard.  I have trouble with my feet but these I found very comfortable.

Title: Would be a great set if the brush didn’t smell of shoe polish Review: At the current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3), this brush set would have been an excellent deal. It comes with a large boar bristle brush with wooden handle, a teasing comb, and a "carry" pouch that covers the head of the brush only.

This brush passed through my hair easily. What I absolutely hate is that the brush STINKS of SHOE POLISH. It is probably the finish on the handle, but the smell was so offensive to me, I could not continue to use this. If the brush did not stink, this set would have received 4 stars from me.

Title: Not Seeing Any Difference
Review: I've been using this spider vein treatment for about 10 days so far. I don't have a lot of visible spider veins, but I do have a few areas with noticeable veins. I really haven't noticed any difference in them since I've been using it. I will say that the product description was very vague to me. It says it targets the red threads and appearance of broken capillaries, but it doesn't really say what to expect from this cream. Are they supposed to just fade in color or completely disappear? The jar is a good size. The cream absorbs well. I don't notice any smell to it. I plan to keep using it and if I do notice any changes, I will update my review.

Title: Another great Essie product!
Review: I must begin by saying I love Essie products. I usually purchase them exclusively (like them much better than OPI) and bring them to the nail salon when I go for manicures (I don't like using the salon's reused colors, so I bring my own). Usually only needing one coat, Essie polishes my nails completely and beautifully so that after one coat, all I need is a top coat and I am done. This new color Taj is no exception. I will say, that I didn't care for this color as much as others, find it not as shiny and is more matted in color than I would like. However, I need to rate it 5 stars because of the quality and because it may be the color you are looking for to match your needs. I do love the Resort Trend line of colors and own several of them for summer wear.

Title: lens covers
Review: great quality great addd protection haven't been out in the rain but material seems to be waterproof, quick ship

Title: Great product
Review: I purchased a computer 2 years ago, for some reason I had a problem, within 24 hours they mailed a box and returned my computer in 5 days, they just had to clean it. This product is worth the money. I will always used it from now on, it is inexpensive and they will take care of it. I used to think they would not honor this and I would have problems, not so, no questions asked just great service. I purchased this time a printer, and purchased this product with it, I have no qualms, I feel good to be protected even I might not ever have a problem. recommended highly and Amazon stands behind it, this make me feel good. Thanks.

Title: Love the subtle clay fragrance; do not like the black specs but the mask left my face silky
Review: I applied this to my face avoiding the eye and lip area as instructured. The clay aroma is very nice. The clay glides on except for the black specs that look like chopped up tar paper (or perhaps leaves). I left this to dry between 10 to 20 minutes and then washed it off with warm water. My face felt silky. However, I absolutely hate the black specs that appear to have no redeeming value. They stuck all over my sink and I had to wash them down the drain. If it were not for this, this mask would have gotten five stars from me.

Title: Great storage option for multiple flash drives!
Review: A convenient, smartly sized storage option for organizing and storing multiple flash drives! Great price too. Nice quality of materials and function.

Review: Was nervous about whether or not it would with our older bath lift but it has worked without fail.  Fully charged it the day it arrived and charge it after each use.  So far so good. Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Off-Brand; a little tricky to install
Review: I had a computer expert install this for me and he had a little trouble getting it working, but it does work and that's the main thing.  The only drivers available for this are on the included thumb drive which the installer was reluctant to use.  He said sometimes these off-brand items that include a thumb drive will have malware on them.  Nothing bad happened, so I guess there was nothing malicious on the thumb drive.  The company doesn't have a website, which is troubling.  If I had not received this as a no-cost evaluation unit, I might have purchased a better-known name brand.  But, as I said, the unit works and that's the most important thing.

They are super comfortable, baggy/loose and are great for sleeping or just lounging around the house. I don't like the waist band, found it keeps rolling down when I wear them (have to keep pulling them up). Title: This supposed to be fragrance free but it smells absolutely awful
Review: This is a lightweight cream for the face and neck in a large 5-ounce tube. The cream absorbs rapidly and is mildly moisturizing. However, the smell is horrendous to me. I absolutely hate it. It is supposedly fragrance free but by that it means they do not add fragrance. The natural aroma of this product has me looking the other way. The current price of $9.09 is reasonable for this but too bad I hate it due to the smell.

Title: I love my new clutch wallet/cell phone holder
Review: I love my new clutch wallet/cell phone holder!  It is terrific for holding in my hand or attaching the shoulder chain.  It's really pretty.  I wish it came in other colors.  It holds my cell phone perfectly and has lots of slots and places for credit cards, change, and paper bills.

Title: Alterered Impedance
Review: I added this in-line with two 50-ohm coax cables, and my impedance as measured by a rig expert antenna analyzer increased to 75 ohms.

Title: DON'T WASTE YOUR MONEY!
Review: I needed a small lamp for my desk.  I purchased this one, thinking it would be perfect.  I received it the next day.  It is very cheaply made, but I could live with that.  After installing three different brand new lightbulbs, I discovered the lamp doesn't work.  The bulbs work in my living-room lamp just fine.  I would not recommend this lamp to anyone.

Title: Relaxes my curls too much; not enough lather; fragrance okay
Review: This shampoo is just okay. The lather is minimal and the fragrance is just okay. It smooths my hair too much. I have fine short to medium-curly hair and my curls were too relaxed after using this shampoo. This is not one I will order again.

Title: The fragrance is almost undetectable but this keeps me fresh Review: I love intense fragrance and specifically men's deodorants WITH aluminum because they seem to be what usually works for me. I usually use nothing but Old Spice Swagger solid with the active ingredient of aluminum zirconium tetrachlorohydrex gly 17%. Rarely can I get by with a stick that does not have aluminum. However, this one does not have that ingredient and it protected me for 12 hours until my next shower. Of course, it is spring, so the real sweat fest hasn't yet started.

I take a shower every 12 hours because I sweat a lot, so I can never attest to protection beyond 12 hours. I can barely smell the Coastal Lavender and Sea Salt scent and I have a very sensitive nose. Nevertheless, this keeps me pretty much scentless between showers, which means it works.

This works better than other non-aluminum deodorants I tried previously. The current price of $16 is a bit steep for a 2.85 ounce solid stick. I took off 1 star for the high price and 1 star for the too subtle scent. Otherwise, this is very nice deodorant with a screw top lid.

Title: Wrinkles are real
Review: Just not a great fabric. Wrinkles easily and difficult to iron.

Title: Beautiful but Broken
Review: I love this dress. It's lovely and fits but it arrived broken! The front loop is undone and the tassle is all frayed. I was hoping to just get a nice dress without having to mess with this stuff as soon as it's opened! Disappointed.

Title: Fair
Review: It was only ok just like all the others out there.

Title: Hoodie runs a tad small & waist comes up to belly button; I prefer it much longer Review: This is a nice pullover and feels super soft on the inside. It is all black with white hood ties. However, there are a few things I do not like about this particular hoodie.

First, there is no center pocket to rest my hands.

Second, the waist comes right up to the belly button. I prefer my pullover's to go below the waist. In fact, this is my most hated element of this item.

Third, the sizing is just a tad small. I expected the XL to be a smidgen looser.

I own their [[ASIN:B07PT8X99F tri-color hoodie]], which is almost wonderful. That one also runs small but the hoodie comes a little below belly button and it has a center pocket and partially zippered front. Instead of being as nice as their other one, this hoodie is like a mini-sweatshirt with a hood and is more for a younger girl.

Title: Another fantastic Nivea product! This time it's just for men (lol, well, I think woman can easily use it, too!)
Review: Wonderful product. I must admit I was slightly skeptical given the low price, but reality is Nivea always exceeds expectations. I love the fact that this is made for men. Pleasant, not overly bearing, fragrance. Great little container makes it handy to travel with. And the product itself is non-greasy and keeps my husbands skin soft, smooth and touchable. I love this for after shaving to keep his skin optimal. No man's bathroom should be without this. Would make a great stocking stuffer over the holidays for all the men in your life!

Title: Nice fragrance, great moisturizing effects, but it has to be melted before use Review: I love the smell of frangipani and purchased this on a whim years ago. Although this frangipani fragrance is not as great as some others I smelled in the past, it is still very good. This also keeps my skin moisturized all day. What I don't like about this is that I have to warm it up before using, so I rarely use this which is why I have had this over five years. In order to use I put it in a bath of hot water from the tap and let it sit while I'm taking a shower. When I get out it's mostly liquefied.

Since it's is solid prior to warming it, there is another issue I found. It was never able to fully melt the entire bottle contents at once. As the oil is partially used up there are smaller and smaller "tubes" of the oil that remain solidified. When dispensing the oil that is liquid, that thin tube of solidified oil blocks the exit so it's hard to dispense the liquefied oil. If it were not for this I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: It works well as a router, but doesn't seem to work well as an extender with my linksys router.
Review: The Netgear Righthawk router extender, works great at the speeds specified as an independent router, but it doesn't seem to perform correctly as a wifi extender with my linksys router.  It might perform better with the same name brand router.

Title: Okay
Review: I have ordered lots of stickers like these over the last few years. They are a lot of fun! These are good images. The actual stickers seem to be durable and nice. However, I had several stickers that were sticking to one another. I provided a couple of pictures. You can see that the backing paper is slightly askew from the sticker which causes some of the adhesive to be uncovered. That allows the stickers to stick to one another. Very annoying! There were probably at least a dozen or more of them like this. I went through every sticker to pul out any that weren't kid appropriate. My daughter is working at a summer camp and likes to give stickers to the kids. So I pull out any that may be religious or just not kid friendly. There were only a few that had to be pulled.

Title: Great sock, however it does slip down without elastic
Review: Only rating this as a four star as one the of the problems of not using elastic in the top band is they tend to slip down. I had my son use them for work (he is a school teacher) and he complained that when he was sitting at his desk, his pant legs rose a bit and his calf and shin were exposed because the rolled down. He told me he liked the material, he liked the fat that they are light weight, and he typically does wear Gold Toe socks. He also told me that although he likes these, he doesn't think he would ever buy this variety again because he likes his socks to stay up. However, he knows some men don't like the elastic hugging their legs. So, great sock, great quality, just didn't work for my son's preferences.

Title: Short life
Review: These only last a short time. Than they stop responding and when you try to reconnect you get a "provising" error.  It is great when it works I bought 3 and only 1 is left working.

Title: Bummer - arrived broken
Review: Shipped in a sturdy cardboard box inside a sturdier shipping cardboard box. The mirror had separated from the unit. The Styrofoam that the top of the mirror should have been secured in was too small for the box and was dislodged in shipping. I was able to attach it back but the lighting never worked. It's a disappointment because the mirror itself is terrific and the stand looks like quality.

Title: Ick. Not for me
Review: I don't know what it is about this stuff, but gave it 3 chances and hated it more with each use. So yes, the title is true, it does instantly melt on your hair, which for me made it hard to get through all my hair so I ended up having to use like double my normal amount of conditioner. Then each time it left my hair heavy, dull and sticky feeling. Those fruit micro oils left some kind of waxy type build up on my hair so now I'm going to have to put some baking soda with some clarifying shampoo next time I shower in order to strip it off my hair. Thought at first it seemed like a good deal, but will just throw the rest away which for me is kind of a big deal. I'm cheap and hold on to all my products til I use them, lol.

Review: The smell is so bad and I washed them 4 times and soaked them over night! Buyer beware!!!!!!

Title: Screen protectors
Review: As long as you follow the directions EXACTLY, it’s easy to apply

Title: Brush & comb are slippery; plastic rake is useless; scissor is good; headband is functional Review: At the current price of $24.99, this set is expensive for a total of six items. Included in this set are one large boar / nylon bristle brush with what looks like a linoleum covered handle, one small wooden comb, one plastic brush cleaner rake, one headband, a scissor, and a carry pouch.

The brush glided through my fine curly short to medium-length hair with ease and so did the comb. Unfortunately, they are not easy to hold because the finish is very slippery--particularly on the brush.

The only item that is absolutely useless is the plastic rake. I was unable to get any hair out of the brush using this. Nevertheless, the scissors cut well and the headband is functional. This set is a combination of cheap and decent materials and feels mismatched.

Title: Sound quality wasn't there Review: Wanted a player with decent quality and this one did not fit the bill. Family member agreed.
My first ever time to return an item to Amazon; easy to do.
Have reordered another brand which is an Amazon choice with many favorable ratings.
Hope this works for my needs.

Title: Arrived broken- AVOID
Review: Mine arrived broken and I had to have it immediately fixed. YOU FAIL.

Title: 2.5 stars - I DISLIKE the AROMA but LOVE the lather & the way it leaves my hair
Review: I really wanted to love this 2-in-1 shampoo and conditioner but I do not simply because it smells like rubber to me. Other than this, it washes my hair well and lathers up nicely. It also lightly conditions.  I love Old Spice products and use their deodorants; however, this otherwise wonderful shampoo / conditioner duo is not one I would buy simply because the fragrance is so unappealing to my senses.

Title: Good TV for the price.
Review: The tv overall is really good.  Good picture and better sound quality than I expected.  The user interface is quick and responsive.  I did get a little frustrated with some of the initial set up  - but nothing too bad.  The remote seems a bit on the cheap side - but it works well.

Title: Great for the metro-sexual male in your life who is looking to improve and assist in slowing down skin aging.
Review: I had my nephew use this for three weeks and what follows are what he told me. He was never one to really worry about his skin in the past, but now that he is 34 he is seeing the benefit to trying to begin (and maintain) a new skin regimen. He told me that he really likes the way his skin feels, and looks, and that he finds he is getting a much closer shave then he did before using this. He did say he didn't feel it was truly worth the $169 price and that he could probably do better with other types of skin cleansing machines, but overall he liked the results and will continue to use it every morning before shaving.

Title: Very nice soap bar; lathers/cleans well; plastic is difficult to remove from soap
Review: I love the citrus scent of this soap. The bar is small but that makes it easy to hold. Also, it lathers and cleans well. However, removing the plastic from the bar of soap before use is difficult as it adheres to the bar. Also, the current price of $9.90 for such a small bar of soap is outrageous.

Title: Universal charging cord with mini-B
Review: I guess this would be a great item if it fit our MP3 player. Because of the size of the smaller plug I had  hoped to replace a charging cord chewed up by our puppy (she's teething) but it doesn't fit our MP3 players. It was shown as a 'universal' item but it isn't universal to our MP3 players (android smart tablet style). Disappointing.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Does what is supposed to

Title: Do not buy
Review: Worked great for 3 days. Can someone please explain why none of these charging cables last for Iphone I have to replace constantly. Will be returning this one. I was very hopeful when I first received. Now it is like all others have to turn twist move around to get cord to work stupid.

Title: Yes, it works with Windows 7 Review: It also works with Harmony remotes. It just doesn't do anything especially well. But for 7 bucks I don't see how anyone can complain. I took C. Watson's advice and set it up in my harmony software with the model he suggested and then did a little personal tweaking and it works fine, not perfect, but good enough. Having tried over the years numerous hand held mouse controllers I have found them all hard to use and unreliable. This one is probably the worst but then I don't use it to control the mouse pointer, just to control media player; pause, play, next, previous, full screen or not and mute. For these functions it is adequate and I don't regret buying it.

For those who need and want full mouse functionality from a remote control, this is sure to disappoint. But for those with needs similar to mine, this is a reasonable choice.

Title: Galaxy Tab S2 case
Review: Husband says it works... went on easily - but stays put... He says it would be nice if it had a face cover.  However, it has protected edges. This is, after all, a "case" not a "cover"...  He received the black.  I will update as he uses it and there is something to report.

Title: Eh
Review: Too hard to work with I don’t know if I just couldn’t get the hang of them or what but my hair wouldn’t stay in them or dry after setting for hours in them

Title: boys pjs
Review: These are at least 2 or 3 sizes too small! ( purchased 2 different sizes and both were 2-3 sizes too small!)  And shrunk even more in wash.  They are supposed to snug fitting... but NOT that snug and my grandsons are skinny minnies!  I donated them.

Title: No
Review: I’m a size 16. I got an XL. It was too small. I would easily go up 2 sizes. Also very very very warm and I tend to always be cold. It was about 50 degrees that day. Probably more appropriate in colder climates.

Title: Best value for long-sleeved tees.
Review: As a big guy, long-sleeved heavyweight t’s are my outfit staple. These are proportionate and true to size, withstand washing well and don’t fade. Ordering more.

Title: Bad customer service
Review: This is not what I wanted and have been trying to return for weeks.

Title: Can't answer most of my questions.
Review: Very dumb due to bad programming.  Can't answer most of my questions.  Typical have to ask Google on my phone, which almost always knows.  Most of the skills you can load are bad and a waste of time.  Nice for music (although speaker not good.  Later models supposed to be better.) and controlling linked devices.

Title: Dickies Men's Multi-pack Dri-tech Moisture Control Crew Socks
Review: I ordered several pairs of these socks for a friend and myself / he wears 12~13 size shoe and I'm 13~14 size depending on manufacturer . . . .we like these socks . . . . . they fit us okay; good price . . . .

Title: Excellent at detangling & I love the color but I like my other detangler better Review: I love the color of this brush and its detangling ability is good, especially with wet hair. The brush is hard plastic and works very well. It glides through my fine short to medium curly hair and gets out all the knots. It works well on my dry hair but even better on my  hair when it is wet. The hard tines feel as if I am getting a massage on the scalp. The handle provides a good grip. 

The only reason I rated this three stars is because I love my other detangling brush better. I have a [[ASIN:B0836XT7J8 Heeta brush]] and it is easier on my hair and scalp. Also, the Heeta detangler is less than half the price of this. My other brush sells for $6.99 and this one currently sells for $14. This brush feels cheaper as well. Other than this, it's great.

Title: Stopped working
Review: Stopped working after about the 4th use. Dried nails well with one coat, but second and third coats didn’t dry at all

Title: Nice to too expensive
Review: This is what the Apple TV controller should have been in the original 4K product. It's is irritating they don't offer a trade in program to replace the original crap controller for a discount. Also too bad the battery is NOT replaceable.

Title: Didn't really work for me at all
Review: Didn't really like this at all. I have naturally wavy hair and my usual routine is to wash my hair, blow dry it and then to finally use a flat iron. When I saw this brush I had high expectations thinking it would help dry and straighten my hair at the same time. I found it to do neither. It does get hot but that was about it. It's not easy to maneuver and I found it kind of awkward to hold in my hand. Maybe it's just that my hair needs a hotter, firmer iron to straighten but this didn't work for me.

Title: Setup is easy but the sound is lackluster to my ears
Review: [[VIDEOID:f3558a6fff96bdd2e36237f96cd5b891]] I have no idea how much these cost but the sound quality is disappointing  to me. Setup was easy. All I had to do was plug it into my USB port and connect the audio jack to my audio output port on my LG laptop and it was set up. As can be heard in the attached video, the sound is lackluster even on the highest volume both on the computer and speakers. I get much better sound from my various Bluetooth speakers than this. In summary, this works but it is disappointing to me.

Title: Magnasonic Projection Alarm Clock
Review: The clock is very good looking, face display is very bright, but the projection doesn't work on the one that I received so will return.

Title: Nice Review: Very nice and lots of compliments
Still not big enough for all my stuff

Title: They aren’t standard sizes, they are smaller and more narrow I have to return mine too small
Review: They are shoes to wear on your feet…silly question!

Title: Color is Mahogany
Review: The color of this lipstick is deep mahogany. It smells ok, goes on very smoothly (it is a buttery formula), and the color is consistent. Using this without a lipliner will likely cause bleeding because of the softness of the lipstick. If you put this lipstick on your arm for a light swipe, it looks like there is a purple-ish hue to it, but after putting a full coat on, all you will see is a deep brown. The only skin this would look good in is a darker skin tone. Looks horrible on a person with fair skin (much too dark).

Title: Disappointed
Review: I was super excited to get this set because of all the RAVE reviews on amazon, but when I used it last night, I wasn't as impressed. My hair doesn't smell like powerful orange cream and when I lathered my hair, it didn't feel as though I imagined it to feel - it felt like the shampoo and conditioner had little substance. I will continue to use it and change my vote if I find it to be different after a few washes.

Title: Very cute. It is supposed to be a medium ...
Review: Very cute.  It is supposed to be a medium 8/10 but it is too small.  I usually wear an 8.

Title: The product was breakable
Review: It broked !!!  Same way that regular cable. It lasted a while longer. That’s all. I was very disappointed

Title: not good Review: fit = yuck
all wrong

Title: disappointed about the immediate pilling
Review: The first day I wore it I was so disappointed. It shed white balls all over my pants and tee shirt I wore under the jacket. Any place the fabric rubbed against itself or the upholstered chair while in a waiting room the jacket would pill. So the undesirable pilling occurred on the arms, wrists, back, neck, and sides. It was a nice bright white and light weight. Too bad I looked like a hot mess as I was at a hospital for 17 hours and didn’t pack a change of clothes!

Title: NOT HAPPY POORLY MADE
Review: My husband did love this but today walking through the house the stone fell OUT!!! I'm glad he wasn't on Harley poorly made obviously! NOT HAPPY

Title: I cannot stand the smell of this shampoo & conditioner set
Review: There are two 8 ounce bottles in this set (one conditioner and one shampoo). The shampoo smells like clay or Play Doh and is very liquidy. It does lather well and my hair feels clean after washing with this. However, the conditioner smells absolutely terrible. It reminds me of a mix of tea tree oil combined with some sort of solvent. I like the thick consistency of the cream but that is all. My scalp started to itch after using this set. I personally do not care for the fragrance or the results. This is definitely not for me.

Title: Waste of money
Review: No difference in appearance!

Title: A great new addition to my skin care regime!
Review: This is my new favorite body wash! I have been using Dove for years now, but this exfoliating body wash really has made a difference in my skin! After using it for almost a month now, my skin is radiant, softer and smoother than it has been in years. I typically use exfoliators for my face, but when it came to my body I never tried using them. I love the way my skin feels and looks, and the fragrance is light and lasts nicely. As far as the bodywash component, I feel clean and fresh after every use. No complaints, only praise for a great exfoliating body wash!

Title: Repurposed blades
Review: I trusted that these blades were brand new but they were not. My existing blades were starting to get dull and THIS "new" set cuts 10x's worse than my dull set, if it's peach fuzzy neck hair-forget it!!!! Clearly they aren't true Andis blades, I can't believe I wasted money on them from Amazon.

Title: photo project
Review: I have/had 3 giant tubs of loose photos, film, negatives, etc in my storage unit and knew the photos were getting destroyed.  So I purchased these and several other sizes along with some 3 ring binders to preserve the photos.  Perhaps 50 years from now my daughter will get a kick out of the ancient practice of taking photos with a real camera and film.

Title: Good sound
Review: This is a nice speaker- I am bummed because I ordered the red and I received the blue- I didn’t want to deal with returning it because I wanted it right away for an outing. It is bigger than I thought- But I can clip it to my belt and walk or hike and it is nice and loud. No instructions came with it but you can figure it out and it synced right up.

Title: Too long
Review: Hate it when pictures and reviews seem to let me believe that a dress will be above my knee. I have a tender surgical scar. 10 years now and I can not have anything touch my scar. Dress nice, that I have to shorten it the pits.

Title: There’s no window to see inside the bottles and they stay misshapen – 2.5 stars Review: I personally do not like these bottles. There are six of the same opaque white silicone squeeze bottles. What I do not like is that there is no clear window on the side of the bottle to easily see the level of the contents. Second, I cannot stand when a bottle does not return to its shape after squeezing out some product. In order to go back into shape, I have to unscrew the cap to let air back into the bottle.

Other than this, these are functional but they just do not suit my purpose due to the two "flaws" I mentioned above. In addition, the current price of $15.99 is on the high side for this set.

Title: GOOD GIFT FOR A TEENAGER
Review: Got this for my 17 year old granddaughter.  She really likes it.

Title: miracle oil Review: because i have itching scalp problem, i thought this product may resolve that problem. has not eliminated it. however, other than
keeping the scalp moist, have not seen any visible change in my hair after using the product since April. Only problem however, is that the oil is very light and drips after appling to scalp and hair.

Title: Very Nice Home Security Camera System Review: Love this security system, the only area that I don't like is that you cant use your computer to monitor the cameras only your phones. I hope this feature will be available soon.
07/22/19 Update: These cameras don't have a two way audio, I was not aware of it until I had a need to use that feature, the time had expire and was not able to returned for a full refund instead I was offered 50% to 60% refund or a $20.00 credit to my account. It is too bad that the lack of this feature is not clear on the website.

Title: Decent watch, still prefer Apple
Review: I like the watch, but prefer the Apple Watch 3 I have. The Apple Watch is more seamless and works with my phone more easily.

Title: Bad stretch
Review: Cheap product it dosnt strectch well and has bad elastic so it pulls hair

Title: So much potential, would love to see this product reworked a little Review: This is a great idea. I like the elegance of the design where you can retract both jacks, but there is an inelegance to the actual usage of the device. The slider is clunky hard to move. Also it is unfortunate that the microUSB will not reach my phone in my life proof case which is hard to remove and reinstall. This takes all the time savings out of this design.

On the plus side, it is a nice drive and the size and specs are great. It's just unfortunate that its strongest design points are blunted by needed a little more thought. Otherwise it worked as intended.

Title: Not truly a glossy finished, difficult to remove
Review: This didn't work well for me. First, it is definitely more of a matte color than a gloss. Second, the color (in my case purple) was next to impossible to take off without make up remover. I actually touched my lips with my forefinger to try to smooth out a missing area and I couldn't get the color off my finger without scrubbing. So, if you are looking for a more matte color that is super longlasting, than this Revlon Ultra HD Vinyl is for you.

Title: Really nice moisturizer!
Review: This is a really nice daily facial moisturizer. I use it daily after showering. It absorbs quickly and leaves y face feeling soft and smooth all day. It is non-greasy and applies easily. My face glows when I use this. I love the fragrance and will definitely be purchasing more when I have depleted this jar. I highly recommend for men and women of all ages as a great way to moisturizer your skin.

Title: Didn't work, but excellent customer service
Review: This mouse looks like just what I wanted, but it would not work with my laptop running Windows 7.  I tried it on my PC running Windows 10 and it didn't work there either.  I'm not sure why.  I contacted the company to return the mouse and they were helpful and quick.

Title: Don't waste your money
Review: Not enough volume, remote has to be pointed directly at sensor.

Title: Only hangs less than half way from your ear to shoulder.
Review: These hang a little less than half way from your ear to your shoulder.  I thought they would hang all the way down to my shoulder but I was wrong. Other than that They are really adorable.

Title: Good body wash if you are willing to pay the price
Review: This is an ok body wash which does contain some vitamins (that other washes don't). Does not wash like other soap based washes (no foam). Fragrance is also ok (light, not overwhelming). I am deducting a star simply because of the price. I mean, 12 ounces for $13? I can buy two Dove body washes (which make my skin really feel moisturized after using) for the same price of this one small bottle.

Title: Works like a charm!
Review: I was looking for an adapter to connect my old VHS player so we could watch some older family movies. Within minutes of receiving this, I was able to connect my VHS player to my television and we were watching movies.
