I am not technically savvy, so for me to say this was easy to do is really saying something. Highly recommend if you are in the market for an adapter.

Title: Order up, top runs very small
Review: So cute but the 6/7 fit like a 4t in the top, so order up

Title: so-so
Review: these are hard to apply and don't look very good once they are.

Title: AWESOME PRODUCT
Review: Above my expectations,  i love this lotion

Title: Lasted 2 months
Review: Great headphones but broke within 2 months , I believe would have been better if not foldable causing them to break easily

Title: Itchy
Review: Very itchy, scratchy.

Title: first time
Review: This is my first time buying it. Just thought I would try it and we shall see.

Title: Julep smoothing base
Review: I purchased my first Julep "be strong" away from Amazon and need more, so I began to source from Amazon.  This particular product is useful because I have ridges... It smooths them out nicely - not 100%... but it's much better.  It works really nicely with their "Be Strong" product that I began using after I stopped doing gel/acrylic nails for 20 years.  Yikes.  Badly damaged nails.  I really do think this product works better than many others I've tried... for one thing it really seems to stay on.  At least a week - no peeling after 1 or 2 days like others - my biggest pet peeve.  I am really happy to have found this stuff!  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Not thrilled with the time it takes to do it
Review: Not thrilled with the time it takes to do it, over 24 hours and it wasn't done. I don't have that kind of time for a backup.

Title: It's ight
Review: It's ight

Title: Didn't Like
Review: I did not like these jeans at all....they did not fit well and didn't look anything lime the picture.

Title: Way too strong spicy fragrance; no floral notes to me Review: I wish I liked this. This is a nicely packaged perfume in an attractive bottle. The scent does not smell like bergamot, rose, or peony as described but it has a strong spicy aroma. It is a bit too strong and offensive to me. It does last all day until my next every-12-hour shower.

The current price of $49.99 ($54.99 minus $5) is competitively priced for perfume like this but it is not one I would order again as I have to really love it to pay that much.

Title: To small
Review: Give a size bigger cuz it fits smaller then the size so if you need 4t/5 you will need to get 6x cuz I get a 4t/5  and it fits like a 3t

Title: Comfy
Review: Bought these for my Sister for Christmas. She loves them. Says they are comfy and warm.

Title: Nice Holiday Pin
Review: The pin is well made but isn't nearly as sparkly as I would have liked for the holidays. If you want something that can be worn during the day without being too flashy, this is it. At the holidays I enjoy more bling.

Title: Does not feel exfoliating; leaves a barrier on my skin; avoid contact with eyes Review: I avoided using this on my face but otherwise, I washed my entire body in the shower with this. The soap is creamy and has a fragrance that smells like tea tree oil even though that is not in the ingredients list. It lathers well but I feel as if it left a barrier on my skin. This is not a body wash I would ever order again.

The current price of $11.49 ($12.49 minus $1) is expensive for 8 ounces of body wash. I am not convinced it is exfoliating or anti-aging.

Title: Very comfortable, Just wondering how long that Velcro strap will ... Review: Very comfortable, Just wondering how long that Velcro strap will last.
Also, I thought my toes would be more visible. Nevertheless, this is the first pair of heels I have worn in years due to a significant leg injury.

Title: Lip balm size moisturizing salve; contains several essential oils Review: This contains tangerine, ylang ylang, and lavender essential oils in addition to other oils. It is a tiny container  the size of a lip balm. I actually ordered this for my dry elbows. I applied a little bit and it reduced the immense dryness but this is oily. Also, the ylang ylang fragrance is predominant and it is not my favorite. In addition, this is no better than some other good moisturizers. Although this works to condition my skin, I personally would use a body cream or body oil that has a different fragrance.

The current price of $7 is on the pricey side of competitively priced.

Title: Basic eye brush set; case smells; brown brushes too short; fan brush not cut right – 2.5 stars Review: There are 10 small headed brushes in this set that are useful for blending eyeshadow powders. The bristles are soft on the white headed brushes and feel great against my eyelids. However, the brown headed brushes are too short and one brush has a sharp edge. In addition, the fan brush is not cut right and the case smells.

This set is only partially useful, in my opinion. The current price of $13.99 ($16.99 minus $3) is too expensive for this set as it comes to $1.40 per brush. A better set is this [[ASIN:B08S749XB1 Leung 15-pc eye brush set]] that is $3 cheaper.

Title: lotion applicator
Review: I purchased this for my husband to apply lotion to his feet in a hard to reach area.  He is diabetic so it is necessary to do this.  He travels a lot for our business and I'm not always there to help.  This applicator has a nice reach length. It's plastic.  The head (replaceable - comes with 4) is firm but a little foam like.  It works well for application and rubbing the lotion in.  I did make the additional purchase of more heads also available at the time of my purchase through Amazon.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Wonderful moisturizing blush!!
Review: I love L'Oreal makeup products. Always a quality product at a super reasonable price. This Radiant Stain Blush product is no exception. It goes on light and it has a moisturizing impact with the camelia oil added in. Lasts for hours, looks great and it's just what I was looking for for my sixty-something old face. Highly recommend this for anyone, particularly anyone with drier skin.

Title: Does not have cosmetic pockets, not a fan. Review: This is a type of material you just have to wipe down, do not put it in the washing machine, and for sure Not the dryer.

This looks to me like its a plastic type of material, but its not..The color pink is ok..
When I travel which is allot, I like to have my things stand up, such as my bottles etc. in thisI have to lay them down. Such as my blush brush, mascara, lipstick, makeup, tubes ,face cream should fit into something that is not with everything else.
That is the problem I have with this, everything basically is all together laying down.
This would Not hold my shampoo, conditioner, face wash, hair brushes, as I don’t want my hair brush with my tooth brush, and cosmetics etc.
I think it needs some pockets in this, as I guess that is what I’m use to..

It does have a larger bottom part, and the top is not deep either.It is light weight, you cannot open this and hung it . Lay it on the counter in the bathroom.

Its good for kids for a sleep over. They can roll there clothes and put it in etc.

Title: Gentle
Review: This is a gentle face cleanser. I have somewhat sensitive skin and this hasn't irritated or annoyed my skin at all. It comes in a nice bottle and has a pump dispenser that works well. You apply it to your dry skin and massage it in to your skin before rinsing with warm water. It doesn't foam. It doesn't over dry my skin either. There is noadded fragrance, but it does have a smell to it. I've had a boutique bar of soap that smelled the same so I think the smell is due to some of the ingredients. While the smell is not foul, I personally do not like it. Smell  influences whether or not I like a product or not.

Title: Not for chromebook
Review: This did not work with our Acer Chromebook. We tried a lot of different suggestions and it would never work. Something isn't compatible and I'm no computer person so I can't fix it! Kinda disappointed I spent the money and now it's useless to me.

Title: Pearl is plastic with a nice luster. Cheesy. Review: These look good to the naked eye!
I just received these earrings, and surprised by the good reviews!!

There very light weight, and the pearl is plastic, not even a fake pearl, and the wire is thin, and bendable.
Although the plastic pearl has a nice luster to it, maybe too good!
I do not wear heavy big earring, so putting one earring in my ear felt like nothing was there, good thing, then I tried putting in the second earring, but the wire was not exactly the same length, as the wire was bend, and kept bending, and a bit shorter!
Finally got it in, but it would not lock , and when it did I couldn’t unlock it and get this
Cheesy earring off my ear. At some point I was going to have to ask my husband to cut the wire to get this out of my ear.
Finally! I finally got this unlocked. Whew.
I called Amazon that I’m sending these cheesy earrings back.

Title: Video Chatting made easy
Review: Very nice .

Title: Multi-pack great value.
Review: This is the only shampoo my husband will use.  The multi-pack is a great value.

Title: Left my hair soft but also weighed down my curls and the aroma is like sour lime
Review: Although this conditioner weighs down my hair a little bit it still leaves it soft. What I really do not like is the fragrance; it smells like sour lime to me. If this did not relax my curls more than expected and smelled a bit better, it would be one I would add to my arsenal of hair products.

Title: Bad for Acne Prone Skin
Review: I was recommended this product from my dermatologist and after a week of using it my acne was worse than ever so I had to stop. I have no idea why as it is scent free and washes off well but if like me you have sensitive and acne prone skin then be wary of this product.

Title: Pretty but offers little protection for your mini4 iPad
Review: Pretty case, mini4 iPad fits in securely, but this case really doesn't protect the sides of the iPad very well. Magnet turns the mini4 iPad on when opening but an iPad is an expensive item and although it looks great it really offers very little protection from falls/drops. It doesn't completely surround the sides of the iPad.

Title: boys pajamas
Review: I was hoping these would be a thinner flannel - they are very thick fleece.  Eh.  Sweaty.  But we'll make them work.  My grandson is 11.  I may have to hem them a tad, but ok.

Title: Very cute shirt runs small may need to return for a larger size
Review: Very cute shirt runs small may need to return for a larger size

Title: Sets my brow without any stiffness thereby keeping my wayward hairs in place
Review: I have a brow "mascara" the color of my eyebrows and after trying this, I prefer that. This provides for a light set, thereby keeping any wayward brow hairs in place. It looked natural on and did not make my brows stiff. Nevertheless, I can pass on this because it did not enhance my brows either. I prefer something that makes them look thicker and this does not do that. I could use Vaseline instead of this and have the same effect.

Title: Stopped working after a month
Review: Worked great for a month and then stopped. Not sure why. Wouldn’t buy again

Title: Not what I have
Review: I took pictures of what I actually got. Although I love mine, it is NOTHING like what is shown. So to rate “mine”, it’s five stars all the way. Sure don’t know what is shown though.  No fans on mine.

Title: Doesn't really work for cat6a, the wires are too thick Review: they work brilliantly on cat5e but the holes are too small for cat6a. I could get the wire through eventually but it was far from easy.

also they should have included a cutter for the wire ends

Title: Completely worth the price
Review: Reading the reviews, I was a bit skeptical.  These speakers are great!  I use them every other day to play, loud music, soft music, listen to zoom calls, listen to lectures, and whatever else my kids do to them.  This speaker, for the past couple of months, has been great!  Easy to operate!  I don't turn on the side lights because they're so distracting.  I wish they'd have a tiny little dot of a light on it though because sometimes I can't tell if I turned it off or not.  There were days that I thought it was off and walked away, only to come back to a speaker that had been on for over 48 hours.  This speaker does not create static noises even though my phone is right next to it with incoming calls.  It's totally worth the price.

Title: Rockville loses rep over this one
Review: This is a horrible product and a pathetic attempt at a more affordable item by a company that has the reputation of being better than this monstrosity. There is no bass (despite a knob that claims to be such). The clarity sounds like a rock band sinking under mud all while trapped in a well. The wattage depicted is a total lie. Even if backed by an amp, this speaker will fail to deliver the promised power. I don't recommend this to anyone; except back to its company with a dunce hat on it that written on would read: "Wha what what... Please start over and try again."

Title: Good Headphones, but not Tozo's Best. Review: These headphones are great! But the controls are a little wonky. You are better off using the device rather then the headphones to control audio playback & pick up & answer calls. But the sound is incredible. The the way they sit comfortably & securely in your ear is awesome. I would still recommend them if you need something with the controls in the headphones, in a pinch. But Tozo does have better models!

I have been made aware that my headphones may have been defective & will update my review after replacing my old headphones!

Title: Handle needs adjustment
Review: I love my bag but the handles can be made longer it needs adjustments to be able to extend.

Title: Good and bad Review: Good: it melts away so you don't over scrub
Bad: it melts away so fast, within 5 seconds of rubbing... so I end up using a lot of it.

Title: Sounds ok
Review: I’ve been using this recorder for awhile. The sound quality is just ok. Sometimes I cannot hear the recording well enough. It’s very easy to carry and very lightweight, which is a good plus. I never use the transcribe feature, so I cannot say too much about it. But i think it can be helpful for some people, not sure how accurate it is though

Title: Not great for my size 9 (too small)
Review: It says it fits 8-9 and I fit size 9 usually but this was too small. I would be willing to exchange for the same product in one size larger (9.5-10.5) and pay the difference. Thank you.

Title: Does not have a smooth sharp edge Review: Very disappointed in this product. This is a cheap snipper tool you can buy at any hardware store for a couple of bucks. The cutting edges are not smooth and sharp. The blade is curved and bevelled so it is very awkward to hold in a comfortable position and cut a toenail. When you do get it to cut, the toenail edge is rough and jagged requiring you to use an emmery board after clipping, else your toenails will snag your socks.
My fault for falling for this - toe nail clippers need to be sharp, smooth and ergonomically suited for the task.

Title: Small Jar
Review: I use face scrubs a couple of times a week. This one has a very light, citrus scent to it. The actual face scrub has minimal grit to it and what it does have is not abrasive. I have a tendency to get sebaceous filaments and a more abrasive scrub helps get rid of them and keeps me from wanting to squeeze them. The jar is very small, plus when you open it and start using it, it seems to be even smaller because the bottom of the jar is raised. The price is very reasonable but if it was more expensive, I would be upset about how little product is actually in the jar. I have sensitive skin and this doesn't irritate or annoy my skin. Overall, it's okay.

Title: Good
Review: La parte de arriba es un poco mas escotada que en la foto y la parte de abajo tiene un elastico bien fuerte que aprieta un poco pero es muy bonito

Title: NOT recommended Review: Not near the quality I expected. Can NOT recommend these flip flops.
The side straps pulled loose after only 4 weeks use.

Title: Quality Product Review: Nice, slim fit.
Only complaint is that it's hard to clean all the ridges and ripples on the back of the case. Lots of opportunity for gunk to get all in there. Doesn't affect the phone.

Title: ok, if you have the time
Review: I just didn't like it. It work like it says but takes time to dry and you need to put 2 to 3 application in order to work.

Title: Uncomfortable
Review: This bra was unflattering and uncomfortable.

Title: VERY EXPENSIVE
Review: My Grandaughter was VERY HAPPY

Title: Good product, but will need to be use as intended only per it's weight
Review: This is a well made product but is extremely heavy - it weights over 12 pounds itself. I bought it to clamp onto my treadmill thinking it would be a perfect device to use for my laptop, but the weight of the device puts too much pressure on the plastic of my Nordic Trac treadmill - my treadmill was $1500 but it's still plastic. The plastic cannot support the device plus my laptop, it starts to give... I put my laptop on it for a quick photo but there is no way to leave it there. It is also hard to photograph the "give" of plastic. I think this product is a good deal, and certainly heavy duty, but not likely going to be usable except on sturdy tables and the like.

Title: Smells too strong, color is nice.
Review: This product smells too strong. After I washed 5 times, I can still smell the chemical.  I don't recommend due to this.  The color is pretty. I mixed with Cinnamon Whiskey and I love it.  Just not that stench.

Title: Only for children.
Review: Description say children and adults can use these. Its more for the kids because you cant seperate the eye pieces enough to adjust them. When I pulled them apart to set,I pinched my fingers in it pretty hard. I did look through with one eye and it was very clear. Comes with the strap, carrying case and a lens cleaning cloth.

Title: Do not purchase refurbished mine caught fire
Review: Do not I repeat do not get a refurbished ring!!!!  my house almost burnt down luckily I was home  I smelled a funny smell like something burning and I had just put that ring up so I went out and checked on it, I came outside there was smoke & flames coming from it I had to take a hammer and knock it off of the plate & pour water all over it. it’s not worth it buy a brand new one I don’t know what happen with this one but I almost lost my house if I wasn’t home and I had just put it at five minutes before this caught fire ❌❌❌❌❌❌😡😡😡😡

Title: Clearly not worth even a penny. This piece of ...
Review: Clearly not worth even a penny. This piece of low grade junk lasted all of 6 weeks. Thanks for stealing money, vendor.

Title: Nice product, but super expensive for the size
Review: Ok, so assuming money is no object, this is a decent product. Exfoliator works well (not really for the face, more for the neck, chest, arms and body). I do love the moisturizer (body repair) it's thick and creamy (almost reminds me of my mother's old Ponds face cream). I will say that my skin feels great after a couple of weeks of use. Didn't really have a crepe problem, but I do have dry skin and some fine wrinkles. This duo does the job. However, the 4 star rating is discounting for the cost. This is really a 'trial' size, yet it is over $60 in cost. You can do better on your own using other products (I love Ahava products as well as Olay). I say shop around a bit or wait for the price to come down a bit.

Title: Company is a scam
Review: They will not honor their own warranty in the watch. Yes it’s cheap but if you say it has a year warranty, honor it! FYI your watch will die within a few months. You’re welcome!

Title: Would not recommend, or buy again
Review: I attempted to use this on my eyebrows and upper lip hair. In a nutshell, it didn't remove any hair. Would not recommend, or buy again. Threw away.

Title: plastic foot liners
Review: I purchased these to cover my feet after I bath and slather with lotion.  The plastic with a waffley, rough texture.. not smooth and are meant to be used with paraffin.  They include some sticker dots to help keep the bag on, however, you would need to put on about 10 of them on each bag to keep the bag on... so ... they are kinda useless in my opinion.  They do keep the lotion on.. I put a pair of mini socks on to keep the bags on.  I'm kinda on the fence on whether I would buy again.  A regular plastic bag (NON closure) works just as well and is a bit cheaper.  Hmmm.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Beautiful

Title: Luxury at it's best!
Review: I really like this Rose Chai moisturizing gel. It goes on luxuriously thick and smooths on my face easily and has a light rose fragrance. It absorbs nicely, but I will say a little longer than other cremes (maybe better for nighttime use if you are in a rush in the morning). I have been using this daily and evening for almost two weeks now and my skin feels amazingly soft and smooth. Comes in a great container and box so would make a great gift as well. When I first ordered this, retail was $79. Today, as of this writing it is $49. I am ordering another because at this price this is a wonderful product. Highly recommend!

Title: Not Impressed
Review: This is a very heavy shirt. I definitely wouldn’t want to wear it in the summer. Runs a size small and is very stiff with no give.

Title: Three Stars
Review: What I intended to order was cables with micro USB ports and I waited too longb to return it

Title: Wallet
Review: Seems like an overall ok wallet. However, day one the zipper pull broke. I wasn’t able to fix it because the small rod on the pull got lost. So for now I have the wrist strap attached to the zipper.

Title: Great wireless set for any desktop
Review: I love this logitech set. Not sure why some people have less than stellar reviews on this as I have had nothing but positive things to say since I started using it several months back. I love the fact that the additional wires that used to support my keyboard and mouse are now gone, leaving my desktop far cleaner and organized. I tend to leave the mouse and keyboard on 24x7 most of the time (I forget to shut them off) and I have yet to have to change batteries since first setting it up. If there were any downside at all, it would be that I honestly wish more vendors would make these keyboards with lit backgrounds (so it is easier to see the keys in poorly lit/morning hours).

Title: No!
Review: Waste of money and effort

Title: Not what I wanted.
Review: I just received them today.  Straight out of the box they felt extremely cheap.  I thought, well for 18 bucks, what do you expect?  But they are also very uncomfortable to wear.  They have a strange fit.  I thought they would be too small but even on my really big head, they are too big.  They also sit strangely on my ears.  The sound is okay but it is only coming out of one ear.  I guess I will look for something that cost a bit more and hopefully is what I'm looking for.  These are not it.

Title: amazing for the most part
Review: The sound is awesome and the bass is definitely better than the non bluetooth ones I have that need a new battery all the time. The battery life on these headphones is amazing and I couldn’t ask for much more. Only downside is that it takes a good minute to get them to connect to my iphone 11. They were fine with my iphone 8, so I don’t know if that’s an issue with the headphones or just my phone.

Title: Nice product
Review: Nice

Title: Lanyards are useless. Review: The goods news is that the lens caps seem to fit my 58mm Canon lens.

The bad news is that the little lanyards for them is a joke. It came with a little key--which is good since I doubt the suggest ballpoint pen would fit in that tiny little hole--but the string is still too large for the hole. I worked at it for at least 15 minutes before the point of the key broke off inside the hole, where it is now jammed. Since it's jammed in there the string is also stuck in there. So technically I have the lanyard attached but I certainly wouldn't trust that! I'll likely end up cutting the string and tossing that lanyard.

Since the lanyards are at least half the reason for ordering these caps, I'm giving them 3 stars and I consider that generous.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Was not what I thought it was going to be. Didn't. Work

Title: Junk Review: Junk. I got the black matte frames and black lenses. Wore them for one hour on a sunny day and then threw them away. Facing the sun you're practically blinded. With the sun overhead there is LOTS of glare and reflections. Vision down and sideways is distorted. The only good thing is that it comes with a nice case and cleaning cloth which I will save for my next pair of sunglasses.

EDIT: Less than 24 hours after posting this review the company Duduma contacted me to say they were disappointed in my review, offered me a free new pair of sunglasses from their Amazon store, and they included instructions for how to delete or edit my review. Sorry guys but my review isn't for sale. The fact is the glasses were bad and I don't want new ones for free.

EDIT: One month after posting this review someone who claims to have a few pairs of Duduma sunglasses that he's happy with, yet has never posted any review on Amazon about them before, wrote a comment here disputing my review. Duduma marketing strikes again? Decide for yourself.
Title: but brand names are better made and better looking Review: Ok product, but brand names are better made and better looking.

Title: Very nice
Review: I was surprised that this sweatshirt is as nice as it is, given the low price. I bought this as a gift and liked it so much, i had to get one for myself!

Title: Nad's?! Buyer Beware!
Review: They call it Nad's but then the directions say you shouldn't use it on your genitals... To bad I didn't read the directions before I applied it... Worked great everywhere else though!

Title: Nice moisturizer, but expensive for what you get
Review: For pluses, this is a nice moisturizer, 100% vegan and made with all natural ingredients.  I have been using it almost daily after I get out of the shower, particularly on my hands and face and my skin is noticeably softer. For minuses, this is a really small bottle for the $30+ price they are charging. It does come with a pump (which may be over kill considering the size of the bottle.  Scent was ok for me but would have liked it if it was a little lighter (once it is absorbed, though, the fragrance significantly diminishes). Bottom line, I probably won't be buying again due to the cost vs. volume.

Title: I'll Fitting Rd
Review: Seriously too small. I'd gotten a 'medium' (my usual size), way too small, then I'd gotten 'large', still too tight fitting...

Title: This foundation is very thick. It's kind of hard ...
Review: This foundation is very thick.  It's kind of hard to spread around. I use a foundation brush.  With it being so thick, it does cover well.  The color just isn't for me.

Title: Weighed my hair down
Review: Made my hair weighted down and somewhat greasy after 1 day!

Title: My skin feels soft and super clean. Love this!
Review: Larger size bottle works great in my kitchen where, with the pandemic, I find myself washing my hands many times a day. This Dead Sea brand is great in helping keep my skin clean while also supplying my skin with minerals and nutrients. I love the light fragrance, too. My hand feel soft and smooth after using this almost continuously for the past three weeks. Again, this is a large size and would work well in a work place/ high traffic bathroom as well. I highly recommend.

Title: Really nice blouse, quality made!
Review: I really love this shirt. I recently wore it open with a tank top underneath and I got a ton of compliments. Fits perfectly, quality made, and looks great on (very flattering). I also ordered this in white to have as an alternate. Highly recommend! Would make a great gift for the holidays as well (I love the roll up or roll down sleeves, too).

Title: Perfect for cruising!
Review: I needed these for a cruise I was taking in December with my brother and nephew. This convenient pack of five were just perfect for our NCL cruise to the Western Caribbean. They were easy to attach and lasted the luggage handling just fine. I was able to easily remove them and will be using them again in March. Highly recommend for all users in the market for cruise luggage tags.

Title: Size up!!!
Review: Purchased the correct size 12 for my 6 year old and they where to narrow. Size up or buy wide.

Title: Just as good as the named brands at a reduced cost!
Review: I get keratin treatments for my hair probably 3 times a year. As such, I always have to use shampoos and conditioners that are sulfate free. Typically, most of the products I use are expensive, so I was looking for an alternative. I absolutely love this Amazon Brand product. Just as good as using a  more expensive salon brand, this shampoo leaves my hair soft and smooth and because its paraben and sulfate free, I  can keep it that way at much less cost. Kudos Amazon for creating another great generic product which is just as great as the named brand products. Oh, and I love the fragrance of this Argan Oil, too!

Title: Love the smell
Review: Good product. Love the way it smells

Title: Photo of correct card matters.
Review: Item shown in photo is compantible with 1.5v and 3.3v slots. Card actually only has the key for 1.5v slot. Therefore, I can't use it at all.

Title: Full protection, decent price.
Review: Excellent. Keeps my tablet fully protected.

Title: Good soap, but all the same scent....
Review: This is excellent soap!  It cleans well, and makes you feel squeaky clean!  The ONLY complaint I have is that all of bars smell the same.  They tout them as having their own unique scent.  But, unfortunately that doesn’t seem to be the case.  HOWEVER, I must say that it is a great scent that they share!  I know I will buy this soap again!! 👍🏼👍🏼😊

Title: Can plug in on 4 sides; 12 total outlets
Review: I love this item.  There are 12 plug recepticles, which is more than most power strips.  The vertical arrangement with 3 outlets on each of the 4 sides is convenient.  The spacing on the outlets is adequate for most "fat" plugs.  The 4 USB ports are great too.  It is attractive looking and the power cord is sufficiently long, but not too long.  Each of the 4 sides has an on/off switch also, which is a nice feature.  The only thing they could have done better on this item is to make the plug flat, so that it could easily plug in behind a piece of furniture.  Very compact unit.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Had one of these before.  Got one for another member of my family.

Title: Very soft but see through
Review: Very stretchy and soft. Not sure how they’ll hold up for working out because a few of the seams on the inner thighs and crotch area look poorly done but who knows. Extremely see through when squatting or just bending over. I’m 5ft 7.5 and 125lb and I got a medium and they’re not tight or anything so I figured they’d be good for working out but I can’t even wear these to the store without worrying if I’m that lighting they’re completely see through.

Title: Wonderful shampoo, helps prolong the time between expensive keratin treatments!
Review: I have naturally wavy, thicker hair. I always get keratin treatments several times a year to help remove the frizz and allow my hair to stay straighter longer. Since I used these keratin treatments I have to be sure to use sulfate free products to help the chemicals remain in my hair follicles as long as possible. However, sometimes the shampoos that the keratin manufacturers recommend can cost as much as the treatments themselves. I loved that when I found this Alterna shampoo it had everything I need to maintain my hair health. Vegan and sulfate/paraben free, this shampoo is safe to use on my colored and treated hair. My hair looks beautiful, clean, shiny and smooth. I highly recommend this shampoo for everyone!

Title: kindle case cover (2021)
Review: I purchased my Mom a brand new kindle and her old one had the Van Gogh Starry night cover, so this would seem a no brainer.  I thought so until I received it.  Sadly, when it arrived I discovered the print was applied UPSIDE DOWN!  So the camera and power/volume buttons are on the bottom. NOT ideal to say the least. To be fair, I contacted Amazon and received compensation for the mess up.  The problem is it was a gift for my Mom!  I would try to order another, but likely a whole run of these are wrong.  Just sad.  It so hard to find a good cover that works on the kindles.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Ok briefs, Review: My son wears a medium in underware. These Good Brief run true to size he said.
He is almost 5’11, and wears a size 32, and he is slim.

He thought these briefs where not as comfortable , and not good looking , or as well made as his other underwear, but would wear them.
Also a bit clingy when he went to the gym.

3 stars

Title: Work pants
Review: Little too baggy

Title: I want my money back and return this ...junk
Review: Junk

Title: Slips Out of Hand Easily
Review: I love using facial cleansing brushes! They do a great job of cleaning my face. I was excited to try this one because of the unique shape. I like the shape of it, but there is nothing to get a grip on so it slips out of my hands rather easily. It would be nice if there were little indentations to grab onto or if there were ridges along it to help prevent slippage. The brush head is pretty easy to remove. It comes with one replacement brush. The brushes are different from others that I have on hand, so I'm not sure what I would do when I need to replacement mine. It doesn't appear that the company sells them. The brush is easy to use and has two speeds. I really like the lid that goes over the brush head because it has little holes to allow water to drain. Overall, it's okay, but not great.

Title: 6ft Gold Plated S-Video Cable
Review: I use this in conjuction with the HDE VGA RAC/S-Video Adapter: did not have to re-arange any furnishings in my bedroom: this cable allowed me to connect my pc to the tv: good clear picture

Title: Is straight
Review: It's aight. Not what I thought it was gone be. Ion be out at night so want get to enjoy color changing.

Title: Not as advertised Review: Claims to be a support bra but it does not support at all.
Although nice coverage for a big busted women it does not hold anything up.
Returning for a full refund.
Do not recommend

Title: This is a great emergency radio to have in your home
Review: I live in Florida and I have been looking for a good transistor radio to use when the power may go out. This radio is great.  It is not only an AM/FM radio, but also a shortwave radio, too. Sound quality is great, reception picks up easily in my home. It is definitely piece of mind for anyone who may be in an area prone to power outages. Highly recommend!

Title: Would Not Sync
Review: I tried and tried, but I could not get this to sync with my iPad Pro. It is a lot bigger than my iPad, which was a plus. I hoped it would work, but I never could get it to work.

Title: Great barrettes
Review: Great metal-free, non damaging barrette. I have several sizes and colors of these. They do not break or pull out hairs. They also hold a good amount of hair, despite their size. I have thick coarse hair and can fit the front section of my hair in one if i dont put too much from my crown. I also like these for wearing each side of my hair up . These barrettes are well made and have little comb teeth inside and they snap tight, so they stay in place well. Will definitely buy again.

Title: These are not true to size
Review: Not true to size, I bought a 42B and although I did not notice they are push up and I hate push up bras I decided to at least try them on to see if they fit but they don't ... like, at all! They were extremely small in fact they don't even close right and are super tight. I know that sometimes because they are push up they tend to be smaller in size but this was not about the cup size but rather the overall bra size it was like 2 sizes smaller in fact or at least one. I made the mistake of buying two pairs of these and they are horrible also I don't like that they kind of feel very much like costume bras or similar the material feels weird and fake I'm not a fan overall and they are extremely thick as well, not very comfortable because the material is superrrr thick. I would give these a 1-2 star review, maybe 2 because they are alright but the sizing is completely off and quality is just bad they look cheap.  I don't know if I can return these??? I honestly will not be wearing them anyway... Do not buy!

Title: Nice hat, runs small
Review: Cute panama hat, looks well enough made for the price. Stylish and perfect for beachware. I deducted a star as it runs small and find it is too tight for my head. Keep in mind that you should have a small to medium small head for this fit.

Title: Do not recommend.
Review: The bulb lasted exactly 1 week and blew.  Don't waste your time and money.  At least I received a prompt refund from Amazon.

Title: A Little Flimsy
Review: These are great to use. The lights come with them. They are easy to set up. But the stands are a little low quality. I know they won't last all that long. And they tend to tip over. When you raise them up high to have light from above, they tip.

Title: Functions Well, Difficult to Use
Review: Not the best choice I have made.

Title: Portable keyboard
Review: I feel comfortable... It easy to move here to there.

Title: Great speaker for it's size!
Review: I just wish that I would have known that you have to keep it plugged into an outlet at all times. I used to have an Amazon Tap and you could take it anywhere with you if it was charged.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Very nice product to get control of cables.

Title: Good for loose curls on longer hair; controls are not in good place Review: I have short to medium fine curly hair and and this iron only curls my longest locks loosely; however, that is to be expected. This size barrel is best for longer hair.

The iron goes from 180 to 410 degrees Fahrenheit. The controls are easy to operate; in fact they are too easy to operate because I kept accidentally hitting them while curling my hair. The temperature stops blinking when it has reached the correct warmth.

The finger grip is sturdy. There is a kick-stand to rest the hot iron on; and believe me it gets hot. Also, note the stand's silicon cover actually has to touch the hot barrel because of the way it's designed. The cord swivels easily. This works as designed.

My only reason for rating this 3 stars is because the controls are placed all wrong and they can be accidentally hit when working with this iron which I did repeatedly.  I love the addition of the canvas storage pouch which is high quality; however, it is a bit difficult to get into the pouch because either the bag or the zipper opening has to be about a 1/4 inch longer to reduce the struggle.

Title: Legs are short, not lightweight enough
Review: The pant legs are too short, and that’s before washing. The pants were also not as lightweight as I had expected. They definitely don’t breathe enough to be worn to bed.

Title: Great slipper
Review: this is my favorite slipper, comfortable and well made

Title: Subtle fragrance like tomato) lathers lightly; cleans but feels like film is left on my skin
Review: This gel-like bar has a subtle but nice aroma to it that is a bit earthy, a bit fresh, and is almost like a tomato scent. It lathers lightly, is cleansing, but after using this feels like I have a waxy film left behind on my skin. At the current price of $8.99, this is also expensive for a 4-ounce bar. I also do not notice any skin brightening. It is the waxy feeling and the high price that has me rating this 3 stars.

Title: Clasp is terrible; tangles easily; not sterling silver but gold plated Review: This chain is a complete disappointment. Although, it looks pretty in gold, I ordered sterling silver. Also, the clasp is horrible. The head of the clasp gets caught in the "door" of the lever that opens. It is practically impossible to open and close. I personally cannot recommend this due to the clasp.

In addition, the chain crimps up easily. It tangles in a way that it has to be un-crimped in order to lay flat. This is not as big a deal as the clasp issue but it is another disappointment.

Other than being pretty, it has nothing else going for it. I personally do not care for the clasp end being the showpiece. I think it is best to use as a charm necklace if one can open and close the impossible to work clasp.

Title: Not meant for larger busts
Review: I'm a 50" bust and it did not fit me (too small) - I give it two stars, fabric is nice, but sizing is way off. Had to return....

Title: These socks are to be a gift.
Review: No idea how they will fit or launder.

Title: Works great!
Review: Works great with my pixel 2, I can charge quickly while listening to music.

Title: Thin stretchy material. Husband will not wear it. Review: This is Not cotten, its a blend , and the material is thin, clingy, stretchy with a silky feel like a women shirt might be.

My husband will not wear this, he said its cheesy looking.

Title: applicator head replacement pads
Review: I purchased the applicator and these for replacement heads.  The applicator comes with 4 heads - this replacement pack is 6 heads.  I expect them to work well. Having said this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: ECHO Dot
Review: Love it!

Title: Cord started breaking after 1 use
Review: I loved that these came with foam noise cancelling orange plugs for extra peace and quiet. I hate that after using them once the wire shows so easily. I don't think these were worth the price.

Title: I hate it. Does not work with dual-band routers Review: I hate this product. I hate it. I hate it. It works fine for two days and then your computer will say "Printer is offline"... but it's not. You have to go and turn off the printer and then turn it back on. Now it's "connected" and will start printing.

I don't know where the technical problem is for Epson but they better fix it. If I print from a mac, the Windows PC cannot print to it. If I reset the printer and print from the PC, the mac cannot print to it. It's always fixed by turning off and on the printer, but who wants to pay good money for a printer and then have such inconvenient nonsense?

Buy something else until Epson acknowledges their incompetence with this problem. There is an Epson web site that has a script of how to configure their printer for dual-bands. The problem with that web site is that it has general ideas but they don't solve the problem.

Title: The flat and angled tweezers work best; the other two not so good Review: This set of four tweezers comes in a cheap plastic case that feel like the latch will break. The angled and flat tweezers work well due to the edge on those tools. The pointed tweezer did not work at all for me and the slightly sloped angled tweezer worked okay. This is not a great set but it is good enough. If the edges on these tweezers were thinner, it would be easier to work with them.

The current price of $9.48 ($9.98 minus 5%) is on the high side of competitive for this set. I would not expect to pay more than $7 for this quality.

Title: Quality is not great
Review: These are a lot shorter than I expected, the plastic is very thin, and the quality is not great (shoe glue on the side, blue paint? on the pink part). Not impressed.

Title: This spray DOES NOT provide an extra strong hold but it smells great Review: This review is for the Pantene Extra Strong Hold Level 4 Hair Spray.

I shook the can vigorously as required and then sprayed a lot on my short to medium fine curly hair and no matter how much I sprayed on, the hold was extremely light. It hardly felt like I had any product in my hair and it did not keep my style at all. The hold it provided was minimal. The scent, however, is great for what it is worth.

Title: Way too long.
Review: I really wanted this to work out as I need to replace some compression tanks that are past their prime. I’m tall for a woman and yet this is so long that it almost reaches my knees. The tag is also very irritating, just so you know. It was easier to get on that to take off.

Title: After 3 weeks, no change in skin. Review: I've been using for about 3 weeks now and I have not noticed any difference. I wasn't expecting miracles but I don't see any difference in texture or color, or firmness of my skin.

Maybe, it needs to be used with other Obagi products, but for the price, I would expect to see some type of change after 3 weeks of using it alone.

Title: Didn’t fit!
Review: It was the wrong size for my phone.

Title: Garbage, now I can't return
Review: Lasted a little over a month and then one of the ears went out and then both of them went out.  Garbage, now I can't return them

Title: Great for my upper lip and brows!
Review: I have been spending money for years in nail salons for eyebrow and upper lip waxing, so I have been looking for an alternative. I was thrilled when I saw this Michael Todd trimmer. I love the way it works. Super easy to use and set up. It really cleans my upper lip peach fuzz, fits well in my hand and it is totally pain free. It also works really well on my eyebrows. I highly recommend this tool to save money and get salon results at home.

Title: not leather, not worth the price
Review: I put this on the Kindle Keyboard and the kindle shut down. I have had the Kindle over one year and it has never turned itself off-all the way off. The look is nice but nothing special. Seems flimsy. I returned it.  only good case I have found so far is the Marware case for the Kindle Fire. I love that case.  I also have a Marware skin for the kindle keyboard and that works really well.

Title: Lightly scented; cleans but does not brighten Review: There is one standard-size bar of soap in this package. This has a light aroma that smells like a mix of tangerine, orange, and citrus to me. This lathers copiously and cleans well. I actually feel that it is moisturizing even though there are no claims on the box to that effect. Nevertheless, I did not notice any brightening of acne scars, skin, or anything like that.

The current price of $7.95 is slighty pricey for this.

Title: Fantastic purchase
Review: I love everything about this shirt

Title: Universal Wireless plugin
Review: Bought a Blue Ray player that was NOT Wifi'd  (I didn't even know that was possible)... Was told I needed one of these "universal wireless" plugins... I worked and worked on it... followed all the directions, looked up advice on YouTube and NEVER got it to work.  Note to self:  DON'T buy things that aren't wifi... trying "upgrade" them later RARELY works - at least in my experience - these devices are rarely "universal."  Anyway.... Sad, but expensive garbage can decor.  Eh.

Title: Don't waste your money o fake Pumas
Review: Fake fake fake! Go on with your fake shiny shoes.

Title: arrived leaking
Review: I didn't know a body scrub could be oily and this one is. Not what I was wanting. It exfoliated great, I was expecting it to rinse clean but it leaves a residue that others might find attractive.

Title: Nice exfoliator - overpriced for my needs
Review: This is a gentle exfoliator. Rating it 4 stars mainly because I didn't care for the aroma (somewhat strong) and I think it is way over priced. I am 60 years old and do not have crepe issues, but I do have aging skin and sagging issues. I have used this for two weeks now. I will state that my skin is a lot smoother than it was before I used it and it does appear to be more hydrated (considering I am in Florida, that is a strong plus). However, for the money, I could buy Ahave products for exfoliating and get the same or better results (and much less a cost). As I do not have major creping issues, I cannot say whether this products works (which may justify the cost), but for my needs it is an excellent exfoliator and I know I could do better price wise for same

Title: Sized way too small
Review: I ordered an extra large and they wouldn’t go over the calves of my legs! The sizes are for children not adults

Title: Lathers and cleans well; leaves my hair clean and hydrated; bottle pump defective Review: I have short to medium-length fine curly hair. This shampoo lathers and cleans well and leaves my hair clean and hydrated. The fragrance is okay to me but not great. I do like the results, especially since it did not weigh down my curls. What I do not like is that the shampoo does sting the eyes if one is not careful. I also do not like that my bottle pump broke off from the bottle as I went to open the pump. I had to unscrew the cap to get to the shampoo but I was eventually able to make the defective pump work.

The current price of $11.99 is competitive.

Title: Bra sewn goofy ! Did not fit. Review: I usually do not have a problem buying a bra.
This did not fit right for me..
I wear a 36 C, not tight , I'm 5'2 125lbs. I'm a older women, and need some type of support, ha, and this bra did Not give me any support , besides,
The bra was sewn goofy !

Title: Low rise jean shorts
Review: I was expecting a greater comfort/softer feel to these "pajama" jeans. The waist was low-rise, which I do not like, so I returned them. The shipping and packaging was fine. Medium was a bit tight for me, I usually wear 8-10.

Title: Super soft and comfy
Review: Got these as a gift for my mom and grandma. They really like them, but say that it can be kinda tight after a long day. Highly recommend as a gift for those who like comfy socks

Title: Tired of fitness trackers not working
Review: Talked to my phone and laptop once and never again. I still use it but without that capability you lose so much.

Title: Four Stars
Review: Worked fine.

Title: rolling backpack carry on
Review: My husband travels a lot and prefers a backpack for laptop and diabetic meds, etc.  The one he's used for about 5 years finally gave out and this was the one he picked to replace it.  We'll see how it stands up.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: A lot smaller than I expected
Review: I ordered my size as usual and I noticed it was a lot smaller than other similar bras I've bought here also it just didn't close but barely, I think it is designed for women with no boobs no offense but honestly it is extremely tight, it's been a while since I bought it so I don't think I can return it but I am probably not wearing this ...

Title: Perfect fit and looks great!
Review: Really nice quality blouse. I am 5'7" 158 lbs and I chose the size large. Fits perfectly, no gaps and feels soft and great on. I have received a bunch of compliments after wearing it this past weekend. The blouse is perfect with jeans (as I wore it) or as something a little dressier (say for work). I highly recommend.

Title: Great case
Review: My daughter loves her case with the pen holder.  It fits her tablet perfectly and she likes the fact that she can store her pen where she can find it

Title: Needs more scrubbies.
Review: I am very sad that this face scrub did not have enough "scrub" to it.  I'm looking for a little more of those little scrubbers in it. Also if it lathered.

Title: Had to return due to way to small
Review: Runs very small, order 2 sizes up

Title: The size of the tip of a pencil eraser; I almost need a magnifying glass to see this
Review: This is cute but super tiny. The coffee cup has a heart image on top. It can be hooked through the center or via the cup handle. Although it is sterling silver, this is just way too small for an adult. This looks like a child's charm. I also feel the current price of $12.99 is too much for this. I would not expect this to be priced at more than $6.99.

Title: Beach cover up, thin material. Review: This could be used for a beach cover up for any size. It’s very roomy.
I’m a size 10, and its big for me.
The material is nice spring colors, not bright, and very thin material.i
This is a big square peice of material folded in half, sewed up the sides but not sewed up where
Your arms Go threw, and where you put your head threw..
There is a tie in the front, the rest is baggy.

I’m not a fan of what this is, and why it’s called a Kimono! I think its more like a Poncho!

Title: A bit like tying up my hair with telephone cord; somewhat tangling Review: These spiral hair ties are gorgeous and perfect for making small pony tails or tying up one's hair. Unfortunately, they do not slip out of my hair easily and feel like I am tying my hair up with a telephone cord.  I tried the Goomee brand spirals, Amazon Item # B08HQYH3H9, and they are not only half the price but do not tangle my hair and are easily removed.

The current price of these ties is $15.99 which coms to an expensive $1.33 per spiral.

Title: Cream blush that is like rouge from years ago; too light for me
Review: This is a cream blush that reminds me of rouge from the 1950's. Unfortunately, it is too light for me and I have a fair complexion. I actually have to highlight it further with a darker blush.

Title: I don't know why slippers aren't available in half sizes ...
Review: I don't know why slippers aren't available in half sizes.  I'm a 9 1/2, not 9, not 10. They have to make enough of these to justify making half sizes, especially the more popular sizes.

Title: Terribke
Review: Material was like plastic. I threw it out after receiving

Title: Can't Use Because Of The Handle Review: The razors are good. The only problem I have is that the razor heads won't stay attached to the handle.

I contacted the seller, but never heard anything back about the faulty handle.

Its a good razor, unfortunately I can't use them because of the handle.

Title: Worked great until then
Review: I have had this product less than two years. The screen went black and would not charge or turn on. Worked great until then.  Now I have nothing.  Would never buy a kindle again.  It was used very little and I was very disappointed.  Only response from amazon was a 20 to 30 dollar certificate off a new one. no thanks.

Title: Comfortable but the sound is off
Review: I like these because they are comfortable but they sound a bit muffled. I mean, I like the way they are made and I am going to keep them but I am not that happy with the sound and I am not at all into my music. I expect a person who takes their music really seriously would be really disappointed in these but maybe I am wrong

Title: just ok  nothing spectacular
Review: someday im gonna find the PERFECT tweezer  i have a collection  you wouldnt believe

Title: So tacky, waste of money and smells!
Review: Opened boxed,  took one look and did the return  in the same sitting!

Title: Lots of compliments
Review: This is a great shirt to wear for hiking, it wicks away moisture and is comfortable in the summer heat.  It fits as expected which is a blessing as many items purchased on line are often too small.  I have gotten compliments on it as well.

Title: Love them!
Review: So cute and comfy... even sexy!!!

Title: This is so wrong!!!
Review: Absolute mess!!!

Title: Mildly hydrating but I can’t get past the color of product; it looks like molasses and coffee Review: The color in these bottles and tub is a turn off to me. I like my shampoo and cream rinse to be clear or creamy white--preferably clear. I was almost afraid this was going to change the color of my hair. However, the shampoo lathers up nicely with a white lather. The conditioner is not overly hydrating--just enough for my fine curly hair. I did not try the masque because I do not need intense moisturizing.

I do like the results but the color of the product is such a turn off that this is not something I would order again. If it were not for the color, I would have rated this 4.5 stars. The Shea Moisture products are wonderful  but this ensemble is just not for me. Also, the current price of $23.49 ($27.63 minus 15%) comes to $7.83 per item.

Title: This PJ top is soft and comfortable to sleep in but it is a bit see-through Review: I ordered the [[ASIN:B01N2NRKNT Mae Women's Short Sleeve Notch Collar Pajama Set]] in a large and the top was not designed correctly but the pants were fine. Therefore, I ordered this top to pair it with those bottoms.

Do not be fooled by the picture on Amazon as it is only the top that is being sold and not the entire PJ set pictured. Nevertheless, this is soft, is comfortable to sleep in, and washes and dries nicely. The two negatives for me are that the top is a bit see-through and $20 is overpriced for this very thin PJ shirt.

Title: Three Stars
Review: The stone comes loose.

Title: Returned - not my quality
Review: Fabric poor quality

Title: Very odd-looking clips; they hold well but do not look as good as I’d like Review: There are three claw clips in the package. They are very odd-looking bow clips and are medium-sized and well-made. Each clip has two bows in the design. They grip my short to medium fine curly hair perfectly but they would work better with longer hair. I just do not like how they look.

At the current price of $6.99 it comes to a pricey $2.33 per clip. The quality of these clips is good but the look is another story.

Title: Either fake or old
Review: I’ve loved the scent of skin so soft and have used it for years!  An added bonus is mosquitoes dislike for the fragrance!  The bottle I received was NOT the real deal! Very disappointing!  I sent it back!  I’m just glad Amazon makes the return process easy or I would have been pissed!  I wonder what was really in that bottle and what Avon would think about the counterfeit product I received!?

Title: Prefer the Samsung Buds+
Review: My daughter got these for Christmas.  After they ran out of charge, she realized they were very temperamental with charging.  She returned them and got the Samsung Buds+.  She said the Buds sound is better, they fit better, and charging is simple.

Title: Really great luggage!
Review: I have been using TravelPro luggage almost exclusively for over 10 years now. However, the largest size I have has been well used and so I was hoping to find a replacement for it. When I saw this Fanskey Luggage, I had never heard of the brand, but I figured I would try it. This is a 3 piece set with spinner wheels. The quality is as good as TravelPro and I actually might say I think it is better. The cases maneuver well and are very lightweight. I love the rich dark red color as well (I don't see much luggage this color so it makes it easier when I was at the airport over the holidays to spot). The three sizes fit within each other for easy storage. Highly recommend!

Title: I love it, but I want to cry now.
Review: I just got my Zagg 6th IPad keypad, this one you just slip the IPad in the slot and connect with WiFi..  I did everything and then I was going to shut it and I could not believe my eyes. The lower part of my IPad screen just shattered all across it and runners going upper. I’m sick. Zagg has a problem. Now my IPad is ruined.  I have had it 10 minutes and this is not good.  HELP!!!!!  Who it responsible for this mishap.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Love this jacket/sweater. It's going to look so cute on my grandson!

Title: Too bright
Review: I needed a hand size mirror with a light, so I got this one. I thought it was the perfect size because it fits so nicely in my hand. It has 2 mirrors and one side lights up. Omg..it is so bright! I didnt like that. I can see my face that well because it is this way. I wish there  was an adjustable brightness switch so I could turn it down. Just something to keep in mind if this is what you want.

Title: Not soft as other brands
Review: Not that soft and comfortable like other brands I purchased.

Title: must try this hair mask
Review: Well, I decided to try the mask because I really enjoyed their serum, for it has improved the quality of my color treated fine hair. I have spent alot of money on deep penetrating conditioners that don't live up to their claim. This mask has a strong perfumed scent. The product is thick and my hair felt soft while it was on my hair. When I rinsed out the mask and let my hair air dry, my hair was so soft and conditioned. This product delivers.

Title: Horrible color
Review: Horrible color,  made me look like I just ate a powdered doughnut...

Title: Great eyeshadows, would have liked an applicator
Review: This is a really nice pallet of eyeshadow colors. I love the muted solid colors and the ones that have a tinge of shiny in them. I deducted a star just because it doesn't come with a brush/applicator which I really would have liked to have had. I understand some people prefer their own brushes, but I didn't have any so had to search around for one in an older eyeshadow that I had around. Other than that, I really liked the neutral/brown colors and the quality of the shadows.

Title: Easy to use good quality product
Review: I really like the colors and the consistency of this polygel really easy to use and no strong  odors

Title: Thick, adjustable hair ties that are not worth the high price
Review: There are three hair ties for the current price of $15.95, which comes to $5.32 per tie. These ties are thicker than the standard elastic hair ties and they have a bead on the end that can be moved up or down to adjust the amount of elastic being used (see photo with adjustment). They work well but if the knots on the ends come apart, then the hair tie will become useless. I prefer to use them as is. However, these are not worth more than $1 per tie. These are like scrunchies but tremendously thinner. My 3-star rating is due to the high cost of these not too exceptional hair ties.

Title: Brush head small & easily misshapen; handle has decent reach; a bit pricey Review: There are two back brushes in this set.

I use a back brush every day. These back brushes work okay. They have a small brush head that is of medium softness so it is mildly exfoliating. However, the bristles arrive misshapen and get misshapen easily. The handle is long enough for me to reach my back comfortably. The reverse side of the brush has plastic massaging nubs; they are useless to me since they are not made of silicone and do not move.

I like that these have a hole for a hook in the handle. These are definitely not my favorite back brushes but they are functional.

The current price of $13.19 ($13.88 minus 5%) is on the high side of competitively priced for brushes of this calibre as it comes to $6.59 per brush. I personally would not have expected to pay more than $4.50 to $5 for each brush.

Title: So Pretty!
Review: Really decorates my wooden book stand beautifully!

Title: Not sure if it's safe.. But, it is working!? Review: Has inconsistent heat distributed.. And shuts off sporacticly not as schedule. When working it's ok.. But,
Concern is a clicking/ticking while it's on. It's constant and only while it's on..and it's different plugs/places so, it's not the electrical source!!

Title: Not my favorite color
Review: I like the fit and feel of this sweater, but I found the shade of green a bit unflattering. It’s not like an army green or more muted, it’s like Christmas tree green. Also it has a bit of a sheen to it which makes it look a bit cheap. A noticed a couple pulled threads as well. But overall it looks like it would keep you warm and function well and I do like the fit of it, so maybe a different color would be 4 or 5 stars.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Great for walking

Title: RECCOMENDED
Review: HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!!

Title: Pass on by
Review: The shoulder straps are way too long

Title: Nice, not greasy ! Review: I would say this lotion is nice.
I have had better Natural hand creams, but with that said,
it is nice, and not greasy.

There are wonderful healthy natural Nutrients in this lotion, which is why
I gave it a 3 star.

I don't see where the fine lines in my hands look smooth from this lotion,
as other hand creams do.

I expected a more Vanila/orange scent,but after its on for awhile it does live up to its scent name, although very faint! At first it smells like lemon.
It is not a strong scent that would interfer with purfumes.

I think a Man would like this also

Title: Great price
Review: The price was great for the tv. Not very sturdy especially for older heavier tv’s.

Title: Great hair pomade, son uses it daily
Review: This is a great styling cream for men and my son uses it all the time. This goes along with the Redken Brews line of products and it is all he uses. Great holding, not sticky and hair stays soft and pliable. Light fragrance and reasonably priced. Nothing but kudos for Redken in making another great hair product. This makes for a great Christmas stocking gift and I always fill up their stockings with things which they need and enjoy.

Title: Does the job but..
Review: It does the job but I can't get past the overwhelming smell. I have sensitive skin and after using the cloths twice, my face did breakout.  To each, their own.

Title: Color saturation is great.
Review: Hilarious, lots of compliments. Color saturation is great.

Title: These fit me like regular knee-hi socks; hardly any compression and loose in the toe Review: These are comfortable socks and I was able to get them on easily like regular socks. I take a size 9 shoe and selected these in a medium. I did not feel much compression (if any) at all. After wearing them all day, the toe area was loose.

These wash well but I choose to lay them flat to dry.

Overall these are nice socks but since they do not feel like there's much if any compression, I rated them 3 stars. As regular socks, they are 4 stars.

Title: Uninterrupted viewing😊
Review: Ease of use and value

Title: Avoid.
Review: For reference I am 5’5” and am 165 lbs. I ordered a large and it was way too small. 5’5” 165 lbs  The bottoms tie on either side and STILL way too small. The top fit well enough in the breast department (36C) but uncomfortable in the arms as it was constricting and I was unable to move my arms around.

Title: Good little transmitter
Review: It’s exactly what is says it is. You connect it to your phone via Bluetooth and it’ll play your phone sound over the radio. It automatically connects when in range. The sound quality is good and it’s more or less initally easy to figure out how to use

Title: Has stopped working after a very short period of time.
Review: I recently purchased these two cords.  After very little use, one of the power cords no longer works.  Very disappointing.

Title: Not Impressed
Review: This necklace doesn't look as nice in person as it does in the pictures. It's really basic and plain. It looks like something a teen or child would wear rather than an adult. The chain is so-so. It doesn't feel like it's going to break right away, but it doesn't seem like it's going to last either. The overall design of the charm is cute, but it looks unfinished. I'm fine with a simple, non-flashy piece of jewelry, but I still want it to be a good quality. This just feels like something you would get a discount store.

Title: The back comes down very low.
Review: I have these that I purchased elsewhere. With these though I put them on and they seemed low in the back not the usual fit. After washing them the fabric became softer like my others but they got smaller. The back went down lower. I will not be wearing them at all.

Title: It's pretty but... Review: I love the color and design. The only problem is, I have very long, very fine hair. Because of that, it's had to pull it all back effectively. Because of the plastic crystal the holder has to pull the band away from my head a wee bit, making it uncomfortable. And hair escapes defeating the reason I got it.

So if you have thick hair or aren't worried about pulling it all back and staying in place, you might like it. It really is beautifully designed, it just doesn't work to well for me.

Title: Not good for cycling Review: I have tried using different ear wings and bud and they have excessive wind noise coming through. I had jaybird vistas and jabra 75 that had no wind noise at all. These are definitely not good for cycling.

The sound is fine when you are indoors are just walking. Decent amount of bass and treble. My husband could hear me talking to him through the mics while riding my bike but I couldn't hear him well due to the aforementioned wind noise.

Title: Good at first.......
Review: Played wonderfully for about 3 weeks and out of nowhere it developed a permanent "shaking" in the picture even when there was no DVD inside. Sort of like it had a short in is system. Tried everything but it won't stop.  Not happy.  ☹️

Title: Not the best
Review: I thought these were a cheap looking pair of glasses. I didn't like the frame at all, it truly is oversized. I even had my husband try them on. He is 6'4" with a full size face and they even looked way to big on him. I guess for $15 they are ok, but it's worth spending a few dollars more and going for some quality when it comes to glasses.

Title: Not sized right Review: I ordered a 2X because I knew it would shrink in the wash. Fortunately I put it on before wasn't. There's no way this is a 2X.

I'm 4'9" tall and weigh 151 pounds with a 36C chest. It's stretched tight across my back and barely buttons up the front (gaps between buttons. Very disappointing because I love this color..

Title: Lacks Consistency... Review: I bought this backpack for my gf last year and it was so awesome that I just bought one for myself. Side by side, mine is a tad bit smaller/tighter. I used hers for a few trips and was able to easily put my 19" HP laptop in it (despite other reviews regarding this), so I felt very comfortable ordering the same pack for my new 16" laptop, which barely fits in the new backpack.

My only guess for this is that NG has outsourced this bag to a different (Chinese) manufacturer, as the color is slightly off and the size is tighter/smaller. I'm sure, overall, NG is reliable, but who knows how well they're watching the tolerances in the manufacturing process. In my experience, Chinese manufacturers allow much more tolerance in their process than typical American manufacturers.

Nonetheless, it's a great pack, with lots of pockets, rugged integrity, and very comfortable.

Title: super cheap plasticTotal waste of money
Review: Doesn't work very good at all. The cheap plastic is hard to turn  with the weight of the hose.

Title: Goes on Like Crayon
Review: It goes on like crayon and the color is not true to advertisement.

Title: You need to use more than the directions
Review: This didn't work as well as I was hoping.

Title: works
Review: comfortable in the ear... I bought these to use as a handsfree option that doesn't have to be charged.  I will update if there are any wear/use issues.

Title: USB cable too short
Review: The fan works well enough but the USB cable is too short and would not reach to a USB port on my computer from the location where I wanted to place the fan. I am going to have to get a USB extension cable. I guess it is partially my fault for not checking in advance to see how long the cable is. But why the cable is so short I do not know.

Title: Pure grease with fragrance Review: I do not like this stick at all. I applied this to my face, hands, and feet. This is super greasy. I felt like I was taking coconut oil out of the jar and just smearing it all over me. I also did not find it very moisturizing; just slippery / greasy.  I do like the fresh fragrance, however.

Perhaps others will like this, but I do not. As the tube says, this is solid oil. It is made with various oils such as sunflower seed oil, beeswax, limnanthes seed oil, etc. Also, at $26 for a .8 ounce tube is expensive. I already used one-tenth of the tube in the first application.

Title: Foot cream is lightweight, moisturizing, & smells great; NOT FRAGRANCE FREE; pumice is AWFUL Review: Included in the package is one four-ounce tube of foot cream and a large double-sided pumice. The pink side of the pumice is coarser than the green side.

The foot cream is great. It is lightweight, moisturizing, and smells great. It is no better or worse than any type of cream one uses for their body but I do LOVE the fragrance which I cannot really describe. Unfortunately, the Amazon site says this is fragrance free and that is not the case; therefore, I took off one star for false advertising.

The pumice, however, is awful. It does work to file down the cracked heels and dry spots on the feet. However, the resulting debris left behind feels like sand. Therefore, when I put on the cream, it feels like I am rubbing both sand and cream onto my feet. I threw the pumice out after the first use. I took off another star for this.

The current price of $7.99 is reasonable for this cream. I personally love the cream but dislike that they advertised fragrance free and included a pumice that dissolves into a sand after using on the feet.

Title: The jury may still be out...
Review: I have been using this for about 3 weeks now. Goes on like water, takes a bit for the skin to absorb it. After it dries, I finish it up with a Glo Skin moisturizer. I am used to getting microderms and even peels to help keep my skin fresh. I can't really say that I see a major difference with using this liquid, however, I do know my skin feels smooth and has a glow to it. I will continue to use this in conjunction with my regular beauty regimen and will update this review if my results substantially change.

Title: Tiny Shoes with Foreign sizing that will NOT convert properly - RUN AWAY!!!
Review: DO NOT TRY TO FIT EUROPEAN OR ASIAN SHOE SIZES WHETHER THEY SAY IT CONVERTS OR NOT!!!! Run from any foreign shoe cuz converting sizes does not work. I wear size 11. Used their conversion because I've had this issue before. I ordered 12 to be safe (I thought) but this converted size 12 MIGHT fit my daughter's ladies size 9. We'll see. NEVER CONVERT SHOE SIZES - RUN AWAY!

Title: Disappointed
Review: This was an adorable belt , unfortunately it broke before I ever got out of my home to wear it.

Title: Fits like a glove
Review: Gift for a friend... perfect fit for a lap top.  She is very pleased by the color and delivery time.

Title: Thin, comfortable mid-calf socks that stay put but they are not soft Review: There are two pairs of mid-calf socks in this package. These are thin but comfortable and they stay put in the shoe. Unfortunately, they are a bid scratchy material in the sense that they are not soft at all. Personally, I prefer the softness of their [[ASIN:B07H8MRRYP Gold Toe Women's Ultra Soft and Cozy Crew Socks]] compared to these; however, those soft socks fall down.

These wash and dry well.

Title: Difficult to cinch closed & is not a bag that will last long; a bit odd to me Review: This bag is a bit difficult to cinch closed and strikes me as something that will not last if opening and closing regularly. It comes with a matching coin purse that snaps to the inside of the main cosmetic case (see photo). It also comes with an empty plastic bag for putting used brushes in that also snaps closed (see photo). To me this extra piece cheapens the bag even further because that plastic baggie is something I would normally throw out. Inside the make-up bag are pockets around the side as can be seen in the photo where I inserted a comb in one of the pockets.

This cosmetic case does not hold too much and may not hold a full brush depending on how long the handle is. To me this is a toiletry bag that I consider disposable. It is cute, a bit odd, and will be functional for a short period. However, the current price of $5.99 is about right for this.

Review: FAIR QUALITY

Title: Typical eyebrow pencil- nothing unique
Review: This is fine but there’s nothing special about it. It’s an eyebrow pencil- just like we’ve all used a thousand times before. The tip is shaped like a marquis diamond but that’s it. Still just an eyebrow pencil.

Title: Fisher-price Precious Planet Whale of a tub
Review: Purchased for a beach themed baby shower... filled with cute little things, a diaper bag etc... it was a big hit.  It arrived quickly (I have prime) and in great ship along with a few other things I ordered.  Will update review if anything pops up.

Title: A-gold brand is much better
Review: I purchased about five of another brand (A-gold) that work much much better.

Title: improved sound quality needed
Review: Smaller than I thought it would be. While it is louder then speaker I was using the sound quality is not as good as expected for a DeWalt product.

Title: Just plain awesome
Review: Spent a week backpacking over the summer. And this product was a lifesaver. Its amazing how well it cools you down, and how it stays so cool for do long. And once it heats up... just snap it and its cold again. I will never hike in summertime without it.

Title: Great Fit
Review: Great looking and fits great

Title: blech
Review: I love good liner brushes. I have used ELF products before but this one turns to crap after first use even my brush cleaner won't help the bristles go back to normal. It was a waist of money!

Title: Nice sneaker
Review: Nice slip on sneaker for those days when running to the store.  Found them a little uncomfortable for wearing all day but otherwise very nice.

Title: I’m fair , this was too lite, and didn’t cover leg scar, or hands. Review: I’m very fair, but this is too lite for me unfortunately.

My leg scar, and the spots on my hands. But the spots I can see through this,
