Title: it's ok
Review: I knew by reading previous reviews that this hoodie was thinner, not a thick fuzzy hoodie and that was perfect for me. I don't like the added bulk.  My disappointement is in the sleeve length.  They are too short for my taste.  However, I will keep it as a runaround.  Otherwise, the fit is what I expected from Woman Within. I am currently washing it.  I have a closet top dryer.  I will hang it in there on really super low heat and hope the sleeves don't shrink up any more!  Hope this helps!

Title: magnetic eyelashes with attachment tool
Review: Ok. I tried for literally about 3 and 1/2 hours before I finally gave up.  I chose this particular brand after reading reviews of others that didn't have enough magnetic.  These have more than 2 so I thought would help.  It's really, really hard to just get these on the attachment tool right.  THEN you have to hold your hand, head and mouth just right to "clip" onto your own lashes.  I never achieved it.  I REALLY wanted these to work.  So, I am going back to the magnetic eyeliner - way easier - at least for me.  I just tossed these.  I would not recommend them.  If someone IS able to get these on, it would be a total fluke!

Title: These are difficult for me to use and tricky to stay put in my hair Review: I find that these clips are difficult to use and stay put in my hair. I had to try several times to get these from falling out. I wish there were some instructions or photos, in case I am doing this wrong. However, I have medium-length hair in the back and it only provided a light hold once I got this seated. Perhaps it would work best with someone who has longer hair or who has their hair already tied up and wants to use a clip to tie up loose ends into an existing bun.

The current price of $9.99 comes to $2.50 per clip, which I consider expensive for these types of clips.

Title: a shirt

Title: Absorbs quickly; leaves my face firm and hydrated; fragrance okay; too pricey Review: I have an aversion to creams that are anything but white and this one has a peachy salmon color to it. It is not staining or anything like that but I never like colored creams.

Also, the current price tag of $76 is a bit steep for this cream especially since the color and fragrance are not my favorite.

Title: Gave away as they were too small :(

Title: maybelline lip stain In The Buff color
Review: I am 55... fair skinned. My lips have always been light and I prefer a lip "stain" because I think it stays on a little longer and maybe a bit less drying that the "24hr" matte/dry lipsticks. I have always used the "In the Buff" color... I have taken some pics for comparison... but lipstick/stain is hard - it can look different on everyone... I usually apply 2x in the day... it is matte, but I apply a sheer, comfortable gloss to the top that stays on quite well and I think helps the lipstain stay on a little better. I have shared pics of BEFORE, IMMEDIATELY AFTER APPLICATION and then 8 HOURS later... which included a meal and in this case I did not reapply the stain, only my sheer gloss and only 1x. It's not perfect. I wish it lasted a bit longer. BUT... it's best I've found in terms of color and lasting power of the dozen or so others I have tried. They arrived quickly (I have prime) and in good condition via USPS. I never hesitate to update my reviews if new info would be helpful and I DO NOT receive products for discount or free.

Title: Smaller in the back than in the front.
Review: Although, these don't crawl, they have an odd fit to them.  They are smaller in the back than in the front.  I do have a booty, but this is a big difference.  I will pass them to some of my friends who have less of a booty, but I don't think it will make much of a difference.  It feels like they put the back on the front and the front on the back.

Title: Absolutely fantastic, I really love this!
Review: I love this Neutrogena product. I use it in the shower every morning (while I condition my hair) and my facial skin has never been smoother or softer. I love the way it makes my face feel, too, invigorating it (almost like a menthol tingle) which lasts even after I rinse. If you love your skin, you need to take care of it, and regular exfoliation is key to keeping your skin youthful and fresh. I highly recommend this facial scrub for everyone!

Title: Thin sweater good for when layering but too pricey Review: The current price of $47.99 is outrageous for this thin sweater. I would not pay more than $15 for this because it is very thin. Nevertheless, it is good for layering due to its thinness. There are two front pockets--one on either side. It also has a button down front. I like the look but not the paper thin texture.

Note that it comes in compressed packaging (see first photo).

Title: Softens my face but I don't like the smell or the mask-like feeling when it's on me Review: This night treatment left my face smooth but I don't like the smell or the way it feels going on. It felt like I was putting on a mask and felt like I had a light mask on all night. There also must be a over 50 ingredients in this product based on the label.

The directions say to apply two drops nightly. I assume it means to face and neck only and to avoid the eyes. I could not find anywhere in the packaging as to whether it meant the entire face or not. I just applied it on my face and avoided the eye area.

Results are smooth after use but I would not buy this for three reasons. The current price of $75 is way too high, I don't like the smell, and do not like the feeling of having applied a light mask to my face that I have to sleep in.

Title: fitbit 3 stretch bracelet Review: UPDATE BELOW....I was looking for an easy on easy off choice that wasn't cutting off my circulation. I have a very average wrist - but every one of the stretch type bracelets I've tried before has been too snug. Opted for the larger size option and it's perfect. Firmly fits, but not cutting off circulation. I chose the white. It's pretty without being obnoxious sparkly. The side clips (that attach to the fitbit) are secure. Now. We'll see how long it lasts. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE: I still like the bands convenience - on and off - after wearing for just a few weeks - the material is now dull and snaggy. Eh. Its because of the satin material. I wish the material would have held up. I am going to try one of the prints - hopefully they are NOT a satin material.

Title: so it's pretty useless at this point--a false sense of security is ...
Review: Goes off sporadically during the night, when no one has passed by to set it off, but also only triggers the alarm about 50% of the time when someone does pass by. We bought it for child safety reasons, wanted to know when our little one leaves his room, so it's pretty useless at this point--a false sense of security is worse than having no alarm at all. The first set we purchased worked well for about a year, than began malfunctioning in the manner described above. We changed the batteries, saw no difference and figured it was time to purchase a new set. Unfortunately, the new set did not work properly either, straight from the box. Disappointing.

Title: easy and fast
Review: Styling with one hand is always a challenge.  I love this styler.  Unlike older "versions" of this rotating wand, it doesn't get stuck.  And it if does, the reverse motion makes it easy to untangle.  I love that it adds just the right amount of body and smoothness.  Honestly, it makes life easier.

Title: Not the best on the market
Review: I ordered this as it is supposed to have been less chemicals that other brands but when it arrived and I checked the ingredients it turns out to be no better than any other retinol on the market. Title: Not something I really liked
Review: Sorry, I wasn't overly thrilled with this mask. I was really hoping for something different. I love patchouli and I was hoping for a patchouli mask. I did not smell patchouli at all, to me it almost seemed medicinal (like iodine). Taking it out of the wrapper it is a wet patch, got it all over my countertop trying to get it out and then on my face. Left it on according to directions, but couldn't keep it there the whole time because of the smell. Even after I removed it, I could still smell it. I did rate this as three stars (and not less) because I did like the moisturizing benefit it brought to my skin. But overall, it is slimy, wet and smelly. I just didn't like it at all.

Title: Label Recommends Use With Styling Products Review: This MYSTIC BOTANICALS HYDRATE AND NOURISH CONDITIONER (Babassu Oil/mango/shea Butter, 8 Fluid Ounce) leaves my short hair looking shiny, with reasonable body. However, it doesn’t seem to hydrate much--it leaves my undamaged hair feeling dry (compared to most other conditioners that I’ve used).

The instructions say: “Follow with one of our amazing styling products.” I didn’t do this, as my haircut is strictly “wash and wear”. However, I did leave the conditioner on for at least 2 minutes (the label says to leave it on for 1-5 minutes). Overall, I was disappointed in the way this product performed when used all by itself as a conditioner.

The conditioner has a light, pleasant fragrance. The scent goes away fairly quickly.

Title: I love this little tool!
Review: I try to get facials and microderms at least once a month (more often if I can afford them). I wasn't sure what to expect when I saw this little tool. I actually love it now after using it for the past 3 weeks! It may not be quite as good as a professional microderm, but it is great to use weekly when I am between salon visits. Super easy to use and the results are actually pretty amazing. I highly recommend it for anyone who is looking to supplement their beauty regimen and to help improve your skin tone and texture.

After I lowered the mounting brackets and brought the camera to a level where I did not have to use a ladder to access them so I could work on them as the support people said, they got stolen!! Third, it leaves my skin feeling clean and smoother than it did before I started using it. I never thought I could find a facial cleanser that actually softens and improves the elasticity of my skin and helps moisturize. I am in my 60's and living in Florida and have been looking for a cleanser just like this. Highly recommend!

I’m not the type of person that has that knowledge nor am I one to leave exposed wiring in my car. I ended up returning the whole set up for a refund. It just didn’t work for my needs. I would rather have something with a larger display and a simpler set up. It’s all a matter of preference but I have nothing negative to say about the seller or the product.

Title: Not For Me
Review: I tried this out a few times and just ended up not liking it very much at all. First, the applicator on the end is useless. It is entirely too small for foundation. Plus, I felt like it was rough since it is attached to the plastic. I’ll just stick to my beauty blender for application. My skin is pretty normal. I felt like this caked up and settled into all the wrong areas. Even when I set it, it wasn’t long before it was creasing on me and getting cakey looking between the eyebrows and around the mouth. It does apply really easily from the stick and then blend really well with a beauty blender, but it just always ended up looking bad. It seemed a little too thick. It just didn’t soak into the skin nicely and seemed to hang out on the surface. It also didn’t like to blend with my concealer. I tried a few of them, but they weren’t friends. It worked best with pore filling primer underneath. Illuminating primer was an instant disaster for me. I would say what coverage you get is a medium coverage to full- but the way the product shifts isn’t going to give even coverage anywhere.

Title: i ended up getting these instead which are SUPER durable, all seven colors for a great price Review: a bit pricey for a single, and i agree the ad is misleading. i ended up getting these instead which are SUPER durable, all seven colors for a great price:

the other weird/great thing i wouldn't have expected is that the chiffon DOESN'T WRINKLE like silk does--like AT ALL. it just stays flat and smooth somehow. anyway, i recommend that set more! have fun!

Title: Stay away from these refurbed cartridges!!
Review: I opened one black cartridge, and it didn't print at all, even after numerous attempts to print and align the cartridges.  I then opened the second black cartridge and found that black ink was leaking out around the print head.  I am certainly not placing this in my printer to leak all over the inside of it.  I don't know about the color cartridge because I'm not even going to open it.  I tried to return these cartridges but found the time limit for returning is passed.  I order my cartridges whenever I put in the last one I have on hand -- how do I know how long until I'll need another one?!?  I didn't realize there was a time limit for returns but here I am one day past the time limit so I'm out the $.  Guess I've learned my lesson.  Here I sit with no cartridge for my printer, in the middle of projects.  Don't depend on these refurbed cartridges!!!

Title: Like a car-wash sponge; big & difficult to work with; definitely not exfoliating Review: After trying this, I am definitely not a fan. I prefer my mesh $2 buff puff over this any day.

First of all, this sponge is large and thick like a car-wash sponge. This makes it difficult to work with. Also, it is somewhat soft, so it is not exfoliating - though I prefer soft over scratchy. In addition, when using soap on this sponge is does not lather up like it does with my buff puff.

Lastly, this sponge looks pink and not brown as the description says.

In summary, I personally do not care for this set of sponges. However, if a sponge like this is something one likes, then this is as functional as any other of its kind, just don't expect it to act like a loofah.

Title: Great finishing spray that everyone can and should have in their cabinet!
Review: Absolutely must have for prolonging the life of your makeup. I have mixed skin (nose oily, cheeks dry) and I find this works incredibly well with my skin. I love using this when I know I will be facing some uncomfortable elements. For example, I have a friend with a boat and whenever I sail, I always finish my make up with setting spray (given the wind and mist on the sea, this setting spray keeps my protected and look like a million bucks hours after application). It's also great to spritz at night before you go out dancing (as it protects your make up from sweat as well). This Maybelline product is a light spray with a light fragrance. Love it!

I have tried many headbands and this is the first set that just is not consistently sized---at least the set that I got.

It does feel durable and the color is pretty, but not what I need. Mostly this disappoints because I asked before buying it and still it didn’t add up to what I was told.

Title: Pretty clips in nice design & colors, and functional but they feel like they will break Review: There are four attractive and subtly colorful butterfly clips in this set. These are not only pretty but since they are small, they work well in my short to medium-length curly hair. They are easy to open and close and do hold my hair. I used them in the back of my head.

However, they do feel cheap even though they do not look cheap. I suppose they are sort of disposable but only time will tell how long they will last. I cannot describe it but when I open the clips I am concerned they will eventually break. For now they are good and they come with a plastic case.

Title: Lackluster lather, hydration is too much for my fine hair Review: I am disappointed in this travel set for my fine curly hair. There are four items in this travel kit. There is a shampoo, conditioner, moisturizing hair mask, and a moisturizing detangler.

The cleanser has a lackluster lather. I wanted more suds and no matter how much I put on my hair, it barely lathered. The conditioner is nice but when my hair dries, it is over moisturizing and makes my hair look darker and not as curly. The detangler / leave-in conditioner only further weighed down my hair and did nothing to detangle it.

Personally, this is not for me. I like that this has fragrance but absolutely hate a cleanser that does not suds up. The conditioner I can tolerate as I just reduce the amount for more fullness.

Since this is travel size, this will last about 3-6 uses depending on the hair length. The moisturizing mask is one use only since it comes in a pouch.

Title: My new favorite!
Review: I ordered this because I was ordering groceries and Whole foods didn’t have any of my regular choices. Surprise! I love it! Lightweight and very moisturizing! I have a new favorite. This is really good stuff! Try it!

Title: Disappointed Review: Very good cooler - But terrible mounting brackets (cheap plastic) - was hard to mount properly!
If it had the common mounting brackets like most coolers - I would give it 4 or 5 stars!

Title: Mediocre foundation set Review: This set includes three implements - a hexagon Brush with its own plastic case, double-side blush brush, and a blender sponge. The bristles are synthetic on the brushes. I actually do not care for the hexagon brush because the bristles are tightly packed and stiff and it does not feel good against my skin. Of course, the packed bristles make this easier to spread liquid foundation.

The double-sided blush brush is very nice and provides good coverage. The blender sponger is dense and has a side with a flat angle that is good for precision and clean blending details.

In summary, the blender is good with liquids. The hexagon brush is good with both liquid and powder, and the blush brush is good with powder. This set is giftable.

For someone who likes to change their brushes and blenders frequently, this is an okay set. The current price of $14.99 ($15.99 minus $1) comes to a pricey $5 per item.

So, basically when you put on the cover for your webcam, there's this fogging around the webcam when you turn off your Mac and shut it down to close it,  which makes it look weird and I can not wipe it off without the removal of the cover. Title: Baggy
Review: My 19 year old daughter loves to wear sweatpants for lounging. She thought these were cute. Unfortunately, they weren't what she wanted. She was hoping for sweatpant style pants. She says these are more like joggers and then proceeded to educate me on the difference between the two. These sag a lot in the crotch and bottom area. The legs are tapered. The overall fit is as expected and are not loose. They are comfortable, but they're not something she would wear out in public.

Title: Not For Larger Wrists
Review: It's been a while since I had gotten a new band for my Fitbit Versa 3. I was excited to have 6 new looks! The bands are easy to swap out. They snap into place nicely. The quality is good. I like the variety of prints. I have a larger wrist. While these can be adjusted to fit me, I don't like that in order to do so, the buckle gets moved up right next to the face of the Fitbit. (see picture). Fitbit recommends that the watch band is loose enough that when you shake your wrist, the band moves a little bit. You don't want it to move too much, but it needs to be somewhat loose. I had to adjust it to the max in order to get it to fit loosely. And if you have a larger wrist then I do, it won't work.

Title: Ok cover, not for older model tablets
Review: The size was correct, but the corners covered up the on/off button and volume buttons.  My Nook Tablet is 3 years old, so maybe not a good match, but it does work (you can still turn of by pushing the corner tab).  Cover is nice, not as heavy as I expected.  And the horizontal "stand" doesn't work like I thought, but does work.

Title: Don’t waste your money.
Review: Not very good quality.  Very cracked looking and Cakey.  Not a fan.

Title: Great brow pencil for daily use
Review: Another great L'Oreal product. Easy to use eyebrow pencil. Full coverage, easy to apply. I use this daily to help fill in my aging (I am in my 60's) sparse brows. Nothing but kudos to L'Oreal for a quality product.

Title: 2or 3 inches too long
Review: Way too long. Otherwise very comfortable, soft material, just wish they were normal inseam. You'd have to be almost 6 feet tall to make these work.

Title: HDMI Stopped Working
Review: Like everyone else has been saying, the HDMI inputs stopped detecting my monitors after a few months. This is an outdated product with no way to update, and you should look elsewhere for something that will last.

Title: Not sure if I'd buy it again
Review: Battery life 5 hours.  Not as promised.  It overheats. It freezes.  The screen when nothing is on it, is mottled. I was really sick when it arrived and for weeks after so I missed the return window.

Title: These run Huge unfortunately! Disapointed, but made well. Review: Made well, but run Huge, yes I said these legging are huge.
I’m a size 10, 5’2 132 lbs, can wear a 12, but its big, and these fit like a size 14! The waist is about 2 to 3 inches too big, and the legs are even Big , but are sewn like tighter leggings, but still big, also the hips. What a shame cause I like these, and can’t wear them..
Maybe take them to a tailer, although not sure its worth the money!!
A medium or maybe a small would have fit like it’s supose too.
The bottom of the legs comes to almost the top of my ankle bone.

When clothes are made in China I never know how the size is going to run!
I have leggings in Medium, large and even Extra large, and they run small. Even the extra large can be tight. Go Figure?
Other wise these are nice leggings.

I can only give these a 2 star cause I can’t wear them. A waste of money.

Title: poorly made
Review: though these are cute looking they're not made well, the rubber is soft and has a weak connection to the bottom of the sole.

Title: Nice quality, comfortable fit, straps are HORRIBLE to adjust
Review: At first when I pulled these out of the bag, I thought.... how is this an XS? It is a large fit, for sure, but I wanted to use these for gardening and so I didn't really care if they were a little big, that was fine. These feel quality, there's no overpowering chemical smell like a lot of clothes these days, and they are comfortable too. But the straps are literally so awful to adjust that if I can't get it adjusted to the proper length I will be returning because this is ridiculous.

Title: Pleasant Scent
Review: I am in my early fifties have had been noticing some hair loss, primarily seeing hair in the shower drain. This conditioner has a pleasant scent. It's a nice creamy consistency. It rinses fine. I haven't noticed any less hair loss so far, but if that changes, I will come back and give an update. It doesn't leave my hair feeling soft either. Those two issues make it just okay in my opinion.

Title: I Found it to Be Drying
Review: I have a separate morning and evening skin care routine, so I was happy to find a serum specifically for nighttime. I also tried their morning serum. While I really liked the morning one, I'm not crazy about this one. I found it to be a bit drying. I am neutral about the scent. It's not bad, but it's not good either. It absorbs really quickly into my skin. It doesn't irritate my sensitive skin. It isn't sticky. After using the serum, I put a night cream on my face and it seemed to absorb more than usual after applying it on top of the serum. Overall, I think it's just okay.

Title: This lightly conditioned my hair without weighing it down but I dislike the vanilla fragrance Review: This arrived well-packaged so that no conditioner leaked out. There's an internal seal and the pump mechanism has to be inserted once the seal is broken. Since the solution was at the top of the bottle, I had to pound the bottle on the counter until it settled otherwise it was starting to overflow as I inserted the pump.

I have tried several of the HairRx shampoos and conditioners recently and I tend to like their conditioners over their shampoos. Unfortunately, I do not like the vanilla scent of this one. On the plus side this conditioner is not overly moisturizing. To me it is well balanced--not too thin and not too thick. I have fine hair and this does not weigh down my curls. I also do not see any difference between this nourishing conditioner and their revitalizing conditioner. They all lightly condition. If the vanilla fragrance was enticing to me, I would have given this 4 stars.

Title: No I'm not super strong. These things are cheaply made
Review: Both adjustable arms broke while trying to fit them to my ears. No I'm not super strong. These things are cheaply made.

Title: Lettering is Dull
Review: I have a couple of other Tommy bags in the same print/design with the Tommy name all over it. The others are canvas material, but their lettering is much brighter. It's noticeable when the items are next to one another. If you didn't see the others, you wouldn't realize how dull it is. The bag is a good size, but could easily be bigger. There's no closure at the top, nor are there any pockets. It does have a cute matching wallet type item that is attached to the inside. The handles are securely attached, but they don't seem as sturdy as some other Tommy tote bags I've seen. It's a cute bag, but doesn't seem particularly sturdy.

Title: Battery did not work Review: Delivery very fast and the price was excellent. Only problem was, the battery did not work. I think it may be my phone and not the battery so my response is that I feel the seller did his end of this deal and tried to help me out. I do not intend to return it since I feel the phone is my own problem.
I really do appreciate the Sellers free shipping, low battery price and fast delivery. His rating is high and I want it to remain that way as it should. Thanks for trying to help me out.
Sincerely, Jan B

It is a heavier weight and feels like it's silky on the outside not like normal Sweatpants. I really enjoy the pattern though....it's very bright.

Title: Fit true to size!
Review: Lightweight and comfortable.

week or so . . . .
sorry no picture, because I'm waiting on a radio dash install kit for aftermarket radio: right now there is a gap on the sides, but that does not bother me nor does it affect the operation of the unit. . .

Title: It's okay for the money.
Review: This computer is okay for maybe a high school student or just someone wanting to use it to browse the internet or pay Bill's. I got it because I needed a cheap laptop to get through my MBA classes for a few months until I could afford a higher quality laptop. I'm disappointed at the small amount of USB slots. I am not pleased with the pop up ads from McAfee and Lenovo. I'm sure there is a way to remove them but I havent figured it out yet. The battery life is just okay. I'm super sad there is no disk drive!! I feel like if i pay over hundreds for a laptop I should not have to buy an external disk drive to use CDs. Some classes have discs to use or install software, super inconvenient with that. It is a little glitchy and slow if you're clicking around too fast, ect. Dont waste your money if you need something with a disc drive, quick fast and high quality for college work, work from home, business ect.

Title: Works well
Review: Let's be honest.  This is a diffuser.  It either works or it does not work.  I found that the diffuser worked and provided even illumination over a wide area with an acceptable loss in flash power.

Title: Nice look but I don't trust the little elastic bands Review: Considering the price of this item and the cost of a Kindle fire, I wouldn't trust this item to hold my fire. It only has 4 little elastic strips on the corners.

The outside is a nice print and a smooth feel. Very attractive. I would say more for a woman than a man but to each his or her own. This is a bright red vs. a deeper red as in the original photo. Pretty.

I would suggest getting a case with sturdier holders in the corners.

Title: Cute!
Review: This is a cute and simple necklace. The quality is okay. While the chain is fairly sturdy, it has a cheap feel to it. Also, the clasp mechanism keeps getting stuck. This particular necklace is marketed to new moms. I'm not a new mom, but I do like the style. It comes on a card that has a new mom sentiment on it, but you could easily remove that before gifting. The chain can be worn at different lengths. I do like it and have been wearing it, but not convinced it will last long.

Title: ULAK IPad Mini 4 Case

It was delivered in a protective cover. The only thing for me is that the kickstand is very hard to pull out for me, did not like that. It is a nice high impact cover for the money and will do its job for protecting the iPad.

Title: Detail on Front Only
Review: This is a cute bead ... on one side only.  The back is totally plain, so when the bead slips around it is just plain metal.  Would have been much more appealing if the travel detail had been on both the front and the back.

Title: DKNY boys t
Review: I thought the price on this tshirt was pretty good, so I purchased for my 8 year old grandson.  I was so disappointed in the quality when it arrived- the material is SUPER thin... wrinkly - even after washing... but the worst is the little blue logo tag that sewn onto the bottom left of the shirt - you can see it in the ad photo.  What's wrong with that?  Well... it's a SUPER sticky silicone like material that STICKS TO EVERYTHING - in the wash - to itself - to everything out of the wash... It's awful.  To be honest, I didn't even donate this one because it's so awful.  I dropped it in the recycle bin. I never like writing negative reviews but I am hoping to spare others this disappointment and waste of cash.

Title: Just ok
Review: This is a thick seemingly durable makeup bag. It comes flat, but can be molded into a rectangular box shape. It can hold a good amount of stuff. I think for the price I could find something I like more at Ross. But overall it does its job well and it is really sparkly.

Review: I absolutely love these earrings. I knew the minute I opened the box, they would be my new go-to everyday pair. I love the size (they are mid size) and beautifully quality made. I love all things Celtic and this design fits my personality and style just perfectly. Presented in a nice gift box, too, so these would make a wonderful present for the special woman in your life.

Review: I found these sock to be comfortable, nicely made and wear well; pricing is also good value.  I would recommend this product.

Title: Excellent as a hair fragrance but hold only lasts 30 minutes Review: I was so excited to try this. This hairspray comes in a three-pack and at the current price of $14.49 (that is minus the $1.50 offer), it would be a good deal if it worked.

I shook the can as directed and sprayed a generous amount on my short to medium fine curly hair. The fragrance is DIVINE; I absolutely love the scent. I used a generous amount on my entire head. However, once the spray is dispensed, my hair felt like it had a hair net on it. I suspected that was for maximum hold and was initially pleased. Unfortunately, once my it dried, the hold disappeared and my hair went flat. I could still feel some product in my hair but I felt as if most of the product evaporated once it dried. My hold only lasted about 30 minutes. Perhaps this would last longer if I teased my strands but I do not do that. I am extemely disappointed in the hold and would never order this spray again.

In summary, as a hair frangrance, this is wonderful but as a hair spray and it has a minimal and very short-lasting hold.

Title: VERY DISAPPOINTED!
Review: Very DISAPPOINTED wife!  She ordered her size, but the fit ran small.  She will NOT be ordering 'Hanes' again!

Title: A lot to like with this power strip; does not have many shortcomings
Review: This has a lot of nice features.  I like the size.  It is not as large as some power strips.  The flat power plug is great, as it can easily fit behind a piece of furniture.  Two of the outlets have extra space for large plugs.  Seems like a lot of the things I need to plug in these days have the larger plugs, so for me that's almost a necessity on a power strip.  Wish they had made 3 or 4 with wider space, but it would have made the power strip larger.  The 3 USB charging ports are a good feature, something you are seeing on more and more power strips these days and it is very convenient for me.  Would have been better with one or two more, as I maxed out the 3 already.  The cord is a little on the short side, but worked okay for me.  An overall nice power strip and I like the white color too.  I replaced a larger, old, cumbersome power station with this and gained back some desk space.  Very satisfied with this.

Title: Run small and narrow. Review: These sandals are light weight, the thong part is a type of light weight rubber, although this says it Leather! I could be mistaken.
I ordered these throngs Sandals my husband in a size 10 that he usually wears.
My husband is slim but has a wide foot.
These run small , and narrow, although my husband has never had to buy thong sandals in a wide,
The regular size 10 should have fit, but they did not.
The soles are light weight, not the heavier more sturdy rubber type.
That said , these are cheesy type thongs I would find in a drug store..
But the price is low.

Title: Good Calvin Klein fragrance, long-lasting and pleasantly (although strong) scented
Review: This is a fairly strong scented fragrance for woman. I liked it, but had to apply it sparingly so it didn't overwhelm my coworkers. I typically love Calvin Klein products (I have a closet full of clothes from them), but the verdict is still out as to whether I will be making Obsessed my new go-to fragrance. I did get compliments from my husband, so he really did like it. Long lasting as well so a little goes a long way. Go to your local Macy's (or pick your favorite department store) to sample this before purchasing to be sure it is right for you.

Title: echo
Review: I purchased this echo for my 80 year old mom... she LOVES have access to all the music, an easy timer set, answers to the random question and even a chat when she needs one.  The sound is SOOOO much better than the 1st gen echos...  and it blends with any decor as far as how it looks.  If you're an amazon shopper, you need an echo and these 2nd gens are greatly improved - worthy of try.

Title: Great size and quantity!
Review: With 3 girls, we go through a LOT of hair ties! These are wonderful and there are a ton of them!! They fit around my pointer finger… about 1”.

Title: Feels good on the skin
Review: I have gotten compliments on this.  It's sizing is right on.  I purchased a 2X.

Title: Lightweight eye cream; leaves my eyes feeling silky; vegan Review: This eye cream is lightweight and hydrating. It is also scentless. I applied it around my eye area after a shower. It absorbed rapidly. At first I was not too impressed because I felt the cream was too lightweight but after it dried, my eyelids and under my eyes felt silky. It is very good cream and does smooth wrinkles as does any moisturizer. I found no other benefit. The claim that this is anti-fatigue is just nonsense to me. Also, the current price of $38 is insane for just 0.5 fluid ounces.

The box claims this is vegan. I like this eye cream but not enough to buy it. My current favorite eye cream is this [[ASIN:B09NNB8VYJ SCINIC Collagen Eye Cream]].

They make longer listening tiresome.
They are not as good as the "real" Klipsch, the ones not made in China!
I can't tell if these are actually THX certified speakers ,as advertised. They did not do well with a THX DVD.
I finally gave up and sent them back. Too harsh. Ordered Audio Engine speakers.

Title: Not 4 moisturizing; thin disposable gloves of the kind that are sold in boxes; a joke for the PRICE Review: At the current price of $3.51 for one pair of thin disposable gloves, this must be a joke. Not only are these outrageously expensive, but they are no better than the disposable ones that come in boxes of 100 at less than $.50 cents per pair.

I have no idea what it means to dry moisturize as these are not moisturizing at all. They just protect the hands for dirty jobs that do not require strong gloves. Mine also arrived with spots on one glove. They are functional but I would pass on these.

Title: Simple basic blow dryer; cheaply made but does the job Review: This is a bare bones blow dryer. When I first used it there was a burning smell but that dissipated during use. There is only high, low, off, and cold blast. The dryer also has a safety plug with reset button. It is a nice yellow color and feels good in my hands. It is easy to move the high, low, off knob unexpectedly. I did that a couple of times until I seated my hands correctly on the handle.

Overall, it does the job and the price does not "break the bank."

Title: No

Title: My other clock radio finally gave out after many years and I thought this would be a great, updated replacement
Review: This clock can do everything but dance.  The problem is that even after having it for a couple of months, reading and rereading the instruction book, I still can't program it to wake me, either by radio (which I prefer) or the buzzer. The alarm was really the main reason for the purchase. My other clock radio finally gave out after many years and I thought this would be a great, updated replacement.  My husband worked on it for a couple of hours and didn't get much further than I.  I really love the time projection on the ceiling or wall. It provides a lot of information and options, but it's not easy to set up.  If I still had the packaging, I would have sent it back, but I never imagined it would be such a challenge, and I threw the box, et al., away.  So I'm still fiddling with it hoping to eventually figure it out, but I still have to use my phone or travel clock when I need an alarm.

Title: Good body wash, cleans well and lightly fragranced
Review: Really nice natural body wash. I love the light fresh scent and the ingredients. Non-irritating, my skin feels incredibly soft and clean after use. I am not sure of the pricing of this as I only received 1 bottle for my Vine review, but even if it is 4 bottles for over $40 it does seem a little high priced.

I'm a 32D and this covered everything perfectly.  The straps were a little loose so laying out in the sun was the only issue I had with it.  I had to be a little mindful of how I was laying in case the straps had fallen but when walking around, it was comfortable and I didn't have any problems.

Title: Mixed review
Review: I bought this for use primarily while sleeping. Positive: microfiber is comfortable; color is very pretty; construction is high quality; sound quality of speakers is surprisingly good. Negative: The tiny bits of Velcro meant to hold the speakers in place over the ear areas are not strong enough to prevent some slippage at times. Also: the headband is on the small side, and it does not stretch particularly well. I am a woman with a medium sized head. If I were a woman with a larger head, or if I were a man, I would hesitate before buying this item. The manufacturer should consider adding spandex to the fiber and providing a somewhat improved Velcro anchoring system for the speakers.

Title: Awesome Features-Battery Life SUCKS! Review: I love (almost) everything about this tablet. Its the perfect size, comfortable to hold, has an amazingly clear/bright screen, Alexa, cameras, contains great apps like Kindle, Zoom, Netflix, Prime Video, etc. But, for the life of me, I dont' understand how it can possibly provide 'up to 7 hours of watching video, reading, browsing the web'. The battery in this tablet drains like wildfire. We lost electric the other night. I figured it was the perfect time to read a book I'd been wanting to start. When I read the first page, the battery level was at 94%. 2 hours later, 23%. Not long after, the battery was gone and i had to stop reading. I was not using any other app.

This tablet is such an improvement over the one I'd been using. Except for the darn battery life. Its awful. Its also the reason this isn't a 5 star review.

Title: Like tiny glass thimbles with a loose metal lid whose rim is sharp Review: These dappen dishes are tiny; like tiny glass thimbles. There are four to this set with four lids. The lids just sit loosely on top and the underside rim of the lids is sharp in my opinion.

These can be used for acrylic powder, mixing tiny paints, etc. It can even be used to put out a dose of morning, afternoon, or evening pills for someone. I love the glass vessels but the top is only okay.

The current price of $8.99 is reasonable for four as it comes to $2.25 per pair.

I will say that my lips definitely are noticeably softer and smoother after using this for almost a month now. Highly recommend as an alternative to doing lip fillers.

Title: Beautiful brush with a combo boar bristle & nylon brush head; staticky & way too $$$ Review: The brush handle on this brush is beautiful and feels like it is handmade. The wooden handle is easy to grasp and hold during styling.

This is a typical radial brush usually used for blow drying with a wave/curl. The brush head itself is a combination of boar and nylon bristles. Unfortunately, using this brush causes my hair to be very staticky. It does work well otherwise and is perfect for blow drying. Note that some boar bristles will fall out during use but this is typical of most boar bristle-type brushes.

What I cannot get past is the $52.50 price tag. That is way too expensive for this brush.

Title: Powerful scrub
Review: This is a nice scrub, super powerful. Great for my body and legs, but not so much my face (which is why I deducted a star). I really was hoping for a facial scrub, but the particles in this are too strong for my face. Other than that, great scrub. My legs and arms are super smooth after showering. Highly recommend as a scrub anywhere other than face.

Title: Good solid earbuds, a little costly for what you get
Review: As has been stated in previous reviews, there are pros and cons for these earphones. First, they are attractive looking (a little on the masculine side) and they come with three alternate buds to be able to adjust them to the ones who fit you best). Second, the sound is good, bass is phenomenal, so the discerning headphone user will not be disappointed with the quality of the Moshi Vortex. I found these to still be a little large for my ears, at least weight wise, and I am not comfortable when walking with them in (they are fine if I am sitting in my house listening to music, just not wearing them around in my ears when up and active). I am rating them 4 stars simply because I think the sound quality is excellent, but I think you can do better for your $80 cost in getting a better fitting, lighter pair to be used on the go (as I do when I exercise/walk every morning).

Well, it works, but I don’t have a lot of confidence in the quality. VERY fragile. I’m thinking I might wrap it in heat shrink tubing to avoid a premature failure.

Title: Works fast
Review: Amazing what this nose butter did for my bulldog's nose. She had crusty layers of dry dead skin and within 4 days of using the product 2 to 3 times a day, her nose is like when she was a puppy, soft, smooth and moist. I will always have this product on hand for her. I choose the unscented. I didn't think a scent would be an advantage and could be bothersome.

Title: The sandy feel of this conditioner must be a mistake; softened my hair but weighed down my curls Review: I do not expect exfoliating pieces of sand in my cream rinse/conditioning treatment. This was off-putting to me as it seems to be more like a shampoo or body wash. Nevertheless, I rubbed this into my clean wet hair and left it on for two minutes then rinsed it off. I love the "perfumy" fragrance. It did leave my hair feeling very soft but weighed down my curls. I have short to medium fine curly hair and my hair was a little flatter after using this.

In summary, at the current price of $45, this is a pricey 6.76 fluid ounce conditioner. I really do not like the gritty particles inside but I do love how soft this makes my hair feel even though it weighs down my curls a bit. Get rid of the grit and lower the price, I would rate this 5 stars.

Title: ardell lip stain

Title: Beautiful but terribly oversized; more like a 3X than 1X Review: This is a beautiful velvet drape coverlet; however, it is incredibly oversized in my opinion. I ordered the 1X to have a loose fit but this fits like a 3X on me. I am incredibly disappointed by this. Other than this, it is gorgeous. It is perfect to use over evening wear. The front comes to a point and drapes down at an angle, hanging lower than the back. There are two pockets, one on each side for inserting my hands. There is no front closure.

If this were not so large in the 1X size, I would have given this 4.5 stars. It only looks attractive on me if I have my hands in the pockets and am holding it close to my body from the inside.

Title: Cute top, odd button mixture. Review: This top is cute. The sleeves around the wrists are a little too wide for the type of shirt. The buttons on the front of the top are silver, the type with no holes and the buttons on the sleeve are gold with 4 holes. It just doesn't look right. I'm going to end up removing the front buttons on the pockets. Everyone who sees it agrees that they shouldn't have done that to this top, any top for that matter.

The sleeves were a good length for me, I'm 5'.

I do like the fabric. It's not too thin and the color is vibrant.

Title: I do not care for the scent of this Eau de Parfum Review: I love trying new fragrances and often buy them at TJX, Marshalls, and Home Goods without knowing what they smell like. I usually choose the high-end names. I purchased this at TJX for $16.99 plus tax for a one fluid ounce bottle, not a 1.7 ounce or 2.5 ounce as stated on Amazon. Based on Amazon's prices, I paid more per ounce than they sell the 2.5 ounce bottle for. Therefore, my review is about the fragrance itself and not the price.

This fragrance smells rich but is impossible for me to describe. The aroma reminds me of a scent that is geared more for an older woman (senior citizen). Although I'll use it until it's finished I wouldn't buy this again because I do not like the scent.

Title: Really nice lip gloss, absorbs quickly, though
Review: This is a super shiny, moisturizing lip gloss. Lightly pink, I apply it over my existing lip color and it helps enhance the glow and shine. I really like it. Only thing I had a problem with is that I found myself reapplying often as it seems to absorb a little too quickly for my liking. Other than that, I can recommend for the shine it applies to your lips.

Title: This “savvy” color is more like a deep brown; not very attractive on me; also comes off easily Review: This "savvy" color glides on smoothly on the lips but also comes off easily. Title: If you're wanting something sturdy, these are still going to come off Review: I don't have the time to go get a manicure, or upkeep it. I also need to have short nails, and for the most part, i haven't been to a salon that will do them as short as I need them.

That said, these aren't sturdy enough to stay on for normal household things. I even tried a second set with nail glue and it just does not work.

I think if you need them for a night or two, they work, and definitely an easy enough application for it to be a last-minute purchase. But they won't last long term.

Title: New ! Ads. Ads, and more ADS!
Review: I have Echo's all throughout my house.  But, as a writer, I quickly learned that recently, distraction has now become the norm with Echo Show. Pop-Up Ads show up every 5-10 seconds, disrupting my photo collection and my train of thought. And then to integrate Avatar items into responses is annoying as can be! No, I don't want to play all those games you are showing continuously. I've contacted Amazon and was told that they are paid ads and I cannot remove them or refuse them. So, I am no longer a fan because you see, I also have Google Nest in my home, and truth be told, they show my photo collection much sharper, the sound is better when playing music and I have found, much smarter when in need of information, and the best part... NO ADS! NO INTERRUPTIONS! NO TRYING TO SELL YOU ANYTHING. So you make your own choices, but Google also has a sense of humor and I am done with Echo Show...  Do you want to pay money to be inundated with Ads! Some every minute (see Jeopardy photos).  Amazon has lost all my respect as to how it respects its purchasers of their products!

I am eliminating a star as I do find it oily (well, it is oil based) and I do need to wait a good 10 minutes before applying makeup (to assure it is absorbed). I usually really like Vichy products and although this does work, not sure if I will be buying more.

Title: OK, perhaps a little pricey Review: These are okay Bluetooth headphones. Again, these are not bad headphones, they just aren't great headphones. I feel that they are what I would expect at 60% the price these are currently listed for. 39.99 with expectations that you are not paying for high end ear buds.

Title: Large barely fragrant bath bombs w/zero performance; turns water almost black Review: There are four individually wrapped bath bombs in this set. They are lightly fragrant but not really pleasingly so.

I dissolved one bomb in close to hot water and there were no suds created, only a fizzing action. The water immediately looked almost black and glittery (due to the gold). Since I personally do not like the color rings caused by bath bombs in my bath, I use them in a foot bath. One bath bomb dissolves in less than five minutes in close to hot water. The fragrance was barely detectable. I personally would never want to bathe with these. I am glad, however, that the color did not adhere to my skin, my foot bath, or my towels.

The current price of $10.99 comes to $2.75 per lackluster bath bomb. I'll pass on these as they are one of the worst bath bombs sets I ever tried.

Title: Pretty!
Review: These are very pretty earrings. The silver plating is nice and shiny. They're a good size and look nice when worn. I found it very difficult to open one of the earrings in order to put them on. I had to use some tweezers to apply pressure. I must have bent it a little because it hasn't had any difficulties since then. They felt a little tight on my ear lobes. It also felt like they were pulling as well. The earrings are fairly sturdy and don't feel cheap, but they're not heavy. I would say they are a mid-weight. Because of the pulling and tightness that I felt, they aren't very comfortable to wear for extended periods of time. The earrings arrived in baggy style packaging. For myself, that's not a problem, but had I been planning to gift these, I would not be pleased.

My legs feel soft and smooth after using this for the past two weeks. I even rub my hands and arms after I apply to my legs so I get the full benefit. This is a great moisturizer and I highly recommend.

Title: Hair brush is good; small brush is okay; quality is commensurate with low price Review: There are two brushes in this set; one handheld and the other a palm brush. There are also two brush covers included.

I like the handheld brush. It glides easily through my short to medium fine curly hair and feels great in my hands. The quality is average in that I can see the glue lines and other imperfections on the brush face but that does not take away from the function.

I personally do not care for the palm brush. The rope that goes around the hand is way too loose so it makes the brush hard to hold. Also, the brush bristles itself are a bit disheveled. Nevertheless, it does brush but not as great as the regular one.

The drawstring jute pouches are a nice touch except one pouch had loose strings as can be seen in the photo.

The current price of $14.39 is commensurate with the quality of this ensemble. By far the best item is the handheld brush as it works very well.

Title: Another great Almay product!

Title: Great microneedling pen for at home use!
Review: I typically go for microderms and facials several times a month and it can add up money-wise. I have gotten microneedling facials done in the past and they typically run about $100-150 for a good one. I noticed that the last one I had received earlier this year, the spa tech was using a Dr. Pen. So, when I saw this, I wondered how easy it would be to try to do this myself. I was so surprised to see it was easy! In spite of the fact that it is a little uncomfortable with the deeper settings, I knew that I was going to see a noticeable improvement. After using this three times in the last two months, I can vouch for how great (and young) my skin looks. I do need to use some aloe vera after use (to keep the redness down). The results are just as good (if not better) than doing it in a spa setting. Highly recommend!

Title: Cover Converts From Floral to Solid Color, But Stand Is Almost Useless Review: This INCIPIO STANDING FOLIO PATTERN CASE FOR AMAZON FIRE HD 7 has a cover that reverses from a floral design (purple/mauve/lavender) to a solid color (mauve). It has a hard shell (mauve) that protects the tablet. It has an elastic band that holds the cover closed over the tablet.

However, the cover does NOT have an automatic wake/sleep feature that turns the tablet on when you open the cover. And the cover is almost useless as a stand for hands-free viewing--there is only one viewing angle, and the stand collapses easily. The stand collapses because the tablet is heavy and the stand is supported by only a slightly raised seam in the cover (no grooves).

Priced about $30, this cover seems overpriced for what it is. Besides converting from floral pattern to solid color, all it does is provide the Fire HD 7 with minimal protection from minor bumps and scratches during transport in a book bag or tote.
