Review: THIS IS A SMALL SLEEK MOUSE THAT DOES A FINE JOB.  IT IS WIRED, A FEATURE NEEDED TO ACCESS CERTAIN BLUETOOTH ACTIONS.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Nice.

Title: A bit greasy but moisturizing; subtle flavor; cute container Review: I love the cute container this lip balm comes in. It is easy to apply with my fingers but I do find it greasy. Nevertheless, it does moisturize. Note that the ingredients are listed in Spanish on the tin.

Unfortunately, I do not like this enough to re-order simply because it is too greasy for my lips. I do like the slim profile container and the .85 ounces of product is  more than double a regular ChapStick tube, so the current price of $7.18 is justified.

Title: Lightweight eyelash curler with small finger holes Review: This is a simple eyelash curler. The curler is lightweight and the finger holes have a silicone grip but they are really too small to get a good grip on the curler when using my thumb and forefinger.

It is still relatively easy to use and curls well and gently. There are also two extra silicone replacement refill pads provided.

I personally prefer my old metal curler to this because it is heavier and has larger finger holes. Also, the current price of $12 is on the high side of competitively priced.

Title: 3.0 micro cable
Review: Husband runs through these like candy - breaks them, loses them.. etc....  So I am hoping this one lasts a bit longer than the others.  Time will tell.  He reports it works just as it should.

Title: Nice effective sun protector for your skin!
Review: This was a first type of moisturizer like this I have ever tried. I wasn't sure how the tinted feature in this would work, but actually I liked it. For an every day moisturizer it's great. I put this on in the morning and reapply in the afternoon when I walk my dog. The SPF 45 gives me some minimal protection from the sun, the moisturizer helps keep my skin supple and the tint helps me look my best (without having to apply any foundation). I like the tint feature, it's light and blended well into my skin. I am deducting a star as I really think this is over priced. Although it is small in size, a little goes a long way, but I think I can do better (with a higher SPF factor) for less money.

Title: Best bra you'll ever own
Review: This is the best bra I have ever owned! It fits so well, and is very comfortable. Warner's also has great fabric styles and patterns in this bra. I bought my first one in a store but amazon by far has the best prices on this bra.

Title: London fog boots
Review: Boot toe doesn’t look as pointy as it did online, and  looked more glossy as well online in person they look dull.

Title: Fits
Review: They fit just like a glove.  They are super lightweight. Thanks

Title: metallic mesh scarf
Review: while it's very pretty, it is very thin and narrow. it looks more plush in the picture. so be aware of what you're getting.

Title: Blurgh
Review: 4 layers I'm looking for beautiful color. If I ever find it I'll update this

Title: HALLELUJAH WE HAVE SOCKS THAT FIT
Review: Finally. Socks that fit my dad's extremely swollen feet from a medical issue. He can now have comfortable socks to lounge in. Well worth the price since we literally can't find this size anywhere else. Thank you!!!

Title: Do not buy
Review: Keeps falling off and now I’ve lost it

Title: Less sweat, dried feet Review: I am on the fence about this product. It states to apply 3 times a day at first. Who has time for that? I did apply at least twice a day. For the first few days, it did nothing. After repeated use, it started to help decrease the sweating of my feed. It does state this in the directions.

It dries the feet out, which I guess is the point, but aesthetically speaking, it doesn’t look great. I want nice looking feet , not over dried looking.

The bottle is pretty small . It lasted about a month. I did buy another bottle, so I could really decide whether I liked it or not.

I am still deciding whether to buy another or not. Don’t like how my feet look when using it, but I like having less sweaty feet. I am wondering how it would work if just used during exercise, when the sweating is worse.

Title: Great Device For Music, But Other Functions Need Work Review: Great for some things, but can rarely answer even basic questions.

I get this same response over & over from Alexa..."hmmm, I can't find the answer to the question that I heard" - keep in mind this is for basic stuff.

Its great for playing music, which is why I initially purchased it.

I'm not saying it isn't a great little device, but it needs to gain more knowledge of basic commands & answers to questions.

Title: Reasonably priced fedora, well made with SPF protection
Review: Cute attractive fedora summer hat. Made well for the price and nice to keep in your wardrobe for those occasions where you might want to add a hat for style. A little small for my head (I have a 7 3/4 hat size so I had to stretch it a bit. I like that it is rated for SPF protection makes it great to wear at the beach or anywhere there is a lot of sun (like there is down here in Florida).

Title: Not silver and the stones are glass not crystal
Review: I was definitely disappointed in this ring.  It was not silver and the stones were glass NOT crystal, making it pretty ugly and unwearable for an adult.

Title: It's Okay
Review: Scent is very important to me when it comes to skincare products. I either want something that smells amazing or it has no scent at all.  I don't like the scent of this at all. It's not gross or off putting, but it's not what I would consider an enjoyable scent. I realize that scent can be subjective and while I don't care for it, others might like it. The serum comes in a nice bottle. It's slightly tacky at first, but it's not sticky. It's not something that makes me feel like I have to wash my hands right away after using it. It has a decent absorption rate. It doesn't irritate my skin. Overall, I found this serum to be okay.

Title: Large rustic-looking handbag of simple design Review: This review is for the burgundy-colored bag.

This bag does not WOW me. It is fully functional with two outer pockets, a central compartment with one tiny zippered compartment inside. The strap is large enough to be worn crossbody. It is larger than I expected and a bit on the rustic-looking (used) side and is simply designed. I think the current price of $44.99 is competitive for a leather bag.

The straps are stiff and sides are a bit rough which makes wearing this crossbody for a long time when full a bit uncomfortable if one is wearing a very thin garment. Also, the card that came with the bag (last photo), says that "contact should be avoided with light colored fabrics as color transfer might occur..." which is disappointing to me.

Overall, I do not feel this is a great bag; however, it is extremely functional. I would not have ordered this had I been able to touch, feel, and examine this purse prior to ordering as it really is not "stylish" enough to me and has too much of a used look for my taste.

Title: love this stuff
Review: love this bath soak - light candles, soft music and close your eyes - sooo relaxing!!! I buy this product at least every other month and use twice a week!!

Title: Not bad, but could have been better
Review: Got this MP3 player as part of the Amazon Vine program. My older Ipod was just about ready to be replaced, so I thought that this would be a good alternative. Well, sound quality is really good, which I liked. Earbuds, as has been mentioned in other reviews, are far superior to the ones that come standard from the Ipod. I didn't like the screen display, too small for these 50 year old eyes. All in all, it's ok, which is why I gave it 4 stars. It does what it needs to do. But, to be honest, if I was going to spend $140 on an MP3 player, I would much rather go with the Apple. Seems that, although their store is a monopoly, it's much easier to get music using the Apple and the screen size (and now camera capabilities) are far superior on the Ipod. I am still using the Phillips and will until it needs to be replaced again (and then I will opt back to Apple).

Title: Glasses still fog and its odor keep stars at 3
Review: The material used for the face\nose\mouth piece is a neoprene type base and has a smell to it that doesn't go away. It is warm, fits fairly well, nice wind resistance. Down sides are many: smell, unable to manipulate the mask much like to pull down to smoke or put on lip balm, and if you have a broad face or fatty cheeks it's too snug, and lastly, it still will fog eyeglasses.

Title: Too small for an XL be careful.
Review: I have to say even though I've a kinda big waist and I'm very curvy I did hope that this skirt would fit me and it didn't barely, I guess if I lost a few pounds it would but then again I'm not even thattt badly fat or anything I'm just on the big side aka. just chubby specially at the top so it was a surprise when it didn't fit and it was barely also so in general it looks pretty and all but the fabric wasn't the best. I have similar skirts that aren't nearly as small at the top and I even got the XL size which is odd I think, it should be a little looser for an XL man not everyone has a super small waist here. Again I do have a thinner top than bottom so it was very weird for me even if I admit I'm chubby too.

Title: Disappointed
Review: The. Case rough and plating dull.  I have no idea how to reduce the band links so it fits. Luckily I bought it as a joke as a Rolex knock off.

Title: My New Favorite Pants Review: Love these pants! I'm short, 5'4" so I have trouble finding pants/jeans that aren't dragging the ground. The inseam is a perfect length.

They aren't just stylish, they are also comfy.

I highly recommend!!!

Title: Best!
Review: It’s ridiculous how many eyebrow liners and pencils I’ve tried. I finally found an affordable one that I love. Color is great, easy to use and lasts all day.

Title: ELF lip stain.
Review: I expected it to be dark, but it did turn out to be a little darker than I guessed. It's still ok.  I wish it would have stayed on a bit longer... about 4 hours, with eating and drinking.  Perhaps that is reasonable.  I use a sheer similar stick gloss over the top.  I felt it perhaps wasn't as drying as other brands.  So that is good.

Title: Now You See It Now You Don't
Review: Well, darn, I guess I got one that plays peek-a-boo with you.  Just got this in today and my drives are popping in and out faster than I can say "Plugable".  I have tried 2 drives and they are both pulling the vanashing act.  I am using them with USB 3.0.  Don't think it is my USB 3.0 card because I have an external USB 3.0 drive connected and it works fine.  Haven't tried USB 2.0 yet, but I paid extra for USB 3.0.  I don't want to use USB 2.0.  Well, I guess I rolled the dice on this item and came up a loser.  Never was lucky at gambling.  That's why I have never been to Vegas.  I'll give it 2 Stars because it seems most of these work OK.  Just not mine.  I'm gonna make this sucker disappear for good and send it back where it came from.

Title: BEST QUALITY DVD WITH REASONABLE PRICE
Review: Sony is the only DVD brand that I buy any more.  I have had two many failures with other brands.  I rarely have a failure with Sony; none that I can remember.  They seem to be very well made.  Older non-Sony DVDs have gone bad on me.  I believe there are better DVDs that are archive quality, but you pay a lot more for them.

Title: Looks frumpy with the knot in the center; material too thin but it’s soft – 2.5 stars Review: Unfortunately, I do not like this. The first issue is my problem. I ordered an XX-Large and should have ordered an X-Large. That is not their fault. However, I did not realize there is a knot in the center of this. That is what creates the scalloping in the center. That knot looks horrible to me. It is the knot that is driving me crazy and making this not lay the way I want on my body.

The material is thin but very soft and comfortable. It is made in China of 30% cotton, 55% polyester, and 5% spandex. My boyfriend likes it but I personally wish I never ordered this. It is not worth the price I will wind up paying. The current price of $19.98 is reasonable for this if it looks good on.

Note that I washed this in the washer in a lingerie bag. It came out fine; no color bleeding. I also hung it to dry.

Title: Doesn't hold up
Review: They are great, comfortable and fit a tiny bit small once washed.  After a number of washes they do start to fray but I will keep buying them because my husband and son like to wear these to bed.

Title: I love the teal color but the bow looks silly on my head Review: This shower cap is well-made and double lined. It fits my small head but the bow looks silly on my head and the overall design is not attractive on me at all.

Nevertheless, water runs right off this cap and the cap covers all my hair.

The current price of $13.99 is on the high side of competitively priced for this double lined cap.

Title: Color wore off quick.
Review: It was a beautiful dainty ring but the color wore off quick.

Title: Average, attractive Kindle cover
Review: The Verso "Profile" standing cover for Kindle Fire HD 8.9" fits my Kindle snuggly, is attractive and works as designed in a standing mode (I actually watched a movie using the Kindle an this cover stand last weekend). It's attractive, but you can tell it's not leather (very vinyl looking and does have a vinyl smell to it). However, it is solid product and protects the Kindle well.I like the black since it goes with everything.

Title: Too small
Review: This is cute. However, it the description should say for children. Its too small for adults.

Title: Do not work on my Iphone
Review: Tried the cords on two different IPhones in two different UDB outlets and didn't work in either.  Garbage.  Save your money and buy different cords.

Title: Way too bulky.
Review: We are going to Universal Studios soon, and I was looking for a versatile bag to carry my camera and other necessities while in the parks. I was very surprised when I pulled this out of the box - even empty, this bag is incredibly bulky. And while the construction is sturdy, it's made from a material that almost reminds me of my old diaper bags. The word "discreet" is used in the marketing for this bag, and I can't imagine that at all. Even with my smaller camera and a few personal items, I am absolutely overtaken by this bag. The shape and design are also a bit odd & impractical - ie: placement of the pockets and definitely the extension for the strap are not ideal. Overall, this is a bag that wears you, not the other way around.

Title: Why would you roll this?
Review: This is not a product I personally would store rolled tightly but apparently the company is comfortable with that. But i can’t for the life of me get the Bubbles and bends out due to it

Title: Works great, dollar store quality
Review: This thing does what it's supposed to do.  Works fine, but the wire is very cheaply made.  Definitely not iPod quality.  I feel the price is too expensive for the cheap feel of the item. The wire wouldn't be able to handle much use.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Looks good, works well, and the solar power is a welcome feature.

Title: Very nice, good quality too
Review: the fit is perfect and the quality is excellent.  these are the best walking crew socks I ever had.  I will purchase again.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Love them

Title: Mirrored lens which they are not.
Review: They are cheap and really good only thing is it states the lens are mirror but the one I received they are not so 1 star for good product.

Title: Too many
Review: Wasn't clear about how many came in one purchase. Needed 2 and now we have 8. But great quality

Title: Clairol Outlast has a great long-lasting lip stain Review: Most certainly does not last longer than 30 minutes. Buyer, be cautious of misleading claims.
Clairol Outlast has a great long-lasting lip stain, I highly recommend it!

Title: ZOSI security system
Review: Not sure where to start, the products are the bottom of the vat, customer service does not exist at all !! They claim 24 hr tech support which no one will ever answer the phone !  I should have focused on all the other negative reviews prior to purchasing.

Title: Nice dress Review: Update:: I changed my review from 3 stars to 5 stars. Excellent customer service. The seller contacted me and sent the right sized dress! The large fit well.

I like this dress. The cut is very flattering. It is a nice material.

The dress,however, runs large. I followed the size chart and ordered an XL. It was too big. I am returning it. I am not purchasing the smaller size because I bought the original one on special. If I order another one, I would have to pay more money. I should get an item for an item.

I am 5’4” and weigh about 169 lbs. The XL was too big.

Title: Great so far...
Review: Speedy delivery, great sound and a great warranty... Let's see how it lasts will update if anything changes.

Title: Not Good
Review: I’m not a makeup brush snob, but these fall well below my expectations. The bristles aren’t terrible. They are very soft. They don’t apply makeup very densely at all. The metal holding the bristles is the part I find really problematic. When you wash your brushes, water pools in them. They are also easily bendable. They don’t hold the bristles firmly enough. Really, I haven’t found these useful in makeup application at all. I find them okay for brushing away excess powder or brushing away eyeshadow when I have fall out. There are better cheap brushes out there.

Title: Fits great
Review: Keeps my grandsons toes warm and toasty in the morning

Title: Ok
Review: Wish it would work on my smart TV

Title: Nope
Review: Great idea but it stopped working except for turning on the tv after a month.  Going back to not using this.

Title: This Ain't It
Review: I was looking for a product to act as a humidity shield to keep my hair from puffing up shortly after I step outside. FYI, I live in GA. The humidity is no joke! Anyway, this pretty much worked like any average hair spray. It didn't keep my hair from absorbing moisture AT ALL. If anything, it just made my hair sticky and hard. No thanks!

Title: Best of all worlds!I l
Review: I live in Florida and find the need to apply sunscreen every day. Typically, I have my beauty regimen every morning where I apply expensive serums and moisturizers and then apply the sunscreen. Sunscreen normally is greasy and does not absorb well and I honestly hate wearing it. In comes this Shore Magic product and it is great. I am now using it as the last part of my regimen. It absorbs quickly, is lightly fragranced and best of all it is SPF50. I am in love with this product and I will be buying more. Highly recommend!

Title: Avoid
Review: Horrid. Theyre itty bitty snd useless.

Title: A waste of money very cheaply mafe
Review: Cheap

Title: Slip off too easy. Not durable. Not for sports. Review: They seem to fit right. But they slip off too easy. Can't do much more than walk in them.
Bought for my 6 year old for soccer and he lost his shoe more times than he kicked the ball.
Frustrating to say the least.
Also hard to get on even with the laces all the way loose.
Really not happy and don't recommend.

Title: Really nice travel bag!
Review: I have no idea why people are saying this is a small travel bag. I guess if you travel with loads and loads and loads of toiletries, it might not be for you, but this is perfect for my needs. A lot of compartments, lightweight and made to last. I deducted a star just because of the odor (must be the vinyl it's made with and the fact that it was sealed in a plastic bag when it arrived). It's a very strong smell. I will be using this next week on a trip to Europe so I will leave it out to air for the week and hopefully it will disappear before I leave. Outside of that, this is a really nice multi-compartment travel bag.

Title: Heavy attractive pendant w/heavy chain but lousy clasp ring Review: The wolf tooth pendant is attractive and heavy. The wolf looks a bit angry but it is exactly as pictured on the Amazon site. The problem I have is with the chain. I actually like the chain itself but not the circular fastener on the end. There is a little tiny and dinky circular loop on the end of the chain that the clasp hooks onto. This is total garbage (see photo). I doubt it will last because both the chain and wolf tooth are heavy. It is like trying to hold the pendant by a thread.

The current price of $12.95 is reasonable considering the quality of the pendant but they need to attach a good loop onto the end of the chain before I give this 5 stars.

Title: like it but........
Review: not doing what i need it to do and the slots dont let the tablet sit too well it moves a lot  ... its nice  the feel of it is nice but its going back

Title: Super easy kit!
Review: This kit arrived quickly and is super easy to use!  It provides many different sizes for work or a night on the town! Love it!

Title: Purchase, packaging and delivery experience is top notch. ...
Review: Purchase, packaging and delivery experience is top notch. Personally,when I wear this scent, it has a strong chemical-like undertone. This fragrance is not for me..

Title: Great exfoliating cleanser for daily use!
Review: I really like this Trilane Daily Cleanser. First, it has a great fragrance (light but clean smelling). Second, it works well to remove all my make up at the end of the day and allows my skin time to breathe and refresh (with some light night creme of course). It's so important to keep your skin clean and pores unclogged. The light exfoliation helps me keep my skin feeling smooth and fresh. This is now a part of my daily regimen, highly recommend!

Title: Nice embroidery, runs small, yellow gold as picture shows, Review: Cute Boho blouse.
The embroidery is done well .
This is a size Medium , and I do wear a Medium or sometimes a large. This is like a size small to me.
I have thin arms, and this was not comfortable, and the sleeves are shorter then what shows on the model.
The V at the top came down low, and it was blousey in the middle, but Not roomy across the back shoulders.
The length was ok, and fit around me.

At this point, I think a extra large would have fit me!

Title: printer cable
Review: who keeps printer cables?  Had to have one and so ordered this one.  Worked as it should - but the cable wasn't the problem!  Oh well.  Will keep it for those times you gotta hard wire.

Title: Eco Styling Gel Broke off My Hair
Review: I put eco Styling gel on my natural hair at the nape of my neck. I had no allergic reaction, so I thought it was safe. The gel broke off two inches of my hair and left me will less than an inch of hair. At first, I thought it was just too much protein, so I put the get-away and stopped all protein products. a few months later I tried the gel in a small area—same reaction. My hair only breaks off where the gel is applied. I will never repurchase this product.

Title: Not waterproof. Bad product.
Review: After owning this camera for less than two years it crapped out because rain got in, even though the camera is supposedly waterproof. Zero help from the company who said I'm SOL. Garbage product, garbage company. Shop elsewhere.

Title: Broke after three uses Review: The connection socket does not have a good contact although the cable looks solid.
I thought Belkin makes good stuff.

Title: Disappointing
Review: I was very excited to give this a try. However, I found the experience quite disappointing. I've tried it twice. The first time I tried it, after about five minutes into it, I realized that I hadn't completely thought it all out and needed one of my hands. I tried to speed things up by using a fan, but it didn't show any signs of hardening, so I had to wipe/wash it all off. So that was all my fault. I tried again, and was prepared to just sit on the bed and watch TV while allowing it to harden. After 20 minutes, my hands still didn't show any signs of hardening. They were sticky and tacky. I gave it another five minutes before giving up. I tried washing it all off but wasn't having a lot of luck. I had to use a sugar scrub to exfolilate it off of my hands. So overall, very disappointing. The product itself looks like honey but a little clearer. It has a mild, pleasant scent. I'm not sure if I will try it again, but if I do and I have better success, I will update my review.

Title: BUY IT!!
Review: This stuff is AWESOME! My face is so clean and my pores are clean and clear! I love it! My skin is Super smooth after just one wash! Buy it!!

Title: Scratchy
Review: I really didn't care for this hairbrush. It was too scratchy and was actually painful to my scalp.

Title: Didn't like these at all.
Review: The old saying 'you get what you pay for' really comes into play with this set of earrings. You do get a large variety so since I was going on vacation, I thought these would be great to take with me. What a mistake. The first pair I tried to put on were a large style and I had trouble at first opening them for insertion. Then when I tried to clip them closed once in my ears I couldn't do it. The second pair I had picked to wear didn't hang correctly (one was slanted). These are cheaply made. I won't try any more of them, if I could have returned them I would have.

Title: Works good as a concealer
Review: Just ok for me. I prefer my current Burt Bees Foundation. It is much easier to apply. This one is a bit cakey for me and would work better as a concealer. (From my daughter)

Title: Bad
Review: Bad. They all fall off.

Title: FOR A MAY BIRTHDAY GIRL
Review: I got this for my 17 year old granddaughter for her birthday.  She seemed to love them.  They were smaller than I thought they'd be but they are still pretty.

Title: Fragrance-free lightweight hand cream that does not feel very moisturizing to me
Review: This hand cream is fragrance free and lightweight. However, it does not feel very moisturizing to me at all. It only lightly moisturized and not enough to make my dry hands feel hydrated. This would be good for the summer when a light moisturizer is needed. However, because the Amazon site says this is an ultra-moisturizing cream, I am rating this 2 stars as it fails as an "ultra moisturizer." The current price of $9.98 would be expensive but competitively priced for a 2.82 ounce tube if it lived up to its claims.

Title: Ok conditioner
Review: I've used almost this whole container and I don't think it really made my hair any more conditioned than it already was.

Title: Two Stars
Review: It serves it purposes

Title: Score another home run for Cover Girl!
Review: This is a great eyeliner. Super easy to apply and lasts for hours (I applied it at 4:00 PM for a night out and it was still looking fresh on my eyes when I returned at midnight). Full coverage, it's one stick that will solve your eyeliner needs. I really love this Emerald Metallic color, it's unique and I have received a load of compliments while wearing it (especially at holiday parties this year). I highly recommend!

Title: Ok Review: I’m typically a size 16/18. I got the xl. I wasn’t expecting it to look like the picture, as a curvy IG Influencer brought me here and it didn’t look like the pic on her, But I wish I would have sized up. By the end of the day I had a small opening in the middle of the crotch of the pants. It’s still cute, but a bit more fitted than I would like. Debating about getting another color. Otherwise very comfortable and stylish. Mid weight material.

Also, the product has no tags, so it’s easy to put the top on backwards. If it is on backwards, it will not be off the shoulder. Simply turn it around.

Title: Defective
Review: The usb connector was defective.  I had to return the headset.

Title: Terrible for my hair, might work for you.
Review: This product left my hair feeling, and looking, hard and stiff. Maybe other hair types will respond better, but I found this to be awful on my hair. I didn't experience what others mentioned here (about the streaming of the spray). Mine did mist well. However, it's the way it made my hair look and feel that was a turn off for me. Plus the price is super high for something like this. You can do much much better if you are looking for a product to keep your hair manageable and looking it's best.

Title: Poor quality
Review: Very poorly made and much too bulky. Won't completely shut so not secure for holding anything in the box area. Only thing it is good for is holding up my tablet to watch movies. I would not buy again.

Title: Good Hard Sole
Review: My Podiatrist suggest I wear hiking boots due to a bad toe injury from a car accident. I have never worn hiking boots, found these and they are snug and perfect.

Title: Great power adapter to work (almost) anywhere!
Review: Compact travel adapter, nice to carry with you on your journeys. I travel quite often to European countries and this adapter will work in every country I will be visiting. No need to have a more clunky model or multiple adapters in your house, this unit will work in over 100 countries. Highly recommend as a way to ease your travel, just keep it in your suitcase at all times so you always have it with you.

Title: Cleans .. but streaks like crazy Review: PROS: Cleans

CONS: Streaks like smearing gel on your TV ! .. awful
Even with a micro fiber cloth .. I cannot remove the streaks?
Don't even consider buying if your TV is any kind of sunlit room.

After giving up on this, went back to Sparkle and a micro fiber cloth .. and tada ! streak free .. perfect again.

Don't get suckered into buying this junk.

Title: Wonderful way to keep your lips soft and smooth!
Review: I love this Nivea blackberry lip care stick. First, the fragrance is wonderful (reminds me of 'flavored' lip glosses I used to use when a teen. Secondly, it keeps my lips soft and smooth. I live in Florida where the sun and beachside winds can sometimes wreak havoc on my skin. My lips are always feeling dry and this Nivea product, in my opinion, is better than any typical Chapstick ones. Nivea has always been part of my daily skin regime and now I can add lipcare as well. Highly recommend!

Title: Very disappointed in Amazon in representing this product
Review: Numerous failures. Very disappointed in Amazon in representing this product. I expected better. Not worth the effort to return the product, will just not be reordering!

Title: very cute
Review: delivery, not good. But the product is very nice. I would buy again!

Title: Does not record all the time
Review: IT WILL RECORD SOME TIMES AND NOT OTHERS

Title: The scallop is unfinished
Review: The scallop on the top is just fabric cut in that shape.  Not hemmed or finished in any way.

Title: Worth it
Review: Love them for the price, I have slow internet,  so probably deserves 5 srars

Title: Not the highest quality, but did impress my granddaughter!
Review: This is a really cute gift for a little girl. First, the 'Frozen' name was a big hit with my granddaughter. She squealed with delight when she first unwrapped this, she was also super anxious to get started at putting makeup on. Of course, at the age of 5, she definitely needed a lot of assistance, lol. On the negative side, this is just a plastic piece, not made for the long haul. Mirror is not a real one (of course, I understand that with the problem of glass with children). The makeup is basic and doesn't last very long (good for a couple of tries, but afterwards gone). So, I can't give this a 100% positive review, but it is definitely a fun gift to give to a little girl.

Title: Size run very small
Review: These pantries run extremely small.  They didnt even come close to a fit

Title: Awesome product..A+++
Review: Awesome product..my fiance loved her birthday present

Title: Amazing moisture!
Review: GREAT product. Just be VERY careful if you spray after a shower. It can leave a film on the floor of the shower that is very slick. Just be careful when you aim and spray. If you stand on your towel or rinse the shower after you spray it’s fine. Worth it- delivers deep moisture that feels light.

Title: Not true to size
Review: Not true to size

Title: Okay for a Kid
Review: This is nothing like a name brand camera. The quality just isn't quite there. However, for a kid, it works pretty well. And then I'm not letting a 7-year-old run around with my "good" camera.

Title: Avail for large hands.
Review: Xlnt for my large Scandinavian hands! Yay!

Title: Thin Consistency
Review: I have been using anti-aging products regularly for the past few years. I'm in my early 50's now and I've started to notice loose skin underneath my eyes. I had great hopes for this eye contouring cream because the description specifically noted that it has a firming quality. After over a week of use, I haven't noticed any difference with the skin underneath my eyes as far as firmness. I have had success with some products before, so I know they're are some that work. This cream has a very thin consistency. It's easy to squeeze too much out of the tube. It took me a few days before I could control the amount of pressure required to get the right amount out. It absorbs quickly and does seem to hydrate the delicate skin area. I did have some irritation and stinging in my eyes one day. I was outside doing yard work and I was sweating a lot. I didn't have any problems during normal days. I do want to share that my eyes are ultra sensitive and many products cause stinging. Overall, I just feeling "meh" about this product. I really didn't notice any difference.

Title: Ok if you dont want it loud
Review: This isnt too bad if you dont like to listen to music loud. There are no controls other than volume and on/off . It did connect to the smart phone very quickly. Good for teens to use in their bedroom. The size will fit on a small shelf. Its about 16 in.long.

Title: Peace of mind
Review: Purchased as a additional protection plan for our carpet cleaner. Havent had to use but nice we have the additional coverage if something is to happen after the manufacturing warranty expires.

Title: Sturdy small emery boards in a value size package
Review: These are nice, on the smaller size, emery boards. They are good for one use (two maximum) as they do wear easily. But, I guess that is why they come in a handy value size. They work well (especially on thicker nails) and fit easily in my pocketbook. Great for travel.

Title: Wrinkles
Review: T-shirts look fine before washing but after they look terrible. Neck is a mess wrinkled and hanging down. Really disappointed. Amazon should be aware how bad they look.

Title: Pretty durable so far
Review: We really like this case for the iPad. Part of the rubber did rip already which is annoying. But it has still kept the iPad safe and our two year old has done a number on it. The glass screen was perfect, easy to put on and has held up well. Love that it has a kick stand to prop it up for movies and stuff.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Still need to keep my laptop plugged in with this new battery

Title: Beautiful accessory for any Ipad Pro owner!
Review: I love Amazon basics products, particularly when it comes to electronic accessories. This Ipad Pro case is no exception. It fits my 9"7 Ipad Pro perfectly, streamlined, great leather case and gives me the protection I need in carrying this around with me. The magnetic fold keeps my Ipad covered and keeps the elements out. Well made, attractive, reasonably priced, this is a must have for any Ipad owner for every day use.

Title: Looks Great but Inconsistent & Frustrating
Review: Sadly this mouse did not give me the quality that I was expecting from a Corsair product. Their keyboards are great, but this mouse just doesn't stand up to the use that I need. It's a gorgeous mouse, and a comfortable ergonomic style. But the battery life was abysmal & the responsiveness was iffy. I ended up getting frustrated and going back to my Logitech mouse.

Title: Sturdy
Review: These are nice, sturdy cable ties with many uses.

Title: Luxurious cream but brush is not supplied
Review: This cream looks thick but goes on light and smooth. It also has a wonderfully fresh scent. It left my face feeling smooth and silky. Unfortunately, the brush mentioned was not included and the $53 price tag is overpriced for this. Otherwise, this is a luxurious cream.

Title: Small, tightly-wound buff puffs that must loosen up to create copious suds Review: Mesh buff puffs are the only thing I use in the shower besides a back brush. I love them because they generate a lot of suds and they provide good coverage during showering. These are small-sized and very tightly wound. There are four puffs and they do not create a good lather compared to my larger mesh and more loosely-wound loofahs I regularly use. I wanted to love them but I do not, although they should get better as they get older.

The current price of $9.99 comes to an expensive $2.50 each puff; these are expensive because they are so small and not as good as others I tried. Note they also pack them so tight into the plastic bag it comes in that it looks like two puffs.

Title: Smart Watch
Review: It wouldn't keep a charge and it kept glitching. Had to be replaced.

Title: Good value
Review: Good quality and fit

Title: microphone sucks!
Review: I got this for my cell phone.. NO ONE can understand anything I say! I can hear them fine, so if you are using it for something else I'm sure it would be fine for you :)

Title: Not what I expected
Review: So in terms of make up, these are easy to use. The colors aren’t great, but they’re ok. I’m not sure it really works the way it says they do (I’m not a make up professional by any means) It seems like it’s just easier to get colors where you want them by applying the old school way. But the price wasn’t bad and my teenage daughter ended up taking them to use. So not a bad deal by any means, but I probably wouldn’t purchase again.

Title: Its ok
Review: I bought 2, so it fits my lifestyle and shape for now.

Title: This only stands up the short direction
Review: As shown in the photo, this only stands up your Kindle in a short view or horizontally ... not vertically. It doesn't help that in any manner. Kind of odd really. I have to lean it on things. Not the best cover for that reason.

Title: wont work with adapter
Review: I bought this as a cute gag gift for my dad for Christmas. He doesn't have an iPhone so I bought an adapter to use with it and it didn't work for him AT ALL! It was so upsetting on Christmas day. It did however work on the iPhone, just not on his with an adapter.

Title: Don’t see much difference Review: My skin really doesn’t look any better. Disappointed, after all the reviews.
Would not buy again.

Title: Great foundation, a little heavy on my skin, but does make my skin look flawless
Review: I have been using Dermablend products for years now. On the plus side, makeup goes on flawlessly and covers all imperfections making my skin look smoother and younger (and does an excellent job of hiding age spots). On the negative side (which is why I deducted a star from the overall rating), it did make my skin feel slightly greasy and made applying blush a little difficult. I am assuming it might be the way this foundation was interacting with my complexion, so I don't want to be too harsh as others might not have the same problem I did.

Title: Nice but expensive bar of soap
Review: This is a nice lightly scented bar of soap. I have been using this daily for almost a month now and there is still plenty of the bar left. My skin is left soft, smooth and clean and I like the light lavender scent. I also love that it is 100% natural. I am deducting a star only because of the price. I think that $15 for a single bar of soap is super extravagant and I don't think I will be buying again.

Title: Total waste of money
Review: The size is fine, and that’s the only positive thing I can say about these shorts. The fabric is see through and the stitching on these are so awful. They are supposed to have the paper bag style waist and the stitching is just all over the place along the waistband. I’ve purchased from the Milumia brand before and these are a huge disappointment

Title: Does not work as listed
Review: Very unhappy with product.  Very hard to apply. Not recommended.

Title: Pass
Review: Doesn’t have strong enough magnets.  Doesn’t hold anything.

Title: MEH
Review: I have wild wavy/curly dry hair that requires a highly moisturizing conditioner. I had success with Renpure Shea butter but it was discontinued so I thought I'd try the same brand but different conditioner. After reading the reviews I thought this would a good place to start, but I am NOT thrilled. The scent isn't anything special and most of all either are the results. My hair hasn't been particularly soft and I had to start using a detangler spray afterwards. I leave my conditioner for several minutes like a hair mask too. Not blown away. Won't buy again.

Title: Nice
Review: Bought this for my 9 year old nephew for western day at school. He weights around 60 pounds and 52" tall. Some reviews said runs small, order up & some said runs big. I took a chance & ordered a 10. He is thin, maybe a tad wide. He usually wears an 8. This shirt was big on him, but it will work for the occasion. If your child is an 8, and not chunky then order the 8. This shirt is actually fits as expected.

Title: Sleeves and pants are very very very short
Review: I am 5'6" . I am size 6. The size I ordered was OK but sleeves were 3 inches short and pants are 5 inches short! They are the lengths of capri! Looks ridiculous! And these is $100 pajamas! Unbelievable!  Order only if you are shorter than 5'.

Title: OK mesh puff back brush with uneven head; handle is sufficiently long Review: There is one mesh bath mesh back brush with rope loop for hanging in this box.

I love mesh puffs because they lather well and that has become my goto shower "sponge." This puff with a handle offers the same sudsy experience and the handle is long enough for me to reach all areas of my back when working from both the top and bottom. The airy mesh allows copious suds to be produced in the shower. The only thing I do not like about this brush is that the mesh is uneven and looser in some spots than in others. Other than this it works the same as others. Due to the unevenness of this puff, however, I am concerned it will unravel sooner than I expect. To me, brushes like this should last about 3-6 months before they have to be thrown out. I'm not sure this will last that long.

The current price of $7.99 is on the high side of competitively priced for this.

Title: These work great
Review: They lock into place as they should.  They are great for small jobs.  Does the job they are described to do.  I would buy again.

Title: Be careful what you purchase.
Review: Lian Li is a well known brand but they have decided to join the ranks of many other brands, using cheaper materials that degrade faster so you have to buy more. Greed is the driving, sustaining force of almost all major companies in 2022.

Title: Pristine:ljk
Review: I've owned this cassette player for years and decided to buy a second one and use them both in conjunction with one another. I have this wonderful French language course on tape...a little antiquated method of learning a language but, I have on good authority that this is a great course.  I prefer to emerse myself in the language and then repeat what I hear outloud; therefore, I needed to have two cassette players to better critique myself. Further, I took one of the cassettes to work with me and used it in a lecture.  I placed it inside my book bag during the lecture and the reception was great.  It was a virtual lecture and I wasn't sure if the sound would be muffled but, to my surprise, I could hear every clear word.  Most people today want all the newest gadgets and they pay an exorbitant amount of money for them; this item was so reasonably priced that it only sweetened the deal.  It's one of my best purchases this year. I recommend this item!

Title: Made my scalp itch and flake after 2 weeks.
Review: The only thing I can say good about this combo is the smell. After using the combo for 2 weeks, I noticed my scalp start to itch,  then I noticed flakes started to appear.  Stop using it and about week later the itching and flakes disappeared.  There it is, I don't like it and tossed it. I will not buy anything Pantene again. Paying for the name, whatever is in it has an irritant.

Title: I keep these
Review: I gone through so many of ear buds... keep coming back to these.  They are comfortable and stay in.  A combination that is apparently NOT such an easy thing to do.  My ears are not large, but not super small.  I just find that these are the most comfortable. As they warm with your body heat, they make the perfect fit.  They maybe aren't rocket science, super dooper cool ear buds, but if you want ear buds that are comfortable and work longer than 2 months, these are it! I'd give them 5 stars if they had a retractable case or similar.

Title: It was ok
Review: OK

Title: Not great, I sent it back
Review: This card was mostly a disappointment.  The performance was no where near what I expected and it was so loud I could scarcely stand to be in the same room with it.  I sent it back and got a gtx 460 which I am very happy with.

Title: Needs improvements
Review: At first these sleepers fit as expected. I bought two to test out and was immediately impressed and loved the designs, so I ordered two more. Well now that I’ve washed the first set of sleepers two times, I regret buying more because the dark blue has faded a ton and shrunk a good 2-3 inches in the leg. These went from having some extra room to grow into to just fitting perfectly. I compared the washed sleeper to the brand new one so I can confirm that it’s a big difference. Not too pleased, I can get more reliable quality from a $5 sleeper from Walmart.

Title: NOT LIKE THE OLD LEVIS
Review: Wanted to get some old style jeans, the kind when they were made with COTTON but these new jeans are all so uncomfortable, the amount of spandex/elastic in them is insane!  I really loved wearing Levi jeans most of my life, but these, they're so synthetic that they fit with no comfort and of course, look like leggings that keep SLIPPING DOWN ANYHOW. I guess the days of having jeans that aren't going to fall down and squeeze you into a sausage skin are over. ;)  Really not into the "SKINNY JEAN" feel but maybe reviews like this will remind LEVI of their original material and BRING BACK THOSE OLD COTTON DENIMS so women can stop having to fuss with their pants all the time.

Title: Love how soft my skin felt after I dried off but absolutely hate the film left behind on my body & how this dispenses Review: I wanted to love this but after trying it, I would not order this again. What I love is the fragrance and its ability to leave my skin soft once I dry off. The lather is okay but not great; I like lots of suds but I do not get it with this soap. What I hate is how this dispenses like shave cream. Before each use I had to shake the can. The first time I almost broke the top off because I did not realize I had to press the smaller button. I thought it was dispensed by pressing on the large nozzle like one would a whipped cream can.

After I was done showering with this, my body felt like it was covered in a film. This is what I hate the most. I am also skeptical how long each can will last.

Title: Worked great!
Review: took this on Vacation as a beach cover-up! Worked great!

Title: Very Attractive
Review: This is an unusual and very noticeable collar necklace.  It calls for a simple background dress and elicits many compliments.

Title: Broken and will not charge
Review: Broken and will not charge.

Title: Doesn't sync with my Windows phone
Review: We're still getting to know each other. I can't get schedule reminders, or Bluetooth syncs. What's funny is if the tv is on and "she" hears her name "she" perks up. Don't let an Alexa commercial come on... too funny.

Title: Nice material but too large
Review: The material on this is quite nice but out of the bag there were a bunch of loose stings I needed to cut off, no big deal but the bigger issue is the large size I ordered a medium and it fits well around the chest but the arm are massive, you could fit an elephants leg through them. Also the bottom is quite loose as well. In the picture it looks much more slim. I’m not sure I will be able to wear it as I have quite muscular arms and this shirt make them look tiny.  Also I’m not talking a little loose in the arms its a lot loose. If that’s the look for going for this is your shirt.

Title: Piece of garbage
Review: Battery last 4 to 5 days then it's dead, has to buy a solar panel then it kept a charge on it, then 2 months later it completely  stopped working, no warranty either, buyer beware.

Title: Poor
Review: Poor

Title: Nice cheaper alternative to Tiffany
Review: This is a great alternative to the original Tiffany design. I can't comment yet on tarnishing (which is something I find cheaper jewelry does) as I have not had it long enough yet. I have always wanted the original Tiffany heart necklace but it is was out of my budget, so when I found this dupe I was really excited. Design-wise it is like for like and have had a lot of compliments on it. One complaint about it though is the colour. I ordered yellow gold and it is too yellow (to the point that it makes it look cheap). If they could get the colour right then this would be a beautiful necklace. Chain is a little flimsy too and so I changed mine out as the clasp and chain broke after two wears. Otherwise for the price, it is a nice classy little purchase.

Title: Returned
Review: Too bulky. I would not recommend these for Summer.

Title: Would buy again!
Review: Surprised by these total support pouch design underwear! Have spent more on other named "support pouch" designed undies with little gain. Hanes hit the mark and actually designed a comfortable package containment appartus!  Bravo and thank you! Fit as indicated. Will buy again!

Title: gel heels
Review: These are great to wear with lotion of choice after a nice soak.  They are snug - but easy to put on and take off - I have a size 8 1/2 women's foot.  I have had the full gel sock and I prefer the breathability of these... less claustrophobic. Everyone is different  - but I think these work well.  I have gentle machine washed and then lay flat to dry - no issues.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Very comfortable
Review: Very comfortable. Great for lounging around the house. Has two side pockets.

Title: Great disposable razors, come in a convenient 6 pack
Review: These are great disposable razors. They seem to last a long time and are very well made. They fit ergonomically in my hand and are easy to maneuver. Blades are sharp and get the job done. I like that they come in a 6 pack which makes it convenient for keeping in my medicine cabinet. These do not look 'junky' like other disposable razors do and perform well, so I think they are great to even make stocking stuffers for during the holidays. Highly recommend.

Title: Perfect to keep electronic devices safe while able to fit everything you need.
Review: Exactly what I was looking for for my business and for using everyday to take my business with me.

Title: Not good for all surfaces
Review: Won’t stick to all surfaces. I have painted wood frames and they won’t stick for more then a few days.

Title: Arms Too Short
Review: I am 5'6" and wear a size 18. I ordered this shirt in the 2XL. It wasn't as oversized as I expected, but it's definitely a loose fit. However, the arms are way too short! I'm average height and have average arm length. My upper arms are fat, but that wasn't where the fit was off. I would estimate the sleeves to be at least 2 inches too short. It was enough that it was noticeable and uncomfortable which is such a shame because I really liked the shirt. The fabric is super soft. It's not stiff like some flannel plaid shirts. I was looking forward to wearing it.

Title: 3D FIX MAKEUP SPONGE BLENDER
Review: This sponge is a little bit softer than the bottle gourd but it works really well to i love it because it great working around the eyes since it has that point.
Title: Does the job Review: I had some assembly problems. One of the two arms broke right away (from overtightening)

Title: smith and wesson boots
Review: My husband usually buys a different brand of this style of boot but wanted to try these... unfortunately the same size was too small and much more difficult to get on than the other brand.  They wound up in the donate box.  I would encourage you to consider at least 1/2 to 1 size up if you are going to try these.

Title: They fit my 3M workman am/fm perfectly.
Review: Easy to install.

Title: Returned It
Review: If you're lucky to get one that works perfectly right out of the box, this seems like it would be a decent quality DAC for the reasonable cost. (Some have reported theirs did not last long, so of course I have no idea about longevity. Mine was not working right immediately out of the box. Returned it. I did not get another one since I lost confidence in it.)

Title: Comfy!
Review: Love the dress!

Title: Decent for something quick.
Review: It’s really light weight and decently soft and has a nice stretch to it but it collects hair and dust like crazy. I had it on for not even 5 minutes just walking around my house and if someone collected so much dust and pet hair even tho my animals don’t even go into the rooms I was in.

Title: This is extremely tall I could not fit it anywhere, had to place it someplace else.
Review: Overall I did not like this, it's extremely big, occupies too much space and I couldn't even fit it in my closet where I'd originally thought to put it, I had to place it somewhere else where I didn't want to put it. I am not even sure I'll use it anymore I will probably just buy a different one. When I saw the picture I thought it was tall but not as tall as it is easily about the size of the lower part of my leg or larger to me that is huge... I'd be able to deal with one less tier or just a bit smaller but size is the actual problem of this product, the lower part is huge as well. Overall it looks very sturdy and would work well if I could actually fit it ...well anywhere.

Title: Man I can't tell you how good a but this is
Review: Man I can't tell you how good a but this is!  Works Great on i7.  Set up your devices and leave it on the screen showing all devices...you have a great phone based universal remote!

Title: Lightly tightening, dries a little sticky; must avoid eyelids Review: I put this under the contour of my eyes. It is a cool creamy gel that dries a bit sticky. It does tighten and feels slightly moisturizing. It also only slightly improves my eye bags. What I do not like is that I cannot use this on my eyelids. I was looking for an eye cream and this is for under the eye area. Also, I found it difficult to pump out of the bottle. I had to prime the pump about 25 times before any cream gel would be dispensed.

The current price of $44.20 ($52 minus 15%) is pricey for this.

Title: Great for gift giving!
Review: This is a gift basket is a cute gift for someone. Contains body Wash, body Lotion and a bath fizzer (something I had never tried before). I was not crazy about the rose scent (it might just be me) and the sizes are on the small size. This is not something I would buy for myself but I can see how this would be great to give your child's teacher or mother-in-law or mail person.

Title: Look nice, and that's it Review: I picked these up when they were on sale. I needed some boots for riding and happened to come across these. I figured they would be fine while I learned and I'd upgrade to more expensive boots later on. They fit nice, have a zipper rather than laces (which is what I wanted), and look great. They seem to be decent quality for the price.

However, these boots are really only good for aesthetics. Once you feel the material, you can tell right away they will not protect your ankles, which is one of the primary reasons you'd want boots. The material is way too thin and soft, and bends easily at the ankles. I wouldn't trust these to protect me in an accident. So for that, I'm knocking off a couple stars. Might as well wear regular boots at that point.

Title: Google 6 pro screen protector
Review: Works okay

Title: BNC connectors are frail like eggshells Review: Well, the price is fantastic. They arrived super fast. The images displayed are ok
However, of the 4 that came in the order, I have only 2 in working condition and I have had them for less than one month. The bnc connectors broke apart on 2 of them ( like an eggshell ). Now, I will have to buy 2 more. So in the end, I didnt save any money and will actually end up spending more money then I originally intended. The other 2 cables are still working but I am afraid the bnc connectors will also shatter so I wont touch them unless I must.

Title: Pretty but tight across the bust.
Review: While it is very pretty, I did find it a little small across the bust.  I thought it was just me, but my sister tried it on and she is a cup size smaller than I am and she also found it a little restrictive across the chest and under the arm.

Title: Pretty good
Review: I was hoping this would Completely replace going to the nail salon to get my cuticles removed, but it’s not That great. It works Good but not Great!! It was easy to do and I liked the light moisturization it provides after application.

Title: Smells like burnt strawberry; it's crumbly & gets all over my sink Review: This works to soften the lips and remove dead cells; however, I hate it. It smells terrible--like strawberries that were burned on the stove. The first ingredient is sugar and it is just a crumbly mess. I rubbed a little into my lips and the scrub's sugar granules went all over my sink and bathroom counter. I hate this. I'd rather use a baking soda paste or a sugar paste I create myself.

UPDATE - I decided to try this again with an exfoliating lip brush and I still hate it. It is crumbly and goes everywhere. The smell is also offensive to me. I immediately threw this out after my second try.

Title: Too small..stacks at waist & will NOT pull down over hips (am size 10) Review: Flimsy see-thru fabric that cannot be worn as "stand-alone". As this type of product "replaces" the need for a bra in smaller people the tank top is not only mis-sized (top small) but un-usable for its intended use.
Waste of money.

Title: It Fits!
Review: I am a plus size mom. I currently wear an 18/20. I'm a 42DD. This bikini top does fit. I wouldn't call it full coverage. Or at least I'm not fully covered. That's okay. My husband likes it! I wouldn't wear this in public, but it's fine for the hot tub. I have had difficulties getting it to feel comfortable around the neck. When I loosen it, "the girls" aren't up as much. When I tighten it, it hurts the back of my neck. I suppose it could be the style. Overall, it;s okay.

Title: It works! Review: It works. I can't get as much lift as when I use a large round brush and regular blow dryer.
Great price. Arrived fast. Heat settings are nice. The cool setting is nice.
I can really straighten my curly/kinky hair.
Very easy to use too. Worth the low price.
I think It's my technique that isn't giving me lift lol

Title: Charging port cover missing!
Review: Sigh. I hate buying stuff and having missing pieces. Charging port cover is missing and it’s what makes it water resistant. Big hassle these days to mail back the whole package and wait for a new one which might or might not have the charging port cover. How hard is it to make sure everything is included as advertised?

Title: Only time will tell Review: I bought this to take & use while on a trip to Europe but unfortunately the trip had to be rescheduled until the spring so I won’t be using it until that time.
I hope I will remember to write a review once I’ve tried this brand of sweet almond oil.

Title: CHOOSE THIS ONE...
Review: I love this case. It appears well made, the material is soft and feels durable. The features are nice. It comes with a pen/stylus, the stand is convenient and my kindle feels protected. This is the best case I've found and I highly recommend.

Title: Not as advertised
Review: The picture on amazon showed a cape I got a headband

Title: Ok
Review: Was way too small for boy

Title: Great facial serum made a noticeable difference in my skin!
Review: This is a really nice facial serum containing collagen. I typically use a serum every morning on my face after showering and have done so for at least 20 years or so now (at the recommendation of my dermatologist). I really like this new serum from Manilla. I always thought Asian women had beautiful skin and now I think it might have to do with the rice milk ingredient (something I never tried before). This serum goes on light and absorbs easily into my skin. It has a light fragrance that I really like, too. My skin over the past few weeks has begun to look noticeably healthier, smoother and has a definite glow. I will be ordering more. Highly recommend!

Title: Good for inbetween salon keratin treatments
Review: I usually get keratin treatments 2-3 times a year. As they tend to be expensive and as I desperately need the treatment more often, I was looking for an in between alternative. For the money, this is actually pretty nice and works well. It is lightweight, absorbs quickly and is not greasy. Deducting a star due to the design set up of the tube (not real user friendly) but, outside of that, for the money this works really well.

Title: Big wallet, nice workmanship
Review: Bought this as a gift. It is a big wallet. And I mean big.

Title: Tamed the frizz in my hair but did reduce my curls some Review: This review is for the Pantene Body Boosting Mousse.

I have short to medium length fine curly hair. I shook the can vigorously and dispensed a little mound of what looked like whipped cream into my palms. I then massaged it throughout my hair and styled it. My hair dried without any frizz, so this did tame any fly-aways. I also like that it did not feel like I had product in my hair. However, it did reduce my curls and that I dislike. Other than this, it works as designed.

Title: OK
Review: Good case. The front USB ports fell apart after a year.

Title: You pay return shipping, almost same cost as product.
Review: Product is adequate, but nothing special. Worst thing is that I ordered in error, and you have to pay for return shipping. The cost is almost as much as the product !

Title: Good enough….
Review: I think I’ve bought these a couple of times as I have 4 kiddos with phones. I don’t feel like any charger lasts in this household, and we are always trying to find a charger. I bought these in hopes that by color coordinating a color charger to each child, we would no longer have the argument of “He/she has my charger”. It did not accomplish peace in this house. 🤷‍♀️ With that said, the chargers work fine. I can’t say they last durability-wise any better than any other charger.

Title: Perfect
Review: So cute

Title: Yiiikes... wayyyyyy too small
Review: Just... no, sorry.

Title: Not a good buy
Review: These straps are wearing out much too quickly. Initially they seem sturdy and the sliders hold position. Before you know it, the sliders do not stay put, the strap fabric thins out. The rubber grips on the eyeglass frames loosen very easily and do not stay put. I would not buy these again.

Title: Beautiful as expected but....
Review: It was so bent up and how the heck do you take it from a 6 year old to return. Came in a envelope with very little packaging stuff. Bent in three places reallt bad. So study but bent

Title: Not happy too heavy
Review: Too heavy.  I would like a cover like the one I got with my HP Touchpad., Thin covered the front when not needed. Did not add tons of weight

Title: Don’t waste your time or money

Title: Really nice filligree earings
Review: These are super cute dangle earrings and I can see how they could become my every day earrings. As of this writing there is no price associated with them so I can't comment on the value. I will say, they are well made and they are a perfect length (not too short and not too long). I love silver as an every day jewelry statement so these will certainly get a lot of wear. Would make an excellent gift as well. Highly recommend.

Title: Washed and still works! Review: I bought this mp3 player for my daugther over a year ago. She left it in her jeans pocket and then threw her jeans in the washing machine. This mp3 player went through a full wash and spin and it STILL WORKS.

My daughter has dropped it, stepped on it, thrown it... and it STILL WORKS. The little plastic cover it comes with did break and the battery cover cracked, but it STILL WORKS.

You would think she is trying to break it on purpose, but that little Samsung will not give up. It just keeps going, and going, and going.

Title: Perfect staple jacket for winter!
Review: This peacoat is great! First I bought the XL and it was too large, so I bought the large in black and in the Navy, and they are so sharp looking! I’ve had a couple of people stop me and ask where I got them! It looks perfect with jeans and a scarf for winter!

Title: size 4x is more like 2x
Review: Sized way too small

Title: The wire worked great no problems.
Review: The wire worked great no problems.  Would buy again.

Title: Has a rattling sound when played loud!
Review: I have 3 and will be returning this one sine it has a rattling sound when the volume is increased!

Title: Not pink, doesn't plump.
Review: Based on other reviews, I thought this would be a great product. I was surprised and disappointed to discover that this shade is truly colorless on my lips, and it doesn't possess any noticeable plumping factor. Also, other reviewers mentioned that this burns quite a bit and I totally disagree. There is some level of slight burning but it's very subtle. I've tried other lip plumpers that work much better, such as the Physician's Formula Plump Potion. While very sticky, that particular gloss does do what it's advertised to do. The NYX Pump it Up gloss really isn't worth the money. Anyway, people looking for long-lasting plumping won't really get results from a lip gloss - that usually requires some sort of collagen injection, and I'm not about to go there. I'll just have to be satisfied with my less-than-Angelina pout and chalk it up to genetics. :-)

Title: For the money, this is a good facial mask
Review: This is a decent moisturizing mask for the money. Not quite as flimsy and 'wet' as other facial masks, so it easier to put on your face. However, I didn't find it fitting my face as well, so I am not sure the ingredients will get the same opportunity to be absorbed as other masks might be. I do like the way my face feels after using it and the fragrance is light and fresh and provides a relaxing aromatherapy experience when the mask is on. I

Title: Doesn't Irritate
Review: After several uses, I'm feeling pretty neutral about this cleanser. It doesn't irritate my skin or my eyes. The smell is not horrible, but it's not something I am excited about either. It doesn't remind me of any particular scent or smell. The cleanser produces hardly any lather. My skin doesn't feel dried out after usage. Overall, it's okay.

Title: Use in my Office
Review: Perfect surge protector for under my desk at work!

Title: Love it
Review: Great to wear at the gym

Title: Three Stars
Review: Hard to apply without wrinkles

Title: Fire table battery
Review: Battery needs to be charged daily even if only turned on for short period of time

Title: Doesn't with Kindle Fire HD, LTE 8.9
Review: I was so looking forward to having a longer cord for my Kindle Fire HD, LTE 8.9. I ordered two and neither of them work. I see other people have had the same issue. Won't buy from the company again.

Title: womens size disney raincoat
Review: I am 5'7" usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x... 38DDD.  I sized up - but I recommend staying true to size.  It's a bit too large.  The other thing is that it is pretty cheap plastic.  I am disappointed.  But, you get what you pay for.  It will keep the rain off, I think.  It's ok, but I have to say it probably won't last beyond the one trip to Disneyland.

Title: Such a cute sleeper!!!
Review: This is super cute for my 4 month old grandbaby. I love the way it fits him perfectly and it certainly keeps him warm on these chillier than normal Florida nights in February. The shark pattern is super cute and colorful , too, and he looks so adorable in this. I highly recommend this to anyone and would certainly make a great baby shower gift.

Title: Pink (not purple) tiny silicone eyelash/eyebrow brushes – 2.3 stars Review: There are two tiny brushes in this case. I need to use two hands to get at the brushes because the case lid closes on itself. The wider silicone brush is for the eyelashes and the thinner one is for the eyebrow. I prefer to use both for my eyebrows. They are cheaply made and I doubt these will last long, especially when they have to be washed to remove mascara or eyebrow pencil residue.

In addition, I ordered the purple one but it looks light pink and not purple which is a disappointment. The current price of $8.09 ($8.99 minus 10%) is terribly expensive for this as it is not worth more than $2.50 in my opinion.

Title: Not bad… not awesome
Review: Good price for home use only. Directions were little confusing with screws and bolts etc and what goes where. Rivets we’re not as good as expected. Was quite awkward to install with my epson projector. Average product for your average consumer

Title: Smells like an alcoholics breathe
Review: This product works really well BUT it sells 100% of wine and reminds me of a whino!!! It smells just like an alcoholics breathe... eueew kind of nasty.

Title: Great Design! Review: This charging cord has a great design. I love how it fits flush against the phone & doesn't protrude out like most cords. I also like the length, but will also purchase some longer length cords as well.

Overall, it's a wonderful product & great price.

Title: Doesn’t fit as snugly as most leaves open corners
Review: If you have ever dropped your iPad this isn’t the product for you. All of the extra features are great but it leaves your iPad exposed on some of the drop points and I’m not happy about that since I have dropped mine in the past. I’ll keep this one until my new version gets here but don’t be fooled by the looks and the price. Spend the extra money and get the extra safety.

Title: Great Quality, Super Soft, Highly Recommend
Review: I ordered 2 of these for my boys for Christmas gifts. They were great quality & super soft! LOVE the corduroy accents on the cuffs & collars.  They are going to love them! The look really warm too!

Title: 6ft length is great
Review: It keeps charge great. But after some use must keep putting charger in phone several times before it actually charges

Review: Was really odd looking and the color was off... also... I have a small head and it was too small even for me.  A child possibly?  Its just that the style is not well represented in the photo either.  I tried to work with it... but it just wasn't for me - and I really think it will be disappointing for other adults too. I returned it.

Review: POOR

Title: Disappointed
Review: The pants themselves are really cute but they have a huge stain and a small cut next to the stain I'm trying to make arrangements to return them

Title: Hot product, half-baked implementation
Review: Does not include plug adapter (strike 1). Gets very hot on iPhone 13 Pro (strike 2). Does not charge very fast (strike 3). Not a very satisfying device considering the risk of hot operation hot which could shorten battery life. Extremely disappointed in lack of a wall charger for a charging device. This is half-baked idea that fries your wallet and phone battery. Three strikes, it's out, would not recommend to a friend.

Title: Too small for long hair. Wasted my money which is hard to come by with pandemic
Review: Too small for waist length hair. They should state how much hair length it actually works on

Title: Hoping for better
Review: Not bad if you use it for desktop or workbench.

Title: Super small & definetly not wide width as ordered
Review: Nice looking shoe, but I ordered 6.5 wide and it's more like a size 5 reg.  I order online because I can't get to a store, so returns are near impossible. Waste of my money. This is not a shoe you'll want to buy online.

Title: Eight double-banded headbands; knot on top; not for me Review: The tie-dye colors and design look great in the package. However, all eight headbands in this package double banded which means they come to a knot on top. Those type headbands do not fit me well, nor do they look good on me.

I personally prefer single band headbands over double. The double bands create a thinner line across the forehead than the single banded ones. The colors are great and I would have rated these 5 stars if they were a single band. Unfortunately, I'm not crazy about a "knot" in the center of my forehead.

The current price of $13.59  comes to a reasonable $1.70 per band. These are definitely pretty and if a bump in the middle is what one is looking for, then these fit the bill.

Title: Great Idea
Review: I bought them for a friend in rehabilitation center and she has loved using them when she's has to change rooms and have roommates. No issues with them whatsoever.

Title: Good cushioning. Good fit for regular width.
Review: Very comfortable. Would not be good for wide feet. Nice toe room. Normally wear a 10 regular width & they fit great. Good cushioning!

Title: 1/2 earrings. I’m not a fan. Review: These are 1/2 earrings, with a twist, with posts that have a strong backing that does not come loose.
The earring are not gold, and do not look like real gold earrings, there too shinny
There not heavy, but the fake pearls do not look real, and I think the pearls would have
Looked classier if there where smaller and on a small loop that dangled a little.
For costume jewelry this is a good price. 3 stars

Title: Not good, not bad. Review: Purchased hoping it was similar to Maui Babe Browning lotion. Its different.
Not as moisturizing and washes off too easily -- was nonexistent after a quick dip in the pool. MB Browning lotion didn't need to be reapplied so frequently.
Formula is a bit thinner than I'm used to and while it's not a bad fragrance, its definitely not reminiscent of the tropics.

Title: Doesn't last long - keep your receipts and original box
Review: Only worked for about four weeks.  I bought another at the Verizon store, and it lasted a little longer, but it also quit after 8-10 weeks.

Title: Stretch Out Easily
Review: These stretch out so easily. I didn’t even have them on tight and the elastic got wavy around the edges after 2 or 3 days. Not sure I would buy these again.

Title: Nice selection of 8 scrunchies; material can be slippery on hair
Review: There are seven green-colored scrunchies and one white scrunchie. The material is like a satin, so it is a bit slick which increases the chance these will slip out of the hair. I have medium length hair in the back and they did slip out easily if I pulled on them. I do feel these are attractive but low-end. If the bride and bridesmaids all have long hair, then these are a decent option. The current price of $13.99 comes to a slightly pricey $1.75 each. For the quality of these scrunchies, I do not feel these should be priced more than $1.25 each.

Title: Love the plaid but it doesn't dry well
Review: I only wish this product was as good as I hoped it would be.  I loved the plaid design when I got it but the smell of chemicals were strong so I washed it.  The smell was gone but it was more wrinkled than I liked when it came out of the dryer.  It's to bad.
