Review: Stopped working in less than o month. Amazon was not helpful in getting replacement wanted me to send it back for repair even though it was listed for return for another month. Bad bad customer service

Title: Horrible quality
Review: These are terrible quality. How hard is it to make one of these? I have always used these types of sponges and I have never had an issue with them. But these fell apart in no time and they are not consistant in size.

Title: Poor customer service
Review: An interesting material.  Poor customer service.

Title: Reception
Review: HD Reception are pretty good.

Title: Thin Fabric
Review: I am a size 14 woman. I have been looking for a white men's button down to wear with jeans for a while and was excited to see this. It's a good looking shirt, albeit a little thin, but it runs small. Usually XL men's shirts will be oversized on me. I thought a slim fit might be a better fit. The arms are too tight. The shoulders fit okay, but with the tight arms, movement is extremely limited. However, it does fit my husband! He normally wears a size medium to large depending on the garment. He's 6'2" and weighs about 195 pounds. It is not as loose as most XL shirts would be on him, but it does fit his arms and shoulders fine. As I mentioned, it is very thin. He will definitely have to wear an undershirt with it. My family has many Tommy brand items and this one just doesn't seem to be as nice as the others.

Title: Will not wake up from sleep
Review: Just bad, will not wake up from sleep.  I purchase this and within a few hours the same day I got it would not wake up from sleep.  Amazon replaced the next day.  The second Kindle did the same thing within a few days.  After a lot of talk with Amazon they excepted a return and  refunded it.  Very disappointed with the Kindle Fire HD 10.  I was very excited about the larger size (watch lots of movies with the Kindles)  but this one just didn't work.  I have 3 other Kindles, a 7" and 8" also one that is about 5 years old and they work great.

Title: Great addition to your beauty regimen. Amazing results for your lips and surrounding areas
Review: Absolutely loved this lip treatment. I typically use moisturizers on my face, but I guess I never thought of how my lips probably are one of the first areas that show my age. This cream is a smoothing addition to my daily beauty regimen now. I use it at night before bed and in the morning when I wake up. I can honestly say that after using this for almost two weeks now, the results are amazing. I see my lips looking fuller (I typically have thin lips) and the skin around them is smoother. If there is any down size it's the size of the product and the cost. I mean, I will probably be through this little jar in less than a month. Not sure I will spend $60 a month or so for this. But, maybe in this case, you do get what you pay for.

Title: Sizing is wrong
Review: Ordered a large, which is what I usually wear and it was so small that I had trouble getting my arms in it.  Returned it the very next day.

Title: Really nice sunglasses for the money!
Review: I am not sure what the other reviewers got as a product, but I am super happy with the glasses I received. These are nice sized, lightweight polarized glasses. My first impression of them is in the presentation. I love the way these came, looks like a more expensive brand based on the careful packaging and boxing. These fit well and look great on me. No complaints at all.

Title: Great toner for men!
Review: My husband is not one of those guys who is considered a metrosexual male. If anything, he shies from using any skin treatments considers it kind of a feminine task. However, he really likes this toner. He has been using it now for well over a month and I can say he is using it daily. I love the clean fresh smell his skin has and I can see an improvement in his skin tone and it feels soft and smooth after shaving. He is now using this instead of an aftershave. I bought him a second bottle as a stocking stuffer at Christmas since he liked this so much. Highly recommend!

Title: TOO Small!
Review: WAY too small.  Gave to a friend because for the price it wasn't worth returning.

Title: Great styling brush!
Review: This is a great brush. Quality made, strong bristles, it works perfectly on my shoulder length hair. I typically like to straighten my hair so I spend quite a while brushing and blow drying my hair every morning. This brush is a perfect size for me, fits well in my hand and maneuvers easily. Just perfect. I ordered another for my guest bathroom for when people visit. Highly recommend!

Title: Runs small, and low rise. Legs are short but roomy. Review: The color gray is nice , the material is soft, and Thin, but good for summer.

These pants should have fit me with room to spare,.I wear a size 10, 5’2. And the Large is tight!
Short in the crotch, look at the model. unless you want a Low Rise. The legs are shorter on me then the
Model also. Kind of looks like I’m going to a flood!
Legs are not tight.
Guess these will be good to garden in.

Title: Too small for my huge wide feet.
Review: I honestly thought they are okayish but they are very thin and are very tight on my feet on lenght too but they do fit just barely what I didn't like is that the material is like very thick plastic and you can feel it but also very heavy feeling on your feet so yeah they are cool if you want to wear them for a while I guess but I doubt they are comfortable to wear for long periods of time I don't mind because I bought them only to wear around the house but I def wouldn't be able to handle them for long periods of time they are just too tight! Maybe if you want to do some odd job and just want whatever these are fine but not a fan.

Title: Great hyaluronic acid serum for daily use
Review: Really nice serum. Goes on smoothly, absorbs quickly. I have been using hyaluronic acid serums daily for 10+ years now (ever since my dermatologist recommended it). My 60 something year old skin looks far younger than it did (even after loads of sun in my youth). Of course, there are loads of products in the market, many less expensive than this one, however, this is one of the best I have used. I love H20 products in general and use them every day. I love all the quality ingredients in this one (check labels, folks) and will stick with this serum on an on-going basis. Highly recommend.

Title: Been using these for years
Review: I have used these for years and they work for me. Whenver I break out on the back of neck from working out and sweating, I use these and the breakout goes away. I use these on my face as well once a week before I use a mask. I love how well it exfoliates and smooths my skin.

Title: The brushes are a little small
Review: I ordered gold and received silver.  The brush heads are smaller than expected.  I would prefer a fuller brush than the ones in this set.  The bristles are soft.

Review: Did not get my eye makeup off at all.

Title: Fell prey to the hype
Review: I know it's a beloved Fragrance but it's not for me!! It's awful!!

Title: Five Stars
Review: This lotion is very soothing for sunburn.

Title: but hoping for the best, I purchased the product
Review: My age really shows on my neck and chest area, 60.  not expecting much , but hoping for the best, I purchased the product.  I am slowly seeing a difference and I'm happy with 'slowly'.  I will certainly be getting more and plan to use this neck cream for a long time.  Good stuff!

Title: Easy to use
Review: Great size, very user friendly

Title: Multi format DVD Player
Review: The Philips DVP5140, is an excellent device. I purchased it to play DVD's  from the UK and they show wonderfully. I am also excited about the picture quality and sound.

Title: This will do, but not as good as iCarez brand. Has bubbles after 2 tries & 2 days. Review: I've had better tempered glass screen protectors from iCarez for my Fire tablets and my various cell phones. Unfortunately, iCarez doesn't have one available for the Fire 10" tablet right now. I chose this one simply because it looked like the same type and quality that I've been accustomed to in the past That's not quite the case.

This Omoton screen protector is harder to install and get on correctly. It catches and bubbles whereas the iCarez glass protectors on both my 8.9" Fire tablets and my Lg V10 phone went on in the first try without a single bubble or dust particle. But the Omoton took two tries and there is still a bubble on both ends of my tablet after 2 full days and nights. It's a small irritant, but one that shouldn't be there at all. I'm going to look for another brand that's closer to the iCarez quality and try again.

Title: clip on dangle statement earrings
Review: I purchased these thinking they would be just the right earrings - I did purchased the clip on as I cannot wear pierced earrings any more.  The PROS:  very comfortable - came with cushioned clips with spare cushions.  They are pretty.  The CONS:  WAY too heavy.  But the worst, the pear shape stones at the bottom of the dangle will not hang forward - so the stone is faced to the side.  Eh.  So when you're facing someone, all they can see is the SIDE of earring.  Not idea.  In all honestly, I probably wont wear them because they don't hang properly - so I will donate them or gift them to a costumer or something.  The stones were pretty but not spectacular - But they are faux.  I didn't expect much but did expect them to hang as shown in the photos.  They are silver tone - would last for a few wears I'm sure, but they aren't made to be lifelong pieces.

Title: Game changer
Review: So easy to use. I use it every day. Great investment.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Loved iy

Review: The material was a bit thin.

Title: I love the dress but it's only getting 2 stars because ... Review: I love the dress but it's only getting 2 stars because the seam ripped when I washed it. I washed it on gentle cycle.

I love the color and the fit but it had sequins under the arm that would rub and irritate my skin.

With all of that said, I will order another one to give it another chance because I do love the fit and color.

I don't like that this one is plain in the back. Mine wasn't plain at the bottom in the back.

Title: Brighter than my future Review: This light burns with the power of a thousand suns. I accidentally flashed myself in the eyes with it the first time I turned it on and I still see the outline in my dreams.

My only beef is that it doesn't clip into my camera properly, but that's very possibly my camera's fault, or mine, as I am a professional idiot.

Good light, please take precautions and protect your retinas.

Title: No lasting power but great fragrance
Review: Fragrance is spot on pistachio ice cream. However, it fades FAST and isn't something you can depend on to linger more than an hour.

Title: You'll hate the product when you need to change the battery.
Review: Product does it's job, sometimes too well.  Rain will set it off, and so will rabbits and birds.  For this reason you may want to get a buried driveway probe otherwise you will get a lot of false alarms.  I have both this optical sensor and a probe and when I get dual notification, then I know something is out there.  Here's what needs to be improved:  #1  There are 4 Recessed screws to get to the battery, and when you flip it over so you can see where to put the battery they will fall into the dirt.  How Stupid of a design can you get!?!.  How about a simple battery compartment  access door or something that just snaps in place or a single screw.  #2  Who remembers obscure tones?  IF  you have multiple gates on your property, how are you going to remember which tone goes with what gate?  How about a voice over that says something like :  Area 1 or Area 2.  Or better yet, allow the user to upload or record their own tones or something:  "Someone at the Front Gate!"

Title: Cool !
Review: I love these with the magnet attachment !! I have a kindle and the charger cord is loose in the socket so I used this Because of the little magnet that you use for the charging slot. It's save's My kindle charging opener From getting damaged even more because the magnetic cord grabs on right away. This is a great product I wish I would have had it a while ago.The cords come in different lengths Which is nice.

Title: A googly eye camera safety feature!
Review: These are adorable and do the job. During Vivid I had a lot of Skype and Zoom parties and was able to switch it off for conference calls. Kind of tricky to stick in the right place as they are so small and thin.

Title: Uncomfortable
Review: These jeans were not exactly too small, they were just not comfortable.

Title: Irish Spring is the best!
Review: I have loved Irish Spring since I was a kid. Typically using bar soap, Irish Spring has been a staple in my bathroom for years. Now that I, and my kids, are older, we find ourselves switching from bar soap to liquid body wash. I was anxious to try this Irish Spring body wash and I am so glad I did. Same great fragrance as the bar soap, but in a handy pump bottle. This seems to last a long time as we have been using it for almost two weeks now and the bottle is only about 1/4 depleted. My bathroom smells great from the fragrance, our skin feels amazingly soft and clean. Absolutely love this and highly recommend!

Title: My husband recommends this!
Review: I let my husband review this product, so this is what he says: "This is a good moisturizer, have been using it now daily for almost 2 weeks. It goes on evenly and smoothly and absorbs fairly quickly into my skin. I also use it on my face when it is super cold or windy out and it seems to protect my face from becoming chaffed. It's funny, but never really thought of taking care of my skin before, so this body hydrator is really good."

Title: Removes hair against the hair growth
Review: What I like about this razor is that, it is for sensitive skin and you do not need to use shaving cream which is great cause you are saving extra money. What I do not like about this razor is that, if you have a lot of hair stuck to the blades, it does not shave as well as when you first try them cause the hair is stuck and I have no idea how to get those hair out, another thing about this razor is that it shaves well going against the hair growth but, if you use that same razor to shave the same direction as the hair growth, it does not shave well cause of the hair that is stuck in the blades and, I have not switched to the new blades yet because I do not want to waste 1 blade in only 3 days of uses.

Title: Poor sound quality.
Review: I bought this product because it matched my black iPod classic but I returned it the same day. The speaker looks cool but the sound is horrible. It was tinny and muffled and not worth $60.

Title: Too long to cure
Review: This did not work at all, it took forever to cure and germs would shift and slide off nail before it cured. Had to return.

Title: Pretty and comfortable
Review: I am 5'1" 105lbs, the xs skort is comfortable, flattering, and just the right length. The shorts under are pretty short (kind of like hot pants) so not super modest but fine for normal activities where the skirt covers you most of the time. Quick dry type fabric. Basically it's well made and what I expected.

Review: Purchased a 4 pack only needing three for our cruise.  I gave one to each of the people I was with and we have zero issues with them.  They are sturdy and very clear so we had zero issues with readability or having to worry if they were going to get torn off.

Title: Great shirt
Review: I love this shirt! It fits well, the material is soft and comfortable, the color is vibrant. I will definitely wear it often! It’s a casual shirt, but one that can be casual and cute at the same time.

Review: So cheaply made they broke almost immediately. Sad.

Review: NOT the same color as in the photo!!! Its more salmon pink than bubblegum pink. It's a pretty top just not such a pretty pink.

Title: Great way to pamper yourself or the one you love!
Review: This is a great hydrating bath and body set consisting of body wash, lotion and bar soap. I have been using the wash and soap in my shower for about 3 weeks now and the lotion in the morning and evening on my arms, hands, legs and feet. I have seen a noticeable improvement in the moisturizing of my skin and I love the fragrance it leaves behind. Highly recommend this shea butter set for everyone.

Title: The jury is out on these. Updated. Review: Will update after I wash the jumpsuit but first impressions are: the jumpsuit is large and baggy. You definitely need a shirt or tube top underneath or your boobs will show. :/. Right now it looks a little like a clown outfit but hoping I can shrink it a tad. I really want to love it. It’s lightweight, which I like and has pockets…yay!
UPDATE: washed on gentle cycle/cold water and dried on delicate cycle. The jumpsuit shrank slightly and it’s a perfect fit now. Will probably order 1 or 2 more with different patterns.

Title: Buy it

Slow write speeds often 25mb/s (using usb 3.0)
I have other thumb drives that perform much better
Heat .. this thumb drive can heat up a lot. I wouldn't say "burning" hot like other reviewers .. but maybe around 100 degrees F

Title: Terrible
Review: I got one size down from what I ordered & it looked like it was two sizes down or a small even, even though I tried to stretch it it's not stretchy at ALL! The fabric is rough and very hard to work around uncomfortable, the material is not soft and doesn't stretch and feels rough to the touch, when I came back to check if I could buy one size up I noticed that the product is no longer being sold. So basically I feel like I got ripped off, got sold an item so they could get rid of it in their inventory and I cannot even complain about it anymore or make my review count because it's not being sold anymore. Such a rip off, not happy.

Title: Slow as molasses, but works as emergency back up Review: We were having drama with the Wi-Fi connection the first couple of weeks after moving into the new house. We got a new modem, all new Ethernet cables, and finally picked up this router thinking the problem was our original route. Turns out, the issue was a splitter on the cable company's end - whew.

This router is a good size and easy to use in almost any location. It sort of looks like the squatty third cousin to our Alexa. When we did have this unit connected it worked, but really struggled. Our usual router is a 2 channel set up and is just blazing fast. I knew this one wasn't on the same level before I bought it, but it is still considerably slower than expected. We have a thermostat, Alexa, two or three tablets, two smart phones, two TiVo minis and the laptops drawing from the WiFi at various times - a lot of stuff for this router to cope with. I've since gone back to our original router fortunately, but I am keeping this one as an emergency back up.

Title: defective, Is fully charged, doesnt work.
Review: Not as described, not lavender, fully charge, heads will not spin. Useless crap.

Title: I like the lip plumper, but don't like that it didn't come sealed.
Review: I did end up trying this lip plumper, but I was very hesitant due to it not having a seal on the case itself nor on the box.  One of them needs to be sealed to know that it hasn't been tampered with.  The color is nice and the lip gloss is thick, a little too thick for me.

Title: These are great!
Review: I've purchased some charging wires that wouldn't charge my phone, but these work perfectly.  I would buy them again.

Title: Returning
Review: I purchased this off  good reviews. But my cellphone speaker is better. Plan on returning.

Review: Way too expensive. Works fine but not sure if it's worth the money. Maybe if you have a super busy and complex network.  IMO the cheaper models will do just fine. Missed the return window so stuck with it.

Title: gel bead face mask Review: I purchased this for relaxation. I do get migraine headaches and was hoping it might be soothing then, but not so much. Still, it is nice while soaking in a hot bath, stays cool for a few minutes - which is about
as long as it is comfortable. Refrigerate before use. I rinse with a some very soft soap, dry and refrigerate after each use. Having said all of that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Not very well made.
Review: This is cuter in the photo.  It's not very well made.  Part of the ruffle in the front isn't sewn down, the rest of the ruffles look like they are baste stitched instead of sewn with a smaller stitch.  I'll have to sew the ruffles down to be able to use it.

Title: Maybe use it for gift wrap? Review: This thing is such a rip off.
It honestly feels like crepe paper.
Crinkles and feels like paper.
I know it’s inexpensive but I at least expected cloth.

Title: This caramel color is darker than I expected; does not provide full blemish-free coverage Review: This caramel base is like a dark bisque or mocha color. It blends well but not nearly as easily or flawless as the more expensive [[ASIN:B07PNRDWJ6 pretty vulgar]] brand I have come to love. I am able to use this on my fair skin by really blending it in but it is best used in summer when my skin is "kissed" by a tan and that is only because I selected too dark of a color.

Overall, this is okay, I would just select a lighter color for me. The reason I rated this three stars is because I wish it blended easier and provided a more blemish-free cover.

Title: Only mildly exfoliating; Welch's Grape Juice fragrance is off-putting to me
Review: This scrub should be used only three times per week on a moistened face. I used this in the shower by wetting my face and then applying a generous amount. I made sure to avoid the eye area. It mildly exfoliated my cheeks, nose, and forehead. The scrub is a gel with a sand-like "exfoliator" mixed in. I did not care at all for the Welch's Grape Juice aroma. I am extremely fragrance oriented and this is not my favorite; I feel like I should be drinking it rather than washing with the scrub.

Title: Five Stars
Review: The best frames and lenses. This is my second pair.

Title: Stay away.
Review: Screw holes not tapped correctly. Metal not welded properly. Stand leaned forward when secured to table.

Title: Terrible
Review: These are the worst emery boards I have ever used. The grit on sides 1, 2, and 3 seen the exact same— very coarse. There is no light or medium grit on this emery board. Sides of four, five, and six, are all the same too. They aren’t even really gritty at all. Seven is just slicker. They’re pretty terrible. You get very coarse grit, nothing, and slick. They don’t work.

Title: long two toned with bangs wig
Review: It just looked like a wig on.  Sorry.  I was hoping for a more natural look.  I bought a shorter brown with highlights, a shag cut, that is adorable.  This one... not so much.. so I returned it.... It didn't really look like the photos on the ad... hard to capture accurately - I get it... but still.  I returned it.

Title: Great greaseless full coverage sunscreen!
Review: Really cool concept for a sunscreen. I have a tendency to use sun screen primarily on my face and neck simply because of application problems (and enormous amounts of sunscreen needed). This is the first time I have ever used a sunscreen, and in Florida I really needed it. I actually took it with me on a recent Caribbean cruise and I am glad I did. Easy to apply, I quickly (and effortlessly) sprayed it on my legs and arms. Non-greasy, odor free and SPF 50 all combined to an easy to use sun screen. I think this is a must have for beach and pool goers and especially for those with young children. Organic and good for the environment as well, I loved how easy it was to cover myself with and the protection it gave me. I will be buying more to keep on hand for when the children and grandkids visit. Must have!

Title: Horrible support Review: I bought these because the columbias I normally buy are not available. Its just like walking barefoot only with a heel that is too low which causes rubbing elsewhere. Waste of my money.

However, the SMELL of these bags will destroy ANY of those thoughts.  2 stars for the possibility of use.... ZERO stars for the actual bags.  I am so disappointed. Title: Tough on the feet
Review: They look great but are very uncomfortable, like walking on hard concrete, no give.

Title: Holds stiffly for about 2 hours then my hair goes limp after that; fragrance is great Review: This review is for the 3-pack of Pantene extra stron hold hairspray (#4).

I sprayed this over my entire short to medium fine curly hair, and it went on thick. My hair felt like it had a net in it. However, that hold only lasted about two hours and after that my hair went limp. The bottle says that it holds without leaving the hair feeling stiff or sticky. The sticky part is true; it is not sticky. However, it does go on stiff and stays stiff for a couple of hours. After that, there is no hold but it still feels like I have product in my hair.

I do love the fragrance which smells like apple to me. However, this hairspray hold power is just so, so and is not as it claims.

Review: Purchased these for my Mom as she likes to switch the color of bands to match what she's wearing - she loves them.  She wears a stretch band for every day use.  These are just for a fun change.  They are a rubbery feeling material, with pierced holes for more comfortable wear.  The clasp is a base metal of some sort I think.  I believe they will last longer than Mom will need them.  Several different colors.  Arrived quickly (I have prime) and in good condition with other items I had ordered.

The scent is the reason I rated this three instead of five stars as it is a five-star soap in every other way. It also mildly exfoliating.  I also tried their [[ASIN:B00BWNGY4U lavender honey]] soap which is also excellent but which I rated two stars because of the fragrance. I guess it is the "honey" in these soaps that just ruins it for me.

Title: Overpowering Floral Fragrance Negates Good Qualities Review: This SUPER-MAX CARE COLLAGEN CREAM is thick and does a good job of rehydrating and rebuilding aged or sun-damaged skin. Unfortunately, it has an overpowering floral fragrance that lasts for hours.

The fragrance does NOT make me sneeze (unlike many perfumes and perfumed products), but breathing in the fragrance makes me feel kind of sick after 15-30 minutes. The cream doesn't wash off easily, either. Because of the strong fragrance, this is suitable for night-time application only, and it's unsuitable for anyone who is sensitive to fragrances.

Title: As Of This Posting There Are Too many Things The Voice Commands Cannot Do Review: It was a struggle at first to get the VOX remote to pair with my Roamio OTA...but after multiple attempts it did eventually pair.

The voice feature needs to be improved by a lot. A lot of things I ask, it cannot do for me. One simple thing it should be able to do: I have channel 9.1 as an example. There are no sub channels on OTA channel 9. If I ask to go to channel 9, it won't do it. It should be smart enough to know that channel 9 is 9.1. Oh, and it doesn't work with " 9 dot 1." To voice change to channel 9, I have to say "9 dash 1." It's frustrating, to say the least.

Also, it won't switch back to the previous channel you were watching by voice command: "Go to last" or "Go to Previous"

Also, you cannot voice command for your TiVo to go into Standby Mode. You can voice command the TiVo to open up Settings, and then use the buttons on the remote to navigate to the section where you can press to go to standby.

Title: High-Quality Sports Socks Absorb Moisture Well Review: As you would expect from the adidas brand, these ADIDAS ALPHASKIN HYDROSHIELD LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONED SOCKS (1-Pack) are high-quality sports socks. They’re left/right specific socks--a feature that I think is overrated, and that makes it necessary to sort the socks carefully after washing if you own more than one pair of these. The socks do have an “L” and an “R” woven into the toes to make sure you get them onto the correct feet (unless you get dressed in the dark).

The socks absorb moisture well, as advertised. They have loops resembling a terry cloth towel on the wrong side, and these loops wick up moisture. The cushioning bands make these feel like medium-weight knitted socks. The socks fit snugly around the arch of the foot. In fact, the socks generally fit snugly--the 9.5-12 size is too snug for my husband’s feet, which are shoe size 12-12½.

Title: Skin care is so important and microneedling is a must do!
Review: I have been getting facials, microderms and microneedling for 15+ years now. I honestly feel that my skin (67 years young) looks better than it did when I was in my 30's. Spas can be expensive, so I was really looking for an easy to use at-home device and this Dr. Pen microneedle kit is it. I love the various attachments and I can make it as deep or as light as I see fit. I use a great serum to go with it and my skin is flawless. I have been using this every two weeks now and I can say my skin has never looked healthier and glowing (sure, the first day after the treatment it is a little red, but it goes down within 24 hours). Highly recommend to everyone!

Title: Great, gentle but thorough cleanser for your skin
Review: I love Vichy products and have a lot of them in my every day beauty regimen. This new cleansing water is amazing. Light and refreshing, it gets the job done and removes all my foundation and shadows while leaving my skin soft, smooth and clean. I like this so much better than most sudsy cleansers I have used and my 60-something skin has never looked better since using it every night for the last month. Highly recommend this for anyone at any age.

Title: An excellent brush but the bristles keep shedding Review: The brush feels and looks excellent. The bristles are rigid enough to clean dirty nails and hands but not too rigid as to hurt my hands. Unfortunately, from the first moment I used this, the bristles started to fall out. Every single time I rubbed my hand on the brush, more bristles would fall out. If the bristles stayed put, I think a reasonable price would be around $18 and not $27.95 for such a tiny item.

Boar bristle is normally expensive but it is such a small brush for the price. Based on some of my research, animal hair brushes do shed and eventually are supposed to stop shedding after lots of use. I have one of their hair brushes and it still hasn't stopped shedding. Unfortunately, I cannot vouch for this brand's shedding history, so if one is familiar with this type brush and it eventually stops, then I can say this is an absolutely excellent brush.

Title: They began to pucker from the edges on the back side immediately and failed a short time later Review: Update: In my earlier review (Below) I did not know how long they would be functional after they started to pucker. Title: Not a pretty lacey bralette. its a sports bra that runs small. Review: I do not know why this is called a Bralette!
A bralette is a comfortable sexy bra, and there is usually a triangle material that covers the breasts, is very Lacey, also around the bottom is lace., the thin straps can be ajusted, but there is Not any support. I don’t think a Bralette is for larged breasted women!

This bra is a pull over like some sports bras, with a soft cottony material, that does not have any shape, comes up high in the front
And back, opposite of a bralette..these straps are like a sports bra, but the sides are cut in and too big for me..
This is not sexy or with a sexy low V in the middle like a Bralette is..( I have a few Bralettes).

I think this is a Sports Bra, without any shape and flattens me.
The black elastic around the bottom is not Comfortable for me., but does not curl up.

This is a large, and should have ample room, and comfortable, for me its not comfortable , and was hard to get off and on.
I’m disappointed!

Title: Seems to be too dry for me! Review: This is what I have been looking for, I thought!
This palette does not come with a brush or puff.
I used my fingers to give my face some contour, but I found this to be dry, and
Wasn't smudging well.
I do not have dry skin, and I put moisturizer on before using this.

I was a little disappointed !
With Covid going around again I’m not going out much, but I’ll be giving this another few times
Trying it.
If I really like it, I’ll be back with a update

Title: Love this
Review: Very cute well made mask.

Title: Too thick for my taste
Review: I will gift it, as think it is too thick.

Title: nail files
Review: These are my preferred nail files - 120/240 grit - so a coarse and fine side.  They last forever.  I put one in each of my cars - my purses and bedside - You get 6.  And I find that people "borrow" them and then keep them - so I like to keep a stock.  I have natural nails that I sometimes get gel manicures on - and once in a while powder dip.  They work on all types in my opinion.

Title: 3 pairs of memory foam ear tips
Review: I was really hoping for better replacements for the tips that came with the galaxy ear bud pros that I purchased.  I guess I need an even bigger memory foam tip - the largest tip in this selection is barely big enough... I just throw out the others I don't need.  Eh. They work - sort of - but not if they aren't the right size.

Title: Runs boxy, and big under the arms, soft & comfortable. Review: This is not what I would call a sweatshirt, or a blouse.
The material is soft like a tee shirt , but not as thin, and not
See threw.
This hangs loose, and runs big.
I received a Medium, and under the arms it is Big also.
I think this looks boxy on, and does not show your curves
Longer then I normally wear.

The neck-line did come off my shoulder a bit, although I was not wanting the off
The shoulder look , but when I put a light
Weight jacket on, the neckline ended up high on the front of my neck!

I put this in the washer and dryer, it did not shrink that I was hopping it would.
I’m 5’2, 128 lb. 36C. Older woman .
Hope this helps.

Title: Intense fragrance I really like but cream is thin & runny but moisturizes well; INSANELY priced
Review: This lavender patchouli scent is really intense and smells wonderful with floral and slightly sweet notes. Nevertheless, the lotion is very liquidy. I expected this to be more body butter like (meaning thick). It moisturizes well and absorbs quickly and leaves my skin feeling silky. The current price of $25.20 for 4 ounces is also insane. I took off one star for the insane price and one star for the thin texture. If this lotion were a bit thicker and cheaper, I would have rated this 5 stars.

Title: Great brush - every woman should own one!
Review: Absolutely fantastic buffing brush. Besides being a perfect smaller size (will not take up that much room in your makeup case), it fits wonderfully in your hand allowing for expert applications. The bristles are strong, yet oh so soft. Use this for my blush application and the results come out professionally every time. I cannot recommend a better brush for this purpose. Japonesque is known for they high quality products and this buffing brush is no exception.

Title: This was not the same product I buy from my salon
Review: This travel size conditioner was not the same as the full size I buy from my hair salon. The fragrance was really weird , it had a plastic like scent and was very unpleasant. I knew it wasn’t the same and therefore refused to even use it.

Title: Yuck
Review: Thick and stiff and doesn't spread on easily. Leaves a pale residue. Also, has a strange smell.

Title: framed oval mirror
Review: I thought I was receiving the unframed, beveled edge - but I got this one... a really heavy, ugly shiny chrome framed mirror. YUCK.  I returned it.  Why 5 stars?  Well... it's not for me, but someone else may really like it.  It was very well packed.  It's just too garish for me... In my personal opinion the shiny chrome makes it look a bit cheap... just my opinion.

Title: Cups runneth over
Review: Not a great bra for big boobies. Let's just say even when purchased in the correct size, the cups runneth over. Not cool.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Purchased a 2x for 164 lb female 5 ft 5 inches.  Gray in color.  Love that they have useful pockets, fit is nice and flattering.  Wash and wear well.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Only for a few days but it very well, no complaints yet

Title: Good price; shipping a little slow.
Review: Great price.  Works as expected.  Took a while to get it, but it comes all the way from China.

Title: Great light moisturizing cream!
Review: I really like this InfiiniteAloe moisturizing cream. First, it comes in a large tub with a handy small tub that I can keep in my purse for use during the day (or if I travel overnight somewhere). I can easily refill the small container which keeps this more economical for me. When using it, the cream applies easily and my skin quickly absorbs the moisture (I have relatively dry skin). My skin is glowing and noticeably softer after using it daily for a few weeks now. I really do like the musky scent as well, it is light and almost not noticeable when absorbed. Highly recommend this cream for all.

Title: love this blouse for summer
Review: Cool and breezy, loose fitting cotton top perfect for too hot summers.  Lovely color easy to care for, line dry and quick press.  well made too.

Title: Comfortable Fit!
Review: For kids, these headphones are okay. They have a comfortable fit. The headband is adjustable and adequately padded. The ear cups are nicely cushioned. They seem to be average as far as durability. The length of time that they will last will depend on the child and any potential abuse they get. The graphics are pretty cool. Sound quality is decent, but not great. However, it should be adequate for most kids as they usually aren't audiophiles yet! The volume limiter is a good feature. Overall, these are not great, but okay.

Title: Interesting Design
Review: This organizer has an interesting design. It's 2 separate pieces. The base is long and divided. Then there's a square piece that rests on top of the longer bottom piece. It's raised so you can still store items underneath it. The square has silicone strips going across it to create individual spots so you can store things such as lipsticks and mascaras. The silicone pieces flex to accommodate various sized items. I have limited counter space in my bathroom, so I am not sure that this work for my make-up, so I think I am going to use it at my desk to hold office supplies.

Title: eh
Review: As reported by many others, this robe runs very small.  I normally order a 14/16, 1x.  I ordered the 3x which fits like a 1x... sort of. The under arms are really huge.  Also, it's like it was a "second".... there was a "tie" on one side of the robe (meant to secure to another tie on the inside, keeping the robe closed) BUT the inner tie was not there.  Disappointing.  The outer tie is sewn on as reported by others and is not too high for me... I am 5'8".  The length hits me right at the knees.  I am going to keep it as I plan to use as a swim suit cover up but it is not a really awesome robe.

Title: No way
Review: U cant watch live when its recording the Ifiii or what ever it uses allows 100 texts a MONTH i used in a day returning tomorrow

Title: Definitely needs some updates!
Review: The video playback freezes when it switches from infrared to the normal camera.  Also, the playback software on video is a bit annoying.  They should design it to be more like video playback on a phone, DVD player, or YouTube.  But it is difficult to get exact timestamps, & there is no fast forward, rewind, pause/play features.

Title: Great multi-use tissues!
Review: These are really nice tissues. Stronger than typical tissues, you can use them for cleanups, makeup removal, anything that you can use a regular tissue for, but better. Absorbs super quick and does not tear easily. Best part of all these are good for the environment. I highly recommend these for every home.

Title: If you love your skin, you need Coppertone Defend & Care!
Review: This is my new favorite when it comes to sunscreens for my face. I am relatively fair (Irish bloodlines) and also 60 something. I worry about things like cancer more and more these days (along with the impact that excess sun has on aging skin. Along with trying to eat right, exercising and doing spa treatments occasionally (microderms, facials), my skin looks terrific. And I know that, for my age, I look younger than many of my younger (in age) neighbors here in Florida. Sun damage wreaks havoc on your skin and this Coppertone Defend and Care works great. SPF 50, I apply it under my makeup each morning and I am good all day at the office. I particularly like this brand of sunscreen as it is non-greasy and absorbs quickly so it doesn't mess with my makeup. Nothing but great things to say about this, every home should have at least one of these on hand at all times.

Title: Works great
Review: I needed an inexpensive external drive for my new laptop. As it is not something I use often, i didn't want to spend a lot of money on it. For what I need, this was the perfect product. I plugged it in and it worked right out of the box. No hassle, very easy. I am sure if I was using this more, i may find a more expensive solution would be a better fit, but for what I need- this was perfect.

Title: Great compact bag, stores a lot!
Review: This is a really nice compact travel toiletry bag. Loads of compartments, great for my make up, medicines, vitamins and hair supplies. I love that it folds up into a neat compact case and that it can open up and hang (I usually put it in the hotel bathroom on the back of the door on a towel hook). This isn't for very large items, but is great for probably 90% of my items. Quality made, zippers are strong. Highly recommend!

Title: exfoliating brush Review: UPDATE below....This brush seems small and defenseless right? It's really a tough exfoliating brush! The bristles are soft when you brush fingers over the brush (I was thinking eh this is so soft!)- but don't let that fool you... start using it! It's very invigorating with little pressure and effort! I was really surprised. I use one of those classic hair pullers on my legs and it always works best if you exfoliate first. Impressive and effective. If you're in the market for an effective exfoliating brush - this one is certainly worth consideration. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. And I hope this info was helpful to you.
UPDATE: 2/6/2019.... Just an FYI... the handle tends to hold water... which can become gross. It's supposed to come apart but I haven't been able to get it apart yet... So I am moving to using this as a dry brush just before or after a shower/bath.

Title: Good charger
Review: Hopefully theses last longer that the last two sets from different companies so far so good

Title: Junk
Review: Don't even waste your money

Title: Smells great!
Review: This item arrived quickly and packaged well. It is a nice sized bottle too. I put it in my aromatherapy diffuser with a little lemon grass oil and my house smells like a spa! Great buy.

Title: Love this highly mositurizing night cream!
Review: I have been looking for a good overnight moisturizing skin cream and I think I finally found it. This cream is thick and goes on smoothly (being quickly absorbed into the skin). There is no residue to stain my pillow cases or anything else. My 60-something skin in the morning feels amazingly hydrated, soft and plumper looking.  I am not thrilled with the scent (it is almost a mint or even a mild medicinal smell, like Vick's vapo rub) but it doesn't stay on the skin once absorbed. I highly recommend for anyone looking for a great overnight moisturizing cream.

Title: Sizing Runs Small
Review: I was surprised that I didn't love this! What's not to love about a comfy sweatshirt! I currently wear a size 16 in women's sizes. The arms didn't fit well at all! They were a little short on me, and I'm pretty average in height/arm length. They were also snug on me that made it uncomfortable to wear. On the plus side, it's soft and well made.

Title: Decent, but the scent wasn’t for me.
Review: Works, but the scent wasn’t really for me- it is mild and you don’t notice it once it is applied.  I tried it as an alternative to spray deodorant. Solid bar and it does work nicely for my long runs.

Title: Quality is Lacking
Review: I loved the idea of this charger/power strip.  The wireless charger ceased working after one month.

Title: Adorable- My Son loves his shirt! Peace out single digits!
Review: Came super fast and was a hit - went with his theme and he loves the shirt !

Title: like it.
Review: I bought a sample bottle of this brand at whole foods during Christmas as a stocking stuffer and came back for more. I think it does really add some texture and volume.  You have to be careful with these types of shampoos/conditioners as they can sometimes leave you with fly away/static looking hair. That sometimes happens, but I use a leave in conditioner to help with that. It smells clean and not particularly flowery, to me.  I always update with any issues if they would be helpful.

Title: Okay product
Review: The problem that I found is that the cord is so long it dangles down to far and is annoying to sleep with. If you zip it in the pouch it is hard to get back out.  Another problem is the volume most of the time is so soft I have to put the volume all the way up to be able to hear it.  Not sure if it is because the headphones speakers are not adjustable or if it is the head phones themselves.

Title: Fits 6 or 7 credits cards and is perfect for the top pocket of a shirt or small bag Review: This wallet is small and fits 6 or 7 credit cards in a tight wad. There are three pockets on either side and one in the middle. I would actually use the middle pocket for some small folded bills; although they do not need any RFID protection. This is small enough to fit in a top shirt pocket or a tiny purse. I cannot vouch for the RFID claims, but will take their word for it.

What I do not like is that the surface shows every imperfection / scratch / crease as you can see from the first two photos. The leather is also very thin. However, this is still functional, attractive, and perfect for when a tiny wallet is needed.

Title: Tiny, soft washcloths & nothing more; NOT EXFOLIATING Review: There are six tiny and super soft and velvety washcloths in this package. Three are vibrant red and three are a deep black. They work like washcloths do in that I have to put soap on them and wash my face, make-up, etc. off my face. Scrubbing with them is pleasant because they are super soft. However, they are not exfoliating at all.

The current price of $8.49 is a pricey $1.42 for what amounts to a Kraft singles size square of cloth.  I wash these type cloths in a lingerie bag and lay flat to dry. I do not recommend putting these in the dryer.

Title: Great lip color!
Review: This is my first time of using Measurable Difference makeup and I am impressed. Beautiful color, comes in a handy applicator container, easy to apply and long lasting. I am deducting a star (although I probably shouldn't because it does call itself a matte lipstick) because there is no shine at all (something I really like in my lip wear) so I do need to dress it up a bit for my use. I do apply an over coat of clear gloss and it does work great. If you are looking for a gloss and lipstick in one, this is not for you. But if you like your lips without a sheen, or you don't mind applying a top coat, then you will love this!

Title: Organic Aloe spray
Review: I purchased this JUST IN CASE I got sunburned  - but was careful and did not.  So, instead I just sprayed this on as sort of a moisturizer and it was great.  I have sensitive skin and I did not have any reaction to it.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Review: Really cute shoes, the sizing is way off! Bought a sz larger after reading reviews and they were way too small, lesson learned, never buy shoes online

Title: Really easy to install and works really well as a privacy ...
Review: Screen Fits my HP Elite X2 perfectly. Really easy to install and works really well as a privacy screen. I would highly recommend this to others concerned with the privacy of their tablet.

Title: One Star
Review: Crap

Title: Three double banded and two single band headbands; not for me Review: The colors and design look great in the package. However, there are five headbands in this package and three of them are double banded (see photo) and two are a single band.

I personally prefer single band headbands over double. The double bands do not look great on me and the cloth creates a thinner line across the forehead than the single banded ones. Unfortunately, the colors on the single banded ones in this package are not super attractive on me. These bands are just okay but they  are not really my preference as I'm not crazy about a "knot" in the center of my forehead.

Also, the current price of $12.99  comes to a slightly pricey $2.60 per band. These are definitely pretty and if a bump in the middle is what one is looking for, then these fit the bill.

Title: Disappointed
Review: These shoes were a waste of money. I don’t like to return items so I will give them to GoodWill

Title: Decent, but the design is flawed.
Review: Somewhat disappointed. Works as advertised except this desk is not wide enough and therefore your computer is not centered for typing. I’m order to do my homework I have to set it up as shown in my photo (move computer to center of desk instead of where it’s supposed to sit) which leaves little room for my mouse to be used. This is the only flaw I am seeing so far.

Title: small makeup brush set

If you need a brush for fine or medium application - this is your set.  Comes with a kinda cheapy bag with a slide closure, but what the heck.  Also came with a small pair of scissors too.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Nice warm sweater, has wool in it and is itchy for me. Review: Good looking charcoal winter sweater that has light little flecks of different colors in it.
This sweater will keep you warm.

I have to wear a tee shirt or something underneath the sweater as it is a bit itchy for me.
There is a small % of wool in this sweater, and its just not comfortable for me.

I think this run small, or I like my sweaters big to wear with leggings, and this does not work for me!

Dry clean .

Review: Returned but got a surprise, charged return shipping.

Title: Wasn’t aware of the gold sheen
Review: Didn’t realize there was a gold sheen to this color and it totally washed me out. Giving 3 stars because I still love the other colors in this stain.

Title: very comfortable
Review: I did the try before you buy just because I have had so many issues with clothing and to my supress they are amazing. I did get the 16 which I wear but could of worn the 14 maybe I actually lost some weight lol either way I love them. Thank you

Title: led gets brighter with fan speed equal more noise
Review: at full speed these fans blow 1800 rpm and at 100 percent they are noisy the led is based off fan speed if i lower the fan speed to even 80 percent 1400 rpm the light goes very dim pointless to have blue leds in the fans if the led part is going to dim with fan speed do not buy if you like quiet computer because the led will turn off if they go below certain rpm very disappointing

Title: Poor quality
Review: Very cheap quality

Title: Great artisanal soap! Shea butter makes my skin soft and smooth! Great fragrance, great soap!!!
Review: To be honest, I have been using liquid body wash for the last 2-3 years exclusively. This is the first time I have used bar soap (ok, except for maybe hotel stays) since that time. I am super impressed with this soap. First, it is very sizeable and heavy. I have been using it daily for the last 2 weeks and it still looks like the same size as when I took it out of the wrapper (so my assumption is this will last a long, long time). Glorious lavender mix fragrance (which I love). I feel cleaner than I have in years and my skin feels amazing (I assume it's the shea butter). This is my new favorite soap and I love it. No more body washes for me, I will be using these European soaps going forward. Kudos to Pre de Provence!

Title: Great, long lasting mascara!!!!
Review: This is a great mascara. As usual, L'Oreal produces some of the best cosmetic products out there and this new mascara is no exception. I am a 60 year old woman with thinning lashes and brows. I use this Voluminous Lash Paradise exclusively now. It fills out my lashes and makes my eyelashes look fuller and longer than they did 20 years ago. It also is easy to remove (with my makeup removal pads) so I do not wake up in the morning with raccoon eyes. At the same time, it lasts all day and holds up to hard wear. Kudos to L'Oreal for another great product!

Title: Four Stars
Review: Good looking, good fit, I'm satisfied.

Title: Just as good as the more expensive ones......
Review: This screen protector fit my kindle HD 7 (2013 latest release) really good.  I watched the video on the tech armor website on how to apply and was able to do it in one try.  I previously bought an expensive one for my first kindle because I figured the more expensive one was better.  But this one seems just as good if not the same!  I bought the 3 pack just incase I messed up applying the first one, but I didn't, so now I have two extras!

Review: They are very tight, not very comfortable.

Review: Kind of stiff and not sure it will be worn but it looks like it will hold up well

Title: Mistake!!!!
Review: I thought it’s earrings for earrings I need two!!  I only received 1.

Title: Cheap and fragile
Review: This is a dime store fan, cheaply made but it is quiet And easy to install. In a tent or camper it’s hard to get it high enough to keep from always hitting your head on it as it runs. It does move enough air to be of some help.

Title: Brushes & combs are excellent; plastic rake is useless but everything stinks of burnt rubber Review: At the current price of $18.04 ($19.99 minus 5%), this is competitively priced for a total of five items. Included in this set are one large boar / nylon bristle brush with wooden handle, one small boar /nylon one small wooden comb, one plastic brush cleaner rake, long wooden rat tail comb, and one wooden wide-tooth comb.

Both brushes glide through my fine curly short to medium-length hair with ease. They are easy to hold; even the small one. The wooden combs work well too but I am not a user of combs.

The only item that is absolutely useless is the plastic rake. I was unable to get any hair out of the brush using this. Nevertheless, the other items are great, particularly the brushes.

The biggest problem I have with this set is that it stinks of burnt rubber. It is for that reason only I rated this 3 stars.

Title: Waste of money
Review: Does not hold the cords together . Magnetic is weak

Title: matte lipstick
Review: It's a little bit cakey.. lasts around 4-6 hours (eating, drinking, talking - ha - and now masks).  I really miss the old felt tip, lip stain... they stopped making it years ago. Super sad... this is not really a good sub.. but it's ok.

Title: A difference
Review: My hair no matter what I put in it is dry! It just soaks up everything I put and is always frizzy. After using this mask now for the 3rd time, my hair is so much softer. My hair isn't as frizzy. I love it!

Title: Apple charging wires
Review: The multiple lengths come in handy for different uses. The 3 foot wire is perfect for in the car while the 6 &.10 foot wires are perfect for the desk, couch, or bed.

Title: Great generic brand, works at removing makeup magically!
Review: I have to start by saying I love Amazon named products. They always seem to produce a quality product, basically little to no difference between them and their specific brand counterparts. These facial wipes are no exception. Great quality and strong, removes most of my makeup in a single swipe and make my skin feel refreshed and clean after using them. I tend to use waterproof mascara and surprisingly these wipes help clean my eyes flawlessly. I will never buy a named brand product again and will stick with this Solimo product. I highly recommend!

Title: Great hair waver but is a tedious chore
Review: This is a great ceramic waver for hair. It is fairly easy to use, but it took me almost an hour to do my entire head of hair (despite the fact that this has a larger plate for more hair at a time than other curler/wavers. This fits well in my hand (ergonomically easy) and it was easy to maneuver. Not sure how often I will be using this (I typically prefer my hair on the straight side) but I will use it for special occasions since it seems so tedious to go section by section. This would be easy to use on someone else in lieu of doing my own hair. Might ask a friend to help me with mine next time for sure.

Title: nice
Review: nice tweezers  but for the price  they shoulda came with a nice  case  .....i gotta find something to keep them in so they dont get ruined !

Title: Great gaming laptop cooler
Review: I needed additional cooling for my gaming laptop. I wanted something that would perform this cooling function without much fuss. I purchased the DreamSky cooling fan and have not been disappointed in it. It really makes a huge difference. Yes you have to sacrifice a bit of motor noise for the additional cooling but you won't be disappointed. It has a speed control so you can adjust the speed or turn it off completely. This is just what I needed and for under $20 how can you go wrong?

Title: Can't wait to get more
Review: This helps me relax enough to actually fall asleep and stay asleep. I have trouble calming down in the evening, I am naturally a night person so I have trouble falling asleep but after a nice warm bath with this soak, that is no longer an issue.

Title: Nice material Review: Interesting pattern. Nice fabric. It isn’t cheap and thin. I ordered the “apricot” Happy with the purchase.

I am 5’4” and weigh about 172 lbs. I am a 36 DDD. I ordered an XL. It fits perfectly. This is a long shirt. It goes almost to my mid-thigh.

Title: Stretched out after one wear
Review: They’re comfortable and secure the first time you wear them. But then they get stretched out after that initial wear. So you don’t get very much mileage out of these. They’re cute too, so that sucks. And it’s not like I have a really big head so the fact that they get stretched out after one wear is really annoying.

Title: Run small, shrunk after washing. Good looking socks. Review: Very nice looking ski socks.
There made well.

That said these sock run small. My husband could not get them on. I have to admit he has wide feet.
I’m a women, and wear a size 6 1/2 to a 7 narrow. The part of the socks fit me, but the leg part is tight. I have very slim legs.
After washing and drying these socks, they shrunk..

Title: Great Blouse
Review: Great blouse. Good quality and washes well. Only issues is the shipping charge (expensive).

Title: It was larger than expected. I had to roll the sleeves up twice. Will likely return it..
Review: Size was too large. It is a good thickness for the Fall season. I will likely exchange it for an XL size. (I'm a 2X normally).

Title: Too Short For Full Size Trucks
Review: Not able to use only 7ft. Long.

Title: VERY STYLISH
Review: I got the Echo & stand for my daughter & son-in-law for Christmas.  They absolutely love both.  The stand is very stylish & they have it right on their breakfast bar so they can access Alexa whenever...

Title: Five Stars
Review: Good quality combs.

Title: Easy to use
Review: This product is fantastic. Place under running water and squeeze it together. It soaps up and is easy to use.

Title: Does not spread the lotion at all; foam will disintegrate over time; handle weak point Review: This lotion applicator comes with a folding plastic handle and two rollers. I just forcefully pried open the handle and then slid the roller onto the track on top. I just use the release button to release the roller when I want.

I utterly dislike this and feel it is a waste of money after having tried this.

LIKES
- None

DISLIKES
- It does not work. All it did was soak up lotion and did not move it around on my body.

- At $20.39 ($23.99 minus 15%) this is outrageously priced.

- The foam rollers will disintegrate over time just like rubber bands.

- The handle has to be pried open with force and it feels like it is going to break. When collapsing it feels the same way.

I cannot recommend this. Applicators like [[ASIN:B093BF3FB3 this]] are far superior to this one, last for years, and cost much less.

Title: Good quality Review: Arrived very quickly. I tried it on the next day and felt it fit. According to the size guide, I needed an XL. I wear a 38 DDD bra size. After wearing it for a day, I definitely needed a large. I emailed the seller about returning it and never received an answer. So, customer service isn’t that great.

The material is thick. I got the shirt in white and it was not see through. The shirt itself was good quality. The square neck caused me issues with my bra straps showing at times. That might not have happened if I had gotten the smaller size. It did wash well.

Title: missing the code
Review: The 'special code' found on all the boxes which Angel is packaged in had its code cut out.  I was so mad.  You can take that code and 'refill' your bottle on the  Thierry Mugler web site and get all sorts of little free things.  I did complain to Amazon about this, and they gave me a partial credit since I could not return the perfume itself.  This is the first time this has ever  happened to me and am hoping it doesn't happen again.  There was nothing wrong with the perfume itself, but since it is so expensive, I've come to look forward to 'refilling' my bottle and receiving my little gift.

Title: Excellent!
Review: I love these. They even come with a carry case and several sizes of ear bud inserts. Thank heaven!  I get ear pain from most, but the smallest buds fit great.  They also have a charger and all of it fits in the carry case. I just wish they came in more colors preferably something bright!  When I leave them on my nightstand it takes a while to figure out which of half a dozen black cables are the right ones. Even white would be ok as only my iPhone has a white cord.

Title: nail clippers
Review: I bought these to replace a set that really cut terribly and left ragged edges.  I was hopeful for this set and they do indeed cut cleanly.  And they are made in the USA.  Win/Win.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: A bobby pin with the word LOVE on it; too expensive for what it is Review: This is nothing more than a high-end bobby pin. At the current price of $12.95, I feel this is way overpriced.

The pin is more of a hair accessory that a hair holder. Also, when I tried this on, I had to be careful to fasten the bobby pin in the correct direction so that the word LOVE was displayed correctly. It is a nice accessory, but I would not pay more than $3.50 for this.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Works well. No more worries about losing 4000+ photos

Title: Junk that doesn’t work
Review: I would give this negative 0 stars if I could. Does not work at all. Shame on you for stealing $10 from unsuspecting people.

Title: Be prepared for considerable shrinkage
Review: I absolutely love this shirt , the quality of the flannel, vibrancy of the thread colors, thickness and softness are wonderful. Unfortunately ,the shrinkage after just one wash was so much so it was very noticeable and after the second wash it had shrunk so much that the sleeves no longer reach my wrists and the length no longer covers my backside . Very sad considering I sized up wanting a certain look and expected to be able to wear this shirt with boots and leggings. I normally wear an XL , I’m 5’7 and 170 to175 lbs . I purchased an XXL wanting a fuller more baggy fit , perfect and actually a bit bigger than I even expected but after two washes it fits more like a large .

Title: Refurbished and satisfied
Review: My granddaughter is overjoyed!

Title: Runs small and is super thin
Review: The hat is onthe small side and is really thin.  Not as nice as one would hope for considering the cost. Too expensive and would reccomnent

Title: Four Stars
Review: My mother in law loves it.

Title: One of my favorite conditioners on the market today!
Review: I love this shampoo and conditioner (I have purchased both). First, I love the scent. Lightly peppermint and lavender, it fills my shower with the most amazing calming fragrance which lightly lingers on my hair for me to smell during the day. Second, I love how my hair feels after using it. The conditioner goes on thick and smooth and makes my hair shiny and super soft. I highly recommend for all hair types, but especially for hair that is dry and difficult to manage (i.e. frizzies).

Title: It’s cheapy but cutey
Review: Cute enough... cheaper than expecting. Plasticy... you get what you pay for. The price is super cheap. Would look cute tho. I have found the right thing to wear it with.

Title: NOT FOR iPAD 2017 model
Review: This is NOT for the Ipad 2017 model as noted it is.  Not even near the right size.

Title: Good product
Review: Great jams! Soft.

Title: Not Easily Attached to Laptop
Review: Got this home, followed the instructions, as little as there was, and still can't make it work on my laptop. Will have to wait until my son comes for a visit to see if he can figure it out. Darn, he'll not be coming for a visit until April, 2021

Title: boldify thickening hair style
Review: I used to have really thick hair, but as I have aged, I have about 1/2 or less as I did.  So I purchased this to see if I could work up some body - it's 'O.K.'  but it does leave your hair feeling a bit stiff - and oddly - a little bit oily?  It's hard to describe.  It did give an appearance of a little thicker hair but I can't quite go to 5 star experience.  Will try it again and see if a little experience using it helps.  Having said this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Unhappy
Review: the watch is not working at all

Title: 1" flat iron
Review: I bought this on a lightening deal during "prime" shopping day... It works well... the clips are handy if you have medium to thick hair (and I do) to help you get to the bottom layer first... the clips are plastic. It's a 1" wide flattening surface... which I find is easier to use than the wider ones - personal preference here. It heats up in a reasonable amount of time. The base of the cord is a swivel so that helps keep the cord from getting all twisted.  I use a reusable rubber twistie to tame the cord when it's in my drawer - this helps keep the cord healthy and not broken. Wish it had come with a travel bag!  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Un-reliable!  Not worth buying
Review: This camera was a disappointment. Pictures are good during the day, However it does NOT capture everything RELIABLY! Seems to go on & off! I watched a neighbor walk past my house and the camera didnt even capture that! Only (reliably) seems to capture stark, stronger movements, like from vehicles.  Night vision was awful more than 15 feet out, and in all, I was not at all happy with it.

Title: Love love love
Review: I seriously love this workout set. I’ve bought in 5 colors and plan to buy more. Excellent purchase

Title: Attractive adjustable felt hat but buckle trim falls off easily
Review: This is an adjustable (see ribbon tie in first photo) felt hat that is made in China of 65% cotton and 35% polyester. It is comfortable to wear and is attractive but not as attractive as I had hoped on me.  What really annoys me about this hat is the buckle trim keeps falling off. I expected it to be secured in some way and it is not. Had I known this, I would not have purchased this.

Title: Refreshing mist on a hot day. Review: I'm not sure what this product is supposed to be. I will say what I like about it. I love that I can mist my face and arms while having a hot flash. I have found no difference in the appearance or feel of my skin. On a hot summer day, it is a cool refreshing mist.

Directions for Use: apply to skin in a fine mist. Wait for a few moments and gently pat dry. A daily care product to be used at anytime during they day or evening.

It doesn't say where to apply it...face? body? Is it a quick sponge bath, to refresh or a face product? Better instructions are a must.

Title: As Expected
Review: As expected

Title: Interesting design, sloppy assembly
Review: The USB and SD ports are upside down. Very unfortunate oversight on an otherwise interesting product.

Title: Best Atomizer Out There! Review: This is by far the best atomizer I have ever purchased! It is easy to fill, has a great design, fits perfectly even in the smallest purse and is quite pretty.

I highly recommend to anyone looking for a high quality and pretty atomizer.

Title: Logitech wireless mouse
Review: Every time I purchase a new laptop... I purchase a new wireless mouse.  I am older, not a fan of the laptop finger pads... This mouse works just as it should... the wireless nub is small and once plugged in, I really don't notice it. I will say that it seemed to "grab" the mouse pad I was using for a few days.. but it seems fine now... not sure what was up with that... never had that happen before.  I have an average size hand and it fits nicely and comfortably to me.  I always update my reviews with info that might be useful.

Title: Disproportionate. The top fits smaller than the bottom. ...
Review: Disproportionate.  The top fits smaller than the bottom.  I understand that the bottom is supposed to be a high waist, but it is baggy and the top is flimsy.  No support.  Just some thin foam.  Not meant to really wear in the water, just to sit by the edge of the pool.

Title: Doesn’t securely hold iPad
Review: The case is a very hard plastic.  My iPad would not stay firmly in the case therefore it was useless to me!  The one thing I would have appreciated is the deep grooves that would have allowed it to stand at angles without slipping and falling down!  That is a feature that is lacking in most iPad cases IMO!  I returned it

Title: The app is nice that way you don't dedicate a screen Review: The motion detection is very sensitive some times I believe it detects the wind moving the camera just a little. The night vision is good. Lately for some reason when I look at live cameras the image is very blurry. I have had these cameras for a bout two months now so I don't know if the memory is getting full and that is why it blurs the live videos or what. For the price I think they are ok but the blurry live video has me regretting this purchase.
These are wired cameras and that is why I got them but they come with a link to an application where you can hardwire the console to internet and can watch it anywhere where there is internet.
Also, you can buy more cameras and add up to 8 on the DVR.
Update February 2022.
Do not buy from Amazon, the manufacturer will not honor the one year warranty unless you purchase it from their website. After less than a year two of my four cameras don't record clearly.

Title: Too big for my iPad, but seems to be well made and has fun colors to choose from.
Review: Because of being the incorrect size, I have not used it.

Title: Does the job
Review: This is a great, reasonably priced FM Transmitter.I have been using it now for a few weeks with my Iphone 5S. Still a little confused off the need for this with all the radio applications (i.e. Radio Pup) that allows users to tune in to most stations. I guess if your station does not subscribe to a service, then the need for a transmitter will come into play. Sound is good (contrary to what other reviewers had said). and I had no trouble with quality of transmission.

Title: Smaller and lighter than expected.  Nice
Review: Exactly as described

Title: Great find
Review: Sensational.  Very well made, many compliments and it's comfortable to carry or hang around the shoulder.  The detail and care that went into this product was well worth purchasing and it's a product I will go back to for gift buying.  Truly excellent workmanship.  Thank you.

Title: I like it
Review: I have naturally med-dark blonde hair.  I first purchased this eyebrow marker in Arizona at an Ulta. Since I have all the stuff to dye my eyebrows, I was really happy to find something that was way easier. It will last for 18 hours or more, unless you are really sweaty (working out, etc) and then needs to reapplied.  However, it doesn't run, smudge or flake off during normal use. There are a lot of mixed reviews and I wonder it is a quality control thing... I still have the one I originally purchased at Ulta months ago... so when it quits, I will open this one purchased through Amazon.  I will update if there are any issues.  Honestly, I love the color... it's a bit dark, but I like that.  It's not too dark.  the other thing is application... you literally swipe it on... in hair motions... not a "drawing" motion or it will look like a painted on line.  The swiping action makes it look more like natural hair lines, even up close.  Like I said, if I have any issues with this one, I will update my review!

Title: For the price?
Review: I know these are super inexpensive so O was not expecting much. Exactly what I got. Hurt my ears, and they last about a week before they start cutting out. While they work they sound amazing and all the controls work so that's something

Title: Ok- volume needs to be louder
Review: This is better than a lot of other speakers on the market but you get what you pay for. This is a lower/mid range speaker and that’s what you get. Everything works well but it’s not loud enough. Even on the highest setting it’s hard to heart music or an audio book while you’re showering.

Title: As Advertised
Review: Not really sturdy / durable

Title: Good value
Review: Well made and comfortable

Title: Worse I've tried yet!
Review: To pay what I paid for this item aggravates me. Never have I had a clear coat to peel off in only one day. I will stick with the cheap stuff from now on.

Title: Great Deal On A Classic
Review: Prell is my go to shampoo for stripping my hair of buildup and impurities.  The shampoo does not leave my hair dry and is a great alternative to high priced clarifying shampoos.  I find this actually works better than the pricey clarifying shampoos.

Title: Arrived opened and dusty...
Review: This came in with the package opened and dusty. I am not very happy with this product in particular. The stone was full of dust and I decided to remove it with a toothbrush but have not gotten around to it because it seems like it's going to take some time and I used another callus remover I had at hand instead. Not sure if this was worth not taking the trip to the store to buy.

Title: 😔
Review: 😔

Title: Handy
Review: I like to buy big packages of batteries from the Membership stores like Sam's and Costco. The packages have 40 batteries In each package So if you're buying All the batteries You need a place to put them and this is perfect for storage. I also love that it has a battery tester right in the box as well. There are 2 sides that open on this box for storing batteries. No more rolling around in the junk Drawer.

Title: Too small.
Review: The material It was soft and thin, And would have been a good shirt if they weren't so small. I have 5 T-shirts now That don't fit my son. The colors are nice though.

Title: don't waste your money
Review: These are so stiff it actually hurts to try to put these on your feet. I ordered wide width, but these are not at all wide as stated...in fact I think they are narrow width.  So disappointed.

Title: Very bad sound quality to much static and no wear can be downloaded to ios iPhone users 😕
Review: Disappointed

Title: Good for a Kid
Review: This camera is not good for blogging or any serious use. However, it is good for a kid. The quality is lower than similar name brand cameras, but the function is essentially the same. I wouldn't recommend this camera for work or really adult use. But for a kid who might be crawling in the mud with the thing, I think it is a reasonable camera for them.

Title: Tiny earrings...pretty color!
Review: Pretty earrings but, very small.  I would love them if they were larger.  I plan to send them back,

Title: Good delivery
Review: Amazing Idem, lots light and very heavy, look cool with your music

Title: Coverage is highly transparent and lacks the cover-up of some liquid foundation
Review: I have fair skin and chose the "201 creamy natural" shade. The pump bottle easily dispenses the foundation and the coverage is highly transparent. If I had a flawless face without any blemishes, then this would be perfect because the finish would look even. However, since I do have blemishes, this does little to cover them. For me, this is just okay. Also, the current price of $17.99 for a one-ounce bottle of foundation is very pricey.

Title: Runs small
Review: The sweatshirt is great soft and comfortable. Ordered a medium for my daughter because she wanted it to be oversized for a Halloween costume but it fit more like a small.
