Title: One size does Not fit all. Too big, seams not straight. Not flatering. Review: Don't know what all the 5 stars are about!
Yes there warm, but one size does Not fit all

I'm 5'2, 135 lbs, ans these are Too Big.
At the Ankles there loose, which makes them move up under boots, inside seam is crooked.
Definitely does not make your body look smooth,(cause there too big) .
The waist band is so wide it could cover my boobs!

I'll only wear these in the house
The two star is because there warm, and cheap.

Title: Worthy Purchase!
Review: Arrived sooner than the original really long estimated date.  Packaged well.  Remote wall bracket included.  No ceiling or wall mounting hardware included for the screen.  Very quiet operation. Moves very slowly up/down, but no big problem as the projector is usually getting up to temperature.  High vinyl odor, but that's fading, since installed 4 days ago. Does hide-away nicely and seems unobtrusive.  Worthy purchase.

Title: One Star
Review: Poor quality item. Very disappointed

Title: Wanted to love these
Review: I so wanted to love these but for the price, I felt the quality was just not that great. Unfortunately I returned them but what I will say if the fit was spot on. I usually wear a size 10/12 bottom and ordered a large and they fit great. I am 5'2" and 155lbs and the large was spot on for fit. In the photo they are up the calf but on me they hit my ankle which is to be expected as I am shorter. Really wanted to love them but just didn't like the quality.

Title: Works great with my Samsung tv
Review: Works great for changing to the apps., but my tech challenge has kept me from syncing with my Vizio sound bar. I follow the directions but no go! I only gave it a one on volume control because I cannot sync to my sound bar. I did not try to sync it with the tv.

Title: Didnt care for this
Review: Didn't do anything for my hair.

Title: Is this used?
Review: I bought 2 of the Amazon fire boxes . I opened 1 and placed on my main TV. I realized when browsing through my photos (which I have taken none) that a few black photos on already and a video. Started watching a video and heard a young boy saying " can you see me" freaked me out and shut off without listening to rest of video. It says video produced in February 2016. This product is new

Title: Awesome water shoes
Review: Comfy and well worth the money! Perfect for river rafting! Runs little big and it’s fine!!!

Title: Don't size up, not necessary
Review: I am either a 38C or 40D, depending on my weight. Many of the reviews stated that this runs small so I ordered it in a 40 and its too big. I got it on the tightest hook and it fits there but is almost too loose. So I would suggest to order it in your normal size. So I am returning due to the sizing issue, if I lose anymore weight at all it will be completely useless, also it doesn't serve the purpose I bought it for anyway so I won't re-order in a smaller size.

Title: Great sunscreen for the money!
Review: Another lower cost product from Amazon with comparable qualities to name brand items (like Banana Boat). This sunscreen is a lower SPF (but still much better than using no sunscreen) and is perfect for using when I am playing tennis or running as it is resistant to water and sweat. Does not feel overly greasy (although all sunscreen seems to have some greasy feel to it in my opinion) and seems to last for hours without the need to reapply. In fairness, I tend to use a higher SPF when I am going to be out in the Florida sun for prolonged periods of time, but when it is cloudy or late/early in the day, this 30 SPF is just perfect. And at less than $5 a bottle, it's a steal!

Title: Too small, not comfy
Review: Wanted to try these for myself as some lounging around shorts. I ordered size large and they were too small and uncomfortable. I felt a seam in the back of the shorts which made it feel uncomfortable. Good thing my boyfriend likes them cause I gave them to him.

Title: micro chip adapter
Review: If you use SD chips in cameras, etc.. this adapter is useful to plug in chip and then the adapter into your USB port.

Title: The antenna is kind of flimsy!
Review: The antenna didn't 'catch' very many stations for my converter box. It broke easily when I was handling it. But the converter box works fine!

Title: are you kidding me - way to small
Review: i ordered a 44c - this might be a 34c - there is no way... not worth the $10, i will just donate the bra to a womens shelter - hopefully someone there can use it...

Title: ULTRA SMALL ordered one size up and they don't even fit.
Review: I ordered this like 2 days ago hoping they'd be a little loose or at the very least fit me enough to wear them underneath clothes or just to be at home but they didn't even fit me. I even went up one size to have them be a little loose and they weren't! I am normally an XL in shirts and they are always a little loose even with just the XL with these knowing they were probably tighter I decided to order one size up and they BARELY fit me. They are SUPER tight and my arms were crying because of how tight they fit around the shoulders and arms, they almost didn't fit my arms at all! I was surprised to see that they didn't make any mistake with the size and it was indeed an XXL which, like I mentioned, is already one size up from my regular XL size. Overall very dissapointed I'd assume these are for teenagers or little kids and not for an adult given that I'm not really an XXL person and I'm not that fat in general either. These definitely do not fit and are not true to size at all.

Title: Lightly moisturizing but super messy
Review: There are five individually wrapped masks in this package. The instructions are in broken English but still easy to understand. I applied this mask to my clean face -- there are holes for eyes, nose, and mouth. It was dripping wet as most masks of this type are and I always hate that. I let it stay on for about 20 minutes and then removed the mask and wiped off the excess. My face felt mildly moisturized. However, the claims that it brightens the skin and protects them from wrinkles is unfounded in my opinion. This is an okay mask but nothing super spectacular.

Title: Colorful and super soft headbands but bun looks silly on Review: These headbands are soft and attractive. They are so soft that I just wanted to feel them all day. I also love the mixed colors. Unfortunately, I consider this more for a young girl because the thick rose bun at the center looks silly on me. 

I have short to medium-length hair and these do not stay as well as I liked due to the bun on top. If I had longer hair and were younger, these headbands would be perfect. The material is also not wide enough to put over my ears like I do some headbands. 

The current price of $9.95 comes to a reasonable $2.49 per band.

Title: Poor quality
Review: Cracked and fell apart after 2 times. Poor quality.

Title: Great for the money, dissapointing if you want wireless high-resolution.
Review: Wireless does not work and I am upset they would advertise it as such.  Product is very stable, image quality about 640x480 grainy.  Audio works.  Good for the price, but if you want something with better resolution ... go with something higher-end.

Title: No file
Review: I thought it was a 3 piece set. I didnt get a file

Title: Great bag
Review: Great bag. Awesome price.  Fits my 14 inch laptop with room to spare. Has multiple pockets for other items.

Title: Not for wide hips
Review: I’m 5’6” 140 lbs and literally carry all my weight in my fat stomach and love handles. If that’s your body type, this is not your dress. It was really cute and the material was nice but not flattering on someone with wide hips. If you’re skinny, get the dress…it would be super cute on someone with a nice body

Title: Almost ivory in color and it does not spread easily over my face
Review: I actually expected this beige powder to be darker in nature than it is. It is closer to ivory in color. Nevertheless, I can use this but I'm not crazy about it because it does not blend well nor does it go on smoothly. It is actually very blotchy because I found it almost impossible to spread on my skin. I had to keep reapplying it. If it weren't for that negative, I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: Arrived crushed in a bag!
Review: Great style and quality, except it is totally crushed and cannot be worn as it was shipped in a bag, by the seller!

Title: Did not work for me
Review: This product did not work for me. It slides out of my hair. I would have returned it if I could. I guess it works best on thick hair, for I have fine long hair, but a lot of it.

Title: NO GOOD! DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY!
Review: Not good! Sound quality is awful!  Dont buy!

Title: Soaks in all the makeup
Review: I did not get the REAL BB! It soaks in sooooo much makeup it makes me upset.

Title: Nice, light conditioner. A little on the costly side per ounce.
Review: Rating this as a high just ok. I mean, it did work well on my thinner hair, left it smooth and manageable, as good as other conditioners I typically use. On the other hand, this is a relatively small bottle (10 ounces) at a high price. I usually by 32 ounce conditioners (typically Agave products) which per lower ounce cost, work much better. I also didn't care for the fragrance right out of the container (thought it was too strong smelling). After applying and rinsing it I found my hair smelt much nicer (and not as strong as immediately thought). I do like the impressive little container and the applicator plunger. Just think that for the cost per ounce you can do much better.

Title: Average Scarf
Review: Its not a bad scarf, just a little thin for my taste. Good deal for the money.

Title: SUNROLAN Women's Casual Leather Driving Slip On Penny Loafers Boat Shoes Flats Walking
Review: This is by far the worst thing I've bought on Amazon, would not suggest waisting your money they are about 2 sizes smaller then marked, They are made of a very very very cheap plastic material.They claim to be leather false advertising. If I would have known they were made in China I would have never bought these what's worse is the inner cushion inserts are poorly attached they are coming off before even wearing.

Title: Will never purchase again
Review: Tiny cotton balls more air and space. Awful. False advertising.

Title: A little strong/cheap like aroma
Review: It gives a cheap strong scent, you can use to cover scents of odors or just have a strong quick none lasting.

Title: Great top, runs small
Review: Fits great, but runs a bit small.

Title: Okay but lots of bubbles Review: Seems to protect my iPad that i've had for 3 months. I have no idea how it changes writing on the screen because I have not yet written on the screen without the protector. However, it is extremely prone to bubbling. I still have a GIANT air bubble on my iPad that I can't get rid of. When I first put it on for the first month there were so many air bubbles that people would ask me what was wrong with my iPad. As soon as I bought my iPad, i put the case on, cleaned the screen with the provided cloth, and followed the directions and used the suction tool in order to place the cover on my iPad. Even that didn't prevent the giant bubble.

i think it'll protect your iPad, but ONLY if you don't mind a myriad of bubbles

Title: For the price
Review: For the price, I expected clear speak at a low volume.  However that is not so with this speaker.  It has to be jacked up louder to understand tv.  Disappointng,

Title: smells clean
Review: I have a best friend who is a granny/nanny for her daughter's family who's husband is currently serving in our military.  They are a family of five and I just wanted to help with them with some shelf stable pantry and other items. These arrived quickly and in good condition.  I really appreciate that Amazon helps me to help them!

Title: Great Essie Summer Collection color! Perfect for every day, casual or dress up occasions
Review: I love Essie products and this beautiful color is no exception. Nice rich light red color, goes on smoothly and makes my nails look shiny like glass. I find that with Essie my nails chip less and the color lasts longer. This is a great shade for a pedicure, looks so cute with my sandals!

Title: Bought  wrong cable so might be worth it
Review: My fault  wrong cable on my endso never used it but it was long and seemed very sturdy great materials used to make it

Title: Jacket
Review: I was expecting the snaps on the jacket to be a tad brighter over al I like the jacket.

Title: girl cowboy hat
Review: Purchased this hat for a costume... it's ok.  The edges are shapeable - if you want.. and it looks (colors and bands) like the photo... but... it's HUGE - there is a chin strap and I may have to use it to keep in on my head.  It's also very rough to the touch.  Just not what I was hoping for.

Title: Attractive but not powerful
Review: I am not absolutely thrilled with this dryer. It is quiet, but not as strong/powerful as I would like it to be. Seems to take me longer to do a normal hair dry when compared to my previous dryer (Remington). On the plus side, it is attractive/modern and looks great on my vanity. It fits well in my hand (ergonomic) and as I mentioned runs quietly. I think this would be best for a person with shorter/thinner hair. But, with my thicker shoulder length hair, I am returning to my previous dryer and moving this into the guest bathroom.

Title: Amazingly for the money one of the nicest jewelry pieces I have bought on Amazon!
Review: I bought this on a gold box deal, almost an impulse buy. So glad I did! This is a phenomenally beautiful ring for the money. The green peridot center stone is gorgeous and the simplicity of the setting is fantastic. If you can get this ring around the price I did ($20) run to purchase. You won't be disappointed.

Title: Just ok
Review: Left my skin feeling not so clean. Doesn't remove makeup but I will say it is very gentle.

Title: Three Stars
Review: The material is thin.

Title: Washes well but should size up!
Review: Nice fabric but a bit smaller than I expected!

Title: Three Stars
Review: Screen worked fine but not enough adhesive tape included causing ghost taping.

Title: Horrible cheaply made mouse Review: What a horrible product
It doesn’t hold a charge whatsoever

Title: Not very impressed
Review: From my daughter: I am currently using Pantene Sleek and Smooth Shampoo and Conditioner and really like it. I had high hopes for this deep conditioner because my hair was looking a bit dried out. This conditioner felt great going on, because it is nice and thick, and when I washed it out, it felt like it was really going to hydrate my hair. But after my hair dried it didn't appear any more conditioned than with my regular Pantene conditioner. I also didn't care for the strong sandlewood/musky type scent.

Title: Super nothing
Review: The center part that goes between your toes came out after 2 months. The padding on the inside that goes over the bridge of your foot started unraveling after a month. Don't know where these are made but terrible quality..don't buy

Title: Save yourself the frustration
Review: This mouse has always guzzlers batteries barely lasting a month at anytime but I used it so infrequently It wasn’t worth it to buy a new one. But now mid project it just died no battery able to revive it its freaking ridiculous.

Title: Works well
Review: Works well.  Good for a backup

Title: too small
Review: The sizing was really off.  I would reccommend ordering at least one size or possibly two sizes up.  I probably won't order this style/brand again.

Title: Not for thick hair
Review: I’ve had this iron for 3 months now and it just won’t hold my hair! Very disappointed with the performance especially for the cost!

Title: Comfy slippers
Review: Very comfortable slippers. Soft arch support

Title: Better to wax or
Review: While it works , it's just a razor and you'll need to use at least daily. Better to wax or pluck

Title: I purchased the black keyboard cover for my 13" MacBook ...
Review: I purchased the black keyboard cover for my 13" MacBook Air. It fits perfectly however the color rubs off while I type and makes my finger nails black. After a few uses the color already looks faded. Regardless, it protects my keyboard and gets the job done.

Title: No difference in undereye circles Review: I have used this product for 2+ weeks and it has made no difference in the dark circles under my eyes. Very disappointing.
Would not recommend.

Title: fell apart Review: What a waste of money.

The rubber on the ears flaked off in little black pieces. I'm not giving JVC any more money. I still have a 400 pound JVC television.....but i think they're going out of business.

no surprise, they make flaky headphones.

Title: Nice scent, didn’t notice much softness.Although shoulders & back felt softer. Review: This Is a shower oil.
It pumped good on my shower mit, but I had to pump it at least 3 times a few times while showering.
I didn’t notice much suds, but my back skin felt smoother later.
I thought the cedar was a bit strong, but the orange had a nice scent.
Although the scent did not last long once out if the shower.

I have only used Happy Buddha a few times, and after I showered using it, I really did not notice a improvement of
The softness of my skin, but later I noticed my shoulders, and back felt softer..
I still used my body lotion after showering that I love.

Title: Love the unique look of this comb but works no better for me; awkward to hold Review: This comb gets 10 stars for  its unique look, color, and stand-upright design. It does work well on wet hair. It also combs fine on dry. I have short to medium fine curly hair and it works. However, I find holding this comb very awkward. It is not as comfortable as a regular comb. If I hold it with one finger around the curl in the comb, it works better. Also, at the current price of $14.44 ($16.99 minus 15%), this comb is overpriced.

In summary, I love the artisticness of this comb and it is functional art. I also love that it stands up on its own. What I do not like is that it is a bit awkward to use and anything over $10 for this is highly overpriced.

Title: Not Much Better Than Nothing
Review: This really does not function as expected.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Will not hold a 10" tablet stable,  maybe a 7" tablet or phone.

Title: Mediocre shampoo..allot of suds. Tube is good for traveling. Review: This L’oreal shampoo is Sulfate free, which I prefer .
This suds up pretty good with out having to use allot of shampoo.
I still had to use a conditioner after shampooing with this.

The tube is good for traveling, although I would still put this in a zip lock baggy.
I prefer a pump shampoo in my bathroom.

This is a mediocre shampoo. For the price this L’oreal is good value.
Had allot of ingredients I cannot pronounce!
This does not say if its tested on animals or not?

Title: Great sunscreen.
Review: Great sunscreen with minimal smell. If you spray slowly you'll see some white from the minerals but it rubs in easily. Much faster than lotion. Sprays at any angle. I put it on every morning.

Title: Leaves my skin soft but I’m not crazy about the dispensing method Review: This product is definitely not for me. There are two calming booster serums in this set. At the current price of $30, that makes this an excellent deal at $15 each. However, I'm not crazy about this. First of all, I do not care for the smell. Second, I do not like that I have to use a dropper to dispense this. It gets messy to squeeze the top and have the serum drip all over my hands.

The end result is that my face felt hydrated after using this but I still will not use this again since there are so many other products that I like better both in smell and function and which are less messy.

Title: Sags a bit
Review: Using on eufy s40. Its a bit heavy. Plastic clamp is a bit on the weak side and it will sag or droop a little over time. Wish it was metal.

Title: One of the best sunscreens on the market and it's Neutrogena!
Review: This is a great sunscreen product. I have two grandsons who are big squirmers and it's difficult to get them to stand still for 5 minutes (particularly when it comes to applying sunscreen). This Neutrogena sunscreen sprays on quickly and evenly and is a light mist. No sticky residue or milky appearance, it blends into your skin quickly. Lightly fragranced and with an SPF45, this is definitely my go-to sunscreen now in Florida (for myself and my grandsons when they come to visit. Highly recommend!

Title: Mic out
Review: Mic went out in about 2 months worth of use

Title: Really Cute But Arm Holes Are Way Too Big
Review: This shirt is really cute! The medium size fits my 16 year old daughter very well. She's 5'7" and weighs about 145 pounds. She wears a women's medium, but can usually fit into a small. She just prefers her tops to be loose fitting. The fabric is thin and light weight and very soft. The arm holes are really big and it shows a lot. It looks cute on her, but because of the arm holes, she doesn't feel comfortable wearing it unless with a sports bra for exercise type activities. The fabric however, is nicer than workout apparel.

Title: Nope
Review: I bought these slippers for my 2yo that loves baby Yoda. He has a baby Yoda stuffed animal, pajamas, blankets, etc., he even has other slippers. He wants nothing to do with these slippers, I don’t know if he’s scared of them or not but he won’t let anyone put them on his feet. I’ll have to regift or return

Title: Three Stars
Review: Don't like the fabric

Title: Great summer pant.
Review: Fit great and look great.  Line dry and a quick press is all that is necessary.  Loose fitting, but made to be that way.  Well constructed.

Title: Pump does not come off to get allot left on bottom.. Review: I do like this Vaseline lotion.
I use it for my body when I come out of the shower everyday, and keep a bottle in my kitchen.

The three stars are because nothing comes threw the pump when there still is allot of the lotion left at the bottom.
I have to smack it down on the counter so,the pump can get to it but still allot is left at the bottom, and the top does Not un-screw to get the rest of the lotion out.
A big waste.
I will not be buying this again.

Title: trash
Review: tubes all dried up  not even worth my trouble to return it

Title: Nice pair of brushes but I would have preferred more height on the foundation brush Review: There are two make-up brushes in this set. The smaller brush is for under eye concealer, so the bristles are tightly packed and short as it should be. However, the larger foundation brush also has dense SHORT bristles. I prefer more bristle height on my foundation brush so that I can get a better "sweep" during application.

Nevertheless, the bristles on these brushes are soft. There was no shedding but the brush heads almost smell like fresh cut wood to me. Their soft bristles feel good against my skin and work well but with a little more effort for the foundation brush.

The current price of $6.99 is competitively priced for this decent quality brush set. The only reason I rated this 3 stars is because I really dislike how short the bristle height of the foundation brush is.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Comfort

Title: JUNK
Review: After pushing start button for a long time it might start. It has many problems. It freezes and won't open again. I had to detach power supply and set over night to work. It loses internet connection frequently. It freezes all the time. I've had for three months and can't stand it.

Title: mink faux eyelashes
Review: Ok.  I am new to faux eyelashes.. or should I say, I try them once about every 5 - 10 years.  I purchased about 1/2 dozen different kinds and to be honest, these are my favorites.  I call them my Betty Boop cartoon lashes.  Lets be real, glue on eyelashes are a skill.  You have to practice and there are some tricks... I recommend watching a few youtube videos for hints.  I have old lady wrinkly eye lids which complicates things for sure - but I got it.  You do need to touch up with a little eye liner afterwards (I have tattooed eyeliner, but it's not very dark - so I still have to touch up eyeliner).  These are a tad cartoony, but honestly, with masks the latest necessary accessory, lipstick is out - it's all about your eyes!  Joking aside, wear a mask.  We all need to wear a mask.  And I do love these  lashes.  I probably will buy another set of these - I think I pull them off.

Title: Great, easy to apply, sport sunscreen spray
Review: Great reasonably priced sunscreen. I live in Florida and always keep a couple of these bottles around primarily for my grandbabies. To me, the spray on variety works well and is easy to apply (especially with the way they are fidgeting and jumping around all the time). The 30 SPF is a good overall protector (some times I will use 50+ on their faces). I am deducting a star just because I find that the spray doesn't seem to last as long as the regular tube applications. I think it might be simply because I can see the product better and I can spot easier places I might miss. But I will make up for it by applying it a few times when we are outside. Honestly, for the little ones who won't hold still for more than a few seconds at a time, this is the way to go when you want to protect them.

Title: Best on the market today! Fruit of the Loom briefs are a staple in my household.
Review: I have been buying Fruit of the Loom products for all members of my family for years. I can always trust the quality of their underwear and I know that everyone loves them. Having an almost all male family (I had all brothers as siblings and now I have three sons and four grandsons), boxer briefs are a staple under my Christmas tree every year and are always appreciated by all ages (well, maybe not the 4 year old, lol). I always rely on Fruit of the Loom to round out my holiday gift giving. I am buying 4 more packages of these to complete my shopping today.

Title: Better than the first? Not a Chance
Review: I was anxious to get the second generation Echo with suppose better sound. And all the hype. Well the sound from me to echo is worse it constantly asks me to repeat and at least once a day it drops the. Wi-Fi signal, because I have the old Alexa plugged in another room I go to it and it hasn't dropped the Wi-Fi so either I got lemon, or I should switch to the new Google Home.

Title: Uncomfortable
Review: This bra was very unflattering and uncomfortable.

Title: Kind of works
Review: I bought this more to use multiple ports for charging then a USB connection to a computer. Two ports can be used for charging. Issue I have is it will charge for a bit and then just stop. I will have to play with it, unplug it, plug it back in and sometimes it will work again and others it won’t. Cheap enough to not care but still a little annoying

Title: Highlights my face with a golden champagne shimmer; not really my taste
Review: I applied this bronzer over my makeup and it illuminated my face with a golden champagne shimmer. This does not dust on the face easily and coverage tended to be spotty. Additional applications only made the results look worse. This is really for a younger person and not a middle-aged woman.

Title: Keeps dying on me
Review: This is junk. If my TV is inactive for more than a few hours the adapter dies and I have to power cycle it to get it to work agin.

Title: Very Oily
Review: This product does reduce shine. The problem is that it made my skin fell very oily and my skin broke out like crazy

Title: Did not fit
Review: Claim to fit the onn 10-in tablet but did not line up correctly to fit

Title: Bogus pricing!!!
Review: I really like this  product,  but why is it MORE expensive the more you order?  Makes no sense that it is cheaper to get three orders than one order of three!

Title: Not great.
Review: It served it's purpose for a 10 day trip to Europe with students but the fabric began tearing at the velcro on the flap. I won't be able to use it again.  Also if you looking for something that won't be seen under your clothing, this isn't it.

Title: ok
Review: quiet - but airflow is low - I will replace with two 120mm fans soon

Title: Oster 0000 blade
Review: Works really well, of course, with the Oster clipper.  My husband likes a close, but not shaved head and this 0000 blade is perfect in his mind.  Stays sharp for a good long time.  We are careful and clean and maintain the blade and clipper.  Easy to replace on the clipper and easy to use.  We will continue to purchase.

Title: Would not stay in hair.
Review: Applied and let dry. Color came out with a brush. I am not very satisfied.

Title: Poorly Sized Shoes
Review: I ordered a size 2 times larger than my normal size because I've had size problems before. These would not fit! I liked them so much I sent them back so someone else could experience the thrill of SHOES THAT DON'T FIT!!!

Title: Very nice but not as sharp as I hoped Review: I had difficulty setting it up, still not perfect, and the picture quality for a new set is mediocre.
I recommend for those seeking a new set to do better.
Of course we are dealing with COMCAST and they are "suspect"

Title: fitbit 3 perforated wrist bands
Review: These are after market wrist bands for the fitbit 3.  I like the perforated ones because I literally wear my band every day, most days - it's off only to charge.  I feel the perforated bands allow your skin to breath a bit easier.  These bands are perforated, but the holes are very, very small.  I wish they were larger.  There are 10 bands, all different colors.  I mainly use my black band... but it's nice to have a wild color just for fun once in a while.  They feel like and look like a rubber or silicone/or like material.  It's important to clean them regularly - I use an alcohol swab pad and I put them in my UV cell phone soap cleaner once in a while.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Great for cost .. lacking on music and bass Review: While this little speaker packs a punch volume-wise .. it just lacks the bass that other more expensive speakers have.
I do like that it stays ON with my echo dot and aux cable.
But music sounds a little too tinny, distorts on higher volume and not enough bass.
Still for the price .. it's a decent speaker

In the end I went with a JBL FLIP 3 .. and I am a lot happier now :)

Title: Not a good item to order
Review: This was returned because it looked tarnished when I received it.

Title: Dries quickly but heavy!
Review: I bought this for a travel dried but it weighs a lot! It dries quickly and I saw it won all these awards so I gave it a try but it’s big and bulky. Returned it.

Title: Good value
Review: I dont' notice shine but love the scent and hope it works.

Title: Runs Small
Review: I am a size 18. My shoulders and upper arms are problematic with some clothes, so I usually go with a 2XL. This 2XL is a 20-22 according to the product description. A 20/22 would normally be perfect! That wasn't the case. I could barely get the dress over my head. My husband helped me and then when I had it on, it was so tight and uncomfortable! He joked about cutting it off of me! I was able to get it off okay, but my estimate is that it's at least one size if not two sizes too small. The dress itself looks cute. The floral pattern and color is nice. The fabric is light weight, but definitely one that wrinkles easily.

Title: This was a deal
Review: I wear crocs for all my outdoor yard duties and HATE paying full price for ugly, foam shoes. That being said, getting them for a deal on Prime Day made it tolerable.  They are great because they give a little cush to your step and they are waterproof.

Title: perfect
Review: very nice  good deal

Title: light included.
Review: I like the light and I use it to charge our phones.

Title: Not for dark hair
Review: This was purchased for my 4yo daughter for Easter. Her aunts decided to try them out too and unfortunately they weren’t visible on dark hair. Only the blondes could sport the colors. My daughter is dirty blonde so some colors show better than others

Title: Polaroid
Review: Expensive and only exposes in a circle in the middle. Not the whole thing

Title: Very pretty
Review: I am a bit confused because it says these are knuckle rings and to me They are very small. I love the different styles and designs you get. They all come in a black velvet pouch. You get the same in yellow gold a s in white gold. These fit a younger girl as a regular size ring.

Title: Four Stars
Review: Good warranty!

Title: On the small side...
Review: This are very cute flip flops but in my experience ran small, which is the primary reason for star reduction. My son wears an 11 now but was unable to wear these- footbed was too short and they were a bit narrow as well. Not sure if it was just this pair or this style in general. I have not had this issue with other stride rite footwear.

Title: Snug
Review: My daughter is starting a waitress job and needed a black button down shirt until they are able to give her an official shirt. The fit is a little snug on her which she didn't expect. The fabric is thick and heavy. She says it's not soft at all and she found it to be a little scratchy. It did require an initial ironing to remove all the fold creases. It's also very long. My daughter is pretty tall. Because she has to tuck it in, there's an awful lot of fabric bulk around her middle. So she says this will do until she gets her official shirt, but she probably won't be keeping it after that.

Title: Lie about shape
Review: Not the shape pictured AT ALL! Bait and switch here for the maple leaf, we all know what leaf is The picture and what I recieved is NOT IT!

Title: One of fav movies had to have
Review: The shirt is awesome shows Bowie with that amazing hair. Then a few of characters and Jennifer Connelly. I love the movie and this is a great Tshirt I love it once again. I think if you have seen this it's great for all ages.

Title: Works great
Review: Just what we needed

Title: Bad design
Review: The laptop case is so low quality and poorly made. The color looks ugly and I don’t like the overall design

Title: Force is right - Review: The scent overpowered everything for over 24 hours. A little too strong for our family, while the scent was manly and attractive (kind of like the soap irish spring) it was too pungent. Fyi the product is strictly a deodorant - no anti-antiperspirant - which was realized at the send of a work day, lol!

FYI - we are now using it as a air freshener in the bathroom and it is terrific.

Title: Measure your arm...bracelet seems large and needing adjustment
Review: Nice watch, just too big for person intended

Title: Three Stars
Review: Nice presentable boxes for giving away some trinkets that I had as gifts!

Title: Didn't work for me
Review: I am Stan's wife.  The fit of this bra is great and the quality seems right for the price.  However, the side/back panels seem to be made of a stiffer material.  I thought that would get better after washing it - it didn't and it makes me itch.  I can only wear it about 30 minutes and then I'm dying to get it off.  Also, I hook the bra in front and pull it around to pull the cups up over the girls...that stiffer material scratched my skin open.  Since I've already washed it, I will donate it and hope it works for someone.

Title: Sony A6500 e-mount adaptor for all Nikon lenses
Review: Bought this to use my older manual Nikkor lenses with newer Sony A6500. Construction and fit are excellent. Optics suffer slightly as they used to with extension tubes on SLR bodies. Some vignetting with Wide manual lenses.  Still trying to find the right mix of manual f-stops/iso/shutter speed and have better success when in 100% manual mode with the A6500. The quality of the e-mount sigma and sony lenses are so amazing... the Nikon manual lens pics are a little disappointing. I have yet to try with large heavy telephoto lenses but would never think about using this without a lens with its own tripod mount. For price... cannot beat this... want to try one of the autofocus mounts before I buy... this is a great piece to carry in your bag... you can always borrow your friends' Nikon lenses.. Will continue to evaluate over time

Title: 6ft VGA to RCA
Review: this was a perfectly good item, but I could not use it: I ordered the wrong cable. . .It came on time as promised. I gave it to a friend, and he is happy with it. . .

Title: Dried my hands in one day!
Review: I’ve been using the Dove coconut milk bars for my hand washing and it’s helped quite a bit. After years of using liquid soaps that made my hands crack and bleed, I switched to bar soaps which have less chemicals. I thought I’d try the classic Dove bars and the first thing I noticed was an overwhelming amount of fragrance. In one day of use my hands felt so dry and my skin felt very tight and sensitive. I reordered the Dove coconut bars and my hands are fine again. Wouldn’t recommend these bars for anyone with dry skin.

Title: Great soap, high priced but so worth it!
Review: This is an amazing bar of soap. First, it cleanses thoroughly and removes my make up easily. I tend to have sensitive akin and this soap is gentle and leaves my complexion looking youthful and radiant. I agree with one of the other reviewers, I am not sure I would ever have spent $30+ for a bar of soap, but now that I have used this for about a month now, and see the impact, I will be buying a second bar. As an FYI, after using this for a month, the bar of soap still looks as if most of it is still there, so a little goes a long way with this Erno Laszlo product. This is truly a case of ‘you get what you pay for’ with this soap. Highly recommend.

Title: NICE SMELL AND FEEL
Review: i only got this yesterday  hopefully it does what it should  .....but i will tell you it smells and feels WONDERFUL !

Title: Cords
Review: Good quality

Title: Three Stars
Review: Isn’t really shaped like a heart but love the color.

Title: Gets the Job Done
Review: This is a pretty basic mouse, but it does work though the quality of it seems just a tad flimsy. Overall though, have had it over 1/2 a year and have had no problems .

Title: Looks nothing like the picture
Review: I didn’t even completely unpackaged this…and immediately started my return to Amazon. This top looks nothing like the advertised picture, is cheaply made and is not attractive at all! Don’t waste your time and money on this!

Title: Hate the Smell
Review: Doesn’t work very well but the worst part is I can’t stand the smell.

Title: Shiny gloss, not my favorite color
Review: Didn't really like this (color or consistency). The pink was way too overwhelming, looked almost like super shiny pepto bismol on my mouth. I will say it does last (I tried removing some of it to bring the color down a notch but it was almost impossible to get it all off easily). Not for me. It is shiny and if this is a color you may be looking for maybe you should try it.

Title: Wait for a Gold Box special before ordering
Review: I am a little disappointed with the quality of this point and shoot. First, the pros are that it is light, attractive, small and easy to carry. Everything else, in my opinion, really revolves around what you get for the money. Quality of the pictures is just ok, I honestly think my Apple iphone takes better pictures (even in dimly lit areas). But for those people who want to take a lot of pictures on a trip and need memory card, then a camera would be a must have. Not crazy about the zoom capability, seems to definitely be less than advertised. As I mentioned, in low lighting camera stabilization seems low. Overall, if this was in a gold box deal for $99 I would jump on it for the name and durability of a Sony product. But not for $20-30 more than that. I think you can do better.

Title: love this
Review: i was concerned it wasnt gonna work with my TV and firestick cuz the tv is from 2012 and i only had one HDMI port ... i read reviews some said it worked - some said not ... so for the price i took a chance and it WORKED fine  and without issues ... finally something worked without issues  just plugged it in !! hahaha  and i still have a 3rd HDMI port if i need it in the future !

Title: Bows are huge; I would use them as package toppers or for back of hair 3 Stars
Review: These bows are huge.  The picture of the bow in a young girl's hair is deceiving.  These are 1/2 of a foot long and good for gathering hair in the back of the head but not on the side--unless one wants to look like a poodle.  I would use these as package toppers (to decorate gifts or gift baskets) instead.

Title: Logitech signature M650 wireless mouse
Review: I never like the finger/pad method, so I always use a wireless mouse.  This one works as you would expect.  Linked up really fast.  I have a previous logitech so I didn't have to add the new usb nib - it's inside the battery area in case you do need to use it.  It's a thicker mouse (meaning not flat as some), comfortable. It's a workable wireless mouse.

Title: Nice and big Graduation banner
Review: This is just like it is pictured. It is big and the colors are nice. I am going to put it on the Garage door. It will fit nicely. I would buy this again.

Title: Inspiron i17RV-9909BLK 17.3-Inch Ultrabook 1.8 GHz IntelCore i5-3337U, 6GB DDR3, 750GB HDD,Windows8,Discontinued By Manufacturer
Review: I loved it until it died yesterday. I got this in August 2016 - unboxed it in November. It died this weekend. It started clicking and knocking. gave me a blue screen message that "an error occurred and it would restart". Now it says "boot device not found". My last Dell lasted from 2008 to 2013. *sigh* I used it mostly for pictures, emails, facebook, twitter and videos - no gaming - I loved the wide screen and the weight.

Title: Good light exfoliating skin cleanser
Review: This is a great all natural facial cleanser with a touch of exfoliation. It is made in the USA and helps me keep my skin in optimal condition after a full day of wearing sunscreens and make up. I use it morning and evening and it has a surprisingly light scent that helps make me feel clean and refreshed. I highly recommend this to everyone to have as part of their daily skin care regimen.

Title: Hard to find, I always like these, they are easy on your tie.
Review: Hard to find, I always like these, they are easy on your tie.

Title: Tech support not helpful not good for limited internet connections
Review: Sharp clear images and somewhat ease of use but had to return it because it would not sync with phone at all - and I need it for when I am away.  Tech support was not helpful - can only contact them through email and then sent the long link 2x's to supposedly resolve the issue.  It also ate up all the bandwidth i have for internet in about 2 days - odd because it was not allowing me to push to smart phone telling me it was not connected..  Not good for someone with internet that has limited data such as satellite or jetpack hotspots.

Title: AWESOME PRODUCT
Review: LOVEE this stuff .. so much easier than lotion  i spray it daily  seller ships quickly too and its a great price for 3 cans !!

Title: Cheap but at a cost…
Review: Great size and cheap price but a lousy cut.  I needed a shaver for traveling.  Hate bringing chargers so this takes batteries.  The cut leaves skin irritation due to quality.  I’ll use it for now and upgrade later.  I would not recommend this product unless being used on animals.

Title: Great for getting those hard to reach areas
Review: I love this Body Groomer and my husband does, too. I can use this for my bikini lines and he uses it as well for his manly trims. No problems, no fear of cutting or knicking. This fits very well in my hand and is very easy to maneuver. I will never go back to using disposable razors again now that I found this Norelco. Kudos for a great product that I can use easily in or out of the shower!

Title: Easy to apply
Review: It doesnt glow in the dark and it's hard to feel where the power button is when using. It does help to grip remote. That's one good thing.

Title: He loved it!
Review: Bought this as a gift for my nephew for Xmas. He loved it!

Title: One Star
Review: I gave one star for the reason it refurbished and didn't work out of the box.

Title: Way to small
Review: Trying to return these. I have to pay for shipping. Not worth it. It’s a cute design but very  flimsy. Looks like I’ve washed it many times. Doesn’t stand up.

Title: Lathers wells & leaves my hair clean but I can’t stand the medicinal smell Review: This produces a good lather and leaves my hair and scalp feeling clean. Also, my curls were not relaxed after my hair dried. Nevertheless, the medicinal smell is too much for me that I will not be using this again. Therefore, I have no idea if this prevents hair loss. I feel it's a nice shampoo if it were not for the smell.

The current price of $28.99 for 14.11 ounces is a bit pricey.

Title: Nice piece
Review: I bought these as part of gifts I was putting together.  They are very pretty and nicely made.  I wish they were a little bigger as I wanted to fill them with a few other pieces.  I managed to squeeze in a round purse holder, lipstick holder, and a smaller little "purse" as a necklace/jewelry holder.

Title: All rounder!
Review: This has been a great headset for video conferencing all day. Comfort is great, mic quality is great and when I do play music it sounds great too.

Title: Using for old scars
Review: Per the reviews it’s good to rid sightly old scars. Will update as results happen.

Title: Fragrant steamers when dry but not so much when wet; lasted more than entire shower & left no stains Review: There are 12 shower steamers in three scents of orange, citrus, and grapefruit in this package. All are 40g (i.e. 1.411 ounces) tablets. All the steamers smell great and I love that they are all white because they do not leave stains.

I put this in an almost direct stream of water when it would not work in an indirect stream or on the side wall. Normally steamers are supposed to be out of the direct stream of water; however, I smelled nothing then. Although there was some scent once it started dissolving, it was barely detectable once I began my shower with my scented soap and shampoo. I took a shower for about 7 minutes and some steamer was left behind for the next shower.

The current price of $29.98 comes to an expensive $2.50 per steamer.

UPDATE: I found a way to get these to work better. I just put 3 to 5 steamers at the end of the shower out of the direct stream and the fragrance is more noticeable. I thought one would do it, but it doesn't.

Title: sturdy packaging
Review: I was hesitant to order a fragile item but it arrived in fine shape, very well-packed.  Especially like the mirrored bottom and the little chain to stabilize the lid when it's open.

Title: Great gift for college students
Review: At college there aren’t enough plugs so this is great. My daughter love this electrical outlet she takes it to friends houses and to the library. She talked me into buying one. I love it too.

Title: Three Stars
Review: I don't think it gets hot enough but I will charge it and try again

Title: Material is thick, are not comfortable for me!!! Review: The leggings are thick, and a tight, kind of a stretch material. The waist comes up high. Holds the tummy in.
These feel like I’m in a sausage! There not real comfortable as other leggings I have.
There a size medium, and I know a large would be too big.

I’m 5’3, 130 lbs, wear a size 8 to 10.
The legs do not come down to my ankles, and are a little big at the bottom..

Title: Mixed Feelings Review: I'm usually a fan of Netgear products. I'm always happy to get free loot from the brand. Unfortunately, I have very mixed feelings about this switch. I think the worst thing is that you are basically pushed into installing an app that requires a paid subscription. That should be made crystal clear in the messaging before you even waste your time and effort with the app. I don't understand why the subscription is necessary in the first place considering that this device isn't at the level that it requires one. My other gripe is the size of the power supply. I think it's too large in comparison to the size of the switch itself. I think the switch itself is fine, but the overall package needs improvement. This is a rare miss for the brand.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided helps make your decision a little easier.

Title: Does not support 3rd party apps or watchfaces. No SDK for the Sense 2.
Review: For whatever reason no software development kit has been released for the Sense 2 so developers have no tools to work with, no 3rd party apps or watchfaces.

Title: So far so good. It went on easy and sticks very well ...
Review: Purchased for my wife's computer... Big Disney fall. So far so good. It went on easy and sticks very well even as she drags her MBP to work and back.

Title: I love these earrings!
Review: I just wore these last weekend with a pair of jeans and I received countless compliments on them. These are nicely made and super, super light. Wore them for about 8 hours and actually forgot I had them on. Colorful and a perfect size to make them stand out when you wear them. Highly recommend!

Title: Very happy with this purchase.
Review: I am new to biking and very happy with this shirt.  Material is light and great for summer riding.  Price was great for the quality.

Title: stained my hands and my white shorts Review: SUPER easy on and off - Heavy weighted so not ideal for travel. It didn't fit my chrome notebook, but it did fit easily and snuggly to my Sony Vaio VPCEB33FM, my ASUS laptop, and my Dell Latitude laptop. The stamp out for the usb ports were a good effort, you punch out or cut out which ones you need. However my Vaio needs 3 punchouts in one section for usb ports, the cover had 2 in that section (there are punchout options on 3 sides (none in front where the SD card goes), because the punchouts are not a substantial design (flimsy, skimpy) I am able to squeeze in devices to all three.

I am not about to purposely test the shock absorption, it is certainly much better equipped with this cover in place were it to fall off my lap or desk unprotected.

The neat thing is the design of the bottom of the cover seems to aid in keeping the laptop cooler - so 2 stars for that!

Title: Buy Lots of Batteries
Review: This cheap product works. The only problem is it kills batteries faster than anything I have ever used. Needs a new battery after each use. Cheap product isn’t worth the cost of batteries.

Title: NOPE, DON'T WORK
Review: These were purchased to store memory cards for the services taped at church but the case holders just don't want to work. the cards fit just fine but the cases won't snap close & if they do whey will immediately pop open. Needless to say, they are useless & were a big waste of money.

Title: Perfect size and picture!
Review: My husband ordered these when he was on quarantine but still needed to work. They did the job and that's exactly what he needed. I played my games on them, The Sims 4, and the graphics were great!

Title: Does not feel flattering
Review: Would not order again

Title: Great brush
Review: Works well on all types of hair. Fits in purse.

Title: Practically useless at cleaning brushes based on my tests Review: There are two brush cleaners in this set. I tried this on my brush (see before and after pictures) and it barely cleaned it. Please understand that I passed it through the brush many times like I was scrubbing a floor. I tried sideways, up and down, lifting, etc. It got something out but not enough to make these cleaning tools useful.

This brush is probably best used as a scrubber on grout or something because it has stiff bristles but it does not work as designed.

Title: industrial wireless
Review: Husband needed these at a remote job site, thank you Amazon.  Arrived on time and worked as he'd hoped.

Title: Novelty all day, but cute and cushy! (At first...) Review: cute, novelty slippers.
Decent cushion at first but flattened out after regular wear.
Zero support, but you probably wouldn't buy these for support.

Title: Too thin
Review: The light blue pair is too thin to wear out in public because it’s see through. The grey is prob good for pajamas. They also fit a bit small.

Title: Three Stars
Review: DIFFICULT TO APPLY

Title: Criminally bad motion detection. Review: The motion detection is laughably bad. It detects cars driving 1000ft in the distance but not people walking up to within 3 ft of it. I have contacted support over and over and theirbonly suggestion is to mount it on a wall that doesn't exist. An absolute joke. If you want to put this anywhere with a road in view then don't bother, find another device.
And forget the "AI".

Title: CHAIN BROKE IN 2 PLACES after less than 48 hours of wear
Review: Put necklace on on Saturday.  Chain broke in two places on Monday. I really liked this necklace and still like how it looks. But links on the chain bro at two places, leaving the part with the clasp separated from the rest of the chain.  This should not happen with such an expensive necklace!  I have it stuck on a sterling silver chain that is too long for it so I'm going to have to get the original repaired or buy a new one.

Title: Ok for basic stuff, but low quality manufacturing Review: We have several high end sets of binoculars and mostly use them out in West Texas to watch wildlife or the stars. I also use them at horse shows, but I wanted a lighter weight pair. These are compact in size and weigh very little - carrying the case is easy.

However, these are pretty cheaply made. Within minutes of getting them out of the package, a piece fell off and that easy turn focus wheel is sticking. For unimportant viewing like just looking at a bird in a tree or a pack of wild hogs in the pasture, these are fine. But anything else....get higher quality binoculars.

Title: A Great Comb :)
Review: Perfect sturdy comb for detangling my and my daughters' very curly hair.  It is gentile on the scalp and hair, causing much less breakage and shedding than a plastic comb.  I'm planning to purchase more.  This will be the only comb I use from now on!

Title: The clips vary...
Review: These are very cute but they are quite small and the quality of the clips varies quite a bit.

Title: Versatile razor set, works great!
Review: Really nice men's razor set. Would make a great holiday gift. Can be used as a razor or as a trimmer. My husband tells me this is one of the nicest razors he has used. Close shave and maneuvers easily in his hands. Highly recommend!

Review: This had to of been a returned item at some point because it is missing some parts and the box it was in was damaged. I would send it back but I need it for a photo shoot that I am doing soon nor do I have the time or the patience to send it back and wait another week or two for a replacement.  I will just have to make do.  I basically paid good money for a sub-standard item.

Title: No ultra violet movie watching Review: I like it, overall. I don't like how they have your books set up all on one page and I can't delete a book that I hated. But it's an alright kindle. I was able to watch a movie on it today by streaming Netflix and it played it perfectly with no problems.

However, the reason for my 3 star review is that I am no longer able to watch my ultra violet movies through Flixster. Flixster and Amazon aren't working together anymore or something and that means I can't watch all the movies I bought and cashed in the code for the digital copy. Until they fix that, my review will stay at 3 stars instead 4 or 5.

Title: Doesn't fully curl
Review: When I received the product, I used it and it did curl my eyelashes but, not all the way. This eyelash curler have the silicone on it so it doesn't pinch your lashes but, it barely curls for me and it sometimes pinches my skin. When I was curling, the curler keeps slipping off, not sure if I was supposed to keep the bar while using the curler or take it off and use it.

Review: I purchased this for my 5 year old's Samsung Galaxy tablet... it fit perfectly.  He loves the handle and that he can fold it to a stand.  He was having trouble dropping it (No good for devices!) until he got the handle.  The case is a bit spongy too which gives it a little cushion.  All in all we think it's a win/win case!  I never hesitate to update my review should new info seem useful.

I am on a diet trying to lose 10 lbs so maybe in a month it will fit better but I wish I had received this in a bigger size. Too tight around the tummy and in the chest area (I am 38"). Anyway, outside of the sizing, it's a cute tunic. This tunic has a really nice length and is well made and fashionable. I really like the side ties, too. I just wish I could wear it.

Admittedly I usually go for Cuddlduds but as they can be a bit pricey I gave these a try. They looked and fitted great when I first got them and did the job of keeping me warm. However after one wear I noticed they were rubbing thin and by time I had washed them twice (on a hand wash) they had fallen apart at the seams. Bit dissapointed. Will be gooing back to Cuddlduds.

They have worked so far - but I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Review: Takes beautiful pictures and easy to use. Came with tons of fantastic products.

Title: Basic blow dryer; no user guide, no attachments shown, no swivel cord - MISSING PARTS Review: At the current price of $28.14 ($29.62 minus 5%), this is overpriced. The reason is that the two attachments shown are missing and there is no user guide. The cord also does not swivel. This is just a basic blow dryer with nothing else.

This dryer is very attractive with its metallic red color. In the box is just the blow dryer unit. The dryer works well.

Before first use, the red button on the plug has to be pushed in or it won't turn on. There are three controls on the front. The cool shot button is more like a cool shot toggle. The middle button the on/off, low, and high for the speed. The last button is the high, medium, and low for the heat.

The cord is NOT a swivel cord but I do not find I need that. There is a loop at the base of the cord for hanging. This dried my hair well.

In summary, this is a very nice basic blow dryer and I love simplicity but with missing parts, it gets 2 stars from me as the unit is incomplete.

Title: Protects my power supply from small screws
Review: Any small screw dropped in my computer case seemed to end up inside the bottom mounted power supply.  This filter will keep them out.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Very pretty but it just broke after a few months. Very sad :(

Title: Amazing!
Review: Amazing! Easy to use & easy to clean... Not as close as a razor blade, but still a very close shave & the different heads offer many easy styling options.

Title: Look nice

Title: Cleans, lathers, and moisturizes well but I feel like it leaves a slight film on my body
Review: This cleans and lathers copiously. It also feels hydrating. However, after I get out of the shower, I feel like I have a slight film on my body. Also, the current price of $14.99 for 5 ounces of soap is a lot, in my opinion. The fragrance is just okay to me.

Title: Great Rugged Watch
Review: This is the second of these that I have bought in the past 7 years.  It is a great watch to wear while working or working out.  Very rugged.  Definitely holds up to a lot of knocks and use.  Very reliable.

Title: Amazon firestick
Review: I purchased this for my husband that is road warrior so that he could more easily access our accounts.  He uses a separate hotspot for security, never logging into hotel wifi - he reports that it is so nice to easily access our various streaming accounts.  We've had several firesticks over the years.  This one is handy for sure.  Plugs in and sets up super easy.  If I can do it, ANY ONE can.  :)

Title: Decent mirror. A bit annoying to set up Review: This is my second fogless mirror, and the first one that required any setup beyond just sticking it to the wall.

When you get the mirror, you need to peel the cover off the mirror, then wet and apply an anti-fog peel to the mirror. A bit annoying, but at least it comes with 3 anti-fog covers, so when the first one wears out, you don't have to buy another mirror right away.

The first time I used the mirror, it began fogging after 10 or 15 minutes, which was annoying and disappointing. However, the fogging came right off after running some water over it.

However, the mirror has been better since then, staying fogless for the duration of my showers. Not sure if the first time was a fluke, or if I did something wrong, but it appears to be working well now.

I haven't had any problems using the suction cup to mount it. I hung it up about a week ago and it hasn't fallen (and I've taken 5 showers with it hanging).

Overall, not a terrible mirror. I appreciate that it's rectangular and not circular. Not a bad value given it comes with 3 anti-fog peels.

Title: Mediocrity at Best
Review: Broke in no time flat. Their customer service is very limited. Have to send it in against a big price for them to "recondition it". Do not recommend for durability or service. Will toss this one and buy V-1.

Title: After several wears, they are already starting to look old
Review: After several wears, they are already starting to look old. Its easy to see these slippers will not last very long.

Title: HAPPY THEN DISAPPOINTING Review: I have had this device for 8 months and the first four were great then the device would NOT track it was stuck. I called customer service and they tell me I have to do these steps to reactivate and clear out all data. Because after so many times of tracking it stops. This device only works good for about four months then you have to erase all the history of tracking and then turn on then off four times then lights on and off twice then walk around block they said to activate it again then it should start working again BUT IT ONLY FOR ONE DAY. This device has been getting stuck every other day and showing the wrong tracking locations.
I didn’t mind the service pay but why would any pay for something that doesn’t work consistently

Title: Works well
Review: This adapter works well, does what it's supposed to do. In some items it seems to fit a little loosely, but still works.  Most adapters I have fit loosely in some of my devices.  It is very small, which is fine if it fits well on your wire, then you can leave it there.  It would be nice if it had something attached to it with maybe a ring to hold it onto my wire.

Title: Dries polish in seconds!
Review: This stud really works! It’s expensive, but you just need one drop per finger. I can polish my hands just before bed and wait 2 minutes, put a drop of this on each finger and in one more minute I can go to bed and don’t wake up with sheet prints on my nails. It’s amazing. I think salons don’t carry this because of the price but it’s worth it!

Title: Very Comfy!
Review: It fit perfectly and is comfortable.  The straps don't dig in, they're perfectly soft.

Title: Does not help my thick colored hair with a little curl. Good for thiner,& kids hair. Review: My hair is colored med br., and has a blonde weave. I have thick hair that use to be straight. As I have gotten older, my hair has
A bit of a curl to it. I wash it ever day, and use a thick expensive conditioner.
That said I used this Carols Daughter conditioner a few times, and have not noticed it was better then the
Conditioner I have been using.
After using this , I had to use an other leave in conditioner, cause this one did not help my hair to be smooth while
Blow drying, and did not feel that great.

Title: Good for still picture/ video only.
Review: I've had this tripod for a few month. Its panning knob doesn't work whether i tighten it or loosen it(or completely take it out) resulting the head to rotate poorly, grinding with bottom of the head, causing vibration on your video when you rotate. Taking a panoramic picture or video to rotate view won't work with this tripod at all. I am not sure what this side knob is for and why it is there. Maybe it is suppose to be like this or mine is broken. I should have realized that you get what you pay for. If you are looking to do more than just a still picture/video, please look for a different tripod.

Title: Works well enough to keep most hair off the body during a haircut

If someone's neck is terribly skinny, this would leave a gap around the neck because they need one or two more snaps in that area. The back is short as expected. There is nothing fantastic about this cape but it does the job it is designed to do. In this sense, this is good enough. The current price of $8.49 is on the high side of what I would expect to pay for a cape like this.

Title: Great duffel bag with lots of room!

I have been using it almost daily to carry all my gym clothes, I even carry my pickleball paddles and balls for when I go to play. Title: 5 M US I love the look of these shoes and the size was ... Review: Nine West Women's Timewarp Leather Ballet Flat, Black, 7.5 M US
I love the look of these shoes and the size was correct, however, the heel was very narrow and the leather quite rigid so that it was uncomfortable. Even worse, the width across the ball of the foot (at the big toe joint) was as it should be, but pressed hard on the joints of the outside toes so that I couldn't wear them--possibly because the leather is so rigid. There was no arch support (some flats do provide enough to get by) and when I tried various orthotic inserts--like Spenco--the heel was so rigid and narrow that I couldn't get them in--so couldn't help the arch support problem. Even if I cut the toe part of the inserts to fit, putting anything more into the toe would increase the pressure problem.

Darn! the style is really cute, but back they go. I did find an alternative that works, although not exactly the same--the Tommy Hilfiger D'Orsay flats are much more comfortable.

Like everyone else has said, I also received a nightgown that isn’t sewn up in the front. The area in the bust that is twisted, it’s just left open. The fabric is ok, I’d wash this in a bag (or hand wash) and then hang dry because the straps are very fetching and the fastenings used for adjusting them are super cheap. The big issue here is that there are multiple reviews left about the downfalls of this nightgown, and they aren’t changing it. Typically companies use the feedback to better their products. They also emailed me, asking for feedback. I gave it. Their response was to return it to Amazon. Well that would be great and all but the return window has closed. Their reply was just “ok”. So here is the review you were asking for.

Title: Another great Amazon Solimo brand!

Usually, Solimo products are just as good as named brand varieties. This shampoo did not disappoint! After using this shampoo for almost a month now, several times a week, my hair is smooth and silky and is just as good as shampoos I have spent three times more for. I also love this coconut fragrance, too! Highly recommend this quality shampoo for all hair types, but particularly for those who want their hair shiny, frizz free and smelling great!

Title: Messy, But Fun

I thought a kit would be fun for her to do with her 9 year old cousin. First of all, they did have fun. It was a bit messy, but that didn't deter them. The finished products were okay, but a little disappointing for my niece because they didn't look as nice as the pictures or store bought bath bombs. The kit only allows you to make up to 4 bath bombs so in my opinion it's a lot of effort (and mess) to only result in 4 finished bath bombs. I would probably be okay with giving this as a gift, but I wish you could purchase refill kits to go along with it.

Title: For the price I expect more Review: For the price, I'd expect a little bit of magic... They're great headphones, comfortable on the head, and the noise cancelling is great, but having to hold the power button for 3 seconds to turn on doesn't feel like a $300 pair of headphones from 2019. I wish they 1. Turned on automatically when you put them on, and 2. turned off or paused automatically when you take them off.

The volume control/touch control isn't intuitive at all, either. I like to think I'm a pretty smart guy, and I couldnt figure it out without reading the instructions. A product that requires reading the manual for full operation is a badly designed product. Just look at apple. They don't make a product that a 5 year old couldn't pick up and use. As much as I disagree with them as a company, they've set the bar for product usability, and at this price point I expect nothing less.

A $350 pair of headphones in 2019 that has little more in the way of user comforts than a $50 pair is kind of sad.

Title: Colorful, comfortable, thin ankle (crew) socks that run large Review: This is a 5-pack of very colorfully designed socks. They are really comfortable for such thin socks. However, I do like the feel and the fact that the elastic does not "bite" into my legs but not that they move when wearing boots. Note that these are more like crew socks because they come up to my lower calf/ankle area.

These wash well but I hang dry them. Although there is no price listed, I would not pay more than $8 - $10 for these if they were sized appropriately.

I really love that this sunscreen goes on clear so that I can put on as much as I want without looking like I bathed myself in a milk bath. It soaked easily into my skin and my skin felt as if I put nothing on it after it dried. However, I absolutely hate the smell so much so that I probably would never buy this as a result.

This is rated for broad spectrum SPF 50 and is apparently water resistant for 80 minutes. Since I do not go in water, I cannot tell if this is true. I use sunscreen all the time due to having my convertible top down any time the temperatures are 55 and above.
