Title: great for the money Review: great for the money, but it's thin plastic wrapped around cardboard, and will fall apart pretty quickly. mine eventually bit the dust when water got inside and caused an AWFUL smell
for the price, though, i would throw away 10 of them before i would buy a brand name case. for $80 you get a case that will just fall in months rather than weeks.

Title: One Star
Review: Order 1 to 2 sizes up unless you like wearing a second skin.

Title: Good quality for he money.
Review: This costume had a decent quality to it and good stitching. It ran a little large and long for me but I was able to wear it anyways.

Title: Really nice to look at
Review: .but it is slippery to hold, which is a real shame.  I really like the look of this cover, beautiful vibrant red with faux croc pattern.  However, I just couldnt get a good grip with it, and that sucks when you are holding onto this cover. I used it for the kindle keyboard, which fits nicely.

Title: Socks are rough on the interior and they slouch and move around in shoe Review: These socks are for a size 6-12.5. I take a 7.5 in men's and 9 to 9.5 in women's, so since these do not fit my boyfriend, I ordered them for me. I also usually go for a wide width in shoes for comfort and expect my socks to be roomy but still elasticized enough for snugness.

I really like the colors of these two pairs; however, that is where my like ends.  Unfortunately, I do not feel the same way about these socks as other reviewers.  I walked in them and find that the interior is not soft at all. It feels very rough on my feet; almost as if I am wearing a linen or burlap sock. 

These socks are also very thin and they do not stay up on the calf and tend to move around. After having tried these, these are only socks I can wear to bed or around the house. 

I wash them on cold and hang dry them.

In summary, these two pairs are very disappointing in the feel, thickness, and fit and I doubt it is because I am a woman wearing these and not a man.

Title: Other than that it looked nice. Too bad we had to return it
Review: The light didn't work when we installed the batteries correctly.  Other than that it looked nice.  Too bad we had to return it.

Title: Stoppped working
Review: This camera stopped working just a few days after I use it. And the quality is terrible.

Title: Run small and tight. Review: Nice looking low socks for bike ridding, and sports. Seem made well.

I’m a women that has thin feet, and wears a size 6 1/2 N shoes.
That said these socks fit tight!.
My husband wears a size 10 wide shoes, and there was not any way he could get
These sock on!
I now wonder what size these are? I have never Not been able to get socks on.

I’ll Give my 6yr Grandson this pair of socks.

Also said there are 3 pairs, I only got one small pair!

Title: Does not fit my ASUS VivoBook S15
Review: This would be perfect if it fit properly.

Title: Good for kids.
Review: Goid for kids. I tried these for a quick Halloween day sloppy manicure at home. They are made of really hard plastic and you can't make them fit nail beds. Fell off in 20 mins. I used kiss glue which usually does the trick.

Title: Super cleansing & scentless but not hydrating at all Review: I really like this clear gel shampoo because it is not intensely hydrating. In fact, it feels just the opposite. It stripped my hair of all the oils and my hair felt incredibly clean. I had to use a conditioner afterward. I really like this shampoo and it did enhance my curls; I have short to medium fine curly hair. 

The current price of $15.95 is competitively priced. I only rated this 3 stars because it does not live up to its claims but it is a 4-star shampoo to me. If it had fragrance, then it would be a 5-star shampoo. Note that it is vegan and gluten free.

Title: Medium-weight vegan hand cream that is hydrating but way too EXPENSIVE
Review: This is a medium-weight vegan hand cream. It took a few minutes to absorb into my hands and left behind a "thick-feeling" hydration barrier on my hands. The scent is acceptable but not super enticing to me. At the current price of $25 for 2.54 fluid ounces, this is also way too EXPENSIVE. If this were $12.50, I would have rated this 5 stars because I like the results. At the price of $16-$18, I would have rated this 4 stars. However, due to the high price and only an okay scent to my senses, this is just okay and is the reason I rated this 3 stars. At this price and fragrance level, I would pass; however, the hydration results are very good.

Title: Good for the price
Review: Really like this bag. I like that it has compartments.

Title: nice unit
Review: It is a nic looking unit, not difficult to assemble.  It would have been nice to have some type of manual with it!  I am still trying to figure the use of the use of the 10 pin header.  still a good value for the money but they could waste about a dime for an instruction sheet.

Title: Two Stars
Review: They feel small

Title: Five Stars
Review: I wear these almost everyday.  Not too big or small or blingy.  Just right for the professional arena.

Title: Fragrance lackluster; moderate lather; moisturizing Review: There are four bars of soap in the sampler box of macadamia, blue almonds, activated charcoal, and coffee and cocoa. None of the soaps smell anything like their names. In fact, the fragrance is subpar and lackluster.

I tried the macadamia bar and it lathered moderately. I do feel this soap is moisturizing and that is the nicest feature.

These soaps are on the soft side and are not made to last too long. At the current price of $23.95 ($25.95 minus $2), this comes to almost $6 per bar, which is expensive but still competitively priced.

Title: Shrinkage
Review: Buy larger because they shrink a lot with first wash......not like the Hanes of younger days.

Title: Disappointed, Doesn't work like advertised.
Review: Disappointed.  Very slow to load and some of the apps will not even work unless I do a hard shut down and restart, every time I use it (this was Amazons advise) REALLY!  Only have had this a couple of months and nothing but trouble.  I have a Kindle 3rd gen. and it works great.

Title: Kind of cumbersome . I returned these
Review: These were larger than I expected and felt cumbersome . Returned

Title: Perfect cold weather glove!
Review: I was looking for a great pair of gloves for a trip I went on to ski in Utah last week. These were perfect. First, they are fairly thin and are not bulky on my hands. They fit perfectly (medium) and are really stylish (I got the pair in ivory). The best part is I was able to wear them all day out in the snowy/cold weather and my hands stayed nice, dry and warm. In addition, they also are very pliable so I can use them the grip a cup of hot chocolate easily. Highly recommend these if you are looking for a really nice looking pair of waterproof warm gloves.

Title: Drains out quicker than the original.
Review: I went to another product line since this Exxact part was not holding charge very long but the other one I got was worse. UGH.... nothing is exxact in replacement for Dell Vostro lap tops it seems now.... Geeso I was hoping but not all wishes do come true. Charged up this one first but drains out quicker than the original part.  WHY but some companies like the other one I hope also guarantee their parts to replace. Hope it arrives fast since the laptop is in the office used a lot away from desks. UGH.

Title: Not true to size
Review: Found these shoes to be atractive but were way too narrow in both the toe area and the heel.  I returned them.  It's too bad because I really wanted a nice looking pair of tie up brown shoes.

Title: Smells like nothing; goes on light
Review: I shook the can before use and then sprayed it on. First of all, I detected zero scent. There was no fresh scent at all, just a haze of light powder left on my body. I personally do not care for this at all. What I do love is the locking cap on the can. All I have to do is turn the cap to lock it and turn it the opposite way to unlock. As for the product, it's not for me.

Title: Disappointed
Review: Was not compatible with my Logitech peripherals - even though my ConnectPro KVM switch worked fine.  I guess I have to stick to USB 1.0 for now....

Title: Nice Top
Review: Very nice top.  It was soft and fit as expected.

Title: Small
Review: Nice colors but the hat is really small.

Title: Great aftershave with manly scent. Review: Works wonders on my sensitive skin. Use it in minor nicks and cuts and even acne spots to clear up my skin beautifully. Works wonders.
They have other scents as well and I like all of them, but the classic is my favorite.

Title: Ordered a size too big
Review: I’m 5’2’’, 130lb. I’m small framed. The dress was too big, I had to give it away

Title: Weird Smell
Review: So after a while of using this bar soap, on the first day, there was an after smell when I went back into the bathroom,  it doesn't smell fresh like how would dove smell like. I thought it was just cause It is brand new that's why it smells like that but, no. It still smells really bad that I had to clean the shower curtains for the smell to go away.

Title: Not the same color/patters as picture showed
Review: I got what I thought was the pink floral pattern. It came in the mail in a bright purple color and different patterned flowers. I still like it, but just very disappointed since it wasn’t what I expected.

Title: eyeglass chains
Review: Ok.. this is my first purchase of the eye glass leashes for myself... so there is apparently a learning curve.  the corded leashes are a little better but maybe not as "cool" as the beaded ones... But I have had one of the beaded leashes on for less than an hour and already I've had to replace the silicone loop on one side and there are wires sticking out of the beaded leash portion that are pokey.  Eh.  Now, on the plus side, they send a little bag of spare parts - good thing - but nevertheless, the beaded, more stylish leashes may just go in the trash and I'll use the the cords - no pokey wires.  The other thing... they could be about 6 inches longer...  but then, I'm learning.  Maybe there is a good reason they are so short.  All in all, I would skip the cool beaded leashes and stick to the more boring cords - in my opinion.  OR... this could also be a case of "you get what you pay for" thing.  Perhaps I should try some more expensive beaded leashes.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Very inaccurate
Review: Bought this for my husband's  birthday 3 months ago. We just now got it out (July) yo go to my daughter  who lives  in Minnesota and it's  very inaccurate. It tells you to turn several exits before you need to.

Title: Don’t buy this product
Review: DO NOT BUY THIS PRODUCT!! The first time I zipped the first pouch, the zipper broke. I tried another one, same thing,  zipper broke on the first try. HORRIBLE!!!

Title: Good for Retro fun. Review: The audio is OK, not high end. The mic is low end and to far to the back of the headset. But for $10 its good for cheap or retro fun.
The old style head band is nice,it has a low hair pulling effect and also very low profile. So it fits under a Bicycle helmet easy and doesn't give you the giant round hoodie head when put on your favorite sweat top hoodie.
Came with a micro usb charge cord. And your choice of blue or orange ear pads.
(Also I comes in a classic Retro package, the is extremely hard to open without cutting it open. Just so someone can enjoy being to frustrated to cut open the package, and just enjoy tearing it to shreads like everyone did back then.)

Title: Not pink. Its a light beige with a hint of pink. Not a pretty color. Review: Was excited to get this womens pink vizier hat.
The hat is ok, but the color was very disappointing.
It is not the pink that is shown, it is a light dull beige with a pink tinge.
Not was I was expecting.

The cap part is a thin nylon type of material, that I hope will keep the sun off my head, and the material lays flat.
I’ll wear the hat , but not often.

Title: Great product!
Review: Excellent way to store batteries!

Title: Not as good as they used to be
Review: So I've purchased 15 pairs of Oalka leggings since early 2018. They used to be amazing, the fabric was thick and had good compression. Not slippery or shiny. These were the style that didn't have pockets. I've seen purchased a few pairs with the pockets over the past year and they're totally different. The material is thinner and more slick, the crotch tends to shimmy down and they just don't feel nearly as good as they used to be. Oalka used to be my holy grail for both workout and everyday wear, but not so much anymore

Title: A miss for me.
Review: I like the Lee brand, but many of their products are hit or miss for me. These were a miss. They did not fit true to my size, and hugged in all the wrong places. They are also just too light for my taste (much harder to mask different "problem areas").

Title: I love the citrus fragrance of this oil but it does not brighten my skin or moisturize better
Review: This is an oil that goes on with a dropper. I applied three to four drops for my entire face and neck. It has a citrus aroma that I love and it absorbs well; however, the next morning my face was not any "brighter" or "lighter" than normal nor was it moisturized more than the other cheaper creams I use.

Title: slim case for the 2021 new kindle
Review: At least this case works.  I fits perfectly.  It's works OK.  Better than the one they offer when you buy it.  There are some colors.  If you want a cover that actually works, this one does.  If you are looking to hold your kindle in an upright position (tall, up and down) - it doesn't really work well.  If you usually use a cover to hold your kindle wide wise, it will work.

The concept is great in terms of size, but I wanted it for recording wav and mp3 files from my digital piano. Kinda dead in the water for me,

Title: Not a good investment
Review: I just received these ear buds and I am quite disappointed. I do not expect these to last very long at all. The sound is not the problem for me, it's just that it seems to be of poor quality materials. The cord itself is very, very thin so it's already apparent that the wiring is not very well protected. When I put the plug into my iPod if I even slightly twist the plug while it is in the jack I will get a lot of static. Not worth $20.

Review: This headphones works good enough. I bought this because the Jabra headphones seem to always cut out. I bought the Jabra because they can support 2 devices at one time. These however can not. Also, the loop for the ears don't always work well, but they do manage to stay on the head most of the time. This might be because of my big head, but the issue is no real adjustments can be made.

Title: No On/Off Button
Review: Have a larger [6-port] Quirky that has an on/off switch that turns the entire strip off.  Wish I had ordered another brand that had a surge protector & on/off button.  Will order a replacement & use this as a 'gang' plug-in.  Other units also have USB ports & longer cords.  Like the brand, not satisfied with this unit.

Title: Not a Creamy Mousse
Review: This is not a creamy mousse. It does foam a bit, but the foam dissipates almost immediately when you touch it. I've tried shaking it and shaking it and that doesn't change the consistency. I have found that it works best when I apply it directly to my roots, rather than to my hands first. Then I work it into my hair. It does seem to give my hair some lift to it. It does leave my hair a little crunchy where it has been applied. It doesn't irritate my scalp or burn my eyes. Overall, it's okay. However, at the price point, it's not something I would continue purchasing.

He has several other boat shoes in his wardrobe, but almost all cost twice at what these shoes are currently priced.  Really nice shoes, quality made, reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

Title: Nice Magnification!
Review: This mirror requires some assembly. It was easy to put together and took just a few minutes. The mirror has nice magnification and swivels well. The base is clear acrylic. It seems sturdy enough to support the weight of the mirror, but it doesn't look as nice as a solid stainless (or other metal material) base would look. I put this in my 18 year old's bathroom because she is not as concerned with the appearance (acrylic base) as I am.

Review: Tresemme is one of my favorite shampoos, great fragrance and moisturizer, bought at a very great price!

I've had to stop using them on a regular basis, or for very long.  I've switched to a more secure style of work shoe (see link) and am still growing out my deformed toenails over a 6 month period![[ASIN:B00PZ1ATXM Keen Utility Women's Flint Low PR Soft Toe]]

Title: Basic gloves, good for warmth
Review: These are nice basic gloves, nothing special. They are warm and well made and do work well in cold weather. They are not good, however, in snow or rain as they aren't waterproof. Also, I was unable to use my cell phone while wearing these, so I can't recommend the touchscreen capability. In addition, they come in just a plastic wrap so if you are thinking of gift giving, you will need to find a box.  Good basic gloves for the money

Title: Looks nice but runs small
Review: Runs way too small, looks as beautiful as in picture though.

Title: okay, but not as good as people suggest Review: well, I bought one base on the rave reviews of this product, it functions, but far less from perfect.

- what is right about every past reviews is, it doesn't have bubbles and easy install.

- and the reason for that - this screen protector is so thick and it is nothing like we usually expect.

- and the results of that is, it decrease the brightness of the screen "significantly" - the first time I applied, the screen go so dark and for a moment, I thought I got it wrong. The fix of course is to increase the brightness setting - my guesstimate is you need to double the brightness of whatever is comfortable to you before.

- and the result of that is, your battery life will decrease, as the screen is a major source of power consumer.

- another minor issue i had is, the alignment of front facing camera is difficult, as it is so small and it is very easy to cover the hole --- the home button is more forgiving as it is relatively large, but not the small front facing camera holes.

Review: This is definitely a printed sweatshirt so not great quality but super comfortable so something more that you would hang out at home or sleep in....not bad just not quality

Of course, Bose wrote the book on the noise cancelling tech.  Comes with a nice case.  Very happy.  So happy purchased a set for my husband so he'd quit taking mine.  :)

Title: One Star
Review: tiny

Title: Fragrance is subtle and each bar has unnatural floral notes but the soap itself is good Review: I love intensely fragranced perfumes and soaps just like I love vibrant colors. This package comes with four handmade bars of soap in lilac, petal dance, hydrangea, and lavender.

The aroma is very subtle to me and seems very unnatural. There is nothing naturally floral about these soaps. Nevertheless, they do lather well. Each bar is softer than regular store bought bars as is expected.

I periodically buy bar soap at craft fairs and they range in price from $4 to $6 each. At the current price of $15.99 this is in the competitive $4 range. However, I would not purchase these bars due to the lack of a good natural floral fragrance. Other than this, they work beautifully even if each bar will probably last about one week or less.

Title: Frumpy
Review: Wasn’t cute on like pix

Title: I was let down Review: I have used a similar product from a different company that was sort of expensive. I thought I would try this set. It seemed like a good deal, especially with all the different pieces.

The chest piece was fine and seemed to work. The forehead piece was so, so. It covered the forehead, but the part that goes down between the eyes didn’t cover that well and didn’t stay adhered. I wanted it to treat the vertical lines above my nose, between the eyes, but it didn’t work for that. The pieces for under the eyes didn’t stay on, thus didn’t work for those lines. The other pieces in the kit were odd shaped and not appropriate for any where. I wanted to treat the lines on my upper lip, but none of the pieces would work.

Title: One Star
Review: Size runs VERY SMALL!! Ordered large (have small hands) gloves are too tight to pull on.

Title: Perfect for me
Review: Lo e them. I'll order more

Title: Love the Color, Not Pleased with the Compact
Review: I purchased my Too Faced blush as a beauty splurge after going back to work. I absolutely love the color (Love Hangover) and the actual blush. I found the compact to be cute at first, but the shape of it is not particularly easy to hold and open. I am not usually a clumsy person. But the shape of this product does not fit naturally into your hands. After a couple of weeks, it slipped out of my hands. About half of the blush broke & fell out. I was thankful to have been able to save the rest of it. Then a few weeks later, it slipped out my hand again and this time, it's now just a bunch of crumbled, broken pieces. I think the product is good, but the design of the case needs to be reworked.

Title: The fragrance is giving me a headache
Review: Oh my gosh! If it wasn't for the smell, it would probably be ok. Can I return this?

Title: Shave bar has nice fragrance but lathers less than a bar of soap
Review: I never tried a shave bar before so I was excited to try this. Unfortunately, this reminds me of a low suds bar of soap. I could barely work up a lather with or without the badger brush. The skin on my upper lip and my chin did feel moisturized and super soft after I shaved with this but I still do not like this bar. First of all, the bar is square and does not fit as well in the bowl of a shaving brush set. Secondly, the "lather" is almost non-existent as shown in my photo. It is for these two reasons I'll pass on this no matter how soft it leaves my skin and no matter how wonderful the fragrance.

Title: Another great L'Oreal product!
Review: I love L'Oreal products and have been using them for years. This daily moisturizer is great. It is loaded with antioxidants and contains a lot of great anti-aging ingredients. I have been using this daily for over a month now and I love the way my skin looks and feels. If I had any complaints it would be that I would have liked a higher than 25 SPF for use down here in Florida (so I ave to supplement it with additional sunscreen when I leave the house. Outside of that, this is a really nice moisturizer which goes on lightly and is quickly absorbed. Highly recommend.

Title: Five Stars
Review: My all time favorite deodorant. A little more expensive, but well worth the cost to feel fresh all day.

Title: Dead
Review: This was a nice little flash drive when it was working, but it suddenly died recently and will not show up on any of my computers.  I have 2 Pc's, 2 laptops a Macbook, and I can't access the files on that drive from any of them.  It's only about a year old.

Title: Just ok
Review: The sound on these headphones is great but the headband adjuster slips out of the notches to easy it will not lock in place,cord is very long also

Title: Like moisturizing with petroleum jelly mixed with paraffin wax; best for winter only
Review: This looks like Vaseline and spreads like a thinner version of petroleum jelly mixed with paraffin wax. I put it on my face and neck after a shower and even after 30 minutes it still has not absorbed. It actually puts a protective barrier on the skin. After having tried this, I would only use it in winter when my face and neck is super dry. However, this is not a skin sauve I would order again. I personally prefer thick creams.

Title: Not hardly any color, greasy. Review: I wish the color it showed as, Honey Kiss, was the color of the Lip crayon.
The color was so light it looked like a light vaseiline with a little bit of a white color.
I’m fair, but the color did not show up, too white, and greasy,

The ingredients seem healthier then most other Lip crayons,

Title: Excellent
Review: Exactly as described.  More room then I expected.

Title: Three sizes to small
Review: I will never attempt to purchase foot wear on line ever again I have tried several times with zero success.

Title: Great brow gel that’s easy to use!
Review: I LOVE this! It’s so much better than a pencil. I even tried it on my mom who has Zero eyebrows from years of over plucking and it grabbed onto the few she had and looked so good. This is also great for people with fair skin as the colors aren’t as severe as other brands.

Title: Double Din Car Stereo Android 9.0 Quad Core 7 Inch HD Review: came as advertised; delivered before date-of-delivery; good value for money
radio standard, depending on your car, may need install kit for your car;
I needed kit for my 2013 Toyota . . .
suggest you measure area opening of dash where radio is to be mounted

Title: Meh
Review: Not that great.  I like the Green tea scrub better but they seem to have changed the formula on that so I thought I would give this a try and I didn't like this one either.  I'm searching for something that is similar to what the Green tea used to be like.

Title: Awkward Fitting Top
Review: This 2 piece swimsuit is cute, but has an awkward fitting top. The leopard print bottoms are fine and luckily I can wear a different black top with this so I can use it. The top has a twist in it. It makes for an interesting look, but it was very difficult to get on properly. Once it was on, it just looked weird. I'm a 40DD and my chest spilled out of the cups. I wear a size 16/18 and followed the size recommendation. I do think the sizing was accurate.

Title: Perfect!!!
Review: Absolutely perfect and beautiful

Title: USB C cords
Review: If you just purchased the latest gen of android cell phone (for me, the Samsung S10+) you will need a new type of charging cords... they do charge on the cord free units - but if you're away from those, you will need these cords.  There is also a micro usb to usb C adapter - will save you a few bucks - but eventually you'll want new cords. These work great so far - however, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Too small
Review: Order 2 sizes up

Title: Way too complicated
Review: Meh, to complicated

Title: Stopped working
Review: Bought this cable to connect VGA monitor to a Mac mini. It worked for a couple of months (with recurring interruptions) and then finally I couldn't get a signal at all. Replaced with with the old VGA to Apple HDMI adapter and connection returned on first try. That configuration had become iffy previously. Go figure.

Title: Not my Fudge Review: I was getting low on my usual shade saving shampoo when I read the reviews, so I thought I would give it a try.
I think Fudge does a much better job. Fudge actually removes the brassiness from my hair...no I'm not paid by, nor did I receive any discounts or free products from them.
I watched a couple YouTube how to clips and found out about it there. And I will go back to using it. You do need to wear gloves with the Fudge shampoo.

Title: Waist is to small. Review: I love the texture and feel of the product but they don't give enough material to the waistband. I will keep them but I won't
wear them for any length of time -the waist band should be larger both in width and material.

Title: Only worked for 2-3 months Review: Luckily I had nothing important on the card, just some saved tv shows for my tablet. It worked fine for a few months, then just suddenly stopped working. I'm glad I didn't spend that much on the SD card, but still, I didn't expect it to quickly fail like this. Next time, I suppose I'll pay a little more for a better brand. I thought Patriot was a trusted brand but I guess not.

If you want a cheap card that you don't save anything important on, perhaps this card is ok. But definitely do not save any pictures on it or anything else that you'd be sad to lose at a moment's notice. To the trash it goes, and I won't be buying this brand again.

Title: Presentable but low-end manicure set; clippers & scissor not great; nail cutters good Review: This set looks impressive and is extremely presentable. It certainly has a lot of tools, many of which I do not use. The tools in the top set are the ones I use the most. The large handle nail clippers are really low end and do not work well. I have to move the arm in place but the spring action to close it is disjointed. Also the scissor is "sticky." The regular angular and other nail clippers are sharp and work well. The file is decent as is the cuticle cutter in the lower tool compartment. 

The case is nice and there is room for a couple of  thin pieces of paper (like some cash, credit cards, etc.) behind the lower tools. The current price of $9.59 ($15.98 minus 40%) is reasonable for this. However, if one uses the large handled clippers, I would say pass because they are faulty. The scissor is also not great.  The blue case and black tools makes this an attractive set for a male.

Title: Good value.
Review: Liked the price. They work well. Good number of brushes in the set.

Title: great Concept but way too small
Review: It’s really small and doesn’t stay on my average size head. I “pineapple” my shoulder length hair and thought this would protect my curls from frizz. If it stayed in place for a night’s sleep I’d give it a couple more stars. Back to the drawing board.

Title: Conventional vs. Linear motor
Review: Here’s the low-down on Panasonic conventional vs linear motors.  I've owned at least 3 other Panasonic razors and loved them all.  They all had the high-RPM linear motor.  When it was time to replace the cutting blades on my ES8103 this razor was the same price so I figured I'd try it.  Bad choice.  The motor isn't as strong, you have to struggle to get an equal shave, and you have to recharge it before the batteries go down below 60 percent or else there's a noticeable reduction in power.  Stick with Panasonic but spend the extra for the one with the linear motor.

Title: Is so so
Review: Not to pleased. You have to pay for almost every thing you want to watch or have a subscription to a cable company , what is the ise of thos if you have to have cable

Title: Big and Tall mens terry robe
Review: This is a terry cloth robe, but I wasn't prepared for how cheap it was.  After washing, I spent about 1 hours trimming threads and snags.  I would not purchase this robe again.  Really poor quality.  I purchased as a gift and in the end decided not to gift it because it was just to cheap looking and feeling.

Title: Poor customer service
Review: Poor customer service.  Bought another McKlein from ebags.  Much better!  The actual bag is dreamy though I chose a more vertical bag for easier access.

I however didn't care for the fact that the waist was built to high above the belly,leaving a lot of extra material to gather at the crotch making me look a little sloppy.

Title: Does not work well
Review: Its was a nice looking keyboard and easy to store.  But when you use it the keys dint work that well.  They either dont work or they double the letter your pushing.  Would not recommend.  I am now having to order another one that is not flexible.

Title: Not what I had ordered!!
Review: I did not receive the correct color.  I wanted the navy blue with the red stripes.  I would like the correct color please.

Title: Design is nice but material is meh
Review: This shirt has a nice modern design and fits nice up top but a bit more loose toward the bottom/waist. The material feels like cheap cotton, a bit scratchy and not stretchy or breathable. It says it has a polyester mix but it just feels like 100% cotton to me, and not the soft kind of cotton.

Title: Love it!
Review: Very nice looking wallet. Lots of room for various cards.

Title: Pretty butterfly hair clip
Review: It’s as ordered

Title: Strips my hair; is not conditioning; lathers exceptionally well; earthy aroma - 2.5 stars Review: Shampoo bars seem to be all the rage lately. This is the third or fourth shampoo bar I tried. This lathers exceptionally well which is typical of shampoo bars. However, it strips my hair of everything and it does not condition at all. The aroma is earthy but not the type of fragrance I want in my hair.

The current price of $9.95 ($14.95 minus $5) for this bar is expensive but a lot cheaper than the typical $15 of most bars. I personally prefer liquid shampoo and conditioner; it's a better deal and better results. Now if one could shower with this as well as shampoo their hair, this might have a purpose when traveling. Since I am not crazy about shampoo bars, I repurpose this for the shower or for washing my hands.

Title: Highly hydrating to my face and neck but I do not care for the fragrance
Review: I love this night cream in every way except for the scent. I applied this to my face and neck (avoiding my eye area) and felt super hydrated after this soaked in. It is a lovely cream in that regard. Unfortunately, the scent is a turnoff to me and is the only reason I rated this 3 stars as the current $19.99 price is reasonable.

Title: Does not fit to size
Review: Not happy with product.

Title: Worth the money
Review: Purchased on an amazon/woot. I hesitated because I like to get the latest technology and the computer has been out almost two years. I pulled the trigger because it is such a powerful machine, I really could never afford the newest model. It is super sleek, the monitor is a monster, incredibly fast while running multiple windows. Literally like a brand new machine. Packaged in all the original packaging. Can’t recommend enough if looking for a sleek, powerful desktop with a large monitor.

Title: VERY SOFT; COMFORTABLE; CARE INSTRUCTIONS ARE TROUBLESOME
Review: These pajamas have a very nice feel; very comfortable.  You can't beat real silk.  If you want luxurious pajamas, these are for you.  This is the large size, which I thought would fit me, but the pants are too long.  I am 5'7", which I guess is short by today's standards (people are getting taller).  These will fit well for someone who is 5'10" to about 6'2" or so.  Also the shirt seemed a bit too roomy as well, so if you are a large person, it should fit perfectly.  Even though the pants are long, they could probably be easily shortened without compromising the integrity.  The only real problem is the care instructions.  You have to wash this in cold water.  Instruction also say "dry only".  I don't what that means, unless it means "dry clean only", but then it wouldn't say wash in cold water.  Maybe it means to air dry it, rather than in the dryer.  Hardly anyone washes by hand these days, so it depends on whether you want to deal with caring for a delicate fabric.

Title: Don't waste your money
Review: Worked great first use, this is second time using it, bluetooth no longer works, can't tune in radio stations. Probably keep, works with aux cord.

Title: Nice

Title: Three Stars

Title: Nice, but thin. Review: Nice 100% Cashmere Crew-Neck Sweater size M.
I’m 135 lbs, 5’2, and could lose 15 lbs (I’m a older women). This sweater does not run small, its a true medium.

It is not tight in the arms or under the arms. There is allot of give to this sweater..Seems to be stitched nice. The length of the
sleeve’s are a bit long on me, but if you notice on the model it is suppose to fit that way.
I like that the neck does not choke me. it comes below the neck.
It feels Thin, but is soft. I have worn softer Cashmere sweaters then this, but this is ok.
I do think this is a bit pricey for $138.00!!! I believe there will be a price drop on this sweater soon.

Sweater is made in China (what a surprise ha)
I like that it is a dark Black.

Title: Dont buy!
Review: POOR quality. Lose threads everywhere It has three zippers one slides in one direction the others go the other way and the edges are sown so close to zipper teeth their hard to open, close. The ring roll was just dangling with nothing to hold it in place so I had to sew on a button to attach to the bag.

Review: Disliked the reliability of the way the strap snapped together

Title: Expensive Ultra-Thin Camera Cover Slides for Mobile Devices Review: These ULTRA THIN LAPTOP CAMERA COVER SLIDES (for Laptop, PC, MacBook, iMac, Computer, iPad, Spot, Tablet) are very expensive (about $11 on Amazon for 3 slides) for what they are. They are made of very thin plastic, and the cover often pops off when I’m closing the slide. The cover snaps back on easily, but it’s still a small plastic piece that’s easy to lose.

The slide has good adhesive that holds well. The opening is large enough to fit around the camera opening on most mobile devices. Because it’s so thin, the slide doesn’t interfere with closing a laptop or with closing a tablet cover. I do like the “no camera” design on the slide covers.

Title: Now I'm getting dry skin from this . Review: I gave a good review on this awhile ago, but after using this since last summer, I now notice my skin is very dry on my legs, and now my arms, and itchy etc.
I always use a nice body lotion when I get out of the shower everyday .

I would not recommend this anymore.

Title: No Android Screen Mirroring
Review: The Fire HD 8 (gen 5) had screen mirroring.  This Fire HD 8 (gen 6) does not.  Screen mirroring is an android function that allows you cast exactly what is on the tablet screen and the audio to a TV wirelessly.  Removal of this feature was unexpected and was the main reason I bought this as I'd read that was in the Fire HD 8.  But not in this one.

Title: Absolutely gorgeous brush but best for peach fuzz or very short hair Review: This is a really beautiful hairbrush. In the package is a boar & nylon bristle brush but it is not typical of most brushes with that mixture. It almost feels like a very hard boar bristle brush because it does not detangle and it only passes lightly through my short-to-medium fine curly hair. This brush is best for those who have peach fuzz or a little more than peach fuzz for hair.

The handle is a bit wide and not as easy to hold as other brushes but still provides a good grip.

The current price of $10.99 is competitively priced for this. It is certainly beautiful but not as functional for my hair as I expected.

Title: Beware Review: It synced and played music perfectly, but phone reception was terrible. The other people could hear me fine, but the sound i received was intermittent, distorted, and had a brrrrrrr ringing echo to every sound, even the ringing when i made a call.
I could not make out what the other people were saying at all.

I looked in trouble shooting, and it says the unit can get "interference from a wireless LAN, other 2.4 GHz wireless device, or microwave oven." Shocking! Where someone can go these days where none of these other devices are operating? i went 30 feet outside my house and it was just as bad.

Or maybe the one i got is just a lemon. I don't know.

I called SONY and they said to try the reset, but i'd already done that, so they offered to let me send it to them so a techie could look at it. I'm returning it in stead.

Title: Insole made of cheap foam; slipper boot is pretty
Review: I expected the entire interior to be fur lined based on the title. However, the insole is just a cheap piece of foam. The tread on the sole is beefy and the design and look of the purple is pretty. They are true to size but not as comfortable as I expected. Had I tried these on in a store first, I would not have purchased them. However, the price I paid of $24.49 ($34.99 minus the 30% coupon) is reasonable for these. Had I paid more I would have lowered my ranking to two stars.

Title: A heavy, musky scent.
Review: This bottle was larger than I expected, which was nice. And just one spray lasts a long time, which definitely gives more value. This is not a subtle scent, and does not wear off quickly. Having said that, this perfume was just too heavy & strong for my liking. I could detect no hint of the lighter scents listed here, like marigold, pear, and lemon. Instead, it seemed heavy on the musky, earthy scents - nothing that would cross my mind as "refreshing." This is not ultimately a scent I will continue wearing.

Title: Ooey gooey lightly-colored lip moisturizer Review: I've been eyeing up this product for a couple of months. Even though I read the negative reviews on Amazon, my desire to try this led me to purchase one at a drug store instead of a 2-pack on Amazon just to see if I liked it.

Now that I tried this I can't wait to finish it. This substance is a sticky concoction of Vaseline and pale pink color that feels like an ooey gooey greasy mess on my lips. Straight Vaseline feels much better. Even though this does the job, the substance feels like I applied glue to my lips that is partially sticky only. I'm going to use this to lighten some dark lipsticks I have which will reduce the stickiness. I definitely won't be purchasing this again.

Title: Large Not for Nikkor 16-35mm if you want hood
Review: Advertised that Size Large will fit Nikkor af-s 16-35mm 1:4... it will just fit the lens but not the hood... way too small..even with hood reversed... too narrow.  Overall quality is good... can use with other lenses... no way to figure what the appropriate size is for this lens with hood. A wide angle lens like this almost always needs the hood if using outside... Inconvienieced and delay in being able to protect my lens.

My face started to break out from this about 2 weeks after starting to use it.
I'm a older women that has a bit of oily skin. ( that is a good thing though).
I have stopped using it.
I would recommend this for dry skin, or for a body wash.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
This review is on the "Aveeno Absolutely Ageless Cleanser".I was suppose to receive Intensive Renewal Serum!

The Cleanser is a thick yellowish in color, and the smell is Very clean and and nice.
A little goes along way.
I liked the way it cleaned my face, although I do not wear much make up.
My face feels smooth after using it, and has not broken out from this.
If it should break out, I will be back with another review.

The cleanser did not come in a box, if you wanted to give it as a gift, and leaked all over the soft package it came in!

Title: Nice scent but not the best, the scent last longer then other ones I have used Review: I think this would be nice to use before leaving the gym. You smell fresher.
I have not found a Mist that last long, but this does last a little longer, although still not very long!
The Scent is ok, kind of fresh., and there is not as many chemicals in this that I have with other other Mists I have.

Title: Waste of money
Review: Very unhappy with this keyboard, it would slip and slide all over my keyboard tray., and  I had to look carefully to locate some keys that had been moved around a bit.  The mouse, however, was awesome, so for that reason I'm keeping the product and will use only for emergencies. .

Title: Good price ok quality Review: I moved to a new home and wanted to get a new TV. I chose this one because I had the same model for my old house I got from Costco. This TV is easy to navigate, and easy to set up. The picture quality is good. It’s not the best quality I had. For a living has a size quite large, this 65 inch TV is a little small. So I do recommend you to be careful about choosing the right size.
There is deluxe delivery and unpack option for free and it’s amazing. For somebody lives by myself like me, have two person to unplaced it, set it up and test it is amazing! I do appreciate this option Amazon offers. It’s way better than last time I got a TV from Costco and I had to drive and set it up myself. Also, this deluxe delivery and unpack also enable you to check if the TV is in good condition, and if it comes broken you can return and get a refund right away. I did order a tv from amazon that’s broken when due to transportation so I wish I had that option when I ordered it online last time.

Title: Well-made back brush with long handle but too much bristle shedding Review: This brush has a large round head. The bristles are a little coarse and they do shed -- a lot. The handle is long, so it provides me with a good reach. This brush is sturdy and is perfect for soaping up my back. I love that this is one piece and that the head does not come off. The rope on top provides me with a good grip. In addition, there is a loop for hanging.

In summary, this is a good back brush with long reach and exfoliating bristles but due to the constant shed of the bristles, it is not one I would order again. The current price of $9.99 is competitively priced if the bristles did not shed so much.

Title: Seemed a little slow
Review: I inserted this into a USB 3.0 port and thought it would operate a lot faster than it did.  Speed could be impacted by a lot of things, so maybe shouldn't blame the device.  I did like the fact that it is retractable, so no cap over the end to lose when not inserted.  There is not a lot you can say about a flash drive, as they either work or they don't.  The 64G size is a little small these days and I usually try to only get 128G or higher.  On the other hand, you can't have too many flash drives, as they are very convenient.  I liked the size of this, as some of the newest flash drives are almost too small.  If you don't have tons of data, this is a great backup device.

Title: Esto bino casi vacío
Review: Esto biene vació

Title: Dry graphite with touch of blue
Review: Effective at darkening beard to graphite with hints of blue after several consecutive uses and then every other shower use. Makes a big staining mess on shower floor. Stains difficult to clean and some stains cannot be removed--not even from smooth surfaces with bleach soft scrub. Made beard frizzy and dry, with a little more breakage. There are better biweekly color and condition products from different companies.

Title: sony sd  128 gb  issues
Review: These cards are now being recalled/replaced...I am giving fewer stars not for the performance but for quality control. Very inconvienient...fortunately found before video read failures. SEE SONY SITE for description of issues

Title: ear bud replacement
Review: Husband has a hands free ear piece that lost its foam cover.. these were advertised as fitting and they did perfectly.  He also purchased separately a little case to keep his earpiece in to hopefully help the tips on longer.  We shall see!

Title: Bought as a gift
Review: My mom loved it

Title: Four Stars
Review: Liked this very much.  Goes on smooth and the color was just what I wanted.

Title: Hawaiian tropic silk hydration face suncreen
Review: I always purchase this brand and this product when I am going to be somewhere sunny and warm.  It works. It feels good.  I have sensitive skin and I don't ever have a reaction to it.  It's my go to.  Highly recommend it.

Title: Nice selection of clips; great hold but they feel like they will break Review: These clips are long and large and have teeth in the center. As a result they provide me with a great hold. In addition, they are beautiful and match almost any outfit. I have short to medium fine curly hair and these are best for those with longer hair. Nevertheless, they hold on tight at the back of my head where my hair is the longest.

Unfortunately, I am not convinced these will last as they feel like they will break when opening and closing them.

The current price of $13.99 for 6 clips is pricey for this as it comes to $2.33 per clip.

Title: Not for gamers. Review: I bought these fans because the fans in my case were getting old. I put the fans in and the were not moving very much air at all and one of the fans sounded like the bearings were going out. After a week I realized my computer was getting too hot and sure enough, the graphic card got too hot and shut off. I put in my old fans and realized they were actually better.

I bought some 120mm fans from a better company. I don't recommend Apevia at all.

Title: Slower than my old macbook air which is 7 years old Review: I bought this laptop to replace my older macbook air. I'm shocked at how slow it is. I never had the spinning on my other one that I have on this one. I don't get it. I'm tempted to return it for a different macbook. I got a macbook because I hated how slow windows is. this is still faster than windows, but it acts like windows when you need to update it. This macbook is up to date so I don't know why it's acting like a windows computer. VERY DISAPPOINTED!

Is there an update. I get more frustrated with this laptop than any windows I have ever had. My old macbook air, smoked this one. I never got booted off of wifi with my old one. I sure hope they have an update that fixes this issue. I told my friends to hold off on purchasing a new macbook air because no one has time for the spinning and getting booted off that happens constantly.

I do not recommend unless they have an update to fix the problem.

Title: See through, not for big boobs.
Review: Very see through. I got a size large and it was too small for my 36C size around the chest, buttons were gapped open.

Title: Meh? Not fantastic
Review: I feel like this just dyed everything BUT my hair.

Title: Very nice, but not very loud! Review: This is my first pair of this type of Bluetooth Headsets.
They fit comfortable around my neck, and seem like a good quality.
When playing music & the phone rings, it's very easy to switch over.

The reason for the 3 stars is, this is not very loud, for the phone, or music when outside walking,
Or jogging , which is disappointing!!

Title: 3 sizes 3 kids WIN!!
Review: Love these dresses! I bought 3 sizes and they all are perfect! I got them big so they could wear them for a while. My 6.5year old is wearing 9-10 (she is normally size 7-8), my 3.5year old is wearing size 6 (she is normally size 4) & my 1.5year old is wearing size 3 (she is normally size 2). I like them a bit big. That said I think my 6year old can fit in the size 6 dress, I just like a looser fit for them. :)

Title: nail scissors
Review: My mom prefers scissors to clippers and these are perfect in her words.  They are stiffer/tougher than cuticle scissors.. so they work for her.  Comes with a envelope/folder type holder too.  They are a silver metal - could be stainless.

Title: Helps find this remote
Review: I wondered why would I need a cover for this remote? Then I realized, I have 4 remotes out and my fire remote stands out so I know exactly which one to grab! Very easy to put on as well.

Title: scratchy/itchy
Review: If you have a fussy mother in a nursing home, do not, repeat. do not purchase this night gown for her you will live to regret it.  Scratchy, itchy, made her skin crawl fabric.  She like the color and the style, but the way it felt on the skin was awful.  She threw it away before I could even return it.

Title: Did anyone use this for a recessed TV mount?
Review: I believe the electrical boxes are made especially to fit in a recessed (in wall) TV mount fixture. That is perhaps why it is made narrower. In the comments I am not seeing anyone using it for this. I would love to hear if someone used it placed inside a recessed mount and how it worked.
