Title: Cute but some flaws
Review: These shoes are cute but have some flaws. They look really similar to adidas but do look a little cheap if you inspect them closely. They don’t feel super comfortable but the first day I got them I walked 3 miles in them and didn’t have any discomfort which was good. There is a seam running along the front of the shoe that isn’t on adidas and looks really cheap. And also in certain light the top part of the shoe looks a little yellow instead of white like the other white part around the sole of the shoe. I read they run big so I ordered a half size down and they fit perfectly.

Title: Elastic band doesn't stay flat
Review: I'm not a fan of these. The elastic band around the waist is low-quality and does not sit flat, it folds over and rolls up. The fabric is also kind of scratchy.

Title: It’s not stable enough to push the brushes into
Review: I do makeup and when I’m at a location and I want save time for having multiple clients having a brush holder would be great after cleaning my brushes, but the silicone proved time consuming for putting the brush into, it would catch on the handles of some of my brushes therefor making the appliance wobble and become unstable even tipped over once

Title: sucks
Review: Not sure why this got good reviews. Made my hair dry and left build-up making it a challenge to run my fingers through my hair. Returned after three days of use

Title: Zippers work smooth, looks like a teenager crossbody bag. Review: A cute bag for a teenager I think!!
All the zippers work well, there all smooth.

There is allot of zipper compartments in this bag, although the top is narrow, and is a pain to get a wallet etc. out of.

The strap is adjustable, and comfortable.
The material is water resistant.

I’m just not a fan of this cross body bag, it looks like a $10.99. Bag.
One of my girls like this bag.

Title: Eh
Review: Fabric is more silky and less cotton. Kind of like a garden flag but smoother. See through and light weight.

Title: It is not attractive on me but I will use ...
Review: It is not attractive on me but I will use it to just wear outside around the house. I wish the fur cuff was thicker and then it would be more attractive. It looks thicker in the picture.

Title: One of the nicest facial cleansers on the market!
Review: I was in the market for a good facial cleanser that wouldn't dry my skin and I knew that Melixir makes great products, so I thought I would try it.  This Herbaceous Gel Cleanser with Salicylic Acid and Green Tea Extract perfect for me. It contains all vegan ingredients and is not overly harsh on my skin. It lathers well and I love the light fragrance which leaves my skin clean and refreshed. I highly recommend this for any woman or man to use as part of their daily beauty regimen to keep their skin looking and feeling healthy!

Title: Cute Skirt But No Shorts
Review: The title of this skirt says "pleated plaid skirt with lining shorts". There are no shorts. That was pretty disappointing.  The built in shorts makes girls feel less conscientious when wearing short skirts! The fabric is a little stiff which makes me think it will retain the pleats well. The length is good and not too short. The instructions call for hand washing which is another strike against it. There is a generously sized pocket. I like the little piece that adjusts the waist if needed.It looks pretty much like the picture.

Title: 2 types available but only 1 works with Wink.
Review: PIRZWAVE2-ECO-2 works with WINK Hub 2.  PIRZWAVE2.5-ECO-2 (latest model) does NOT.  The item listed for sale was described as the PIRZWAVE2-ECO-2, but the item received was the PIRZWAVE2.5-ECO-2.  Needless to say, this did not work with my existing set up.  I had to return them.

Title: Ok
Review: A bit too small for comfort

Title: Great serum to be using daily!
Review: I love this Cerave Hyaluronic Acid product. I use it daily after showering on my 60 something skin and also at night before I go to sleep.  Not only does it have the hyaluronic acid my face needs, but it also contains vitamin B5 and helps to keep my skin hydrated. Reasonably priced (when compared to other expensive brands) this Cerave delivers on all counts. I definitely see a difference in using it for a few weeks now, my skin is plumper and looks far more youthful. I highly recommend!

Title: Don’t waste your money
Review: Cuts in and out even with the phone 3”away

Title: Good choice
Review: Good quality but large

Title: Love this.  heavy duty
Review: This is heavy duty and can handle charging my battery powered machines.  Easy to use.  I'm going to mount it on the wall.  would buy again.

Title: Are these diamonds no the rhinestones
Review: Shines like a diamond

Title: It feels cheap and it's super easy to knock off the desk
Review: Does the job but seems *too* light. It feels cheap and it's super easy to knock off the desk. Not sure it will hold up for many crashes to the floor

Title: Great shower gel.  I was skeptical at first, but now I love it!
Review: Normally, I don't prefer too much of a scent on my man. Usually, a little cologne if we go out is all he needs. When I first saw this Biagiotti Gel I hesitated. But, being how I am headed back to Italy (Rome) in May, I was lured into getting this. And, how pleasantly surprised I was. My man loves the gel, foams up nice in the shower and he feels fresh and clean after using it. And, I, who wasn't sure why I was even taking this, was pleasantly surprised how good he smells just getting out of the shower. Not perfumey at all, and very masculine. I really love this Roma Uomo scent and I would recommend it for every day use for the man in your life.

Title: This should be a beauty staple for every woman!
Review: If you are in the market for an eyelash curler, this is the one. First, it works great curling my usually straight eyelashes. Second, it fits well in my hand, is easy to maneuver and my lashes do not stick to it. Last, it's super cute in color and looks great in my bathroom. Highly recommend.

Title: You get what you pay for I guess.
Review: I'm giving it three stars because, although the case and keyboard cover are good (I really like those), the sleeve has already started ripping. I haven't even had this for a week. It's kind of disappointing actually. I love the colors of the case and keyboard cover though! But for the sake of the sleeve, which I thought was essential, I have to give it a sleeve.

Title: Pretty
Review: Colorful

Title: Are these for children?!?
Review: These are so short and tiny I don’t even think a 10 year old would fit.

Title: Well made and multi-functional!
Review: This is an amazing two in one iron. I have naturally wavy hair and it never seems to do anything on it's own. I regularly use an iron to straighten it, but I had not tried curling it until I received this device. I absolutely was thrilled with the results (although I certainly need additional practice). I like that I can go from straight hair to curled hair with a simple device. This is well made, heats up quickly and fits well in my hand making styling a breeze. I highly recommend this to everyone looking for a diversified iron.

Title: Do not stay on table well
Review: These are designed to only work on thin table tops.  And they are not sturdy enough to hold anything but a light weight.  Disappointed.

Title: Didn’t work
Review: I didn’t notice any difference using this product. Also doesn’t have the greatest scent.

Title: Color is much lighter than pictured
Review: The color shown in the picture is much lighter than the actual product. I am a fair Caucasian, and when I put this on my fingernails, it almost matches my skin. It’s not as dark as shown in the picture. Someone with more pigment might like it, but just know it’s lighter than shown.

Title: Love
Review: I love this eyeshadow. It's the only kind I ever want to use again!

Title: Wear it all the time!
Review: Love it! I wear it all of the time! It’s a good amount of material and so stylish.

Title: GOOD VALUE
Review: Not what I expected.

Title: Small oval brush that is good for highlighting cheeks or blending; love the cover; too $$$ Review: This is a tiny oval brush that comes with a cover. The handle is just slightly flexible but is definitely not bendable as is shown on the Amazon site--unless, of course, one wants to break their brush.

The bristles are soft and feel good against my face. Initially, there were just a few bristles that fell out but that seems to have stabilized. I use brushes like these to highlight my cheeks and to blend a darker cheek powder into the overall blush being used as the main color.

The current price of $6.99 is too pricey for this in my opinion. I feel this brush should not be more than $3.99 based on the quality and function.

Title: Stylish watch but the band clasp is lousy Review: I ordered this for my boyfriend. The watch itself is very attractive and comes in a nice gift box. I like that the clock face is simple even though it does not have numbers on the face.

What my boyfriend and I do not like is the clasp. The band is self-adjustable by pulling it in another direction. There are no instructions but I finally figured out how to make the adjustments. Nevertheless, the clasp itself is awkward to work and then it sometimes does not stay closed. It opens from left to right on one side and then right to left on the other--meaning it opens like a double door. The inside "door" hooks onto to the band, but the outside door just flaps around. When moving around it is easy for the clasp to come undone.

Overall, my boyfriend and I are very disappointed in this design.

Title: It is easy to tangle one’s hair in this brush; otherwise this is a good brush Review: This large blow-drying brush has very long bristles. As a result it is easy to get my hair tangled in this. I have to be careful with this and I do not have long hair. Nevertheless, this works.

I love the ergonomically designed cork handle as it feels great in my hands and does not slip. The barrel of the brush is medium for medium to long hair.

The bristles are hard as is typical of all brushes. At the current price of $24, this is on the high side of competitively priced.

Title: After using 3 towelettes, my face still was not clean & it irritated my eyes Review: I tried these on a full face of makeup that included:

- foundation
- blush
- eyeliner above the lid
- eye shadow
- translucent setting powder
- lip liner
- lipstick
- washable (NOT waterproof) mascara.

After using three towelettes, a lot of makeup was left behind on my face. It was particularly difficult to clean around my eyes and the solution on the towelette started to make my eyes burn even though they were closed when using them. The package says it removes makeup including waterproof mascara in seconds. I did not find either of those statements to be true.

Eventually I gave up and washed my face with soap and water. I then used a fourth towelette to see if any makeup was left behind, and except for one smudge near my eye that came off, the towelette remained white.

I would definitely not buy these for me because too many towelettes are needed and I found them irritating.

Title: The brush heads stink like paint; it would be a nice set otherwise Review: There are 15 brushes in this set that are perfect for the eyes, lips, blush, and foundation. The bristles are super soft and feel great against my skin. The bristles also stay put in the brush. There are actually more brushes than one needs in this set, in my opinion. Nevertheless, I can't stand the smell of the bristles. They smell like a solvent or paint.

The current price of $15.99 comes to a reasonable $1.07 per brush.

Title: Lighter
Review: Product is MUCH lighter than shown and/or described.

Title: Great moisturizer for the non-metrosexual in your life!!
Review: My son has been using this now for several weeks and has nothing but positive wonderful things to say about it. Considering he has never been one to feel it is 'manly' to use cosmetics and creams, it is an amazing testimonial to this L'oreal product (he is far from a metrosexual male). He maintains a light scruffy beard and has for several years now. His testimony to me is it is light and applies easily and keeps his skin and beard soft and smooth to the touch. WIth a light basically unobtrusive fragrance-free cream, he uses this in the morning after he showers and at night before he goes to bed (to add moisture to his face while he sleeps). Nothing but great things to say about it, in fact he asked me if I can order him more since he is running low, and I will. Kudos to L'Oreal for making products that men will use as part of their daily routine.

Title: Two Stars
Review: This is horrible. What a waste of my money

Title: love it
Review: love this its perfect just wondering where im gonna get replacement filters from

Title: I like their foot balm better; this is too sticky and thin Review: There are two 3.38 fluid ounce tubes of foot cream in this package. The cream is thin and slightly runny. I used this on my feet after a shower and although it is hydrating, it left my hands and feet feeling sticky. I immediately washed my hands, whereas with their balm, I kept it on my hands.

I personally do not have very callused feet but they are dry and this was somewhat moisturizing and has the cooling effect of menthol. I really wish I liked this as much as their foot balm (Amazon item #B08RSGFXR6)

The current price of $17.95 comes to $8.98 per tube.

Title: Senior 2021 Necklace gift
Review: This necklace is beautiful. It is about the size of my thumb nail. The necklace is shinny, the little 0 has a stone in it that sparkles. You will not be sorry you bought this. It is really pretty. Comes with a little card, and a cleaning cloth.

Title: Works for my needs but not professional quality; just good enough Review: This set includes a faux leather case with room for two scissors (one is included) and a full height folder pocket. In addition a rainbow comb is in the package.

I think the case is nice enough but it will barely close if I put the comb inside. I doubt a second pair of scissors would fit in the extra pocket. The included one pair of scissors are loose. I tightened the knob and it is a little better. It cuts well. I tried it on my boyfriend's hair. The finger holes are small on the scissor but that is to be expected.

The comb is pretty but is super cheap. I am unfamiliar with the "professional hair styling open knot" that looks like a broken tine in the comb (see photo). However, after searching the web, I discovered that the indented tine is used by the hairstylist to make sectioning the hair easier.

In summary, this set works but is of marginal quality. It is definitely not a set that I would "gift" to a professional hairstylist, especially with an empty pocket in the case that makes this feel like an incomplete set.

Title: Not a good design for hurricanes
Review: As many reviewers have written, the operating buttons are under the handle.  They are very small and are marked with very small print.  I had to hold the unit under a lamp and tip the unit to read the print.  Having spent most of the night in pitchblack darkness when H Ike made landfall here in Houston, I don't think that this radio is really a great fit as a hurricane radio.  It may be better suited to other kinds of weather events.

Title: Love this Lock N Shine gloss!
Review: I love wet n wild lip glosses, have been using them for years. I like that I can make my lips as glossy as I want with the dual applicator. The color pink I received was a little too dark for me so I used it sparingly with a lot of gloss and it worked great. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a great, reasonably priced, lip gloss. Lasts for hours, makes my lips feel soft and smooth.

Title: Awesome having 6 plugs on one outlet. Review: I have upwards of 30 Kasa switches, bulbs and other accessories in my house. They all work AMAZING. I love the app and all the options they keep adding. The smart features and customizability just works flawless.
They almost never lose connection and quickly respond to google assistant commands.
This is really nice because I can make routines through google home to turn everything off but still have specific items on or off at my desk. I have my work and personal pc, fans, lighting, headset, etc all on different switches. I actually have 2 additional single switches in the same area and they all work great together.
Super easy to wall mount and stays put very well.

My only gripe is that the main power LEDs on the switch are a bit bright and they don't turn off at all. There is the main switch and 2 others. I hope they allow to turn them of or adjust the brightness in the future. But it's not a huge deal as it is under my desk. I just push my chair in front of it at night and it's not a bother.

Title: Great Value! Cute Style & fast shipping!
Review: Great value....the polarized add on is great! Super cute style on! Bought for myself & my bestie! Would recommend!

Title: Pins have air space in-between; these are roller pins & not actual bobby pins Review: There are supposedly 100 pins in this package; I did not count them. I did not realize these had an airspace in-between the pins. These are the type of bobby pins used with rollers (a.k.a. curlers) and not the type for an updo. I tried this around a lot of hair and they would not hold because my hair is too fine. I cannot use these but because I did not pay attention to the photo, that is my fault. They hold the hair very loosely or cause the style to fall out when using loose pins like these. I think they are perfect for rollers, however, because they will go over the roller easily.

The current price of $3.83 comes to $.04 cents per pin.

Title: Thin, Very Wet Body Cream With Neutral “Cold Cream” Fragrance Review: PRE DE PROVENCE ULTRA-HYDRATING EAUX FRAICHES BODY CREAM FOR MOISTURIZING DRY SKIN (Oh Fresh) is a thin, very wet body cream with a mild, neutral “cold cream” fragrance. Unfortunately, the fragrance hangs around, and on my skin it quickly begins to smell unpleasantly “soapy”.

It does NOT irritate my sensitive skin, and it does make my dry skin areas feel silky smooth. A little goes a long way in coverage, probably because it's designed primarily to hydrate skin. It seems to hydrate my skin really well.

However, my personal preference is for a thicker body cream (e.g., Lubriderm) that gives the impression of providing deeper moisturizing and leaving behind a layer of skin protection.

Title: Fantastic, would buy again
Review: These shoes are fantastic. I was working all day in Skechers memory foam and switched to these. While these don't have the robust support those others did have, they are designed so much better for long usage. I can walk about 8 miles before I notice my feet to get tired. I wear them all day and for just about everything between work and running.

Title: Tingles going on and left me with what looked like a sunburn
Review: I used this on my face and neck and it tingled going on. I waited 15 minutes before washing off. The results were terrible. My entire face looked like it had a severe sunburn (see close-up photo of redness on my skin). It took three hours for the redness to go away. I must be allergic to the ingredients.

Title: Best hot tub pillow in the market today!
Review: This is a great pillow. I recently got a four person GE Whirlpool hot tub which has a lounge side to stretch out in. I love all of it except for my head which basically lays back on the tub. Although it is not entirely uncomfortable, I was looking for something better. When I saw this pillow I just had to try it. It is a great waterproof pillow which stays in place with suction. It is soft and definitely is the way to go when I am trying to full on relax. Highly recommend this for all hot tub users.

Title: One Star
Review: Average.

Title: Great small speaker.  Good sound for its size.
Review: This is a great little speaker.  Has really good sound for its size.  Very good battery life as well.  There are more expensive speakers available that have better sound quality - but this one is really good for the price.

Title: All natural hand soap - great size!
Review: I volunteer at a woman's shelter and we go through hand sanitizer and soap like crazy. This is a great economically sized hand wash. Lightly scented, a little goes a long way. It doesn't dry your skin and my hands actually feel softer after I use it. It's also a green product so it is good for the environment as well. We just ordered two more boxes of this and will be using it exclusively going forward.

Title: Comfy
Review: Love the pockets

Title: Really nice tube bra, much better than a strapless!
Review: I had bought a summer shirt which was off my shoulders so I was looking for a good bra to use. I really like this JPGO bandeau bra a lot. First, it gave me full coverage and the material is super soft and this is very comfortable to wear. The padding is relatively light and just gives me support in the right places without being overly padded. I have received a lot of compliments wearing this. I deducted a star because I normally wear a 36 bra and I got the large, wish I had sized up to an extra large (should have read some of these reviews first).

Title: Dry Feet
Review: These smell good. They don't make your feet any smoother! For a week after you use them, you'll have the most unbelievably dry skin on your feet and you'll leave skin flakes all over the place. But once all of that has passed, your feet aren't in any better condition than they were to begin with. In fact, it left certain spots around my toenails dry for almost a month. I wanted them to work. But they were definitely not for me.

Title: Not good for thin hair unless using additional clips
Review: The clip is a bit larger than it looks and there is no grip in my thin hair the clip just fell out. But the clip is sturdy.

Title: Five Stars
Review: I already have three center channels speakers that sound great and now the pair of surround sound speakers. Also sound great too.

Title: I don’t like this formula
Review: This formula is too sticky for me and I don’t like the color even though it’s the color I normally use this one is not quite right

Title: it's ok
Review: The stamp part work as advertised, if you have any wrinkles in that area, it'll immediately bleed into the wrinkles.  If you don't have any wrinkles, this will work great. The other side with brush is very very stiff and pointy, hurts a bit to use it. Well, you get what you pay for. I'll keep and use it, but I would not buy it again.

Title: Poor Quality
Review: Unfortunately I had to return these boots as the quality was terrible. I so wanted to love them but just didn't look like they do on the listing.

Title: Watery, green mess
Review: DO NOT purchase this product from here. Although it's a great product that I've used for years, I was completely disappointed with the quality of the product that was sent to me from this seller. Watery, green, disgusting. Totally NOT how this product should be.

Title: Keyboard
Review: I got my keyboard cover and it was okay - fit on nicely but then I washed it cause it had dirt under it and now it's still only ok. It seems like the plain water did something to it and it doesn't fit as snug. I probably wouldn't buy it again.

Title: This lotion is firming but I do not like the initial burning sensation or the fragrance
Review: I applied this lotion to my clean face after using their cleansing oil and treatment bar ([[ASIN:B071Z8PW9G both ordered separately]]). This lotion has a mild burning sensation on my face and I do not like the fragrance. Nevertheless, my face felt incredible and firm. It was also smooth and soft as a result of using this lotion in combination with their cleansing regimen that came with the travel set I ordered.  If the fragrance of the lotion were better, even with the mild burning sensation, I would have loved this. However, even if I loved this, the current price of $68 is so outrageous that I probably would not purchase it at that price.

Title: It’s so gummy
Review: Tried it on all settings and it’s still sticky/gummy. Not worth the mess and frustration.

Title: Does Not Irritate
Review: I am a regular user of Aveeno moisturizers. My skin is somewhat sensitive and in the last year or so, I have had frequent redness issues. I think my redness is related to peri-menopause more than anything, but it is something that I am dealing with. This moisturizer has a light sunscreen scent to it. There are no added fragrances. It is a little thick and does take a little more rubbing in than other moisturizers for it to be fully absorbed. It does not irritate my skin in any way. I have not noticed any difference in my redness. It is easy to dispense. It takes at least two squirts to get enough product to cover my face. Overall, it's okay, but I prefer some of the other Aveeno moisturizers over this one.

Title: Hurts feet
Review: The Sandals put blisters on his foot on the sides. First time ever having trouble with sandals from UA.

Title: Not for me Review: I have this same brand for my phone and it works well. I figured this brand would also work well for my iPad but it doesn’t. I was unable to use my stylus with it at all, it wouldn’t properly read taps or I would have to tap multiple times for it to read that I was touching my screen. You’d think my hand eye coordination had gone away overnight, but only for my iPad.

The install is much much easier with the phone as it comes with a simple guide that this one does not come with, but if you take your time it isn’t that difficult.

I am returning this item. I’m not sure if it is just a defective one or if the product just isn’t good for my iPad. I’m going to just go with something else for my screen.

Title: DO NOT BUY
Review: There is something fishy going on here. I originally bought this shampoo from Amazon in 2013 (and still have a little left) and I just bought a bottle last week. The original bottle has a pleasant herbal scent. The new bottle that I just received has a horrible, hard-to-describe smell. Maybe a cross between floor cleaner and sour socks? Astonishingly, both labels, including the ingredients list were identical. If you read the other reviews, quite a few people said that the shampoo does not have a pleasant herbal smell and that the company must have changed the formula because it doesn't have the same scent it used to.  I thought, "I'll buy it anyway, How bad can it be? Even if it's not very herbaly, I'll still use it."  Well NO, not only is it NOT herbal scented, it stinks!  But yet the ingredient list is the same. How? Like i said Something fishy.

Title: Gel soap that will not dispense from the pump; stings the eyes Review: As a body wash this lathers and cleanses well. It also has that strong tea tree aroma. It does burn the eyes, so avoid that area.

What I absolutely hate is that I could not get the pump to dispense. I had to remove the pump and turn the bottle over to get the soap out. The soap is like a gel. After showering like this for a while, I then reseated the pump again and was able to get out some product. If I could not get the pump to work, I was going to rate this 2 stars.

I also do not like that this is a gel shampoo--very very thick clear gel. I do love it's antibacterial properties, however.

The current $12.99 price is reasonable for this.

Title: They’re itchy and meant for stick thin legs
Review: They’re itchy, not as well made as you’d expect them to be and they roll down almost instantly when I pull them up, and I’m not “fat” or “thick” I have some jiggle but being 5ft9 and 125lb I’m pretty skinny so I’m surprised these don’t fit. The color is a bit different than in photos and it makes my ankles look huge because of the bulk there

Title: Don't waste your money
Review: No power and it takes forever to blow-dry. Disappointed.

Title: gag gift ok
Review: I bought these as a gag gift and that's about what they are worth... pretty chinzy.  But they were fairly cheap too.  So I'm not too surprised. Just know that you're not buying a great quailty pair of sunglasses and you're fine.

Title: Dislike
Review: This brow pencil was a great color for me. The deep brown is very dark. However, I hate the shape of the actual pencil. It is a weird diamond shape that is way too wide on one side. If you try to just use the tip of the corner, you wear it down. It is just far too chunky for eyebrows. The spoolie on the opposite end if far too small. It doesn't do anything at all. So, even if you happen to like the weird chunky shape of the pencil, you'll have to grab a different spoolie to get your brows tamed properly. I had high hopes, but this just isn't what it should be.

Title: Good medium-density blenders but am not that fond of the slick surface or the high price Review: This is a nice set of three black blending sponges all with one or two angled sides. I love that the sponges are of medium-density.

The flat / angled side is great for smooth applications. They feel good in my hands, blend well, and feel soft against my skin. Since these are of medium density, they do not soak up as much foundation as others that are more airy. The only thing I do not care for much is the slick surface on three of the four angles. Although it does help liquid foundation glide, I still prefer the typical sponge feel.

I love that the sponges do not smell. I tried other colored sponges and they smell like pencil shavings or other chemicals and these do not.

These blenders make a great gift for the make-up obsessed. The current price of $9.80 ($12.80 minus $3) is very expensive for these as it comes to $3.27 per blender

Title: Nothing Special
Review: These are just your average socks. They are much longer than I expected. They are a couple of inches below by knee

Title: long handle applicator
Review: Purchased for my 80 year old mother to help with applying lotions and such without much effort.  Works really well.  The little white rounds are balls that roll easily and apply about anything you want.  Then put the clear protective lens back on - fairly easy to clean.  I am happy with it.  In fact, I might buy one for myself.

Title: These are horrible.
Review: You cannot get a hold of anyone's hair with these. Not even the ones with REALLY short hair. These are horrible.

Title: Used for my iPhone and iPad too !!!
Review: It not bad

Title: Gorgeous and a great value p
Review: Beautiful shoes....didn't fit!

Title: They don’t stick
Review: Don’t waste your money

Title: Great!
Review: I love these! They fit perfectly and are very cozy. They are very lightweight and comfortable. I bought them for travel- a long flight and a long train ride. Easy on, easy off at airport, and great with leggings, yoga pants, skinny jeans. Would definitely buy again.

Title: Great coconut wash, cleans well and smells great!
Review: This Tom's body wash is my new favorite. I love the coconut scent, very light but smells great and stays on your skin for hours. I keep a bottle of this in my and my guest bathroom showers for daily use. The moisturizing quality keeps my skin soft and smooth and I feel totally clean and refreshed after using. The light coconut fragrance reminds me of my travels to the Caribbean so every time I take a shower I'm taken away to a vacation island, lol. I highly recommend this Tom's body wash for everyone. Really nice!

Title: Ya get what ya pay for!!!
Review: Doesn't hold charge long!!!

Title: It’s a win
Review: Very soft lace.  As another reviewer stated, nicer than some more expensive pieces.  Fits as expected.  I am large busted, so not as flattering there as I’d like.  I would have preferred higher cut legs.  I am quite pleased and am sure my husband will love it.

Title: Great hat for winter wear!
Review: Super cute, warm knitted hat for winter wear. I was planning on letting my granddaughter try it on a recent ski trip, but I liked it so much I decided to wear it myself. On the brutally cold and snowy afternoon I wore it, it was wonderful. First, it is super warm with a fleece lining. Secondly, it fit beautifully and stayed on my head despite taking a few tumbles on the slopes. Third, this is super cute and feminine. I absolutely love it and it will be a staple in my closet for years to come.

Title: Great picture - not so great mic
Review: Great picture quality - but the mic doesn't work as well.

Title: burgundy long sleeve shirt
Review: I was really disappointed at how thin this blouse was - wrinkled.. looks really cheap.  I am going to wash and hang dry it - but I think this blouse is headed for the trash bin.  The color is rich and burgundy -ish.  The neckline is small V. I sized up because I did see the rayon content and I like a looser fit - I would definitely recommend sizing up - if you really  want it.  I had high hopes for this blouse, but eh.

Title: Not 1st quality
Review: There were a number of snags in these when I opened the pachage & put them on. Would not recommend.

Title: Not for Large Cup Sizes!
Review: I was excited to get a new swimsuit! I followed the sizing chart and ordered accordingly. The bottom fits perfectly. The top, not so much. When I first held it in my hand, I thought it was a child's size by mistake! It is labeled correctly, but it didn't fit at all. I wear a size 40DD. The bra part didn't even cover half of my breasts! It was comical as to how little it covered. It's definitely not for large cup sizes!! So much for having a new swimsuit!!

Title: Article low profile head Artcise 46mm
Review: Like the design and low profile. Locks tight...but ball really drags and catches when rotated in all directions away from center. As mentioned in another review.. seems to be in the design on the cup..not the ball itself. Would not recommend for anything that requires fluid ball movement. I bought this for iOptron star glider so once set..camera doesnt have to move... I feel that my medium heavy mirrorless cameras safe.. would not use with heavy dslr and big lens

Title: Absolutely fantastic shampoo and conditioner!
Review: This is one of my favorite shampoos and conditioners on the market today. First, I love the light fragrance, like no other I have tried. Second, it cleans my hair and leaves it soft and smooth and prepares me for my straightening regimin. I love how my hair feels and smells and this convenient larger pump size is fantastic and makes washing my hair a breeze. I highly recommend this shampoo to keep your hair looking it's best and keeping it healthy by moisturizing down to the cuticle.

Title: Bad Product.
Review: Don't buy this.  It worked for 2 months.  It is dead now.  What a waste of money.

Title: Lessens Drying Time
Review: This really does make your hair dry faster. I have no idea how but it does. I was worried it might make my hair brittle but it didn’t. Great product.

Title: Beware!!
Review: This charger made my iPhone 8 Plus go into a dead Apple logo loop. I can say at least one of my pack damaged my phone. Thankful the university of YOUTUBE and the grace of God helped my phone get out the reboot loop. The tip broke off easily of another. Other than that 2 of them worked...

Title: Garish color - no return!
Review: I did not see anywhere on this product order that it was not returnable. Terrible color & no returns!

Title: Titanium flat iron ultra slim
Review: Super hot... super fast.  The plates are narrow... Hold the power button for a second or two to turn on - and then the up arrow to increase heat.

Title: Highly scented. Do not recommend for those sensitive to smells.
Review: Opened one in the package. Used twice - could not get past the smell. You would think something for sensitive skin would be unscented!

Title: Another fantastic Ahava product. Love, love, love!
Review: I have written a load of reviews about Ahava products and almost all have been 5 star. I was first introduced to Ahava on a trip to Israel about 6 years ago. When we visited the Dead Sea and then Massada, I went into the gift shop at Massada and saw some creams made by Ahava. Always looking for new skin care items, I read the boxes and saw all the benefits of the Dead Sea minerals and bought several of them. I have been hooked since. I think I have or have had, every one of their products. This night serum was new to me. It goes on smoothly, has a very light fragrance and my skin feels amazing when I wake up in the morning. Everyone over the age of 40 has to try Ahava products. My skin (at age 61) looks better and feels better than it did when I was in my mid-30's. There are definite benefits and results are quickly realized. You will love Ahava, the way I do. And this night serum is perfect as an introduction to the entire line.

Title: Nice but too small
Review: Too small, returned

Title: Super nice set of soaps!
Review: This is a great variety pack of soaps. I love all the fragrances and the fact that they don't dry my skin. I have been using two of the bars now for the past month and my skin feels and smells great. These also would make a great gift so I have already ordered a set for my sister who had commented she liked them as well. Highly recommend!

Title: Three Stars
Review: Good hold but the sprayer is not very good! Not fine enough spray mist onto the hair!

Title: RIPOFF
Review: Yep this company refuses to cover my surround sound system they say the plan was for the portable Bose speaker only that I paid $120 for,  the surround sound and bluer ray player was $500 which one do you think I bought it for what a bunch of thieves  I wouldn't even give them one star but you have to to post your comment

Title: Great shaver for women!
Review: This is a great shaver/trimmer for the most delicate of areas. I am super impressed how easy this was to use. Fits well in my hand (ergonomic), maneuvers easily. Closest of shaves, no knicking, no razor stubble afterwards, just perfect. Highly recommend!

Title: Soft absorbing towels but with quality issue.
Review: Incredibly soft. I plopped my wet hair in one for about 10 minutes. I also place another microfiber towel over that. Surprisingly, my hair dried faster than usual with other microfiber towels with the same technique. The reason for the 3 stars rather than higher is when washed the first time the seam is coming out and there’s a hole in one that’s never been used. So, there is a quality issue.

Title: Soft Fabric
Review: I am 5'6" and currently wear a size 16/18. I ordered this in the 2XL out of caution because my personal experience with buying unfamiliar brands online has led me to order a size up in most garments. The fit of this shirt is slightly loose as described in the product description. The length is long which I do like because it covers my rear side when I bend or stretch. While the fit is fine, it's just okay as far as how it looks on me. I don't love the look, but I don't hate it either. The arm cut outs are different than the usual cold shoulder look. I'm not sure how I feel about them. The shirt would be perfect for shoulder vaccinations! The material is soft and comfortable. The product description says to hand wash, but it also says machine wash is okay, thank goodness! It also says to air dry. Had I noticed that when I was ordering it, I probably would have passed on it because that's too high maintenance for me.

Title: If you like the smell of water, buy this crap!
Review: I trusted with the price this would be good stuff. This stuff doesn't have a smell whatsoever seriously no smell at all. I'm incredibly livid!!!  We should be able to give zero stars!

Title: Subpar performance for a foot spa; it is loud and water bubbles onto the floor leaving me with a mess Review: I have an old Dr. Scholl's massaging foot spa with heat feature that I wanted to replace. I figured this might be a good replacement and I was wrong. This spa looks nice and the rollers on the bottom feel good when working them across the soles of my feet. Other than this, the spa is almost useless.

There are two water levels. The first level will not even cover the feet and the second level barely covers the feet. The spa must be filled with warm or hot water because the heater is only good for maintaining the water temperature (if that). Also, when turned on, it generates lots of bubbles. This means it is extremely loud (which is far from relaxing) and water splashes everywhere. I got to clean my floor after using this because the splash guard was useless.

If this is used without the heat and bubble feature (meaning without plugging it in), then it is okay. However, this is poorly designed and provides an extremely disappointing foot spa experience.

Title: Three Stars
Review: I got the wrong item.

Title: Sham
Review: I can't even!!! They fell apart 3 days after wearing them and they were far too big. Completely disgusted with Amazon and it's sellers.

Title: Large
Review: Nice color nice soft material but way too big

Title: I'd only recommend for basic beginners or if you're looking for inexpensive practice shoes
Review: The shoe was too big for the size and I found that the strap lengths around my foot would not hold my foot in place.  Also, I had to fix the buckles and put them on correctly.  The sole quality was a concern because after doing a couple spins to try the shoes out, I looked at the bottoms and the suede-like fuzz was disappearing and creating a mild bald spot. I own several pair of dancing shoes and primarily use them for latin dancing. There's no way that these shoes would hold up like my others .  Maybe if you're a beginner or need an extra pair of inexpensive practice shoes, this would be ok for you.

Title: Pretty shirt a little on the short side
Review: Really nice shirt. A little thicker material than I thought (polyester), but the colors are really pretty and virant and it lays off my shoulders nicely. If I had any complaint at all I wish it were longer. I tend to like a t-shirt which comes down almost to cover my butt, this stops at about half way down my stomach. So keep that in mind if you are looking to hide a couple of extra pounds (this isn't the shirt for that).

Title: Nice
Review: Like it very much.

Title: Sabrent 13 port high speed USB
Review: Great when you have to charge a bunch of stuff... which is not exactly why I purchased it, but discovered it wouldn't work for that (a user problem)... so then it became a spare charging station which is fine.  Of course you will need the USB cord for charging. It's about the length and width of shorter surge protector... I always update my reviews should new info prove useful.

Title: Should state size
Review: Was way to small

Title: Not as impressed as I thought I would be. Review: This is a fun, useful tablet for the price. I love that you can make all different homepages. Love that you can pick wallpaper which you can't do with Kindle Fires which are the only other tablets I've owned. Of course, if you want a tablet
mainly for books, Kindle is the tablet you want. I also love all the apps you can get with the Samsung. What I don't like is the 8gb storage. I was under the impression if you got the 32gb extra it would integrate with the tablet rather than just be like a drive for mp3s and such. 8 gigs is barely enough for the apps you need. Also the manual tells you nothing about how to add things to the extra drive. Had to go to you tube. My tablet has connection issues from time to time.
I still really enjoy it most of the time. It can be super fast and plays things well from the cloud. Very light and attractive.

I am returning tablet. 8 gbs is just not enough. Extra storage cumbersome to use and doesn't work half of the time. Not easy like the cloud. Speakers unimpressive. I am disappointed because I thought I would like the Samsung. Also a battery hog. Will try the nexus 7.

Title: Great shampoo! Less flakes and hair feels silky smooth and clean!
Review: I and my family have been using Head and Shoulders for years and have been typically happy with the results. Mountain Falls is a new shampoo to me (had not heard of it before). I was hesitant to try it, but to be honest I absolutely loved it! Same primary ingredient as H&S (pyrithione zinc) but with a wonderful apple fragrance. It is a full bodied shampoo, lathers up great and my hair is squeaky clean after use. I think this Mountain Falls product actually makes my scalp less itchy and I do notice less flakes than usual. I do use an additional conditioner with this product as the 2 in 1 formula is not enough for me. But outside of that, I couldn't be happier with this shampoo!

Title: Nixplay 10.1 touch screen digital picture frame
Review: I purchased this digital frame on a treasure truck deal - it  works.  You will have to load the app and follow directions to bluetooth transfer pics you choose from your gallery to the frame.  I purchased an additional memory chip - but it turns out there is no place to install the chip so don't waste your time there.  You can set a regular time to 'run' the frame or manually turn it off and/or on.  You can 'shuffle' OR play all your uploaded pics.  You do not get to choose the 'fade' that happens between pics, but you do get to choose how long each pic stays on the frame before moving to the next pic. Picture quality is pretty good - about as good as the pics you download on to it.  It's close to an 8x10 frame.  Not sure why they call it a 'touch screen' cause I can't figure out what you can do by touching the screen - but ok. It comes with charging cord, regular plug in - there appears to be a mini USB port, but I haven't tried it.  Having said all this I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Good quality
Review: Makes getting ready in the morning easy. They look like real hair, and I get compliments on how cute my hair looks

Title: Not for Fair Skin
Review: I have learned over time that when you have fair skin you are NEVER going to get that JLO Glow no matter what product you use. Not for me. Maybe if you’re a San Tropez girl this would be for you.

Title: Makes a wonderful gift!
Review: I really loved this lavender gift set. I honestly had to consider keeping it for myself as I really loved all of it. Lavender is my favorite scent and I have everything in my bath to accentuate it (including light lavender accents in color). However, I felt I needed to give it away since it was a gift set, so at Christmas I gave it to my aunt. She absolutely loved this! She told me her favorite was the bubble bath but that it was difficult choice as she loved it all so much (and this says a lot considering how persnickety she can be. Highly recommend for gift giving, would make a great gift for a school teacher as well.

Title: ASURION 3 Year Portable Electronic Accident Protection Plan with Tech Support  $20-29.99
Review: nice to have an accident plan just in case of the unexpected . . .

Title: Set of 3 bracelets
Review: I purchased these as a gift for a friend who lives near my daughter - my daughter's wrist is shown in the photo.  Her wrist is small to average.  Daughter was doing the wrapping for me.  I am disappointed at the HUGE, chunky charm.  It really overwhelms the bracelet and I think looks a bit trashy.  I purchased more delicate, pretty bracelet for this person and my daughter is going to throw these in with it  - but against my vote.  In all honesty if I were there in person, I would not.  The charm is just so junky.  They are stretchy, pull on style.  They appear to possibly be actual stone, but it is hard to tell.  On the other hand, always remember that you usually get what you pay for and these are fairly inexpensive. I won't talk about the shipping delays because in this time of virus and shipping issues - but they were seriously missing for a long time before arriving just in time.

As you can see it is a very bright fuchsia color.
It is way too bright for me. This shirt is nylon, so it is very staticky. The sleeves and sleeve bands are very tight. I would not recommend this color nor the fabric of this shirt.

Review: Purchased this new kindle for my Mom.  Her 2017 model was outdated and the new one has much more memory (I added a micro chip too).  She loves it.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Even when I scrunch them down around my calves they roll and leave a tight mark. I think there is some kind of elastic around the top. They might be good for someone who is very thin - I wear a 4/6. The price is great, but I will be purchasing socks from other companies in the future.

Review: I don't know who or how they figured these to be 6x but they were not even close to fitting. Very dissatisfied and disappointed.

Review: Bought these in November,one has quit working and one ,which was never activated now won't work. No trouble shooting instructions and no contact info. Can't determine the issue.

Title: Rash all over body
Review: THis product is awful. It caused my skin to break out in a horrible rash. I also got sun burned. My skin is not very sensitive, and this product claims to be easy on your skin. It is NOT. Do not waste your money. I have used other sun bum products, and I love their regular sun tan lotion. However, this product is awful.

Title: Hard to hold; odd holder that doesn’t stay put; brush bristles do detangle Review: This is a very odd brush. It is lightweight but the handle is so wide that I find it difficult to hold and brush with. The bristles do detangler but  without a good handle, it is a moot point to me. Also, the holder is round. Note that a round object does not stand up on its own. This does not stand up in the holder; instead it rolls over onto its side. The only way it will stand up is if I put the base of the round hold down and then  balance the brush in the other hole (see photo). It comes with an adhesive that fits on the bottom but it makes no sense to use this.

In summary, the entire brush is odd, the holder is non-functional, the handle is too thick on the brush to use comfortably, and the double-sided adhesive makes not sense to use. The current price of $16.90 is also way too expensive for this lightweight plastic brush ensemble.

Review: These were the worst. Although the material feels good, the aren’t long enough by any means. They might be long enough for someone less than 5 ft. tall. It was a huge disappointment.  So, my search still continues to find a comfortable, durable, not too hot 🥵 brand of stockings.

Title: Fantastic soft quick dry non-wrinkle cotton material but pockets have no button or velcro closure Review: Great cargo shorts made of nice, non-wrinkle quick dry cotton material.
Biggest downside is cargo pockets have no velcro or button closure and items easily fall out. Cargo pockets are also a bit too small to fit a 6.5” smartphone. The whole point of cargo pockets is to securely store larger items. If there is no closure and they fall out, this defeats the purpose.
PROS- have drawstring and elastic waist so stay up easier. Have cargo pockets. Nice soft quick dry light non-wrinkle cotton material. Very inexpensive.
CONS-come very small. I wear a 42 waist (2XL) and had to order a 5XL.

Review: Great shorts at a good price.

Title: These shoes are comfortable enough to wear all day
Review: These shoes are comfortable enough to  wear all day... with added insoles. However they fit true to size and have room to accommodate insoles. The black on the toe wore off when I used leather conditioner, so my boots look quite different now, but I still think they look very nice.

Title: Wonderful fragrance; cleans well; non-stinging; love foaming action but no suds & pricey Review: At the current price of $12 ($15 minus 20%), this 6.7 ounce pump bottle of soap is very pricey. The foaming action is good, it does not sting my eyes, it cleans well, and smells divine. However, there are hardly any suds, so I have to use a lot to feel clean. This would have received 5 stars if it were not for the high price and lackluster lather.

UPDATE - I've used this for three showers already and the bottle is almost gone. I am totally disappointed about the lack of sudsing action as it makes me feel like I'm just washing with water. Hence I lowered this from 3 to 2 stars.

Title: Waste of Money
Review: The concept sounds great but it doesn’t work like it’s supposed too and it just interfers with things. Wish we could return!!

Title: Presumably "New" (in factory wrapping, but DEAD) Battery
Review: I received my order, including the mouse, today as promised, which I very much appreciate. The battery was included, as stated in the mouse's product details, which I appreciate. Does it work? Not with the enclosed battery. The red light on the bottom of the mouse went on for just about long enough for me to point & click, see the mouse working that one first moment, then .....poof....the battery died. Wow, I didn't expect that or I'd have ordered batteries too..So, as for the mouse, I'm sure it's as good as it should be. As for the "new" battery, not so much. I've always had the best luck with purchases from Amazon, & there's no way they can be faulted for the dead battery, but for anyone else looking to buy this product, please make sure you have fresh & functional batteries on hand.

Title: Works but for how long?
Review: I am going on a very long trip where this cord is necessary. I initially only bought one but after about a week of use I decided to buy two because the first one feels like it will stop working very soon. Buy if you need this specific length and can’t find a reasonable price anywhere else but I wouldn’t be surprised if they fail soon.
