Title: Weird Fit
Review: These Tommy Hilfiger pajamas are very soft. They're also very cute. However, they have a weird fit. I don't know if the sizing is off or what, but the pieces don't fit well. My daughter is 5'7" and wears size mediums in most clothes. She has many Tommy Hilfiger pieces in size medium and she hasn't had any problems with the brand fitting before. The pants are really short. The waist is baggy. The shorts are baggy and loose.  The shirt is tight in the shoulders. She may be able to wear the pieces individually, but not together as a set.

Title: marginal sound quality Review: this really deserves 3 stars. its not terrible, but its not great. first is sound quality. its not terrible. 2nd is limited distance. its not terrible, but not great.

I wish I had found a better product.

Title: More of an old-time intense scent than something exceptional; I detect no rose Review: The packaging/bottle is exquisite. I love the red bottle as it is very sexy and sensual. However, the perfume itself is not one I would order again. I do not detect any rose overtones. The fragrance reminds me of an old lady's perfume from yesteryear. Even a little is overbearing and is not enticing to me. Unfortunately, this is going to be demoted to an air freshener.

The current price of $79.99 for 3.4 fluid ounces is competitively priced. Too bad the fragrance is too strong and not subtly floral. They certainly hit the mark on the rich scent but it is not one I like.

Title: One Star
Review: Been using this for a while and it did not do anything for me.

Title: Best face wash on the market today!
Review: I love Olay products and this face wash is no exception. It is gentle on my skin and does not dry it out. I use it morning and at night before I sleep, and then apply my nighttime retinol and moisturizing routine. I wake up refreshed looking and my skin is fully hydrated. I highly recommend this for anyone looking for a great facial wash (and best of all it's sulfate free)!

Title: Ok
Review: Ok

Title: Well-Made Gadget Bag; Interior Fittings May Not Suit Individual Needs Review: This ELECTRONIC ORGANIZER (Double Layer Travel Gadget Bag for USB Cable, SD Card, Hard Drive, Power Bank, iPad Mini, etc.) is well made. However, as I always discover when I order an “organizer” bag, the bag’s interior pockets, loops, and the like don’t align with my personal storage needs.

The interior has spaces for things that I don’t own, and not enough spaces for the things that I do own. This is an attractive gadget bag, but it’s impossible to tell whether it will meet your personal needs until you order it and see how many of your gadgets will fit into it.

Title: The perfect cleaner for your unsightly, smudgy phone screen, to make it shiny new again. Review: Try them. You will love them. Guaranteed.

I've been using iCloths for several years now. They are the perfect phone screen cleaner, hands down!! I've tried other products from dry cloths, to alcohol rubs, to my t-shirt, nothing else comes close to clearning so thoroughly. One cloth is plenty!!

They may see a little too dry to work when you are first using them. Don't worry. They are the perfect moistness.

A trick. One side of the cloth is more rough than the other. Use the rough side to clear the phone screen. It works much better than the smoother side.

I fold the cloth in half so there are two of these rough sides. I use one side to do the initial cleaning and the other side to do the final - perfection clean.

Then, I fold the cloth inside out to clean off my finger tips before discarding the cloth.

A suggestion - could you make a biodegradable wrapper?

The price varies between 10 and 17 cents. Obviously, it's better when you get them for the lower price by buying a larger quantity.

Title: Fantastic curling iron, best I have ever used!
Review: Great curling iron. Perfect blade width/size for my shoulder length hair (1 1/2 inch). This heats up quickly and is easy to maneuver around my hair. Makes it easy to curly my typically straight hair in just a matter of minutes. I use this daily after showering and drying my hair and works as well as my old curlers that I used prior to using this iron (in 1/10th of the time). This gold tone is really nice, too, and looks attractive on my bathroom countertop. Highly recommend to anyone who wants an easy, flawless way to curl your hair.

Title: Junk
Review: To me, this was a waste of money. Not useful on a plane or really anywhere. Too short, once bent, leaving no surface space so phone wants to fall off. Don’t buy it. Save your money.

Title: No Seal
Review: This item arrived today and I was surprised to find that it doesn't have a tamper resistant seal.  It's probably just fine, but I'd feel better if it had a seal.

Title: Lotion smells incredible; leaves a hydration barrier on the skin; color stains Review: Besides the violet lotion that comes in an 8 ounce pump bottle, a pen (annoying to use) and a sample serving of another body lotion is included. The body lotion smells fabulous. It is violet in color, absorbs mostly, and leaves a light hydration barrier on the skin. It is also vegan and has none of the fragrances listed on the front in the ingredients list. It also lists at boutique pricing of $16.95, which comes to $2.12 per ounce.

The light violet color does stain. I also used the pink sample lotion and that stained my white underclothes a light pink in spots. I believe it will wash off. If it doesn't, I'll update my review.

UPDATE Sept 23, 2022 - I finally finished this lotion. The staining does appear to wash off. What is weird is that a stone is in the bottle. As I was using the last of this a purplish black stone fell out, which I found weird and did not expect.

Title: I had high hopes
Review: There isn’t anything special about the conditioner didn’t make a difference for my hair or scalp maybe others have had a different experience

Title: multi color charge 3 fitbit band
Review: I am really into stretchy bands and this one is really cool - I really like that the band is thin - and easy to pull on.  It rests easily on my wrist and is NOT too tight at all.  I do have an average sized wrist - about 7".  I am going to go back and order the plan black one too. Arrived quickly (I have prime) along with some other items I had ordered and in great condition.

Title: not purchasing again
Review: not what i expected  glad i didnt pay full price  and got it on a cheap promotion  i love peppermint but this is like stale peppermint

Title: 64GB Drive for USB A or C by PNY
Review: I love that it has both A and C USB connectors. Very pleased that both connectors retract into the device, but they don't retract and close so they are open to debris.. The other potential problem is that the plastic is very flimsy/thin it feels easily crushable. So time will tell how clumsy I am.

Title: Absolutely gorgeous brush but best for peach fuzz or very short hair Review: This is a really beautiful hairbrush. In the package is a boar & nylon bristle brush but it is not typical of most brushes with that mixture. It almost feels like a very hard boar bristle brush because it does not detangle and it only passes lightly through my short-to-medium fine curly hair. This brush is best for those who have peach fuzz or a little more than peach fuzz for hair.

The handle is easy to hold, so it provides a good grip. I also love the blue green color of this brush.

The current price of $11.99 is competitively priced for this. It is certainly beautiful but not as functional for my hair as I expected.

Title: Not exfoliating but soothing and massaging; better for a bubble bath Review: This shower scrubber has two sides. One side has nubs that are perfect for a more massaging feel during showering. The other side is very soft and okay just for washing. Neither side helps with lather. This is best in a bubble bath. It does come with a self-stick hook which has a film that has to be removed in order to stick it to the wall. However, the hook that fits through the hole in the brush causes the silicone brush bristles to stick out at an odd angle (see photo).

I actually ordered this thinking it would be a great silicone brush to pick up cat hair from furniture but it is not good for that because the bristles are too pliable. It is also only okay for showering and is definitely NOT exfoliating. This is best for use as a scrubber in a bubble bath.

The current price of $8.99 for this is about $6 too much.

Title: Works great after you figure out how to install it
Review: It's a pain in the ass to install, I don't have an unzipper on this computer, I had to unzip on another computer and bring it over, the only alternative was to download (the files, or an unzip program) from online and I was not connected to the internet with this computer, that's why I needed the adapter. I would not think they would need to zip drivers to put them on a cd, but whatever. Then the installer failed a few times, I had to manually install the driver in device manager that even kind of worked then it stopped working and I had to do it again, but I had already moved my thumb drive so that's annoying I had to get the unzipped file again. But after I installed the drivers a second time I haven't had any problems and it's worked like a dream  so far no problems, I'm online!

Title: Macbook Air Case is slim fitting and a nice protector
Review: These cases are a must for me.  I can't say these actually protect my laptop, but they do help.  My laptop slid off of my bed and dented a corner. Since then, I have been using these cases and I haven't received anymore dents. Yes, I do still drop it or it finds it way to the floor other ways.  I love the keypad cover.  Since I generally wear out a lot of my keys in a short period of time, the keypad cover has prevented that from happening. I recommend these cases.

Title: The concept is good cost is high
Review: I think the Idea is great, but I found a seat at a Gander MTN store for about $14.00. I already had the bucket and most of the suplies in it can be purchased at Wal-mart for less. If you don't want to take the time to assembel your own then this kit is convienent but you will have to add a few extra things.

Title: Wonderful no show socks, perfect for summer and southern living
Review: My husband loves these. Comfortable, no slip and no show. Absolutely amazing how they stick firm to his feet and do not slide down the back of his shoes when walking the way other no show socks on the market do. These are also super lightweight, almost like you aren't wearing socks at all. We live in Florida and socks like this are perfect for wearing out with Dockers or shorts as they are totally invisible when wearing loafers and they are light enough that the humidity has no impact on making your feet sweat. Perfect!

Title: As described
Review: Very tight fit for the Amazon Fire tablet but it worked and looks cute. Kid loves it.

Title: Already wearing down with approximately 6 months of use Review: UPDATE: There is no way these last a year. They maybe will make it to 6 months. I'm about to hit month 5 (I bought these in may) and the inside behind my heel is completely worn down even though I'm wearing the right size. Any smaller and my toe would be constantly pressed against the steel toe portion. Definitely would no longer recommend, even at this price, you might as well get something cheaper that will last less than 6 months.

I've had steel toed boots before but this is my first pair of steel toed sneaker-type of shoe. I expected some wear but am disappointed in some of the rips I've seen (pointed out in my photo) since I haven't been as rough on them as I usually am with boots. They are far more comfortable than my boots hands down though, I can wear them all day, normally with my boots I start getting tired after about 6 hrs.

Would recommend these for the price, we'll see if they last the year.

Title: Runs small
Review: Love this robe/dress but it ran small and was too long. I am 5'2 and have J lo thighs hence the too small

Title: Not like Keds used to be.
Review: Wore one time. Had heel blisters within an hour.  They got dirty so I tossed in the washer. Set out to fry. A couple weeks later, I looked at them and they were all yellowed around seams. Gross looking. Threw them away this morning.  I have owned several pairs of white keds over the years and they have always washed up well!  Really disappointed.

Title: Suppose to grow back eye lashes, and brows. Review: Interesting concept for regrowing eye lashes, and brows.
This comes in a mascara looking tube but smaller. And has a very thin little brush to apply this to to the base
Of your eye lashes, and brows to help them grow.

I’m a older women, with fair coloring,so not hairy brows.
I have noticed my eye brows and lashes are getting thinner as I age. ( not happy about it).
I have only used this for a couple of weeks, and have not noticed anything growing!
Maybe for my age it takes longer!
If I notice any thing growing I will be back with a more positive review.
Hope I’m back.

Title: Not as comfortable as they are made out to be.
Review: After reading all the reviews about how good of a pair of shoes these were I bought a pair. I took them on a trip with me thinking they would be very comfortable and that was not the case. Very stiff shoes and honestly not comfortable at all. Being a big and tall man I'm always looking for a comfortable shoe. Thank goodness I had my trusted New Balance with me or I would have been up a creek! I would not recommend Fitville shoes my own personal opinion.

Title: Good makeup brushes
Review: I have never ordered special makeup brushes before so I dont know how to compare them to the rest.  I am happy enough with them and they were inexpensive.

Title: Pants are way too small
Review: The top fits perfectly and is really cute but the bottoms seem 2 sizes smaller and were tight and shirt. The set is nice quality if you get the right size.

Title: Flimsy stamd
Review: The projection screen itself is not wrinkle free and the stand is super flimsy. I'm just going to end up using some heavy duty velcro strips to hang the screen without the stand.

Title: Excellent quality as long as you do not need to transmit phantom power Review: I am using this with a LyxPro 4-Channel pair of boxes connected via Ethercon. The quality of this cable is excellent, especially considering the lower price. It transmits noise-free too. And, finally, it is more flexible that I thought that it would be. If you are an old timer who remembers 10BASE2, this has about the same semi-flexible quality as that cable.

Unfortunately it will not transmit phantom power, and I suspect that is because one end of the ground is lifted. However, if you don't need phantom power this is a great value based on price, quietness and overall construction.

Title: Nice and warm!
Review: Nice and warm for my January baby!

Title: disappointed 😞 Review: I was very upset to see this white stitching on both of the black hoodies.
It makes no since to stitch labels that big with white. For over $50 each you would expect better.
So I don't even know if i want them replaced!!!

Title: Bralette with Padding, but it's perfect
Review: I was not expecting the padding when it arrived but it was no different then what is in a bathing suit.  I ended up loving it because I nipples didn't show.  I ended up wearing it for 2 weeks straight just to see how the elastic would hold up.  It's held up beautifully and it's super comfortable.  I'm 5'5 and 140lbs that normally wears 32D and this was a perfect fit.

Title: Not Very Well Made
Review: The two speaker cover arrived, each is constructed of an outer frame and mesh grille; the mesh grille on one of the frames had fallen out due to poor workmanship during the original installation. I had to reinstall the mesh and then melt the plastic anchor to fasten the mesh to the outer frame.

Title: Working great
Review: Thanks it was just what I needed

Title: My hair felt dry & looked lifeless after using this; predominant aroma is lavender Review: This is a travel size bottle of shampoo at 2.5 ounces and expensive at the current price of $6.

Years ago I use to use a men's body wash with tea tree oil from Bath and Body Works but that got discontinued. Since I loved the results, I figured I would try a shampoo with this ingredient. However, this shampoo leaves my hair very dry and un-moisturized, even if I add a conditioner. Also, the results are lackluster. My hair is normally curly but with this, it comes out more on the flat side.

The fragrance smells mostly of lavender. I detect other aromas but the tea tree oil and mint do not come through.

Since the bottle is so small, I will only be able to get about three to four washes out of this for my short to medium hair.  Personally, I do not like the results I got.

Title: Nice for flats
Review: Go with dress for wedding

Title: Let's see if it can survive high school.
Review: Bought this backpack to replace my son"s old Under Armour backpack, which finally succumbed to heavy High School student use. The backpack seems rugged enough, and well made, so it looks like it has potential. The old backpack lasted through Freshman year, and halfway through Sophomore year, so we were happy with that. At that point we bought a cheaper backpack, which didn't last a month- so, that is a very favourable comparison for Under Armour.

Title: Nice for travel etc.
Review: This speaker is OK. It's very portable, which is a plus, and I love the fact that it uses USB for power. The USB cable is a bit on the short side, but it's workable. The power/volume control and mute button are nice pluses. It's a bit on the tinny side, but what do you expect for such a small and inexpensive speaker? When desk real estate is tight, it gets the job done.

Title: Fun to try
Review: From my daughter: I tried this in the morning and didn't notice a huge difference.  My skin seemed a little bit smoother and softer. The scent of it stung my eyes a bit while I was applying it, but went away quickly as it was drying. It feels nice on skin while it's drying and almost creates a cooling/tingling sensation. After 10 minutes it was dry and I rinsed it off with warm water and applied jojoba oil after since my skin felt a bit dry. It was fun to try and had some small positive results.

Title: Tin cans and string would have been better
Review: These just sound awful, one speaker has already died. They are compact enough and look ok. Pay the extra for something better.

Title: Ok for price
Review: Ok for price but couldn’t get it too work

Title: Tongueless Sneakers Are Short, Narrow; Velcro Straps Are Decorative Review: These CALVIN KLEIN WOMAN’S IRAH SNEAKERS (size 8 medium) don’t have tongues—they’re cut like slip-on sneakers, except that the part replacing the tongue is NOT elastic. I don’t understand why the Velcro straps are even there, because the sneakers aren’t adjustable. They either fit you, or they don’t.

I wear a US size 8 medium in most walking shoes, but I cannot get these sneakers onto my feet without a shoehorn and a struggle. (Needing a shoehorn is a big negative in a slip-on!) Even then, the sneakers are too small to even attempt walking in them. I strongly suspect that the inelastic top would prove uncomfortable if I were to try to wear the sneakers all day.

These “size 8 medium” sneakers are very short, and very narrow. I think that I would have to go up at least a full size, to a size 9, for them to fit. The sneakers have a strong chemical odor when you open the box, though I’m sure the odor will disappear when the shoes are worn.

Title: Size isn't completely accurate.
Review: Sizing is slightly off not for anyone with big legs its extremely tight and flat for me at least. The quality is okay and looks good but for me it doesn't fit at all.

Title: Tab came off
Review: Tab came off after a few weeks, found it laying on the floor

Title: Wish my old Fire still worked,
Review: My old kindle fire was far easier to use than the new version which is cluttered with screen after screen that requires Alexa - which I don't have or need.  The number of ads when you play a game can be ridiculous if you don't know how to X out of the game screens, even then it takes me about 20 minutes,  Battery life is much poorer than the old Fire - or all those commercials are draining it.  I guess I'll end up paying to get rid of ads, but not unless I'm 100% sure it will get rid of all the game ads.  The cover makes it hard to open and close - I have a second cover I bought by mistake but have tried it and it didn't fit well either.  It's less than half as good as my old Fire due to this Alexa stuff that I don't understand and, from what I've read, don't need,  So sad they ruined this device - I tend to have a lot of hospital stays and this isn't really fit to take to the hospital unless I can find one of my books to read.  and there is a power outlet nearby. And why is Safari STILL the web browser?  Terribly disappointed even with a discounted price.

Title: Great fit
Review: As I expected...works well

Title: Nice muted purple earrings, super cute!
Review: These are a nice size earring, noticeable on my ears, with a muted purple tint. Super light weight, I wore them all day and evening and didn't even know I had them on. Super cute pattern on the drops as well. Highly recommend these to add to your wardrobe to match all your different shades.

Title: didn't like it
Review: wasn't what I expected

Title: Small and tight
Review: I ordered 6.5 for $33. Now its $60 days later or from other sellers. Im returning because its way too small. Fits more like a 5.

Title: So far, so good
Review: I've had this computer for a few weeks now.  It's been great.  Fast and easy.  The BEST part?? Windows 7.  Yup.  I HATE 8.  Won't have it. I am a mouse user, hate the touch pad.  One the greatest things about this computer is that you can EASILY turn the touch pad on and off with a double tap in the right spot. Perfect.  Honestly, I'm very happy with this notebook that DOES NOT have windows 8.  :)

Title: Gave me razor burn
Review: I normally use a Mach 5 mens razor to shave my legs so maybe I’m spoiled with that, but these didn’t work great for me. The first couple shaves felt ok but by the third use I got bad razor burn. Maybe if you have finer hair these will work better. My hair is pretty coarse.

Title: sun bum SPF 30
Review: Super soft, just smashes on your lips... no flavor, just super sweet. (and no, they were not warmed in any way) Can't use them.  Right into the trash.  All three 'flavors' I purchased.  Eh.  Really wanted them to be good and work.

Title: Not as good as I was hoping it would be
Review: I live in a major metropolitan area with several TV stations.  Most work fine, but at least two that should have a very strong signal are giving consistent problems, and a third can be problematic.  The other stations work fine.  If you are on the fringe of the broadcast area of a TV station you want, I would look at a different antenna.  If you want something for casual or occasional use and have good signal strength, the value for the price is okay, but you are never going to get the weak signal station with it.

Title: Poor Review: Perfume fragrance was extremely faint and fading like it was watered down.
Going back at purchasing at a large known department store.
Buyer beware!

Title: Concealer Review: I did not like it. It was too thick and pastry
Sorry

Title: Goes on smooth, light, and shimmery but colors are too “yellow” Review: There are six pencil shadows. Most of the colors are yellow or orange in hue and there is one blue and one tan that also seems to turn yellow or orange. Each pencil has its own brush for blending and the brush head needs to be turned to release the cream shadow.  I am careful to only turn a little bit because the shadows are soft. They are shimmery as well.

They do go on smoothly but it is a bit difficult to get into corners with the round tip. The colors are light, so that they can be used to blend with other colors.

I personally do not care for this set of pencils. I like the brush head and the fact that I can just turn the top to release more shadow. What I do not like are the strange colors.

The $9.99 price is reasonable for this set as it comes to $1.67 per pencil.

Title: Great for Summer! Review: These are so cute! The shoe laces are even paste, which is a great touch. These will look cute with casual summer outfits. They are comfortable.

I usually wear a size 8 or 8.5 medium width in shoes (USA). These are slightly tight. Length a little short. A larger size might be too large. I am keeping this size.

Title: One Star
Review: Hard to focus and no distance to them

Title: If you want a dongle spend a little more money for a good one
Review: The product worked fine, but the process for connecting my beats every time I wanted to use them was too much a hassle and the range I could move was awful, maybe two feet from my PlayStation and was already breaking up

Title: Worked
Review: They worked. Simple

Title: Another great Olay product!
Review: I love Olay products and have been using them since I was a teenager. I really like this Moisture Whip moisturizer. After I do my regular morning regimen and apply serum, I finish with this. I love that it has sunscreen so when I finish, I am protected (of course, if I am doing a lot of outdoor activity I need more than a 25 SPF and will add additional). I love the way this cream goes on, it is rich and creamy, yet light. When I apply it, it absorbs quickly and makes my face feel soft and smooth and definitely moisturized. Highly recommend!

Title: Soap
Review: Outstanding

Title: Nice small rechargeable mouse
Review: I wanted a rechargeable mouse that I could use when I am traveling for work. This is a small, lightweight, rechargeable mouse that allows me to not have to carry batteries with me. I really do like the size and the way it feels in my hand when I use it. It's not 'silent' as it claims, but I really don't care about that. For the money, this is a great little mouse.

Title: It's a refurbished item-90 days warranty Review: It was a beautiful thing for 6 months. Easy install, superior signal strength and then it died. I called Amazon, which got me connected with a technical support person and after taking my email and phone number, she must have seen it was passed the 90 days. Click, dial tone. You will not get any help if it dies. Caveat emptor. I won't buy refurbished again.

Title: Reasonably priced way to safeguard your cruise luggage tags
Review: These are a great alternative to using just a paper tag with staples/tape. I cruise at least once or twice a year and find that without a luggage tag holder, paper tags can get ripped/lost. This pack of 12 is a reasonably priced pack which could easily support a family trip. These are probably not the best tags I have ever used (they aren't that wide and I needed to fold the tag more than I would have liked to get them to fit my NCL paper tags), but for the price they are great. I have a small group (6 folks) going on a trip in October and we will all be using these.

Title: Don't waste your money
Review: Does nothing it advertises, and company does not accept returns. It is so sticky, and does not help with chafing at all. You are better off with a Vagasil spray and deodorant combo.

Title: Had to return
Review: I love the look of this vest! It’s super cute. However, I had to return because the tag says not to touch with bare skin? This seems kind of suspicious to me…

Title: Oh My Girl's Won't Fit.
Review: Definitely, not true to size. I ordered a size larger and they must have been 4 times too small.

Title: nb boys sneakers
Review: Yikes.  If you're buying for a little boy... these are meant for girls - the photo is a bit misleading.. the pattern on the bottom is a leopard print... with PINK on it.  Now.. that's ok for me... but my grandson was NOT going to consider them for 30 seconds.  Dang it.  I will donate them.  I wish the photos were larger and more true to color.  I was trying to purchase more of these because he loves the twist button style so much.  He won't wear any of his other shoes... so I needed to purchase some more.  I thought these said they were 'unisex'... but the pink leopard print, I agree with my grandson, says 'girl' to him.  SIGH.  These are hard to find.  I am donating these... hope some little girl is thrilled.

Title: Not worth buying to bulky and difficut to use Review: They are pretty but they are not worth buying I was upset because they are not user friendly and the material is super cheap.
I will never buy this item again.

Title: cd cleaner
Review: cd cleaner

Title: Perfectly Fine Keyboard, but Be Aware of What You're Getting
Review: I don't really feel the need to criticize the keyboard since it is, and does, everything the manufacturers say, but I'm back to Amazon today to buy a different lighted keyboard and I'll keep this one for emergencies.  First, the positives.  The keyboard is sleek and visually appealing.  I love the blue back-lighting.  It would probably be a good keyboard to take along for use with a laptop, and that may have been the intent because the condensed keyboard is laid out like a laptop keyboard.  That, unfortunately, is also part of the problem.  The layout of the keys makes it difficult for me to use, with keys like the backspace, which I use a lot, surrounded by other small keys such as Home & End, which sends your cursor all over the page when you hit them by mistake.  It's probably not the best keyboard for people who do a lot of typing.  In fact, I plugged in my old keyboard to write this review.  For the price, I am not displeased, and it will be a good standby in case I need it, but for long-term use, a different keyboard is probably a better choice.

Title: Waste of money
Review: This is crap.  Tried all three on Kindle screen and all three left bubbles and peeled up at the edges within hours.  We followed the directions, but it still didn't work as stated.

.. but fast forward a year later (NEW Netgear Router) .. and they WILL NOT connect !
I have reset everything .. uninstalled app .. re-installed
They WILL NOT connect !@ (already 3+ hours into frustration)

Title: Battery life sucks Review: Had mine for two weeks, it's great except battery life. Charge it over night, use it for short a while and turn it off go back to use and is way down, it's using battery when using

I discovered it's not the battery, it's the keyboard draws the battery down when attached to the tablet whether WI fi is on or not, when using keyboard, if just using tablet use only as tablet and then it's just fine on battery. A new up date on the battery life after experimenting further, After charging take off of key board and when tablet is not in use leave tablet up on end on a shelf and battery won't run down, left connected to key board saps the battery very fast

Title: Nice leather but just okay.
Review: It serves its purpose but the elastic band is loose and I'm sure will continue to stretch over time. It would be nice if there were means of tightening the band.

Review: Lasted 2 months - input is already stripped. Not a lot of use - home office 1 person. Tried replacement usb cords but the inside was shot after a month. Garbage.

Review: Short and baggy, worse after washing.

Title: Eh Review: Grey pair : Arrived with some strings hanging off so I cut them off, see through when bending over(you can see the tag so definitely can see your underwear and skin) not squat proof whatsoever. Super tight but that’s bc they’re compression type of leggings. Ordered small

Blue pair: I ordered another pair this time the blue and they smell like they were dipped in chemicals but the color looks like a brown black unless you’re under super bright light. Ordered medium for the blue in hopes it would be more fabric so it would be less see through but these are see through and not tight like they’re supposed to be.

Title: Not what I expected.
Review: I like the design of the shoe.They are not very comfortable.

Title: Use Sparingly!
Review: This is my first time using any product by Deborah Lippmann. This body shimmer/highlighter comes in a tube. You don't remove the cap to access the cream. Instead, you twist the cap slightly, then squeeze and the lotion comes out. Use sparingly! The first time I used it, I squeezed a large amount of it. I treated just like any other body lotion. Well, it was not pretty! It was like a bronzing effect. Bronzing with lots of shimmer. I had to use 3 or 4 makeup remover wipes to get it off my arms. Then I waited a few minutes and tried again. This time, I only used a small amount. This was much better. It gave my skin a healthy glow. I didn't find it to be very hydrating, but it wasn't drying either. There's a very light scent. Because of the shimmer, this is something I probably wouldn't use on a daily basis. but rather use it for special occasions.

Title: Highly Recommend
Review: This is by far the best comb that I have had for combing and untangling my beard hairs, especially when I wake up in the mornings.  I have a very thick beard and when combing any tangles tend to tug on my face.  This comb glides through my beard, "like a hot knife through butter"!!!

Title: The boar's bristles are nice but the nylon ones are horrible thus leaving this ...
Review: This brush has the roughest nylon bristles I have ever used. They hurt the head on every person I've used it on. The boar's bristles are nice but the nylon ones are horrible thus leaving this brush unusable.

Title: Pretty
Review: Love this camera, no disc needed to install into computer, no more unstable pictures, small, beautiful pictures, the camera thinks for you. especially at close ups, faces look great.

Sending it back along with cancelling my order i had placed before the bag arrived of the side clip on bag that was $30!  Shame on the people who imitate brands and advertise as real! : (  OH...I just called the phone number on the bag tag that said it was for Harley Davidson stores and the number it gave me was for ordering Lyposine!!??? ; ]  Amazon great as always and taking care of it. Title: Very thin Review: It is hard to have problems with zip ties, but I do have an issue with these. I had an entire bag of mystery cords that had entangled themselves like coat hangers do in dark closets. So, I sat myself down with the big bag, and a new plastic bin to bring some order to the chaos and bind up the cords. I had several sizes of zip ties with me to accomplish this task. The only black ties I had were these, so I know the issues I had were with these ties.

These are thinner than all the rest of my ties. Also, my others were made of nylon and were nice and strong. These black ties seemed to be more plastic than any nylon. They were a little harder to use, being a bit flimsy and much weaker than my other ties.

They did hold small cords together, but we're definitely cheaper and thinner. I would not buy these again.

Title: Arrived broken, but I fixed the clasp, and wore it
Review: The silver clasp was broken from the ring.  I fixed it as I wanted to wear it.

Title: Just what I needed!
Review: Love the colors, sturdy and non slip ( thru fingers). I cut off covers  to ear plug and charging outlet for easier access. This was purchased for my husband who has severe neuropathy in both hands.

Title: Gorgeous bonnet & scrunchie but not for fine short curly hair Review: I absolutely love the peacock color of this bonnet and scrunchie. The color is vibrant and attractive. The scrunchie works well and has a tight elastic. Unfortunately for me, the bonnet does not stay on my head even if I cinch the string in the back. I have short-to-medium fine curly hair and it will not stay on when I lay down. Otherwise this would be perfect. I suspect this will work very well for someone with thick curly hair.

The current price of $15.19 ($18.99 minus 20%) is competitive for one sleep bonnet and one scrunchie. Note the bonnet has a long shoelace-type tie in the back.

Title: Worthless crap
Review: Dang electric cord just simply broke off one day. Not thrilled with loading the charger either because the springs are to strong. Look elsewhere for a charger

Title: Gorgeous
Review: I absolutely love this dress

Title: Works!
Review: Work great had about 2 months and I’m super happy with it.

Title: Body Wash Is Hard to Wash Off Review: This NATURE BOX SENSITIVE SKIN BODY WASH (with 100% Cold Pressed Almond Oil, 13 Ounce) has a mild almond scent, and doesn’t irritate my sensitive skin. However, it goes on as a thick, slick layer that’s hard to wash off.

After I got the body wash off, I didn’t feel particularly clean (as I usually do after showering and applying soap, shower gel, or body wash). The scent is nothing to shout about; fortunately, the fragrance doesn’t hang around for hours.

I don’t care for this product, and will be discarding most of it.

Title: Why have I not known about this my whole life???
Review: Stretchy belt!!!! Why have I not known about this my whole life??? I hate hard belts and didn’t know there was an alternative until now. I won’t go back to old belts. I am curvy and yes I have a butt ... so the flexibility of this belt makes wearing jeans way more comfortable!! This belt bends and moves with your body! It also doesn’t have any specific holes so you can adjust this to ANY size and change it anytime you want! Feel great? Pull it tighter! Ate too much let it looser. It’s a very forgiving belt! :)

Title: Rips the hair if its too tangled; best on wet or already combed hair Review: This is a basic set of lightweight vent brushes. I prefer the one with the curve as it molds to my head and is good for blow drying. However, both rip out my hair if my hair is really tangled. It is best on wet hair or hair that is almost combed.

I love the feel of the handles on these brushes as they have a non-slip grip to them and feel as if there is a light silicone cover over each handle.

These brushes are cheaply made but functional. I do not feel this set is worth more than $5.99. At the current price of $10.99, it is way overpriced in my opinion. Although I like these brushes, their price and function with tangled hair is the reason my rating is 3 stars.

Title: photo project
Review: I bought these because I have/had 3 giant tubs of loose photos, negatives, film, etc from the ancient days when people actually used cameras and film.  I feel like I have protected these artifacts for my daughter who may find them amusing 50 years from now.  At least it's better than loose in a tub.  I also bought 3 ring binders to store them all in.  Hope I don't have to do that ever again. :)

Title: Not very comfortable
Review: The shape is good up top but sleeves are not tight. It's look nice but it's not very soft even have washing a couple times. The zipper on the side it way too firm. Can't give this more than 3 starts because it's too scratchy.

Title: The warm beige is more for olive skin or a deep tan; also it does not spread easily on my face
Review: This warm beige is darker than I expected and will look better on a person with olive skin or a deep tan. It is too dark for my complexion. In addition, this make-up does not spread well. When I apply a foundation, I expect a smooth flow with my sponge and this did not provide that.

Title: does not moisturize
Review: Turn it 28 times to get a drop of oil, it looks tinted on the brush but doesn't show any color on lips. Each time I use it... have to turn it 4-6 times... there's not much product in there... my lips look shiny but still feels dry. I'm going to keep it just for the brush, to use with laneige lip sleeping mask.

Title: Comfortable,warm and true to size
Review: Great price and other reviews mentioned the buttons coming off but it appears they changed to elastic instead.They still look nice and I’m glad not to have to worry about losing buttons.Overall I would recommend!

Title: Nice lotions
Review: Very nice product, been using for a while. Don’t really see the difference but I like the way my skin feels.

Title: Bad quality
Review: The quality is so bad and they don’t charge my phone very fast.

Title: Disappointed!
Review: Totally disappointed in the ability to see my neck and chin area. The further from the center of the mirror the less clear the image is.

Title: plus size cami
Review: This cami runs SUPER large.  I read other reviews and tried to order a smaller size - but it is really huge.  It's meant to be loose - but the body of the cami is just huge. So if you're looking for a traditional cami fit - this is NOT the best option.  However, if you want to wear it on it's own - by itself - maybe.  It's too bulky to wear under something - as the photo shows.  The bra section was just too loose for me too.

Review: The screen protector didn’t stick as it should. The case is fine. So now I have a brand new iPad without a screen protector. SMH

Title: Returning it
Review: I brought a 3x. Iam usually a 16/18. 44DDD , 240lbs. It did fit but I didn’t like the way it looked on me. I don’t usually like the way crew necks fit on my girls, but I liked it so much I wanted to take a chance. Sadly it just wasn’t for me and I will be returning it. I think I would have preferred a more cropped top, or a zippered jacket, and the waist band on the bottom of the jacket removed. Also, the patches on the legs differently. Where they are currently just wasn’t flattering on me. I think something can fit but still not look good on your body and that’s important as well. I think just because it is in a bigger size, doesn’t mean it will be flattering on curvy bodies.

Title: Good sound, noise cancelling.
Review: I actually prefer the regular AirPods.  With the pros there is almost too much noise cancelling.  I also hate that you can’t tap to skip or make adjustments.  The thing u have to do with pros is moser difficult and not as effective.

Review: I love this soap, it’s the only one that doesn’t irritate my skin or nose. I order it all the time. This is the very first time I’ve ordered it where the bottles arrived without a seal on each bottle and because of that oversight, there is leakage. Waiting on the vendor to address the issue of the leaking bottles. These are top dollar now (as I use to buy them at the dollar store), so I expect more from vendors with their packaging and shipping practices. At $3.90 a bottle, this is ridiculous.

Personally, this does not suit my fair complexion. In order to wear this effectively, I have to mix it with other lip colors. The picture on Amazon looks very inviting and a bit shimmy; however, in person it is nothing but a flat boring shade.

Title: Absolutely Horrible
Review: These were so bad....I think they were sewn backwards.

Title: Small mesh buff puff with no hanging ribbon; still creates copious suds Review: Mesh buff puffs are the only thing I use in the shower besides a back brush. I love them because they generate a lot of suds and they provide good coverage during showering. This is a SMALL and NOT a LARGE one. I can get larger at Walmart for $2 each. 

This still works like any other mesh loofah I regularly use. However, another issue I have with this one is that it has no hanging loop. This is a first for me. All puffs come with a loop but this one does not.

The current price of $5.19 is insane for this. I took off one star for the lack of loop, one star for the small size, and one star for the crazy price in its current condition.

Title: Perfect

Title: Don't buy!!!

Title: Comfortable leggings but dislike the lettering & top rolls down periodically Review: When I first put this on, the lettering (which says "Rezag Rats") that is on the side of the left leg was stuck together. I actually had to pry it apart because it was like the letters melted onto themselves. Lucky it was not damaged. Nevertheless, I have no idea what that saying means.

These yoga pants are very comfortable. They did roll down periodically at the waist. They wash well inside out but I hang dry them. If they did not have this nonsensical lettering and the waist did not roll down periodically, I would have rated these 5 stars.

Title: cushy and comfortable

They fit a bit differently than usual ear bud so takes a bit of getting used to.  Time will tell! Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful!

Title: Great arch support.

Title: Great to soften skin and keep it supple; balm smells like tire rubber
Review: The product label says this is good for cuts, tattoo care, and can be used for everyday moisture. I agree that this is good for the skin in general. The first ingredient is shea butter. It is a solid stick like underarm deodorant. It is hydrating and is great to quench the skin of cracked elbows and heels. This is not only good for tattoo care. A little goes a long way and rubs in easily on my skin as well as absorbs quickly. Unfortunately, the balm smells like tire rubber to me and I really do not like that. This is the only reason I took off two stars. The current price of $11.06 ($11.89 minus 7%) for a 2.6-ounce tube is competitively priced.

Title: Smell is too much
Review: It's a nice soap and I'm sure it cleans well, but the smell is completely overpowering. Would not order again.

Title: mink oil soap
Review: My Mom is a huge fan of mink oil soap and swears by it.  She particularly loves this brand. When she mentioned it longingly a few weeks ago, I was thrilled to find it on Amazon and that it is still "locally" (in our state of Oregon) produced.  It is a nice soap, moisturizes, but is not sticky, lathers mildly and rinsing completely.  It has a very light, clean fragrance. We shared these around because 12 bars of soap is a lot.  :)  If you haven't tried it, don't be afraid.  If you have sensitive, dry skin, this may be a comfort to you.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  They arrived quickly and in good condition - I have prime.

Title: its ok - no biggy
Review: seems like a nice soap but i don't see any big changes in my skin

Title: I can get this to come on
Review: I can get it to come on and the light comes on. It looks great. I cannot get it to connect to my phone to use it as a speaker.  I tried different ways. I will try my husband's phone soon and see if it works with the iphone. I cannot get it to work with my android, which is very unusual.

Then yesterday when I took it out to wear, it was already too late to return so, the earbuds keeps on falling out my ears and whenever I try to put the earbuds back into my ear while I am in a call, it cancels the call which is VERY ANNOYING. Yesterday was the first time wearing the earbuds for a "long time", the battery life is not that good, I wore it for about 10 minutes and the earbuds just shuts off.

Title: Works great. Review: This leaves my hair very moisturized the entirety of the day, which is rare for my dry hair. I would highly recommend it. It smells Wonderful as well. I just wish it was a Smidge cheaper as the bottle is small.

UPDATE 11-29:After just 11 days, using this only once a day in my box braids (small head), I am more than half way through this bottle. It is much too pricey. The bottle needs to be bigger.

However, this makes a great travel set (I packed mine for my husband on a recent trip to California) and for less than $6, it would also make a good stocking stuffer for the holidays.

Title: Nice Wallet, but limited space and no change pouch
Review: This is a very thin and quite attractive wallet that appears to be all leather.  The quality looks good.  This only holds about 6 credit cards and one ID; that's okay if that's all you have or less.  The RFID feature is a big plus, because apparently these days they have equipment that can read your credit card information just by walking by and aiming at your pocket. The RFID prevents this.  I have always liked wallets that included a change pouch, but this one doesn't have it.  I only gave it 3 stars because of the limited number of cards you can carry in it and the lack of a place for change.  This might be ideal for you if you want a credit card only wallet with the RFID protection.

Title: great value, but felt a little tight around the head
Review: definately built to withstand some pull and push.  The ear piece felt somewhat too tight and that meant you will feel a little 'sweaty' after using it for more than15 minutes.  Can you feel the discomfort: yes.  The positive side is that it has a very good grip!  We bought it purely to hear better and it did just that; recipients also heard us clearly.  Great to use for any VOIP software.  We also used it with the rosetta software: works well.

Title: Shorts
Review: They cute.

Title: Creamy & moisturizing; leaves skin silky; do not care for aroma Review: I have a lot of scars and am always moisturizing. I used scar cream before and they just moisturize the area to make the skin look better but are no different than any other good moisturizer.

This is very creamy and hydrating and leaves my skin silky. Unfortunately, I do not care for the aroma. The current price of $19.99 is also pricey for 3.53 ounces. If it had a great fragrance, I would have rated this 4.5 to 5 stars even at that price.

Title: No software support, uncomfortable
Review: Great sound,  noise cancelation, and look. Other than that, another company purchased jaybird, and they stopped updating the software for the earbuds and case. The fit is also not the best for me personally. Tried the large and medium wing fins, but both made my ears bleed for some reason. Small wing fins didn't feel like they would stay in. All in all, I'd say purchase at your own risk.

I only gave 4 stars because I still miss Frieda Sea Salt Spray which they don't make anymore.  However, this is my new go to so if you have to have an alternative, this would be it.

Title: Great nail polish, perfect for me. Really builds strength in nails!
Review: This is the perfect color for my nails and has the added benefit of being a nail strengthener as well. I use two coats with every manicure. Makes my nails look natural ( this is not a bright pink, but goes on very light) and helps strengthen their typically fragile consistency. I have notice a marked improvement in my nails not splitting or cracking as much as they had. I highly recommend essie products for all nail care and this strengthener variety really works to help build strength in your nails to deter brittleness and breaking.

Title: In love with a face cream!

Highs and lows are way improved and the clarity is amazing. I highly recommend everyone who uses headphones to try an amplifier. For the price, this is an amazing improvement!

I super glued it a few times, but I gave up already.  Maybe the shoes were old and stored for a long time or something.  I don't know but next time ill just pay for the more expensive long lasting shoes from rocky or even new balance.

Title: Not Great and Not too Bad

And they can still catch your strands of hair on the tines.  So not happy about this, even with the low price.  They're made of plastic.  Probably a good grade of plastic, but when you're expecting to receive the item as described, there's only disappointment.  Hoping I can return these even though I opened one of them.  Big let down.

Title: Genuine Antenna Fail after 2 months
Review: I bought the Nagoya NA-771R.  Product received was genuine.  Not that mattered.  It was poorly constructed apparently a loose connection inside near the base.  I first noticed reception was a sporadically noisy.  But it was for transmit I really needed this antenna.  Last week I was transmitting but no one was hearing me. Well turns out it was an intermittent open circuit in the antenna.  I confirmed it with a multimeter.  Not sure if my radio was damaged I think protection circuitry or an overheat caused it to not actually transmit for long with no antenna load.  I'm past the Amazon return window of 30 days, so I'll contact baofengtech support (1 year warranty).

Title: Moisturizes & absorbs quickly; not crazy about the pump mechanism or smell
Review: This cream comes in a pump jar as shown. I press down on the top and then I use my fingers to apply even though this looks like a thick roll-on. The thick cream goes on easily and absorbs quickly. My face and neck felt moisturized. However, I do not care for the chemical scent of the cream nor the pump. I prefer jar creams I can dig my fingers into. I also feel the $40.99 price tag is outrageous even though this supposedly has SPF 30 in it. Since it is winter here, I have no idea how well the SPF works.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Zipper doesn't stay up and these just fit weird.

Title: Too large to wear - had to alter
Review: Needed for party

Title: Way Too Big
Review: Like with several other cheap pair of tennis shoes I've ordered, these are way too big. They're not constructed very well either but I only needed these to work around in the yard. I suggest if you purchase these shoes that you order an entire size down!

Title: Too small
Review: Run way small, so order AT LEAST 1 size up. Go 1.5 up of you plan to wear with socks.

Title: Don't bother
Review: No light??? This is insane in today's market. I'll give this away and the so called touch screen reeks. Too pricey for lackluster performance

Title: Hate it
Review: Absolutely garbage

Title: These are not Goody scrunchies Review: Ordered these because I needed new scrunchies. The ad shows a Goody product. These are not a Goody product which I received, but some cheap knock-off.

They only stretch to about half the span of a Goody hair scrunchie and are very thick. I can only wrap it twice around a ponytail comfortably and it is too loose, but for a tough & tight third wrap it does hold hair securely.

It gets a 1 star for false advertising, however, because I thought I was purchasing a Goody product such as its ad and title claims and it's a lie. These are low quality and a non-branded product (no name on them).

Title: Two Stars
Review: not as good as the BTH240

Title: Lightweight but not sturdy
Review: Definitely comfortable and light weight but it feels a little flimsy. Worried about durability.

Title: Four Stars
Review: This wireless router makes it very convenient to use my mobile devices.

Title: Don't waste your money
Review: These are garbage.  Fabric came away from elastic after one wash.

Title: A must have for every household!
Review: Nothing like having a pandemic strike your community and it turns out that after months in quarantine the men in your life desperately need a haircut and nothing is open. This hair clipper set is great. I had my two grandsons visiting several weeks ago and luckily I had just received this. Easily (and this is coming from someone who has never cut hair before) maneuverable, this trimmer fits ergonomically in your hand and makes cutting a breeze (even on a wiggly 3 year old). After I was done both the boys, and their mom, told me how great the hair turned out. My daughter-in-law even joked that she is going to bring them back next month for a trim (and I lovingly told her it would be my pleasure). This clipper has lots of changeable parts to assure you can cut accurately and easily. I highly recommend!

Title: Okay to use around the house but they look like $30 shoes
Review: Not what I expected

Title: Fire stick
Review: I gave up a Roku device for the Firestick and I'm not all that impressed.  The Roku is much more user friendly and gives all the options that Firestick does.  Although the Firestick does offer apps that Roku doesn't .

Title: Break within few weeks
Review: Keep buying these and keep regretting it. They break within a week or two. Not even worth it- the adapter just breaks and although cord is supposed to be durable it immediately bends and doesn’t work.

Title: Size all wrong.
Review: XL is more like S.

Title: Don't Buy
Review: This is hands down the worst HDMI cable I have ever used. Not only is it the worst HDMI cable I have ever used but arguably the worst purchase I have ever made and worst product I have ever used. The locking mechanism is faulty at best. Upon my first use of this product the cable got stuck in my HDMI input for my laptop. I had to completely break the product down to the connector to free it from my laptop. Terrible product. I would not recomend this to anyone who cares for any of their electronic devices. DO NOT BUY THIS PRODUCT.

Title: Cool for summer , a square bulky shape better tucked in. Review: I ordered this in a medium in blue. The blue is a nice color.
I’m 5’2, 125 lbs, not stocky.
This will be cool for the summer to wear around the house.

There is no shape to this top, but a square shape and it’s not flattering unless it’s tucked in.
It’s long on me, so that’s allot of bulky fabric to tuck in, with those little puffy balls.

Clothes coming from China are All different sizes then they say they are, it’s getting harder
to order.
Colors shows up true to what they show.

Title: Great merchandise!
Review: Great shirt. I love the design. Fast delivery. Very good quality.

Title: Not a responsive company
Review: I only received 2 of the 3....I contacted the seller by email as prompted to....but I received no answer back from them. That's their loss in the long run....

Title: Cleans well and has a decent lather but color does come off in shower Review: There are three bars of soap in this package.  It smells as it should like active carbon which reminds me of the smell of a goldfish water filter I used to use years ago. The lather is decent but not copious and it cleans well. The soap is relatively easy to hold as it is not too large or small of a bar.

Unfortunately, because the bar is black it does turn my shower water black and I do not care for that. As a result, I am using this as a hand soap now.

The current price of $15 comes to a reasonable $5 per bar.

Title: Material not soft and flowing, not any give, but a cute print Review: Out of the package this baby doll top looked cute.
The print is good looking.
But then when I tried it on it fit strange!

The material felt a bit stiff, not flowing, this did fit at first, but once on the shoulders where tight when I tried to stretch my arms forward .
The front came up high, and tight under the bust, and the baby part made me look pregnant, not a good look for me.
This is a small, but maybe a medium would have fit better! Although I can wear a small comfortable l
I’m 5’2, wear a size 8 to a 10..130 lbs or less.

Title: barely ok
Review: Very thin... nearly see through... could be used as undershorts but they are questionable otherwise... won't be buying this mesh type again.

Title: Great Gloves!
Review: I bought these gloves because my office was freezing and my fingers were so cold.  They worked perfectly.  I was able to type and use my kindle and cell phone with them on!  I highly recommend these gloves.

Title: Great headsets
Review: Great headsets. Comfortable. Great sound quality.

Title: Should be better
Review: Poorly implemented design and capacity. It falls off easily. It’s too slick making it hard to pick up. It heats up the phone while it’s trying to charge the phone—not good for phone battery life. Overall this idea is a failure and there is no good Apple battery case for newer phones.

Title: Extra heavy duty zip ties Review: Husband needed these to attach a netting to a tree. Worked perfectly. Zip ties are useful for a lot of things and sometimes you need a REALLY big one. These are it.

Title: ****UPDATED FEEDBACK**** NOT RECOMMENDED. Review: *****UPDATE*****
I have to change this from 4 stars to 1 because it is no longer working. Since it's not reliable, I cannot recommend this product any longer.

This is wonderful. I no longer need 3 keyboards and monitors. It was easy to hook up, saves space and time. I can control all 3 computers from one keyboard and mouse and see it all on one monitor. Worth the price for me. If you need more than one computer in your network this will save you money. All you need is one monitor, keyboard and mouse for up to 4 computers.

Title: Love these!
Review: Love them so much that I bought 3 more!  Comfy!  Has pockets that I love.  I wouldn’t say it’s a lot of tummy control but I think if they were super tight, I wouldn’t enjoy wearing them.

Title: Stopped working exactly a year later
Review: Good short term solution … stopped working in july 2021… one year and one month after purchase… have replaced the battery, ram and other parts… money wasted… Beware

Title: short sleeve mock neck t
Review: I was disappointed in the cheap feel of the fabric, but you get what you pay for.  The fit is VERY tight, so if you're my size of chest, their biggest size is too snug for my comfort (Me: 38E/F)  It is stretchy, but that makes it look even more snug in my opinion... I was rolling the dice I know... but it is not a top I would recommend unless you have a smaller chest area.  The curly edges of the neck and sleeves are not nearly as defined as shown in the photo, which, in my opinion, adds to cheap look.

Title: Uniden R7 radar detector
Review: I am on the fence about this detector.  First, it's HUGE.  And it makes a lot of noise.  I've turned it down 4 times... I need to figure out if I can get it to auto mute after a few beeps.  It talks... I do like that it tells you if the signal is coming from behind or in front of you - or even side to side.  That's interesting.  It comes with a really great window sucker attachment.  The cigarette lighter charger has a usb port on it and a mute button.  I do use the mute button a LOT.  The directions are SUPER lengthy and complicated - EH.  Like I said... I'm still reviewing my position about it.  Having said that..  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: No
Review: This was I’ll fitting and not good. It was too small and I’m returning it.

Title: A bit cheap
Review: Okay for the price. Clip, as most, is brittle. Suction cup sticks great to glass. Arm uses small screws. Standard GoPro accessories will work if the hole at the end of the am is enlarged. I'm looking elsewhere.

Title: Runs big, not a cuddley fleece. Review: This is not a Fleece cuddley sweatshirt. It is a stretchy heavy material.
I have a french terry sweatshirt, and it does not feel like this one!
This is stretchy,hangy, and runs big.
Zipper works good, large front kangaroo pockets.. nice size hood.

Title: Amazing sound from a small system!
Review: Powerful and attractive, the SC-AKX73 is an amazing table top stereo system. As other reviewers have stated, this is a 900 Watt system (according to the specs) and it is every bit as powerful as that. As an fyi, I have a living room in my home which actually has a two story ceiling in it, so lot's of open space. I only had this unit cranked about a third of the way and I can say the entire room was throbbing. Very, very nice and very impressed. Bass tones are amazing and highs can rival the more costly Bose systems. All in all, I highly recommend this system to anyone. For the price, you honestly cannot go wrong for the features and quality that the Panasonic brand brings.

Title: Smells great
Review: Smells great only complaint is this sunscreen is not sweatproof and burns eyes

Title: boys velcro sneakers
Review: These are fun with the flames, but I wish the chinese brand name would not have been across the velcro strap.  I would not buy they again because of that.  Fortunately grandson will quickly grow out of these and we can move on.

Title: Cute, but runs very small . Buy 3 sizes up at least. Review: This is a cute sweatshirt, although I don't know why this says it is for a girl! What is the difference of a boy or girl here?
Seems to be sewed good.
This is Not a French Terry. The outside is sweatshirt material.
I expected a warm soft fleece inside. It became soft after I wash it, but its not fleece, it is like a cotton knit inside.
Seemed warmer after washed and dryed with a dyer sheet.
After washing this it shrunk allot.. It now fits a slim tall 2 and a 4 yr old .

That said its cute, but if you order this , go at least 3 sizes bigger, even if it says Usa Sizing.

Giving this a 3 star cause it nice, but you cannot buy this by size. It runs so darn Small.
Taking two stars off for the very wrong sizing.

Title: Three Stars
Review: I prefer a full cover

Title: Sbicca thongs
Review: I used to wear sbicca brand sandals all the time when I was younger....  so these are a lower version of the platform versions I used to wear... the top thong is leather with a crystal strip in the center of each strap.... they are a little cushy... not overly so... the bummer is the leather strip between your toes... it is sharp and uncomfortable... I am going to try and "file" them a bit, particularly on the right shoe and see if that helps... otherwise, they are comfortable for wear only a few hours at most and not with a lot of walking. Also, I usually wear a size 9.  I highly recommend going up a full size... unless you're ok falling off the back of the shoe.  It's a shame because I love the look. FYI...I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info be useful.  Further,  I do not receive compensation of ANY kind for my reviews... my purchases are VERIFIED and full price.  100% independent purchases.  As are my reviews 100% my own and unbiased in any way. However, remember they are my opinions which may differ from yours.

Review: Did not work right after I plugged it in. I will have to return it. Maybe I just got a lemon.

Review: Not really what I wanted but it works ok.  Vinyl feel and doesn’t stand up very well but ok for Protecting the pad.

Review: I am not sure how much protection this provides - certainly less than a camera bag - but it will protect against scratches and small bumps. It's fairly thin. It fits my Canon EOS Rebel T6i w/ kit lens very well - like a glove.

Review: Thankful that I found a replacementremote for my tv

Review: The cable feels very solid and durable but I’ve noticed the charging speed to be significantly slower than my other cables. Would not recommend. In one hr it charges maybe 30-35% whereas the other cables (Amazon Basics or Apple) will easily get to 70%.

Title: Just Ok, Not My Favorite Fraco Sarto Shoes
Review: Definitely not my favorite pair of Franco Sarto shoes...they are just OK.

Title: Love this facial scrub brush!
Review: I have never tried Project E products, but I was in the market for a new facial scrub and I was anxious to try this. Using a scrub brush has been a routine beauty staple in my shower for the past 15 or so years. This is a really nice one. I have been using it daily with an exfoliating powder and my skin feels noticeably smoother and softer. So far, after 2 months of usage, still have not had to change batteries. I highly recommend this to everyone (men and women).

Title: Beautiful Purse
Review: Very nice. Great size. Middle compartment helps to keep everything organized.

Title: Get the TIVDIO V-111 instead Review: Sad Sony product. The only thing good about it is the sound. Poor antenna design. Poor tuning, reception, drift and the tuning gauge isn't accurate.
For the same price, you can get the TIVDIO V-111 (it was the VITE VT-111) here on Amazon. It's digital display is accurate, size is about the same, auto-scan, nice antenna, clock, uses 2 AAs, reception is exceptional and doesn't just get AM & FM but LW and shortwave, too. Solidly built. Only drawback is the Sony's sound is a bit better.
For the $, get the TIVDIO V-111. Much better radio with more bells and whistles.

UPDATE : Added a star because of the sound. Once you work around the quirks it's not a bad little radio. Reception isn't the greatest, but for local stations it's adequate. Wish Sony would would look at the V-111 and upgrade to digital display, etc. I'd pay extra for it.

Title: Fragrant steamers when dry but not when wet; lasted entire shower & left no stains Review: There are eight (8) shower steamers (sweet orange, peppermint, rose, lavender, lemon, vanilla, grapefruit, and eucalyptus) in this package. They all smell nice, although they do not smell as I expect.

I tried the rose one in my shower and made sure to put it away from the full stream of water at first. After a few minutes in the shower of being outside a direct stream of water, hardly any scent was generated so I put it almost in a direct stream of water. It dissolved in about 7 minutes and the fragrance was good until I started washing with my fragrant soap which overpowered the scent of the steamer.

One thing I love is that it did not stain my tub. The pink color just washed away.

The current price of $19.99 comes to $2.50 per steamer. This is overpriced and the performance is just okay. I tried [[ASIN:B09PTC1SPH these]] steamers, which may be the exact same but are cheaper.

Title: Nice adapter but it will fail with vibration!
Review: I purchased this "GoTough" 90 degree adapter directly from Fotodiox.  This idefinitely does NOT measure up to other "GoTough" adapters. I had the same vibration problem where the four mounting screws came loose.  The screws are the size of eye glasses screws so trying to tighten them and getting them to stay tight is futile.  If you use this adapter on anything with vibration, do NOT buy this adapter, you will regret it.  The other Fotodiox adapters are much better than quality than this adapter.

Title: Mistake
Review: Pain in the butt to assemble and not that comfortable at all. Items like furniture should be seen and experienced in person. Big mistake to order by reviews or pictures that don't accurately depict the item

Title: Wonderful miracle hair regrowth product!!!
Review: I always remember my ex-husband using Rogaine years ago and I used to laugh at how vane he was, lol, to want to grow hair back. Well, I find myself now using Rogaine. I am using it on my eyebrows (my salon hairdresser had recommended it since I am getting older and my eyebrows were thinning). Although it's not recommended for contact that close to the eyes I have been very, very careful to use limited amounts and that none of it 'leaks' down. I love the foam application, it makes it simple to apply. As others have mentioned it has minoxidil which does have it's side effects, so carefully consider before using. I have started to see some growth in areas of my brows where no hair had been coming in for years now. I think this is great and will most likely not be using this for the full 4 month supply. I will update this again as I use it longer some time next month to see if it continues to work as well as I think it will.

Title: Tights
Review: Tights are a must in my life.  Nice and toasty.  I attribute them to keeping me alive in the winter.  Thanks.  I love ‘em.

Title: Luxury feel, sound quality can be improved Review: I bought these for my mom and me. She likes the old fashioned in line earbuds.
First glance and feel, they have a nice feel and the material is durable. I like the magnet that holds the earbuds together. Its a decent case to hold everything together.
Sounds quality is not as impressing. The noise cancelation is not truly noise canceling. Phone calls are not very clear and microphone doesn't make me sound clear. Music is not the best if you like heavy bass songs.
For the price I expected a little more.

Title: Highly recommend
Review: I can not remember the short cuts, this has helped a lot. It also washes off easy.

Title: I love La Roche - always delivers quality!
Review: Another wonderful product from  La Roche-Posay. Goes on light and smooth, perfect to apply after a shower and prior to makeup. I have always loved La Roche, it used to only be available from dermatologists but now you can buy the product everywhere. I love the UV protection as well as it is non-greasy (as most UV products are). Might be a little over priced, but most La Roche is, then again you do get what you pay for. A little goes a long way with this tube, will last a few months.

Review: I had high expectations for the BOOM 💥 products. I looked awful with it on my face. Someone even thought I looked sick… and then I noticed that i broke out with pimples…. At my age. I wont be buying any more. Red Dye? It’s horrible. The best thing about this is the little pouch but it’s not worth 80 bucks.

Review: Not a good purchase. These are very very heavy and the shape is not as described. They are shaped like Hersey kisses. But, the main problem is the weight. What were they thinking? They are going back.

Review: I don't like that the side slits go all the way up.  It makes it kind of bunch up on the side when sleeping.  I would have preferred for them to be sewn down at least part way. It's on the thinner side, but comfortable.

Title: This is a great gift set!!!!
Review: This gift set is a steal at under $25. It contains deep moisture body wash, deodorant dry spray, Intensive Repair Shampoo, Intensive Repair Conditioner, Macadamia and Rice Milk Body Polish and a loofah. If you were to purchase all of these separately you would run over $40. I love the way my skin feels after using these in the shower and part of my morning routine for the past month now. I particularly love the body polish. I highly recommend and can say with the boxing, this would make a fantastic present for the holidays. Highly recommend!

Review: Its easy to set up and works well,on the negative side remote to small, hard to read the buttons. I need a small flash light but maybe in time I will get used to it. Just got today

The clasp is clumsy and the necklace fell off my neck three times in three hours.  I didn't lose it because it dropped into my lap each time but it made me wary of wearing it.  Disappointed.

Review: Item received exactly as described.

Title: Very nice shorts
Review: Very good fit, comfortable,, and price was right!

Title: Cleans well but left my curly hair dull & flat; stings eyes
Review: I have short to medium-fine curly hair. I used this in the shower and accidentally got this into my eyes and it stings. Nevertheless, it washes and lathers well. However, I hate the way it left my hair looking after letting it air dry. My hair looked dull and my curls were flat. This definitely does not work for me.

Title: This is more like a summer body lotion with an antique scent Review: This is only lightly moisturizing and the scent reminds me of an antique shop; old and musty but not totally in a bad way. The fragrance is from my grandmother's time in the early 1900's.

The moisturizer sinks in almost immediately and leaves smooth lightly softened skin behind. If the scent wasn't so nostalgic, I'd like this as a summer lotion because it is non-greasy and has no stickiness to it.

Title: Trackball
Review: Like the wireless feature but this trackball takes some time to get use to. There are some issues getting use to the location of the index finger but with some practice it works OK.

Title: hard shell travel case for hair tools
Review: Got this to "house" a small roller type stick and flat iron.. a couple of rat tail combs and a small can of hairspray for my Mom's short hair.  It fits nicely under her sink and is easy to grab. It fits the standard length instruments perfectly. It's lined with a soft, fuzzy material - an elastic band on side keeps your tools in place and the other side has a handy mesh flap perfect for combs, etc. I great zipper keeps everything where it needs to be and then... a super handy handle.  I am very, very happy with this purchase as it fit my needs so well.  I will, of course, update my review should new info seem useful.

Title: Great colorful swim trunks!
Review: These are a very nice, quality made swimming trunks. My 36 year old son son (5'8" waist size 32) fits into these perfectly, they are the right length and he couldn't be happier with them. He actually told me he wears them not only for swimming but even if he is doing some kind of outdoor activity because they fit and look so good. Highly recommend these LTIFONE brand boardshorts/swimming trunks.

Title: NOT WHAT IT SAYS

Title: Only unscented that works all day
Review: This is very hard to find in stores, so I get it here. It is the only unscented deodorant/ antiperspirant that works. It is completely unscented, and does not bother sensitive skin.

Title: Love the bath salts and foaming bath; eye mask is too tight and it's not adustable Review: I love the smell of roses and that is what this set reminds me of. This set contains four items and they are 16 ounces of Rose Scented Epsom salt bath salts, 5.7 ounces of foaming bath, 1 ounce of rose potpourri, and one attractive pink eye mask.

I love the bath salts and the foaming bath. The fragrance is great. However, the eye mask is not adjustable and just constricts around my eyes which is bothersome. The dried rose petals are okay but not fragrant.

The current price of $15.83 ($19.79 minus 20%).
