Title: Lacks Enough Support
Review: By appearances, this is a beautiful bra. I realize that this is actually a bralette for larger busted women as opposed to a bra. My 18 year old daughter loves bralettes, me, not so much. I found that it lacks enough support. It felt like I was wearing a sleeping bra. After a few hours, I switched to a regular bra because it just didn't feel right. With all that being said, it's a beautiful bra. I love the color. The fit was fine and it was comfortable. I just need more support.

Title: Better products out there Review: This camera is nice but there are better Network cams at the same price point. It took several tries before I was able to setup the camera successfully.

Pros
- Looks nice. Doesn’t look like most Network cameras.
- Magnetic dish allows you to set the camera at different angles.
- Wide Angle camera. 1080p picture is clear.
- Night Vision.

Cons
- Should be easier to setup.
- No reset button on the camera. You have to plug and unplug the device 4 times to reset it (and it doesn’t always work.
- iOS app not updated to support iPhone X.

Title: From riches to rags in one easy step
Review: If you buy this beauty, DO NOT WASH IT!  Air it out, but keep it dry.  I washed exactly according to the label, but it was a goner, earning it a place in the donations box.  Sigh.  It was so beautiful.

Title: It works for an Acer Aspire V
Review: The best charger that I've found to replace the one that came with my Aspire V. Acer has an issue with the port for the charger that can sometimes cause the cord to be loose and fall out. This charger stays in, charges quickly and the cord is very long. Absolutely worth the money.

Title: Good customer service
Review: The stickers are an okay quality. I’m not over the moon about them but they do adhere to glass well. It will take some time to see how they hold up. The customer service from this company is very good and that is important to me as a buyer.

Title: Good to have coverage
Review: You just never know

Title: Disappointed
Review: I bought this for the usual reasons but the remote does not work.

Title: Not recommended. Review: Didn't do anything to my hair. My hair isn't thick. It's more on the thin-mid size thickness.

Tried it on different hair thicknesses and it really didn't make any noticeable difference.

Not recommended.

Title: Returned
Review: Simply put, this should have supported Bluetooth, and while manufacturers are still using proprietary systems to connect is beyond me. Since this was intended for an Android tablet, this was returned for the simple fact it will not support Bluetooth.

Title: Design makes extracting coins difficult & zipper is sticky; there's room for 4 credit cards Review: I am not crazy about the design of this slick leather coin purse. The purse is longer than a regular wallet. The zipper is also very sticky. When I put coins in this, the dimes get stuck in the corners and it is hard to extract the coins. On the back side of the purse are slots for four credit cards or IDs which is a nice feature. It does come in a giftable box.

In summary, I like that this is leather and that it has room for four credit cards. However, I do not like that sometimes the zipper is sticky and that fact that the coins get stuck in the pointed corners. I wish I had not ordered this as it does not suit my needs.

Title: Fair value
Review: Bought for a gift - poor seams for jacket type style.

Title: Shiny lips for sure!
Review: I have been using these for almost a month now. I really do love the way my lips look when using this, beautiful and shiny. I deducted a star because I didn't notice any kind of plumping factor on my lips (I have very thin lips). But, honestly, the shininess made up for the lack of plumping. I also have to say I needed to reapply a lot more often than other lip glosses, this absorbs very quickly into the lips. Highly recommend if you are looking for a real shiny lip appearance.

Title: Three Stars
Review: This bead is a composite.  One of the beads had a small chip, so was out of round.

Title: Spacious toiletry bag but not high quality Review: This men's toiletry bag is spacious and attractive. However, this is not high quality. I personally do not feel the zippers will last. Also, there is white glue outside the gusset on my bag (see photo).

There are three compartments. The central compartment has three folder pockets on one side and three elastics on the other and then a cavernous inside. There is also one zippered compartment on both sides of the central compartment with elastics, folder compartments or zippered compartments as shown in my photos.

The zippers mostly glide easily but feel cheap. One zipper sticks a bit. The bag is large enough to hold a full size can of shave cream, full size deodorant, full size tube of toothpaste, toothbrush, and other incidentals with a little room to spare. There is a sturdy carry handle on top.

In summary, this is just an okay PU leather (fake leather) toiletry bag. The current price of $17.09 ($17.99 minus 5%) is on the high side of competitively priced for this.

Title: Can’t open it
Review: I DONT know if I would like this or not because neither I nor my husband could get it open!

Title: snowflake headband
Review: It looks very different in person.  The snowflakes are material and don't lay flat.  A few are crinkled and the edges stand up.  Disappointing.  I tried several things including a light steam.  It is comfortable to wear, but wish the snowflakes laid flat.

Title: Functional but cheap quality
Review: This mirror was smaller than I initially expected but it will fit in a suitcase easily.  The overall quality is a bit on the cheap side but it will be better than not having a shower mirror when I travel.  I purchased the large version of this mirror from Hammacher for $50 and it was also cheaply made.  Hammacher offers a lifetime warranty so if it ever breaks (falls off shower wall), I can get it replaced free of charge.  If the larger mirror did not have a lifetime warranty, I wouldn't pay more than $20 for it.

Title: Order a Size or Two Up
Review: This is a very cute swimsuit, but unfortunately it runs very small. I'm wear a size 16/XL in most clothing and a D-cup. I always order a size up in swimsuits. This is more than 1 size larger and it still doesn't fit. I have another swimsuit in the same size from the same manufacturer and it fits. It fit my torso, but I it wouldn't cover my chest area at all.  I love the fabric print. The swimsuit itself is made well. The back is darling! Overall, I am disappointed in the fit.

Title: Decent
Review: It’s alright, seems to scratch easily and the sizing doesn’t seem to be true. But it will work for now.

Title: MEN'S WATCH
Review: This was a Father's Day present and it stopped the same day it was given.  I was not at all impressed with this and will be sending it back tomorrow.

Title: Nothing like the stock photo. Buyer beware!
Review: Cute but looks nothing like the product photo. Could not give as a gift as the quality was terrible. I’ve purchased make up bags at Dollar Tree better quality than this.

Title: Although this has slight heel and ball of foot cushioning, this is an average crew sock to me Review: I purchased a 3-pair pack of these copper fit crew socks in both [[ASIN:B01BJNSRE2 black]] and [[ASIN:B01BJNSRAG white]] because I have been trying many socks that have cushioning in the heel. Each 3-pair pack was $9.88 at Walmart.

I have plantar fasciitis and find that wearing socks with heel cushioning in addition to using [[ASIN:B00J1FOOVQ Dr. Scholl's DreamWalk Hidden Arch Supports]] in my shoes are one of the many things that are helping reduce and even eliminate my pain. Originally, I purchased [[ASIN:B00W470PRU Thorlos Unisex Micro Mini-Crew Socks, Spearmint, Small]] because they are very cushioned; however, they are also extremely expensive.

These copper fit socks have some cushioning on both the ball and heel of the foot, but overall I'm not impressed with them. For me, it's worth buying the Thorlos over these because I found their sock to be thicker in the heel. Even if I didn't have plantar fasciitis, I still would not rave about these as they are average quality and nothing special.

Title: individual false eyelashes
Review: Eh.  The knot at the base is too big for my taste.  Everyone likes something different and so if they work for you, great!

Title: too small
Review: runs a little small so i am not able to wear it yet - but is seems well made and is good quality

Title: Great for skin- Smells like salad dressing
Review: Grape seed oil is VERY good for your skin and this is excellent quality. Just be prepared to smell a little like Italian salad dressing. That’s what it reminds me of when I put it on but that’s because it is pure. Beauty doesn’t always smell good (pure vitamin C is another example) . If it smells like oranges, you didn’t get the right kind. You bought a product loaded with fragrance.

Title: Runny Cleanser
Review: This is a bit too runny for my taste, leaks out instead of squeezing out.  Also seems a bit drying, won’t reorder.

Title: Steer clear if you’re tall
Review: This sizing on this dress is just nuts. I bought the dark blue and red in size XL. I’m 5’10” and typically in a size 16/18. I was able to physically get the dress on, but that’s it. The buttons ended way too high up, right at crotch level and the arms were very tight. If you’re tall or have a long torso, I don’t see this working for you. The length and overall style was awkward as well, this would only look cute on someone who is petite with a smaller frame

Title: casual/lots of compartments
Review: Great alternative purse for a day out playing, when I don't want to use my LV and get robbed.

Title: No
Review: This sunscreen is very moisturizing and lightweight but it smells like old mens aftershave. The smell didn’t start to dissipate until a half hour after application and into my workout. Another half hour later after my workout and being sweaty, I could still faintly smell it. I was only using this to wear during workouts in the am, so ai don’t waste my good sunscreen, but it’s not worth it. The good qualities do not outweigh the bad. I will be returning it. Try Supergoop mineral sunscreen if you are looking for one.

Title: What's not to love about this amazing shower gel
Review: This is a great deal on this multi-pack of marula oil shower gel. I sometimes have trouble finding this in the store but never on Amazon. I get it for a better price on Amazon as well. It's my favorite go to shower gel. The scent is great and it hydrates my skin.

Title: I just do not like the scent of these soaps.
Review: I wanted a smoothing moisturizing hand soap.  This does that.  I wanted a scent I would love.  The citrus did not smell like fresh citrus of any kind but more like it rotted.  The Lavender similarly had no particular lavender oder and even smells unpleasant.  I am discarding these and I already purchased a new bottle of lavender hand soap from a company I trust.  Fingers crossed.

Title: boys underwear
Review: Purchased for my 9 and 11 year grandson.  Washed and dried nicely AFTER I got the right size - run super big apparently - even though I carefully read through the sizing info. My boys are average size, not super small or large - sized down one full size for both - dropped 2 stars for the hassle and cost of replacement. Donated the ones too large. Having said this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Difficult to set up at first but after is a great watch
Review: I like the size of this watch and the display and functionality features. I am deducting a point for set up. I had a heck of a time trying to get it to pair with my phone's bluetooth. I did look out here to research it and looked at the only one star review and saw someone had the same problem. After about 20 minutes pf putzing around with this, I did get it to pair (no idea how it happened, it just magically did). Anyway, now that it is working, I really like it and am wearing it daily. Great way to track my movements.

Title: Great little trimmer!
Review: Compact, efficient and does the job. Rating it as a 4 star simply because as it pertains to using in nostrils, the head tip seems to be big (for me anyway), for others it might work well. I will not use if for this any more. Instead, as an eyebrow trimmer, and even for ear hairs, this works well. I love the lightweight design, it's great for taking with you when you travel. Uses a AAA battery.

Title: Not a good value
Review: I ended up cancelling this order. Not a good value.

Title: Brocato hair spray
Review: Bought these for my Mom... she is not a huge hairspray user, so this travel size makes the best sense - takes up less space and will last a long time for as little as she uses it.  I will update my review if new info would seem useful... and as she lets me know what she thinks.

Title: Nothing special
Review: Nothing special but at 4 bucks well worth it.  These are not 4 pin and are quite loud at full speed.  I doubt I will buy more, I do prefer the higher quality fans available.

Title: Skin feels soft, but blotchy tan. Review: First I want to say I’m fair skin, so you can get a idea of how this worked for me.

When I just came out of the shower, , and the first time I used this, I put Allot on my hands.
Rubbed on my legs, and body, and arms.
My skin felt very moisturized, and soft.
That night I looked at my legs and the tan is Very Un-even, and dark. I have used tanners before, but not when
my body was wet, , and I have never had a uneven tan before!
I thought I rubbed Jergens natural glow wet skin moisturizer/ Tanner very good into my skin,
but its hard to really tell where its going cause I was so wet.
The bottle sits on it's top which makes it difficult to put down , and close the lid when you just put this on your hands to rub in.
This tanner is Medium-Tan, and wow I’m tan just using it one time from my knees down, but
not on the rest of my body.
I think when I try this again, (if I do) I will dry my self off, then wet my hands and not use so much.
The color has a very lite orange color to it, and a scar on my leg is now darker, and off color.

Title: Takes 90 seconds to dry but leaves my hands clean after use; fragrance is weird Review: There is one 2 fluid ounce flip cap tube of gel hand sanitizer in this package. This sanitizer takes about 90 seconds to dry but leaves my hands feeling clean. I personally do not care for the fragrance as it is a weird smell that I cannot describe. Also, this does not feel moisturizing.

The active ingredient is benzalkonium chloride 0.1%.

I really like the portability of this tube but do not care for the product itself. At the current price of $5.99 comes to $3 per ounce which is very pricey.

Title: This. Is. Purple. Review: So as someone who has used a blue shampoo before, I concur with other reviews that say this isn't blue. Its. Not. Blue. Its definitely violet/purple.

That being said, it doesn't work as well as some other purple 'poos. It doesn't seem to be too drying but also doesnt really give the results some of the others do after a few uses.

Title: shorts out
Review: Shorts out for about 5 seconds every 5 minutes or so. Not a huge deal but kind of annoying.

Title: Don't Care For It Review: I'm not in love with my Kindle Paperwhite. The size is nice and the battery life is pretty good. But I don't care for the black and white only, though I do understand the purpose of it. I have SO many issues with the touch screen. MANY times it doesn't work at all and I must reboot. Downloads take longer than normal. I don't like the setup either. I sometimes have a hard time finding certain books.

There are times I wish my Kindle Fire wasn't so old and outdated so I could go back to using it.

Overall, I'm not impressed

Title: Two Stars
Review: Did not work well. I did not return it, because it is a hassle.

Title: I love these holiday socks!
Review: These are super cute holiday socks. I will be wearing them several times this year during the holiday season as they are so festive! Colorful, quality made. warm and will look great whether I am going to a holiday party or just to jazz up my walk with the dog. They don't roll down and fit great. Highly recommend!

Title: Some ugly colors
Review: Only 4 good colors the others I would never wear , cheaper to just buy separately

Title: Not sharp enough to cut smoothly.
Review: These are extremely dull and will wreck your nails. They were not sharpened apparently.  It’s a complete waste of money, but luckily Amazon refunded me.

Title: Too small!
Review: These pants are at least two sizes too small. I bought them one size bigger so they'd be baggy, which I prefer, but when they arrived, they were way too small. I know I haven't gained weight, so I have to say the pant run at least two sizes too small, or they were mislabeled. I have to return them.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Works great. Easy to install.

Title: One Star Review: Terrible did not work on 7+ IOS.
Slow not intuitive

Title: Almost like being at the movies
Review: This is nice. Great sound.

Title: Breaks after 3 years - see picture
Review: good while it lasts.  I'm easy with my use and only use 2-3 times per week.  Really, I recommend a Mac due to Surface Pro’s cost of extras and repairs

Title: Not loud enough for the price and not waterproof
Review: For the money there are better, louder and waterproof speakers

Title: Barielle ridge filler
Review: I purchased 4 different brands of ridge filler and so far this one is the one I like the most.  It says it has silk fibers - it looks a little off white in the bottle - goes on clear.  The fibers don't show.  With 2 coats is does about 3 out of 4 of ridge filling. I think it depends on how deep your ridges are.  It isn't matte at all, but not super shiny - more like a natural looking gloss you would get using a rub/polish stick on your natural nail.  It dries in a usual amount of time -Some of my nails have some pretty good ridges - and my nails are not super strong. I have had artificial nails for many years - first acrylic and most recently gel.  But with the virus I haven't had anything but regular polish for about a year.  Sometimes the ridges cause splits and and then snag clothes, tear and bleed. I miss having my nails covered and am hoping to find something that will allow me to survive until we are allowed mani/pedis again!  I just applied it tonight, so I will update my review if there is anything remarkable to report - either positive or negative.

Title: Flattened my hair more than boosted it; I do not care for this spray
Review: I do not care for this spray at all. The fragrance is not great and all this did was make my hair flat, sticky, and dirty looking.

Title: Needs some sort of way to attach them to something when not in use
Review: Works to keep the dust out of the plug slots when they stay put, except that it's easy to lose those teeny pieces when you do need to use the slot. Unfortunately, nothing adheres to silicone, not even super glue, but an emergency sewing kit can help to keep from losing too many pieces.

Title: nail cleaner
Review: This tool has 2 tips... one side you could use after a soak, to push back your cuticles.. the other side is the pointed tip that is meant to clean under your nail.  That is great and both sides work reasonably well.  The thing I am disappointed about is the middle... it shows black in the photo and it is when you receive it.  BUT - I was hoping the middle was silicone or rubber to make it easier to grip and hold on to.  It is not.  It is just black metal.

Title: Total Waste Of Money
Review: These are way too soft and flimsy, wont stay over your ear even when just walking. I have had them three weeks now and the microphone has just failed.

Title: Bad zip!
Review: I do badly wanted to love this bag and I did except for the awful zip. I had to return it because of that as I know trying to get in and out of a bag with a bad zip would end up driving me mad and I would never use the bag. Such a shame as everything else about it was great.

Title: Cheap material
Review: The style is cute but the material seems very cheap. The chest bodice area looked weird on. I returned it.

Title: Stutters Review: I bought this as it was one of the only Bluetooth headphones with multi-point support. It started to stutter, updated the firmware. Stuttered again, reset the headphones. After a month later, it is still not reliable. I guess I will have to lower my expectations for wanting multi-point support. However, I will likely buy something better.

And while wired headphones is obviously better, I wanted wireless as I sometimes get the wire caught against something especially when walking my two dogs.

Title: Terrific device that really works!
Review: For the money, this is a great little device. It works right out of the box (after inserting battery), no parts to install or put together. Painlessly, you can insert this into your nose and in a flash, all little hairs are gone. It seems the older we get, the more hair appears in places that we really don't want. This gadget is perfect and can address nose or ear hairs easily. For the money, this is a great tool. My husband liked using this too, as his ears tend to get hair in them as well. Highly recommend for men and women alike. Would make a great stocking stuffer!

Title: Prefer the original formulas Review: I am a long time fan of Head n Shoulders. Saw this new formula & decided to give them a try. For me, they are pretty bad.
1. cloying fragrance
2. makes my hair super dry
3. Leaves my hair really dull

Going back to original formula. Leaves my hair soft & shiny.

Title: Not worth the money
Review: I’ve been dealing with my eyes watering so decided to invest in some waterproof eyeliner.  Within 5 minutes of applying this I had puddles of black eyeliner in the outer corners of my eyes.

Title: Ear buds fall off easily
Review: The wires can disconnect from the ear buds, which I thought I liked at first but they actually come apart much too easily.

Title: Best bundle for price- x5 for $8.. but, loose fit into phone!! Review: If you blow thru cords like we do as a family of x6… You’re always in the market for a respectable bundle for a bang up price! X5 for $8.. is one of the best deals I’ve seen. But, the rule stands true… You will get what you pay for! Having said that- these can serve a purpose.

Feels a bit loose in the iPhone 8+ (it will stay connected laying flat or stationary otherwise not very secure) connection is tighter with the 13/14 series. Cords casing isn’t overly robust.. braided exterior helps but is not reinforced from normal bend or tweaks. I haven’t received the dreaded “not compatible error message..” so that’s a perk! Charge time with 8+ from under 10 to 90% takes approx. 2.5 hr. It’s not overly fast… but steady.

I find this set is best used as back up or left in a car.. they will do the job.. but not ideal to withstand everyday wear/tear that a cord sees. If used in this capacity- they may meet an early demise bc they lack reinforcement. Hoping info helps decision… Stay safe, everyone.

Title: Terrific Backlighting, But Too Many Buttons Review: This GE BACKLIT UNIVERSAL REMOTE CONTROL (Backlit, 8-Device, Graphite, 47510) has terrific bright backlighting, and works with my Samsung TV, but has too many buttons! It’s complicated to use, because most of the buttons (e.g., navigation, channel, volume, mute, menu, etc.) work only in conjunction with specific device and procedure buttons (e.g., TV, DVD, Stream, etc.).

With my other remotes, you simply select the Input (Source), and all of the buttons will work to control the display, channels, etc. With the GE remote, you have to press a device/procedure button (e.g., TV, Stream) IN ADDITION TO selecting the Input/Source, or else the control buttons on the remote will NOT work properly.

The GE remote works so differently from my other remotes, it’s a chore to learn how to use it. I love the brightly lit display, but that’s not enough to make me want to fiddle with extra buttons all the time.

Title: Five Stars
Review: not sure bout it yet

Title: ... stronger WIFI to my upstairs level & it works great! Great value for the price
Review: Bought to get stronger WIFI to my upstairs level & it works great! Great value for the price!

Title: Not waterproof
Review: Okay glove but NOT WATERPROOF. They resist water kindof but wore them on a rainy hike and my and my boyfriends hands were soaked and freezing. So the men’s and woman’s of these gloves are not waterproof.

Title: Not as bright
Review: These batteries come in a nice little holder. I charged all 4 at once but there was one that took way longer than the others. I put 2 in my flashlight and noticed the brightness wasnt very good. They didnt last long in another one I put them in.

Title: Good bluetooth @ good price
Review: Bought two of these for wife & I - we needed something in the gym without a dangling wire being in the way. Only had them one week and work pretty good for the price I paid (preChristmas deal). They aren't met to bang loud bass in your ears (not at this price) but they do provide a decent sound and are clear enough at louder settings that they fit our need.

Title: Cute shoe
Review: I never had to return a paid shoes from Sketcher, Crocs or other name brand. This shoe did not fit at all, to tight, I have normal feed. Really sad, cute shoes but not for me.

Title: I do not care for the lemongrass fragrance but the soap washes and lathers well Review: There are six bars of Lemongrass soap in this set. The fragrance is a bit too Lemongrass strong but the soap washes and lathers well. I also like that the bar is hard. Some soaps are softer (like the boutique bar soaps) and this one holds its shape.

At the current price of $25.99, this comes to $4.33 per bar which is slightly pricey but still competitive. If I liked this fragrance, I would have given it 4 stars.

Title: Nice sign
Review: This yard sign was a really nice way to announce my 60th birthday.

Title: Armholes a little big
Review: I was hoping to wear this alone without anything underneath like the product image but the arm holes are a bit big and show my bra. It’s soft and comfortable though.

Title: A+
Review: Excellent

Title: Five Stars
Review: I love it! So beautiful,  I want another one soon.

Title: Blah
Review: No different than other versions,  hate it,  waiting for port issue.

Title: Beautiful brush with a combo boar bristle & nylon brush head; staticky & way too $$$ Review: The brush handle on this brush is beautiful and feels like it is handmade. The wooden handle is easy to grasp and hold during styling.

This is a typical radial brush usually used for blow drying with a wave/curl. The title on Amazon sort of implies this is all natural bristle and it is not. The brush head itself is a combination of boar and nylon bristles. Unfortunately, using this brush causes my hair to be very staticky. It does work well otherwise and is perfect for blow drying. Note that some boar bristles will fall out during use but this is typical of most boar bristle-type brushes.

What I cannot get past is the $47.50 price tag. That is way too expensive for this brush.

Title: Be wary of the amount of "curved".
Review: They are almost unnoticeably curved. Had I to do over I would buy larger flat LCD's.  While a step up from my dual 24" displays the "curve" is not worth a premium price.

Title: Nice fealing material.
Review: Soft, easy wear, comfortable, cute, washes up nicely

Title: Two Stars
Review: The cord is so short I couldn't use it at work or at home.

Title: Not kinky hair
Review: Very silky and not human kinky hair. Will not work for my class. But my fault for not reading more about it before being excited and just buying.

Title: Each replacement replacement has less battery life
Review: Battery failure a problem, but each time WYZE sent a replacement,  it had even a shorter battery life. This. they tell me is my last replacement. The fully charged watch goes dead after two days. No use buying a new one until they fix their battery problems. Don't get me wrong, I LOVE the watch and WYZE cams, but this watch needs to have a longer-lasting charge battery... Every two days is ridiculous.

Title: Buttons not lined up well...
Review: The fitment is not ideal on the buttons.

Title: very painful to sleep in
Review: yes it does work, very painful to sleep in, and gives you similar clip mark at as an old fashion curler... returned

Title: Poor battery life, feature rich Review: If only the battery life was better... I have the GPS turned off and I only measure my blood oxygen level when I'm asleep yet it is nearly impossible for the watch to last a little more than 24 hours.

My next Garmin will be the one with a solar powered assist.

That being said for the negatives this watch has the features I wanted at a good price:

- Sleep quality/quantity
- Blood oxygen level
- Steps counter
- Flight of stairs counting
- Water intake recording ) manual input)
- Multiple activities recording (it can detect when I'm running, bike riding, etc.)

It has been durable and the screen is still scratch free.

If poor battery life isn't a deal breaker buy it.

Title: OKAY
Review: REPLACEMENT BATTERY WORKS. IT IS NOT A PERFECT FIT, THERE IS A SMALL GAP, BUT IT WORKS.

Title: lasts for weeks and weeks Review: I am naturally an ash blonde and I have golden highlights. My eyebrows have ALWAYS been lighter than my hair and as I've aged, they've become even lighter! I was afraid the "brown" would be too dark. It is dark, but I find it just right for my tastes. I leave on for 15 minutes. If you wanted an even deeper color you could leave the product on longer although I think the directions say a maximum of 15 minutes. Honestly, it's just the right color, not too dramatic, not too light at 15 minutes. The best part is that I really only dye my brows about once every 6-8 weeks. But then again, I'm NOT into the super dark dramatic brow color. I noticed some of the other brands last only 1 or 1 1/2 weeks! Yikes. In any case, the tube will last a long time making it way less than just one trip to the salon.

NOTE: the dye IS permanent and will stain ANYTHING it touches and is left on... including skin. But a good oil based moisturizer will buff out any "oops" on skin.

Makeup is so personal... I hope this helps in some way!

Title: Dress is cute, but the slit is up to my panties
Review: The dress is really cute. The fabric is soft and the print is pretty, but it's also thin and see through. I received the white with flowers.  The reason for one star is the slit, which can't be sewn closed,  is up  to the top of my thigh.  You can see my panties. I'm very short waisted so I would think it would be longer on me. The only way I would wear this is as a swim suit cover.

Title: Handle too short and rope in the middle of the puff is annoying - 2.5 stars Review: This brush is two-sided. The only thing I like is that the bristles on the brush are relatively soft on the back. However, I would have preferred a larger head so that there are more bristles and larger puff.

The other thing that annoys me is that the handle is too short and I have to stretch to reach my entire back. In addition, the rope loop in the middle of the puff is ridiculous and annoying during washing. Why they thought this was a good thing to attach to the puff is beyond me. There is already a hole in the handle for hanging.

In summary, this is functional but is the least favorite back washer I tried so far. The current price of $8.99 is a bit high for this as I can buy something like this at my local Walmart for half that.

Title: Has some scent; love the color; cleans but does not brighten; doubt there’s SPF in soap Review: There are two tiny bars of soap in this package and a mesh bag. This is a weirdly advertised bar of soap. I never heard of SPF in soap and I doubt there is any in this and, if there is, I doubt it would work.

This is not fragrance free as specified as it has a subtle aroma that I cannot describe. The soap lathers mildly but cleans well. I actually feel that they are moisturizing even though there are no claims on the box to that effect. Nevertheless, I did not notice any brightening of acne scars or anything like that.

I do love the color of these bars. Note that the bars are nicely sized and fit comfortably in the palm of my hand but I have trouble keeping them there. I have no idea what is the problem with vegan soaps but these bars are a bit slippery when wet. I have discovered that most vegan soaps are like this, which I consider a falling hazard as the bar ricochets around my tub.

The current price of $9.99 is pricey for this as it comes to $5 per bar. Each bar only lasts me about 3-4 days.

Title: Too soft of a sole
Review: Way way too soft of a sole. Feel every pebble or crack in the sidewalk. Two thumbs down.

Title: perfect
Review: Needed a smaller center channel for my Harman Kardon AVR 1700 and smaller living room setup. this was a bit bigger than I thought it would be so glad I bought it. the sound is perfect with our directv, H/K and LG tv setup. full sound matches well w/ Polk Audio 505 subwoofer. plus you can't beat the price.

Title: Bad Smell
Review: I just can't handle the smell of this lotion. It sticks with you all day. Almost smells like burnt cookies.

Title: Don't trust the picture - it's BLUE, not WHITE.
Review: Fine as a cable, but color is way different than the picture and I bought assuming it was accurate.  It's not white at all - it's blue.  I needed a white cable to blend in to my setup and this did not match.  Returning.

Title: Bad product, but great vendor!
Review: This product is supposed to be unscented but it smells really bad! The vendor really worked with me to make it right and turned a bad experience into a positive one! I will definitely shop the Mr. Medical store again.

Title: Functionality, performance and price...
Review: I like that is an Amazon Fire tablet but I prefer the older models. I find this type a bit complicated and with some glitches. I want to return it but it is too late for exchange. Will try a replacement???. I am satisfy with Amazon products but not with this particular tablet.  It could be better..! Thanks.. I LOVE AMAZON!!

Title: this hemp lotion has a very intense, perfume-like scent ...
Review: this hemp lotion has a very intense , perfume-like scent!! was expecting an all natural hemp formulation .... not my preference at all!

Title: Clean scent
Review: This is my husband’s signature scent.  It has a nice clean scent.  It’s a regular purchase.

Title: Good - but not as good as the 840 Pro. Review: Considering this is the 'next generation' drive I am pretty disappointed.

It should be faster than it's predecessor the 840 Pro but it's not.

The 840 Pro has 550 MBPS read and 500 MBPS write compared to 550 MBPS read and 470 MBPS write on this one.

What gives Samsung?

Title: Nice foot mask, softens skin and diminshes cracked skin
Review: I have extremely dry feet and cracked heels. I have used these three times now and I do notice a difference. My skin is softer and the cracks are noticeably diminished. I have deducted a star simply because I do not like the way these come. Both socks are attached together and I need a scissor to separate them. It would be so much easier if they had a perforated place to make it easy to tear them apart.

Title: great
Review: Great costume. It is what I expected :)

Title: More spandex than cotton
Review: I had high expectations of these, I guess. The feel is more spandex/poly than cotton, the fit is more like standard boy shorts than boxers, and by the end of the day they have stretched out enough they are riding high. Not awful but not great. Disappointed.

Title: No good
Review: The stamp is cool it worked but the eyeliner smudges easily and sincevits water proof you can't just fix it. I had to scrub it off my eyes at work because it was all over the place

Title: Tight knit, feels tight around front of head. Review: I think this is nice, and a well made cap.
But my husband does not like it. He is slim, not much hair, but feels the cap fits too tight around the front of his head!
Also too long in top, or back,and Not as soft as his other cap he loves! I agree ,this cap is not that soft, and I did wash it.
This is a tight knit cap , if that makes any sense!

Title: computer good, spacebar junk Review: It would get 5 stars if not for the space bar if you don't hit it in the middle and hard it doesn't work. I bought this one to test before buying 45 more of them for the company. If you need it for typing DON'T buy this one.
And sending it back is a waste of time. If I can't get mine fixed I'll never get another Acer.

After using this computer a few months now and after I sent it back to Acer to fix the space bar which they can't fix.
Don't buy this computer you will be sorry I am.
I will never buy any Acer product again nor will my company.

Title: disposable mascara wands
Review: Bought these to use with my eyebrow dye... works perfectly. With careful rinsing I can use a couple of times before discarding. A good price and quality in my opinion.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Does brighten but I’m not crazy about the purple color or the subtle aroma
Review: I have very brassy looking short to medium fine curly hair. This shampoo lathers and cleans well. After my hair dried, it did look more alive and less dull, so I would say it brightens. However, I do not care at all for the purple color or the subtle aroma. Purple is my favorite color but not in shampoo. The color changes to white when sudsing up so it does not get on my tub. However, for those who do not mind the color or the scent, the current price of $22 is competitively priced for this because it is like a salon product.

Title: Soft material, looks worn looking after washing, or its suppose too! Review: I like Goodthread shirts for my husband and son, they make great shirts.
But this is the first tee shirt.
The tee shirt is a soft material. I guess black cavier is not a deep black. To me it looks like a faded black!
After washing this shirt the bottom curled up in different places. The shirt did not shrink, but looked worn, or its
Suppose to look that way.
The large seemed larger then other shirts in this size, although I would Not size down.

Title: Pretty & versatile bags but zippers are sticky & one broke immediately
Review: These cosmetic bags are very pretty and perfectly sized to carry incidentals or make-up in one's purse. Unfortunately, the zippers on both bags were sticky and would not open and close easily. After opening one of them a few times, the zipper broke as I expected it would. If this had better zippers, then the current price of $9.99 would be reasonable. As is, they are garbage.

Title: Good, But Far From Premium
Review: I have a 'premium' battery charger. It can deep cycle your batteries, test, discharge and recharge to refresh your batteries. It can slow charge for extended life or fast charge if you need things quick. It has a multi line display that lets you see all sorts of information about the battery. This Duracell charger is a very basic but serviceable charger. I'm also not a fan of chargers that hang off the wall or need you to supply an extension cord. It works, it's better than most of the giveaway chargers that devices come with but it's not premium by any stretch of the imagination.

Title: Excellent variety pack of shadows!
Review: Nice variety pack of eyeshadows. I love the muted neutral colors, go perfect with almost anything I wear. Also like the fact that these would make an excellent gift as well with the packaging. Colors last a super long time. When I apply in the morning (super easy to apply), it remains all day and comes off easily with my makeup wipes at night. Highly recommend!

Title: Nice and easy assembly
Review: Went up easy and the TV got perfect.

Title: Just OK
Review: its OK .. you get what you pay for in this world

The lipstick went on soomth.

I’m fair with blue eyes, and This color is awful for me. It is a bright, bright, Pink.
I tried to put a lighter color lipstick over this, but it didn’t work , it would probably be a nice color on someone with
A darker skin color then I have.

Title: weak product, terrible support Review: I have had problems with this mouse almost from the beginning. Primarily, every time the computer was restarted, I have to reprogram all the keys from scratch. I asked repeatedly for software that would work independent of the Internet, and simply store the program in my computer. Several promises were made to me but never kept.

Finally the program stopped working altogether, and I spoke to someone at customer service for the 10th time, and I was given case number 351267. She promised that a high level technical support person would get in touch within a few days.

It has been about two months with no reply, so I called into today. I was told that my case had been escalated to second tier support, and that there was nothing they could do but wait for a reply. This is shockingly bad customer service!

I no longer have faith that they can solve my problem. The concept is great, but it's very glitchy, and their tech people are nice but grossly ineffective.

Title: small
Review: These are cotton canvas bags.  I got them to decorate as party favor bags.  They are a bit smaller than I would have liked, but I believe the dimensions provided were close. I was just hoping for slightly more room.  They did smell a bit musty.  I aired them out and gave them a quick spray of Febreeze.

Title: I like the bra strap Review: I was a little hesitant on purchasing this strap, since all of the 5 star reviews (except for 1) were NOT verified purchases... and the buy one get one free code does not work..

Yes, it's cute and very soft. I bought 2 of them, and one set has a strap that's sewed twisted, so one is thicker than the other, and as it twist the sewed line circled around toward the front, giving it a twisted look right around my clavicle.

I didn't think much of it at first (I mean, I never look at other peoples bra strap.. who does that?), until 3 people told me that my strap was twisted today! I like the bra strap, it is comfortable, but quality does not match up to the price.

Zoom in on the picture and see for yourself

Review: This shoe horn is small.. because it's travel sized for your convenience.  The horn portion is heavy metal... sturdy.. the mini  handle is a leather or leather like material... it does NOT fold.  The thing that was not so great is the smell.  It came with a really cheap cloth like sleeve with pull tie closure... but it stunk so badly I threw it away... it wasn't worth keeping.  The handle is still smelly... really strong musty moldy smell... I am currently setting outside in the sun and fresh air hoping for a reduction of the smell... Hmmm... Title: Thick conditioner; smells like Twizzlers
Review: I have no idea why they call this a conditioning wash. Supposedly it is supposed to remove residue. However, to me it seems backwards. First I wash my hair and then I apply conditioner and rinse out. I did the same with this. This conditioner is thick, so I had to use a little bit on my fine short-to-medium curly hair. The aroma reminds me of red Twizzlers--okay but not great. The conditioning is ordinary. I do not feel this is anything special for my hair. It lightly conditioned without weighing down my hair--nothing more and nothing less.

Title: The back of my hands felt tingly after puting this on. Not a thick lotion, did not turn my hands white.. Review: I put a small amount of the CeraVe sunscreen on the back of my hands, and with in a couple of minutes there now tingley!
I shook the tube before using this. This is not thick, and it went right into my skin, and feels dry. Its not greesy, and
Did not turn my skin white.

There is 45 other InActive Ingedients in this. All I cannot pronounce!
I would Not put this on my face.

It says to put this on 15mins. Before going into the sun.reapply after 40 mins. If swimming, or sweating.

I had some questions I wanted to ask this company about the use for my grandson who is a 3yr old red-head, and we
Live on a river in Ca.
I Called the company, pushed all the right buttons, and was on hold for 10 min. Then it went into a recording asking if I liked the product,
Would recommend it, and then hung up!
What a waste of my time. This is a company I personally will not do business with now.
I have owned busneses, and customer service is number one.

Title: Lacks fragrance; a bit too moisturizing for me; a good shampoo otherwise Review: There are four 20-ounce bottles of shampoo in the shipment. The shampoo is so creamy that it reminds me of conditioner and not shampoo. It lacks any strong fragrance and I like fragrance. It lathers well enough but not as good as shampoos that are less moisturizing. I have fine curly medium-length hair and this relaxed my curls a touch. After using this, I did not feel like I needed a conditioner. It is a good shampoo otherwise.  It is too soon to tell whether it works on split ends or not. I would have to use this for a couple of months to determine that.

The current price of $19.88 comes to a reasonable $4.97 per bottle.

Title: Spotty reception/see update below Review: With an armband I can make these work for me. Originally I imagined that I'd wear these, throw my phone in my shorts and be good, but unfortunately it did not work out that way. The receiver has a hard time picking up the BT signal through my body and drops out fairly regularly. Very annoying. Strangely they will work from a distance but not if you want to have your phone on you. On the upside, I've gotten more familiar with all the voice activated features and Suri that I employ when my phone is strapped to my upper arm.

Update June 3.
Well we can call it a day for this headset. They crapped out while in use last Thursday, May 30. I'm logged in now to return them only to find that my return window expired Friday, May 31! Regardless of Amazon's return policy, I feel confident in declaring this headset a peice of s!&t due to reception problems and 30 day lifespan.

I'm happy to update my update: Just minutes later, Amazon extended the return window and I'll be fully refunded upon return of this item.
Amazon has the best customer service policy in retail.

Title: Beautiful and really nice price!

Title: Well....
Review: Well.....this set started out well, but by the time I had tried everything, I am not much of a fan. The first item I used was the cleanser. It has an amazing, orange scent. It foams pretty well. It doesn't strip or over dry my skin. I tried the liquid exfoliant next.  I used it like a toner and applied it with a cotton round.It didn't have much of a smell. I felt neutral about it. The third item I tried was the Hydra Bright drops.  I did not care for the scent at all. It was very medicinal smelling. It also left my sensitive skin red in a couple of areas. Finally I tried the hydrator. It also had a medicinal smell but it didn't irritate my skin. The kit comes in a little clear bag. I do like the sizes and it really is good for traveling. But overall, this didn't impress me and I feel just meh about it.

Title: travel cable organizer
Review: Husband travels 300 days a year.  If you travel at all, you can relate to the shear volume of cables you have to carry with you.  He LOVES this organizer because everything is conveniently and easily accessible.  There is a place for every cable, every adapter.  I personally chose a different one, but this one is every bit as handy.  It has a zipper closure that keeps everything where it suppose to be.  It has a center "layer" or flap. He has it pretty stuffed and it still closes. It's about the size of medium/large book.  It fits easily into his carry on backpack.  Again, it's just really nice to have ONE place to reach for and get your power cords, ear plugs, etc... I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Facial hair remover, could have been made better
Review: This is a facial tool made for removing fine hairs. Although it is technically a razor, I honestly had some trouble navigating it over the curves of my face. They really should make this more ergonomic allowing for easier manipulation and control as I found it difficult being sure to get all the hairs, especially in my lip area. Found myself going over certain places several times at different angles. I typically use a round head batter operated hair removal system which seems to work much better. I am still leaving this at 4 stars as it does work and perhaps it's just me having difficulties.

Title: It's ok
Review: The stretch band that goes around the cover is super tight, I had to pull it to the max to get it around my iPad over. Just as I put it on, I immediately ran into the first problem. I fold the keyboard back to write on the screen, it does not lay flat and at an upside down angel ...  impossible to write at this angle, which defeats the purpose of keeping the apple pen close by to write with... the quality of this product is not bad, just makes it inconvenient if you take a lot of notes on the ipad

Title: Solid glides on and protects me for 12 hours until my next shower; wish fragrance was stronger Review: I love intense fragrance and specifically love men's deodorants WITH aluminum because they seem to be what usually works for me. I usually use nothing but Old Spice Swagger solid with the active ingredient of aluminum zirconium tetrachlorohydrex gly 17%. Rarely can I get by with a stick that does not have aluminum. However, this stick does not have that ingredient but still protects me for 12 hours until my next shower.

I take a shower every 12 hours because I sweat a lot, so I can never attest to protection beyond 12 hours. The sandalwood and black pepper fragrance is not as powerful as I would like, however. Nevertheless, this works.

The current price of $15 is really boutique pricing for this 3-ounce stick. Protection-wise this works even though it is aluminum free. This is also labeled vegan and cruelty free.If the fragrance were stronger, this would have received 4 stars from me.

Title: Need to follow the directions to get the curls you want.
Review: This is a good product and works well if used properly. I don't use a hairdryer. I air dry my hair from wet. I want to buy the cream version next time because I have dry hair.

Title: Very Comfortable and Warm.
Review: I love these stylish boots!  I can't wait for our first snow so I can wear them out in the wintry weather.  I have tried them on and they're very comfortable and warm.  I wish they came in half sizes because I really wear an 8 1/2 and these are just a tad too long but if I wore really heavy socks they would be just fine.  They are very true to size.  Update:  we had our first snow and these kept my feet dry and warm.

Title: Four Stars Review: Skip doesn't work, won't let me get WGN channel, says not authorized which is not true. Would like to replace my remote

I would like to know if many people have had the skip not work on the remote?

Title: Thank you Amazon! Review: So difficult to find the right color (burgundy) baseball belt. After reviewing several contenders, we went with this on the brand alone- assuming it would be a quality belt.

We have not been disappointed. You get what you pay for, and sometimes the brand names are more expensive for a reason. This is one of those cases. You can be confident that when you buy this, it will be exactly what you are looking for and exactly what you need.

Title: Great lightweight well made luggage!
Review: I have always loved TravelPro luggage, so I was excited to try this. To be honest, I have been using hardsided luggage for the past few years, so I was a little apprehensive switching back to softsided. I was so impressed when I saw this set. First of all, the luggage is of a perfect size, great for when we travel for a few weeks to have bags that all match and of varying sizes that are perfect. Second, these are well made, zippers are easy to zip (and don't snag). Spinner wheels are also fantastic and the luggage turns on a dime. Lightweight and well made, I highly reccommend!

Title: 3ft Lightning Cable Review: Love the length, feel, overall construction style. Works just as good as the original for actual charging.

However, the USB part of this cable is so weak. It bends and flexes and stays that way. In fact, one already bent so much that it broke. Good thing there are 3 of these in the order. If you are careful, they'll last a while. But I dunno if the steel is not properly heat treated or what, because it's way too soft.

Title: Not waterproof
Review: suppose to be water proof and came off after 30 min in a pool.

Title: Like a molting bird Review: I needed these wings to add to a raven costume, so I was pretty excited to find them, but apparently I should've just made them myself. Whatever glue they used dried out so that the feathers were already falling while I took them out the package. I ended up using my glue gun to replace nearly half of the feathers. We didn't even use them in rehearsal to try to preserve them. I told the girl wearing them, "if any of the feathers fall out while you're on stage, just pretend it's natural molting."

I would have just returned them, but I needed them and obviously couldn't return something I'd altered even by necessity. Two stars since I didn't have to source my own board, elastic, wire, and feathers...

Review: Like it for morning walks

Title: Good looking sweater, but runs really big!
Review: Overall a good sweater, but the sizing is way off.  I read a ton of reviews saying that it runs on the small size, so I purchased a size small.  That was a bad idea- it definitely runs quite large.  The moment I tried it on (and yes, like other reviewers have said, it's hard to get over your head), I realized it was very big on me.  It looks like I purchased a medium or maybe even a large, even though I bought a small.  I'm 125 lbs and 5' 7".  If you're around my size or smaller, you should really get the extra small- I wish I had.  Otherwise you will be swimming in it.  I had to sinch it back with a hair tie so I didn't look so dumpy.  But on the bright side, it's quite soft- not scratchy at all.  Also it looks just like the sweaters in the movie, which is cool.

Title: Goody Styling Essentials Hair Brush, Woodgrain Professional

Title: Feels better than stock to me, and the sweat doesn't absorb into leather. Review: Positives:
1. Sweat cleans off easy, not hard to install and the included eye cover is functional. I find it works better with my frankenquest adapters at holding things in place than the stock foam. It bounces on my face less ands doesn't require as much tension.
2. This does seem to work better at keeping my face cool that just the silicone covers for the stock foam.
Negatives:
1. There is still a bit of light bleed out the sides, but it's not bad unless you are in a really bright room and you can only tell in dark scenes. I have seen other adapters including side cushions to repair this issue.
2. The nose piece doesn't stay on well, and when it does it presses hard and leaves a mark on my nose. It's still rubber so it's not painful, but there has to be a better solution. Maybe cut it lower or make it a bit more flexible. If you remove it there is a lot of open area in your lower vision.

Overall I recommend it over a silicone cover for the stock foam, but it has a lot of downfalls so I am sure this isn't the best option for a new face plate.

Title: Fits me Odd! It was not sewed right ! Review: Cute dress, but fits me odd!
I thought I ordered a medium, but I can’t find a tag with the size.
I’m 5’2, 125 to 130 lbs.
The elastic sleeves on my shoulders, the material is just folded over, sewed, and the elastic was just layed inside That thin type of trim, and The material moves up and down you can feel that elastic inside.
The sleeves do Not stay up on my shoulders at all, it’s a sloppy hot mess on me.
I’m not real big busted, but this is tight under the bust and does not lay right!

The length for me is longer then mid calf, but Not to my ankles at all. That is ok, it just this
Fits me odd, or was not sewed right… I have never had this type of problem before.
I ordered the in blue, not a bad color, just looks like I just walked out of the barn….

Title: Just an okay set; nothing outstanding
Review: This is reasonably priced for what you get, but there are better sets that you can get for about the same price that come in wooden storage boxes.  This is packed in cardboard, so makes it look cheap, so maybe not something you would want to use for a nice gift.  If you are getting it to use for yourself, it should be okay, but I would suggest getting a nicer set that will hold up better and last longer.  There are plenty of cheap silver sets available; this one is probably no better or no worse than any other.  The spoon sizes were a little weird; didn't seem to be standard sized, so that could be bothersome to you.  My wife took a quick look at it, but did not like the set very much.

Title: Perfect

Title: Leaves your hair feeling like straw.
Review: I didn't buy mine off of Amazon but did buy mine else where.  I did try to give this product a chance, after 3 uses I decided I really do hate it.  My hair felt like straw.  I gave it to my husband to use and he agreed, it did the same to his hair, although he said it made his hair feel like a brush bristle. Title: Hair styling set for females with very long hair Review: I consider this a bit gimmicky. There's an insert that says what one should do with these styling tools on wash day and second day after wash--see second photo.

There are nine pieces in this set (see first and third photos), including clips, brush, headband, etc. The brush is very nice and perfect for styling with a blow dryer. The two rollers adhere to the hair easily and the clips can be used to secure them in place.

I like the clips and brush the best. The rest is on the cheap side. Unfortunately, I cannot make full use of this set because it is for females who have long hair. I have short to medium hair and this set is too large to work well with shorter hair unless I am using only the headband.

Title: AMAZING!!!!
Review: These socks are utterly amazing!!! My feet were very dry and had lots of cracks that even my pedicure lady couldn’t eliminate with all her tools. I use these as soon as I get out of the shower. I lather my heels in a good healing lotion and wear them for the full 60 minutes. It’s been about 5 weeks and my cracks are almost fully healed and even my pedicurist was shocked! DO NOT HESITATE TO BUY!!
