Title: Very difficult to cancel plan!
Review: I returned the item an did not need this plan. It is very hard to cancel and receive a refund!

Title: MEMORY lazy in it's doings
Review: The manual says that if you are watching...whatever, & hit the STOP button, followed by the red 'OFF' one...the next then you what to continue at the point you left, you first hit the PLAY/PAUSE (blue) one and it will begin there.  WELL, it does NOT always works as claimed. Half the time you must hunt for the spot.  A REAL drag...bummer/nuisance.

Title: Eh
Review: Not all it's hyped up to be. I still prefer wipes because they are just as effective and cheaper.

Title: Cute but weird fabric
Review: Cute, but the fabric is that weird, slick fabric that many clothing items that come from China are made.

Title: One Star
Review: Too complicated I write to the company never replied

Title: Cheap Junk! Broke on First try.
Review: The FIRST time I went to use one (the pink one) I pulled it out of my purse arriving at dinner with friends. They asked what it was, I explained how great it was and what it did. I proceeded to hang my bag on the hook. The pin attaching the hook the the circle broke off, sent the circle flying across the restaurant floor and then the pink crystals in the circle popped off the disk and went ricocheting in a different direction. The waiter (who witness this fiasco) retrieved the “fabulous handbag hook” and brought it back to me in several  tiny pieces. What a waste! I just sat my bag on the booth next to me.

Title: soak off tips
Review: I purchased these so I could do my own soak off of my gel nails.  They clip on.. but I do recommend using a cotton ball soaked in acetone, rather than the 'lint free' pads you can purchase... they pads are too thin and dry out before you get any soak off ability.

Title: Not as useful as I thought it would be .... Review: I was hoping to be able to use this with both my iPhone and my iPad Pro, but the "angles" just didn't work for me at all. Also, my iPhone kept slipping off the stand unless I braced it on the end with a book or something. Kind of defeats the purpose.

Might be OK for some specific uses, but I think there are better products out there. 3 stars -- it's just OK.

Title: Too clunky & not ergonomic
Review: The male end of the belt is too large to fit thru the belt loops on many of my pants. The triangle shaped connector for the receiver end of the belt is clunky and not ergonomic

Title: Doesn't smell as good as other Got2b products
Review: Got2b products always smell great but this one not so much. It works fine, not too sticky and does make me feel like I have a little more hair...but I think it could be better.

Title: Horrible Fit
Review: When I bought these I was afraid they would be too small but they are huge.

Title: It seems ok
Review: I am using this card with my Roku.  I am not sure if the occasional delays are from my Internet connection or the card.  In the interest of fairness, I am assuming that the delay is from an intermittent Internet connection at times.  With that assumption, in place, the card is working fine and with fast response.

Title: Don't buy Review: Did not work
Had to return

Title: Washes well and does not sting my eyes but it is a gel-like soap and does not have a copious lather.
Review: This face wash does not sting my eyes and cleans well. It also has a nice scent. However, it is a bit gel-like (slimy feeling) and it has a light lather. If it were not more like a gel instead of a soap, I would have liked this more.

Title: Genial!!
Review: Es comodo la tela de muy buena calidad pedi el XL y se ve un poco grande pero esta excelente cuando se lo pone

Title: work in progress
Review: Bought this based on reviews. I use as an eye base. It creases on me. My eye lids are oily, so maybe that is why. It does help my eye makeup look more fresh at the end of the day. This product with last a long time even though the container is sample size. I am going to try to use a different eye cream on eye lids or none at all to see if this resolves my issue.

Title: I should have returned it.
Review: I bought this in gray, and it irritates my skin. It’s super hot to wear, isn’t long enough and way too wide despite having measured correctly.

Title: wired headphone buds
Review: I purchased these because I wanted a wired set that would fit into a small bag/box to put in my purse.  This works perfectly.  Comes with many different types and sizes of foam ear piece covers - I found the perfect fit for me.  While I was testing it on my Samsung S10+, my neighbor called - perfect timing -  it announced the call with her name (in my phone log obviously) and I pressed the button on the wire to take the call.  It worked perfectly.  The sound was clear and solid.  I asked if she noticed anything with the sound on her end, she said no. I usually talk to her on my speaker option.  Now, I don't intend to use this set for making calls - I wanted them to use for privacy and consideration of those around me while playing games or viewing videos, etc.  Comes with a very nice, small holder - perfect for your purse.  Having said all of that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: They’re huge.
Review: These are very big and they look terrible. The material isn’t soft nor silky, so they don’t glide off the hair when trying to remove them. They’re the hugest scrunchies that I’ve ever bought or seen for that matter. I cannot recommend them. I’ve worn one, so I’m not sure if I can return them, or if I should just suck it up this time. But on a good note the colors look nice. If your ponytail would be two inches across (rather than one inch across) for your thick curly hair, these might work great for you size wise.

Title: camera mounting kit
Review: Camera mounting kit.  Husband reports it works perfectly for his application.  It is white and plastic.  Easy to install.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All of my reviews reflect my honest, personal experience with the reviewed item - your experience may be different. I am not influenced by any outside source. I receive/accept NO free products or discounts that are not available to all shoppers- ever. For some reason our shopper ranks are no longer visible - so, to give you a little more info about me, I am a top 50 reviewer (#30 the highest rank achieved). Those numbers used to fluctuate over time - up and down but I noticed that they stopped updating regularly - perhaps to phase them out. It's a shame because it did help you see who has been around the longest and who is a trustworthy reviewer.  I've been doing reviews for over 25 years with Amazon - over 6,000 reviews posted, those reviews have been viewed well over 50,000 times, including well over 25,000 likes. Bottom line, I pay for all my stuff, just like you do.

Title: Plain, thin, Basic looking vest. Runs Big. Review: Light weight plain looking vest.

I didn’t expect a down looking jacket , and won’t buy a down jacket anymore, but this is thin , and very basic looking.
The outside of the material is To the point of looking cheesy to me.
My husband and my sons will not wear this, although my daughter likes to go fishing with her boyfriend and will wear it fishing.
Has allot of pockets, and one inside pocket..pockets are not very deep.
Zips up with snaps.

This is a size Medium, and it runs Big. My daughter wears a large or Xlarge in something like this, and The medium fits her.
She can zip it up ok. I wonder if this is miss-sized!
The arm holes are big, which is good if you wear a heavier shirt underneath.

Title: Excellent flat iron!
Review: I always use an iron of somesort on my hair (just prefer my hair straight in contrast to the natural wave that I have). I previously had used the Remington Shine Therapy model so I thought I would compare the Frizz Therapy to it. I actually prefer the S8510DS Frizz therapy iron over the Shine therapy. I find my hair to be sleek and looks like it was keratin conditioned every time I use it. I love the way my hair shines. If I had any complaint at all it would be in the 1" size. I have previously used 1.5 and 2 inch irons and I feel they are easier to use for me. But all in all, the Remington Frizz Therapy is a great product and I highly recommend it.

Title: Has a sleep timer and a beautiful picture. Good value
Review: Just the right size for a bedroom.  Has a sleep timer and a beautiful picture.  Good value.

Title: What's that smell?
Review: Lovely items, but they smelled strongly of chemicals right out of the package. I washed on delicate cycle with cold water and line dried, that got rid of the smell.

Title: lots of uses
Review: I purchased these for ease of sun protection when in my zero gravity chair or hammock on Maui.  They are meant for tanning bed protection, but they are also great for regular sun too. I also use them to protect my eyeliner tattoo from the sun which can bleach the tattoo.  Lots of colors (they chose) ... each has a string to attach if you choose to. The plastic part is pretty thick, stiff plastic so they should last a while.  I always update with any issues or other useful info.

Title: Leaves my hair shiny & clean – product is not as advertised; it’s w/Marula oil not Moroccan oil Review: This is a four bottle set of 22 ounces each bottle. However, the product I received is not as advertised. It is supposed to have Moroccan Oil in it and not Marula Oil. It is for this reason, I changed my rating from 4 stars to 2 stars.

The shampoo lathers well and smells great to my senses. It left my hair feeling clean and shiny and without frizz. Overall, I like this shampoo but I hate that what is pictured and ordered is not what is received.

Title: You get what you pay for
Review: The quality is okay, nothing special. The bracelets were thrown in the packaging and now I’m sitting here trying to determine which one is “always” and which one is “together”. For the price it’s fine. Scratchy material though

Title: not for older ladies
Review: I needed to return this...did not work well for me  had too many problems with it.  I am older lady and could not deal with it

Title: They are of poor quality
Review: Theses ear phones was a nightmare they worked for a short time and died two pairs didn’t work at all ... will not order this product again sorry very disappointed 😔

Title: Only charges 1/3 of the way full... Review: These batteries do not fully charge up. After I charge them up fully I put them into my blood pressure machine and it only shows one out of three bars. Also when storing the batteries after fully charged they lose all of their charge.
*Seller was sweet and contacted me regarding review. They tried to make it right with stronger batteries. Unfortunately, they preformed exactly the same as the first ones. I still wish I would have spent a few more bucks and got a different brand. I really wanted to erase the prior review, upon having better results with the new batteries. I feel bad but, must be honest. Great customer service!

Title: Initially ok, but not now
Review: The setup for this when we first got it was easy. However we lost out router to a lightning strike. So when we got a new router and got back our Wi-Fi we can not connect this power strip. I have deleted it from the app, unplugged it, tried to reinstall it, but it will not connect. It is a POS. I DO NOT recommend.

Title: They're okay
Review: I really wanted to like these jeans so although I bought three different style in one order and rated the other two as soon as I put them on, I waited with this one. I've worn them since and I still cannot fall in love. The wash is good, it's a dark denim which I wanted and expected. the fit is horrendous. The waist is high, higher than I measured, the material is very loose which although they have stretch should still mean that they fit, they don't. I am a size 12-14, I usually buy 14 in jeans if they have stretch but these are incredibly loose. The waist is loose and gape and although I like the length, the shape of the jeans make the bootcut very unattractive. I wanted to love them,  I really tried but because of the color and the fact that I can leave them for winter and through a sweat shirt over it with sneakers, I rated them a 3. Oh well, I still have two pairs I absolutely love!

Title: absolutely amazing
Review: ok - i want this in every color available - i ordered a 2xl and it fits perfect... so cute, so flattering and so lightweight and comfy!! yes yes yes!!!

Title: Although color is rich, polish is TOXIC in my opinion due to TOULENE ingredient Review: I used their [[ASIN:B07N27H3GN Pink Tourmaline]] polish once before I realized that polish and this nail polish is TOXIC. It contains TOLUENE which causes neurological issues. In fact, I know someone who has Parkinson's Disease as a result of this chemical.  When I tried this polish previously I did not realize it had this. As a result, I am throwing this away without even using it. Had I known it contained this ingredient, I would never have ordered this for review in the first place.

For those who do not care about the ingredients, this polish is a vibrant deep color that is very attractive.

Title: Never ordered this
Review: I didn’t order this so idk what to say????!!

Title: Bras run way small.
Review: Size is way off, maybe 3 sizes smaller

Title: orthotic flip flops
Review: These look ok - but in person - EH.  The sparkly glitter portion of the upper flakes off everywhere. Super cheap looking.  They say arch support, but I couldn't tell on my feet.  I donated these.

Title: Smells awful, has orange tinge, & is sticky slimy; disgusting; went right in the garbage
Review: This pack of two anti-aging serums smells so bad that I had to suppress a dry heave. In addition, the gel has an orange tinge to it. It goes on sticky and slimy and is absolutely disgusting. I threw this right in the garbage.

Title: Great every day leggings, comfortable and well made
Review: These are a perfect fitting legging for me. I like the fact that they are higher wasted, but the waist band does not roll down on me. They stretch and are well made. I am almost 5'7" and their leg length is just perfect for me. I love wearing these with a long tunic. They are great looking, comfortable and I have received a load of compliments on them. These are my new go-to every day pants/leggings.

Title: Great value for the money and a terrific, attractive hair dryer for all hair types
Review: Great, powerful hair dryer. I love the modern design, looks great in my bathroom. Dryer has multiple settings and can work on any hair type. I have wavy hair that I like to blow dry straight. This dryer fits the bill entirely. Ergonomically fits perfect in my hand and the tip attachment helps me in straightening my hair using dedicated sweeping brushes. I love Revlon hair products they are typically very reasonably priced and this Perfect Heat model is terrific and does seem to dry my hair faster than any previous model I have owned.

Title: Memory Foam galaxy bud pro tips
Review: I purchased these to replace the tips that came with galaxy pro ear buds.  I purchased a different brand and they were too wide and not tall enough.  These are slightly taller - but less wide.  They work better for me.  It is a bit tricky to install them first.  Don't give up - pressing firmly.  Then, you should know that one size may work for one ear and another size the other.  I do have a bit of a problem keeping this in - but it's not the foam tip fault.  They keep them fairly short so they fit in the mini charger box.  I really need a longer foam tip to keep them in my ear.  I'm back to using my corded ear phones most of the time - it's a real shame because these would be so convenient in size.  Of all the foam tips, these were the best - they are not quite long enough to help me.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Was a little too big returned it.

Title: Gentle, cleansing, 7-ingredient baby soap w/nice scent; nice gift but way too $$$$ Review: This soap is 100% natural and handmade. It has seven ingredients of saponified organic coconut oil, saponified organic olive oil, organic castor oil, organic shea butter, organic chamomile floral water, lavender essential oil, and purified water. It is vegan, organic, cruelty free, and non-GMO. The bar is only 2.5 ounces.

I love the lavender scent. It lathers moderately well and is cleansing and moisturizing. However, at the current price of $9.99 this is only a bar to be purchased as a gift for a new mom as it is way too expensive in my opinion. If it were $5 or less, then I would have rated this 4 stars. If it were $4 or less, I would have rated it 5 stars.

Title: Nice dress Review: The material is nice. The dress is actually lined. I do not, however, think one will get the fit shown in the photo. I don’t think the actual cut of the dress is the same. The quality isn’t bad, though.

I did follow the size chart. The dress I ordered was too, large. I hope the next size down is not too big, also. I am 5’4” and weight about 170 lbs. I am large busted. My pants size is about a size 12.

I ordered light green and liked the color.

Title: ... in my sewing room and this one is just great. It is nice to be able to work ...
Review: Needed a TV in my sewing room and this one is just great.  It is nice to be able to work and watch at the same time.  Wonderful picture.

Title: husband says excellent
Review: Husband purchased these as a gift for a teacher who is sharing his skills at bird watching with young kids.  Husband reports they work wonderfully and were greatly appreciated.

Title: amazing!
Review: Honestly more and better then I was expecting! Great frame to build and take down, the led is super bright and is larger then anticipated

Title: does sooth the hair even if you have to wash it daily.
Review: I am pretty active with sports and I try not to shampoo every time to protect my hair from excess stripping of its natural oil.  I was surprised how naturally moisturizing this shampoo was without additional conditioner.  It does not add heaviness, and yet it gives me the clean I am looking after a long run and after a veery sweaty workout.  The scent is okay, but I welcome that I can wash my hair with a shampoo that helps in 'soothing' my hair and not strip it dry.  recommend if you need to wash your hair daily and dont want to condition it eery time.

Title: These work great!  The sound was nice, no static
Review: These are not noise cancelling, but they aren't described that way.  They are comfortable and easy to use.

Title: 2 shoes both left feet Review: We received 2 left shoes.
Could not contact seller.

Title: This shampoo is not as great for my hair as I thought it would be
Review: This review is for the shampoo only. I purchased two 33.8 fluid ounce bottles of the shampoo on sale at Marshals for $10 per bottle (regular price $12.99 each) plus tax because the fragrance was extremely attractive to me. However after trying this, I would not purchase it again. The fragrance is not as great when washing my fine short hair with it. It does not have copious lather like I like. Also, I feel as if the shampoo strips my hair like a detergent.

Title: Cakes up in my wrinkles
Review: Love NYX but this product isn’t for me

Title: Super easy, just plug and play
Review: it's a keyboard. I plugged it into my laptop and it worked. Lol.

Title: Not the quality I expected
Review: Sponges are very hard to the touch

Title: Easy to use.
Review: Takes care of the tangles and overall messy look of your cables but does not bundle the cables well.

Title: Sent wrong color!
Review: Used to purchase these a lot and I needed another pair. Good for the price. However, these are CLEARLY not metallic. They are glossy. Disappointed!

Title: No tea tree oil smell; lathers well, feels moisturizing, but nothing special Review: There are three 3.52 ounce bars of soap in this package for the current price of $19.54 ($22.99 minus 15%), which comes to a pricey $6.51 per small bar.

I tried this and it lathers well and feels a bit moisturizing or oily. However, it does not WOW me. Also, there is absolutely no tea tree oil aroma. In addition, all the writing on the package is in Korean except for the words on the front that says "Control BHA Soap."

Title: They do the job
Review: Ordered the XL, and these were a little tight around the middle. Not unbearably so, but wish there was a velcro adjustment for the waste size. These were cheap, so I wasn't surprised by the so-so quality. Overall, these are worth it, but consider spending a bit more- especially if you plan on getting anything more than occasional use out of them. They just don't seem like they will hold up o er time.

Title: Under eye cream / NOT eye cream; moisturizes but does nothing else Review: When I quickly ordered this, I thought this was eye cream. The package says eye cream and so does the pump bottle. However, it is under eye cream. I applied as per the directions under my eye from the inner to the outer corners. I already used this several times and all I notice is that it is moisturizing. It did nothing for the bags or dark circles under my eyes.

I was looking for a full eye cream anyway but am still disappointed that a product currently priced at $68 is just moisturizing and nothing else.

Title: Perfect polish, darker than the picture
Review: Essie nail polishes never disappoint and I use them exclusively. Easy to apply, long lasting, resists chips, I love Essie products way over Opi brands. I deducted a star simply because of the color. I found this to be darker, greyer almost with a slight purple tint (from the picture it looked to be more of a blue which is what I was looking for). So, please keep that in mind when picking this.

Title: It functions but not what I prefer
Review: It was very difficult to get the wrinkles out of the fabric. Also, the adhesive strips didn’t support the screen.

Title: Cute Fall T-shirt Review: This is a cute T-shirt to wear during the fall months. I ordered the brown. You can see in the photos that it isn’t really a brown, but more of a burnt orange or rust color. I love the actual color! The print is really cute. It appears to be a heat pressed transfer. It appears to be thick and good quality. I am hoping it washes well and the transfer doesn’t start peeling, etc. I won’t put it in the clothes dryer.

The T-shirt, itself is good quality. The fabric is a good weight and soft.

I am excited to have another cute shirt to wear in the fall.

I am 5’4” and weigh about 172 lbs. I am a 36 DDD. I ordered an XL and it fit perfectly!

Title: Cheap knock off but decent.
Review: I bought this to replace one that was similar that I purchased in a store for about $40. This one is definitely made cheaper but seems like it’s pretty good. I don’t really tap on the screen while it’s sitting on a table or anything, I just use it to protect my iPad when I set it down and things like that. The only thing that I don’t like is that the case doesn’t cover the entire edge of the iPad. The shorter sides are completely exposed and could be prone to chipping. I suggest you go with a more rugged case if you travel with your iPad. The only place I really use mine is while I’m sitting on the couch.

Title: Then, cheap, stretched out and too big
Review: Made in china. Need to say anything else? I'll wear a eight and a half and these fell right off and would not stay on even without putting a shoe on. They are way too big and they are extremely thin and nothing is described on packaging. I'm very disappointed in such a name brand product.

Title: What am I missing?
Review: How do these have so many good reviews? I feel like I am missing something. Do I not use tweezers correctly? Because the way I've always used them, there is NO way I can use these in that manner. They are not pointed nor sharp enough to grasp a hair. What a joke!

Title: Presentable manicure set but some implements difficult to remove from case Review: This set looks impressive and is extremely presentable. It has a lot of tools, many of which I do not use.

I use all the clippers the most and they cut well. The tweezers are aligned and pull chin and eyebrow hairs easily. The scissors are sharp and the cuticle cutter and file are good. I do not use the rest of the implements. However, my biggest complaint is the way these tools are packed in the case. In order to get to the nippers, I have to remove the nail clipper and then work the nippers up and down to remove it from the sleeve. The scissor is also tightly packed in. This really annoys me.

I do love the case. Note that the black plastic lock has to be removed before the case can be opened. 

The current price of $10.44 ($10.99 minus 5%) is reasonable for this. However, the difficulty removing certain tools from this case would have me pass on this.

Title: gaming bag roccat
Review: Husband got to carry a 19" monitor.... which is fine... however, it doesn't have enough pockets/compartments to hold cables and cords. I will update if any new info would seem useful.

Title: Customer service
Review: Anker products in general are pretty good but I just wanted to say that the customer service is awesome!

Title: Moisturizes well but smells like sour milk to me Review: This cream is thick and creamy and goes on smooth. It absorbs quickly and moisturizes my face well. However, I cannot stand the smell. To me the aroma is more like sour milk and that just kills it for me.

PS This is certified as vegan.

Title: Great device, low on battery life
Review: This Dumite hair clipper system is a really cool device. It is sleek, thin and light and fits perfect in your hand allowing you the ability to maneuver it easily around your ears, sideburns and back of neck. I had my son try this first (he is 35) and he absolutely loved it. He told me how easy it was to trim his hair (something he had never tried on his own before). With the change of heads and combs, he was able to adjust it easily for the length of his hair. I am deducting a star for the battery life on this. It states that after charging for 3 hours, it should last 2 hours. My son, after using it twice, had to recharge. Of course, the use was two weeks apart, but considering the device had only been used for about 15 minutes each time, I would think we could have gotten another use out of it without having to charge. Other than that, this is a nice nose, ear and hair trimmer.

Title: Small
Review: I bought this to try for my wedding...but it was sorta small and when it stretched to fit my wrist...it just looked weird.

Title: BEWARE! No strap included
Review: Very disappointed that it did not have a strap as advertised. This picture makes it look like there is a variety of things included. Don’t be fooled. There is nothing at all but the case itself. There are better choices.

Title: These gloves act like a pumice in the shower to exfoliate my skin but they are thin Review: These are very thin gloves that definitely exfoliated my body in the shower and left my skin feeling smooth and soft. They act like a pumice to slough off dead skin cells. However, there are three things I do not like about these gloves.

1 - They develop pulls easily. For example, when I was removing the plastic package bindings with a scissor, they developed several pulls just by stretching the glove away from the binding to cut the plastic tie. Perhaps these can be packaged in a plastic bag instead to avoid that issue.

2 - They are very, very thin and I do not expect these to last more than a few weeks of daily use.

3 - They prevent soap from producing copious lather like [[ASIN:B015IHD0LK Mesh Puffs]] do.

Nevertheless, these gloves definitely work but expect a less exhilarating sudsy shower and be prepared to replace them often.

Title: Don't bother
Review: Granted they only cost $11.00 but I thought I could get some wear out of them. They tarnished after the first wear.

Title: Just okay.
Review: They're okay and cheap good for a light user, mouse is not good for gaming not 100% flat and keeps jumping down not good for precise work either when you need accurate clicks because it keeps jumping down. I ended up giving them away and i got a wired pair.

Title: Exfoliating but way too large to hold comfortably; only a 3 pack not a 6 pack Review: In one burlap bag are three SUPER LARGE loofahs and two self-stick plastic yellow hooks. The loofahs arrived flat as a pancake but are humongous when wet (see photo). These are definitely exfoliating but they are impossible for me to hold.

Also, there are supposed to be six loofahs in this package and instead there are three super-sized ones. The current price of $13.93 ($16.99 minus 18%) comes to a competitively priced $4.64 per sponge.

Title: Flexitol
Review: Husband is diabetic and foot care, especially heel cracks are tough.  We've used a whole bunch of different creams, greases and oils.  This one seems to be the easiest, fastest way to get the heels healed.  You want to soak your feet... dry off.. apply Flexitol and put socks on overnight.  You can see results in a couple of days... I know it says see results in one day... I'm not too sure about that... but it's quick enough for me. We travel a lot and it's not always easy to find the Flexitol.  So thanks to Amazon for providing it to our door practically every where.

Title: Moisturizing, thick, scentless face and neck cream; takes a while to absorb
Review: This face and neck cream is a bit thick and sort of pasty to me. It is scentless and also very moisturizing. I put this on my entire face (excluding eye area) and neck, and after it absorbed my face felt super hydrated. What I do not like about this cream is its pastiness and the fact that it took about 30 minutes to absorb into my skin. Other than this, it is super hydrating.

Title: Great gadget for the techy in your life
Review: Very attractive watch, but as other mention, it's not that easy to set up. I had my nephew, on Christmas Eve, get it ready for me. Took him about an hour painstakingly reading instructions. But, once he did, and he showed me, I was ok with it. Has a lot of features that I really don't need (I am interested in tracking the miles I run primarily), so I see this watch primarily for a 20 or 30 something who love new gadgets. I personally, prefer my old Fitbit, but that's only because I am not the techy type. I have been using this unit non-stop for the last 3 days now and I will say it tracks mileage perfectly and I like the on-line experience as well. Only rating it 4 stars because of it's slight complexity in set up and use.

Title: 18 inch plug extension
Review: Needed a single plug in extension for one of those "auto rollup" cord keepers that has a triple plug in in a fan shape.  Didn't fit what I need to plug in so I got this extension and it works perfectly.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Color Safe Clarifying Shampoo
Review: I typically mix baking soda and shampoo twice a month to clarify my hair, except when it's colored. Then I have to resort to apple cider vinegar. I was hoping this shampoo would save me the trouble and it kind of does. I think it would work perfectly on fine, thin hair - I end up feeling like I have to use double to get through to the scalp and my hair is in the normal range.

Title: Quality control lacking
Review: None of the backs provided fit the posts. I had to take some from other earrings. Not happy about having to do this

Title: Was not happy
Review: This was very disappointing not soft will be giving away.

Title: Lots of missed motion
Review: This thing is not light. It's very heavy, bulky and big. I don't need the spotlight feature. On the highest sensitivity settings for motion detection, it misses cars driving by around 3 feet away. I had to totally reposition my mounting pole when I replaced my eufy e40 with the s40. I feel like I downgraded. I don't recommend. Just get a e40 and a solar panel and duct tape over the plug in the back to keep water out. I'm very disappointed in eufy. Maybe they will fix the motion in a firmware update in the future.

Title: faux mink drama eyelashes
Review: These are very cute and I like the alternating thicker clumps, more dramatic and visible.  Trimmable.  You get 10 pairs.

Title: Open jacket and top. Not a cable stitch like a sweater it’s rayon Review: This is certainly different!
This is a light open type of jacket and a top.

This comes as a top, so watch how you take it apart, so to speak,
Then it becomes a open type of jacket.
When it’s the jacket, it’s open like the picture shows. The front hangs down , but
The back is shorter.
When you want a closed type of jacket or top, you take the right side and bring
It across and under the left side, all the way, and there is a button at the neck , then pull the left side Over the right side , and button it to the right side buttons there are a few.
I like it better as a top.

The material is not a cable stitch like a sweater would be, it’s a Rayon fabric and kind of heavy And stretchy. It is soft.
I’m Not a fan of this type of material, I think it’s cheesy.

The tag at the neck was sticking my neck and was hard to get the stitching open with a scissors as it was sewed over about 4 times.
After 30 mins on each side ,got the the tag out and threw it away.

Title: Way too small.
Review: The shirt I ordered was way too small compared to other same-sized tops.  Cute shirt, but I cannot wear it.

Title: AWESOME
Review: love it  and easy to put together !  perfect fit too

Title: So cute, but
Review: Love the style & they are nice and soft. The pink color looks a little dirty, tho. Washed the a number of times & they looked ratty. Would not recommend.

Title: Very Unique with on/off switch for each port
Review: Unlike other hubs that I have owned, this has a nice feature.  It has on/off switches for each port.  There is a blue light to indicate that a port is on.  Not quite sure what I would need this feature for, but it is certainly unique and might be handy for something in the future.  The best part of this hub is that it is USB 3.0.  My computer has a limited number of USB 3.0 ports, so this allows me to expand one port into 6.  There is also a 7th port that appears to be just to be used as a charger port.  I do wish it has a few more ports, but that's the only thing I find lacking.  Being that this is a powered hub, it won't steal power from your system, so gives a lot of expansion capability to add USB devices.

Title: Not the normal Oakley quality
Review: Feel like they’re not going to last very long.

Title: I only like the fragrance and am disappointed in the packaging which is both unsafe and illegible Review: I like the sweet floral scent of this skin cream. It goes on smooth but feels like a mask on until it dries. My face felt soft but not really moisturized.

There are many things I don't like about this.

- I don't like the consistency of the cream (jelly like).
- I don't like how it feels like a mask on my face until it dries.
- Everything is written in Korean except for the title, subtitle, and "theskinfood" website (which is also in Korean).
- There are no instructions with the product or ingredients list on the jar. I had no idea whether this was safe to use around my eyes so I avoided the eye area during application.
- I also really hate that this looks like a small jar of honey. I can see children and uninformed adults thinking this is a food item. To me the packaging is dangerous.

The only thing I liked about this cream is the pleasant floral fragrance.

Title: Don't Get Taken!
Review: I misread how much of this product I was getting and was shocked to get only two bottles for the price.  The price is VERY inflated for two bottles of this conditioner which I can purchase for less than $4 at a big box store.  Don't get taken by paying almost $20 for a $4 product!

Title: Not impressed at all
Review: I go to the spa at least once to twice a month for either a facial or microdermabrasion. Doing this does end up costing me a couple of hundred dollars a month which, although this 60 something skin needs the treatments, is getting harder and harder to afford. I was excited to try this device at home. I honestly am not impressed with the quality. I did not get the same abrasion level that I get in the spa and the crystals are a terrible quality. What this device relies on is a strong vacuum and I found myself constantly trying to keep my face from being sucked in. Maybe it was me, or maybe it's because I am not used to trying to do this on my own skin, but it didn't work well for me.

Title: Does not stand up to the Norelco name. Doesn’t give a close shave Review: When I ordered this Philips Norelco I expected a good mens electric shaver, as Norelco has never let him down before.
There is only One blade on each side if you take the tops off.
One blade does not give you a close shave, but at this point I guess it’s better then nothing if your a man that
Does not want to use a regular razor.
Does not pull beard hairs out, but does not get a close shave.
My husband is still looking for a good Electric Razor.

Title: Complete Trash!
Review: Made my hair a tangled mess, went to return it and they want to charge me for a pick up? Beware of anything you know buy from third party sellers - you have to drive it yourself to drop it off

Title: Not RP-SMA Connectors for Antenna, these are proprietary push-on-antennas
Review: So I wanted to extend the range of this router by taking off some of the internal antenna's and screwing on another RP-SMA high gain antenna in a better location.  NOPE.  These are some kind of funky push on antenna's that are not threaded.  So good luck finding the right type of connectors to adapt to this box.  Don't advertise removable antennas like it's upgradable if it's really not.

Title: Rose scent is very mild
Review: The powder feels nice but the rose scent is so mild that I doubt I would buy this product again

Title: Bit of a big range
Review: I love this outfit, it is really cute and made well. However, that being said I do think a range of 0 to 6 months is too much of a wide range. I'm keeping it because I got it at such a great price and I'm hoping that my grandson,who is almost 2 months now will be able to get some wear out of it this summer.

Title: Stopped working after 5 days
Review: I turned it on and suddenly it didn’t recognize the cable box. I did a days worth of trouble shooting and the tech team of TLC agreed there is a problem . They said they would get back to me in 48 hours. A week went by and I contacted them again. They wanted me to do the same thing. They told me they’ll be in touch in 48 hours. We’ll see

Title: This stuff performs much better than I expected
Review: I always had to really scrub my underarms in the shower at the end of the day, to remove all deodorant residue. With this I don't have to and it works most of the day. Also, no white residue. This stuff performs much better than I expected. I tried the Degree dry spray first and it wasnt nearly as good. AND, I was never a fan of Dove solid. Idk why it works but it does. Great free sample I received and I will buy more when it runs out. Also, it has lasted longer than my other solid deodorant. Normally I would of had to buy more by now. Its worth it. Get it!

Title: It is me not the product, I can not ...
Review: It is me not the product, I can not connected. I have to ask someone, I tried and tried. could not do it. I lights up and seems to work, but I do not how to get it into my PC.

Title: Fits the Seagate Backup Plus Slim (2T) but reeks! Review: It fits my Seagate 2TB backup plus slim drive just fine. It's actually a little loose so it may slide around a bit if I carry it somewhere but I don't suspect that'll be a problem. I like the hard case and the padding on the inside makes it feel protected and there's a place to store the cord.
Deducting 2 stars because it smells heavily of cologne on the inside. What the heck? Did you guys spray it with something for some reason? It's ridiculously strong. Someone with an allergy or asthma would be in trouble when they open up this thing. Do not buy if you're sensitive to perfumes!

Title: Great size but need to be ironed
Review: I needed inexpensive napkins as I wouldn't be using them frequently and I thought about the Pioneer Woman who uses bandanas for napkins. Perfect. Arrived lickety split, are huge, and will be great as napkins. 3 stars because I will have to iron them every time they are washed! I don't know when I last ironed anything and initially, couldn't find my iron!

Title: Don’t buy it! Review: Garbage! Disconnects and stops recording.
Found that out when my dogs were barking out the window at the MAN in my YARD and I Realized it had not been recording all day.
So unless you plan on checking it every hour on the hour (then climbing a ladder to reset it) to make sure it’s still connected to your Internet I would suggest something else.

Title: Meh
Review: This cleanser is more like a toner than a traditional facial cleanser. It's very thin and runny. It doesn't foam up at all. While it the smell is not too strong, it isn't very pleasant. I will say that it doesn't irritate my skin at all. It also does leave my skin feeling stripped or dry. My overall feeling is just meh.

Title: Hawaiian Tropic SPF 8
Review: I always purchase this brand for when I travel.  Smells nice, but not overwhelming.  Not sticky.  Works perfectly and reef safe.  Not a block, just keeps you from burning a few minutes longer.  Water resistant to 80 minutes according to the bottle.

Title: DOES THE JOB SMELLS GREAT
Review: Dove antiperspirant mens spray is my husbands new favorite. This does the job all around smell,sweat,and long lasting. The price and deal cant beat last awhile. I would highly recommend

Title: Large pop and burn
Review: I did not use the blow dryer very often, because I let my hair air dry most of the time.  I used this maybe 3-4 times a month over the past year and half.  I used it today and it was making a strange noise, then a pop and sparks!  Unplugged and threw it away!  Scared!!!  Disappointed!!!

Title: Looks fun
Review: This is a nice and fun looking set. I just felt uncomfortable using it without the ingredients for the items included. The scent of the flavor smells good and everything comes well packaged.

Title: Difficult to Put on
Review: Straps keep unhooking while trying to put it on. Runs very small

Title: My face feels smoother, and No breaking out. Eyes starting to feel stinging in the morning! Review: Lumene sleeping cream has a wonder scent, although it does not last long.

I noticed since using this the first time my face had a slight sting to it the next morning and now every time I use it till I go in
The shower.
I'm thinking with the fruit acid in this also the Lumene sleeping cream is also a exfoliant , and a moisturizer!
My face is Not breaking out using this.
My face feels smoother the next day, and hydrated , but I don't look any younger lol.

I'm really on the fence with this night cream, as my eyes are starting to feel sensitive using it, a bit burning and i'm Not
Using it near my eyes.Before putting this on my face, I always use my eye cream.

I have never had a reaction like this before, and I do not have sensitive skin!,
Right now I'm giving this a 3 star.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Omg love this product.

Title: Kinda like a straight sack
Review: Cotton is soft , colors are vibrant.However it is like a straight sack, no waist at all.

Title: Great V-Neck, Very Flattering!
Review: So comfortable! The material is not only durable, but also soft. The style is flattering & the v-neck is not too low cut. Very glad I bought this in two colors...I'm very pleased!

Title: I am a woman and this was not ergonomic
Review: I returned this. I couldn't tell from the product images that the keyboard halves are large. When I placed the halves together and placed my hands on the keyboard, my hands were farther apart than I wanted them to be, which completely defeats the purpose of this keyboard. So much for ergonomic. I actually have a pretty wide upper build for my petite frame so I have to think that this keyboard must have been designed with men in mind... big surprise. Kinesis, get some women on your design team or at least in your test group, it is overdue. Thanks.

Title: Wow! Beautiful!
Review: Awesome shirt and comfortable! Long sleeves and love it for cold weather!

Title: I love using this for my TV
Review: I have a few wires that need to be plugged in for my TV, Wifi box and other items. This works great!  It fits well behind my TV without falling like the longer version kept doing.  It stands and is supportive of the different types of wires I need for entertainment.

Title: I do like this, however if you need to do certain ...
Review: I do like this,however if you need to do certain functions on the dvd or remote..they can be hard to find..they are marked but do not often do what it says..lol but the sound and picture quality is good...battery lasts for about 2 full movies..bad thing is there is no way to see how much battery is left and just suts off when dying..no warning..

Title: Great for home or business!
Review: This is a really nice hand soap. It cleans well and leaves your hands feeling soft and smooth (non-drying). The dispenser makes it a nice item to keep right on my kitchen sink for when I come in from the stores. It actually is quite attractive, too, and looks nice in my kitchen. During this pandemic, I have been washing my hands continuously, so it is nice to find a soap that is not only antibacterial but also moisturizing. And the fact that is ecofriendly is just icing on the cake. Highly recommend!

Title: Definitely not an ipod
Review: Let me start by saying I got the Philip's Gogear as part of the Vine program. I have always used an Ipod, so this was new for me. I really had serious issues with using this device. First for the positives: it's an attractive size and the display is clear. On the downside, I found it difficult to navigate. I also experience, while running, the jostling of the settings (meaning that all of a sudden it skipped to the next song). I had a real problem with that, so I stopped using it. Figure I can give the device to a kid or someone who doesn't jog or require any kind of non-static device. So, I rated this two stars thinking that maybe someone who doesn't exercise and is simply listening to music might have a use for this, but I am returning to my Apple.

Title: Cute sweater, Can’t get the paper to peel off over the logo transfer! Review: This is a cute sweater for a boy or a girl.
Made well.

The sweater is white, but in the picture it looks like the crew neck is red! It’s Not. Only the inside of the crew neck is Red.
My 5 yr old grandson is a Big tall boy. Right now its a bit big on him, but will fit him for the winter.
This sweater looks good with a shirt underneath.
I would not call this soft.

I want to wash this sweater to know if it is going to shrink, and we don’t wear new clothes till there washed, but The Red Logo on the front of the sweater came with a type of wax paper over it. It looks to me this is a ironed on transfer, but I cannot Get all the paper to peel off the logo it keeps tarring, and I’m afraid if I wash this its going to make a mess in my front loader washer & dryer!! Or is the red going to come off and the color will get on other clothes!

I asked that question on Amazon, and it looks like it was taken off!
3/ stars because of the paper, and its not as soft as advertised, or it might me with a dryer sheet!

Title: Nice, runs small Review: The color said black, but this looks dark gray with a blue-ish & gray color running threw it.
Has a nice zipper at the top, with a inside cover, so you do not get chest hair or under shirt caught in the zipper, and it’s
Easy to get over your head.
The material feels like a Polyester..
Sewed good.

My husband is slim, and this was uncomfortably too tight on him, and was also to tight on my son who can wear
A medium, but a large is more comfortable.
My husband did not feel this is a thermal warm shirt!

I would order this shirt in a larger size.

Title: No directions and not all earrings fit the gun hole
Review: Absolutely no directions and only one size of the earrings they send you fit into the gun hole unles there's some way to widen it we tried figuring it out, but once again no directions.

Title: No
Review: I have sensitive, acne-prone, combo skin. These made my skin break out. But they were soft and smelled good. I stopped using them though.

Title: Goes on like a paste; smells incredible; left my hair silky; relaxed my curls too much Review: It feels like I am putting Elmer's glue in my hair when I try to spread this around. However, with the water running in the shower, it does liquefy and turn into a nice wonderfully fragrant lather.

After I let my hair air dry, it was super soft and silky but my curls were too relaxed for me to ever consider ordering this again. I have medium length curly hair and prefer the curls to remain. This conditions super well and I love the feel of my hair afterward but it is the curl reduction I do not like.

Title: Not as expected
Review: I was really looking forward to this keyboard but unfortunately it is incredibly frustrating to type on it. There is a big lag, if it types anything at all.

Title: Unadorned Wraparound Garment Constructed From Rayon Jersey Fabric Review: This ARABELLA WOMEN’S SHORT ROBE (Black, Large Petite) fits my 5’ 3” size 10/12 figure perfectly. When I wear it, it looks exactly like it does on the model in the product page photo. (You do need to tie the inside waist tie—common on wrap robes—and thread the sash through the “belt loop” at the front edge, if you want the robe to hang properly.)

However, this robe seems quite expensive (about $32 on Amazon) for what it is. It’s a simple wraparound garment constructed from heavyweight rayon jersey (a knit fabric). The only seams are at the neckline and armholes. The knit fabric edges, including the lower sleeve edges at the wrists, are NOT hemmed, but are “finished” with loose machine overcast stitching. All it takes is one broken thread to start the unraveling of this stitching.

There is no embroidery or other decoration. There is no hanging loop. The robe is NOT particularly warm, and it’s complicated to put on (especially because the knit jersey fabric collapses into a heap whenever the robe is taken off your person).

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great seller, great price, great product!!!

Title: Super speedy, great price, Samsung name quality, good size for OS.
Review: Super speedy, great price, Samsung name quality, good size for OS. I replaced the slow 5400 rpm 500GB HD in my laptop with this. Much zippier.

Title: Impossible!
Review: You need to be a jeweler with the appropriate tools to make this work.  Awful design.

Title: Great, but one major flaw
Review: The sound quality is fantastic.  I like that they aren't hurting the inside of my ears like the buds do and i like that they are usb-c charging so i only have to have the one cord with me for trips. But the fact that you can't adjust the wire in the back is a major flaw.  I have a small head I guess.  When I put these on and lean back on the couch or in the car, the wire pushes the headphones almost up to my eyeballs. I'm considering not even keeping them if they can't be used sitting or laying down.

Title: It Works, but There are Some Issues Review: Living with a teacher means there is a constant need for supplies. Teachers almost always have to supply their own things for the classroom and one item that my teacher wife needed was tablet. I fulfilled the need with this UGEE Digital Drawing Tablet.

This tablet earns good marks in certain areas. It features a large drawing area and it is easy to set up. The 12 buttons can be customized and used as shortcut buttons, making your tasks easier than before.

The issues with this tablet, however, are a few. One small issue is that it isn’t wireless. This isn’t a huge deal, but wireless would be better. The positioning is a little more challenging than expected, too. But the greatest problem I have is with the stylus and its tendency to scratch. Peeling off the plastic was easy enough, but already, I could see scratches from my fingernails! Just the slightest scrape leaves a permanent mark behind.

Drawing tablets are useful to have and for the price point, this UGEE Digital Drawing Tablet is a decent option overall. It gets the job done, but the issues stated above convince me to rate it average overall.

Title: So sad
Review: The product was returned

Title: Moderate lather unscented cleanser; not my favorite
Review: This is a moderate lather clear gel cleanser. It feels somewhat cleansing and is good for my sensitive skin but it is not my favorite cleanser due to the moderate lather, gel-like nature, and lack of scent. It is also unscented. The current price of $19.50 is pricey for 250 ML (8.45 ounces).

Title: Though this item would be bigger.
Review: Very small as a (thank you) gift but not birthday or Christmas gift.

Title: Beautiful, but inconsistent quality
Review: I’m on my third case. They are all lovely and protect my kindle in my purse or jacket pocket. The Van Gogh faded, but stayed intact, so 5 stars to that one. I bought the black case with the phases of the moon, which I love visually, and the first one broke after a couple of months of light use (I tuck it in a pocket of my bag). I bought another, thinking I may have gotten a dud, but that one, too broke around the magnet. I glued it together and that lasted a few more months. It’s really too bad, because it’s gorgeous and does the job. Trying to decide if gluing it again is worthwhile.

Title: Definitely a beautiful watch, just difficult to initially figure out the strapping
Review: This is a very handsome, quality, men's watch. Excellent presentation in the box, the leather strap is quality and overall the watch makes a wonderful appearance. Rating this only as 4 stars as it comes with a weird strap closure mechanism that I have never seen before with a watch. I even tried to google/you tube it to see if someone may had posted some way to put it on (the instructions only spoke of how to set the watch, not how to strap it on your wrist). Not sure if this is a European way of watch making, but it was extremely confusing. Once we figured it out (and it took time), the watch overall is lovely.

Title: Not what you expect!!!
Review: This item took forever to arrive and when it did, it was at least 3 sizes too small. I ordered a 2xl because I wanted a cute cloak that I could wear over heavy winter clothes. Well, the picture certainly looks cute, doesn't it...it's not wool, it's lined with polyester and the sweater part of it is so thin it wouldn't keep anyone warm! I am completely disappointed and will be returning it immediately, leaving me with no winter coat! This site obviously is really great at false advertising!  Their information should say, 'if you want a coat that is thin, made completely of polyester...or some unknown material, comes 3-4 sizes smaller than what we advertise and has a sweater section that will let all the winter air through, then this cloak is for you!'.  H.O.R.R.I.B.L.E.

Title: Runs Small
Review: These black yoga pants run small. I'm a size 16/18 in pants. The XXL is snug all over and tight in the calves. The material is thin and not flattering because lumps and bumps are very visible. The pants do have pockets which is a plus.

Title: Great addition to smart home
Review: Enjoy using this new device.  Plays words to music, great video calling, access to calendar, weather.  Does everything I do on my smartphone

Title: All are great
Review: Love them. The leaves are a little big but the other items are precious.

Title: Very Snug
Review: I followed the recommendation to order a size up, but that really wasn't enough. I'm a size 18 and the 2XL is very snug on me. The material is light and a bit see through. I would suggest wearing a black bra underneath.

Title: Not sure why this has good reviews. My devices had a hard time connecting
Review: This devices brought my wifi network to its knees. Not sure why this has good reviews. My devices had a hard time connecting. And even if my devices weren't connected it would hog a bunch of bandwidth and slow the whole network. I personally would just buy an AirPort Extreme. That solved range problems for me.

Title: Prefer plain jojoba oil
Review: This might be a good product for some, but I prefer using plain jojoba oil to cleanse and hydrate my face. I just use 3 drops to remove eye makeup and then 3 drops on the rest of my face then use a warm washcloth to wipe it all off several times. Once clean I rinse my face, dry and add 3 drops to hydrate.

Title: This hoodie is thin and shrinks a bit, otherwise it is fine Review: The large fit loose on me as I expected. The hoodie looks good on and has a generous sized hood that can be drawstring tied. The center pocket is spacious.

I did not expect this to be so thin. When I think of hoodies, I think of the heavy sweatshirt kind. This is made of thermal like material (like a thermal knit undershirt). Also, after I washed it on warm and tumble dried it on medium (as recommended), it shrunk. Now it fits perfectly but I did not want it to shrink.

Had I known this was so thin and that it would shrink, I would not have ordered this.

Title: One of the nicest facial creams on the market!
Review: This is a really nice facial moisturizing cream. It is thick and luxurious to the touch, yet it applies evenly and thinly so it is absorbed quickly into the skin. I found it to be light, yet effective, and I can easily apply makeup after I use it. I love the way my skin feels after using daily for the past two weeks. Great presentation as well in the box and jar. Highly recommend as a good moisturizing cream!

Title: Ipanema platforms
Review: I own MANY Ipanema brand flip flops...this is my first pair of the harder plastic, platform flips.... I always buy up one size and that is true for these as well... I LOVE the coral color (which is actually why I purchased them... and even the tan colored soles... but what I am NOT fond of is the heavy, harder rubber/plastic soles. The tops are looser than the flat flips and SO heavy...  you end up sort of slogging along, trying to keep them on.  Eh.  Not my fav.  Sure wish I could find a this coral in a regular flip from Ipanema.  They are my go to thongs (that's what old people call flip flops).  I've included some pics in case they might be helpful.  . FYI...I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info be useful.  Further,  I do not receive compensation of ANY kind for my reviews... my purchases are VERIFIED and full price.  100% independent purchases.  As are my reviews 100% my own and unbiased in any way. However, remember they are my opinions which may differ from yours.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Wish they were little heaver.

Title: Attractive travel brush; no bristle shedding but brush moves too much in the handle Review: This is an attractive travel foundation brush. It works relatively well (see negative) with blush or highlighting. The brush feels good in my hands, the bristles do not shed, and the head provides decent coverage. It is also soft against my skin. Since this is a travel brush, it slides in and out of the tube flawlessly. My only issue is that the brush wobbles a bit in the hollow handle when it is in its fully opened position. I do not feel like I have a solid brush in my hands because of this.

The current price of $7.70 is competitively priced for this brush.

Title: this is getting to be way to long a survery
Review: I do not like all of these extra questions Enogh is Enough!

Title: 2 stars for now....
Review: My son got this for my dad,(his PaPa,) were giving it too him for Xmas being he's about to be 65 we figured it would be funny too after seeing reviews i can't wait to get my dad's reaction when realizing he smells like a call fire lol...

Title: Granddaughter loves it
Review: Very Very well made, thank you

Title: not working
Review: I have had these before this 1 would not do anything

Title: Dont buy the refurbished one
Review: Bought this hoping it would take advantage of my fios gigabit but have been very disappointed, best I can squeeze out of it is about 500 with cat 6. I have measured the speed with my old router and can get 900 out of it, I can get 980 when I hook up striaght to the fios box.I tried all different configs no QOS etc and different firmware but no difference, so I am positive it is the router that is under performing.  I would not recommend this router.

Title: Wow, what a disappointment
Review: I have been eyeing this lotion for months now and I originally was going to buy the coriander scent but decided to go for lime since we were headed into Spring. The lotion is so loud and smells so bad that I had to wash it off my hands to stop coughing. The scent gave me a headache and was very unpleasant. The texture and feel of the lotion wasn't bad, but for the price I paid and the amount given...It was ridiculous. It's like you're paying for the heavy glass bottle instead of the product. Yes the packaging is nice, but the lotion should have been the star. What's ironic is there's no hint of lime, not even a little bit. It's a hit you in the face, foul floral smelling nightmare.

Title: Stylish
Review: My granddaughters loved these sweatshirts! They both had to wear them to school the next day. Very stylish.

Title: Ok if you use it with another lip product
Review: I usually love Haus products, but this Lady Gaga Oil Stain doesn't do it for me. First, I think it is way overpriced at $24. The color is almost transparent and is not even good as a normal lip gloss. I am not sure how this even qualifies as a stain. The one saving grace is that it is moisturizing and I have been using it as a base to my morning colors and my lips definitely feel better and smoother.

Title: Earthy-smelling soap; cleans well; I did not notice any “evening” of skin tone Review: There are two small bars of soap in this package.  They have an earthy and almost “cigarettesmoke” aroma to me. This soap lathers and cleans well. Due to its small size,it is easy to hold. Nevertheless, I did not notice any “evening” of skin tone or anything like that.  

The current price of $11.99 comes to a pricey $5.50 per bar.

Title: For Tenergy batteries only
Review: According to the packaging, but not clearly stated anywhere in the description, this charger is for use with only the Tenergy 9v batteries. I'm extremely disappointed that this was not a clearly written out warning for buyers. I will be shopping around again for a different one. Hopefully my tensity unit won't need the batteries I have charged before I find one. I'm sure the unit will work just fine with the Tensity batteries, but I cannot verify this. They are getting 2 stars mostly because of the lack of clear description that it will only work with its own batteries. I cannot comment on its effectiveness otherwise that rating could change to a 1 or 3.

Title: Rosebud Salve, A Must Have! Review: Always a winner! I not only use this product myself, but I give it to friends as gifts. I have gotten so many "thank yous" since I gave them out at Christmas.

Rosebud Salve is a great multi-use product & I highly recommend it!

Title: 5 tiny plastic jars which hold about 2 teaspoons of product; lids unscrew easily Review: There are five tiny plastic (a.k.a. acrylic) jars in this set with different colored lids (black, teal, yellow, gray, and pink). Title: JBL Balboa Sub10 is a worthy contender Review: Although the JBL Balboa Sub10 delivers very good performance for a relatively modest price, I would never refer to it as "the little subwoofer that could." That's because it's far from little; this thing is quite big by my standards. However, considering that the function of a subwoofer is to reproduce low-pitched audio frequencies, I'll accept that fact that it's the size it needs to be do its job well.

Because I live in a multi-family building and have neighbors with which I share walls, I have not been able to crank up the volume beyond medium. That being said, I have been quite pleased with the bass sound and have not experienced any distortion with this subwoofer at the volume range that I have used. Audiophiles who do not have cost as an object will no doubt want a more expensive subwoofer than the Sub10. However, for the rest of us who are just looking for a dependable, reasonably priced subwoofer for our sound systems, the JBL Balboa Sub10 is a worthy contender.

Title: It's ok... Review: I did not purchase this keyboard for gaming, I purchased it to use mostly as a higher-end computer keyboard. I'm using it in conjunction with [[ASIN:B003BIFI6E the Razer DeathAdder Left-handed Gaming Mouse]].

I like the feel of the keys on this keyboard - the rubbery surface is nice; the bumps on the F, J and 5 keys are easy to feel. The lighted keys look very cool in the dark, and have a good, solid feel when I press them.

What I don't like:

~ The lights in the keys are too dim. You can barely see them in a lit room. There should be a way to adjust the brightness of these lights.

~ The Num Lock, Cap Lock, etc. lights are too bright. There should be a way to adjust these also.

~ The Keyboard sits at too low an angle for my taste - the back feet of the keyboard should be raised higher.

~ The smooth finish of the area around the keys shows fingerprints horribly. This surface should be matte.

All in all, I like the keyboard (and will keep it), I just wish that a few things about it were designed differently...

Title: Subtle & nice fragrance; lasts entire shower but scented shower products overpower the scent - 2.5* Review: There are 12 square shower steamers in this package. I find that to be the case with 95% of the shower steamers I tried. In fact, I have yet to find one that I love.

The fragrance of both is nice but fleeting. I am glad the color is non-staining. At the current price of $28.47 ($29.97 minus 5%), this comes to an expensive $2.37 per "steamer tablet." At this price money quickly washes down the drain. The one thing I do love very much about this, however, is that each steamer is individually wrapped and also shrink-wrapped inside that. This means these steamers can be used as stocking stuffers or for an Easter basket.

Love the Laptop, so light can keep it in my totebag or large purse, love the red color. I have never had a computer, like it. you do not have have to hit the keys, just touch it. Love also the Windows 7, I still have my PC, for normal use. But love this laptop. I hope my friends buy this laptop, has so many extras, like camera, etc. I am very impressed with the quality, I looked at some which were cheaper but you get what you pay for. And this is the Cadillac of Laptaps. Light weight und looks terrific. Would recommend it to anyone. Ingeborg Coffman

Title: Great pomade for all men!
Review: This is my son's favorite new hair product. Applies smoothly into his hair, is not sticky, and holds his hair in place for hours. He loves the light fragrance, too, and he loves the way his hair shines. We highly recommend this for all hair types (he tends to have very dry, flyaway) and lengths (his is just below his ears).

Title: Great for use between salon visits!
Review: I have had red light therapy treatments from my skin salon for years now (as part of a facial or microderm treatment). My salon tech sings the praises of using red light therapy for boosting collagen and making your skin look and feel youthful. This is a great hand held device. Well made (quality) and so super easy to use. I have been using it for over a month now and it works really well. I think it's great that I can use this at home between salon visits to keep up with my beauty regimen. Highly recommend for all people who want to look their best and retain youthful skin.

Title: didn't work for me
Review: top and arms were nice, great fabric.  Rest of gown too much matererial and tent like.  Returned.

Title: Not the same color as shown
Review: This charm looks pink. The one I received was not pink in any way. I did not like. Returned it.

Title: Great eye cream for aging skin!
Review: This is an amazing under eye cream! I have been using this now for a little over a month and I honestly can see a difference in the skin and under eye appearance. I have had dark circles and bags under my eyes for years now and I have been searching for something that can help make a difference. This Avya product makes my skin noticeably smoother and my skin feels amazingly soft. The dark circles have definitely been diminished and I look 5 years younger. Highly recommend!

Title: Smells wonderful
Review: I havent used yet but it smells wonderful.

Title: Speakers didn't work
Review: They didn't work took them to a computer store and they didn't work at all.

Title: It doesn't stay plugged in.
Review: Chromebooks made a big deal about how the plug into the laptop was to be pushed to make it stick...  this one doesn't do that.  I love how it came boxed and all, but the fact that it doesn't stay connected to my chromebook is a problem. I'd return it but I can't be without a charger. As long as I'm vigilant and keep pressing in. It will charge.

Title: Great for your laptop! Review: love this!!!!!
Perfect height for my laptop on my desk. Prevents neck/back strain. Love the drawer and storage pockets on the side.

Title: Looks very nice, not much protection
Review: This was good enough for my wife. She wanted more protection bit the lid covering is thin and floppy. It wouldn't offer much protection from a fall.

Title: Not very stable!
Review: This table is just okay. I dont particularly like how thin it is. I get that it is suppose to be stored easily and sleek. However, it just is not sturdy enough for me. The lip on the laptop tray is not big enough so my laptop just slides right on off especially lying in bed. The legs are so annoying!! I spend more time adjusting and adjusting and adjusting to make sure both sides are lined up symmetrically and in the right position so that I'm comfortable and my laptop is stable. I dont have time for that when I need to be studying. I have barely used this since I got it and probably will just sell it and find something else to be honest.

Title: Works differently, takes some getting use to! Review: This works different then any I have ever seen in this type of nose / ear trimmer!
Does Not have a button to press for On and off.
You press the medal bar, then when you use this, it only stays on
When it’s touching your skin! Then it goes off when it’s not.
To me this is annoying, and my husband won’t use it.
This takes some getting use to!

Does not come with the battery, but I don’t think any of these do!

Title: Burning product (your eyes are important!!!)
Review: Not good at all . Too strong for your eyes it burn :( trashed right after two used ( I did give a second try) nope 👎👎👎 don’t try this product unless u love burning eyes I don’t have sensitive skin . So go figure. Don’t say I don’t warn you

Title: Don't love it. The weight of my iPhone moves the light Review: I've been using my iPhone as a webcam and I thought this light would be a clean way to mount my phone and light my face. For context, the light and my phone are just above my monitor (i.e., looking down at me). Unfortunately, the "strengthened holder" (which is holding my iPhone) begins to droop after a while, and that in-turn drags the light with it. I have tried tightening the various joints and repositioning the light, but inevitably it droops again.

If I had the light directly in front of me, and not angled down, I think it might work better, but that is not possible given my desk setup. I'd pass on this.

Title: Not a great value
Review: The color wasn't as pretty as advertised,and the material is more thin than I was expecting.

Title: Pretty “Golden” Watch, Sized for Woman’s Wrist Review: This TIMEX WOMEN’S CLASSIC DIGITAL MINI is a very pretty “golden” watch that is sized for a woman’s wrist. I love the way it looks.

It comes with the watch already running, so you’ll need to replace the battery sooner rather than later. You’ll also have to grapple with the instructions for setting the time, which are only available online. The instructions for the “Digital Mini” are the correct ones.

The instructions could be clearer, although they do work. They don’t tell you how to switch from 12-hour to 24-hour mode, if your watch gets switched to that by mistake (as mine did). I fumbled with the Mode button until I finally got the mode switched back, though I’m not sure exactly how I did it.

The buttons are hard to press--a real negative if you want to use the chronograph or calendar function a lot. The hard-to-press buttons also make it hard to set the time. You will probably find setting the time and date to be easier if you use something hard to press the buttons for you.

Title: Perfect sunscreen stick to take on the go!
Review: This is an absolutely perfect sunscreen stick. First, it is a great size, easy for me to carry it in my purse at all times. Second it goes on light and smooth. Like most sunscreen, it does feel slightly greasy, but it does absorb fairly quickly. The fact that this is an SPF 50 makes it all the better (especially since I live in Florida and I am constantly applying some kind of sunscreen to minimize the impact of our super strong sun). I highly recommend this for all, even school age children since this will fit in a backpack easily.

Title: Great sound, but... Review: Was working great!
Easily connected to my phone and useful in my 2003 Jeep. The sound quality was amazing and 100% as if it was not a FM transmitter. But now after 6 months there is a frequency sound coming into it. Nothing has changed on my jeep, I drive the same routes and keep the same stations, but even if I switch stations the device is making a weird sound. It is actually getting louder day by day and noticeable through the music. Gonna start looking for a new one, but was great through the 6 months. (I've checked the stations and nothing has changed with the stations nearby either, so I know it is not another radio station frequency cutting in. I also do not have my antenna on my jeep since my last FM transmitter worked better with my antenna off)

I've found all the FM transmitters I've bought on Amazon eventually die after 6 months. So this being my fourth, I am not surprised.

As I was using the waver, I kept hitting the buttons either changing the setting or turning it off.  It just made it a hassle to use.

Title: mink fur eyelashes
Review: These are actually pretty easy to use.  I need to trim a tiny bit off as they fit my eyelash line a bit better than way... I can wear them about 3x before they are done.  No glue... so you'll need to buy some.  I buy LashXO adhesive.  Works well, washes off easily. I will buy these again.

Title: more for large surface area.
Review: very light, but not sure the hair actually drops into the small 'bucket' created unless you go every slowly.  the trainer is too wide for lower extremities,  good for other surface areas.  it has a fan button and I really dont know what this is for?!  okay, but not great.

Title: On the other I used my favorite, cheap
Review: I applied the mascara and primer as directed, on one eye. On the other I used my favorite, cheap, drugstore brand in the  "pink and green" container. You could not tell the difference!!! I am so upset that I spent so much money on this gimmick. Also, the next day, despite two face washings, I was constantly picking little black specks from my face left from the tiny fibers that are in the mascara.

Title: Barely any scent when dry; no scent in the shower; dissolves like a bath bomb but takes longer Review: There are 12 steamers in this package in 6 scents of Jasmine, Lavender, Rosemary, Orange, Vanilla, and Rose. Each tablet is half the size of a hockey puck. I elevated this tablet in the shower and let the steam and water droplets hit it. It slowly dissolved and leaked a pale green color all over my tub that (thankfully) washed away with little effort.

I have the nose of a bloodhound and I could not detect any scent. I could barely detect the scent before I put it in the shower. I then decided to dissolve this in the bottom of my shower as if it were a bath bomb. I still barely detected a fragrance. Why anyone would use something like this is beyond me, especially when very little fragrance is present. I already wash my hair and soap up my body with very fragrant shampoo and bath soap, so there is no need for a steamer in my shower.

Nevertheless, this lasted two showers but did nothing for me.

At the current price of $15.99 for 12 tablets, this comes to a reasonable $1.33 per steamer if they worked.

Title: Greasy and ONLY sunscreen Review: I probably won’t use this long enough for a review on its effectiveness but it’s SO GREASY looking on my skin. It’s not a “glow” - it just always looks like I just ran a marathon

Also the product mentions none of the main ingredients advertised on this page. All it says on the bottle is that it’s sunscreen

Review: Still not sure if this item works as advertised, the signal seem kind of weak

Title: great for droopy eye lids
Review: I don't know what the bad reviews are about. I am 50 years old with hooded eyes and these stickers did wonders for my crease. I even applied sticker on moisturized eye lids and the stickers don't fall off. I accidently bought size small but they still work. Next time I will order medium

Title: Cheap brush that doesn’t work well
Review: I gave this 3 stars because my 5 year old likes the look of it and thinks it’s her special brush and likes using it. But overall it’s a very cheap feeling brush that seems like a toy. It’s not very comfortable for an adult to use. Very small for your hand and doesn’t have long enough bristles to get through hair well. The comb is nice and the hair ties are nice. I would recommend a different brush though. It doesn’t detangle well on wet or dry hair. Wet brand brushes are much better.

Title: Great t shirts
Review: These are great!!! I like the length that keeps them tucked in, and the material is soft,breathable and extremely comfortable. Very happy with this purchase

Title: Straight Edge Razor Blades Disposable
