Title: Lightly moisturized my body in the shower but this causes the tub floor to become dangerously slippery
Review: I purchased a bottle of Nivea body wash and a sample of this "in-shower body lotion" was attached. As instructed, I rubbed it all over my body and rinsed off. It left my skin feeling nice and smooth and somewhat moisturized. However, as the lotion is rinsing off, the bottom of the tub or shower gets very slick. I would never purchase this because of that as it can cause a serious fall. Also, I find moisturizing outside the shower with a regular moisturizer to provide better results. If it did not make the shower slippery, I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: Great toning water. A must have for your daily skin regimine.
Review: I love this. A quick spritz in the morning and evening on freshly washed skin keeps my skin looking optimal and feeling great. I use this before applying my hyaluronic acid serum and it preps my skin like a toner and allows all my other beauty treatments to quickly absorb and optimize their impacts. I have been using this now for almost a month and it is great for my 60 something year old skin. I highly recommend!!!!

Review: I love wearing this hat with boots, skinny jeans and turtle neck.

Title: Not the suit for me.
Review: Well, at least I got a good laugh!  Using seller's size chart, I bought a size 5X(!). It didn't mention that I would have to be over 6 feet tall in order to fit into this swimsuit.  The crotch landed between my knees, and if I pulled it into position I had a huge roll at my midsection.  It reminded me of the swimsuits of the late 1920's.  I would give this one star for pure entertainment value.

Title: material is very nice, fit of the shirt is Goofy! Review: The material is so nice , I wish I could say that about the fit of this shirt!

The arms are sewed to low, under the arm, or big, or something, it just does Not fit like a shirt like this should.
I’m a Women, and wear a women size 10, and it fit me Odd. My son wears a medium to a large depending on the shirt, but he is Slim, 5’11, about 150lbs, and he could not wear this...At this point My husband didn’t want to even try on this shirt.
In this type of shirt my son would wear a medium slim, but the arm holes are sewn to large and Gooffy he could not move right, if that makes sense!
What a shame cause the material is so nice.
The shoulders are wide enough though!

Title: Runs small.
Review: Super soft. Runs small, but not worth returning.

Title: The set looks nice.
Review: The set looks nice and would make a nice gift.  I don't like the smell of the bathbombs.  When I opened the box, I immediately closed it.  I don't know if I got a bad batch or if they are all like this.

Title: Shoes are a little narrow, but fit well otherwise.
Review: These shoes are a little narrow, but fit well otherwise.  They are cute on. I think they are a little high for walking shoes.

Title: Florida humidity has nothing on this Frizz Fighter Revlon hair dryer!
Review: I live in Florida where the humidity during the summer wreaks havoc on my hair. I even splurge twice a year (at least) to get Agave treatments to help with the frizz. Although the Agave treatments really help, I often need more than the strong conditioners. When I first saw this Frizz Fighter hair dryer I must admit I was skeptical. However after using it for 3 weeks now I can honestly say that my hair looks so much better and I get less frizz and flyaway hairs and helps the Agave in my hair stay sealed in and makes my hair more manageable. On top of the way this dryer works, I love the styling of the dryer itself. It looks wonderful on my bathroom counter with its sleek smart styling and beautiful red color. In addition, it is a powerful drying mechanism and is relatively quiet considering. I highly recommend this dryer to assist in all your hair needs.

Title: Nice make-up application set but too expensive & finger holds too tight Review: This set comes with a sponge and brush head as well as one base applicator these go into. It also comes with instructions and a cloth case.

I love the sponge and brush. They apply foundation and blend well. However, I have three issues with this set. First of all, the applicator arm is cheap plastic, so I do not understand why two of them were not included as I have to keep switching sponge and brush heads.

Second, the applicator finger holes are tight. I am able to fit two fingers into it but only at the tip which makes application uncomfortable after a while.

This is a nice set with a giftable box, The current price of $39 is way too expensive for this-- about $27 too expensive in my opinion.

Title: Nicely made, comfortable
Review: These are very pretty and comfortable. The leg opening felt tight at first but stretched a bit with wear.

Title: which is not good enough for me I went back to Logitech
Review: What can I say you get what you pay for. It lasted awhile, which is not good enough for me I went back to Logitech, which I used previously, last a long time, wonderful designs. You actually can use your old mouse or any previous product with the new you order. I will never understand why some company skimp over a few dollars. In the end I will never purchase it again, because I trusted them to get something great. Design is no good for a board.  I must say Microsoft which my children have, looks great and they so not mind. Well I am sold now on Logitech, why switch when something is great quality. To me on a computer like a car is important. Maybe because I was raised in Germany, I expect quality. I say go a head and buy it, but be sure to know, in a few months you have problems.

Title: Small fit but nice and soft
Review: Cut narrow so feels small for a 2x

Title: Hard Worker's Choice
Review: When in construction in South Florida ClubMan helps alleviate the inevitable chafing.  My husband has tried others but ALWAYS goes back to Pinaud.  Also the 3 pack is a great price.  shipping was faster than projected.  GREAT DEAL ALL THE WAY AROUND.

Title: Fragrant steamers when dry; subtle fragrance when wet; lasted entire shower & left no stains Review: There are 12 sweet orange essential oil shower steamers in this package along with a plastic cutter for the wrappers. I love the aroma when dry as it is intense.

I put this in the shower away from the full stream of water at first and barely detected an aroma. After a few minutes in the shower of being outside a direct stream of water, hardly any scent was generated so I put it almost in a direct stream of water. It lasted the entire shower but the fragrance was subtle and it was only noticeable when the shampoo, body wash, and soap that I used in the shower were unscented. If my soaps had a fragrance, then I smelled nothing.

One thing I love is that it did not stain my tub. The orange color just washed away.

The current price of $16.19 ($17.99 minus 10%)comes to $1.35 per steamer which is very reasonable. The performance is average. I was surprised since others rated these so highly.

Title: Long chain for maybe bigger ankles
Review: This anklet is beautiful, but was too long so I have a lot of extra dangle after I fasten it (and I’m not referring to the butterfly dangle, I mean where I have to hook it closed). Aside from that, I love it!

Title: Comfortable, Works Well (Update 12-19-2017) Review: Bought this for the rare phone call to thr county or government where I'd need to keep my elbow painfully bdnt while being on hold or transferred from person to person endlessly. I figured on these rare occasions a headset would be just the thing to ease my elbow pain (arthritis). A bit cheap but works okay. Sill have to see about longevity.

Update - 12-19-2017: The pair I bought this spring got stepped on and the plug was bent beyond repair. I ordered another set and they arrived promptly. In less than a year it feels like they changed the design for the worse and sadly raised the price. I wish I'd saved the old set to compare because these feel far more fragile and fit my head poorly. They still work for those rare times when I need to be on the phone for a long period of time and I want to spare my elbow the arthritis pain. I'm less impressed with this pair than the last but I guess they'll do for the little I need them I really didn't want to spend big bucks on a better set for the infrequent use they get. Hope these last.

Title: Beautiful, plush fleece robe!
Review: This is a super comfy fleece robe. I love the hood (I never had a hood on a robe before) and wearing it after a shower makes me feel warm and comfy. I also love just lounging around the house in this robe at night when there is a chill in the air. It's also super cute and looks great on. I wear a size large in most clothes (I am 5'7" weighing about 155 lbs) and this is a perfect fit for me. Would make a great gift for the holidays for the woman you love in your life (especially if they feel chilly in A/C or live in cooler areas of the country).

Title: Said it was refurbished, wasnt
Review: I bought this because it said it was refurbished and that they were refurbishing it to make it look brand new out of the box. However, when I got it, I opened the box and all I could smell was cigarette smoke. I knew it came from a smoker's house immediately, and when I opened up the disc drive, I saw that all the plastics were completely yellowed from the smoker. The disc drive itself was broken, and it didn't even fit in my model anyway even though they said it did. I was able to take apart my old disk drive in the one that I had bought, and used some parts to fix the existing one in my PlayStation, but listen to me when I say DO NOT BUY THIS

Title: STUNNING clips that do not stay in my hair well; best for someone with thick long hair; odd closure Review: These clips (3 of them) are absolutely stunning and perfect for an elegant outfit. Unfortunately I have short to medium fine curly hair and this barely works in the back center of my head if I roll my hair up into a knot. This is definitely for someone with long thick hair. Note that the clips have an odd but easy closure via an S hook in the back.

The current price of $13.99 comes to $4.66 per clip.

Title: TOO Big to look real Review: I called the company before buying these earrings. As I did not want them to look Too big!
I was told there about .85pt each.
To me they look fake, and look larger then 1 Ct. each. About 1.25ct. each.
They also looked glassy.

Seem to be made well, and the setting is nice looking.

That said, I sent them back.

Title: Not pink but it’s milky; absorbs well but can get messy Review: There are five 27g (0.952 ounce) packets in this set. The packet tops will break off easily and mess up one's purse if care is not taken with these. Once the packet top is broken off, the opposite side of the cap is screwed on to keep it fresh and mostly safe from leakage.

The white (not pink) milky hand cream absorbs quickly. It is a lightweight cream and just an okay moisturizer. The fragrance is okay. The best feature of this set is that it is portable. However, I recommend the cap be screwed on correctly before traveling with this.

I have no idea how much this will cost but I would hope this would be less than $1 per packet.

Title: Great exfoliating aid, really works well.
Review: I typically use an exfoliator (sugar based) for my face and a stronger one for my body. I never used a cotton pad to assist in the exfoliating, so I was interested in how these would work. Surprisingly, these are great. Instead of using my fingers to massage, I use these and they work really well, giving me the extra exfoliating I need. I do not use them every day as I am afraid of it being too strong a mix, but twice a week is working well for me.

Title: and my friend is very happy with it's operation
Review: I got this as a gift, and my friend is very happy with it's operation.

Title: Smells like candle wax, has a moderate lather; is moisturizing
Review: I am actually disappointed in this bar of soap. This is a small 3.4-ounce bar that is supposedly in a calming lavender fragrance. I do not smell lavender. Instead it smells like plain candle wax to me. The lather is moderate and I like a lot of suds. The best thing about this is that it is very moisturizing. For that it gets 5 stars.  The current price of $5.99 ($6.99 minus $1) is expensive but competitively priced for this. Unfortunately, this is not a bar of soap I would order again. I prefer a high lather and a good fragrance, which this does not have.

Title: Disappointing, especially for the price
Review: I bought the small ones, since my hair is just above my shoulders, but my hair isn't thick (or long) enough for the rollers to stay in.  I think they'd be great for longer, thicker hair though.

Title: Not a luxury shower cap but a nice one; tight like a bathing cap; runs a bit small Review: This is an unusual type shower cap in that it is more like a swimming cap style with a bit of a bouffant of a chef's cap as is shown on the model in the Amazon photo. It fits well over my head even though it is not as attractive on me as a regular shower cap. However, it does run on the small side. The elastic stays in place and is very comfortable around my small head. I love how gentle it grips my scalp. There is a loop on the outside (as seen in one photo) where this cap can be hung from.

Both the exterior and interior are waterproof. This cap does run small so this is not for large heads. Coverage is good but my favorite caps are the typical ones that are fully bouffant style. The current price of $19.99 is way too expensive for this cap as it is definitely not a luxury cap. This is not a cap that will last more than six months.

Review: The fabric was very thin and seemed "cheap".  I sent it back.

Title: Started to chip and peel in 3 days ! Review: This bonder base coat worked pretty good at first.
I put it on over just Washed nails using a nail brush first.
I put the bonder on under my nails, over the top, and edge of my nails.
Waited for the bonder to almost dry. Then I put on
Two coats of my opi polish, then put a opi fast drying top coat.
Under my nails, over top, and tip again .

I use opi top coat every night this way, and my manicure will last
A little over a week and has a fresh shine. My finger nails grow fast.

I usually garden everyday but usually forget garden gloves, cook every night, clean etc,
And this worked ok at first!
I normally use a different bonder, it’s not Opi, but this Artistic bonder is chipping faster after using it a few times.
It is a little better then other base coat bonder I use to use, I’m picky.

Btw, I use to own a large beauty supply house, and hair salon, and put on bonders and
top coat this way makes a big difference.l, but not with this bonder.

Title: Packaging Issue
Review: This stickers worked well. The 3 stars is for the condition it arrived in. It came in a small zip bag which had some sort of residue on it. I had to disinfect throughly and wipe clean all the stickers. The residue was on the outside and inside of the bag. I was going to give it to my kids for individual use but because of this I made them into a poster for their birthday.

Title: Phone doesn't fit

Title: Attractive scarf, covers shoulders, but it is a bit thin and a tad scratchy

Title: This lavender honey soap lathers and moisturizes well but the scent is off-putting to me
Review: This Shea butter lavender honey soap moisturizes and lathers well but I hate the scent. I do not detect the lavender but do detect the honey scent. The combination is just awful to my senses. The scent is the reason I rated this two instead of five stars as it is a five-star soap in every other way. It also mildly exfoliating.

Title: Has Acetone, hard to take my polish off with this., pricey. Review: I use a base coat, then two coats of Opi polish, and Opi RapDri top coat every night, and my polish stays fresh and shinny for
Over a week.
That said if I don’t have a acetone in my polish remover it takes forever to get my polish off.
This Mountain Falls does have Acetone in it, but not much, seems like this is watered down.

My other polish remover is a larger bottle, does have acetone, plus other things in it, is 1/2 the price, takes the polish off in less time, and I think my nails are in better condition.
Although this does take my polish off easier then targets Acetone polish remover, but that is only a dollar or two!

Title: They were all damaged and unusable. Second package like this.....
Review: I bought this from a store and it was amazing however the 3 purchased from Amazon were all damaged so I just lost $$$.

Title: hardcase for hotspot
Review: This is a hardcase for your hot spot - it is exactly as portrayed.  Zipper closure with wrist strap.

Title: Handle is to large to grip
Review: Did a great job on my hair and flexible bristles did not hurt my scalp, but the handle is so large that I have a difficult time gripping it.

Title: Nice slippers
Review: Nice color, but look and feel cheap compared to Isotoner brand that I as replacing

Title: Not as cute as I thought. The rips at the bottom look like rips, not intentional Review: Not as cute as I thought. The rips at the bottom look like rips, not intentional

I thought the rips would look like it was made this way, but it really just looks like the sweater is ripped all along the bottom. Other than that, the sweater would be adorable!

Title: Terrible they caught and snagged everything
Review: Yeah not a great design the charms got caught and pulled off right away even snagged my clothes

Title: Three Stars
Review: Flimsey quality. Battery died completely. Bought a replacement battery. Tore up the headphones trying to replace dead battery.

Title: Came BUSTED OPEN
Review: this is something that’s going to be used in my body. All over my skin, which is sensitive and porous. The fact this is OPEN is UNACCEPTABLE, I don’t know how someone could have packaged this and thought it would be okay. Anything could’ve gotten in to it. This isn’t sanitary or sterile.

Title: Great light Great Price
Review: I love this portable light.  It is perfect and does not take up a lot of space.  Motion detection when you put your hand under it with a 30 second and 60 second option.  The only light you will need at a great price.

Title: to messy to carry
Review: I will start buying the correct sizes which Amazon carries but will travel on longer trips with regular sizes which I will not carry on and carry in my suitcase. I would not buy it again, to much waste and clean up if you get home.

Title: Good
Review: These are good except the logo on the back is silly and not a huge fan of the lines around the butt, but they are really comfortable and fit well. I normally wear a medium is athletic shorts and these fit great. Prob wear with a longer shirt to cover the logo and seams.

Title: Cute But Runs Small
Review: This is a cute swim suit bottom, but unfortunately it runs on the small side. I ordered this for my teen daughter. She wears a size 8 in jeans, or medium in leggings/underwear/sweats. This is a large which should have been a little big on her. Instead it was too tight in the hips. The white is not transparent, which of course was a worry of mine. It's heavy enough that it's not see through at all. Construction is good.

Title: Don’t buy
Review: Not worth the money!

Title: Orange/Regular fit
Review: OMG my favorite headband ever!!! I have waisted a lot of money over the years on hair accessories.  This one is perfect.  I can not stand any pressure on my head and after about an hour will have bangs in my face because i have to take other headbands off.  Not this one!  I ordered more in each of the colors!

Title: Cute But Impractical
Review: This lipstick case is darling! I really do like the kitty design. However, when I ordered this, I thought it was a universal lipstick case, but it's not. It's designed to fit the Paul & Joe lipsticks and only ones from 2017 or newer. Well, of course I ordered one of their lipsticks so I could properly try out this case. It does fit the case, but it does come out a little too easily. The case is cardboard and will not last long term. It reminds me a lot of the Tarte lipsticks. Their lipsticks are in a similar tube type container, but you don't have to purchase theirs separately. So while I do think this is cute, I also think it's very impractical.

Title: Good for running in mild temps
Review: I am 5'1" 105 lbs and ordered an xs short. Thank you under armour for selling petite sizes!! They fit great, next to skin but not restrictive. These are lightweight leggings for warm weather, we still have some 50s + 60s days and these are perfect. No issues with chaffing or discomfort, at least not at a 5k distance. Not see through.

Title: Nice overnight, standard duffel bag
Review: Nice lightweight duffle bag. Nothing fancy, but a good bag to use to carry shoes/clothing or any other items. Wish it had more storage and pockets. I like the luggage by-pass which makes it easy for me to use while going through the airport by attaching it to my roll on luggage. Not sure how long this bag will last, stitching is not that tight. If it was  my son using this to the gym I don't think it would last that long. However, it is good for an overnight bag (just not heavy duty usage).

Title: Two Stars
Review: Cords broke quickly and one only worked for a week.

Title: Runs a little large and long!
Review: Bought this for my average sized 9 year old son and it arrived on time, nice and clean, but was waaaaay to big. The XS was more like a M-Lg!! Needless to say, it didn’t fit, so be aware of the size issue. Otherwise it looked nice and the packaging was also good.

Title: Very pretty
Review: Nice value for the money

Title: Not an adult backpack!
Review: This bag is for a child.

Title: darker colors better for me
Review: It's a good pink tint.  I have just begun using them, so I can't really say if it's helping my lips to be softer, less dry.  But I can say that the color doesn't last for "8 hours"... it's not a stain.  There is a slight fruit punch odor, but it's not strong.  I prefer the darker colors because I feel the lighter ones sort of wash out my lips.  Honestly, these remind me of the "tinker bell" glosses you used to get when you were a preteen years ago.. and that's gotta date me!  Hope this helps.

Title: Does not secure as advertised
Review: It keeps falling off the wall, so I can only put it up when I use it and have to remember to take it back down. Very disappointing.

Title: Disappointed
Review: After several days with product, I got rid of the beard.

Title: Small in the waist
Review: I'm 5'3 170lb apple shape and it was super tight muffin top in the waist. Didnt fit my shape.

Title: Thin Material
Review: I love wearing light weight quarter zips. This one is even lighter than I expected. The material is practically see-through. I ordered this for my self, but it was a little on the tight side. I wear women's XL, so often men's L will work fine. This is more of a fitted style shirt. It fits me, but it is too snug to wear. Overall, it's just okay in my opinion.

Title: Bath bomb is irritating and left my skin itchy Review: [[VIDEOID:5f7f9f4edb46825585073574c310b95d]] There is one large individually wrapped bath bomb in this set that can be broken into eight individual pieces. The fragrance is subtle but nice. I used one piece in a foot bath and the suds lasted over 10 minutes. I loved everything about this except that this left my feet very itchy.

There was no color bleed, which is great also. The current price of $8.99 comes to $1.12 per bath square which is reasonable. If this did not cause my feet to itch, I would have rated this 5 stars.

Title: Clean up is a breeze! I love these makeup remover pads!
Review: To be honest, I have never used eye makeup remover pads before. Typically, I use a gentle cleanser and a washcloth and just hope for the best. But usually, I get little of the mascara that is on my lashes and through the day I start to see little black specs on my skin. I was really pleasantly surprised with these Kleenex removers. First, they are soft (not like a washcloth) and they smoothly remove all my eye makeup with no residue. I am sold and will be keeping these on my bathroom counter permanently now. And on top of it, the little dispenser is so cute it looks great there as well. If I had any complaints at all it would be with the size of the pads. Wish they were a little bigger. But all in all, great product!

Title: Price
Review: Won't buy!!! $95.00 for a tank top???? Shameful!!

Title: Worst bra ever Review: This bra is the worst fitting bra I've ever worn. It has zero support, the lace fabric is rough and extremely iritating to the skin, and the back keeps rising up.

I absolutely DO NOT recommend this bra.

Title: Comfortable skort. Not too short
Review: Comfortable skort.  Not too short, looks like a skirt and washes well.  Material is light-weight, construction is quality and I wish that this was sold in other colors because I would purchase more.

Title: no great for my hair type
Review: I found that this product works well when my hair is a a shorter length. As it grows, it really doesn't hold a curl but does make my hair softer and less frizzy. My hair is fine, wavy and longer in length. This product would be great for thick tight curls. I have noticed that my waves are less defined at the summer heat is approaching. You have to use a lot of product.

Title: Cleans & lathers well but its overwhelming sweet minty fragrance is a turn off & it left a residue on my skin
Review: This lathers up well and does not sting my eyes. I feel clean after using this body wash. However, it has a strong minty fragrance that has cloyingly sweet overtones and I feel it left a residue on my body. It is for these two reasons that I do not like this body wash.

Title: Great attractive and fresh smelling
Review: I love Dial products and I have used them for most of my life. This foaming handwash is a must have for any household. Antibacterial, I keep it on my kitchen and bath sinks and it helps me and my guests stay healthy and clean. I love the scents of this package, particularly the lavender as it makes me feel fresh as well, and the containers are attractive and look great on my countertops. If you care about your family and friends, drop the bar soap and keep these instead near your sinks for daily use.

Title: Get It!!
Review: OMGEE! As someone who has always struggled with underarm odor, I Love this stuff! I was previously using Dove Dry Spray and it eventually stopped working, but Im on my 3rd can of this spray now, and it's going Strong!!! It could probably last all day but because of my history, I dont like to chance it. So I normally do 4 sprays total, a day. It smells good as well. Perhaps a pear smell? And it disappears once its on. The only reason I have rated it 4 instead of 5 stars is because something is wrong with the spray nozzle. It only sprays out adequately when the bottle is upside down. And that has happened with all 3 bottles I have purchased. (Not on Amazon). But I feel thats a small price to pay for such a Great product! Hopefully they fix the nozzle.

Title: Nice, inexpensive nude pallet.
Review: I bought this to create work appropriate looks, and it works well for that. I think it would be a better palate if it included a darker shade, however. Good mix of matte and shimmer shades. It's much less expensive ($5?) on amazon than at CVS.

Title: nice
Review: very small which i wanted  but i only hear sound from ONE speaker on my TV  .. but for the price ill keep them  i like the size  ...  its for a 19"  TV  so  it works  sounds better than the TV speaker  i gotta see if i can figure out the settings inside the TV  maybe its just single  ill look on the TV remote later  but  sound from both speakers woulda been nice  i mean otherwise what is the point !

Title: Wow
Review: This is awesome!!! Staying in RV for 2 months and we are so happy we got this!!!

Title: Very Nice
Review: These are super cute rain boots. They are a little heavy, not too much. Super comfortable and very fashionable.

Title: Not really a great clipper set
Review: Not really a great clipper set.  Does not cut close enough on black hair to get a really close ceasar cut.

Title: Not flattering
Review: They fit super weird in the crotch area. It bulges out. I won't wear them!!!

Title: Back scrubber
Review: Absolutely love this, and at such a great price, only con would be wish it was a few inches longer. Highly recommended.

Title: Canon PowerShot ELPH
Review: It will work just fine. But not for the camera I got it for, it's too big.

Title: Gave me a rash Review: I have purchased this hand soap in the past with no problems. This purchase isn't good at all. With pandemic wash my hands like a surgeon. I have a terrible rash going up my arm, and it is so watered down it's ridiculous!

Don't purchase again.

Title: The sound was great but the quality isn't top notch
Review: These broke not long after purchase. The sound was great but the quality isn't top notch.

Title: A Tiny Robe for an X-Large!
Review: This is a cute robe, BUT it must be a child's X-Large!

Title: Eye cream
Review: I purchased this first for my mom for her christmas stocking.  She loved it so much that I purchased some for myself.  It's lovely.  I don't think it does anything miraculous, but a very small amount goes a LONG ways.  It has a lovely, very light scent.  I just like it!  I will keep purchasing it.

Title: Item Returned
Review: This item was returned for inferior quality video, and processing power. Also, the UI made it a pain to deal with especially since I am a fan of Stock Android UI (such as on Nexus devices).

Title: Color different in person
Review: This is an ok romper but the color is a lot more neon orange then the pretty orange/reddish shown in the picture. The fit is ok, and the material is comfortable. Would be better in a different color.

Title: love the color
Review: the left and right clicks sort of stick making it hard to play my games. will keep it for a backup

Title: Product functions are too susceptible to breaking.
Review: This would be a great product, but after about nine months this CD player became defective and the cassette player it almost impossible to work. The sound is a lot lower than expected without external speakers. One thing I love is the turntable And the tuner is good.

Title: beautiful little charm
Review: Disappointed that my charm arrived in a foot long clear plastic bag.?? No dust bag, No polishing cloth,No box.  If you are ordering as a gift just have your own presentation ready!

Title: Hair combs too short and teeth break easily.
Review: The teeth on these hair combs are too short and don’t stay in your hair.  Too bad, they look fashionable but first two I put in my hair some of the teeth broke off.  Very brittle plastic.  Don’t buy.

Title: One of the nicest pair of sunglasses I have ever owned!
Review: I needed a nice pair of aviator sunglasses for a Caribbean cruise last Christmas. I ordered these, not sure what to expect. I was pleasantly surprised. They come in a cute case to start with and protected by plastic. These are super lightweight, quality made and fit my oblong shaped face perfectly. Outside, they definitely protect my eyes from harsh rays and make it much easier to do all outdoor activities (especially driving). I am wearing these daily now and I get a load of compliments every time I wear them. Highly recommend.

Title: A cross between a gel & a cream; says to avoid applying too close to eyes????? Review: There is one ounce of eye product in an attractive blue tube with a plastic crystal top. Although this says it is eye cream on the tube, it is more like a cross between a gel and a cream and it is slightly opaque. What I don't like is that it says not to apply this product too close to the eyes. Really? This is an eye cream.

Nevertheless, I applied this on my lids and under the eye. It goes on smooth and soaks in and hydrates. However, it hydrated my eye area similarly to the same results I see from the other creams I have. There was no reduction of dark circles or anything like that. I personally would never order this again because of the warning not to apply this close to the eyes.

The current price of $9.59 ($11.99 minus 20% off) is reasonable for this if one does not mind the warning.

Title: Super Comfortable and warm
Review: These are really comfortable. I wear them outside going to/from garage or mailbox. They are warm too! Im buying another pair for back up

Title: Huge Review: These pants were very lightweight and shiny. I love the idea of palazzo pants with a fitted waist. These pants were the right length with a conservative heel. The waist was too big
(but I have a small waist) and there was enough palazzo for two people. Cute idea and not badly made, but looked cheap because of the very thin and shiny fabric. Returned.
I am 5 ft 6, short legged and 116 lbs. I ordered a small.

Title: Perfect size!
Review: Compact footprint on table between my hubby's chair & mine. It holds both of our glasses & expresses our patriotism at the same time!! Great quality!

Title: Five Stars
Review: Functions as it should.

Title: I SEE YOU Review: the camera is but working, the customer service is poor. the actual software to view the video is inaccurate. the manual is absolutely obsolete. the people that answer the customer service line knows barely nothing about how it works. had to call several times because the manual was missing lot of directions. I have not had to actually relay on the camera for an auto accident, so am hoping that it work
for the main purpose it was purchased.

Title: Wonderful shampoo, terrific light fragrance!!!
Review: I love Herbal Essences shampoos, have used them since I was in my 20's. Great product, wonderful fragrance (I don't see it overwhelming at all). I particularly love this coconut milk hydrating variety as it truly made my hair soft and managable and easy to style (I also bought the coconut milk conditioner variety as well). This has a rich lather, is able to be used in all water types and keeps my hair smelling fresh and yummy all day. I have had a lot of compliments since I have been using this (friends have commented on the great fragrance). Kudos Herbal Essences for another great shampoo variety!

Title: Product arrived in good shape. Unfortunately the pump part of the soap ... Review: Product arrived in good shape. Unfortunately the pump part of the soap dispenser doesn’t work. Wasted $
Not something I will waste time and energy returning.

Title: Very loud material
Review: These pants are very loud when you walk. I was irritating so I returned

Title: Fragrant when dry, subtle when wet; lasted 8 min & left no stains but particles go down drain Review: There are eight (8) shower steamers (mint, lemongrass watermelon, eucalyptus, rose, strawberry, lavender, and orange) in this package with a plastic cutter. They all smell nice and as I expected.

I tried the strawberry one in my shower and made sure to put it away from the full stream of water. Initially a very light scent was generated but once I started washing with my scented soaps, I smelled nothing. It lasted the entire long shower and dissolved in about 8 minutes. Besides the non-existent scent once the shower starts, I really hate that the particles in the steamer wash down the drain. I had to put a strainer over the hole to catch all the debris (flower pieces, etc.).

One thing I love is that it did not stain my tub. The red color just washed away.

The current price of $15.99 comes to $2 per steamer. This is competitively priced.

Title: Beautiful silver earrings!
Review: These are a super attractive pair of earrings. Light on my ears, easy to clip on, I can wear these all day and evening and don't even remember they are there. I love the filigree geometric pattern and they look great on (I have received several compliments while wearing them as well). These would make a great gift for someone or buy them for yourself. I can wear these casual or even for dressier occasions. Highly recommend.

Title: Good product
Review: My wife loved it!

Title: Not worth it
Review: The cover doesn't stay on unless you glue it. But I guess that defeats the purpose. I have to be honest I guess if you put this on a computer or something where it never moved it would be fine but I make turbo cooling fans for brushless rc motors and this cover just clicks on with pressure kinda stays but you never know when it's win fall off. The actual part that screws on is ok but not justified in the price. Looking elsewhere.

Title: Do better
Review: Way too large and ill fitting. Not comfortable and you feet will slide all over the place when they're wet

Title: finally !
Review: i finally found  the perfect screen cleaner and cloth  definitely ordering larger size cleaner and throwing the others in the trash !!!

Title: Best so far .. but eh Review: Let me just start by saying I've tried several tracking devices
Tile
TrackR
Sunny&Lucky

and Tile is the best so far.

Pro's
Setup is fairly easy
Works as advertised
Has crowd support (for finding your Tile)

Con's
Drains your smart phone battery (really quick .. about 5x more than normal for me)
Disabling the Tile works to stop battery drain, but re-setup is difficult

So after using Tile Sport for 2 months now ..
I have uninstalled it entirely so my mobile phone can actually be mobile (without always charging)

Hence only 3 stars
I wish there was a setting to manually set the bluetooth pings (ex. every 30 mins) to help with battery drain.

** UPDATE ** I finally just removed all together .. the battery drain on me & wifes phones was just too much.
A lot happier now that we have removed the app, and threw away the tiles

Title: Even better than the high-end dry shampoos
Review: This is even better than the high-end products that I've used in the past. I love the scent and the volume it gives my hair. I highly recommend to anyone that is looking for a dry shampoo to give them some texture or refresh their hair.

Title: Four Stars
Review: Wasn't like the scratch and sniff patch that I had used.  However, a wonderful fragrance.

Title: Headphones
Review: Good sound quality but not the best for noise cancellation. It is inconvenient they are not foldable and, considering so, they should at least come with a case. Fit feels snug and they have not fallen off on accident. Bluetooth range is very good, I have been able to walk 3 floors down in my house and did not lose connection.

Title: If I could give more than 5 stars I would!
Review: If I could give these slippers more than 5 stars I would. I have very painful planters Fasciitis. This was instant relief. I love being barefoot in the house, but I just can’t take the pain. These were a great alternative.

Title: Five Stars
Review: super useful

Title: Runs small.
Review: Shirt was not true to size.  Runs small.

Title: Hammed disc is not done well looks cheesy, Not a chocker Size. Review: This is a ok Hammered Looking gold color Dainty disc.
It said it was a chocker, which it is Not, if it was it would be the new look, as all the different sizes Necklaces are out oF style Now unless your
You would wear A chocker with this.

The hammered looking disc is not done very well, and looks Cheesy, it looks better wearing this on the shiny side.
My younger daughter will wear this.

Title: Strips my hair; is not conditioning; lathers exceptionally well – 2.5 stars Review: I never heard of a shampoo bar. This lathers exceptionally well and I found that surprising. However, it strips my hair of everything and it does not condition at all. I am also not crazy about the scent--the aroma is not pretty but not offensive either.

The current price of $15.89 for this bar is also outrageously expensive. I personally prefer liquid shampoo and conditioner; it's a better deal and better results. Now if one could shower with this as well as shampoo their hair, this might have a purpose when traveling.

Title: No box, no manual, bit so far no problems
Review: This is as basic as it gets.  It was shipped in a non-ESD plastic bag with little protection.  It has no privacy cover.  You can get access to the manual on-line, but a print copy would have been nice.  I found out there that you can tilt the camera rather than needing to hang it cocked downward.  It has sufficient range of motion to work on a 55-inch monitor.  Picture quality is acceptable to good.  I have some issues with backgrounds being blown out that I need to address.

Title: Menthol-like fragrance is too strong for me; sort of burns; I use as a hand soak Review: This peppermint and eucalyptus epsom salt has a strong menthol-like fragrance which is too intense for me. Nevertheless, I used 1/4 cup to about 8 cups of warm water to soak my hands to reduce swelling and aches. This worked well but the fragrance was difficult to inhale. Also, since my hands are always in water, the combination of the oils and salt made my skin feel like it was burning. It was almost like I had cuts on my hands and there was salt in the wounds.

There are about two to four servings in this 15-ounce package depending on how much is used. They recommend no more than half a cup for a full standard size bath for the first use.

The current price of $7.99 is pricey but competitive.

Title: with a name like "be quiet
Review: with a name like "be quiet," I would expect to be able to go above 75% pwm without noticing the sound. I mean, it's a good fan and it moves air, but if you want a completely silent fan, I'd keep looking

Title: Gift for traveling husband
Review: Bose is still a great product, comfort, life, etc.  I bought these for my husband who wanted a smaller, but workable headset for travel.  He loves them.  I will update if there are any issues.

Title: Just an ordinary make-up bag that is plastic on outside w/black cloth lining Review: This bag is nothing special. It is an ordinary make-up case that feels like plastic on the outside, has a nice leopard print, and a black lining. It is a bit larger than what most women will carry with them and certainly has enough room to fit sponges, brushes, eye, blush, translucent powder, lipstick, lip liner, eyelash curler, etc. with room to spare.

The zipper open and closes easily. The seam on the bottom of the bag is sized differently in the sense that one side is larger than the other (see photo).

Title: Brush isn’t set right & doesn’t comb through my fine hair; comb is okay Review: At the current price of $8.99 for this boar bristle and comb ensemble, I am not surprised that it is substandard. First of all, boar bristles brushes are usually expensive. Secondly, the brush rows are not evenly spaced on the brush I received and I had some bristle shedding which is usually expected in boar bristle brushes.

However, this brush DOES NOT glide through my fine hair; it only skims the surface. The wooden comb is pretty and works but I am not a comb person.

I am personally not at all impressed with this set as it doesn't work for me at all.

Title: Not as expected
Review: I put this on under my eyes to brighten dark circles but it leaves more cakey look and creases and wrinkles are noticeable.

Title: It works
Review: I added a few of these to my system - they’re an updated from the previous square version and now attach via a magnet to a ball and socket base which, in turn, attaches to your wall (or wherever) with a sticky pad. The ball and socket design is great - makes it so much easier to change the angle of view or remove the device to swap out batteries; however, I’m not a big fan of the sticky pad. Make sure you want it to stay where you put it because the sticky won’t let go without a fight and will probably take a little paint or wallpaper with it if you DO remove it.

Title: POOR quality materials!!!!
Review: Metal is very flimsy!!!!

Title: Five Stars
Review: It’s sunscreen

Title: Not that easy to use
Review: I tried really hard to make this work after my shoulder surgery but it is not very user friendly. It has a great storage aspect so I was really hoping this would work but it was just a big mess. I wouldn't recommend this.

Title: Works very well and stands up to my sweat Review: Update: these randomly stopped charging shortly after the warantee timeline expired. I did use these to work out and I’m wondering if my sweat impacted the battery life. I did try to contact the seller and Amazon and I was out of luck. Waste of my money. Cannot recommend.

Original review: These work super well! I read MANY reviews before buying this product. I wear these when working out and despite my sweat, and even when wearing glasses, they stay in fine. I have had no problems with bluetooth connectivity across several devices and it holds a charge for quite a long time. I am so grateful for this product. In our small home, I can do a YouTube workout while my spouse is sleeping without waking him. Just 5-10 years ago this technology wasn't available or at least so cheap. This is great.

Title: nice but not what i wanted
Review: gonna be returned  i bit the bullet and ordered one for double the price you get what you pay for in this world

Title: Dermelect nail strengthener
Review: Not really sure it's done much to strengthen my old, weak nails, but I still like it as a base coat. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All my reviews reflect my honest, personal experience with the reviewed item - your experience may be different.  I receive/accept NO free products or discounts that are not available to all shoppers.

Title: Tiny much z?
Review: None one said you need 3 to make the sidebar of one normal wish I hadn't gotten.

Title: Great way to help your hair look shinier and healthier!
Review: I get Keratin treatments several times a year. Of course, they can add up money wise, so I have a tendency to try to stretch the times between visits to the salon. I typically use special sulfate free shampoos and also look for supplements to help my treatments last longer. This Kerazon Keratin argan oil helps fill that role.  My hair looks smoother, shinier and between treatment frizziness is diminished. I highly recommend this even if you don't do keratin treatments to keep your hair healthier and better looking.

Title: Choppy Cut
Review: These don’t cut smoothly. The cut is very choppy.

Title: Great daily body wash for men with the added benefit of exfoliating!
Review: Both my 35 year old son and husband have been using this daily for the last almost 2 months. They both absolutely love it. For years I have been expressing to them the benefits of exfoliation and I guess they thought the idea fairly effeminate. With this Nivea product, they are finally reaping the benefits of exfoliating and smoothing their skin (face and body). I can honestly say that my husband (who will be 67 in October) has never looked better. I know now they are both sold on this product and I highly recommend it not just for exfoliating but for a terrific body wash that leaves one feeling revived and smelling great. Highly recommend!

Title: Bigger! Review: My husband uses this nose trimmer and thinks it’s bigger then his old one, and doesn’t
Trimmer as close!

Title: Easy fit
Review: Love. Don't like that I can't tumble dry but they're cute

Title: Beautiful
Review: This pin is really beautiful and well made. However, you must be careful to angle it well when putting it in, or it will slide out if you have thick or heavy hair. I can only use this for buns... not french twists, because it falls right out.

Title: I only like the soothing cream & can pass on the other items Review: At the current price of $24 ($30 minus 20%), this comes to $6 per item. There are four travel-sized skincare items in this package. The products are a fresh cleansing oil, facial cleanser, unscented toner, and soothing cream. The first two items are cleansing products. I tried all items and did not care for anything but the soothing cream.

The oil and toner are difficult to dispense from the bottle. I really had to squeeze hard. The cleansing oil did nothing for me, nor do I feel it was cleansing. The facial cleanser is okay but not better than soap. The toner is good but I personally do not use toner much. The soothing cream is hydrating and I like that. It is like a good unscented face cream.

Title: Short Lifespan, Retired too soon
Review: The wallet snap broke within two weeks. I did not last through my trip. The purse however  lasted about a month and a half before it started getting holes in it.  If you're getting it for a short trip for protection that's perfect.  But it isn't for everyday. The passport fits in the wallet perfectly, and the pockets are plentiful in the purse.  I like a little flashlight, and even though I no longer use the purse or wallet I keep a little flashlight in my purse that I use now.

Title: Nope
Review: These are nowhere near the right texture for a makeup sponge. These are hard and they don’t work well. When you wet them, they don’t hold water properly. They don’t blend really well. They smell like new tennis shoes when you get them. I really gave them several uses and tried them in several ways and they just do not work well. They are much too firm. It is like trying to apply your makeup with an eraser.

Title: Average ...or not

I've been using it as an intercom, too, so I can call my husband instead of shouting or walking to the other end of the house.  We've also gotten used to asking Alexa all kinds of questions...most of which get answered.

Title: Don't buy

I usually size up when it comes to swimsuits, so the 2XL is what I would go with. The bottoms were a little big, but they would work, except I didn't like the ruffles at all. The top was too small, not just in the cups, but everywhere. It was too tight in the middle and the material didn't stretch well. The cups were too small, I was pouring out of them which is not an attractive look. The construction seemed to be fine. It might be better if the pieces were sold separately. Title: Piece of Crap!
Review: I purchased this from DealYard and they were not cooperative in taking this back because I plugged it in to see if it worked and it didn't. But when I mentioned this to the dumb bimbo on the phone she said that they don't take products back that  have been "used". I told her they weren't in my hair all I did was plug them in and they didn't even heat up! She said that they were considered used because I took it out of the package!! My question to you is How do you know something works or not if you DON'T TAKE IT OUT OF THE PACKAGE AND TRY IT OUT?!?" She was a total idiot! I will NEVER purchase ANYTHING from DealYard again!!!! But, Remington WAS helpful and they took it back and gave me a total refund!

Title: 👍

Title: Runs Small
Review: These sandals run too small. You should order at least a size up. My daughter has a size 9, regular width foot. Since these are open, I expected them to fit regardless of any potential width issue. Unfortunately, they don't stretch or flex to allow any foot to fit unless they are smaller and extremely narrow. Title: Thick pink cream; moisturizes well but does not absorb; more for winter Review: This cream is not what I expected. First of all, it is pink. I do not like creams that have color to them. Thankfully, there is no color that comes off on a tissue, so it fades away after it is applied.

I applied this to my face and neck. It is incredibly hydrating but the cream never fully absorbs. It just lays on top of my skin no matter how much I rub it in. As a result, I consider this more of a winter cream where one wants protection or a barrier from the cold and wind.

I do love the fragrance of this, however.

The current price of $23.96 ($29.95 minus 20%) is competitively priced.

Review: I was looking for a hair clipper that was versatile and could be used on adults as well as children during this pandemic. This Toovren set is just perfect. It has loads of attachments to be able to do the job professionally and quickly. Parts are easy to switch out and clean. Fits well in my hand and makes hair cutting a breeze (even when my two young grandsons are squirming on my kitchen stool, lol). Highly recommend if you are in the market for a new hairclipper.

Title: Not a good smell
Review: Didn't smell nice. Smelled cheap.

Title: Uncomfortable even to wear for a sexy look. Its not sexy. Review: The Bra is sorta of pretty , and a nice pink Satin look to this bra.
The lace on the top and bottom look unfinished to me, Although it looks that way in the picture here also.
The thin straps come off easy to make this into a strapless bra.

This bra is more for fun, but its very uncomfortable, and I could not wear it for long..

The bra runs Small. I wear a 36C, in any Bra I buy, this was so tight my husband had to hook it for me.
For me this is Not a Sexy bra. The stitching is awkward on the front of the bra with that Big seam down the middle..
When I tried on a Tee over the bra, one side looked like I had a nipple showing! which I didn’t, and my boobs looked like
a nose cone on a jet. Might of been the look in the 60s, but its not a pretty look now.

But My husband and I got a good laugh out of the looks of this bra.
I will be donating this to a thrift shop.

I’m giving this a 3 star, for the effort put into this bra, and it can be sexy. Just not for me.

Title: Love the clippers but the shield is pure garbage Review: These clippers are sharp and they cut well. I also like the spring action. However, the red shield that comes with it is useless. It just kept falling off and one would think it is part of the packaging. Not only was the shield cracked but the magnet was stuck to the clippers (see photo). 

Although these clippers are great without the shield, the current price of $16.14 ($18.99 minus 15%) is expensive for these, especially when the red clip is just garbage. Why Revlon would pair such excellent clippers with such plastic junk that cracks and does not stay put is beyond my comprehension.

Title: 3 LUOEM Lace Bras-Strapless, wireless
Review: They look longer in the pictures online, so they just barely cover my boobs. If you made them 4”-5” longer, so it would go down to about the waist, it would make a perfect little splash of femininity of lace under a v-neck or button-down blouse. Add a bit of sexuality, without showing anything is perfect.

Title: beautiful
Review: Beautiful, high quality barrette. Holds my thick hair well, without causing any breakage to my hair. My favorite at the moment.

Title: Moisturizing but color is too muted; best for blending
Review: Unlike the other reviewers, I actually felt this lipstick was moisturizing.  It also stays put and does not come off easily onto my hands. However, the matte finish is blah and the color is not the coral looking hue depicted on the Amazon site, but more like a boring flesh tone. This is best used to blend with other lipsticks to tone down their color.

Title: Not Moisturizing Enough
Review: This serum isn't very moisturizing. It dries a bit sticky. I haven't noticed any remarkable improvement in my skin. In fact, if anything, my pores seem a bit bogged down. They aren't clogged, but they're more textured with this serum than before. It smelled fine. The bottle worked fine. It has a bit of slip and feels nice putting it one. It does layer with moisturizers perfectly fine. My skin didn't seem more radiant. It did nothing for my dark spots. I don't have a lot of fine lines. And it wasn't enough for dry skin.

Title: Flexitol balm
Review: This is THE only working heel balm.  If you have heel cracks - this is the balm to try.  You can see a difference in only 1 day. I wish I could buy it by the gallon so I never ran out!  Once you try it - you'll never go back. I've tried 'cake' tins, peels, etc... this is the only thing that actually works and lasts.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Nice wide toe box and sole
Review: Overall smaller than expected length-wise, but does fit the foot. Does not rub or cause foot irritations. Soft inside with no notable seams. Nice wide toe box and sole. Would have been a five star, but slightly shorter in length than expected. Would buy again!  Would recommend for diabetics with neuropathy due to lack of seams. Velcro tightening is somewhat limited due to smaller Velcro patches, which I mention because you can lose this mule without noticing if you have significant loss of sensation.

Title: Overall, not bad!
Review: Super cute top! I haven't worn it out yet, but I can tell from trying it on that its a good fit. I do think that once its washed that it will shrink. The material is 100% cotton & is not very soft. Overall I like the shirt & look forward to wearing it next year at St. Patrick's Day celebrations.

But, on me, I found it hard to use applying shading where I didn't want it which meant I spent time cleaning off the exces. I am rating it three stars because I am sure there are others who will love this, but honestly, this did not work for me. I did like the idea of the brush applicator so if they decide to scale down the crayon/pencil to a little bit thinner side, I might try this again.

One thing I did notice is that when I remove one from my ear, the music doesn't stop playing. My kids have different brand ear buds (one has Airpods and the other has Skull Candy wireless) and that is a feature that both of theirs have. Another thing, the wording on the packaging implies that they've got a lot of bass, but I haven't observed that. Overall, they're okay.

That said there are two pairs out of six pairs of sock that , what I call seconds, repaired , or damaged socks!
One sock of the striped socks had white threads sewed in, about a inch of the sock, the back of the same sock has a odd
Seam sewed into the back part of the whole sock , as it looks like this Co. is using every scrap of material to put the socks together!!
The second pair of striped socks are both sewn up from the toe to the top of the back of the sock, which leaves frayed seams inside of both pairs.
That is the reason for the 2 star.
If it was not for putting damaged, repaired socks in this box, this would have been a 5 star.

Title: Does nothing but brush my eyebrows and hardly leaves any pigment behind; this is a total waste of money Review: Dermablend, you have got to be kidding me! There is almost no product and no pigment in this eyebrow gel. I do see product in the tube, but only the tip has some pigment. Attached is a photo of the pigment that comes off the brush when pressing hard on a white paper towel. If you see almost nothing, that is because there is almost nothing.

I have Brooke Shields type thick bushy eyebrows and I figured this gel would highlight them better that the Vaseline I normally use. I kept dipping the brush into the tube and it seemed my eyebrows were getting brushed but absolutely no color was being applied to my brow. I tried over six times on each side and was able to extract a little bit of color on the tip of the brush which is what can be seen in the picture on the white paper towel.

Had I purchased this, I would be incredibly upset. It does nothing but brush the eyebrows and does not deliver on filling them in, highlighting, or applying much pigment. Even at $1 it would be a waste of money and it is highway robbery at $20.

Title: Cute shoes, runs narrow though.
Review: I love the color and got a great price in my size, but something about New Balance shoes always has them run super narrow on me. I can wear a size 11-11.5 normally in other shoes, I ordered this in a 12B (was cheaper than smaller size) and they are really tight. I think I can stretch them out though and I like the style and color enough to want to make them work. If you have relatively wide feet though, I would consider that when choosing your size.

Title: Super hydrating; lovely fragrance to start but a fishy finish
Review: This 2.03 fluid ounce tube of rose hand cream is SUPER HYDRATING and creamy and absorbs quickly. It also smells like rose to start but then there is a fishy smelling finish to the cream that I do not like. I absolutely love the results. The price of $6.99 is high but typical for this quality. Unfortunately, the after smell is offensive to me.

Title: Decent for home use
Review: I typically go for microderms and facials at least once a month (and have so for the past 15 years). A good microderm treatment can cost over a $100, so I was hoping I could find one I could have at home. I saw this and really was anxious to try it. Unfortunately, I was not thrilled with this. For home use, it is ok. Took a while for me to read instructions and get going. I didn't find the 'beads' to be as good, or as strong, as a professional salon has. I also found there was more suction/vacuum than was really needed (so my skin was being irritated more with the vacuum than the crystals). I will keep it and will try it again, but will only be using it when I can't get to a salon. Wasn't thrilled with these results, but it was ok for the home.

Title: My eyes got puffy and red under my eyes using this!!! Review: I have been using this Kit for 4 days.
Today I woke up to under my right eye being red and puffy, and a little dark underneath.
My left eye is now dark underneath.
I’m older, but I have never had any puffiness or any redness under my eyes before.

I have always used under eye creams since I was a teenager, and my eyes have not shown much age.
I’m thinking I might have an allergic effect to this Anti-Aging formula, although this has never happened to me before with other
eye creams.

Title: piece of junk Review: Easy to use, but that's about it's only good attribute.

You get nothing but static using this transmitter. The sound is often with an extremely high-pitched whine as well. The "clearscan" feature it has where it'll scan the radio stations and pick the "clearest" station for you to play through is ridiculous and useless. I don't know how it "chooses" whatever station it does, but by the time you scroll through to reach that station on your radio it is no longer the "clearest"--when really none of them are clear at all anyway.

I had a transmitter before this one (which eventually broke) that was $10 cheaper and it only came with an option for 4 channels, and it sucked but still worked better than this thing. I'm very unhappy that I paid $25 for this piece of junk. I thought transmitters would be one of those things that "you get what you pay for," but apparently not. I bought it out of town on a road trip and lost the receipt anyway so I can't return it, unfortunately, or else I would.

Title: Thin & Light Weight
Review: These men's pajama pants are thin & light weight. That could be good or bad. If you're looking for warmth, keep looking. The material is not very soft. The fit is fine. My husband wears pajama pants in the mornings when he comes downstairs for his coffee. For his purpose, it's adequate. He doesn't love them, but he says they're okay.

Title: Three Stars
Review: No increase in bars but the hotspot stay connected without dropping.

Title: Rhinestone necklace
Review: I really wanted to like this, but it really looks like a 2.99 piece of junk in person.  In addition, it arrived in a tiny box where it was 'folded' to fit into the box so it permanently bent the necklace part of the piece where it had been folded.  It's truly just garbage.  Some sort of silver tone metal.  Made in China (to those that care).  The rhinestones are completely lifeless - no sparkle at all.  The chain is supposed to be adjustable, but unfortunately with the folded bent sections limit that.  Eh.  I can't recommend it.

Title: The clipse don't grip
Review: The bands would not stay attached to my charge 3. If I swing my arm or my shirt sleeve bumped it the band would detach. I would not recommend this even though they look cool and it's nice to have a metal bracelet I need to work on the clip which connects it to the actual Fitbit device.

Title: Better than the pricey stuff
Review: Amazing eyeliner. I can’t believe the price on this!!

Title: Amazing tv
Review: Works great but this is the 2nd one I purchased in 3years.  Very upset.  Should last longer.

Title: Silicone back scrubber is junk but the puff is nice enough; PRICEY Review: Mesh buff puffs are the only "sponge" I use in the shower besides a back brush. I love them because they generate a lot of suds and they provide good coverage during showering. This puff is medium in size and wound perfectly. It works like any other mesh loofah I regularly use. There is a ribbon on the end for hanging.

In addition to the mesh loofah, there is a silicone tipped back brush enclosed. That is just total garbage. The handle is short and the silicone "catches" on my skin and makes it hard to move it around. I hate it.

The current price of $12.99 comes to $6.50 per item which is extremely overpriced. I only like the puff and can buy one like it at my local store for less than $3.

Title: Good bra not the best
Review: Very high cut in front and goes straight into armpit area so very annoying to put on deodorant in these!! Won’t buy again.

Title: Four Stars
Review: They fit easily over my prescription glasses and protect from both glare and wind.

Title: A must have for every Kindle owner
Review: This fits my new Kindle (which I received as a Christmas gift) perfectly. I love the color and the way my Kindle fits so nice and snug inside. This is a great addition as it protects my device nicely and I can easily slip my device in my hobo bag for carrying around without fear of damage or scratching. Highly recommend!

Title: Terrible color
Review: The color is terrible. I know it's natural but it does not work with my skin tone

Title: Short life span
Review: Worked for about 4 months and then just stopped. I charged it, it says it’s connected to my MacBook, but nothing happens.

Title: Don’t like it at all
Review: Not impressed at all

Title: THEY WORK!
Review: Cutting too-long fingernails & toenails.

Title: Is this fake
Review: It seemed like a used bottle that had spilled. It had residue around the lid and it came in a plastic bag....I'm not really sure if it was filled w/ Nexus - it didn't smell like it was.

Title: not good for outdoor use
Review: This is a great little camera for me in all respects except one: I photograph primarily outdoors, and with no traditional view finder, only the LCD on the back of the camera, it is difficult to see the subject I'm photographing - especially in full sunlight. After some practice, I've been able to get most photos right, but there are still a few headless people and sky shots for items on the ground. May yet return the camera for one with a traditional view finder, but for the price, speed and image quality of this camera, I may just keep it as an alternate. Think twice on how you use your camera before you buy this one. I wish I had!

Title: Should be for a child
Review: Purchased two bracelets from seller, the square and the cross. Had to return the cross because it ran small and seller wants YOU to pay for shipping back. This bracelet should be listed as a child's bracelet and not for an adult

Title: Runs Big, shinny.. Review: These Goodsport are shinny black leggings, with a gold design at the bottom. I’m not a fan of the gold, it
Looks cheesy to me, along with the shine in the Leggings.

These run Big, I wear a 10 or a 12! 5’2, 138 lbs. this is a Medium. ( need to lose 15 lbs.)
The crotch is long, and the legs are short, and do not fit tight. Even though I’m not tall, I have long slim legs.
Since they do not fit tight, there a little baggy above my ankles, and stick out looking goofy as good leggings do not hang above the ankles.
These are Not yoga pants, as I would have to keep pulling these leggings up.
The waist is Not snug, and comes up high with a thin elastic. I tried rolling the waist over, but it doesn’t work like that!

For the winter I can wear this with a big sweater and boots.
Pricey.

Title: An ok sock
Review: A bit on the small side.. ok colors.

Title: An interesting item but finicky Review: Review update:
After using the keyboard for a little while, some of the keys stopped functioning and rolling up or bending the keyboard for storage or moving it, permanently damaged the product. There's no point to a flexible keyboard if it breaks because you bent it slightly. Not a very useful product beyond the novelty. Wouldn't recommend it unless you've been dying to have a quirky unresponsive keyboard you can take with you.

------------
When I set to order a flexible keyboard, I mainly wanted it for the novelty. That is probably for the best since this keyboard is very unique. It lights up, is bendable and has nice texture to it. However, the keys are a little unresponsive unless you press them from a certain angle. Also the keyboard is a little larger than normal keyboards because of the extra inch and a half of covered wires at the end.
If you are looking for a keyboard which is for gaming or for typing very fast, this is not the keyboard for you. If you want something cool and easy to pack or move, then you will likely love it.

Title: Nice
Review: I like the dress! It’s very light! Has a little stretch. I’m 5’4, 240, got a xxl. Great with a strapless! Sexy back!

Title: Thin synthetic eyeglass case; not very protective
Review: This eyeglass case is attractive and feels nice but is very thin and not really protective for my glasses from being crushed. For the current price of $9.99, I feel a padded soft case or a hard case that is better can be purchased. This is not thick enough for me.

Title: Disappointing.
Review: Though these look cute on the outside, in reality these were a bad buy and not at all what I expected based on the description. For one thing, I wear a size 6-7. Knowing they run a bit small, per other reviewers, I purchased the medium (size 7-8), and my toes pressed up against the front of the slipper! Also, if you look at the photo, there is a seam at the ankle where the footie joins with the rest of the slipper. This seam was really uncomfortable, digging into my skin when I walked. The buttons, which look as though they have a function, are actually just decorative. And the worst part? That lovely soft tuft of fur you can see poking out the top of the slipper doesn't go all the way down - just to the base of your ankle. The rest of the inside is made of a plain fabric. Overall, a poorly made item that I ultimately returned.

Title: A must have for daily use
Review: This is a really nice facial serum. I have been using hyaluronic acid serums daily for twenty plus years and my skin looks great. I have used ISDIN products for years now and they produce a quality product. This serum applies lightly and is absorbed in my skin almost instantly. Fine lines are diminished and my skin looks healthier and glows. Highly recommend for anyone to make this a part of your every day beauty regimen.

Title: nice set  but container hard to open
Review: nice set but with my arthritic hands its hard for me to open the case  maybe ill have to find something else to store them in  otherwise id give it 5 stars

Title: Junk.
Review: These glasses are terrible.  You can see your own reflection while wearing them making it difficult to see.  Also the lenses are warped and it looks like the mirror film will peel right off.

Title: Adhesive could be stronger
Review: Adhesion could be better

Title: Super Soft
Review: I got this tshirt for my sister, who is a teacher.  The fabric is super soft.  A nice fabric.  It will be nice and cozy.  The print is of good quality.  A great T for a teacher!

Title: Easy to set up and use
Review: Great sound quality!  Easy to set up other devices that work with Alexa.

Title: The earrings were okay. Review: Wanted quality earrings with bling.
The stones were okay. I was not impressed with the metal setting.
I returned them.

Title: Did not work.
Review: Charges as instructed but died after 15 seconds of use. Returned.

Title: Works Great, When it works at all Review: Unfortunately the search for a good PC remote doesn't end here. Setup and software installation is easy and straight forward with this device - plug it in, put the disk in and that's just about all there is to it.

It has all necessary functions and promised to be perfect. The problem is it frequently just stops working until the computer is rebooted. The newest driver available for windows on the company's website is over 2 years old. There was a promise of a vista driver in june but still no sign of it and their "knowledge base" has been offline for at least a month. The FAQ available only covers the simplest of problems, so again, no help there.

You might still want to buy this remote, the price isn't awful - just be aware it isn't going to work as well as claimed.

Title: Good idea, poor execution
Review: It was heavy on air and made hair sticky.. A disappointment :(

Title: Great product Review: I was recommended this by a friend, and was not disappointed. Quite the opposite - it's very sleek and quiet to type on. The keys feel very snappy yet fluid. The leg stands look a bit weak as if they could easily break, but I haven't had any trouble with them yet. You don't really need them, as it sits at a slant anyway. Still nice for those who prefer a bit of an upward slant.

The illumination feature is really quite fabulous. Overall, a great product and highly recommended. Well worth the price.

Title: Nice pattern
Review: This holder works well and I like the pattern buf the button doesn't line up correctly in the hole of the holder.

Title: Sucks at sucking
Review: Cleaned and preped glass...... Fell off .... Got it wet ..... Fell off.....  Spit on it ..... Fell off....... Didn't put unit on it...... Fell off..... Complete junk

Title: Long cord is good
Review: Long cord makes life easy. So far so good.

Title: Nice workout outfit but runs small
Review: I really would have liked to have given this workout outfit 5 stars, but I couldn't. On the positive side, it is super soft and really comfortable. I am deducting the star because of the sizing. I found this to be way small. I am 5'7 about 145 lbs and got the large. I was able to wear the pants (although they were snug) but I couldn't wear the sports bra comfortably (it was pinching me). I never usually wear an XL, but I really wish I had sized up (a lot of these reviews were not out here when I selected this. Word to the wise, size up.

Title: eyelash curler
Review: They are a little bit loosy goosey but it will work.  Comes with extra rubber closers and a cloth draw string bag and a pair of tweezers that kinda - Eh.  But they could pinch something.  They are a rose/pink metal.

Title: Nice gift
Review: Got this to replace my boyfriend's old minimalist wallet that was failing apart. Looks and feels nice and it holds all his stuff!

Title: Three Stars
Review: The screen cover is so thick that it's hard to type properly.

Title: Too small
Review: Too small and uncomfortable.  Why can't a size 3x be a true 3x  it's hard to buy on line because items don't come standard so one never knows what they are getting when buying clothes on line.

Review: Would have like it fuller than flatter.

I also have the EOLV, which is thicker, larger and easy to use

Title: Three Stars Review: Very cute bag, but smaller than I expected
I returned

Title: Didn't work for me
Review: I tried this with a hybrid 32GB/512GB Intel Optaine drive.  The drive was recognized by my computer, but when I tried to access it, I got an error that said the drive was corrupted.  I took the drive out and put it back in my laptop and it worked fine - no trouble accessing the files.  I contacted Sabrent support a few days ago but have not heard back.  Will likely return this item if I don't hear from Sabrent in the next few days.

Title: Stack of 30 floppies .. could read none Review: Must of got a bad unit, could not read any of the 30 floppies I tried.
Just gave the same error over and over .. Unable to read media ?
I even tried just formatting a NEW floppy and it couldn't do this either.
Sending back for refund .. will try another brand
