Review: The same brand from Wal-Mart is much better.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Did not noticed that this was only the pants.

Title: Love the Message!
Review: My 20 year old daughter loves the message of these hats. She's already started wearing the dad hat one. The "Make Racism Wrong Again" message is actually a patch glued onto the hats. However, it wasn't very secure on the beanie and was hanging on at just one of the corners. I am going to have to sew it on to keep it there. The actual quality of the hats is fine. This one just got past quality control!

Title: Great brush set, perfect for everything
Review: This is a great brush set. Not sure why they specify this for travel because I think it's great for all the time. I keep this in my bathroom and use it daily when I apply makeup and then, if I am going somewhere after work I stash it in my purse for use later. I have taken this set while traveling as well. This would also make a great gift or stocking stuffer during the holidays. Just a perfect set of brushes for all your needs from blush to shadow. Highly recommend!

Title: Great tattoo cream!
Review: My son recently expanded on his tattoos (arm) and I got this for him to try out. He really liked it. Said it went on smoothly and had a calming cool feeling on his skin. Moisturizer balm was absorbed quickly and he said it seemed to heal sooner than it has in the past when he has gotten his tattoos. He said he will be using this in the future and will be recommending to his friends.

Title: It works well
Review: I kept this on my computer for about a year with no issues. Its cute and it worked pretty well for a while but it did break on the underside after regular wear and tear. The keyboard cover really just wasn't for me but it stayed relatively well.

Title: Five Stars
Review: good wiring kit; everything we needed to install amp and subs

Title: Big Size with Small Sound
Review: Although speaker boasts the built in subwoofer and tweeter that will provide you with room filling deep, rich sound upon using it is lacking. I first compared it side by side to a small Bass Effects speaker of comparable price. No comparison. It also does not provide more than 7 watts of sound at RMS, or (clear sound) according to testers I used. End result you can get better sound at a fraction of the size from comparable sizes. If you think this is similar to a Bazooka Tube, or Bass Cannon, you will be sorrily mistaken as I was.

Title: Don't believe the hype
Review: Logitech (Logi) states on the product page for this mouse that, "Laser-grade precision means you’ll enjoy incredibly smooth and accurate tracking and cursor control on just about any surface."  That is definitely NOT the case with this mouse.  Sometimes I use my laptop just before going to bed, so I place it on the bed sheet.  It does not track smoothly at all on this surface.  I even tried switching to an old mouse pad and the tracking was still bad.  Thankfully I only use this mouse while traveling and while charging my MX Revolution - which works fine on the bed sheet and other surfaces.

Title: Flimsy when fully extended, but good deal for casual use
Review: I purchased this to mount a dB SPL meter. For that purpose this is an excellent deal and all the tripod one needs. For SLR cameras like my Canon T7i, this would be OK (and merely OK) as a table top tripod with the legs fully retracted. It wobble too much otherwise. For me this is all I need. Had I purchased for my camera it would have been returned. Bottom line: if you need to mount a stationary device or use it as a tabletop tripod you will love it and the price. Otherwise I recommend spending a few extra bucks and getting a tripod that is sturdier.

Title: Shampoo is ok, with a good scent, dry shampoo felt dry & sticky on my hair. Review: Before taking a shower, I sprayed the dry shampoo into my hair.
My short thick hair went into place, but felt dry, and a kind of sticky. I do not think I would use it again.

When I take a shower every day, I also wash my hair then blow dry it with a round brush, and sometimes use a curling iron.
The shampoo suds up allot, had a good scent. I also used my heavy conditioner.
I liked the shampoo, but its not for color treated hair, and after I used this my hair seemed dry, but not as dry as the dry shampoo. That is too drying for my hair, that has color and a weave.

Title: Mic doesn't work alone
Review: You can't sing into the mic unless a cd is on. Seems very illogical

Title: Large, slim-profile pocket mirror; light not dimmable; USB cable too short Review: This mirror has a slim profile but is large for a pocket mirror, measuring 5-1/8 by 3-1/2 inches. The USB charging cable is about 11-1/2 inches and very short.

There is no charging light. I charged this for a few hours. The compact has a close-up mirror on bottom and regular one on top. The top mirror has a touch button for the light. It is not dimmable even though the instructions say it is. I tried to dim the light and could not.

Also, closing the mirror does not turn the light off. I had to press the button to turn out the light. In addition, the mirror's surface is difficult to clean. I had a lot of trouble cleaning my smudges off the mirror.

This is functional and I like how thin it is. Also, the larger footprint provides me with more surface area for viewing my reflection. Nevertheless, I consider the current price of $29.98 outrageous for this, especially since it does not dim, has no charging light, and comes with a short cable.

Title: EASY TO PUT ON MY NEW I-PAD
Review: I found this screen protector to be quite easy to place on my new 11" I-Pad Pro.  I've used other screen protectors on my other electronics and they were harder to put on.  This screen protector is quite easy.  I recommend it highly.

Title: Three Stars
Review: not sure yet if it works.

Title: Hydrating mask but results are no better than a regular face cream Review: There are four individually wrapped masks in this package. Each mask just has to be unraveled and then placed on the face for 15 to 20 minutes. There is no cover film to remove from the mask which made it easier for me to just unravel and smooth out over my face.

Each mask is incredibly wet and gelatinous. After I used this and then massaged the remaining gel into my skin, my face felt hydrated. Note that I had to wipe off the excess because there was just too much solution. Nevertheless, the results were hydrating but no more hydrating than when I apply a good face cream. Since a face cream requires less fuss than a mask, I personally would never order this again. However, it does moisturize.

Title: The cutest little bag!
Review: The perfect bag. A good size and great quality.

Title: Sturdy
Review: This may look ugly on a table but It really does the job. It holes the outlet nice and sturdy And when you're pulling On the outlet it doesn't get loose in the holder. I put a little folded paper towel on top of the table Under this so I wouldn't scratch my table And it's still grips well.

Title: Good quality
Review: Looks great...washed well

Title: WONDERFUL smell
Review: I LOVE the smell of this shampoo and it does a pretty nice job but is a bit expensive

Title: Horribly grainy photos, takes decent videos though Review: I couldn't be more disappointed in the quality of the photos this camera takes at a short distance, and it also appears to be nearly impossible to take even a halfway decent macro shot with it. Medium- to long-distance photos turn out quite nice, and the video quality is not too bad either.

Battery life is pretty poor as well, in my experience, but that can be mitigated somewhat by always having rechargeable batteries charged and ready to go.

Overall, a very disappointing purchase.

Title: Manufacuror/packing error
Review: Mfg messed up.  Received 6 EACH of the identical design and COLOR in both packages. They are very ornate and wide.  Manufacturor/packing error.....but a time-consuming  and costly personal Inconveniece to resolve for us.

Title: Autism/ADHD safe
Review: Not only safe to play with but safe because it hasn't broken and cut him like other screens because he's a little rougher than most kids and very happy it doesn't have lock-screen ads. The only thing that hasn't worked well is the parent area in kids app because it spells out the numbers you need to enter and on day 2 my son who just turned 5 showed me he was doing the mama part LOL

Title: Thick Cream Doesn’t Moisturize, Absorb Quickly Review: This O’KEEFE’S HEALTHY FEET NIGHT TREATMENT is a thick cream that squeezes out in a thin (about 1/8 inch wide) strand--probably so that you won’t be tempted to use too much. The directions say to start with a small amount because a little is all you need.

My experience is that I need quite a bit of cream for each foot, because the product isn’t absorbed quickly. Also, the thick cream doesn’t seem to be as moisturizing as other overnight foot creams that I’ve tried. I don’t feel like the cream softens the hard areas of skin on my feet as well as other products. The cream has little noticeable fragrance, which is good.

I think that I’ll be using up a tube of this product very fast, which will make it kind of expensive for regular use.

Title: Casual wear, not elegant Review: These earrings arrived today. They are cute. I expected them to lean more to the side of beautiful or pretty. They are smaller than I thought they would be. The color isn't what I'm used to with Rose gold. I have a Kate Spade watch in rose gold and this color is very cheap in comparison. I understand these are not an expensive item such as the watch but they just look on the cheap side.

The metal is thicker than I expected. The appear elegant in the photo but not in person.

I consider these casual wear.

Title: will not buy again Review: it did not refresh faded hair color, did not make my hair soft.... all it did was tint my hands and nails pink.

update... it still sucks, i used layer after layer after layer... long story short, I used the whole bottle, waited 10 minutes then rinsed with cold water, and still see no result.

Title: The only thing I liked about this mask was the warming sensation; cleans as good as soap
Review: There are four clay masks in this package. I used this after my shower by wetting my face and then massaging this on for one minute but avoiding the eye area. The massaging action is what causes the warming sensation with this mask. After one minute, I thoroughly rinsed this off. My face did not feel any more clean or better than just using plain soap and water. I did not see any unclogging of my pores. Other than the warming sensation that felt great, this mask does not do anything for me.

Title: Not a good purchase.
Review: Thin inexpensive yarn. Very disappointed.

Title: good winter walking shoe
Review: These are comfortable sneaker type shoes for walking outdoors in cool weather. Although they are not waterproof, they do keep out moisture if you step into a shallow puddle or walk through wet grass, etc. The upper is very soft and flexible, not stiff at all. They are a bit wide and roomy, and I have narrow feet, but I can wear them very comfortably if I tighten the laces. No issue there. I chose to add a cushioned insert, there is definitely enough space for most insoles. The shoes themselves have a pretty minimal insole, not a ton of arch support or cushion. They have nice treds on the outside but it looks like they would wear down since they aren't that deep.

Review: Go up a size or maybe 2 larger

Title: This time came so much like a liquid. Not like before.
Review: Quality came down. Use for my white hair.

Title: Great case
Review: Great case - Like the fabric cover and love that you can position it at two angles. would definitely buy again.

It will work for what its made for but the only reason I bought this is bc nothing else on the market exists to hold fake nails (that I've found & I searched for a long time). If I had seen this at a store, I would MAYBE pay $1 for it. I should have done what I planned originally & made a nail holder myself from stratch.

Title: Low price for an adequate entry-level e-reader. Unfortunately, ...
Review: Low price for an adequate entry-level e-reader. Unfortunately, it's stopped working after only 6 months. My fire lasted longer. Debating buying another after this.UPDATE:I was contacted by customer service and walked through re-booting, no problems since.

Title: Gorgeous garbage; battery & USB cable missing from unit Review: This is gorgeous garbage. The battery that is supposed to be in the handle is missing and I had to peel back the sticker to even see the charging port which has no connection. Also, the USB cable is missing as well. This went right in the garbage.

I have several razors like this and love them but their quality control is obviously poor.

Title: It's okay
Review: Quality through the radio isn't that great but it does work

Title: Doesn't Stay Plugged in Most Devices - Not Comfortable Review: I purchased this for my son, to replace his previous headphones, because he had nibbled through the cord sheathing. I liked that this was cheaper, cute, and had one wire off one of the ear pieces, instead of the kind that look like a necklace that come from each ear and rest on your chest. I started using these headphones on his E-Reader and it just doesn't stay plugged in, because the L-shaped plug doesn't allow it to go in far enough, and it easily pulls/falls out. Now, I am going to go buy the slightly more expensive, but much better quality Kidz Gear headphones. I couldn't have known that this was really going to be an issue, until I got them, so I just wanted to help let others know.

My son, today, after using the headphones for the first time of more than 20 minutes, he declared, "These are hurting me." So, my four year old would like to add that to this review, as well. He was always really comfortable in the other headphones, even able to fall asleep with them on (even though they look bulky, they were even comfortable to me).

Title: I've had this exactly one year and they quit working
Review: Junk I've had headphones eairbuds for one year and 32 days I've had headphones eairbuds for one year and 32 days They quit working

Title: Great shaving kit but overpriced for what you receive
Review: This was a great old-school shaving kit that I got for my 35 year old son to try. He absolutely loved it but complained, as others did here, that the sizes of the product are super small and he didn't get more than 3-4 uses out of the products. Of course, the case and brush are still usable, but it is costly for what you receive. The products themselves are great, he loved the shaving cream and balm and I did go on Amazon and order him a full size version of the shaving cream as a gift for helping me review this. I would think that if the Art of Shaving was trying to entice more people into using their products that they would make this intro pack more affordable (less than $20 would be more like it). Deducting a star for the price, but the product and presentation itself were a big hit.

Title: Easy to use eyeliner but....
Review: This is a good product but it doesn't last very long, making it quite expensive..

Title: Great
Review: I had a first generation fire stick and upgraded to this one. It has performed Much Better! I’m Very satisfied.

Title: Padded socks, runs small.. Review: These socks are well made, are a bit thicker in the heel, and front of the socks.

MY husband wears a size 10 1/2 shoes, and has a wide foot. These sock where not comfortable, they were tight.
I wear a size 7 narrow, and the socks where too big, and the bottom are slippery wearing them on the kitchen floor!

I like socks with patterns on them , but I’m not a fan of these sock.

Title: clear toiletry bags, set of 3
Review: I was hoping for just a bit better quality.  Plus, they were pretty smelly - like hot plastic.  Husband took them for his shop stuff.  Eh.  So they are functioning - but not as I had hoped for sure.  The plastic is thicker, but the zippers are junky.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All my reviews reflect my honest, personal experience with the reviewed item - your experience may be different.  I receive/accept NO free products or discounts that are not available to all shoppers.

Title: One Star
Review: Broke after first use

Title: The sizing is Asian Size, the quality is poor.
Review: I wouldn't mind this blouse too much but the sizing is Asian size again and although I ordered a plus sized one it just wasn't the right size at all, not to mention the fabric is poor quality in fact just terrible quality and looks like cheap cotton not sure why or what type of fabric it is but it is super rough to the touch and feels very cheap similar to a bad tshirt or sweater cloth but to me it even looked almost worn or like it had shrunk in the dryer. The quality in general was bad it looked like something meant for dress up or maybe for work? Not sure how to explain but it is definitely not what I imagined. The fabric doesn't stretch at all and doesn't seem to be the right sizing either. I don't think I would buy this again wish I could return it to be honest.

Title: Soft and usable but a little bit tight on my small head Review: There are three soft and slightly cheap feeling headbands in this set with a center bow. They work well to keep my hair back when applying make-up or a mask product. The one main issue I have with these is that they are tight on my small head. They do stretch to fit but if I had a larger head, these would be uncomfortable to use. These are functional and work as designed.

At the current price of $9.99, this comes to $3.33 per headband which is competitively priced.

Title: Very soft, but the sides are not high enough. Review: So comfortable you do not even know your wearing a bra.
Cups are soft, not thick and I like that the straps can be adjusted in the front.(A big plus)
I usually do not like wearing a underwire bra, as the wire feels its cutting into me, but this one is very comfortable, and
its hard to tell there is a underwire.

Some reviewers said they thought this bra ran small! I do not think so at all.

The reason for the 3 star is, the bra does not come up high enough on the sides, and my boobs, or skin pushes over and out.
Looks ugly, and shows when wearing tighter Tee’s.
If you take a look at the women wearing the bright blue color bra, it shows what I mean.

Title: Turns brownish
Review: Low quality gel turns brownish after you cure! Don't waste your money

Title: Soft
Review: Very comfortable

Title: does not smell like the softsoap "fresh breeze"  I currently have.
Review: can't even describe the smell - disgusting - so disappointed - called the company and they are going to check into it and sending me a label so I can return all 6

Title: Mac OS Catalina - Lose all your data
Review: If you move to Mac OS Catalina, prepare to LOSE ALL YOUR DATA. The drivers are not compatible and my data just disappeared. How Samsung could let this happen is unbelievable.

Title: VERY HAPPY
Review: i have owned Logitech 570s for years .. this is basically the same .. but its a bit higher do my hand isnt drooped on the right side and i like that since i have severe wrist arthritis  ... i HATE regular mice ... omg moving that thing around drives me nuts ... so i've used a trackball ever since i found one MANYYYYYYY years ago .. i did agree with everyone though  took the blue ball from the 570 and removed the black one and it seems a bit less shaky  also it has a high low switch .. the low setting is fine .. i saw someone mentioned downloading software from a site . im gonna go try and find it  none of my friends can use my computer when they are here cuz of the trackballs they are all used to uses mice .. well i was happy to find a different version of a trackball  as ive been looking for years - tried the one where the ball is on top  i didnt like that one either  the only thing i notice is i dont see a BATTERY LIGHT INDICATOR  as indicated in the description whereas the 570 has that so i know when its time to change the battery

Title: Probelle Nail strengthener
Review: Ok. I prefer OPI, but this one does ok.  I think it doesn't stay on as long. Having said that - it's more clear than the other.  All personal choice.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: thick toe nails - forget this one.
Review: if you have stubborn and hard toe nails, as you do as you get older then i would recommend another brand.  this works great if you have thin toe nails.  I didnt love the hold as it kinda slippery if you have to tackle tough and thick nails.  otherwise, it does a decent job for hand nails and if you are blessed with thin toe nails.

Title: Short life
Review: Decent product but won't last very long if you actually use it. I suppose if you buy a new tablet every year and you're gentle on it, it might last that long.

Title: Excellent Keychain for the AirTag
Review: I bought this to hide the AirTag and it works great. No one knows the AirTag is in there.

Title: Gorgeous bottle but fragrance smells old lady like and does not last long Review: I douse myself with fragrance twice per day after my two daily showers. Therefore, I am always buying parfum sprays. I never use just a little bit.

Periodically, I go to my local chain store to try fragrances I never even smelled before in the chance that I get a good one. I purchased this based on the rave reviews. However, what one likes in an aroma is a matter of personal taste. I do not like this fragrance. It smells like a perfume from the 1950's and it is hard for me to describe. I just consider this an intense old lady like fragrance with indistinguishable and unpleasant notes. I will not be buying this again. I do, however, think the bottle is beautiful.

I paid $49.99 plus tax at my local chain store which is about $11 cheaper than the $59.90 plus tax price here.

Title: pirate treasure
Review: Ok.. If you're buying the box because it's filled with pirate booty - Eh.  They are really, really cheap plastic items that are truly just garbage.  There is a paper map - on thicker paper - might be the only thing that is of some quality - but not really useful in any way.  The only thing I left in the boxes (I purchased 2) was a plastic skull and cross bone ring.  There are some really thin plastic coins that are truly ugly - threw those in the trash too.  I separately purchased some metal gold coins, glass jewels, faux pearl necklaces and some other trinkets.  I then buried them in my sandy front yard.  The box is a fairly good size.. and will work- has base metal pieces on the outside. The slide hook closure sometimes closes, sometimes you have to really wrank on it to make it work.  Eh.  As any empty box and 1/2 the price - maybe?  All of these things together, I would not purchase again.

Title: Won’t buy it again
Review: The container must have set in the warehouse for a long time.  Product was and is watery.

Title: Doesn't work
Review: I needed this to read CDs and DVDs on my Surface.  Didn't work and the product is poorly made.

Title: I am not hightech but looks easy to use Review: So sorry again I haven't used this yet but will soon. I am not hightech but looks
easy to use..and nicely made. Sorry will use soon and give you an up date.

Title: Almost white in color
Review: It was lighter than the photo.

Title: Weak, awkward to use. Review: First off, this was unable to clear the majority of the dust from my PC. Went through the hassle of taking it outside, since it hasn't been dusted in about a year, and I barely got any dust out. Still a good layer of dust visible, that I'm able to blow better with just my lungs.

Form factor is terrible, awkward to hold. Pulling the trigger requires you to more or less pull downwards with your index finger, and by downwards, I mean towards the ground. I.e. you have to move your finger sideways.

Overall, a disappointing experience. All the cans are really good for is perhaps cooling yourself down on a hot summer day.

Title: Not flexible enough
Review: The amount of movement for flexibility is ridiculous. It is so little that it is useless. I tried to save money and now I have something that is useless. The photo shows maximum tilt, but with this, the Echo Show still shows the ceiling when the camera is on. Not enough tilt.

Title: Feels good to soak feet, but other than that, not much help.
Review: The tea tree/epsom salts soak was only somewhat helpful. It softened nails, but I have been doing this for quite some time and haven't really seen any great difference.

Title: Good for spring or early fall temps.
Review: Very pretty design. I am 5 feet talll and the nightgown goes to the floor on me. The fabric was thinner than I expected. But this would be fine on a spring night or early fall temps. It just will not be warm enough for winter cold temps. Unless you keep your home set for 80 degrees. We keep ours at 62 degrees in the winter. The only problem I had was with the neck. I thought maybe I was wearing it backward. I was not. When I wear it I keep pulling the neck lace away from my neck it feels like it is to tight. I am going to make a cut in the fabric and stitch it down and it should be fine.

Title: Not a set of 3 Review: Old Spice doesn't disappoint. The Swagger scent is nice and the deoderant lasts a decent time. You might need to reapply about halfway through the day.

However, this product is either being falsely advertised as a set of 3, or they forgot to send the other 2. Since others have mentioned not getting 3, I think the seller is intentionally misguiding customers. Reducing the rating for that alone.

Title: This stuff is a luxurious vacation in a bottle.
Review: It smells heavenly but not overwhelming at all. My hair is so soft, I didn't need conditioner. Bets stuff for a fraction of what some cost. Worth every penny  IMO. Try it.

Title: Does NOT work with a Laptop!
Review: Does not have a APP to work with a laptop!.....Also does NOT notify cellphone to motion!

Title: Great way to have everything at your finger tips!
Review: I went on a trip to Iceland with my son and his family this past July. I wanted him to try this to see how easy it would be for him with his family of four to travel. He loved it. He had an easy way to keep organized with the passports and vaccination cards. Everything was kept in a simple single location and it was easy to go through the TSA checkpoints. I highly recommend this for all families!

Title: Five Stars
Review: nice

Title: Did not need it once I got it cause I ...
Review: Did not need it once I got it cause I used Basic Talk but I kept it just in case I may need it later in life.

Title: Yep. Good.
Review: Nice.

Title: Ears are various widths apart depending on headband; these are super cute & soft Review: BUYER BEWARE that the photos on the Amazon site differ in fabric design than the ones I received.

There are three super soft and incredibly cute headbands in this set. They also work well to keep my hair back when applying make-up or a mask product. There are only three issues I have with these. First, I love the pink one because that one has the ears in the right place. The yellow and blue ones have ears further apart so that they are not on the top of the head. Also, the yellow one is tighter than the other two and also has some stuffings coming out (see photo). Nevertheless, I consider these all minor issues as this does not take away from their functionality.

At the current price of $12.90, this comes to $4.30 per headband which is on the high side of competitively priced.  These are very nice but they are not perfect. I do love their softness and functionality; however, if I were looking for all the ears in the perfect place, then these will not fit the bill.

Title: Fuzzy after one wear
Review: I thought these were so cute and soft, until my 23 month old took them off after wearing for a short period of time. She was picking fuzz out from under and between her toes. After washing they looked even more fuzzy. Now she doesn’t want to wear them.

Title: Small
Review: Much smaller than shown

Title: Beautiful stylish blouse!
Review: Super cute blouse. I love that I can either roll the sleeves up (for a more casual look or when it might be a little warmer) or wear them down. Fits great, not tight, material is nice and soft. I like wearing this with my jeans and a white camisole underneath the blouse. Washes well as long as you hang it right out of the dryer a little damp (to avoid wrinkling). Highly recommend this blouse for casual or dressier occasions.

Title: love them both Review: I bought 6 of these when they were released with the bonus offer. I got them for a move to a new home. Because of the delay between receiving & setting up the units I missed the return window. All 6 would have been shipped back for a refund.

I have both The ECHO & TAP, love them both. My primary very simple, not very technical use is as a cooking & alarm timer & playing music. The volume is far too low to hear the timer unless I'm in the kitchen. My other units would blast me out of the house if I had the timer set on volume 10. The DOT can not be heard in the next room with a simple wall & full door opening. The microwave is louder. I can't count on it as an alarm, reminder to take my meds or anything else.

The quality of the sound for music is like an old AM radio. Not worth listening to. Yes, I know I can go buy extra speakers but it defeats the purpose of buying a small compact unit. I am actually going to be giving them away & will give GOOGLE Home a try. That's how disappointed I am in this AMAZON product. AND, I love AMAZON so this doesn't sit well

Title: Treat yourself, or the one you love, to the luxury (and warmth) of merino wool!
Review: Super soft, super warm, these are amazing merino wool socks and the colors are warm and vibrant. My son lives in Northern Virginia near the mountains where the winters can be brutally cold. These socks help keep his legs and feet warm and comfortable even in the coldest of days when he is doing outdoor activities (like snowboarding, hiking, or just going to and from his car). I have already purchased two more pairs to give him as one of his Christmas gifts this year. Highly recommend!

Title: Puts my paperwhite to sleep as I'm reading! Review: Sturdy construction, fits well but puts my Paperwhite to sleep! I fold the cover back when reading and lately I've noticed that my kindle was turning itself off as I was actively reading! At first I thought that it was a kindle issue but I was away on vacation and was going to wait until I got home to call Amazon! I had purchased it in April so it was still under warranty, plus I have the extra SquareTrade coverage when it's no longer under warranty by Amazon.
A friend told me that she had returned her case because the magnet on the cover kept turning her kindle off! So, I decided to get the official Kindle Paperwhite case. Everything is working perfectly! Now I'm STUCK with this case because I purchased it back in April!

Title: Not how it used to be, skip it Review: They changed it...it's now darker and feels more like soap then lotion. I LOVED this stuff but won't buy again. I should have returned it but now I'm stuck with a bottle of lotion I can't use. This lotion used to be creamy and left my skin feeling mosturized and soft, this batch left my skin feeling slightly tacky even hours later.
Bummer, now I have to find a new favorite lotion

Title: Four Stars
Review: Yes its everything i new it would be.

Apparently what your device thinks is 1GB compared to what SD card manufacturers think is 1G differs
I did not know that

I guess I really paid for a 30 GB card with my tablet

Title: Ugly color and gritty
Review: Gritty and ugly.

Title: Made Little Difference With Short Hair Review: This GARNIER HAIR CARE WHOLE BLENDS LEAVE-IN MIRACLE NECTAR HONEY TREASURES TREATMENT (5 Fluid Ounce) left my short hair looking pretty much the same as always. I added it after using my regular shampoo and regular conditioner. If anything, it made my hair feel less soft, and look less shiny. The ends of my hair seemed unchanged. it’s possible that the treatment made my hair easier to comb.

The fragrance of this treatment is similar to the fragrance found in other Garnier hair care products. It’s reasonably pleasant, fairly light, and doesn’t hang around for hours. This is essential for any product that is intended for you to leave in your hair. You work in a very small amount--the size of a quarter or less--with each use.

Title: Didn't work
Review: Cord did not work!

Title: Amazon branded products are Fab!
Review: Great, comfy top! I have three of these now & love them. They are comfortable, wash up well & look good. I highly recommend this & other Amazon Essential products...I've never been disappointed with any Amazon Basics or Essential products. A+++++

Title: Didn’t work well for me ! Review: I thought I knew what I was getting!
But this is a different type of make up for me.
I’m older, and I have always gone for the dewy look, and not much makeup, but I do wear blush, eyebrows, Mascara. Etc.
This is light, and did not feel this on my face. I used the sponge that comes with this, and then
I got a close up look, and notice allot of white stuff on my face, like something came off
From the sponge or !! Btw I just came out of the shower and dried off.
I took a face brush and it came off, also my skin is not dry. I also put on a moisturizer first
before applying this! I was not a fan of how this opened also.

After I used my face brush I still was not real happy about the coverage, or it’s too light for me!

Title: Bun maker
Review: Very cheaply made. Does not hold fine or textured hair.

Title: As advertised.
Review: Good to weatherproof your outdoor plugs.

Title: Would be a great set if the brush didn’t smell of burnt rubber Review: At the current price of $14.99, this brush set comes with a large boar/nylon bristle brush with wooden handle and decorative floral design on back, a plastic comb,  and a plastic with metal tines brush rake for cleaning the hair from the brush.

This brush passed through my hair easily. The comb is a wide tooth plastic comb that is good for detangling hair in the shower. The rake is useless; I have yet to find one that works. What I absolutely hate is the smell of the brush. It STINKS of BURNT RUBBER. It is probably the finish on the handle, but the smell is extremely offensive to me. This is not a brush I will use, unfortunately due to the terrible smell. 

I aired out this set for hours and the smell did not wane.

Review: Too tight

Review: I used it twice and no more came out. Total waste of money.

Title: Amazing!!!!
Review: Wow!!!  After a few weeks I started noticing changes in my dryness. Plus what most amazing!!!!  My feet been swollen for a few years.  I had to buy bigger shoes ,one day my shoes are lose.  what !!!

Title: Nice gift set but I hate the colors of the creams
Review: This is a nice foot set. It includes a washable foot file, a foot scrub, a foot butter, and a pink case. The set is nice and a good gift. The current price of $49.99 is a bit pricey for this. However, I absolutely hate that the scrub has black seeds and the butter is a hard yellow. I have an extreme aversion to creams and scrubs that are anything but clear or white and this is my only gripe but I would never order this again as a result. Had I realized this before I ordered it, I would never have ordered it. Otherwise, it is a nice gift set.

Title: Will not order again
Review: Very harsh on my skin.  Would not recommend for those with dry sensitive skin.

Title: OK
Review: Not really good quality denim, kind of thin and weirdly stretchy. When I pull them up they tug on the bottom. They feel like mom jeans. You get what you pay for.

Title: Great every day hair brush
Review: This is my new favorite addition to my master bathroom. This is a sizeable, sturdy brush, with strong yet flexible bristles for keeping my shoulder length hair looking great. I do not use this for styling (it's too big to handle the way I straighten my hair with an iron). However, once my hair is done, this is a great way to keep my hair looking it's best throughout the day. Fits ergonomically well in my hand and covers a large portion of my hair at one time. I really like this Revlon brush.

Title: A cute lounging outfit Review: I received this outfit and tried it on. It’s a nice outfit. Comfortable, yet stylish.

I got the greenish, leopard print set. It is made of a nice material. Comfortable.

I am 5’4”. I weigh about 172 lbs. I ordered the XL and it fits great

Title: Awesome remote control
Review: The volume and channel buttons light up, when you press the light button. This replaced my 14 year old Samsung remote.  Very easy to connect to the TV. The only CON is the volume button you have to press each time for up or down. If you hold down the button it does nothing. I also wish the channel buttons light up with the light. The preset channel button works really nicely with changing from one channel to the previous channel.

Review: Old school fragrance.  I get compliments everytime I wear it.

Review: This was just what I needed for my bath and beauty products.  The handle is kinda funky, but my bathroom counter looks so much better now.

I wore the shirt and have to say it looked good with my leggings. I’m wasn’t as bothered with the seem. The shirt had a nice fit. The material was thick and not see through (I ordered the white).

My bra size is 38 DDD . I ordered an XL and it fit well.

Title: Fair
Review: smaller size than expected

Title: One of the best Sunscreens on the market today!
Review: This is another great sunscreen product from Hawaiian Tropic. I love the fact that this contains antioxidants. Being that I live in Florida, I am constantly trying to avoid the sun and keep myself covered as much as I can (not just because of my fear of cancer, but also because of the terrible aging which occurs when one has too much sun). I use this 30 SPF on those days when I don't need optimum protection (late in the day, when it is cloudy), otherwise I typically use 50SPF (or higher). This goes on lightly, is not greasy and has a light fragrance. Like I mentioned, the antioxidants are just icing on the cake to prevent damage and cancer.

Title: Need to be me
Review: They were to tight for my calves and they were way to thick for my nursing shoes

Title: cuticle remover
Review: Eh. Wow.  Followed the directions - exactly.  Didn't do a dang thing - didn't remove ANY part of the cuticle.  I'll keep looking..  I long for the days of regular manicures!  Maybe next year?

Title: By whose measure?
Review: I don't think there could have been a true 100 feet of wire on this spool.  My room is 26X9 feet, and allowing an extra 6 feet of wire from speaker to floor and 9 more feet at the front to allow me extra wire in case I have to pull my receiver out to hook up something, I figured that was 50 feet, but when I cut off that length of wire to run to one rear surround speaker, I was about 7 or 8 feet short of enough for the second speaker and had to order a second reel of wire to finish the job.  Still waiting for it to show up.

Title: Easy to use.
Review: I find this straight cut clipper is less likely to nip. The blades are set back so the lip keeps the clippers from going too far under the nail.  It catches the clippings, but as soon as the clippers are repositioned, they fall out.

Title: Floratta Rose
Review: Beautiful! Nice and light Flowery scent. I wear Coco Mademoiselle and Flowerbomb by Viktor and Rolf- And this is similar to those, in that same scent family, I would say. Very happy with this purchase! Try it!

Title: Very destructed Review: The beads were very loosely sewn on, I'd image they'll all fall off after a wash or 2.
Super stretchy, comfortable, and lightweight demin.

Title: I want to love it but Review: I bought this for fitness when I walk or ride my bike. I want the GPS to be as close to accurate as possible. Well this doesn't even come close. It has me going in a straight diagonal line. Basically I'd have to be going through homes, yards etc. It is depressing because I love everything else about it.

Edit: I actually returned it. There was an update and I tried it again and it followed me then did the diagonal problem again. I think the issue is, it tracks you but then stops, then starts again later on. I ride my bike 25miles and it said I only went 18.

Title: Great product
Review: Excellent beanie for the price!my son loves it and said it’s very comfortable and looks great on!

Title: Volume - way too loud. Review: The volume goes from loud to mute. Nothing worse than hearing children’s content from 3 rooms away. Volume is way too loud. From loud to mute - with no in between. Stupid.

Too many download options to make money - kids fill it up with crap and use all the memory. Wish I could just have the three apps I purchased show up.

Get what you pay for - should’ve bought an iPad.

Title: Great no slip socks!!!
Review: Really nice 'invisible' no-show socks for casual wear.. I use this when running or when going to the store and they feel and wear great. No slippage, they stay on my foot and do not slide down into my sneakers. These are also a nice quality made sock which should last for years. I got the darker color package and I couldn't be happier. Highly recommend!

Title: Do Not Buy
Review: These thing are useless.  They are so thin and they do not do what they claim they do.  They are about 1/10 the thickness of a normal shoe lace so they look terrible in the shoe.  I thought I was going to brake them while putting them through the shoe.  I tried them for a day and gave up and threw them away.

Title: ... for a birthday and I already know he will love it because I sure do
Review: Got it for my boyfriend for a birthday and I already know he will love it because I sure do.

Title: Red LED stopped working in less than 1 day.
Review: Red LED stopped working in less than 1 day.  Dovetail?  Great.  Placing the circuit board for the LED switch where it is exposed to both the elements and to friction from adjacent parts during installation and adjustment?  Dumb.  This finder came with the XT-6 Plus telescope I just bought and assembled.  I'm now tempted to just return the whole darned thing for refund as a matter of principle based on the feedback here, given I would likely need to purchase another brand finder even if this one is replaced.

Title: Great at home microneedling pen for almost professional results!
Review: I have had microneedling done in the salon several times. It is typically a semi-painful experience but the results are well worth it. However, it is expensive (typically $125+). When I saw this at home kit, I really wanted to try it. I will say that it is pretty comparable to what I get in the salon. I have used this twice in the last month. Not that easy, for me anyway, to do this on my own face. I have a tendency to 'take it easy' on the areas that I think may be sensitive, so I did not concentrate on all the areas the same. I used some great serum here as the base and my skin did feel amazing after use. I did convince a girlfriend to try this tonight, figure it might be easier if we each do it on each other's face. Other than my not being able to do it to myself properly, I highly recommend this microneedling pen.

Title: Clips are pretty but need a longer clip to attach to hair..
Review: My hair

Title: Great way to extend your Keratin salon treatments!
Review: I get Keratin treatments at the salon at least 3-4 times a year (would do it more often if I could afford it). I am always in the market to use products that can help extend my salon visits. This Keratin Perfect shampoo is really nice. It is sulfate free (which is the first thing I look for ) and makes my hair feel silky smooth and soft. If I had any complaint at all it might be for the price (or at least the size of the bottle compared to price). Other then that, I highly recommend for anyone who wants to improve the texture and appearance of your hair.

Title: Snug in the Top
Review: I like the length of this dress on me. I'm 5'6" and it goes to the top of my foot. The fabric is light weight and very wrinkly. I'm not one who irons, so this fabric is not for me! The cut of the dress is cute, but I found the neck and chest area to be a little snug and not flattering in the way it looked in the upper arm/chest area.

Review: This bag is attractive and helps protect my ipad when traveling.  It has an extra pocket for charging cord and adapter.  It's thick and stretchy.

Review: As stated above, no lift him straps.  Very light material

Title: This lotion is thin & perfect for summer; it dries to a silky soft finish; however, the coconut fragrance is chemical smelling
Review: I ordered the Coconut Beach scented body lotion. The lotion is thin and glides on easily. It also absorbs well and dries to a silky soft finish. Unfortunately, the coconut smell is more chemical in fragrance to me than fresh coconut. Since I am really hooked on fragrance, this is the only reason I rated this 3 stars. Other than this it is a good summer body lotion.

Title: They run small!!
Review: I normally wear a 2X, I ordered 3X and it is smaller than I like. I prefer these type clothes roomy and they definitely are not. I ordered 3 of them and I have only worn 1 . I hate to go to the trouble of sending them back, maybe I'll give them as gifts.

Title: This is horrible. I didn't like that it felt like lotion ...
Review: This is horrible. I didn't like that it felt like lotion - so I didn't use it. Then I ran out of cleanser and was like I will just suck it up.. After 2 days, my face is so dry and irritated.

Title: Five Stars
Review: just what I n ended for my batteries.

Title: I loved it until...
Review: Until it developed a huge rip along the side of the brush. Sorry

Title: Loose curl, coarse texture, & bundles contain 1/2 amount hair. Review: I like the 6 inch length and color, but there clearly is a difference in the quality and quantity of this Xuchang Roktress brand compared to my previous purchase of different brands from different supplies of the 10” Jamaican bounce. 1) The curl is looser than I desired and expected. 2) each of the six bundles has less then both of the other brands I purchased. 3) the hair doesn’t hold up as well, as there are a lot of shedding of 12" straight hairs from the curl.

Bottom line ~ This 6 pack bundle is not a product I would buy again or recommend. I think it would be better to have fuller bundles and tighter curls without all the 12 " strands of shedding. Brand reviewed is Roktress Ltd. -Do not recommend & will not use this item

Title: Better for storage than real-world conditions.
Review: I ordered two of these, a medium and small.  They're very well-made, rugged and good looking, even though they're not that different in size.  My maifor n concern is that they don't pull/stay closed very well.  The material around the top is so heavy that the pull string and locking mechanism leave the pouch open by about a half inch or inch.  If the pouch happened to be sitting in the rain, the lens inside would get wet.  I purchased them primarily for storage, so they'll work for me.  3.5 stars.

Title: No noticeable change.
Review: Is this a knockoff?  I love the metal glide tip.  It does go on smoothly.  Product doesn't get any stars.

Title: The replacement works.
Review: Well Amazon stated it was the last battery I purchased, but it wasn't. I purchased a smaller one to fit my landline phone. This one attaches to my phone, but won't fit into the cradle.  Ive kept it, due to needing a battery for my 2nd phone.

Title: It’s a win win with color and style.
Review: Beautiful blue shade!  Can wear the bottom all the way down on your jeans/pants or pull up and shooz!

Title: Worth it
Review: I was really surprised by how well this covers. The applicator is really handy, it also comes with a travel case. Overall I was satisfied especially at this price point

Title: Sturdy
Review: My son loved the can it came in and the thick chain. It exceeded his expectations.

Title: Five Stars
Review: great little gadgets for my smart pone and batteries.

Title: Unique issue
Review: Wouldn’t format, not in my dash cam or laptop. Went to the store and bought another (same size and brand) and it worked just fine.

Title: Perfect for Teens or Tweens
Review: I was a little disappointed with these earrings. They are pretty and dainty, but the pictures for the item must have been greatly enlarged. In person, I cannot see any difference between the diamonds and the silver. There's hardly any sparkle either. The actual size is just a tad smaller than my pinky nail. I think these would be perfect for a teen or tween. As an adult, I would be disappointed to receive these from my spouse. I do like that they are sterling silver. Don't get me wrong, they are nice looking earrings, but if you're looking for sparkly diamond earrings, keep looking.

Title: This is a fitness watch and I would expect for the price better quality.
Review: Really think twice before buying this.  I pre ordered and bought mine right off of Fitbit.  I had it only 4 days and somehow scratched (deep scratch) the screen.  It is NOT covered under warranty and Fitbit will not cover it.  The Versa is supposed to have gorilla glass and this should not have happened.  This has to be a product defect.  Check online for "Versa Scratched screen" and you will find many complaints.  Buyer beware.  I have owned ALL the Fitbits and got a new one every year.  This may be my last.  This is a fitness watch and I would expect for the price better quality.

Title: Stunning presentation & highly giftable but the scent reminds me of Play-Doh – 2.5 stars Review: This 3.4 ounce piece of artwork Eau de Parfum is just stunning and comes in a highly giftable package. Unfortunately, I am not partial to this fragrance which smells like Play-Doh to me. However, scent is a very personal thing, so I am sure others may find this fragrance highly enticing.

At the current price of $90 it is very expensive but definitely competitively priced for a brand-name perfume. This is definitely not worth this price to me.

Title: It not help with hair showing color !
Review: My grandniece like it but not good showing color on her hair at all ! It not fair I pay for it ! Sound like cheap !

Title: Powder does not dissolve; has nice eucalyptus scent & leaves feet soft but also w/a ring around it
Review: There are two four ounce foot soaks in this package which is enough for two foot baths (i.e. two servings). The  powder smells like eucalyptus. It does not look like a bath salt at all but more like flour. It also does not dissolve well in the water even after stirring (see photo). In addition, it leaves a ring around the foot bath and my boyfriend's ankles when he is done soaking with this. It did leave his feet soft, but both he and I do not feel this is anything special. The current price of $14.99 for two servings is a ridiculously expensive price of $7.50 per soak for something that does not dissolve.

Title: No better reception as one I have without an amp
Review: No better reception as one I have without an amp, actually it seems less strong but I am not a professional!

Title: Cream is thin, and does nothing. Review: I do not think this does anything for my face. I do use other face moisturizers that are thicker, and I notice a difference.
This cream is thin.
Not to waste it, I use it on my chest, and body after using body lotion, or the other way around.

I gave to my husband, He thinks he looks younger !!(that is up for Debate). He has never used any face creams before.

I will not be buying this again.

Review: This case is one of, if not the best, case I’ve ever had!  Don’t think about buying it…just buy it!!!

Review: Received this a year ago for christmas and they did an update and now it doesn't work and because I'm about 2 weeks  out of warranty, there is nothing they can do but get me another one for almost another $300.00 dollars, what a ripoff. as much as we order from Amazon, and this is the way they treat their customers, Beware!  It's now July 2015 and my third kindle has broken, can't get it to turn on, had white lines going through it, and my warranty was on the 1st Kindle ? the customer service women said.  So there was nothing they could do (who also said she didn't make enough for me to be upset with her, she is their representative) I do so much business with them , I will miss them but not as much as they will miss us! I've learned my lesson.

Title: Not Great Sound
Review: I had low expectations, and they didn't let me down. These do not produce good sound. You get what you pretty for.

Title: Good Fit!
Review: This holiday shirt is a good fit and fits as expected. The design is nice, however, the vinyl image is fairly stiff which I find to be annoying. It looks good, but the stiff vinyl makes noise when wearing and just feels weird to me.

Title: Item not well packed.
Review: It's working but the item had been smashed when I received it.

Title: excellent
Review: Works great. fast service. Thank you

Title: Cannot Straighten out Cord
Review: I can't use this plug in any way, shape, or form. Plug it in and the tightly curled wire will not straighten out. This is so ridiculous. The length I need just isn't there and the thickness and curliness of the wire take up so much room because it will not flatten out. Would it be so difficult to wrap this plug in the way that all other plugs are wrapped for sale? I need to return this cube so I can get one that the wire lays flat.

Title: Great Hold
Review: My husband uses this hairspray, and he loves the maximum hold without the stiff stickiness from other brands.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Don't really know - it was a gift

Title: Sturdy
Review: I had a smaller holler to put my kindle tablet on but After a year It stopped staying up. This 1 is nice because it has a wider bottom which balances the tablet much better especially when I move it on the table.

Title: The chan holds up well
Review: I like it  and got it for my cross. Thanks

Title: Great shampoo and conditioner!
Review: This is a really nice moisturizing shampoo and conditioner. I love the coconut fragrance, reminds me of being in the Caribbean and summertime. A little goes a long way with this shampoo, so this should last me for a couple of months. My hair stays frizz free and is soft and smooth. Highly recommend for men and women who are looking for a new moisturizing shampoo and conditioner set.

Title: Vegan & moisturizing but I don’t care for the scent Review: This lotion is vegan and made with plant-based ingredients. It was very difficult to prime the pump for the initial application of moisturizer. I had to pump for about 60 to 90 seconds to get it working. However, after that the pump worked fine.

The lotion is creamy but has a smell I do not like nor can I describe it. It does moisturize well. I used it on my hands over several hours and they felt hydrated and had an interesting soft texture to them.

Currently, this is not priced but I would expect that this 200 mL (6.763 fluid ounces) bottle would be priced in the $6-7 range.

Title: eyebrow dye brush
Review: Ok... so I am blonde... and purchased the brunette and the blonde color... I included a pic... the brunette is on the left as you looking at it and the blonde is on the right.... Hmmm.... seems the same... the brunette side seems SLIGHTLY darker.  I personally could use either one. I have very thin eyebrows so I really wildly applied it.  You definitely use a bit more control for a sharper look... I just like a less harsh, natural look.... I found it stays on all day.  It also adds a bit of texture... which for me, with thin eyebrows is a good thing.  I always update my reviews if new info will help.  Further, I do NOT receive compensation of ANY kind for my reviews.

Title: Feels like liquid marshmallow; doesn’t absorb; also do not care for the light green color
Review: I never like creams that are any other color than white. This is a light green. The consistency going on my face and neck reminds me of spongy liquified marshmallows. The cream also stays on top of the skin and does not absorb; therefore, my face feels tacky until I wash it off. Personally, I do not care for this vegan cream at all.

Title: NO INSTRUCTIONS.....USELESS for me....
Review: This came with NO directions....when you are completely NEW to telescopes it would be nice for some instructions.  I cannot use it because it is either broken or probably because I don't know what I am doing......

Title: kindle cover
Review: I just hate this cover.  It doesn't stand properly and it's a real pain because it doesn't.  So disappointing.  I will use it until I can find an after market cover that WILL stand.  It really should work - and simply does not.  I ordered the new olive green kindle and the cover is a perfect match.  Now, if only it worked.

Title: Exactly what was needed
Review: Needed am inexpensive wireless mouse and that's exactly what i got

Title: not easy to tweak
Review: there are lots of settings that had to be changed via tech support and they couldnt get it going good either  so i returned it and it was such a BIG unit  took up way too much space

Title: Flexitol heel balm
Review: Of all the heel balms I have tried, this one works the best.  Nothing is perfect... and if you don't use it nearly daily (best daily) - it doesn't work that well - no surprise.  My husband is a diabetic and uses it too.  I like to purchase two at time and the pricing on Amazon is better than I can get locally, plus it's delivered right to my door.  Win/Win.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Seiko Men's SNK645K Watch
Review: Usually have no problem ordering from Amazon, not so with this watch, received no paper work for this watch and didn't receive a bill of sale for the watch from Amazon. Called and held on the phone forever and still haven't been able to resolve the problem, So no paper work for the warranty, no bill of sale, and no paper work on the watch. seems no one can help. Watch itself appears to be a nice watch. Will see how it works.

Title: very lacking
Review: i have a 15.6" laptop  i ASSUMED i wouldnt have to cut it  i was wrong  i had to cut it  and now if i am using the laptop or go to touch the edge the decal lifts up a bit  i can see it would come right off  with little effort and ill have to replace it  with hopefully another company who uses a better adhesive  !!!  also it came all wrinkled up  it seemed to flatten out easily though  once i got it off of the white paper  also no keyboard sticker  for this one  im gonna order something else  i really hate the way this one feels around the edging although im again ASSUMING they all will do  that  we will see  i think ill cut the next one so its not close to any edge !!!!!

Title: low tech works
Review: No batteries, no cords, no weird smell that lingers on the keys with compressed air.  This is a GREAT option to all of that.  Stands about 7" tall and looks like a really big nasal aspirator. :)  Honestly, I LOVE when I can find something that doesn't need batteries. I use plug in ear phones with a microphone on my smart phone.  I just hate having to charge stuff.  It is well made and I think it will last as long as I will want to be "blasting" my computer keyboard.

Title: Fragrant steamers when dry but not so much when wet; lasted entire shower & left no stains Review: There are 15 shower steamers in a lovely lavender scent in this package. All are 30g (i.e. 1.058 ounces) tablets. They smell great and I love that they are all white because they do not leave stains.

I put this in an almost direct stream of water when it would not work in an indirect stream or on the side wall. Normally steamers are supposed to be out of the direct stream of water; however, I smelled nothing then. Although there was some scent once it started dissolving, it was barely detectable once I began my shower with my scented soap and shampoo. I took a shower for about 7 minutes and some tiny steamer pieces were left behind for the next shower.

The current price of $29.98 comes to an expensive $2 per steamer.

UPDATE: I found a way to get these to work better. I just put 3 to 5 steamers at the end of the shower out of the direct stream and the fragrance is more noticeable. I thought one would do it, but it doesn't.

Title: cell phone stand and light
Review: You get a table top stand and a table top light.  That's great.  But it's kinda cheapy feeling plastic and the phone grip is very hard to use/clip.  You have to man handle the stretch and while doing that manage to get your phone in.  Eh. Also the feet of the stand are wonky - don't adjust.  But do close up for storage really easily.  There is a switch wired into the light - you can change the brightness (about 4 different levels) and the warm or whiteness (again, about 4 choices).  It is working right now... but I am going to look as some other options.

Title: It was just "OK"
Review: i was hoping for a much better result .. as far as resisting fingerprints  ... thats not true and i was hoping for more of a "sliding" affect like i read all over that this product does  the instructions say to put it on the cloth and not directly on the screen i cant help but wonder if that would make a difference ...  it has a "bit" of a slide but not what i was hoping for

Title: not sure about those
Review: They do look unfortunately pretty cheap and anyone can spot the fakes from a mile away. I had another one at home that looks much better, but I opted for those since the price and getting 4 of them was quite appealing. I guess you get what you pay for, it might work for some uses, but not necessarily for home security.

Title: Problem with it
Review: It should be compatible with asus tuf x570 plus MB, but it reboots sometimes whenever the MB want, that’s not called compatibility. So I returned it.

Title: Just OK
Review: Unfortunately I couldn't get on with this bra. As a larger busted girl I find it hard to find a good sports bra to use for horse riding to minimize bounce. This one for the price did not do a very good job. It was pretty average. I have had cheaper bras that do a better job so unfortunately not what I was expecting.

Title: Hat is too small; gloves will stretch to size; scarf is itchy
Review: This is a gorgeous hat, glove, and scarf set until I tried it on. First of all, the hat is small. I have a small head and it fits over my head but feels like it is going to pop up. I do love the fleece lining inside. Second, the gloves are on the small side but they will stretch to fit. I love how the fingertips are touch screen enabled (i.e. three conductive fingertips) for use with a smartphone or tablet. The scarf is long and generous and overall very nice, except it itches me. I also love the two-tone color of gray and black. This set is thick and definitely deep winter warm. The current price of $25.85 is even competitive; however, this set does not work for me due to the small hat size and the itchy gloves and scarf. The Amazon site says this is made of acrylic and polyester. I suspect the itchiness comes from the acrylic.

Title: BEWARE! These are MENS sizes! Review: Nice style, but beware...although listed with women's shoes, these are MEN'S SIZES.
I ordered an 8.5 (womens), and ended up receiving an 8.5 MENS, so a 10 in womens. So only 2 stars.

Title: Product started out great then it stopped holding a charge
Review: Downloading was easy, great sound quality, holds lots of music.  Suddenly, it would only hold a charge for a short period of time. Now, it doesn't even recharge.  My little girl is very disappointed.  I thought this was a real MP3 player with little girl decorations. I guess it was just another expensive toy.

Title: smells bad
Review: sticky, and the smell is awful.

Title: Expensive but does keep skin moisturized
Review: I have been using this oil for over two weeks now on a daily basis. Jury is still out on the pure benefits. On the plus side there are vitamins in this oil (but no retinol) so it is good for my skin. Goes on a little oily, takes a while to absorb. My skin does feel softer since using, haven't really seen a significant difference in elasticity or in the fine lines (crow's feet) around my eyes. On the negative side, at over $40 I don't think this is worth it. I have some really great facial serums at 30% of the price that, in my opinion, work much better.

Title: Scent is nice, but the shampoo came open n the box. No seal Review: Has a great scent.

That said this Ritual shampoo came open in the box it was deliveries in!
The box was too big, and did not have anything packaging inside to protect it!
Also My shampoo did not have a seal on , and did not have a seal covering the cap.

It’s a mess, and threw it out. .

Title: Works well for the most part
Review: This is actually a pretty good device and I’m happy with it. You’re  able to add apps but it seems to be a little defective, as it acts up in funny ways.  Sometimes it freezes up and I just unplug it for 10 seconds and restart it, but not often. Certain apps will get quirky and not appear properly, but I just continue hitting the “back” button until it straightens itself out. Sometimes it’s easier for me to just figure out how to deal with tech quirks if possible rather than go through returns, replacements etc. I would recommend it, hopefully you’ll get one that doesn’t act up!

Title: It's cute but
Review: It was so cute and my son loves it but there were little Holes all over shorts

Title: these are waste of good money , and bought two
Review: They do not work

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great product. Quality construction - really like it.

Title: Not what I expected
Review: I bought it because of the convenience of converting it from back pack to satchel… the straps are awkward and long for a backpack. It doesn’t keep its shape well but it does hold stuff and looks professional

Title: Just not pretty
Review: These are just not pretty earrings.  I expected them to be nicer.  The print/photo isn’t good quality.

Title: My sister loves the soft warm comfort
Review: I gave them as a gift

Title: assemble as instructed
Review: this was a gift / my friend says he liked it / it was what he thought it was / he likes the idea of open computer . . .

Title: Very pretty but disappointing because this is so loose it falls off the nose Review: This is like a shirt for the face. It is so wide and large that it falls off my nose and the ear loops come off my ears. There is absolutely no way I can use this. I supposed someone who has a super wide or round face would benefit from this gaiter but it is a disappointment to me. I do love the colors, however.

The current price of $12.99 is expensive but still competitive for this if it were not so large.

Title: Okay value, on the thin side
Review: They run pretty small and are somewhat thin, but for under $13 it's a good value.

Title: Great, light moisturizing product for daily use!
Review: I have heard about Vichy products, but have never tried them until now. I actually loved this Mineral 89 formula. Goes on light and absorbs into my aging skin quickly. I have been using it daily twice a day for the past month (in the morning and before I go to bed). My skin is actually glowing and has a more youthful appears and glow. I find this to be a great moisturizer which does not interfere with my other beauty products (i.e. sunscreen, foundation, etc). This is a reasonably priced product compared to other moisturizers out there and I think it does a much better job than most. I am sold on Vichy now and will be expanding my knowledge of the product line and bring more into my daily beauty regimine.

Title: Soft and Flat
Review: These are basically soft and flat. I should've spent more money to get harder ones. Doesn't really do all that much for blending foundation.

Title: This worked.out great
Review: This worked out great for us.  We were able to get.out any wrinkles and it was easy to set up.

Title: Takes a while to remove nail polish
Review: I used this to remove my gel nail polish and I would say that it takes more than 30 minutes for me to actually remove the polish. It could be the amount of layer that affects it from removing it fast, but 30min to remove my gel nail polish can dry out my cuticles really bad.

Title: It's cheaply made but
Review: It's just ok not real bad no real good

Title: Just like original remote
Review: Easy to use . great value too

Title: Beautiful Presentation!
Review: This cleansing cream has beautiful presentation. It's probably the prettiest jar that I've ever seen. It looks very high end. The product itself, is just okay. First of all, the smell is pretty strong. I don't mind strong scents, but this was a very familiar one with notes of lemon. I love lemon scents, but this one is artificial. And when I finally figured out what it reminded me, that was a huge turn off. It smells just like dishwasher detergent! I had difficulties getting past that. The cream is very oily. I tried using it both ways - rinsing it with warm water and wiping off with a tissue. In both instances, my face didn't feel clean afterwards. This type of cleanser is not for me.

Title: This top coat dries to more of a matte than glossy finish but has the non-chipping power of my favorite top coat Review: The best top coat I have ever used in my life is [[ASIN:B000EVGQ8U Out The Door Top Coat]], which I have applied on my nails for the last 20+ years. Therefore, I decided to compare this Paris & Vine brand with that one. The first picture shows my left hand with this Paris & Vine top coat and the second picture has "OutTheDoor" top coat on it. The difference is not as visible in pictures but in person it is obvious.

This top coat is not as glossy as the other and dries to a more matte-looking finish. The staying / non-chipping power is about the same. However, considering this is three dollars higher in price plus the fact that it really is not as glossy, I would choose my other brand over this one. It works but it does not beat the best. If the price were equivalent, I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: Ran a little too big for me (32A/B)
Review: Ran a little large on me, I may need a smaller size (32A/B) but none is available. Otherwise the bra is fine, it's just big on me.

Title: Nice fragrance; moisturizing; only fizzes & I needed strainer to catch petal pieces when done Review: [[VIDEOID:d5dd1373fa830ee17cd7e836dd7a2f67]] There are 6 individually wrapped small bath bombs in this set in one nice fragrance combination of patchouli and buriti. Unfortunately, that is all that is positive to me. Each bomb fizzes and dissolves in about two minutes. There are no suds and only floating chopped petal pieces in the water. The bath looks a bit oily but I did not feel my feet (as I used this in a foot bath) to be moisturized by soaking them in this. Also, my foot bath had to be washed out because the oil adhered to it.

Since these are white, there were no color rings to adhere to my skin, my foot bath, or my towels. When I was done, I needed a sink strainer to catch all the debris that washed away. I am glad I did not use these in an actual bath.

The current price of $10.81 ($12.72 minus 15%) comes to a reasonable $1.80 per bomb; however, these bombs are so lackluster to me that I would never order them. I love the fragrance and the fact that there is no color to rinse off, but that is all I love.

Title: Dont fit!
Review: Seams on top of shoe irritation to big toe.

Title: I should have known not to dry this; soap is brown & barely lathers; has earthy smell Review: For some reason I thought this would be different from the African Black Soap Bar I tried previously. However, I do not care for the earthy smell nor the dirt colored solution that barely lathers. I really thought I would give this soap another try but now I will steer clear. I figured the liquid version would be somewhat different than the bar but it is only a little better.

I hate using this to wash my face. I will repurpose this as hand soap. The current price of $22 is also pricey. This is definitely not for me and I will avoid such soaps in the future.

Title: I did not notice any difference to my face or neck after using this Review: There is a small tin of gel mask in this set along with the eyedropper serum. I do not like the gel mask at all but that is because I do not like gel masks in general. Therefore, my review rating is based on the serum.

The mask takes about 30+ minutes to dry and is not easy to peel off. So this is not for me.

The serum is not easy to get into the dropper. I had to try a couple of times. Nevertheless, I tried this for several days over my face and neck and under my eyes. It is safe for the eye area. My face felt smooth but did not look tighter or any different. I also did not like that I had to add moisturizer on top of this. I figured this would suffice but that is not recommended.

Overall, this is not for me. The current price of $46 is pricey for something that I do not feel delivers the results I expected. It is just okay.

Title: Not choosing this kind again
Review: Did not adhere well.  Guess I will stick with Command

Title: Junk
Review: Broke after a month!  Don't waste your money!!!

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great style. Awesome price!

Title: One set of 2 medium-sized clips; no teeth in middle so hold is light Review: There are two claw clips in the package and not two packages of two clips. They are gorgeous, medium-sized, and well-made. They grip my short to medium fine curly hair well but they do not have the hold of clips that have teeth in the center. They would also work better with longer hair. 

At the current price of $9.49 ($9.99 minus 5%) it comes to a competitively priced but pricey $4.75 per clip. The quality of these clips is excellent and they are beautiful as well but I just wish they had teeth in the center.

Title: It did nothing
Review: It did nothing. I used a different brand, and it worked great??

Title: scalp scrubber/massager Review: I purchased this because my natural nails are thin and split - so scrubbing my head with washing my hair is a real hassle. This is a GODSEND. Works really, really well without getting tangled! I was worried about tangling - shoulder length hair - but it doesn't tangle even a little. I feel like I'm really getting a good wash AND - bonus - it feels really good. The "tips" are rubbery - firm - but not too firm. The hand hold is very comfortable to hold and use. I'm going to buy another to travel with. This is a really great solution for me.
UPDATE: Purchased a second for travel.

Title: See no value if one has a smart TV. The only thing thus far that works ...
Review: Much to do about nothing. See no value if one has a smart TV. The only thing thus far that works through voice commands is the weather.

Title: Absorbs quickly; not too greasy; moisturizes lightly; leaves skin feeling smooth; dislike fragrance
Review: This is a tall 5-ounce pump bottle of hydrating body oil. The fragrance is not to my liking; almost like a bad coconut. A little oil goes a long way. It  absorbs quickly and is not too greasy. The moisturizing effects are light and it leaves skin feeling smooth. It is the fragrance that has me disappointed. The current price of $8.35 ($8.79 minus 5%) is reasonable for this.

Title: It did nothing to minimize puffiness or dark circles around my eyes Review: I originally thought this was for the entire eye but it is one of those gels used to minimize puffiness or dark circles around the eyes. I tried it for several days so far and it appears to have a little moisturizing affect but my eyes look exactly the same as before using this gel. This gel glides on and absorbs well; it is also fragrance free.

I am disappointed that I cannot use this on the eyelids. In addition, there is a warning on the box to avoid direct contact with eyes; however, this is typical with most (but not all) eye products.

UPDATE: I have been using this regularly for over two weeks and have not seen any difference with regard to minimizing puffiness or dark circles around my eyes. It is moisturizing only to me.

Title: Great diamonds, bad caviar.
Review: The small beads are very cheap looking, the diamonds are a great price but if you're getting this specifically for the little ball/studs then I would pass, they look plastic and I cant even use them for my nails.

Title: Not good
Review: Sound quality is not good. Cant even turn it up all the way or it's just that quiet

Title: Cute and thin style sock
Review: Very cute thin dress type socks.

Title: I tried them Review: I have used silicone patches for my upper chest with good results. I have some light wrinkling on my upper lip and though silicone patches would work well there. I purchased these.

I wear my patches to bed. The first time I wore this patch, it fell off in my bed. I had to search for it the next morning. I then wore the second patch. It fell off during the night, also. Falling off defeats the purpose. They do not stay on; so therefore, aren’t beneficial.

Title: Overpriced
Review: This earbuds is definitely overpriced. The sound quality isn’t any better than other no name brands. and the battery life isn’t that good either.

Title: Not Even Close
Review: I like my shirts loose fitting so I ordered up a size!  The moment I took it out of the plastic bag I knew it ran small.  Giving it the benefit of the doubt, I tried it on--couldn't even get it over my chest!

Title: I love Travelpro!
Review: I exclusively use Travelpro for all my travel/packing needs. Although I am now using the spinner series, this suitcase (20") is still in my use today. I use it as a small carryon bag where I keep my laptop and some miscellaneous clothing items (in case my larger cases don't make it to the terminal at the same time I do on the plane). I know the Travelpro brand is durable, attractive and stands up to lots of misuse by baggage handlers. You can't go wrong buying this brand!

Title: 🙂
Review: 🙂

Title: Doesn't lather well
Review: Does not lather as well as clearasil

Title: Great Deodorant, but leaves an oily stain on your clothes over time.
Review: Great deodorant, but leaves an oily stain on your clothing overtime.

Title: Complete rip off Review: Followed directions, used multiple tablets from this set. Nothing. No scent, no steam, nothing. It just makes a mess at the bottom of my shower than dissolves down the drain.

Waste of money. Do not buy. Extremely disappointing gift and a way overpriced rip off

Title: Softly disappointed
Review: Not pleased with the volume level as this speaker is not loud nor has booming bass like the description said

Title: OK as long as its OK from being liquid and turning back into solid
Review: its really hot now in NY  so it showed up liquid .... but returned to solid in my house .. so im hoping its OK  otherwise im impressed with the size  i had NO clue it was sooo big

Title: Cannot get it to work
Review: I've spent hour after frustrating hour trying to get this to work. No go.

Title: Sporadic shutdowns, good for short recordings
