Review: I'm not thrilled with this recorder. Even fully charged, we experienced sporadic shutdowns and having to turn it back on at least 4 times in a single one hour meeting. My unit seems to want to record for about 10 to 14 minutes at most and then shuts down. If that's all your doing, recording a short conversation, this is probably fine. If you need something to backup a board meeting or something important, this should not be your first choice.

Title: Clutter buster
Review: Wow! What a clutter difference this plug makes! Definitely exactly what I needed to help keep my kitchen counters clear. Easy to plug Dot into it and works beautifully!

Title: I could give this product 10 stars
Review: Have to give this one 5 stars. My hair is fine and limp. Used it yesterday and couldn't believe at the end of the day my hair was still in place and going strong. After I washed and dried my hair I lifted parts and gave them a quick squirt let them dry, combed them down a little and did a light spray over the rest of my hair. Pleasant smell. I was so glad for that because strong smelling products can sometime put my allergies into a tailspin. Looking forward to trying more Kenra products since I was so happy with this one.

Title: muscle bath salts
Review: muscle relief bath salts - pretty big bag.  I estimate you'll get about 3-4 or so baths out of it if you use 1-2 cups per tub. Smells strong - hope it works as strongly as it smells!  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Attractive Wrist Band
Review: This wrist band is a big improvement on the silicone bands that I have for my Fitbit Alta (not HR). It fits my Fitbit very well. The band is really large. I have a large wrist and usually link bands don't fit at all.  I was able to take 2 links out and it was still a little loose, but with removing the 3rd link, it was too tight. Removing the links was just like the directions showed, but I found it a bit difficult to open up each link that I was removing. What I didn't care for about the wrist band was that it wasn't a simple process to put it on or take it off. It wasn't hard, but it was a pain. You have to slide it on/off to the actual Fitbit rather than using a clasp on the band. It's nice looking, but takes more time than my previous band to put on.

Title: outdoor work socks Review: UPDATE BELOW: These are and have been my husband choices for work boot socks for years and years. They are sometimes a bit difficult to get - so was happy to get them here. They wash wonderfully and machine dry. They are thick and last about a year. My husband wears them daily.
UPDATED REVIEW - there is a real problem in getting your order these days - I ordered FOUR pairs of 3 sets (this would be 12 pairs of socks to keep the math easy) and you will get only 4. I've had to call and complain 3x to get the 12 pair I paid for!!! This is a huge problem. While the socks appear to be the same, they are a bit thinner - hope they last as well. I am considering going directly to the seller to purchase these now. It's just not worth the hassle otherwise. Makes me so sad to update this review. Hopefully fox river will get it straightened out FAST.

Title: Great pair of soft and comfortable short pajamas
Review: These are a great summer pair of pajamas. Cut loose for a fit (I typically wear an 8 or a 10 but I like my pjs to not be clingy), they are extremely comfortable and super cute. I like them because although I know they are pajamas, I am not afraid to sit outside on my back porch in the morning to drink a cup of tea (as they look like a little short lounge outfit). I have washed them once and they clean easily and did not shrink. Great lightweight comfortable pajamas. I really like the heather grey color as well.

Title: Loved the clock while it lasted
Review: I loved most everything about this clock radio. The projection was clear and I could read it without my glasses. I could charge my phone without even more cords at the bedside. And the alarms worked fine. Changing the time could be a little tricky, but manageable. What brought this down to 2 stars is the lack of longevity. My clock is now 3 years old, and it does not work. Not odd looking numbers or alarms not functioning - it just is off, and will not come on. Completely powerless. Tried different outlets, nothing works. It is dead. One day, it worked fine, and then the next, there was nothing. In comparison, we have another clock radio that was one of the first digital ones that is about 20 years old. I would expect a clock radio to last longer than 3 years.

Title: Perfect fit/perfect amount of cushion
Review: These house shoes fit perfectly.  They are comfortable and my feet do not slip around in them.  I wanted some that weren’t too flat or too tall, but had some cushiony memory foam.  These have the perfect amount of cushion.

Title: Very nice and well made
Review: I purchased 4 of these wallets. This one for me and rest for gifts.  Well made and very lovely in feel/texture and feminine,

Title: Overheated
Review: I wanted to like this. It had everything I needed but unfortunately I went with another option as this one seemed to overheat. And I'm not talking warm . This got to the point I could not pick it up to move it. Maybe this was due to the metal shell

Title: Very fragrant & soothing hand lotion; leaves my hands silky; way too pricey & not refillable Review: There are three small pocket-sized tubes of lotion in this package in coco cooler, fig fizz, and carrot kick scents. The lotion is of medium thickness, absorbs quickly. and leaves my hands feeling super silky.

The package says that this is ready to refill and I just do not understand that. Even after I pulled off the top, I do not see any way to refill such a small bottle. That's the first negative. The second is that this is so expensive at $32.90 which comes to $10.97 per travel-sized bottle of only 1.69 fluid ounces each. They say that 20% of profits fund water projects in developing countries. Unfortunately, I always had a belief that one should not buy a product because part of the profits go to a good cause. However, that is only my opinion.

This hand cream is very nice and lovely. The scents are nice too. However, this is too expensive and not refillable, in my opinion.

Title: Moisturizing
Review: I like the ease of use that goes along with sheet masks. This is the first time I've used one specifically for the neck area. I received a set of four masks. They have minimal English included and no instructions on how to use it. I had to go by the picture on the packet. The mask is fully saturated with serum (or whatever it is) and I had to squeeze some of the excess out. It doesn't stay in place very well and kept slipping down my neck. I tried to limit my movement in order to keep it in place. While I haven't seen any miraculous results from it, I did find it to be very moisturizing. I massaged the remaining serum into my skin afterwards. Overall, it was okay.

Title: Loved the outside of the purse
Review: Item arrived promptly. Loved the outside of the purse, really great quality but unfortunately when I opened it I was disappointed with how flimsy the card holders were. I felt that they wouldn't stand up to daily use so sadly returned the item.

Title: Dainty
Review: Very nice ring

Title: It will transfer TV programming to an iMac. But ...
Review: It will transfer TV programming to an iMac.  But it requires an app to send the TV programming on the iMac to an iPad on the same WiFi system.

Title: Size was off
Review: So hard to shop for these items on amazon - size was off but easy return policy. Also hard when bra size is like 44B because the bras lose their attractiveness in style and look.

Title: good
Review: it arrived promptly, packaged well and feels great. just as described. HOWVER, it shrank two sizes when washed in cold water and dried. absolutely would NOT buy it again. I wore it for one week.

Title: Enjoyable entertainment device
Review: The device is very sensitive but not annoying.  Alexa's different trivia games are nice and the ability to sync smart devices are convenient.  App rewind was also a welcome addition to the product and volume control.

Title: Yikes
Review: I like the idea of this and it's helped a lot on road trips with the kids. But it falls apart quite easily and there are several pieces you have to put back together like a puzzle. Not to mention when it does fall apart, there only left the bracket with a long screw sticking out. Super dangerous if we got in a wreck it would go right through a skull

Title: Probably the best sunscreen out in the market today!
Review: I love La Roche-Posay products and almost exclusively use them in my daily beauty regimine. I was excited when I saw this sunscreen not only because of the manufacturer but also because of the 60 SPF protection. I live in central Florida where sun is the biggest enemy to your skin and I typically use a 50 SPF, but having a higher SPF was something I really wanted to try. I applied this the first day before I spent the day on a neighbor's boat and I was thrilled with the results. First, it goes on smooth and absorbs quickly. It is non-greasy and I wore it on my plain non-makeup'ed skin. I did not reapply it and after 4 hours on the boat (in and out of coverings) I came home with no noticeable color on my cheeks. I will be using this exclusively as it is a great protection and my skin feels soft and smooth without feeling greasy.

Title: Ermahgerd, an ersome hert
Review: You guys need to get this hat! I'm a petite adult female (lol that makes me sound like some breed of dog) and I have kind of a small head. All the adult sized hats sized small are still too large in circumference. So here is a pic of me in the hat so you can see what it looks like. I was in an Athleta fashion show, lol. I am really not made for the runway. I tried to do a little pirouette thingy and my shoes with their rubber bottoms kinda got stuck as I spun around and it looked super awkward. Anyway, I digress. The hat. The quality is good for a "made in China" item, the inner brim is not at all itchy. It's not the most ventilatory thing to wear in 190 million percent humidity, but as my mother always said, pain is the price for beauty. I also purchased the hat in another color. You really can't go wrong with this accessory! So buy it now!! :-)

Title: Great
Review: Fast charging

Title: These suck
Review: I had these in the 90s and loved them. I purchased two sets of these for my daughter and both fell apart within a few weeks. Don't waste your money

Title: Fantastic Shower oil for dry skin
Review: Such a great product for people with dry skin. You also get a lot more for your money than when you buy something like aquaphore spray.

Title: What can I say, it’s a battery
Review: It’s black, compact, sleek and no one has asked it out on a date yet.

Title: Beautiful but…
Review: This is a pretty top, but the white version is paper thin. I loved it, but it’s just too thin.

Title: Great nail polish, great color, what else do you need?!!
Review: Love Essie nail polishes, my favorite. How can you go wrong with L'Oreal? This is a pretty light pink color, perfect for a natural looking finish on my relatively short nails. Full coverage, easy to apply, lasts for days with no chipping. Just beautiful, no issues, perfect.

Title: Not A Fan
Review: I love skin care. I love face masks. I do not love these. Each container contains a lot of product. If you use all the product on your face, you’ll have a huge mess. You’ll have face mask in your hair, all over your pillow, on your sheets. I’m a side sleeper, so this just got everywhere. It isn’t nice. It kinds of rolls up like dried rubber cement through the night, so you wake up with little rolls and balls of rubber cement stuck to everything. The worst was getting in out of my hair. I gave up after pulling it out strand by strand and just rewashed my hair. It didn’t really make much of a difference in my skin. Definitely not enough to be worth the giant hassle it is. It softens my skin, but not anymore than a standard night cream. Just not worth it, in my opinion. It just feels like really thick lotion that doesn’t properly soak in.

Title: Pretty!
Review: The shimmer is really pretty. A little goes a long way so I think the value for your money is good.

Title: Super Moisturizing
Review: This lip balm is the best!  It's deeply soothing, moisturizing, and lasts longer than other lip balms.  I keep one in my purse, my kitchen and anywhere else I spend time.  There is no scent, but I'd rather not have one.

Title: A+
Review: Excellent brush set

Title: Kinda grozz.
Review: Weird texture and taste funny.

Title: Smells wonderful; conditions and provides shine to blow-dried hair; weighs down my curls a bit
Review: I love the fragrance of this blowout cream. I put a little on my damp short to medium fine curly hair and blow dried it. My hair felt conditioned and had a sheen to it when done. However, this product does weigh down my curls and for that reason only, I give this 3 stars. Otherwise this is a really nice cream with a wonderful floral scent.

Title: Didn’t work
Review: Didn’t work

Title: Sizes are way off.
Review: Sizes are way off.

Title: Narrow toe area but breaks in after a bit...CUTE shoe
Review: The only reason I didn't give these 5 stars is because they are a little narrow in the toes. I can honestly tell you that I had planned on returning these right off the bat after trying them on out of the box but then I got busy and the return window lapsed so I was stuck with what I thought were "unusable" shoes because of that narrow toe :(- HOWEVER! because I was stuck with them I thought well I mind as well walk around in them and they actually began to give some in the toe and are totally wearable and fairly comfortable once broken in a bit. PLUS after I started trying to break them in- my fiancée noticed them immediately ( and lets just say he doesn't give me a ton of shoe compliments without being asked!) and he LOVES the look of them - he always talks about them being my cute "pink shoes"... ahem... meaning I should wear them. So give them a chance! But may not the best if you have very wide feet my width are usually average...

Title: Great though hat
Review: Beautiful hat, bright white color, great reflective details. My hair fits well through the back, the size adjuster is easy to use. Very comfortable.

Title: Not long enough for me, weigh 135 lbs. Review: Seems to be made good.
I wet this, put my french soap on it, But,
I'm a women that weights 135 lbs, and did not find this spa back scrubber long enough!
The handles are too short, and I had to strech my hands, arms behind me to far to use this.
Very uncomfortable.

Title: Didn't Fit Composer
Review: Sadly I had to return it, It didn't fit my composer...

Title: Decent product, can't stand the scent
Review: It's decent, but for Aveeno, disappointed in scent.

Title: This is not the old version
Review: I bought this from the picture online it says it is the older ipad Version and it is not, it literally does not work with the older version of the iPad I noticed because I tried purchasing the original product before and it didn't close correctly, I went to get a replacement thinking I had just gotten a defective one but the replacement also did not work and I only noticed when I got home. Having had to purchase the cover twice I decided to go for a cheaper online version and see if I could actually get the correct version for my older iPad and when I saw this it had the picture of being for the older one here but apparently it is not, it is literally for the newer version. I am sending this back and hopefully getting a refund because I cannot use this.

Title: Meh
Review: Get what you pay for

Title: Fit a bit low and opens in the back when squatting.
Review: I love the feel of the jeans.  They are stretchy and comfortable.  They are a bit low and show crack when squatting.  I don't care for that.  They don't lie flat against the back.  In the photo they appear higher waisted which I would think would be more fitted, but they are not.

Title: The arm holes aren’t right Review: The dress itself, is nice. The material is nice. The dress just wasn’t cut correctly. The arm holes were huge. A bra would definitely show. I am pretty sur another size would not correct that.

I ordered the size according to my measurements and the size chart. I ordered a 16/18. It was too large. I am 5’4” and weigh about 172. I wear a 36 DDD bra.

Title: Ok
Review: Just ok

Title: This little speaker packs a punch!
Review: I needed a wireless speaker I could use on my lanai in Florida. Wasn't sure, despite the overall great reviews, how good this would really be. All I can say is 'Wow, wow, wow!'. The bass is strong, the overall sound quality is amazing and it was super easy to set up and start using. I am a 60 year old woman and sometimes I can be technically challenged, but this unit was quickly paired and blasting. I am very happy with this speaker and, for the money, is comparable to the most costly speakers on the market. Highly recommend!

Title: STINKS
Review: I was hoping to like this lotion, but it doesn't smell like hot cocoa. I had to take a shower after putting it on. It turned into a floral-y, powder-y scent that I couldn't tolerate. Even my husband (who can smell NOTHING) remarked how offensive the scent was. Don't waste your money.

Title: Velcro wears quickly
Review: The shoe is adorable and my 3yo loves them. They fit as expected, colors as shown, lightweight but sturdy, easy to put on and take off.....EXCEPT.... after one month of use, the Velcro part is worn out and doesn’t “latch” anymore rendering the shoe useless.

Title: Four Stars
Review: just what we needed thank you

Title: Had to return Review: My husband is 3x type guy that works in cold areas on ocassion. He's purchased carhartts for more than 30 years and knows they always run small so he opted for 2 sizes bigger than normal in the insulated bibs and,as it turns out, the largest size carhartt offers. Sadly they were still at least 2 sizes too small! He was soooo disappointed to have to return these and purchase an brand other than carhartt. Wish Carhartt would review their sizing and offer a bit more of the larger sizes AND more accurate sizing information.
As I said... sadly, these were returned. :(

Title: Adequate
Review: I refuse to continue torturing myself with underwire bras.  The problem is finding a good wire-free support bra.  After trying more than 2 dozen bras, I find that it’s the best of all of them, even though it is just adequate.

Title: Nice Variety of Sizes
Review: My 18 year old daughter has been wanting some silver hoops, but she wasn't sure how big or small she wanted. This has a nice variety of sizes so she can try them out to find out which ones she likes best. The quality is okay. Most of them open/close without any difficulties. They aren't has shiny and silvery as silver ones, but they're okay. They don't irritate my daughter's ears.

Title: Excellent hand moisturizer but I cannot stand the fragrance Review: This moisturizer absorbs well, does not feel greasy on my hands, and really moisturizes. However, I absolutley hate the fragrance.  I am a lover of fragrances but this tropical aroma does not smell tropical at all. I would expect a hint of coconut but it smells almost like burnt rubber to my senses. 

The current price of $9.74 for 1.7 ounces is competitive for a high quality cream. Nevertheless, I would not even consider buying this only because of the terrible fragrance. Another complaint I have is that the yellow lettering below the Hand Cream label is practically unreadable on both the front and also in the instructions on the back. They need to change that to another color.

Title: Comfortable
Review: I find it nearly impossible to find the perfect bra. I even went to one of those stores in the mall that does the bra fitting and sells expensive bras. As far as comfort goes, this is pretty good. The straps are stay in place well. The band fit me on the smallest setting. I have found that the band rolls up in the front. While that doesn't impact the appearance when wearing clothes, it is annoying. While it is a minimizing bra, it doesn't compress very much like some others. Construction seems to be fine. I'm not impressed with the shape it gives. It does not separate the girls and is not flattering at all. There's also not a lot of support and no lifting.

Title: Adorable !
Review: i hope this fit ok  i checked fit as expected but they are for a christmas gift  they are ADORABLE though  i wish i wore socks

Title: Great protection
Review: I like it because every time I do not buy protection something happens. I just had a brand name computer give me trouble I had it 13 months and had to pitch it. I expect a computer to last at least 5-7 years.

Title: Straight leg
Review: These are not tapered leg pants as appears in the photo. They are straight legged. Please update photo on listing

Title: micro storage
Review: I have a galaxy 7.  Comes with NO instruction and "suggests" that you need an "app" BUT so far I've found NO app.  I've plugged it in to my phone, I see a few files - but not all and the ones I want - my photos- show empty!! NO instruction about how to get it onto the stupid "data traveler."  It would be nice if it weren't SO hard to include basic instructions.  If you can't provide that, then don't advertise that works with most any android device.  Grrrrrr.  I will be going to youtube to try and find a nice, step by step instruction for idiots like me.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  In this case, it would be full of bleeped out cuss words.

Title: One Star
Review: Not impressed. Only changes color in icy water.

Title: Good brush for young girls or travel; however, brush stinks Review: This is a nice, cute, small brush for young girls or for adults that want to travel with a small brush. The handle is small and the head is big. The brush glides easily through my short to medium-length curly hair. This comes with a burlap carry case that fits most of the brush except for the top of the handle. Unfortunately, the brush smells something awful and that is headache producing. This will have to be aired out a while.

The current price of $11.98 is competitive for a boar bristle brush.

Title: Four Stars
Review: This shaver does a nice job and is of high quality.

Title: Bad quality fabric, do not fit properly.
Review: These pants are super small and I ordered an XL sizing, they are definitely not for lounging but rather feel very thick and yet at the same time the fabric is light in that it doesn't cover from cold weather, they look super uncomfortable because of the material it is rough and looks very cheap, they feel almost like beach pants but I'm not even sure what you would wear these for at all, the material is just terrible quality extremely stiff and doesn't feel nice on the skin at all. I tried to put them on but they don't fit my curves at all in fact they don't go up they are completely straight and maybe for someone without a butt. I don't understand how anyone could wear this without feeling uncomfortable though they look like they don't even move at all, almost like doll's clothing. Again they may look big in the picture but the material is not stretchy at all. I would like to return these if possible will check if I can.

Title: VERY CHEAP HAIR.  I WOULDN'T RECOMMEND ANY ONE TO BUY THIS HAIR.. I MEAN NOONE!!!!
Review: Looks nothing like the picture

Title: Great skirt
Review: Great fitting. Comfortable and easy to travel with.

Title: Super cute three pack of Celtic earrings
Review: For the money, you can't beat this three pack of earrings. Sure, they are not as big as I would have liked them (I prefer a larger size earring), but they are super cute and surprisingly made well. I'm Irish and having a variety of Celtic knot earrings is great to have whether I am dressing up or just throwing on some jeans. These would make a great stocking stuffer for the holidays or even something to give someone on St. Patrick's Day. Highly recommend.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Worked perfectly at hiding my sagging eyes.

Title: Very poor quality am returning
Review: Very poorly made. Zippers got stuck first week - broke. It’s useless.

Title: Snaps defective
Review: Love that I could customize it and give as a gift- it was well received. But they put the baby in it and two of three snaps didn't actually snap. So if your just looking to give a cute gift it’s good but if you want to utilize as an actual onesie it’s not so good.

Title: This cover was a big disappointment!!
Review: This appeared to be cheaply made.  It was NOT anything close to what I was expecting!  My 9 year old grandson immediately took it off of the iPad mini he uses whenever he comes over to our house.  I was truly disappointed with this product!

Title: plantronic charger cord
Review: My husband loves his plantronic head set (I think this is set #3) and he needed a new charger cord - thus this purchase.  He reports it works exactly as it should.

Title: Sweet smelling pomade the consistency of cold cream that leaves my hair clumpy and dirty looking Review: This is a sweet smelling pomade the consistency of cold cream. The fragrance is fine but the product makes my hair dirty looking, even when applying a little bit. It tames down the frizz but with a hair gelled wet and stiff look.

I recently tried their [[ASIN:B01KPUWJDK ORIBE Body Wash]] which is absolutely amazing and expected the same of this product but am disappointed. I have short, fine wavy hair that frizzes terribly in the rain. Unfortunately, this is not the product for me.

Title: Looked like a frosted silver color to me! Review: I’m not into frosted nail polish, but I was courious about Paris & Vine from the reviews here.
The polish goes on smooth, but to my eye this was Silver and Not a rose gold color that I was expecting.
I usually wear Opi polish, and the paris & vine polish seemed to dry as fast as Opi.
Over this color I use Opi RapiDry, and it went on fine and dryed fast.

The large square black lid top was too big and would not open this polish , it just kept spining around, and came right off to expose
A little lid cover that I had to open this with!

Title: O rings  weak
Review: Only after wearing my bracelet a couple of times the o rings came apart and now I need to figure out a way to make them stay closed.

Title: mini spray bottle
Review: I purchased 2 of these to make some hand sanitizer for my Mom during this time of virus.  They work great.  Essential oil, alcohol and a touch of hydrogen peroxide.

Title: Seems to be a good value, but screen contrast doesn't work
Review: So, if the sun is too bright, there is no way to adjust the contrast color.  The menu flashes up and then disappears rapidly.  Not sure if this is firmware upgradable.  I mounted this on my Bobcat T650 Loader so that when I am trenching I can see the spray paint line behind me as  I am dragging the trencher.  Problem is the contrast is terrible and no way to adjust it, so I couldn't see the fluorescent orange paint on the ground.  Everything else seems to work great.  Cabling was good.  Camera feels like a quality metal housing that will be able to stand up to the abuse /heat/dust on the back of the Bobcat.  Night vision is grainy, but it does work.  Not bad for the money.  The Bobcat solution was over 1k, this isn't bad for under $100.  Time will tell.

Title: Globs
Review: The first time I used this it was fine but the second time it came out in globs. I’m returning it.

Title: Perfect
Review: My 7 year old wanted these for a Georgie from IT costume. He loves them & they fit perfect. He wears a 3-3.5, according to the shoe. His toe was almost to the end. So they fit as they should

Title: Great reasonably priced electric razor!
Review: My husband loved this Philips Norelco model. First, it's a compact size, nice to travel with or just store in your bathroom between uses. Second, it does the job and keeps his shave close. Third, it's a really reasonable price (at the time of this writing Amazon didn't have a price on this, but I did find it on the open marketplace for less than $50). The box it came in is attractive and this would make a great gift for someone in your life. There are far better models out there in the market today, but for the money, this is a great choice!

Title: Not durable! Only lasted 6 months.
Review: I thought I had really found some great headphones for a great price. They only lasted six months and a few weeks before the wire stopped making a connection. No way to contact the seller. Just out of luck!

Title: Don't recommended
Review: Bubbles never went away,  not user friendly even though I've put then on numerous items in the past

Title: Great product.  Works exactly as described.
Review: Works great.  No issues with it at all.  Bought one for a friend of mine.

Title: Feels cheap, tons of creases and wrinkles
Review: As soon as I opened up the package and felt the product I knew it was going to appear cheap when photographed. I hate the vinyl material and wish I would have read more closely as I always prefer a wrinkle free cloth backdrop. The wrinkles don’t completely come out and even if they did it’s just a bunch of unnecessary work. Plus there is a chemical smell presumably from whatever dyes they use to print the pattern on the vinyl. Do yourself a favor and just find a cloth backdrop.

Title: Didn’t grab my hair, nothing for me. Review: My hair is a little shorter then shoulder length hair, and I thought this would give
My hair a smoother look, although my hair is not really curly.
I did ask questions before ordering this but nothing from the seller!
The top of this is half round that is a hard plastic, with small groves your hair is suppose
To fit into when you comb it threw!
It doesn’t do that. I had to lay my hair in the round groves, and Nothing happened.
There are different temperatures on this that work well and This did get hot,
But it did nothing. If this had flexible plastic bristle it would grab your hair and worked!
Or I think you have to have very long hair, hold it down, and put hair in the
Groves but there not even deep enough to take my hair.

I do have a round heated brush with the plastic moveable Brussels that grab my hair,
Which I thought this would also do but this is smaller, hard and didn’t do anything.

Title: Good but Not What I Wanted Either
Review: Ive been looking for THE perfect screen cleaner for years  .. i hate that my PC screen and tablets and phone is constantly icky from my fingers  they invented touch screen .. they shoulda figured out how to keep them clean without having to clean them 10X  a day ..... I have so many things I've tried in liquid form .. so many different types of cloths to use - so many "gadgets"  ... so i thought I'd next try this one .. and its OK  i guess im looking for the screen cleaner that will make my fingers glide like the screen is waxed and i just dont find that with anything and the fingerprints are always just as bad .. maybe someday someone will figure it out .. for now .. ill keep this  its a good price for the amount of bottles each being 8 oz that's for sure ... !

Title: Cheap looking
Review: I was disappointed when I received these. The metal components make the earrings look so much cheaper than they were,

Title: Works great with a standard height winter jacket collar
Review: Works great with a standard height winter jacket collar. This is slightly shorter down the neck than may be desired if wearing a scoop neck type top. Very soft, warm and fits great. Works for me.

Title: I always use Pears soap, and buying online has ...
Review: I always use Pears soap, and buying online has saved me quite a bit of money and is very convenient.

Title: Made Eyes Puffy
Review: I used this over 2 days to try it and it made my eyes more puffy. And made the dark circles look worse. So disappointing as I was looking forward to the results based on the reviews. So far the burts bees eye cream is the winner!

Title: dickies heavy duty socks
Review: I was really expecting these socks (purchased for my big guy husband) to be a bit better quality as they are described as heavy duty compression.  They are not.  The first time he put them on, they snagged.  Eh.  They are not "compression" in any way - but they appear to sort of stay up - but if they were compression - they would definitely stay up.  They are cotton socks - but far from heavy duty work socks.  They will last for a few washes as far as I can see.  Disappointed.  We are using them right now as holders for ice packs for knees and elbows.  Not exactly what we'd hoped for using them for (on work feet!) but we have repurposed them.  I just cannot recommend them as heavy duty work/compression socks for men who really work.

Title: Another winner from Conair!
Review: What's not to like? You can never go wrong with the Conair brand & this product is no exception. Its durable construction & design make it easy to dry & style hair.

Title: Three tank tops for the price of one!
Review: I really like this set of Rosyline tank tops. Multiple colors you get a set of 3 for under $20. These fit nice and snug (I got a size medium and probably could have used a large, so keep that in mind when ordering). Material is nice and soft. They look great under an off the shoulder shirt or with a tunic sweater where wearing a shirt underneath is required. Pretty nice set of the three colors you will probably use most to accent and add to your wardrobe.

Title: much fuller than expected Review: Needed a Living Room sub for our 5.1 system. had to be somewhat small but pack a good punch.
Harman Kardon AVR1700 receiver, Axiom Audio M2 bookshelf and BIC center channel and couple of small polk audio rears.
once i went online read about a good starting point on this sub, it made my H/K auto setup so much easier. 80 is my crossover start and setup using H/K's LFE sub output. good match.
we get good deep sound (*way better than the cheaper sub we had earlier), it is pretty harmonious with our Axiom and BIC fronts.
still need to do a bit more tweaking as we run more blu ray movies. time for Matrix to be played. have only owned this for one week. so far can't be happier.

Title: ok for protection
Review: Seems like only value is for protection to back and sides of tablet. Not really impressed.

Title: Too small
Review: This is a sturdy and well made little case. But that was my main problem.. it was too small. I purchased this case to use with my new [[ASIN:B005MTMFHU Canon SX40 HS 12.1MP Digital Camera with 35x Wide Angle Optical Image Stabilized Zoom and 2.7-Inch Vari-Angle Wide LCD]]. This case was absolutely too small to carry the camera, extra batteries and the battery charger. I returned the Ape Case to Amazon and purchased the [[ASIN:B0000CCVC9 Canon 100DG Bag for Canon SLR Cameras]] from Best Buy, mainly because my trip was closely approaching and I did not have time to have the new Canon case delivered prior to my departure. The Canan 100DG is much roomier and allows for a ton of space for everything I could possibly need to take along with my Canon SX40. If you have a smaller camera or are not going to need to haul all of your extra gear with you (say, going out for a day long hike, etc.), then this Ape Case may fit the bill for you. If not, then I highly recommend purchasing a larger case for your camera and all the related goodies.

Title: Good cord
Review: Good cord. 15ft is exactly what I wanted.

Title: Useless Review: Update: I think if you have low porosity hair, you should avoid this conditioner. I think that is why it did not work for me. It is protein-rich and might work well for someone with high-porosity hair.

Original review:
My hair hadn’t ever looked so bad as it did when I used this conditioner. I was so disappointed because it is EWG verified. I got this mid-pandemic so I stuck with this product for a whole month since I wasn’t really seeing anyone. Even though I globbed it on, it was not moisturizing at all. I have very thick, 2b wavy/curly hair, Irish descent. Also, it is expensive for the amount of product you get. I went through almost the whole bottle in a month. I was really disappointed because I love Attitude’s moisturizer and body wash. But after this experience I definitely would not recommend their hair care line. Definitely try Shea Moisture instead, their Power Greens conditioner awoken my hair from the depths of hell from which this Attitude conditioner pushed it down into.

Title: Runs VERY small...
Review: DEFINITELY size up one or two sizes. Large was way too tight on me, but I kept it as incentive to get back to a size medium later on. I'll probably order this again in an XL because it really is a cute top and very comfortable material.

Title: Feels like a piece of metal
Review: Way too heavy.

Title: Not worth the $
Review: Wears down the batteries quickly. Does not curl lashes any better than standard type of eyelash curler. Don't waste your $

Title: Better than nothing
Review: Hard to work controls like tuning, volume etc. in the dark. Wish I had gotten something more elaborate. Sound is good, though.

Title: Nice comfy T-shirt
Review: Material is thicker fits great!

Title: Didn't work for me
Review: After using this daily for two weeks I eventually stopped. First, the instructions were lacking and it took me quite a while to figure out what I was doing (and I am still not sure if I was doing it right). Second, the serum was not like anything I have used before (it was not light and took a while to get absorbed). Third, I haven't noticed any difference (I have some pronounced age spots that I have been trying to diminish and this did nothing). Sorry, can't recommend, but maybe it may work for you.

Title: Not good
Review: Leather strap to wide to put a watch on.  Only problem. Can’t use it.  I want to send back but can’t find it..

Title: Diamond fell out
Review: The diamonds fell out. It was a beautiful toe ring. Doesn’t look that great with missing diamonds.

Title: Shm
Review: This magnet doesn't work any better than the regular ones

Title: Good for what it is.
Review: Software is way out dated.  Item still works though, just be sure to re-encode your video files after ripping.  Extension cable is cheap and doesn't work well, caused a lot of audio and video errors.  Once I removed it, all issues were fixed.

Title: NOT THE GREATEST
Review: Side ripped out 3rd time my son wore them.

Title: Love!!!! Beautiful and shiny! Covers gray! Review: Okay... I moved to a somewhat remote town from a major city. I’m gray but originally a true blue brunette. So....I have spent months with my new hairdresser lifting my color - to almost an ash blond. Aweful. I’m a Chippewa girl. I wanted my dark hair BACK. This color rocks. Highlights, shiny.
Love. Back to dying my own hair.

Title: Softened my hair but left my curls a bit flat and my hair with a sheen Review: This conditioner has a fresh light fragrance that is pleasant to my senses. After washing my hair, I massaged a quarter sized dollop throughout my wet locks and waited about one minute before rinsing. My hair dried soft but my curls we almost non-existent and I have short to medium fine curly hair. Also, there was a little bit of sheen to my strands. Overall, this is just okay for me but based on the results, I would not order this again.

The current price of $34 for this lare 33.8 fluid ounce pump bottle is commensurate with the pricing of salon-style products.

Title: Wonderful
Review: Had a old wireless keyboard for 7 years and a mouse, my new computer gave me problems, I purchased this Logitech Combo and my computer loves the mouse and key board. Only wished I purchased a new set sooner. I recommend it highly.

Title: it's ok Review: Goes on smooth, blendable, the chubby stick itself looks bluish, but once applied to my eyelids, it's charcoal grey. No sharpening needed, just twist to dispense more.

update:
I originally gave this product 5 stars. After going out for a few hours today, I am changing it to 3 starts.
It's blendable, has a nice color, easy to apply, but it creases. It could be the 99 degrees weather or my oily skin.... I probably won't buy this again

Title: Nice fabric, Poor assembly
Review: I was really disappointed with the straps of this piece. The fabric felt nice when I was pulling it out of the package but the way the straps were stitched together made the entire shirt look a bit cheap. Unfortunately, this will be a return for me. Top runs a bit small too.

Title: Its large, nice cover up. Review: This works as a cover up over your bathing suit for the beach, or pool etc.
It’s roomy and fits my daughter. She is 5’6, and busty.
This is light weight, and is a see threw, but not as much as other beach cover ups she has.
The color looks like coral with colorful embroidery on the front that is done well.

I washed this on a delicate in zipper laundry bag, and hung on a hanger to dry.

Title: Very soft
Review: My daughter loves it. It fits perfectly! Thank you and would recommend it!

Title: Great at home product to use!
Review: I love taking care of my skin. I try to get a microderm or peel at least once a month from my local spa to try to keep my 60 something skin rejuvenated. When I saw this Necessity Skincare product I couldn't imagine what this product could do costing less than $25. Surprisingly, it works really well (at least as good as the pumpkin peels I have been getting) and at much less cost. Slightly tingly when applied, my skin feels great and soft afterwards. I think this is a great alternative to more expensive spa procedures, you should try it!

Title: multi plug extender
Review: Plug it in to existing outlet and extend your plug options.  It does stick out a bit from the wall, in case that figures into your use.  Works as expected.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Nice pattern, very small ! Review: Update, I have not changed my thought how small this is, but I like the design so much I bought the larger purse with this fabric design
On it..happy with the handbag, but not how small this little holder is..Still cannot get all my cards in this!
------------------
Looks cute, and I like the pattern on the fabric,.
But So very disappointed in the size. The measurements were Never given, and looks bigger in the picture.
This is the Same width as My iphone 7 plus, but 1 1/4 shorter.

It is two piece sewed together in the middle. One part is a snap pocket for change. The other part is a zipper pocket with a divider.
Has a ring on one side to put your finger through.
I do not carry a large purse with me, but to walk out the door with this little type of change credit card holder, I would
Forget about it if I Took it to the grocery store, besides it would fall threw the cart.

I have bought Vera Bradley purses, and have been happy with them.

Title: Beware that this is eau de toilette not eau de parfum
Review: Seller is misrepresenting this product because eau de toilette is milder and sent a note apar phone and the photo shows eau de toilette but the written description says eau de parfum

Title: Love this GPS!
Review: I hike at least once or twice a year, and usually into areas which are not clearly marked or travelled by many people. I am thrilled to have gotten this Magellan as a member of the Vine program. I used it this past weekend, just walking in my neighborhood park. Let me start by saying it is super easy to set up (batteries) and programming the destinations (although maybe it's simply because I have been using a variety of GPS systems over the past 5 years or so in cars and handheld). This item is perfect for carrying in a pocket, is very lightweight and is extremely user friendly. I used it locally here all last weekend (various places in NJ and Pennsylvania) and it functioned beautifully. Of course the true test will be when I travel to Montana in May and use it in the wilderness. But I am excited with its potential!!!

Title: Two Position Holder
Review: Durable, has two sturdy positions for iPad and has nice color choices.

Title: Did not connect to ipad
Review: None of these cables would fit my iPad port. I have a ledger nano x that works via Bluetooth but you need a cable to perform some features

Title: excellent product
Review: Great product, arrived quickly and was glad I ordered it, came with a lot of extras that would come in handy later.

Title: Very disappointed in the quality Review: I love the floral design.
The stand does not work very well.
The cover has not held up very well.

Title: Cheap🐤
Review: These earrings are for play!!  There okay cheaply maade

Title: FAIR QUALITY
Review: TOO SMALL TO WEAR - RETURNED IT

Title: Super bad
Review: I’ve been using this for only a few days and it already stopped working. It’s so cheaply made and the sound quality is terrible

Title: Workable blow dryer brush for medium to long hair; lightweight; long bristles can tangle in hair Review: This is a medium, lightweight blow-drying brush. The bristles are long, so it is easy to get one's hair tangled in this. Also, the handle is smooth, so the grip is not as good as other brushes I tried.

The barrel of the brush is perfect for medium-length to long hair. I have medium length in the back of my head and this works well if I am careful. My hands do not get tired working with this due to how lightweight this is.

The bristles are hard as is typical of all brushes. Although the length of the bristles is not my favorite and the handle is too smooth, this is workable. At the current price of $12.99 ($14.99 minus $2), this is competitively priced.

Title: Inexpensive
Review: Fine

Title: Great bracelet
Review: Great bracelet. I have been wearing it for more than a year and it still going strong. Definitely a good buy.

Title: Moisturizer
Review: Keep this in the living room so while I’m watching TV, I’ll grab the jar and apply to my face neck and back of my hands. It’s moisturizing, not greasy and soaks in the skin very lovely.

Title: These colorful blenders work well but there's color bleed making this not giftable Review: There are six blenders in this set; three in pink and three in green. I love the sponges as they are of medium density. Their colors are vibrant but all the green sponges had pink color bleed from the pink sponges, which is terrible if these were purchased for a gift as the sponges look used. For personal use, it does not matter much.

The green sponges have a flat / angled side which is great for smooth applications. The pink ones are the typical egg-shaped blenders that are also good for blending or any large make-up application.

All the sponges feel good in my hands, blend well, and feel soft against my skin. The sponges have a slight "paint" smell to them but it is a pleasant smell.

These are good for personal use but pass if these are intended to be a gift.

At the current price of $8.99, this comes to an expensive $1.50 per blender. Most blenders today sell for under $.90 cents each.

Title: Get a regular tablet
Review: Ads as your lock screen. Super laggy. Poorly designed navigation

Title: Jabra bluetooth headset
Review: Husband drives a lot and needed a reliable, easy to use hands free headset.  The only issue is that you MUST remember  to charge it.  But when it is fully charged, it is great.  I cannot tell he's using his hands free as opposed to holding his cell to his ear.  It's clear and quiet of background noise.  I am impressed (as far as the "receiving" end) and husband says it is very comfortable to wear and often forgets he has it on.  I never hesitate to update my review should new info seem useful.

Title: GREAT QUALITY
Review: GREAT QUALITY AND VALUE

Title: Great for body, not so much for hair.
Review: I initially bought this product because my scalp was dry and itching.  I normally  use the tip and dab it onto the scalp without rubbing it in like the direction tells me to do.  I noticed that over an hour or two of walking around, my whole head, including my hair gets extremely oily, like i havent washed it for days!  I tried putting less oil, but the same thing would happen.  Eventually, i gave up on my head and just rubbed it onto my skin.  The oil stays on well on skin.

Title: Awesome!!!
Review: Love this product and FAST shipping!

Title: Love the colors
Review: Vibrant colors, zipper closet, fits nicely on  my shoulder, 2 outside pockets. Beautiful but functional. Love these purses!

Title: Does not maintain heat well...at all!
Review: Had several from Amazon, even this brand...and this one NECER seemed to get hot like others from day one. Sure, it was hot enough to do hair...just 20 times longer due to lack of heat and constant loss of heat. Much better out there for same price!

Title: Ehhh...
Review: Not as good as I thought. It works sorta, but you can do better.

Title: VERY Bad audio quality. Review: TERRIBLE Terrible terrible sound (No matter what settings selecting)
Only for bedroom so for $157 ok. Will look at sound bars?

Title: Works okay
Review: Ok shampoo. Seemed to leave my hair a bit greasy, but maybe that’s because it’s a bit more gentle. The scent is also a bit different than I expected. It has more of a warm perfume type scent than a fresh and clean one. I prefer Pantene and dove shampoo.

Title: aromatherapy beads for step in tub
Review: After using several tubes (to be sure I didn't just have a weak tube) I can report that these have nearly NO aroma at all while using step in tub OR when you open them to put them in! Next to ZERO aroma. Period.  So, I guess I shouldn't be surprised it is NOT dissipating thru the tub air jet system.  I purchased both scents - the lavender and the eucalyptus. "Aromatherapy" and you would THINK there would be an aroma.  It is so faint that I feel like just throwing them away.  What a waste of time and money.  Just FYI - you must use the "air" on your tub to "get the benefit of the aromatherapy" - so YES I did properly use the correct setting on my tub.  Eh.  My advice - get a good quality aroma therapy candle and light it.  Don't waste your money on these in my personal opinion.  Grrrrr.

Title: Disappointed
Review: At first I was excited by how well it fit my MacBook. That was until I tried to use it. The card reader is worthless. The SD card constantly gets ejected even though the MacBook is sitting on a desk not moving.

Title: Packaging is EXTREMELY concerning & there’s no noticeable affect on aches and pains Review: I got this for my boyfriend who is almost always hurting; however, this has had no noticeable affect on his aches and pains and he has been using this over a week. If it worked, I would have rated this two stars. However, since it doesn't work and the package is super dangerous, this is a 1 star cream to me.

The packaging of the Hemp Hot Cream resembles Dijon mustard and that in and of itself is VERY dangerous. I can see someone who does not understand the language, cannot read, has dementia, or who quickly grabs what they think is mustard for their sandwich accidentally using this cream as a condiment. This is no different than the controversy with Tide Pods that look like candy to children.

If this was not packaged like specialty mustard and it worked, this would have received 5 stars from me.

Title: Wish it would have fit
Review: The materials are nice quality and the shoe is quite comfy. The only reason I gave it a low score is that the shoe is so narrow. If you have wide feet it does that unattractive "gushing" thing. Not the shoe for people with big and wide feet.

Title: Beautiful deep blue jean shirt but sizing is way too small
Review: This is an incredibly beautiful jean shirt but the sizing is 2 sizes too small. This large fits like a small. I usually take a medium in a men's shirt if I want a snug fit or a large if I want a loose fit. This shirt just stays open like a jacket on me and there is no way I could ever close it even if I were flat chested. This is not typical of other men's shirts I wear. I am so incredibly disappointed because there is no way I could close this even if I lost 70 pounds. The sizing must be "Asian inspired." Another disappointment is that the button holes are too small (or tight). It takes a tremendous amount of effort to open and close this shirt. It is best if it is pulled over one's head, providing the sizing were appropriate.

Title: Nice cable but...
Review: Works for charging. However, does not work with CarPlay applications. This cable fails on CarPlay where other cables have no problems.

Title: Refurb didn’t workout this time
Review: Returned. Pretty sure I found out why it was refurbished. Did not hold the signal nor auto connect when it was lost. Had high hopes, but it didn’t work

Title: You get what you pay for
Review: Smells and lasts like a cheap imitation. However, to be fair, the description does indicate this an interpretation of a high quality and far more expensive product.

Title: Too wide for boots
Review: Unfortunately this bootjack didn't work as the antenna on the bug were set too wide apart so didn't hold my boot. Purchased another brand which was so much better. Would work for someone with wide shoes.

Title: CHEAP PLASTIC PRODUCT!
Review: CHEAP PLASTIC CASE; NO CORD TO ATTACH TO MY TABLET....WON'T LAST LONG.

Title: Not bad as a replacement kit lens, but don't expect too much
Review: After reading some of the other reviews, I've concluded that I got one of the 'soft' lenses...meaning that the majority of the time, images don't turn out as clear as they do/did with the Canon kit lens.  But, honestly, what do you expect for $200 glass?  I'd say it's worth it for the price if that's your budget and you need a kit lens replacement. I've heard great stuff about Sigma and wanted to give them a shot with something small before getting their 10-22mm or other more expensive lenses...this, however, didn't fully convince me that they're on par with Canon, but I appreciate the potential they provide for competitive pricing.

Title: TERRIBLE PACKAGING!!
Review: URGENT!!  I purchased this for my sister's 75th birthday.  The outer box was TAPED AND WIRED TIED!!  I had to cut it off and it CANNOT BE USED TO Present her gift.  I am so disappointed.  PLEASE CONSIDER SENDING ME A NEW, CLEAN WHITE BOX TO present her earrings.  This was a great deal of money for terrible packaging and presentation.

Title: Disappointed. Back they go.
Review: I was looking for quality to wear with winter coat. These weren’t it. They weren’t fluffy like the pics. They’re not soft, but actually a very itchy synthetic feeling. I’m surprised that they are so big when most reviews claimed they ran small. I have a 7 inch wrist and these wouldn’t work even if all the other things were fine. Returning them.

Title: Bad seams
Review: The seam that wraps around the legs is extremely uncomfortable, thick and digs right into you. Only one pocket as well not two like normal pants have and super thin and see through.

Title: One Star
Review: it would not pair with my airpod...

Title: Super comfortable and well made!
Review: So comfy! I made the mistake of trying these on before trying the Lindsey style on - which ruined it for me because the waistband makes these SO Comfortable! Especially since I'm a curvy girl. I bought both styles and while I do love the extra style, details and pockets on the Lindsey I'm returning those and buying another of these Morgan because for me comfort rules the world. That said these are also very flattering! Well made as well. I'd recommend especially if you have a curvy figure!

Title: Totally Worth It.
Review: I bought these because I was tired of buying the ten dollar water shoes that you can find at a pharmacy and having them last one or two wears.  These are fantastic!  Used them to go kayaking and then explore a beach.  The sand stayed out for a while but its inevitable that sand will enter your shoes.  I thought they were a little small at first, but I wore them with thin athletic socks and they were great in and out of the water.  As far as fit goes, I normally wear a 6-1/2 shoe and I bought a 7.  The 7 was a perfect fit.  If you normally like a little more room in your sneakers, then I'd recommend getting a whole size larger.

Title: Best facial serum I have used in years!
Review: This is a wonderful daily facial serum. I have been using this exclusively for almost a month now. I love the way it makes my skin feel and look (younger, healthier and brighter). Very watery when it comes out (a little goes a long way), it is almost instantly absorbed into my skin. I use this as a base for all my regular daily moisturizes and my fine lines (especially the crows feet) are practically diminished. I am not sure, when I am done with this, whether I will reorder with this $200 price point. But this is a nice size bottle and should last another month or two so I have time to save up some money. Definitely highly recommend.

Title: Ok Slide Sandals
Review: The slide sandals were too narrow for me and didn't fit properly.  I could wear them but the arch wasn't in the right place.  I was disappointed in them.  Others with more narrow feet might not have the same problem.

Title: Pictures not good enough to frame! Review: I was very excited about this being a photo printer but it seems anything printed out is to faded.
My grandson came over and did some 'test' prints to see if he wanted this type of printer but after making multiple copies with a lot of noticeable changes on the computer, the printed copies all had the same faded look to them. I do not think we are being too picky!!
Maybe this is because its the first images printed. They pass for tossing some pictures on a refrigerator but not to frame them.

To connect the printer to the wireless network I had to create an HP account, setup the subscription for the automated ink and have the printer connect to HP servers before being able to use the printer. For their new ink system we will see how it goes with printing pictures. The prices appear reasonable especially for the amount of ink used for printing photos.

Does not fax .
It is quite to use.
Comes with a few 4 x 6 papers to print out pictures.
17 1/2 inch Wide, 15 1/2 inch deep, Tray in front 5 1/2 deep

Title: Great devise!
Review: Very easy to set up and easy for all devises to connect to it.  This device, while expensive, really worked as advertised.

Title: solar hand crank radio
Review: I actually purchased this for our emergency kit.  We live in a tsunami path.  I haven't actually used it yet - hoping I never have to, but I thought it was a good fit for the emergency kit - especially since it includes a usb port for charging a cell phone.  As I said, I am hopeful it will never be used, but is an essential part of any emergency kit I believe.

Title: Good product
Review: Good product

Title: Strange Fit
Review: These shoes are much darker looking in person. The photos in the description look almost purple with pink, especially the picture showing the bottom of the shoes. In person they are more of a dark blue with orangish red. The fit was a bit strange, too. They did fit me, but the shoe has a lot of stretch to it and it's almost like putting socks on your feet. The sole doesn't extend as far as my heel goes. Though it felt like my foot was on the shoe bed. It's really hard to explain. I did order my usual size, so perhaps going up a size would have been better. There is adequate cushion and support. It was a little tight in the toes, but not painful or irritating.

Title: Nothing like the color in the picture
Review: The color was way too light and chalky. Nothing like the color in the picture. Made my lips look like I was kissing a chalk board. Not a good look.

Title: For the money you can't go wrong!
Review: For the money (at the time of this review this palette is around $6) this is a great eye shadow palette. Loads of colors which blend easily and last for several hours. Of course, I have had much better, but most times the Sephora brand has cost me over $50. I think this would make a great gift for a young girl, but reality is it can work for anyone. Highly recommend for the price.

Title: nice size for kids play
Review: good overall - difficult to navigate to correct screens at times.

Title: Nice & soft. Runs Big till washed , and put in the dryer. Shrunk fit better. Review: NIce soft material, although they do not feel like linen that is usually stiff, and has a larger weave then these do.
Has a draw strings, and elastic inside waist band.
The button On the waist band was hanging off. I had to sew it back on!

My husband has worn a 32 inch waist forever. These pants run Big in the waist, legs, and length.
Our son wears a 34, is taller, these pants fit him. But I don't think these pants are what a teenager wears!
That said after washing, and putting them in the dryer, the pants have shrunk, and now fit my husband..although the pants need to be ironed!

Title: Size was off
Review: So hard to shop for these items on amazon - size was off but easy return policy.

Title: Didn’t work
Review: This didn’t work for us. We tried wetting hair and it still didn’t work. Lots of other products out there that work.

Title: Disappointed in this Croc Flip Flop
Review: My old Croc finally gave out. When I went to reorder they no longer make the style. This was as close as they came. Cute black with leopard insole. Fit well but the insole is made of a slippery material . Unlike my old ones, the insole was very slippery. I can were them around the house but can not wear them out as my foot slides. I do not recommend them.

Title: Great jeans
Review: Love the fit.

Title: Love this coconut butter body scrub!
Review: Absolutely love this body scrub. I keep a container in the shower and have been using this several times a week for the past three weeks now. I love the way my skin feels and looks. Super smooth and soft and my dry crepey skin looks noticeably better. I also love the fragrance, makes me feel like I am in the islands on vacation with the coconut butter. Highly recommend this Dove scrub for anyone (man/woman) who wants their skin to look and feel amazing.

Title: great new futures
Review: I purchased my first watch 2years ago and wanted a second one because of the battery life, I live in a senior gated community and tell all seniors to buy one because this watch will sense if you are in trouble and you can hit the button for help.My neighbor came over and thanked me for recommending this watch to her it saved her live because it will monitor you heart,, she told me the watch send her a SOS about her heart being in trouble, she went to the hopsital and it saved her from a heart attack, because of the early warning with this watch. Now I own two when one charges  I have a spare one. Thank you to the inventor from Apple.

Title: Love this!
Review: As soon as I got this, I ran to my car to test it out. I was so worried it wasn’t going to work. Not the case! I’m so excited and happy with this product! It took 2 minutes to set up, and now, I can listen to my playlists from my phone through my car speakers, talk hands free, and it’s just so cool! Very happy with my purchase. You can’t go wrong , especially with the price!

Title: Shes always listening
Review: Works great

Title: This was not what I was looking for.
Review: I ordered this device by mistake. That is on me. Mea Culpa.

Title: Noisy
Review: I will have to give this only three stars. I have tried it on two different computers, one a notebook and the other a desktop, both running Windows, and in both cases it puts out a very noticeable hissing sound. It is extremely irritating when playing quiet classical music pieces. I don't get that hissing sound with the built in sound cards on both of my computers. But otherwise it works OK and it installed easily but I cannot recommend it because of the hiss.

Title: Different than expected
Review: This tee looks different in person. The colors are bright neon and the material is thin and athletic like material. It is comfortable and fits well.

Title: The sleeve actually reach my wrists!
Review: It's a good undershirt for scrubs. It softens with wear but maintains color.  Down side, it's not nearly as fitted as the pics indicate.

Title: Needed more length
Review: The 6 foot just wasn’t enough.

Title: Nothing special
Review: Soft but not very warm. And the "glitter" is nothing more than an occasional thread woven throughout.

Title: Great Summer shorts
Review: Fantastic summer shorts that come with a decent enough belt. I wear a 38 waist and ordered a 38. These are slightly larger than I like. Not quite like a 40 but maybe a 39.

Title: Excellent
Review: He loves them! Thank you!

Title: Do not purchase!!!!!
Review: Listen please- these are not Logitech - poor version of it. Don’t buy. Run to Staples and buy the real deal.

Title: Nice Color!
Review: I really liked the color of this plumping lip gloss. It's a pretty peach color with lots of sparkle. It's a little too sparkly for me, but I can't fault the product for that. It is a very sticky gloss. It started out with a mild tingling, but after a short while, it was more of a burning sensation. I assume it was the plumping action, but I didn't notice any plumping. It was a little bit difficult to remove, too. Wiping it off with a tissue didn't work. I ended up using a lip scrub to help take it off.

Title: Didn't work for me.
Review: My remote was destroyed by my dog, and I ordered this as a replacement.  I would not bond with the TV.  No instructions.  The packaging looked used, so I suspect this one has been purchased and returned many times.

Title: Weird Body-Measurements were used for these shirts ! Review: Neck - can't breathe it's so tight! Sleeves waay too long for men's size M. while the cuffs are super-loose! I've several older US-made shirts in men's M. I know how an M is supposed to fit. What were the manufacturers thinking?
Last time I buy clothing on-line. These will go to the Goodwill store. Nice try though...

Title: Wanna buy mine cheap??
Review: Used as range extender and sure showed better wifi signal strength but the actual improvement in wifi was negative.....i unplugged it

Title: I can use everything but the glue cup rings to test make-up Review: I do a lot of product testing and this set is perfect for testing make-up without contaminating it so that it can be passed on.

I did not count what I received, but supposedly there are 50 each of eyeshadow, lipstick, eyeliner and mascara applicators. However, also included are 100 glue cup rings  which I assume are for affixing false eyelashes or nail decorations. Since this comprises one third of the set, that is a big negative for me. For someone else who uses glue cup rings this is perfect. However, I would have preferred more of the disposable applicators than the disposable rings.

The applicators are of good quality for being disposable and if it were not for the fact that 33% of this set is made up of the rings, this would have gotten five stars.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Print is TINY, but informative.

Title: FAKE PRODUCT DO NOT BUY
Review: Fake product.

Title: Nice watch
Review: But not fantastic!

Title: Too tacky on the skin even after several minutes Review: I never used a primer before. This looks like a circular tube of pink underarm deodorant for easy application on the face. It is colorless and glides on clear. I waited several minutes before applying make-up but it has a tacky feeling to it that I do not like.

I applied my make-up and it stayed on all day but I did not find this hydrating or brightening in any way. My make-up also wore off like it normally does. Personally, this is not for me. I do not see the purpose of this stick given my results and do not care for its tacky and sticky feel.

Title: gift she loved it
Review: gift for my sister she loved it!!

Title: Carxtc Double Din Install Car Stereo Dash Kit for a Aftermarket Radio Review: says "it fits Aftermarket Radio Fits 2009-2013 Toyota Corolla": my car is a 2013 Toyota Corolla, but it didn't work for me: side pieces did not bolt to my radio: I think it is because my radio mounting holes are not the same as the kit: my radio is one that the kit does not work with. . .
nice kit tho. . .

Title: Waste of time!
Review: Don't bother ordering this item!.....It does not work as described!

Title: Great Printer for the Technically Challenged
Review: I wanted a new printer to use for a multitude of tasks.. the primary of which was to go with the new camera I purchased to print pictures. I found it easy to use and the quality of prints is wonderful. Only thing I can 'complain' about is the ink cartridges. Seems expensive to replace and not the easiest ones to find (I can't find the info on the box or in the instructions, I am going to have to open the printer and look at the ink cartridges to know which ones I need when they get low). Other than that, I highly recommend.

Title: Good Product
Review: I use these to practice dance routines at home which have carpet floors.  They help significantly to turn and eliminate friction, but it's obviously not going to be as good as socks on a tile floor.  I'd still recommend it because it works and stays on your shoe.

Title: Isn't ideal
Review: I appreciate the seller's desire to sell a cheaper alternative to the GoPro-branded suction cup. However, there's a reason it's cheaper. The suction cup on this product seems to be too small to support the weight of the GoPro. The first time I tried testing it on my mirror, it fell after about 5-10 seconds. Also, the long arm separating the GoPro from the actual suction cup part is so long that the GoPro is susceptible to shaking when in a bumpy situation. Spend the extra money and get the GoPro-branded one

Title: Low-budget, cheap brushes – one brush fell apart during first use Review: The picture on Amazon looks better than in person. The green is not as vibrant. I also feel the current price of $9.99 is outrageous for this set. 

There are 11 brushes in this set. The brush heads are very soft against my skin and they work like ordinary make-up brushes. I ordered this set because I wanted some very thin bristle brushes and this set has seven of those which is perfect for eyeshadow and the lips. The bristles also stay in the brush, at least so far, which is good.

However, the brushes feel very cheap and the handles are in two pieces. This means they will have a tendency to come unglued and fall apart. The first brush I was going to use fell apart in two pieces (see photo); I had to glue it back together.

In summary, I am not impressed with this set. I do not like how the color is not as vibrant on the Amazon site. The bristles are okay but the handles are not great and can fall apart.

Title: Not easy to wash Review: I bought these because I was coming up on a surgery and needed headphones that would help me sleep since hospitals are so noisy overnight. These are perfect, especially for the price!
My boyfriend tried them and asked me to buy him a pair immediately!!!!

UPDATE: Needed to wash the band and it was very difficult to take apart. The earbuds don’t just slide out. And it was impossible to put them back together :(
Had to toss them. Otherwise I would give it 5 stars

Title: Good product, poor packing/shipping
Review: Wrinkled upon arrival, and impossible to "iron" smooth. Very disappointing.

Title: surge protector with usb ports
Review: Usually surge protectors have 6 plugins... this one has five... I missed the extra space was taken with usb charger ports.  It is bright white.  The dimensions and cord length were accurate.  I would personally would have preferred the six regular plugs... but I can't knock stars for me missing the details.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful, nor do I shy away from answering comments/questions.  I do NOT receive compensation of ANY kind for my reviews.  My purchases are VERIFIED, FULL price and 100% independent.  As are my reviews!  They are fully my opinion, which could differ from yours - and that's ok.  Happy shopping!

Title: UA shorts
Review: Ordered a large was more like a medium , very thin material.

Title: Great for organizing
Review: Very good quality and kept everything organized in my backpack.

Title: The first pair has some stretch to them and I love them. I loved them so much
Review: These are well made jeans but they are different than the first pair I ordered.  The first pair has some stretch to them and I love them.  I loved them so much, I ordered two more!  Now, I'm disappointed.  These have 0 stretch and they are too small.

Title: Size chart does not depict accuracy
Review: Crotch seam was short therefore making the waistband sit too low and tight

Title: So So comfy can't take them off !!
Review: I have always loved the rainbow brand sandals. My husband has never owned a pair and I can not get him to take them off. I mean he loves them and says they are so comfortable and soft and mold right to your feet . Great job on the cloud sandals and rainbows period last FOREVER

Title: No good
Review: Too tight.  Circulation is cut off and my feet then hurt.

Title: Grerat all natural product that really works!
Review: This is a great, non-greasy treatment for hair. I live in an area where I tend to get a lot of static electricity in my hair, particularly during the winter months (while walking on carpeting).I also tend to have wavy hair that can easily get out of control unless I use strong conditioners. I use this Argon Oil for everyday use and I couldn't be happier. Basically fragrance free, I find my hair does not go limp but instead looks great and healthy. Highly recommend this treatment for anyone who has frizzy hair needing control or who lives in an area prone to static electricity.

Title: rubber viking mask
Review: Purchased for husband... it was cool "looking"... but was sweaty and uncomfortable to wear... plus it had a rather strong odor... Meh.  Wish the horns pointed up and not down.  It is soft, silicon like or rubber like material.

Title: Terrible
Review: You definitely get what you pay for with these. Blew out after the first wash

Title: Runs, big, is cheaply made, sleeves are Not good looking, no shape, Review: Looking at the dress on the internet it look pretty good!
But not in person I think
It does run a bit big, but its just Not a good looking dress at all.
There is No shape, and the sleeves are from the 60’s..Some type of double big, double ugly big sleeves, that are not good looking.
Although with a belt this might look better!

What the other reviewer said about a halloween costume is a good idea.
This dress is also a very cheaply made dress..

Title: Four Stars
Review: Works well, but I was not aware that it wasn't a magnifying mirror.

Title: nightgown with pockets
Review: I wanted to use this gown when my grandsons visit, however, while it rather heavy, it is see through... the pockets kind of fall forward... not quite as nice as I was hoping... I am 5'7"... 38DDD and usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x.  It washed and dried ok.  I am just disappointed at it being see through.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should info seem useful. And I hope this info was helpful to you.

Title: Buyer Beware!!!!!
Review: It appears that when the 30 DAYS FREE trial is up this is nothing more than a VERY EXPENSIVE doorbell!...

Title: Not true black. Look worn! Review: I wanted to love these shorts as they fit well and were a great length but the material is horrible. If they hadn’t have been in sealed packaging I’d have thought they’d been previously worn and washed numerous times prior to arriving at my door. I ordered the black and it had that pre washed faded colour to it so nothing like in the photos on the site. Also the material and stitching very poor quality. Not what I had hoped for from Haynes who in the past have been my go to.

Very flattering fit though and true to size so if colour and material doesn’t bother you that much then these are perfect for working out, dog walks, casual wear etc.

Title: Cheap quality
Review: Hardly a Polo robe. Thin cotton and made in China. What a mistake

Title: Unbelieva-Brow, Longwear, Waterproof Gel, Blonde, 0.15 fl. oz.by L'Oreal Paris
Review: Sorry, but No. "Unbelieva" is right. I think this would be ideal stage makeup, there is nothing subtle about it. FYI it WILL stay on for DAYS as advertised. Also the shade is darker than the other 'blonde' shades I use.

Title: OPI red nail lacquer
Review: As you would expect OPI polish is really the top of the line.  In this time of no mani/pedis... sometimes you just need to do this yourself.  Red is tough and a real skill.  But it you don't look too close, it works!  I will be really glad when I can get a professional mani/pedi again!

Title: worked well
Review: My husband tried these for work.  He says that they worked well and were sturdy.

Title: Smells like an old lady perfume from the 1960’s; I don’t like this Review: I never heard of this perfume but I always like to try new scents. This smells like an old lady perfume from the 1960’s. It also is long lasting in the sense that it lasts a few hours. I don’t like this at all.

The current price of $29.99 would be typical if I liked it. It says it is a blend of wood, spicy, and leather and I smell none of that.

Title: Thin. treble.  Very little bass
Review: Thin. treble.  Very little bass

Title: Runs very small
Review: Looks like kids clothing size. Color is pretty. Material is soft thin and stretchy. But it was still too small.

Title: Large bright numbers, dimmer, feels & looks cheap, alarm softer than expected but at least it works
Review: Difficult to set at first at least for me, I hate dual purpose buttons, regardless the numbers are large even for someone wearing glasses daily , dim feature is good, HOWEVER...  the alarm isn't loud enough for deep sleeping and didn't appear to have a volume option unless it gets louder as it beeps. I got only as a back up to Alexa and my phone in case there is ever an issue with how early I must wake up. This clock looks and feels very plastic & cheap because it is, I prefer the sleek wooden one over this but that stopped working in 2 weeks, thx Amazon Quality Control, sigh.

Title: Not really useful as tennis socks but okay to wear around the house
Review: Too hot for summer but they do protect my feet so I wear them like slippers
