Review: why make a product that doesn't even fit?! It's about a cm from actually fitting my MacBook 15".. waste of time.

Title: Did not work
Review: Did not work

Title: I gave this to my sister and she likes it.?
Review: I don’t know the answers to these questions because I gave the robe as a gift..but I also ought one for myself and it’s perfect..

Title: Hanes makes well made clothing you can depend on!
Review: The color was nice and bright and the top was really cozy.  Pleasantly surprised!  Will order in more colors.  It’s a must have...

Title: Great workout and every day pants!
Review: This are great pants. I wear them all day (not just for working out). Comfortable, high waisted, perfect length for my 5'7" frame. I love the little zippered side pocket which is perfect for holding my cell phone. These have a nice stretch to them and give when I move. I love the slight sheen, too. No complaints, I will be ordering a pair in black as well.

Title: Lorex customer service - security cameras
Review: Lorex LW2702 7-Inch LCD Quad Digital Wireless Surveillance System.  Bought this surveillance system a week ago for $299.99. Installed it and it wasn't recording or picking up movement all the time, and it is not in color, more like black and white, the screensaver is in color. A couple of days later it rained (installed it on our garage) and both cameras quick working right, one filled up with water and the other the alarm kept going off with nothing in sight. called Lorex and all they said was, we should have had it under cover, which is not mentioned in instructions. These are the rudest customer service people ever, don't expect help from them. We were told to pay to ship it back and if they didn't think it was our fault. they would then decide to replace it. Lorex needs to get their customer service back in the US. If anyone asks I would NOT recommend buying anything from this company.

Title: Windows 10 is not my favorite, now after 4
Review: For the most part, a decent tablet... except for a few irritating shortcomings. Windows 10 is not my favorite, now after 4.5 months of use, I've learned to accept its faults.  Now, however, I'm having a terrible time getting the stupid thing to start up - the power button only works 5% of the time (I'm not kidding!). The keyboard is cute, but I've only used it a couple of times, and two keys have already broken off and will not snap back on. The usb port is nice to be able to use a mouse or thumb drive... like that, and the price is nice on the pocketbook. Despite the good, I won't be buying this model again. It's a poor piece of 'made in China' junk. I'm probably being generous giving it three stars.

Title: Calm to the crazy
Review: This is the most practice and efficient wallet I have. It is easy to find credit cards and I can attach my keys to it for a quick grab and go. I would highly recommend this for people trying to organize some of their chaos.

Title: Not Sure About This
Review: I'm not sure about this tight peeling mousse by Dermalogy. I follow the directions. The foam dissipates very quickly and absorbs into the skin. It makes my skin feel dry, which I suppose could be tightness instead. I can't say that I am noticing any improvement with my skin. I do have sensitive skin and have not had any problems using it.There's a very light scent that's barely noticeable. I've used it a few times over the course of a week. I will continue a few more times, but I'm not inclined to add something to my regular skincare routine if I'm not seeing or feeling any benefits.

Title: photo project
Review: I have/had 3 giant tubs of loose photos, film, negatives, etc as many of us do, from days past when people actually took pictures with cameras and film.  I used these and some 3 ring binders to try and preserve and protect the negatives.  I am sure they will be fine for years to come and I feel like I've done my part to protect them in case they become artifacts like fossils...  :)

Title: Hard to get unwound, but works good
Review: Nice thin flat cable; works well.  Includes mounting clips for attaching to a wall, which is a nice bonus.  The cable comes nicely coiled, but be careful uncoiling it.  When I uncoiled it, I got a twisted up mess and it took me 15 minutes to get it straightened out.  I used it to hook my wife's computer directly to the router instead of going through wi-fi, which is slower.  Router is several rooms away, so this worked great to hook up in another room and not have to deal with the slower wi-fi connection.

Title: Dope but like wtf why do new phones not have jacks?
Review: Man, I got a new phone(galaxy s20) and they salesman hyped it up and it is dope but how is this the future with headphone jack?? I didn't notice till I got home and was like. What?!? But this thing is dope you can charge and listen at the same time(like why is that so amazing we've been able to do this like wtf) but needless to say, the future is here. Charges fast and audio great. I have it plugged in my car aux at all times(car doesn't have Bluetooth) and have no issues. I read some ppl said you have to plug it in the aux first before the phone. So idk ihave it plugged in at all times so idk. But yea, does what it's supposed to with no problem. The little box does get hot so keep that in mind, but doesn't seem to affect the product tho.

Title: Make sure to leave room for sag.... Review: I installed this in the back of a built in. Had 24" to clear and it did fine, but it sages down about 1.5 inches and I wasnt expecting that much. I left that much clearance luckily, so it barely rubs, but it can block the IR since I have a sound bar wall mounted also.
TV only weighs about 25 lbs so I have no idea how bad it would be if you used the max capacity of 60lb.
If it didn't sag so bad it would be 5 stars though. Easy install and works well, feels solid.

Title: Great
Review: I’m a size 18 normally. I’m 5’4, 245 lbs. I got size XXXL. The fit was Great! Would highly recommend! Will get other colors!

Title: Very Different From Other Primers I Have Used
Review: This primer wasn't at all what I was expecting. I've tried several different high end primers before and they all have a similar texture and consistency. This one is very different. It comes out white instead of translucent. The color rubs into your skin clearly, so there's not whiteness once it's absorbed. It does leave a sheen behind. It feels like a thin lotion or moisturizer. Other primers that I have used have a silky, thicker feel to them. I don't notice much difference in my pores. It does give you a smooth surface before applying your foundation which is the purpose of primer. I haven't had any issues with sensitivity. It is definitely cheaper than the other primers that I have used. Overall, it's okay. I will continue using it, but I'm not sure it's something I will order again.

Title: Love the cord length
Review: Love these chargers

Title: Stay Away from These Boots!!!
Review: I bought a size 7 and I normally wear a 6. I buy a size larger in boots so that I can wear thick socks to keep warm. I just fit into these but without socks. They are cute for the price, BUT, the odor of those shoes is disgusting! They are made from a synthetic product that has the strongest petroleum smell imaginable! To add insult to injury, the box comes with a sticker that says the shoes are made with a carcinogenic product and it must be labeled as such in the state of California! You are warned that they should not be eaten or chewed! The shoes have been sitting, outside, on my deck, for 3 days in the hope of diffusing the smell of the product. It really is unbelievable. I truly pity the people who have to produce these shoes. What a dangerous work environment they must have to endure. Amazon should not be selling this kind of product, in my opinion.

Title: foil entrance fringe
Review: I purchased these to discourage the swallows from nesting in my carport.... so not the proper use.  It didn't work.  But it was a try.  Now, having said that, they are exactly as advertised.

Title: Perfect
Review: Works just fine.

Title: Not really workable in a bedroom scenario. Review: It's a mediocre product. Technically does what it claims but the controls are not great. I would like to see it be controlled from an application that you can download on your phone or a tablet.

I'm sure they will get there eventually but this ain't it.

Title: Great, but not my fit
Review: The function seems good, lightweight, and easily packable. Color is not quite as depicted in the picture online and the fit was a little tight for my shape and comfort. However, I wish that it were slightly larger because I do want a silver one. And, the Prime day price made it easily affordable. Too bad it was too small for me.

Title: Unflattering
Review: My daughter graduates this spring. Her cap and gown will be white and she has to wear a white dress underneath it. She is 5'7" and weighs about 150 pounds right now. She wears a size medium/8 in most clothes. I ordered a medium for her in this dress. It was way too large on her. I was had to grab several inches in back to bring it to where it looked good. The dress is pretty shapeless, unless you pull it even tighter. Even if the size had fit, I think it would still be very unflattering. It's boxy looking. The material is linen and it is lined nicely. It does wrinkle easily and would require ironing. The construction seems good.

Title: Love this!
Review: With my laptop that has a touch screen, I gave up my monitor at my docking station and use this stand to allow me to easily see the screen and touch it while using a full-sized keyboard.  It's perfect for my needs and has held up well over the last 5 or so months.  HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

Title: Five Stars
Review: My son loves this.

Title: Tiny hair ties with a bit of stretch; can’t see writing or design once in use
Review: These are nice looking hair ties when they are not fastened in the hair. They are just small pieces of tied ribbon with writing or a design on them. Once they are in the hair, it is hard to see either the writing or the design. They do have a little bit of stretch to them so that it makes it easier to fasten. Personally, I think these would be best used if someone else is fastening to the bridal team to ensure there is at least some visibility of the design or "team bride" wording.

Title: Cute but tarnished with in days
Review: I liked the look of them but they tarnished within days. If you purchase them be aware of that fact. Take them off to wash hands or lotion.

Title: Wonderful product!
Review: A year later and still works wonderful

Title: Did not fit my Kindle 7.
Review: Perhaps I have the wrong version, but this cover didn't fit my Kindle 7 at all.  With UPS drop-off being so far away from where I live, it's too expensive fuel-wise to mail back.

Title: Material is stretchy , clingy. Runs small, I look pregnant. If your preg its ok. Review: The dress is a good length for me cause it is not so short that when you bend over your underwear and butt does not show.
The fabric is stretchy cheesy , that runs small.
I'm 5'2 about 135 lbs. got the medium that is clingy, shows underwear line, and my tummy looks like I'm pregnant !!! Which is not
A good look.
The color I got was a pinkish , not bad, but not great either.
Retuned this.

Title: Perfect for my 8 year old
Review: This was a hit for my picky 8 year old. The variety between long and short socks was great. No fights over socks not fitting or being itchy in the mornings. Perfect!

Title: More barrettes than I thought
Review: I had enough to share.

Title: Fits okay but sometimes rides down a bit on fast walk; also had stitching pulls after one wear Review: I wanted to really like these but they get 2.5 stars from me. First of all, they fit well and feel comfortable. They also have one pocket on the other side of each leg for cell phone, cash, etc.

What I do not like is that they periodically ride down when I am doing my fast walking. Also, I rubbed into several things the first time I wore them and I developed two pulls in the stitching on either side of the legs.

They wash well in a lingerie bag and I hang dry them. If they did not have that creep in them and I did not develop the pulls, I would have rated these 4 stars instead of 2.5 stars.

Title: Return
Review: Didn’t use them sent back

Title: Quality pedicure set at a very reasonable price!
Review: This is a fantastic pedicure tool set for the money. Contains everything you need to give yourself, or someone else, a professional pedicure. It also comes in a black leather case which makes a terrific presentation especially for gift giving purposes. I have purchased another set as a Christmas gift for my brother because I was so impressed with the contents and the quality. Highly recommend this as either a gift for someone or just for yourself.

Title: Great shorts
Review: These are the only brand of shorts my high school runner will wear. He has in every color (and the flag print) and runs in them daily. I appreciate that they are affordable and I can usually get for about $11.

Title: Very strong mint flavor
Review: I purchased this packet of lip balm thinking it was something it was not.  I had purchased the Burt's Bees Ultra Conditioning Lip Balm with Kokum Butter, and I loved it.  It was the best lip balm I had ever used.  But this lip balm has a very strong peppermint flavor, so strong that it actually was painful the first time I used it, and continues to hurt a little, though not as much as that first time.  I will probably toss it as soon as I can get what I really want.  I think the product itself is probably fine; it's just that for me the flavor is way too strong and painful.  To the purchaser I suggest:  Be sure you like and can tolerate peppermint flavor.

Title: Nice, quality made jacket
Review: Nice warm hooded jacket/sweatshirt for your child. It is not really a soft, flexible fleece, but a little stiffer as a jacket. This did fit my 7 year old grandson well and was a welcomed addition to his wardrobe, especially when we were out in the 40 degree desert weather in California this past week. Quality make. Really no complaints except that it is not soft like a 'regular' sweatshirt and, like I said, it's more like a jacket fit.

Title: Long time to charge the batteries
Review: Long charge time

Title: Great cross body leather bag, versatile, stylish, functional!
Review: I originally thought I would use this on a cruise I was recently taking as a means to compromise space and cross body to protect my cash and wallet. Well, I find myself using this almost all the time now whether I am going to the market or going to church or just to a friends house, this leather crossbody messenger bag is great. Quality made, reasonably priced, this bag is packed with storage room and zippered compartments. On top of that, it's really attractive and I have been asked where I got it after receiving compliments. I highly recommend this and think every woman should have a bag like this in their wardrobe.

Title: Not as durable as it should be.
Review: Be very careful inserting the CF card, because the pins will push out of the connector making this useless. I won't buy another one.

Title: Great non-sticky pomade for men!
Review: This is a really nice pomade for men's hair. First, it has a gel like consistency (which in my opinion gives it a cleaner feel) and it is super easy to apply and massage into hair. Second, after application your hair is non-greasy or sticky and hair is perfectly controlled. Highly recommend this pomade for the man in your life. My son, who is 35, has been using this exclusively since I received it and his hair looks great!

Title: Lip plumper
Review: Doesn’t plump lips as much as expected, but does plump lips a bit and makes a great gloss.

Title: My daughter is happy with this drawing tablet
Review: My daughter is happy with this drawing tablet.  However the stylus only lasted 2 months and we had to purchase a new one.  But the tablet does everything she needed it to.

Title: They were OK
Review: They were OK

Title: Cute But Runs Small
Review: I ordered these for my 17 year old daughter. They're cute and perfect for summer. She wears a size 9, average width shoe. These are super narrow and definitely not a size 9. I would recommend ordering at least a size smaller.

Title: Buy it
Review: This was amazing! Loved the durability, and many pockets. I used it as a personal item on Spirit and Jet Blue and it fit securely in the bag area, with room to spare. I packed 2 dresses, high heels, a skirt, top, night clothes, 2 pairs of flip flops, and personal items with room to spare. I was a little disappointed at the charger aspect. It has 2 places-one inside the main part of the luggage, and one outside and both have a usb attached. I didn’t look at this before my trip. To charge a phone u will need a power bank and your phones charging cord. Otherwise it was lightweight and Great!

Title: Cameras are partially covered
Review: The cut-outs for the camera do not line up with either the front & back cameras. I cannot get them to line up by Wiggling the tablet within the sleeve. I had to snip the material to make those cutouts larger. This is a significant design flaw imo, so I am deducting 2 stars.

Title: Really nice sneaker/loafers! Most comfortable shoes I have worn in a long time!
Review: I have a 9.5 W foot and these shoes fit me perfectly. They are easy to put on (no ties, straps) and plenty of room in front of my toes and for the width of my foot. They are super comfortable and cushioned and, like a sneaker, they make a great walking shoe. I love the platform as it gives me a bit of a height lift as well. I really am surprised by how much I like these stylish, comfortable shoes. I have no idea why people are saying they fit small at all.  A cross between a sneaker and a loafer, these are just perfect for me!

Title: Radio stopped working
Review: Suddenly. One second the radio was playing the next nothing but static. Then no sound.

Title: All three bars are full of mold; this went right in the garbage
Review: This soap is repulsive. All three bars arrived with mode on them. I threw them out immediately.  The current price of $14.99 for 3 bars of moldy soap is a travesty.

Title: Needs some improvements
Review: For a company that can come up with Ring video doorbell and video outdoor lights I am really disappointed with the keypad and there should be a choice between motion sensors. and window locks because most of us have dogs more than 75% of American homes I ha e 3 dogs 2 over 50lbs

Title: Beautiful hair comb but difficult to affix; best for thick hair
Review: I think this is a small but beautiful hair comb and very decorative. It is also perfect for the holidays and not only a wedding or special occasion. However, I had a difficult time affixing this in my hair. I have short to medium fine curly hair and, not only was it awkward for me to put this in my hair, but it wanted to fall out. I believe this would be best for someone with thick hair so there is a better hold. Otherwise, this is very pretty and elevates one's hairstyle. The current price of $6.89 is about right for this piece.

Title: Nightmare to install Review: I spent over two hours installing this for what was suppose to be a ten minute job. It simply did not want to connect to my mesh router even though it was ten feet from it. The signal seems to go in and out. The thing is connected one time and disconnected the next. I am going to hardwire it to my wifi extender and send this back. Just so you know the wifi extender works like a charm.

Title: Too difficult to install.
Review: The problem is not so much the cushions as the design of the headphones itself do not allow easy and effective cushion replacement.

Title: There is no power light to tell when it's on ...
Review: There is no power light to tell when it's on or off.  We've only watched about 5 movies on so far but it's working.

Title: usb charging cords
Review: I purchased these to charge my grandsons' multiple devices that need charging and they work well.  I like the braided quality of the cords - they appear to be sturdy and I hope they will be long lasting.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: One Star
Review: Wayyyy too small....if you are not a tiny tiny woman(girl) do not order.

Title: micro SD chips
Review: Husband purchased a couple of these for go pro cameras he has... they work as they should.

Title: It works & Apple product to boot
Review: Bought 2 for traveling. One for wife and one for me. The ones that came with the iWatches are being used with stand setups where you need to use an Apple cord vs a knock off. We haven't had any issues so far with these chargers.

Title: wall socket extensions
Review: These are useful when you want to expand your 2 plug in wall plate... I will say that they don't really stay in the wall very well... too loose. But it works well enough.  I just check it every so often and make sure it's pushed in. They are white.  Fit into a 2 plug wall plate... makes 6 plugins.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful, nor do I shy away from answering comments/questions.  I do NOT receive compensation of ANY kind for my reviews.  My purchases are VERIFIED, FULL price and 100% independent.  As are my reviews!  They are fully my opinion, which could differ from yours - and that's ok.  Happy shopping!

Title: Not as advertised Review: Socks are light weight and inside of socks where the seam is, is very thick and in irritating after awhile.

Do not recommend. I would have returned but washed them as soon as they arrived so I could wear
them

Title: After several attempts, I was unable to download a ... Review: After several attempts, I was unable to download a single game app, nor could I create and order the case that was supposed to come with this tablet, as ordered through QVC'S deal with Amazon. I'm unsure as to why this tablet is being sold to innocent people.

Title: Great combs...one for home & one for your purse.
Review: Very durable, well made comb. Love the size of the comb & spacing between the teeth. I use them not only to detangle my hair right out of the shower, but when I finish styling to piece out my layers. I highly recommend these...especially since I can have one for home & one for my purse.

Title: Tiny
Review: I ordered as a shower gift purchasing NB size.  They are cute but tiny.  Debating on if exchange is worth the effort.

Title: Such crap
Review: This is kid make up. Dried up, looks awful. Save your money.

Title: comfort bra
Review: I purchased 3 different sets of this "type" of bra... I am a 38 DDD, wear 14/16 0x/1x.  I was looking for a comfy, weekend like bra... these are really soft... and ALL three sets were exactly the same bra - the only difference 2 or 3 dollars... so if you're going to try them definitely go for the cheapest set... they are literally exactly the same. Just make sure to get the 3 set and not the 2 to get the most bang for you buck. They do have removable pads.  I personally leave them in - wash on delicate, in a lingerie bag and the dry them flat in my dryer closet.  So I don't have an issue with the pads.  They are a pain to take out and put back - but while in they cover "nips" for modesty. There are obviously no underwires so there is little to no support... but I wear battle bras with severe underwires all week.. sometimes you just need a break.. however... I was hoping a little more.  The bottom does roll up as you're wearing them.. BUT the wide straps are super comfortable. These are are in NO WAY "sports" bra - but possibly a yoga bra -  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: No compact to carry and break Review: I bought a pack of these years ago. I used them, then put them to the back of my mind.

I don’t wear makeup to work, but have noticed some shine in my tzone. I didn’t want to carry around a compact. I can be rough with my work bag. I bought some oil blotting papers at a store near me. I tried a couple different ones, but wasn’t really happy. I then remembered these babies. I found them on Amazon and bought a 3 pack.

They are compact and easy to carry. They absorb excess oil. They have rice powder on them, so it’s like you get to powder your nose at the same time. They also work on my fair skin.

Title: Fell Apart
Review: Only wore these a few times and they came apart at the seam.  Very disappointed.

Title: Does the job
Review: It does the job it was intended for. Smaller then I thought, and make sure you screw it to the wall or else it will tip over. Don't buy if you have little ones because mine are constantly pulling all my DVD' S off of it.

Title: This is a magic bullet for my dry skin needs
Review: I love Curel products. They always perform as expected and have quality products. I have extremely dry skin. Besides having some psoriasis on my elbows, my shins and feet tend to get try and flaky all the time. I really love this Extra Dry Skin Therapy variety of Curel. I apply it every morning after I shower and then at night before I go to bed. My legs and arms have never felt so smooth and soft. It is non-greasy and absorbs quickly. I highly recommend.

Title: This thing is really great!!!
Review: Easy to use - great battery life - pretty good sound for such a small speaker!  What else could you want??  Definitely worth the money.

Title: Not 100% what I wanted them to be.
Review: They’re thin and feel like I bought these from a fast fashion brand. Was hoping for something that felt a tad more durable. But these pants are cute and I do want to style them with my crop tops. I’m not returning though mostly because I don’t have a lot of pants that fit me as well right now.

Title: Great for bring on your feet!!! ... but use caution when sitting for extended periods
Review: I bought these for nursing clinicals. I've only had them a week but they seem very comfortable and fit the bill! I will say they are more for being in your feet constantly - which is great, but the restriction at the top of the foot ( which is not there when standing) can make your feet fall asleep if sitting too long ( I found this out while sitting in a lecture) but there very roomy and comfortable. Happy with my purchase.

Title: Great, attractive and functional power strip!
Review: This was a perfect power strip for me for use in my bedroom.  My nightstand has several items on it (Alexa, phone charger, lamp, white noise machine) and I only have a two outlet wall unit. This power strip is great, it only has a 4 ft. cord which makes it perfect for my arrangement (so no lengthy bulky cord) and everything fits in well. I also love the design and color. Although you can't see it behind my nightstand, it has a great textured look to it and it is crisp and clean. If you are in the market for a shorter length power strip this unit would be great for you. Highly recommend.

Title: I wanted to love these bags...
Review: These bags look great and are well made and nice colors BUT... They are too heavy and, somehow, too shallow or something.  If you set them down, things spill out.  If you hang them over your shoulder they balance oddly and are uncomfortable.  I'm thinking about whether I'll even keep them.  They LOOK great but are very disappointing functionally.

Title: No snapchat
Review: This is a nice tablet but it only uses the amazon app store. Snapchat is my favorite app but its not on the am amazon app store. Quite a few apps that I use a lot are not on the amazon app store. Amazon please look into this.

Title: nice but too small
Review: nice but somewhat small even though waist size was ok.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great quality, fast delivery. Just what I needed.

Title: Artifacts for Archeologists to find
Review: Works with your 100 yr old Palm device

Title: Low waist, runs very large.
Review: Fabric was good, and not too thin. But I thought the cut was all wrong: legs were really loose, and waist hit a couple of inches below natural waistline.

Title: Five Stars
Review: They are great. Wish I had order them sooner

Title: Long handle for good reach; mesh puff produce slots of suds; handle will break if too rough Review: I usually buy about two plastic handled back puffs per year at Walmart because the plastic handles do not last with rough handling. These back brushes have even thinner handles. As long as I am gentle with them, I expect to get about six months of use out of the puff. The long handle provides me with a good reach. The puff itself is only on one side and not double-sided like the ones I purchase locally. However, the puff is puffy enough to provide me with great coverage and lots of suds.

Overall, I like these well enough. Just beware they will not last long. It also comes with one self-stick hook. The current price of $13.99 comes to an expensive $7 each. At my local store, I pay no more than $4 for an equivalent item.

UPDATE June 2, 2021 - I lowered my rating from 3 to 2 stars because the back brush came undone after about one month of use. I expect to get at least 4-6 months out of a back brush before I replace it and it did not last that long. See the photo.

Title: work good
Review: works the way they are supposed to.  would buy again.

Title: Five Stars
Review: My son liked the case for his I-pad and so the wallet was a present.  He was excited

Title: Disappointed
Review: These shoes look great but are huge when they arrive! They are flimsy cloth shoes

Title: Fair value
Review: Does the job!

Title: Sadly No No Buy Again
Review: Not so great. Fell apart after 1st use.

Title: FINALLY, my hat soulmate
Review: I absolutely LOVE this hat. I have had a very difficult time finding a hat to fit my small head, even resorting to purchasing kid-sized fedoras. While this isn't a "petite" sized hat, I trusted the other reviewers and ordered it anyway. So glad I did! It fits great and doesn't look too big for my head. The adjustable string inside is perfect and the fabric-lined interior is comfortable - not at all itchy. I saw some people asked if the hat could be crushed. I don't think that is the best idea. Wallaroo makes another kind of hat that is meant to be crushed, but the brim is different that this one.

Title: He's the ELMO  GURU
Review: He loves it  that why  I got to get 2 more and the hat and 3 PJs and the jackets  too

Title: Great shirt but too small
Review: I liked the look, feel and fabric.  Very nice.  However, this would not fit my stomach, it was too small.  However, if I could lose some of this belly fat it'll be waiting for me.

Title: Not cozy
Review: I expected this robe to be much warmer than it is.  It’s not soft and fluffy, and the zipper sticks.

Title: Love love love the shadows and the tin they came ...
Review: Love love  love the shadows and the tin they came in  the shadows are so beautiful I'm very glad I ordered so many.

Title: Too small for my small head; barely fits and I have short to medium hair
Review: This shower cap barely fits. I have a small head and it fits me snugly. I can get my short to medium-length fine curly hair under this cap, but there is no room left.  I also do not like the way the bow fits on the top. It is waterproof but this is not for me. I prefer a roomier shower cap that does not feel like it is kid-sized.

Title: Nice reasonably priced moisturizer with light SPF protection
Review: I love Amazon Brand and particularly Solimo products. First, they are super reasonably priced. Second, they are comparable in ingredients as more expensive name brand products. This facial moisturizer is no exception. Similar to other brands, this is a nice light moisturizer which has a pleasant fragrance. It does contain minimal sunscreen protection (SPF 15) which is good right after I come out of the shower to build a base on throughout the day. Of course, in Florida my SPF needs are far higher than 15 but this product does give you that base and the moisturizer is quality and helps keep my skin hydrated. I usually use additional products in my morning routine but this is a nice product to keep in your bathroom.

Title: Works very well, but way overpriced
Review: In regards to quality, I am quite pleased with this cooling pad. It does the job quite well, and is rather quiet too. But not for this price, they're asking too much in comparison to others on the market. There are plenty of similar cooling pads who work as nicely for much less. Drop the price by at least 25% and I'd definitely recommend it to others.

Title: Doesn't Last Long
Review: I hate the feeling of dry lips, so I am a frequent user of moisturizing lip products. I do like that this one is a fairly natural product. It has a pleasant, essential oils smell to it. You do have to use your finger to apply, which I'm not crazy about, but that's not a deal breaker. I have found that it doesn't last as long as another lip balm that I use. I have to reapply this a lot. Overall, it's okay and I would use it, but I prefer other ones over this one.

Title: Dont like it much
Review: Doesnt really taste like bacon at all in my opinion.

Title: Love!
Review: All of tammy taylor products are awesome!

Title: Beautiful work
Review: Always wanted a Tree of Life with chakra stones and got it with a  copper chain to boot. FAV!!! Love it. Didn’t expect the shorter chain accompanying it but appreciate it and kudos to you for the extra gift. The wire wrap looks great as do the stones. Very happy with my necklace!

Title: Horrible!!!!! Ugh no
Review: Streaky, sticky, gross and I’m an esthetician. Don’t buy this!

Title: Four Stars
Review: nice

Title: Phone charger
Review: [[VIDEOID:55e63d40d07e5f34fa19aaeb1b6df5cf]] I used it few times, then after that wouldn’t work at all.  Very frustrating!

Title: fun to wear and warm!
Review: love these little slippers - keep my feet nice and toasty!! fit as expected

Title: A Bit Deceiving But The Right Price Review: Why the 3 stars?
This package deal comes with items that seem to be drawn from an overstock bin of items in a similar category. So you DO get the items listed, just with different brands names.
The kit altogether is priced well and you "get what you pay for", however here you get what's given. It'd be better if they showed the varying brands given to customers.
Most of the cleaning kit was Polaroid which is great.
The lens protector kit is a brand I have not heard of but appears decent.
The bag (as others have mentioned) is not what's pictured. I need the tripod otherwise I'd return the package due to the seller knowingly sending items not accurately described.

Suggestion to the seller: Add accurate photos so people are more aware of what they may be getting versus what's expected from the provided pictures.

Title: and it's perfect for that Review: I bought this watch to wear to an interview, and it's perfect for that. Very small and dainty on my wrist, but still easy to read at a glance. I removed the removable link but it still a little big for my wrist, so I will probably eventually have more links removed. It is loose enough that it often turns upside down. I do have pretty small wrists, however.

I am sensitive to nickel but have not had a problem with this watch.

The band becomes completely separate when you open the clasp, making it a little harder to put on than some other watches.

It was packaged in a small red box, which I intend to keep. The watch is fastened around a small piece of foam. It's not as nice as the packaging for some of my other watches, but this watch was much less expensive so I guess you get what you pay for.

Title: Nice pieces.
Review: I bought these to put together with a larger "silk" square.  They made a really nice "token" gift.

Title: Horrible!
Review: This was a waste of money. You have to have the perfect eyebrow shape that matches one of the “stamp” stencils or you’ll just end up stamping your skin. This is supposed to enhance your eyebrows but If you go to stamp your eyebrow and don’t have hair exactly where the stencil is you just stamp your skin and it looks absurd. Wasn’t able to return. I think I missed the short window- check return policy if you really want to try this but I wouldn’t do it again.

Title: I was excited for these but they are terrible! Review: One the piece that goes in the phone came
Right out of the cable in my phone. One won’t charge or connect to the truck at all. One was works ok. It’s used in the house so I am unsure of it connects to the truck. None of these charge our phones now. They worked for a short time.

Title: Cute.
Review: Cute and practical.

Title: Great Product
Review: AWESOME sound!  Easy to install. The wireless subwoofer makes it easy to place any where in the room.

Title: Eh
Review: Scratchy thin material

Title: Wahl balding 6X0 blade
Review: You gotta replace blades every so often and these are no exception.  They work well and as long as is reasonable - about 1 year with medium use.

Title: Couldn't use it
Review: Blue tooth range was just too short. My button to open my garage is way inside of the garage, away from the garage door.  Disappointed.  Maybe, if the garage door button would have been closer to begin with, it might have worked out.

Title: Nice but look darker in person
Review: These are nice earrings except I found the ones I got to be not as silvery as the picture, they were more of a gray steel color. The appear well made though other than that and a nice variety of styles.

Title: Really nice facial serum!
Review: I have been using all kinds of serums and facial products for 20+ years now. I really do like this Resveratrol Concentrate by Reveel. Goes on lightly and smoothly and is absorbed quickly into the skin. My skin feels noticeably softer after using this daily for several weeks now. I deducted a star because I thought, for the money, I could do much better than this price. Other than that, it's a really nice daily facial serum.

Title: Attractive and a bit large but stays on my face and ears Review: I tried their [[ASIN:B08F7QQ11T colorful version]] of this mask and it was so large it would not stay on my face or ears. However, this one is a little snugger. It does stay on my nose and ears but I have to be careful it does not fall down during use because it is still larger than I need. It is a comfortable and attractively designed gaiter.

The current price of $12.99 is expensive but still competitive for this.

Title: Awesome Lifesaver! Review: You might be wondering why I said this item is a lifesaver. Well...since my new phone doesn't have an aux port I was worried I wouldn't be able to listen to music via wired earphones & other things.

This little splitter makes it possible & I can't thank you enough!

It's a great quality product with nice design. I highly recommend!

Title: no unfiying reciever
Review: I bought as the package was damaged but that was not the problem.  problem was NO receiver to make it work  waste of money

Title: Wish they were softer on the heels
Review: I was hoping these would be as comfortable as a similar pair I already have, but nope! These are very hard plastic that doesn't have any give when wearing. If you have bone spurs, don't buy these unless you're into pain.

Title: WASTE OF MONEY! DO NOT DO IT!
Review: I am ready to throw this thing away. In the middle of watching shows, it completely stops working. I can sometimes disconnect and reconnect to the internet, (keep in mind, I have great internet service, and everything else linked to the internet is still working fine) but most times, I have to completely unplug the device so it can reset. I would NOT recommend anyone wasting their money on this garbage. I do not know if I got a crappy stick, or if they just suck in general. I do know one thing! Money WASTED! Can someone fix this issue?!

Title: Def. worth the money
Review: It's not quite the same as the original FUJI but will do.  I did try it, so it does wqork.

Title: cables
Review: I had a lot of trouble keeping them in my phone. Half the time they would not charge.

Title: Buyer Beware
Review: Breaks for no reason in no time. Don't waste money.

Title: IT'S NOT A MOUSE IF IT DOESN'T LOOK LIKE A MOUSE
Review: Absolutely squirrely.  I am never sure if the control wheel will work and if it does, how many lines it will scroll, how many it won't scroll, whether double-tapping will work or whether double-tapping results in triple movement.  In a word, it's worthless.

Title: Disappointing
Review: My expectations were probably too high and it was my First security camera.  It was easy to set up, a nice size and I sat it on a table rather than mounting it.  I use it as a warning system of movement.  The pictures are not clear enough to even identify myself.  I can tell the difference between the cats when they are in front of it.  I will probably look for another one with a closer or zoom function and a clearer picture.

Title: Ok but not great
Review: These earrings have a weird finish that is smooth/shiny in some areas and rough/matte in others. They don't irritate my ears and are light weight but the finish seems low quality.

Title: Horrible!
Review: This top was horrible all around. The material was cheap and nasty and the fit was horrid and unflattering. Returned it straight away as for the price it is a rip off.

Title: Not worth even the cheap price
Review: These were not the best investment. I knew they were inexpensive and tried them anyway. Lesson learned: buying cheaply is not a good idea.

Title: Don’t bother buying
Review: This case does NOT fit iPad Pro 10.5” 2017. Cut outs are not accurate. Cheaply made. Returned.

Title: Scary
Review: One of the chargers gets scary hot. I can’t even use it. The chargers are inconsistent and do not always work. When they work it’s a very slow charge.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Don't bother if you use Linux.

Title: Cable is a bit short
Review: Cable is a bit short but ok

Title: meh
Review: I think this was myself that they were too small. Otherwise the bra is ok. So so. Lightweight, not great quality but ok.

Title: Wrong Size
Review: Unfortunately these were the wrong size, so I did not use them.  These are the AAA size; not double A.

Title: Not as purple as pics
Review: Definitely not as purple as the photos show. They seem to work well tho and are better than having scratched up lenses.

Title: Good for the cost.
Review: Very basic. Easy to use. Sound isn't real clear without use of thin, wire antenna. Very small. It's ok for the money.

Title: Lathers moderately; cleans well; bar is slippery & I dislike pine blend fragrance Review: The writing on the packaging is all in Korean, which is the first negative. Second, it is difficult to remove the plastic from the "sticky" bar of soap but I finally got it off after working on it for about three minutes.

The fragrance is a mix of pine and something else. I absolutely dislike the aroma. The soap does clean well and spreads well, but lathers only moderately. Also, I found the bar to be slippery when wet and was afraid I was going to have this slide out of my hands. I have no idea if it stops acne because I see no difference.

In addition to the above, the current price of $9.98 ($11.09 minus 10%) is very expensive for this soap.

UPDATE: The vendor contacted me via Twitter and said that they are working on English stickers. Also, the reason the plastic stuck to the bar was due to the humidity and heat. The plastic is on the bar to prevent the moisture from evaporating.

Title: True to size, mid weight fabric.
Review: Perfect color (dark grey is a great shade) and the fit is fantastic! Many big and tall hoodies seem to sag down and out (almost triangle shaped) but this is a great fit for an athletic big guy.

Title: Doesn't keep nails on
Review: I'm convinced this isn't nail glue 🤣

Title: Three Stars
Review: Will be good on icy driveway. True to size

Title: Best Memory Card around
Review: I love the Transcend cards, have always bought them for my cameras. I find that, dollar for dollar, they are the best value and quality than any other card on the market. I own a Canon Rebel and take a lot of pictures. To me, the optimum size is this 8GB for storage. I usually take two of these cards with me when I go on vacation and, although I take a ton of pictures, usually still come back with some room on the cards. I highly recommend this brand and size of memory card for any amateur photographer out there. You won't find a card like this, at this quality and reliability, for under $13 anywhere else.

Title: Really nice warm beanie cap!
Review: Super cute, well made and warm beanie cap. Works well for me in the fall and winter months to keep my head warm. Large enough to cover my ears and it easily covers my entire head to maintain warmth. The hat itself is super soft and plush and I love the gray color which blends with most of my jackets and wardrobe. Would make a great holiday gift for a warm winter.

Title: Another great Solimo product!
Review: First I have to state I love Amazon Brand (Solimo) products. They are true to the more expensive name brand products and this body wash is no exception.  This Deep Moisturizing Body Wash is similar to Dove body wash, but at a lesser cost. I have been using this exclusively now for the past 3 weeks and I love the way my skin feels and smells. I have very dry skin and I see a noticeable improvement in my skin already. I love how clean I feel after using it as well. I highly recommend this to anyone!

Title: One Star
Review: Did not work with my Samsung Galaxy 6. Returning shipping costs almost as much as the product.

Title: Broken when I received it.
Review: I can't use it, it's crushed.

Title: Easy to Use
Review: I've been using sheet masks for the past couple of years. They are very convenient and easy to use, plus they're not too messy. The material for the masks is different than most of the ones that I have used. It's more like a heavy paper towel and even has the texture of paper towels. That may be more eco friendly, I don't know. I didn't like or dislike it better than the others. It didn't rip easily like some do.It was a little difficult to get it to lay flat on my face and I had to keep pressing down on parts. That is also pretty common with sheet masks. These are very saturated and dripped a lot while I was wearing it. They left my hands feeling a little sticky, though I didn't feel the stickiness on my face. I didn't notice any tingling while wearing it, but it did have a nice cooling affect which was more noticeable when I removed the mask. It didn't irritate my skin or eyes. Overall, I found it to be just okay. I didn't hate it, but I'm not sure I would order these again.

Title: It did not have that new leather smell. I ...

Title: Didn't last long
Review: Although I love the performance and features of this mouse, it doesn't last very long.  The small plastic feet on the bottom gradually slip loose which causes problems with the tracking - makes the device very irritating to use.  Logitech should sell replacements, but as far as I could find, they don't.  Also, the side button (the one below the forward/back buttons) seems to wear our faster than the other buttons.  I've owned at least 5 of these over the last 10 years and on 3 of them, the side button failed.  On one of them, I actually wore a hole in the plastic.  Not sure if this says more about the quality of the device materials or the force with which I click it.

The zipper on this brand doesn't go down as far and the boot is much more narrow, which makes it too hard to get in and out of several times a day. I purchased these because they looked similar and had the color my husband likes.  However, color aside, nothing else was acceptable. *sigh* We returned them.  I never hesitate in updating my reviews or shy away from comments.  Further, I do NOT receive compensation of ANY kind for my reviews.  My purchases are VERIFIED, full price, 100% independent. Title: Quality is mediocre & sizing is one to two sizes too small; I returned this

Title: Saggy Crotch Area Review: The material is great and I love the overall look of these leggings but the crotch area has a weird amount of extra material so while your legs are tight and the waist is snug, the crotch area is saggy (in both front and back). The only way to “fix” it is to hike them up repeatedly so you kind of give yourself a wedgie…but the material just sags back down again. I don’t feel it’s a size issue. Going smaller would be too tight for me, going bigger would be even MORE loose and saggy stuff there.
I’ve ordered other items from this brand and didn’t have this issue. I just won’t get this particular style again.

Title: Comfortable colorful socks!

They fit great and the colors are a hoot for him to wear while in class (he is always looking for new and different socks and ties). Highly recommend these, they fit great, stay up (don't roll) and they are soft and comfortable. These would make a great holiday gift for the man in your life!

Title: Oh dear
Review: Ok... first, I think this seller's products run large... secondly, the color is so far removed from the photo.  It's WAY brighter... just awful really.  It looks like a sack on. Even when I pinched it in the back, it still looked like a sack.  I think this may be a dress better suited to someone very slender?  I am returning it.

Title: Cleansing w/light lather; fragrance too subtle; bar is slippery like many vegan soaps Review: The pink color of the bar is not as rich looking as it is in photos--just beware the color is more dull in person despite what my photo and the Amazon photo shows.

This bar is cleansing but the lather is very light and the fragrance is too subtle for me. Also, the soap is slippery like many vegan soaps I tried previously. It sometimes slips out of my hands. What I also do not like is the rose petals in the soap as they go down the drain. I'm not partial to soaps with particles that can actually clog one's pipes.

The current price of $9.99 is also expensive for this small bar.

Title: Not very protective - More for style

I honestly think this color (and I assume the alternate pink as well) is better suited for teenagers. The case is thin and not very protective, though, so I think the idea of giving this to a teenager there may be better (more protective) alternatives. I would say go ahead and spen another $10 and get one of the better cases and skip the style/fashion side of a case for your Kindle.

The caution message says that sensitive skin may notice some tingling. I found it to be more like a mild burning feeling. I had a small cut on my chin area and it caused some painful stinging for a moment. My sister doesn't have sensitive skin, so I will probably pass it on to her.

Great material, allows me to breathe while biking (not too hot for me here in Florida). I love the California design (where my family is from). Highly recommend this design and also this manufacturer if you are in the market for a biking shirt.

Note that the top has a protrusion to give the illusion that one is getting more cream than they actually are. There is only 1.69 ounces in this jar and it comes in an oversized box. The current price of $14.95 is certainly very reasonable for this cream.

Title: Not much a difference ! Review: I'm a older woman , although my pores are not really big. We can all use something to make our skin look smoother.

I put on face cream first. As I didn't think this pore Minimizer Was rich enough for my skin . I put Olay pore minimized on, and did not notice much difference !
Maybe I should try this for a week with out using moisturizer first !!!!

I used fair to medium.

I'm fair skin , but this is light in color, and the texture is thin. After I use it , I put over a light liquid make-up,I then could notice
A little difference in my skin looking smoother .

As I said the color is light,. The color on the the box does not look like what comes out of the tube at all.

I have use before another brand that was pricier, and I noticed a difference right away, but not with the Olay.
That said the pricier one cause my face to break out.
Olay did Not clogged My pores or cause my face to break out, as the pricier one did.

I'll continue to use this, if I start to notice a better improvement ,I'll be back with a new review.
I do not use heavy make up.

Title: Sadly, Not Nearly As Effective As Canned Air. This Has Weak Air Blowing Power In Comparison. Review: I assure you, if you do a side by side comparison between this O2 Hurricane Special Edition and a typical canned air duster you will see a huge difference, and you will be disappointed like I was.

Dusting off a TV or computer screen or eyeglasses is a good test with this and the canned air side by side, of course, but you could simply just shoot the air on your hand and feel the inferior force from the O2 Hurricane Special Edition.

I was so hoping the O2 would be better than it is because like everyone I dislike the possible frostbite situation when using the canned air. Plus, the ability to use the O2 from any angle is really nice.

One day I do expect they will be able to make a canless air system in this kind of compact cordless size that has the air blowing power we need. But until that day, unfortunately, this one just isn't it.

Title: Satisfactory Fit; Cushioning Without Thickness Review: These GALIVA WOMEN'S COTTON EXTRASOFT LOW CUT CUSHION SOCKS (3 Pairs) are comfortable to wear. They provide cushioning without thickness, so they don't take up a lot of extra space in your shoes. The women's medium size (8-10) seems a little small on my size 8 foot. The gray color is a standard sweatpants gray.

Because these low-cut socks have no cuff, they have ribbing across the arch of your foot to keep them from slipping down into your shoes. Mine slide down a little anyway, but the overall spandex-assisted, snug fit is satisfactory. The 3 pairs of socks arrive in a box with 6 single socks inside. The price (about $15 for 3 pairs on Amazon) is very attractive.

Still, I strongly prefer my more expensive Wigwam cotton tennis socks with ribbed cuffs for everyday wear. (They stay up and absorb moisture better.) I rate these Galiva Extrasoft Low Cut Cushion Socks at 3 stars ("It's okay" on the official Amazon scale).

Title: Watch the Edges Review: I ordered this USB coupler from Tiny Deal (China) through Amazon on January 20th and it arrvied February 20th. I should have paid careful attention to the edges that are clearly visible in the photo. Evidently a poor design, the edges are raised, appearing like metal burrs. In my opinion that design was unnecessary and potentially dangerous as the edges could have been rolled or not folded at all. Although the reliefs aren't razor sharp, they can still pose a hazard for young hands or for anyone who has pronounced arthritis.

When I inserted the male USB cable, it doesn't go all the way into the coupler, but it does appear to make a connection with the electrodes that are inside the unit. However, at this point, I haven't given it a trial run for continuity, since I have purchased numerous cables and connectors to keep in stock rather than for immediate use. In time, I suspect that I'll eventually find a coupler without burrs that will be less hazardous to connect and disconnect.

I really like the color of the white & pink bristles. The storage bag is very nice and sturdy. As far as performance, the brushes are decent, especially for the price. I've had better and I've had worse. My biggest issue or complaint is that some of the brushes were broken as I detailed above.
