Title: ok
Review: I have a couple of older turbins that are terry... not terribly fond of the "microfiber"... but was unable to find the terry cloth.  The microfiber washes well, but I don't think it is as absorbent.  Just a personal choice, I'm sure.

Title: Cute for a child but not very realistic
Review: I purchased these glasses for an adult Harry Potter costume.  I was looking for a pair that were relatively realistic and adult looking.  I think they would be cute for a child but not so much an adult.  As others have stated, the glass lenses are super thick- thick to the point that it's silly looking.  Also the black plastic frame is pretty thick too.  Also they run a bit small, so if you have a larger sized head, I doubt they would fit you.  Overall it looks very cartoonish. and not very realistic- I was a bit disappointed.

Title: Not Fancy.. Just Fun!
Review: its a Summer style Faux Straw Cowgirl hat! came all crumpled up in a box with just paper stuffed around hat... took some doing to hand-shape it to be “ wearable” ... it works ! nothing fancy , but fun!

Title: headphones are disappointing
Review: I need something for mixing and recording  these are just not going to do it I'll spend a lot more money to get something much better

Title: Mighty Mule rocks.
Review: We live on the Pacific Ocean front.  We have a mighty mule gate... for about 10 years.  This is the first time we've had to change out the key pads.  I consider that amazing.  Salt air is hard on everything.  Our mighty mule has been amazingly reliable.  Have had to change the battery on the main engine once.  But again, that is to be expected in normal conditions, let alone direct salt air.  The arrived quickly (we have prime) and in excellent condition.

Title: Not For Me
Review: This did not work well for me at all. It leaves a burning sensation on my skin. It made my eyes water pretty constantly, even though I didn’t put it on my eyes. The texture felt nice and it layered well under my makeup. But it made my skin so uncomfortable. It made my skin sting and feel kind of puffy. Definitely not going to continue using it. It smells like sunscreen. It has a thicker feel, like sunblock. But not very oily.

Title: works
Review: This is a basic computer bag.  It fits with my 15.6" laptop perfectly with a bit of room to spare for the cords and mouse (yes, I still use a mouse).  The side zipper bag could be used for some paper item (?) but unless you'd like a big buldge out the side, I wouldn't use... maybe for a few pens and note pad?  Possibly slip your cell phone in for safe keeping while moving about.  I buy basic black and then stencil with gold and silver sharpies to match my other pieces.  Helps them not get confused with others who have similiar basic black bags.  I will say there is a "fold" on the front side that is bright red... I didn't catch it originally... Don't really care for that, but it's not a super big deal.  The shoulder strap is included, basic and comfortable.

Title: curel extreme
Review: I purchased this to put in my cars. It's the perfect size for the boot or glove box.  But also would fit in a reasonable sized purse.  I LOVE Curel.  It IS the best.  Not greasy.  Works in nicely and keeps working all day.  Couldn't be happier.  Can't get this locally in our small town, so ordering is the best for me.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All my reviews reflect my honest, personal experience with the reviewed item - your experience may be different.  I receive/accept NO free products or discounts that are not available to all shoppers.

Title: Feels like a thin synthetic material. Review: Nice looking thin material top.
If this top was in white, you probably could see threw it.
Has a good looking scoop neck, not too low.
The sleeves are pretty long. The left sleeve under the arm is smaller then the right arm!
The top part fits good, then the bottom flares out that makes this top more flattering.
Washed, and put in the dryer with a dyer sheet, did Not shrunk.

I do not think this is a jersey material. It’s has the usual feel of a thin synthetic material.

Title: Colour is not pretty and not the same as advertised.
Review: I have bought this colour shade before and now it's a completely different colour. It does look very Matte but it's a very bright pink that doesn't even look like the one on this picture, I tried it on and it honestly makes me look like a prosti... it looks so bad I have no idea what I'm going to do with it anymore because its horrible and I don't want to wear it at all... I went looking for the colour I like on amazon and it is sold as a different colour though and also the price for that colour lipstick I like has gone up to the point it's almost 20 dlls so expensive!!! I am shocked this brand is so wrong, just for a simple gloss lipstick... I am not sure I will buy again depends if I actually get the right colour next time I buy because this one was literally a complete different colour from the one on the picture.

Title: Best bathing suit I have ever owned Review: This was the most comfortable bathing suit I have ever owned. Period.

Out of the water, these are perfect shorts with pockets to carry whatever you need, and comfortable enough to walk around all day! And in the water, the boxer liner helps keep the shorts in place.

If you are reading tjis and wondering if this bathing suit is for you... the answer is YES... this is EXACTLY what you are looking for.

Title: Goes bad after a few years of use and is inaccurate in charging
Review: Had this for over 10 years. Over the last several years (maybe 5) it seemed like a lot of batteries I would charge would drain vey quickly. Thought they were just bad batteries. Finally realized through some testing that the charger was actually the problem and it was not fully charging batteries. At times it would not even recognize a battery leading me to ditch the battery when in fact the battery was fine. I estimate this was going on for the last several years. For the price, it's probably better to just buy a cheap $18 charger and change it every couple of years to be honest.

Title: Renewed version i was sent had right earbud not working. Review: I've heard so many positive things about the galaxy buds plus. Great battery, sounds quality, etc. I wanted to save some money and I bought the renewed version.
After receiving, it connected to my s20 note ultra quickly after opening it. However the right bud showed disconnected. I tried all the trouble shooting methods from samsung, youtube, and friends.
End result was the right earbud seems to be defective.
This may not happen to you. Maybe I was unlucky .
As for the left earbud, it sounded great and fit comfortably in my ear.
This rating is more for buying renewed galaxy buds and the quality of MY product I've received.

Title: Terrible Quality Control: Bent/ Swollen Battery Review: The battery I received was BENT! I needed this for an emergency, because my laptop battery died suddenly. I played delivery tag for two days, and it comes to me, perfectly packed, in bubble wrap, in a pretty little box, and it’s BENT!!!!

I tried installing it bc I thought “oh it’s not too bad?” But it almost ruined my computer. It wouldn’t go all the way in, and made the battery eject button lock, so it was stuck. I had to pry it out. It’s a miracle it didn’t ruin the battery port.

Terrible quality control, and now I have to wait on a second replacement. Obviously this seller likes to repackage old batteries and pass them off as new, so thanks for that.

Title: OK starter make-up brush kit for a young girl Review: There are 10 very basic and small make-up brushes in this set. The bristles are relatively soft. There was no shedding. Their soft bristles feel good against my skin and work like many other brushes I tried previously. However, since the brushes are small, this is not a professional set. I personally prefer larger foundation brushes than this set supplies. The small brushes are fine as there are five of those.

The current price of $11.99 is on the high side of competitively priced for this basic set of 10  brushes as it comes to $1.20 per brush.

Title: Not securwe enough for me
Review: It said it would work for a 7 inch tablet, it just doesn't hold it securely enough for me.Keyboard functions fine. Maybe I am just picky?

Title: My Eyeshadow Stays On Longer, But Not as Long as I Would Prefer.
Review: This is a decent eyeshadow primer for the price. It's easy to apply on my eyelids. Eyeshadow stays put longer than without any primer, but I find that it still doesn't last all day. I would estimate that it lasts up to 5 or 6 hours, but by the time I get home from work, you can barely tell that I have any eyeshadow on at all. I will continue to use this, but I will also keep searching for a better primer.

Title: Failed to work Review: Installed and worked once - then my pc did not recognize it any more.
Re-installed win 10 again - same thing happened.
Trashed it.
New system Win 10 - Gigabyte carbon ac mb - Intel 8700k cpu - 16gb memory

Title: Arms too long
Review: The material appears to be good quality.  The body of the shirt fit me well.  The arms too long.  The lengths of fabric that creates the cross cross in front are too long.  The criss cross droops.  The color is actually as pictured.  I guess it would be considered a “Heather “ green.  It wouldn’t work with the bottoms that I wanted it for.  Overall, not a bad shirt.

Title: Cheap China C**P Review: I almost never return products because I usually do some research before I buy things. But unfortunately this " thing " from China was just pure junk and I did end up returning it. About the only good thing I can say about it was the company refunded my money very quickly without any hassle.

Two of the lights didn't even work right out of the box, one of the stands were broken, and the backdrops are a joke. And on top of that, the thing ended up creating even more shadows than I was getting using nothing. I thought it would be great because all I do is take a lot of really close up pictures with detail and didn't think I would need an expensive fancy rig, just a simple one. I was right on my thought about simple, but, man - was I wrong on this one !!

Do yourself a favor, don't waste your time or money on this !!

Title: Great as a travel item, not so great for regular wear
Review: Pros and cons with this one. First and foremost, this is a great jacket to pack during a spring/fall trip where rain fall and cooler temps can be unpredictable at times. I took this with me on a recent trip to Iceland for my husband and it folded small and compact and was easily stored in a backpack for our hiking adventures. The size (large) fit him well. For the cons: kind of a weird looking jacket. I certainly wouldn't see him wearing this on a daily basis as the zipper is on the side and it has a weird plastic feel to it. That said, it's ok for unpredictable weather and travel, but wouldn't wear it on a regular basis outside of that.

Title: The fragrance is offensive to me but I love the soft results of this conditioner
Review: This conditioner has a very strong and unpleasant fragrance. However, once I get past that, the thick cream conditions my hair well. My dry hair felt super soft. It does relax my curls a little bit but not too much. I certainly would have liked this more if the fragrance were not so offensive.

Title: Perfect for costume
Review: Got this for my child to be Georgie on IT. He was pleased with it. He's 51" & weighs 58 lbs. The medium fit perfectly

Title: Too tight.
Review: For the xxxl mans size, this is very tight. It doesnt stretch much either. The pant length is very long. The colors and picture print is very pretty .

Title: Nice skirt that is more casual than business like and very short on me
Review: This is a really nice high quality skirt.  I do not like wrap-around ties and the tie on this is short; more like a bow tie size which I like. However, the skirt is way too short and not something I will wear. It also is made of a stretch material that makes this look more casual than business like. Unfortunately, this is not a skirt I will wear because it comes about three inches above my knees.

Title: wifi action camera
Review: Husband reports upgraded version but not sure the "upgrades" were worth the complication of getting it work. Eh. He was also disappointed it did not come with SD chip.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: The stones are fake.
Review: Nice concept and bracelets design but these stones are fake. I’ve been around crystals/stones to spot the fakes. There’s a couple that’s plastic.  The only good this is that the black stones can be used as a diffuser but for chakra healing with the other stones won’t do much.  The bracelet looks heavy but it’s very light.  Also the lettering on the leather is not centered for the OCD.

Title: Just ok t-shirt
Review: Not overly thrilled with this t-shirt. It is a fairly nice quality, but kind of thin. Fit me well (I got a large). I washed it once and it shrunk slightly and was pretty wrinkled (despite my taking it out of the dryer on time). Don't think I will buy any more, but but nice to have around as a spare t-shirt.

Title: dermelect nail ridge filler
Review: I really like the slight iridescence of this polish... but as a ridge filler it's about a 2 out of 4.  I have included a pic.  I have several nails, including my thumbs that have serious ridges.  So if you have slight ridges, you might like this better than I with several nails with pretty big ridges.  I will also say that the polish stayed sticky for quite a long time as well.  So waiting to apply a second coat will take a while.  The best part is the slight iridescence. I purchased 4 different brands and this is the 3rd one I've tried so far.  I give each a few weeks of use before passing final judgement, I am on the fence with this one so far.  Nice slight color, not so great ridge coverage and full drying takes a bit too long.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: lip crayon Maybelline
Review: Ok.. I purchased the "talk the talk" color hoping it would be a natural color.  It sort of is.  I need a hair darker - but it's ok. I provided a picture.  I am fair skinned and 60 years old. I will never make a lip model - but I am real. It feels good going on.  It is a matte finish.  It doesn't feel dry or drying.  They say up to 8 hours.  I am going say - more like about 4 if your eating and drinking - at the most.  It is a crayon style - that twists up.  It comes with a point that you have to use at an angle to keep point.  The major disappointment to me was that it did not come in a package.  It was not sealed at all.  I carefully looked at the tip, it doesn't look used. So I wiped with an alcohol swab.  But it should have come in/with a seal.

Title: Vet small
Review: Xxl was like a large The other one in the picture was true to size.

Title: Seems to work well, booties are super slippery, though
Review: I have extremely dry feet, especially in the heel area. I was excited to see how this foot mask would work. I have used three of these already and I have seen a difference in my feet. They are softer and less dry and do appear to work. I have deducted a star simply because these are step in plastic booties with liquid inside and can be messy. I did have to massage the booties while they were on my feet to be sure they were fully covered (and not sure if I got it all). Also, while they are on, be aware you cannot stand or walk in them (unless you want to slide and potentially fall) so be sure you stay in place while wearing. I think this concept would have been better with applying the liquid to my feet first and then putting the booties on (rather than having the liquid already in them and trying to cover all the areas by massaging.

Title: Beautiful
Review: These are very nice. I was thinking they would be a tad bigger, but that's my fault for not checking dimensions. They are about 1 1/2-2 inches. Very shiny & well made

Title: Gorgeous High Quality Gemstone and Sterling Silver setting!! just amazing!!
Review: This 8 carat beautifully emerald- cut ,  brilliant yellow/gold Citrine gemstone and its substantial and elegant Sterling Silver ring setting is just AMAZING!! I  have many beautiful high quality jewelry pieces, rings , earrings, bracelets, necklaces etc . and I can tell you that this is an exceptional piece of jewelry!! at an Amazing good price’n🤩

Title: good hat!
Review: There is a draw string to adjust fit, held up fine in the washer (air dried), pretty hat with good sun protection.

Title: To big, hard to walk in ,
Review: They won’t stay on when I walk , it’s hardy to try to keep them on . Sick spent so much for nothing!!!!

Title: Great item!!!
Review: I couldnt wait to get this power strip!! I have a reading chair with a floor lamp next to it. The outlet is behind that and low to the floor. I use a kindle when Im in this chair and hate to have to reach down and behind every time I need to plug in and charge it, because I have severe arthritis and bending is very painful. I saw this power strip with the 2 usb ports and knew this is what I needed! I was right.lol I have it on the back of my table, out of the way and now I just reach next to me to plug my kindle and/or phone in. It has 12 outlets for plugging cords in as well. Such a useful power strip!

Title: Wow!!!
Review: These are soooo comfortable and adorable… thank you so much!!!

Title: Cheaply made nail clipper set; nail file plastic doesn’t come off Review: There are two nail clipper tools in this set, a nail file (see dislikes), and what looks like a cuticle pusher or toenail lifter is included. I'm not really familiar with that last tool.

LIKES
- Handle of all the toenail clipper feels great in my hands
- The cutting blade on the clippers are good
- The other implements are nice to have

DISKLIKE
- One of the spring clips on the toenail clippers is uneven and looks like it will fall off. It actually will operate fine without it.

- I cannot get the blue plastic off the nail file. I tried scraping it off with a sharp object and even soaked the file. It just won't budge. This means this tool is unusable.

- The fingernail clipper feels super cheap. It is really the casing around the clipper that is awful.

The current price of $17.98 ($19.98 minus 10%) is way too pricey for this, especially since one tool is useless and the small clipper feels cheap.

Title: Worth trying
Review: This straightening brush is a little heavy to use and i was only able to do a small area of my hair at a time.  I had to go over my hair several times. I thought it would be faster but it was not. I guess it depends on the texture of each persons hair. I had to return it. It is worth a try to see if it will work on your hair.

Title: Usable, but better for storage than real world environment
Review: I ordered two of these, a medium and small.  They're very well-made, rugged and good looking, even though they're not that different in size.  My main concern is that they don't pull/stay closed very well.  The material around the top is so heavy that the pull string and locking mechanism leave the pouch open by about a half inch or inch.  If the pouch happened to be sitting in the rain, the lens inside would get wet.  I purchased them primarily for storage, so they'll work for me.  3.5 stars.

Title: These seem all the same moisture wise but they have different scents/flavors; boxes hard to read Review: At the current price of $34.99 this is a pricey way to soothe my lips, heels, hands, chin, etc. as it comes to $11.66 per tube and each tube only has 1.25" of balm in it. Nevertheless, this is moisturizing and soothing and a little bit glossy.

I used this on my lips, heels, and hands and it was hydrating. This is good for when one wants to carry a small lotion without having to take a bottle with them. However, I just feel this is way too pricey even though it works well.

It is impossible to read the white writing on the pale pastel boxes and I took off one star for that and the price and the fact that each balm seems exactly the same except for the flavor/scent. For example, the jasmine flower is supposed to be glowing, the rose flower soothing, and the Babassu Oil one rejuvenating. They all seem to have those properties.

In summary, I really like these but they are overpriced and it is impossible to read the writing on the boxes.

Title: So-so
Review: Nothing to brag about. I consider these the "emergency pair" when my good ones get lost or broken.

Title: 👍
Review: 👍

Title: Get a subwoofer system
Review: If you just don’t have the space or this is for more of a commercial install this might fit the bill nicely, other than that I would recommend going with a system that has a separate subwoofer.  Also the controls on this thing are brutal, for over $300 Samsung couldn’t put in an onboard screen help configure, either on the remote or on the speaker!? All your get it LED lights, so if you forget the sequence or lose the manual good luck. Sound is much better than on board TV speakers, but definitely lacks the bass a subwoofer system will have. Like I said the only mark for this should be if you don’t have the room for a sub.

Title: Good value and function.
Review: This is my second case.  First lasted a long time, just showed some wear and tear but still functioned.  I really like this case!

Title: Beware if your head is a bit larger...
Review: This works just fine and is very clear. I'm able to use it on my mac connected to the keyboard USB port or the laptop USB port. My only complain is that the headset is a wee-bit small so it squeezes my head.  I've only used it 3 times thus far, so I assume it will loosen up over time and I'll admit my head isn't the smallest on the planet, so if you have a smaller head, it may be just great.

Title: Almost salon quality
Review: I get facials/microderms at least once a month. Usually, as part of the spa visit, a light peel is included as part of my visit. I found these pads easy to use. I don't feel quite the strong tingling I get at the spa, but I feel a light tingle. I am using these between visits (once a week) and I have noticed my skin looking younger and fresher. Highly recommend for at home use!

Title: Not Really Much of An Upgrade, If At All
Review: I am mostly disappointed in this product, as it does not seem that different from my previous Kindle.  I do not like the power button on the bottom, although I'm sure others didn't like it on the back.  Battery life seems about the same.  The experimental browser still doesn't work very well.  I still like the Kindle for reading, but this device could be a LOT better designed.

Title: Slow But Works
Review: The interface could be made much better, the tech exists. It gets the job done, but grab a fresh cup, you will be here a while!

Title: while it fits well, but it doesn't stick as ...
Review: while it fits well, but it doesn't stick as well as i had hoped. the sticky bra itself is very very sticky, but lacks flexibility; from the top of the breast the where its not as rounded, the bra stays well, where the bottom of the curve would immediately peel of  breast. so it just hangs off your breast, I was wearing a loose halter top, it was very noticeable the bottom edge of the bra was pushing outward

Title: If the temperature dial would stay put, then this curling iron would be fine but the current design is flawed Review: What I like is that the iron is easy to hold and the "curling wand" and base have "dimples" or nodules on which the curling iron rests when hot. This helps keep it from touching the counter. The tip is also cool to the touch when in use.

Besides an on/off switch there is a turbo button that allowed me to increase the temperature a bit. To me this turbo button is unnecessary, but I guess some will like it. The biggest problem I have with this curling iron is the temperature dial. The dial is at the base of the wand and when I am in the process of curling my hair, the dial has a tendency to move simply because my thumb comes to rest on it. This means the temperature is always fluctuating. I think others will have the same problem.

This iron also comes with a thin sleeve for the wand that is made out of felt-like material. It is cheap but it is still a nice touch. If the temperature dial placement was better designed, I would have rated this iron 4 stars.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Just what was needed.

Title: Too slippery
Review: Too slippery

Title: AWFUL!
Review: I was over the moon when I found these online as I was looking for a cheaper slip-on shoe that I could put on when taking the dog out or doing the gardening. They arrived and firstly they were about an inch too big (and I am a true 7.5 and so ordered a 7.5), secondly, the lining kept falling out and so the shoe kept flying off. Absolutely awful so will be returning ASAP for a refund.

Title: Not propotioned right.  Fit not good.
Review: Beautiful shoes but not for me...Strap across toes is way too far to the front of the shoe.  I could not hold them on my feet.  I have tried several things, but hard to wear.  Just a bad fit..proportioned too far from heel which is too wide.  This was a 6 1/2 size.

Title: Buy something else! Dollar tree headphones are prob better!
Review: These headphones lasted for an entire 3 months before the right headphone stopped working. Of course it’s outside of the return window. I guess you get what you pay for.

Title: Sizing is completely off
Review: The size for this is completely off and very small, the fabric doesn't stretch as much as it should or it says it does and the top part where the elastic is is extremely tight the kind that won't let one breathe. I am probably going to have to gift this off but I was in real need of some shorts and have had a super hard time finding anything decent on Amazon that could be worn by any woman with curves honestly.

Title: I see and feel no arch support with these socks, so I am disappointed Review: I ordered these because it said they have arch support. I feel and see no support with these. They are thin but comfortable and they stay put in the shoe. However, because there is no support, I consider these only okay. I am a woman's size 9 and they fit well.

There are six pairs of white ankle socks with gold toe. They wash and dry well.

Title: Seems ok
Review: From my daughter: Nice lotion that’s feels good on skin and has good sun protection. Light enough to wear under makeup or alone. Didn’t notice a huge difference in the appearance of my skin, but also didn’t experience any negative side effects.

Title: Didn't Work for My 3D Printer Project
Review: I wanted to use this in lieu of binder clips on a glass bed mod for my 3D printer who's aluminum bed had warped. It just wasn't sticky enough to hold. . . let me change that to, it just wasn't sticky, at all. It might hold itself on my laptop's monitor below and near vertical but go past 90° and the pads would fall off in seconds under nothing but its own weight. They worked as spacers. I started with five 20x20 pads then cut those in half when they failed to adhere the glass bed to the printer. As spacers they worked well but the height of the glass and the spacers really stressed the binder clips and I worried about cracking the expensive borosilicate plate so I removed the silicone pads and stuck them in a drawer in case some friend might need them for something. I can't return them because I cut them up. At least they weren't expensive.

Title: CUTE
Review: Though cute and nicely sized, the CLASP is very difficult to open.

Title: If I could do it all again I'd order from somewhere else. Review: I recommend Newegg.com if you're looking for a hassle-free purchase with a timely delivery.
This item got lost, mispackaged, and lost again in under 2 days and as a cheap purchase it's not worth the time, effort, or frustration of dealing with clumsy Amazon employees who have a tendency to lose things and keep you waiting longer than most sites for your item.

Title: Works well so far
Review: Does the job and the length I wanted for my car.

Title: husband likes
Review: My husband uses these under his nose and over his mustache... a very tricky, tiny spot to shave.  He prefers these to the battery operated trimmers. They are fairly reasonably priced, so we keep ordering them.

Title: Looks like it came from a bubble gum machine
Review: Awful presentation! Cheap looking and not what I thought I was ordering!

Title: The waist in Large or XL was too small
Review: I could get better shorts from ross and tjmaxx for the same price or cheaper. So I returned mine.

Title: Huge unfinished looking & poor quality sweater. Review: If I could I would give this sweater zero stars.
It’s HUGE!!! It’s unfinished edges, & only would work for someone who might want to use it as a blanket.

Title: Easy to Use; Work Very Well
Review: These sleeves really work and they are big enough to comfortably accommodate at least 4 to 6 thick cables; maybe more thin cables.  At first I thought 20 inches (the length of the sleeves) seemed a little short, but since cables start and terminate at different points, anything longer might not work as the run distance would be too long and you might have to "backtrack" on a cable after it comes out the end.  I have masses of cables running everywhere and just one of these helped make things neater.  Now I need to use the other 3 in the package.  I might even buy a second package of 4 if I still have cables that need straightening up.  The nicest feature of these sleeves is that you don't have to feed the cables through them.  They unzip for the entire length and you just lay the cables into the sleeve and zip it up.  No need to disconnect cables.  This is a genius idea and I love it.  I have tried other methods to keep cables together, such as zip ties, but they don't work nearly as well as these.

Title: Received broken
Review: They are beautiful But came broken, I’ll be sending them back.

Title: A lifesaver for aching tired feet
Review: I have a job where I am on my feet most of the day. When I get home at night, I love using a good foot bath and this new one I just received is great. Multiple massage, jet and heat settings, I can soak my feet while watching TV for about an hour before going to bed. In the morning I wake up with my feet feeling amazing. This is my new favorite go-to device and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a cure for aching sore feet. This would also make a wonderful Christmas present for the special someone you love!

Title: Cute and useful
Review: I like this travel case. I don't use it for travel. I use it for my very fine jewelry and the print I got is really feminine and pretty. The top doesn't stay open very well but overall, it was worth the price.

Title: Only one stencil
Review: I bought this set for the 3 stencils. It only came with one.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Product looks good, but they are too long for my legs.

Title: Cute but too small
Review: Got the biggest size and was still too small for me ☹️ Only giving 2 stars bc they were super super cute!!

Title: my news brief "is not available" after 2 minutes...
Review: I've accumulated numerous Echo devices ever since I was given the opportunity to purchase the 1st generation Echo at the pre-production price of $99 a few years back.  Always impressed and always satisfied until I purchased the 3rd generation Echo Dot with Clock and added it to my home network.  In spite of all of my other Echoes continuing to work just perfectly, this particular 'Dot with Clock' will provide my new brief but after ~2 minutes the news story (in progress) simply stops and I am informed that "---- is not available at this time".  Not sure if this is a conspiracy or if it is a glitch in the software for this Dot... Either way, it is disappointing, and none of the online solutions are helpful as I've deleted, re-added, reset and renewed the Dot and all of my news subscriptions.  It's a nice clock and it does play music (I'm a Prime member) stations, but I have always looked forward to my news brief each morning and this has definitely been a disappointment.

Title: Made my chapped lips worse.
Review: Not good for chapped lips sounds odd but for me it irritated my lips pretty bad.

Title: Kerasal fungal nail treatment
Review: I actually purchased this for a friend (neighbor) who can't really get out much these days - and she reports it appears to be working.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Great value
Review: Works great with my Apple phone

Title: Too Narrow in the Legs
Review: I am 5'6" and wear a size 16 in jeans. These light weight hiking pants fit everywhere except in the lower legs. They were too narrow, specifically in the calves. I was able to put them on, but the legs were so tight that they looked like leggings. I do have thick calves and have issues with some pants being tight in the calf area. The fit in the waist and thighs was fine. Moving past that, the pants are light weight and seem to be constructed well. There are plenty of pockets. These would be great for hiking.

Title: Small
Review: I thought these seemed a little cheap.  They don't work like majic, more like any other cloth but my surprise was how small they are.  They are like 6 inches by 4 inches.  Smallest jewelry cleaning cloths I have ever used.

Title: Okay, fabric is tough and runs small
Review: Fabric is a bit stiff and hard to get over the head and arms in. Ordered A 9-12 month size and it fits my almost 6 month old right now and he is about average height/weight.

Title: THIS APPLE IS A LEMON!
Review: I bought my iPad Mini in April of 2021.  I recently began to have problems with the touch screen.  There is a specific area on my screen that does not respond well anymore. I have to tap firmly several times before it finally responds.  I am horribly disappointed that this Apple product turned out to be a lemon. I don’t have enough money to buy a new one. Is there any way to fix this problem??

Title: This is not volumizing to my hair at all; it is just like ordinary shampoo to me
Review: I washed my short to medium fine curly hair with this shampoo and although the fragrance is nice and it lathers well, my hair actually had less volume than normal after it dried. It was also a rainy day which normally results in my hair being more voluminous. This is a nice shampoo but it is typical of most other nice shampoos on the market and nothing particularly special.  I rated this 3 stars because it is costly (at the current price of $23) and does not add the volume it claims.

Title: Sounds ok, overhead strap no longer locks
Review: The sound on this has been OK.  But it was just less than a month when the overhead strap part stopped locking into place and if you are not careful it can come out of the piece it slips into entirely. For the life of me cannot figure out what broke off, since I am the only one that wears it and I don't plan on my head changing size I suppose I need to get some tape before it comes completely apart.  Not the most comfortable one I have worn but my most comfortable one sounds bad so there is the trade off I guess.  For the money I am not expecting it to last ages but a few more months would have been nice.

Title: I have Grandson who is extremely good at building things and he found this boring and unless
Review: I bought this for my Genus Grandson who builds motors to computors,  He was very boarding with and tried to make it something fun.

Title: Leaked all over envelope

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great little device!

Title: Just beautiful
Review: I bought the entire set when Amazon was having their 20% off celtic jewelry sale (earrings, bracelet and pendant). What a great deal. Got a lot of compliments. Items are lovelier than they show in the picture and high quality for the price. Highly recommend!

Title: One Star
Review: This is not the real face wash, buyer beware...!!!!!!!!!

Title: Great compact hair dryer that packs a punch!
Review: Nice travel hair dryer. It is small, but super powerful. I love it's size and the fact that I can easily take it with me when I need to travel. It has multiple heat and strength levels for optimum drying. It also fits well in my hands and it is easy (and light) to maneuver. Highly recommend if you are in the market for a new hair dryer.

Title: Harem waist
Review: I liked the heavier material its not a flimsy skirt.

Title: travel liquid bottles
Review: These are silicon tubes for lotion, shampoo, conditioner, etc... I haven't used them yet... so I will report back on the "leak proof" portion.  They are soft and pliable.  The zippered carry case is also soft.  The base of each tube has a turning piece that you set so that you can identify what is in each tube. The claim to be "TSA approved."  I will update on this as well if I have any issues. Each tube is about 3 1/2" or long - eye balling it, with suction cups on one side so you could "stick" them to the shower wall if you wanted use "hands free."  They report each tube holds 2.8 oz. The colors are just as pictured in the set I received.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Five Stars
Review: My grandson love them.

Title: Misleading SULFATE FREE title.
Review: Just received.  Have not used yet, but feel very misled about the title of product.  I was searching for a sulfate-free shampoo and conditioner.  While the conditioner is sulfate-free (Big shocker, most conditioners don't have sulfates) , The shampoo is FULL of sulfates.  I definitely feel misled.  You should take sulfate free out of the title!

Title: Card reader slot housing too slim for my IBM microdrive
Review: I received this from Kodak as a replacement for a defective [[ASIN:B002P5KOXG Kodak A250 50-in-1 Card Reader 83037]] I purchased that only worked once.  Well, this 72-in-1 won't read my IBM microdrive because the housing opening on the Vivitar is too slim to fit the drive.  However, it did read my compact flash card from the same camera because that card's housing is slightly slimmer than the microdrive. I am very dissapointed, can't recommend this reader, and am skeptical about its claim of being 72-in-1 memory card.

Title: Beautiful and wipeable
Review: This is exactly what we were looking for. Beautiful colors and we love the extras it came with.

Title: not happy with keyboard went with apple "I" pad and love ...
Review: This one is not for me, very small type, not happy with keyboard went with apple "I" pad and love it.

Review: I’m a 46F. I got the size 44 based on reviews. It fit but there’s no support. I would go 2-3 sizes down from your normal size for a more supportive fit. Even adjusting the straps did not work.

I do not recommend this product. I will try to contact Sceptre, but I have been having it for several months so I'm sure they won't honor anything.

Title: Great bag
Review: This is the second same bag I purchased, my son a surgeon in the Air Force uses this every day and for travel. I noticed they were on sale I bought him another one for the future since he uses the first on so much. He has never loved a bag that much and it looks great on a professional or student, the leather is aged and soft.  Do not hesitate to buy it the price is great.

Title: Nice scent, its a gel not a fan! Review: I like the scent of this Hydro light gel, and it does last awhile.

Being this is a gel, When I first put this on my hands it feels like it won’t absorb, but it does pretty fast, but its sticky for awhile, but not long, then My hands feel soft, but they don’t look soft, or any different before I used this, if this makes sense!
There is some good ingredients in this, but there in a very small amount in this!, and other ingredients I’m not a fan of.

Guess I’m more into body butters, and cream lotions then a gel!

Title: Thin, soft material
Review: Overall pretty pleased, comfortable and soft. Drawstring on pants is huge though, tricky when you untie them to use the restroom

Title: Great moisturizing skin cream!
Review: This is one of the nicest skin moisturizers I have ever tried. It goes on super silky and is quickly absorbed into my overly dry skin. Lightly fragranced, you will not have a conflict with any perfume/fragrance you will be using. My crepey skin has begun to look much better after using this daily for the past 3 weeks. I love this applicator bottle as well. I keep it in my bathroom and after I shower I pump a little on the palm of my hand and then smooth it over my legs and arms. I highly recommend this for all (men and women) to help your skin feel and look health.

Title: No go if you are bigger than a C cup!
Review: Fit was as expected but gave no support whatsoever. Returned mine with no problems. Would not recommend if you have a larger bust. I am a 34D and even going about normal day to day walking in this bra gave no support let alone if I had tried it in the gym.

Review: Keeps freezing up.....Wasted my whole Saturday night trying to get it to connect......Ended up packing it up and returning it......This needs to go back to the drawing board.......

Title: Great quality, really useful
Review: This is a great crossbody bag. I took it with me to use in Europe on a recent vacation and basically threw away my Rick Steves hidden money pouch. This is roomy, holds my phone, my credit cards, cash and even my passport along with makeup and a small brush. Bag stays secure across my body so I am not worried about pick pockets. The bag itself is made with beautiful leather and is extremely attractive. Highly recommend this for traveling but really for any time you want a smaller bag.

Title: Painful
Review: I don't know who invented these vertical wires on the side boob but I'm positive it wasn't a woman. I liked this bra for the first five minutes. It bruised my sides where the bottom of the vertical wire poked me all day. Not much support at all. Do not buy.

Review: I really love this bag except putting my 15ml bottles does not allow me to be able to use the zipper pouch at the top :( but it is too cute and I am happy either way thank you

Title: Made my skin Dry! Review: The Revlon prime is suppose to make your pores smaller.

Before putting this on my face, I applied two different moisturizer I use everday when I come out of the shower.
I have tried this revlon Prime a few times ,and it seem to dry my skin.!
When it got on my lips They became very dry also.
That said I have used other products for making pores smaller, and then my face looked smoother, but not with this Revlon
Prime plus for me.

Title: Bold and Fake
Review: This is the worst eyebrow product I have ever used. It does not look at all natural. It is a very long application process. The doe foot applicator applies the product, then you brush it in with small strokes with the small angled brush, then you brush the hairs with the spoolie. It looks so fake. Very bold. But in no way natural. I already have pretty bold brows, so this was definitely over the top for me. It is also pretty difficult to remove, which is likely a plus, unless you mess up. You must remove with an oil based cleanser.

Review: Very cheap

Title: Very disappointed
Review: Easy to install but didn't even get a signal sitting 2 inches away from the router.

Title: Love the flowery fragrance, the slight sheen, and the weightlessness but my hair felt too dry and not soft as expected Review: After washing my long fine wavy/curly hair, I applied this mask from root to ends and left it on almost 3 minutes then rinsed it off. After my hair dried, it had a slight sheen to it and the product did not weigh down my hair. However, my hair felt a bit on the dry side and not soft as I expected.

I do love the flowery fragrance and the fact that it's weightless on my hair. However, since it does not condition as well as I expected, this is not something I would purchase for myself.

Title: Easy to Reverse
Review: My husband is 6'2" and weighs about 195 pounds. He wears a size 34 in pants. I ordered this belt in a 36 after looking online about how to order belt sizes. What I read said to buy a size larger than what you wear. This belt fits him, but only on the last hole. Next time I order a belt for him, I think I will go with a 38. The product description says this is made of leather. It's not an obvious leather. I'm not saying that it's not leather, but it doesn't have some of the leather properties that I have gotten used to over the years. It is sturdy. The belt reverses very easily. However, unless you're in super good lighting, I found it difficult to tell which side was black and which one was brown. The brown is a very dark brown. The brand name is on the belt buckle, but it's fairly discrete unless you're specifically looking for it. Overall, this is okay. My husband has been wearing it and it holds his pants up!

Title: Gorgeous sun protection shirt but cut is all wrong and it is see through Review: I was so awed by this shirt in the package that I could not wait to try it on. It is a gorgeous variable blue color and feels soft. Unfortunately, when I put it on, the torso was way too tight and short (above the waist) and the arms were long and loose. I take a large to an XL in women's depending on the cut. However, I could have used a 2X in the torso and a large in the arms. In addition, it is see through. I even decided to put this on over two other base layers and it was still see through in the sense that one could see every body outline.

This is such a gorgeous shirt and is rated for 50 UPF for sun protection but I am going to have to wear this as a base layer due to the sheerness and odd torso sizing. If this fit me perfectly and was not see through, I would have given this 5 stars.

Title: 2PCS United States Marine Corps Face Cover with 4 Fi-Lter USMC Face Bandana Balaclava Reusable
Review: fits better than I thought. . . . good price. . .

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great camera! i am really pleased: Just what I was looking for. . .

Title: Pricey but well worth it. Skip the spas and do it yourself at home
Review: Another home run from La Roche-Posay. After using this for almost a month, I can testify to the amazing effect it has had on my skin. I have found the small lines around my eyes have all but disappeared and my 60 year old skin is plumper and fuller and way softer to the touch. I do think $65 is a high price for a small amount of serum which is not coming directly from a physician's prescription. But, after having used this now for a while I think it is an amazing serum and a must have for anyone's aging skin. Skip the doctor's office and spas and try this first. You will be amazed at the results.

Title: Run Small
Review: I'll need to return.  I don't know why non-slip-ons don't come in half sizes.  I wear 9 1/2, but can wear some 9s, so I ordered that.  This 9D is too short.  I've never ordered a 10 in my life and likely will just return for credit.  That's a shame because I really like the look and it felt good, except for the size.

Title: Poorly made you will lose it in a matter of hours
Review: Clicked into place once. Stopped after that and falls off. Fell on the street 3rd day I had it. waste of money which I’d like back.

Title: Looks good Review: This is a nice top. Medium weight material. Not ultra thick, but not too thin. I received the black and leopard print one. It looks nice. The sequins are a rose gold.

One negative: the sequin areas are a bit scratchy. The shirt could have used a thicker fabric over those areas. There is also decreased stretch in those areas.

All in all, buy the shirt. You can’t beat the price . Very nice top for the price. It made a very nice looking outfit for me.

Size is pretty much as expected. I am 5’4” and weigh about 171 lbs. I am a 38 DDD. I chose an XL.

Title: Five Stars
Review: What a bargain!

Title: Okay
Review: Product very shiny but does peel

Title: Huge, heavy But not warm, droops down. Color green is good. Review: The color green is a nice winter color.

Not only does this run large, Big, but the material is like a nylon that clings to the body and is heavy.
I'm a almost 5'2, 130 to 135. Older women. The medium was huge, the neck drooped down, but not sexy.
If you notice in the picture, she is wearing a scarf around her neck!
The front did not hang like the picture at all, even though this runs Big.
The seam was sewed crooked.

I did get a refund. Thank you.

2 stars for the color.
I do not recommend.

Title: Great shower product, a bit expensive
Review: Great shower aid. I agree with some of the others, think it is better to take with you on an extended trip (think 10-21 days) than to be using daily in the shower. As positives, I loved this light fragrance and the buffer makes my skin feel silky smooth. My issue with this, if there is any, is the cost and the fact that when I hang this in my shower, the water from my shower keeps running on it even when I am not using (using up some of the soap). Maybe it's my shower set up, but I have to place it where the water pours and I found this will probably last me a lot less than maybe others. To me, I would probably only get a good 10 uses out of it and it becomes way too expensive for my use. Rating it as a 4 star because I think it will work well for others. And, like I said, I felt great after using it and my skin was fantastic. I will definitely get one of these for my Mediterranean cruise in May 2017 to take along with me.

Title: Just what your winter skin needs
Review: This is just what you need for winter skin. It stays on and keeps skin hydrated for a long time. It's a great lotion and I highly recommend it.

Title: I love this product!
Review: One of my largest skin problem areas since I have passed age 50 is my legs. No matter how often I try to use lotion on them, I still tend to find (particularly after shaving) to find my legs having that repulsive 'alligator skin' look. I started using this Vichy product immediately after showering daily and now I see a noticeable difference on how my legs look. I have no idea what the other reviewers are saying out here. I found the fragrance very light and the lotion itself also light (not sticky) and it absorbs quickly Into my overly dry skin. I am now using it on my arms as well and I see an amazing difference simply after a week of use. I highly recommend this body lotion for over age 50 skin, particularly those with skin which may be prone to the elements (either very cold or very hot/sunny environments).

Title: works but doesn't stay in after a few uses .  "Buy the more expensive one you will be better off".
Review: Okay butafter a few days it keeps slipping out of the computer and coming apart. I should have bought the more expensive one.

Title: Sizing is very small if you can go one size up
Review: This fits like it was made for a teenager, I ordered a size XL and was too small apparently they ran out of XXL too so I couldn't order a size up but the XL wasn't only snug it was tight! Felt like a size Medium to me even very very small. Definitely not for an older person.

Review: I see no difference

Title: Handy for travelingp

Title: Cover, and Protect, but nothing else
Review: This was supposed to function as a stand. This tablet never leaves home (since the tablet it poor quality), however I wanted to have something that would stand up so the tablet can function as a bedside clock. It doesn't do that, or doesn't do it good enough.

Title: Great basic line razor!
Review: I had my husband use this for almost a month so this review is largely based on his feedback. First, it comes in an attractive box, perfect for gift giving. Second, it's reasonably priced as a baseline razor. There are far better models of electric razors on the market, but for more than twice the cost. This razor is lightweight and fits very well in his hand (ergonomically correct). He maneuvers it easily and the shave he receives is surprisingly as close as the more expensive Braun models. Although he said he will be primarily using his better models, he will keep this one around mostly for business travel (due to its compactness) and as a back up to his 7000 series. He highly recommends this model, especially for those men who have not used an electric razor in the past and want to try it.

Title: Brush
Review: This brush works well.

Title: USB plug in microphone
Review: In this age of zoom calls and video meetings - I found my laptop microphone was a bit less successful than I was hoping - so, I purchased this microphone.  It appears to have solved the issues I was having with breaking out - volume of laptop microphone. Super easy - plug into usb port and you're set.  Power on and off.  No actually mute button - and I haven't tried it but I supposed you could turn it off and see if anyone can hear you?  Comes with a foam muffler and a couple spares of those. Additionally a nice drawstring closure bag to keep it all in.  For the money, it's a great option.  Having said all that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: It works
Review: I've been using this cable for the past few months and it works great.  No problem at all.

Title: be careful while charging your nook Review: I read at night before I fall asleep which is why I bought the back-lit Nook Color. I like the easel style of the roocase because it works great while I read in bed.

One problem - I had it plugged in through the opening in the bottom of the case charging it while reading. When I decided to go to sleep, I flipped the case closed and bent the plug-in part of the charger. Broke it. Don't forget to unplug the charger before closing the case!

This is a sample size. I got one like this same size from Sephora subscription for $10 that had 4 other samples of skin care/makeup.

For $18, don’t waste your money.

Title: Big hit at lunch
Review: These are incredible value for the money. All of the included parts have worked for a few months and are still in great quality. We use them at lunch for an hour each day with smash.

Title: They don't fit my ears or anyone's ears comfortable at all
Review: They don't fit my ears or anyone's ears comfortable at all.  The sound is ok.  I can't get them to stay in well enough or long enough to truly check out the sound quality. I would pass on these.

Seen before!

Wear these even around the house.

I would Not recommend these shorts for a your
Guy, or older.
