Title: Moisturizes well
Review: This is a good moisturizing mask. I say good and not excellent just because I have been using it for three weeks now, twice a week, and haven't seen a really noticeable difference in my skin. This small tube does seem to go a long way. It goes on smoothly and evenly. When it dries, it is easy to remove. Does not leave your skin feeling tight (I kind of like that feeling when I use a mask because I feel it is closing my pores). After using, my skin does feel soft so I do know it does provide a good moisturizing effect on your skin. Not sure if I will be buying more as I was really looking for more of a pore tightener.

Title: Functional, but poorly designed Review: This Belkin 8-outlet surge protector for the most part serves us well for plugging in our TV & entertainment center. I would have liked to use it for my desktop but the design has some flaws. Namely, anything with a DC converter ends up taking extra outlet space so I cannot use it & have every thing for my desk properly plugged in.

Like other reviewers have mentioned, there seems to be issues with the USB charging ports. I don't have much experience charging via USB port other trying with my computer. Attempting to charge my tablet via the USB port on my computer and the Belkin surge protector were equally disappointing. Slow as molasses in the dead of Winter. Is this a common issue or am I just unlucky? I'm going to go back to just using my regular charging cord & the outlet and not bother to try again.

In any case, I'm rather disappointed in this surge protector. Slow charging, poorly designed outlet spacing, & a high price makes it one that I would not recommend.

Title: Lip balm is hydrating but I do not care for the sandy texture of the balm
Review: At the current price of $14.99, this is way too expensive for this. This lip balm is definitely hydrating but I personally do not care for the sandy texture of this salve. After having tried this, I would not order this again.

Title: More for the looks.
Review: The sound is about what I expected from the price I paid.

Title: Definitely not up to par!
Review: Don't be duped like me.  These are flimsy and cheap.  After one use I had to toss this bad  "facial sponge".

Title: Tons of fun, easy to assemble...
Review: Pretty easy to assemble and comes with a black car... although it does not light up thank god I got the extra led lighted cars that were sold seperately. One major thing though on the tv it showed the tracks glowing in the dark and the track did not do so.  And the bridge was kind of hard to assemble.. other than that this was a much anticipated birthday gift for a 4 yr old boy and when he was able to assemble the track himself he loved it.  Nice colors and hours of fun.

Title: Attractive brush that is best for peach fuzz or very short men's hair but sheds a lot Review: This is an attractive boar bristle hairbrush for men with peach fuzz or very short hair. It has stiff bristles but it does not detangle and it only passes lightly through my short-to-medium fine curly hair. It passes through my boyfriend's hair well, however. This brush is best for those who have peach fuzz or a little more than peach fuzz for hair, which is why it is advertised for men. The handle is easy to hold, so it provides a good grip. The handle does feel a little cheap. Also, the boar bristles shed a lot. I know boar usually sheds but this sheds a lot and that coupled with the cheap feel of the handle is what caused me to rate this 3 stars.

The current price of $12.99 is competitively priced for this. It is only functional for very short hair.

Title: Doesn't work on burns
Review: My daughter burned her hand and I had just received this product.  I sprayed it on her hand (the burn wasn't open).  She said it burned even after a minute.  I had to wash it off.

Title: OK ear/nose trimmer; takes one AA battery NOT included Review: I am one of the very rare people that likes these types of small pocket razors. This is what I call a bullet head razor. This one is just okay. The razor is a bit wide compared to women's pocket razors. It does trim the nose and ear hairs but they have to be long. There is also a slight burning smell with this razor.The head is removable for cleaning.

This comes with a cleaning brush and a user pamphlet. One AA battery is needed but NOT included.

The current price of $10.99 is competitively priced for this "pocket" razor but I do wish it came with a tiny cloth bag for carrying both the razor and cleaning brush.

Title: Does what it is meant to do
Review: Very easy to configure, fits my 11.6" Alienware very well. I can focus air on my Gpu and WASD keys to prevent from getting hot. Easy recommendation to anyone who needs a cooler for intense applications. My WASD keys barely get hot and my Gpu runs much more stable.

Title: Lovely gift
Review: What a lovely gift for a young lady or woman.  It's made well, very pretty and many compliments.  I would order this again.

Title: Love the metal ends but it gave out too fast
Review: Got this because the others I had tried usually weakened right at the end. This one was fantastic for that, very sturdy didn't tangle up like others. I loved it. However it slowly stopped working on each device one by one. Worked for about a month before I finally got tired of it and got a different one.

Title: Doesn't have NFC as stated! Review: Works well enough, microphone and pairing work well. But does not have NFC. This would be ok if the price wasn't so high and it wasn't advertised as having it.
I contacted their support and was told to reach out in Amazon through seller contact.
Once I did this I told them that I received a MR21GA VS MR21GC, the only difference being the NFC functionality.
They said they function the same and to request a refund if I am not satisfied.
I will be doing this. The NFC functionality is a big portion of the remote and it states a different model. Will be leaving seller feedback as well.
Be careful folks.

Title: Very Comfortable
Review: Got them for my husband and he loves them

Title: Three Stars
Review: Spells divine, but doesn't thicken or dry shampoo. It added more of a shine than anything.

Title: Wow Gorgeous
Review: One of the prettiest dresses and most comfortable dresses I have ever owned

Title: Fits as expected
Review: Pretty colors. Ordered 2x

Title: Decent
Review: The design / color / letters on the keyboard skin are easily rubbing off and wearing off. I haven't even had it that long and two or more keys are almost completely worn off. The case is good though but I'm disappointed in the skin

Title: Perfect bag!!!
Review: This came inside a box that was packed in another box. No way it could be damaged. This bag is perfect! My laptop fit in perfectly. There is a smaller outside pocket ( on a slant like a pant pocket) that is handy. There are 2 more larger pockets inside. The handle is so comfy to hold with everything in it. It also has a long shoulder strap that you can attach as well. The material is thick and sturdy with a double zipper enclosure on the top. I love it! Great quality product!

Title: They Seem to Improve Speed; very thin; don't kink up
Review: I hooked these up right away and they did seem to help with speed of my local area network.  They are very thin, but sturdy so they don't kink up easily, as some cables will.  I like them and might get some more for other connections in my network.  Unfortunately the cables are a little short and I just barely got one of them to reach.  If I get any more, I'll have to see if they make a 10 or 12 foot version.  Other than length, the only other downside I can see is that these are somewhat pricey.  You get what you pay for, so they may be well worth it.

Title: What a great, easy to use device!
Review: I wasn't sure what to expect when I ordered this. I have slightly wavy hair which leaves me having to do something with my hair every morning (either flat iron to straighten it or use curlers to get curls). This is super easy to use and, instead of my having to wait for curlers to do the job, I can curl my hair within minutes! My hair comes out super shiny, full bodied and I can make the curls as tight or as loose as I want. The ceramic material prevents damage to the hair, so this is safe to use daily. I will never go back to standard curlers again! This would make a wonderful gift for the holidays!

Title: It Burns
Review: I bought it because Dita Vin Teese reccomend it and she supposedly has sensitive skin.  This stuff burned me so badly at just one pump and it smells really cheap,  I'm surprised she recommends it

Title: Great Review: I’m 5’4, 240, 44ddd boobies. Got the XXL. It fit Great! Comfy! I probably will get an XL next time for a tighter fit like the model. But for days I don’t want that, I will have this one. It looks Cute Regardless! Will purchase other colors.

Update 11-13-2020: It washes well. I did get a second one in wine red in an XL. It fit even better than the XXL and is So Comfy!!!! See pic.

Update 11-5-22: I brought the leopard. The quality is not as great as the others. Thin material, but cute. Unsure how it will hold up due to the thinness of the fabric in this color. The wine, black, and gray still holding up very well!

Title: Don’t waste your money!
Review: I hate these sweats! They are cheaply made and sized for a child size instead of an adult. The product is poorly made and I would not recommend it to anyone. Stick with sweats that you are familiar with made by a company you know. These sweats come from China and are not good quality.

Title: Staple clothing item
Review: Very classy

Title: Edges are uncomfortable, not very true to size. Just barely.
Review: Only problem I had with these is that they are very uncomfortable around the edges. I tried wearing one for sleeping and couldn't stand it.  I really would not buy again because of that I made the mistake of buying this twice before even trying it. Not worth it.

Title: Robe
Review: To small

Title: great price
Review: Did the job

Title: Unless you are below average height, this is NOT a dress
Review: Ordered this on sale, took a chance because there were no other reviews and shouldn't have wasted my time. I'm 5'10" and this just barely covered what it needed to in the back. Unless you are relatively short, this is more of a tunic. I'm a size 16, 40D cup and ordered the 1x/2x and the chest was tight. The band that is supposed to hit right below your bust, like an empire waist, really came mid bust and just looked and felt  awkward. If it was long enough though, I would have kept the dress and made it work because it is really pretty. The only reason I am giving it two stars is because it was a beautiful green color, looks just like the picture and the embroidery is nice. It would be a great dress for someone really petite.

Title: Get what you pay for
Review: This is the second set I've purchased for my husband.  He has a beard and moustache he's always messing with.  This is a "cheap" set.. but it seems to work for a reasonable amount of time considering the price.  I wish they'd make a better set that was meant for "smaller" jobs.  Haven't found it yet.

Title: I don't hate it. I love it but the sizing is ... Review: Ok, I don't hate it. I love it but the sizing is way off. I wear an 8 and due to prior experience of sometimes these fit and sometimes they don't, I ordered a size bigger. This fits more of a size 1/2, definitely not a 10/12. Size chart needs to be changed. The bottom fit since it is adjustable but the top is too small.

FYI: I am a vine voice but I purchased this swimsuit.

Title: Junk
Review: I purchased this as a gift. She hated it. She probably threw it in the garbage

Title: Hydrating hand and body lotion but smells a little like a new shower curtain - 2.5 stars Review: I know this is marketed to men but I love men's products and use them regularly.

This is a body lotion (6.5 fluid ounces) and hand lotion (2.5 fluid ounces) combo pack. Both lotions are thick and moisturizing with the hand lotion the thickest. However, I do not like the fragrance at all as it smells a little bit like a new plastic shower curtain.

The current price of $29.90 is pricey for this duo.

Title: work ok
Review: I have tried them twice.  I found on clear night they did not seem to make much of a difference to me.  I actually felt I could see better without them.  ON the rainy night, I did find some improvement in glare, but not substantial.

Title: junk
Review: Had to send this unit back 3 times! Buttons break  so easily! Sound quality is pretty good but nothing lasts on this unit....button broken on power and channel.

Title: Lovely way to clean silver.
Review: It’s a wonderful way to keep your gems gleaming.

Title: Pass
Review: Cute but don’t stay on.

Title: Not very comfortable
Review: I like the look and feel of these compression socks but honestly, they feel a bit too tight so I stopped wearing them and purchased others that are similar but less restrictive.

Title: Not cool!!
Review: Don't be misled by the name nicecool these slippers are completely synthetic..how can that be cool? On one hand they claim to be warm and cozy, then comfortable and cool. Complete nonsense Don't buy!

Title: OK
Review: ones with label to write on were better

Title: love this
Review: i got a free sample of the leave in conditioner  ... i love this stuff  so i was happy to find it on amazon !!

Title: eyelash glue
Review: Honestly, it works about as good as any glue - it dries clear and is tacky in about 30 secs.  Works as I like.

Title: Runs small, nice looking shirt
Review: They need to adjust their size chart for this shirt.  Although, it looks nice and washes wel, it doesn't fit correctly.  If they put up a size chart to go with this shirt, then people will be able to order the correct size.

Title: discontinued scent
Review: Crabtree & Evelyn has basically discontinued this particular scent in a lot of their products options and I am sad about that.  It's hard to describe the scent, but it is clean and slightly woodsy?  I do love it and am I sad they have mostly discontinued it.  I always update if there are any issues to report.  Would be 5 stars if the price was more reasonable... *sigh*

Title: Beautiful but one bag.
Review: It's a bra bag and this is why I'm keeping it , but ... it is not reversible.

Title: size Med. Big, Not flattering. Review: I bought the Medium.

The material is heavy feeling, and clingy..I'm 5'2' about 136 lbs..older. This ran big on me. Looks cheesy.
For being short I have long legs, and I'm not stocky, but this top made me look Fat..It is not flattering, even if your a smaller
size small I Think.!
I returned this.

Title: Needs balance control
Review: The sound quality of these speakers is fine.  Unfortunately, I can't position them so that I am in the "sweet spot", so all the sound appears to be coming from the speaker I am closest to.  This makes sense, but it doesn't help me.  To those who say, just move the speakers - I can't.  My placement options are limited to a single location and it means I am closer to one speaker.  As mentioned in the headline, a balance control would solve this issue.

Title: Doesn’t work for me
Review: Nope I will not buy this again it doesn’t work at all

Title: Would not purchase again
Review: It is easy to use but if you're diabetic I would not recommend

Title: stopped working
Review: i purchased this product but it stopped working after 2 months.

Title: Beautiful but see through.
Review: Beautiful, however, it is slightly see through. Fit as it should.

Title: Perfect fit
Review: Wife loved it

Title: Prefer eos
Review: Work well and as advertised. I prefer the eos chapsticks though. I like the texture and flavor of eos more and the ingredients are more simple.

Title: Now Playtex quality
Review: Very unhappy with this purchase, the cups have been made a bit larger, which does not help at all, seems to squish everything together.  The straps stayed in place on first wearing, then have slipped every time since.  Also, the band is not sized according to the chart, since I have to wear it on the last clips.  I purposely bought one size larger band specifically to allow breathing room.  Basically, this is a bra I will wear when absolutely necessary, but no way could it be worn 18 hours.

Title: I cannot stand the smell of unrefined Shea butter; otherwise this is good Shea butter Review: I purchased this to use as part of a recipe for making body butter. Although this Shea butter is very moisturizing, I cannot stand the "burnt tobacco" smell and that "fragrance" overpowers any essential oil I add to my recipe.

From now on, I am purchasing the [[ASIN:B01MG1KC41 refined Shea butter]] instead. There is nothing wrong with this Shea butter as all unrefined Shea butters smell like this. It is just because of the smell that I will not be purchasing this again. Otherwise this is great Shea butter and very moisturizing.

Title: You get what you pay for
Review: Run small. NOT for those with wider feet. Material is vinyl/plastic looking.

Title: Super soft athletic socks
Review: These are nice, lightweight running socks. They are no show and as such, usually roll down into my sneaker at some point during a run. However, these are super soft (merino wool) and they do resist rolling down until I am out for a long time. They feel great on my feet and I wear them during the day with errands and even to work and they are so comfortable. Highly recommend!

Title: 5.0 not 5.1, works ok, static at long distance
Review: I selected this bluetooth adapter for my daughter's computer so that she could use her wireless headphones with it. Overall, it does mostly do what it claims, but there are some issues. It found her headphones right away, but uses 5.0 tech, not 5.1. The sound works great if she remains in her room, but will encounter static at distances much less than 65'. The price is too high for what the adapter can do, and the static is very annoying.

Title: better flow required
Review: the brush is smaller relative to Garnier product and the color a better match.  however - with all of these products the 'gue' was a little thick and hard to apply.  Maybe it was me using this product for the first time.  You do need to rub the brush extensively down the hair line and also allow it to dry.  washes off easily with shampoo.

Title: Five Stars
Review: great gift from wife.

Title: I like that the brushes are angled and decent for precision work but not for thin brows
Review: At the current price of $13.99 for two tiny angled eyebrow brushes, this comes to $7 per brush which I consider a bit pricey. Although the brushes can be used on to apply concealer or to highlight the eyes, these are best for the eyebrows. The angle of the brush allows for precision and these cover my bushy eyebrows well. I doubt someone who has thin brows would find these brushes useful. I also like these for powder eyeshadow but not for much else. I do not like that the handle colors are not the same. It looks like a mismatched pair because of that. Overall, these are okay but I'm not overly impressed. Note that the bristles do not shed.

Title: Lotion leaves my skin silky; fragrance is okay but PUMP is AWFUL Review: This body lotion is over packaged and comes in a box which comes in another box. The pump is separate. After I installed the pump, it took me over five minutes to get the top to pop up. I was ready to give up. Nevertheless, it finally opened and I was able to pump out some lotion.

The lotion is thick and creamy and absorbs quickly. It also left my skin feeling great. The fragrance is okay but not great to me. The current price of $14.67 for this 8 fluid ounce pump bottle is competitively priced. I actually took off one star for the okay fragrance and one star for the lousy pump.

Title: Did not not look good with my fair skin, although moisturizing. Review: I recieved the Nude. It is very creamy, comes in a good looking lip-stick tube that has a little click when you close it.
It should not open Up in your purse.
I’m have fare light skin, light hair and this did not look good on me. It just blended in, and I looked totally washed out.
When my daughter tried it on, it looked mave very lite pinkish on her, and did look better, Although not her favorite.

This color is not for everyone

Title: Good
Review: Me compre el m es un poco ceñido el color azul es super lindo y en si esta muy bien

Title: Looks nice
Review: I tried it on a iPhone XR in my car and on a portable speaker also on a iPhone 6s but it did not work on either sadly ... will be returning

Title: Great jacket for the price!
Review: This is a great jacket for the price!  I wear a large but bought an XL so I could put a fleece or layer underneath, so it is a bit big- mostly the sleeves are very long, but the velcro at the wrists tightens them up fine. Very warm. Perfect to pack up for travel. Bright blue is nice and visible. Would definitely recommend this jacket.

Title: Masks have wholes
Review: These masks have holes in them. In the picture it looks like seams, but they ar eactually holes. Also the letters " KN95" are holes. I returned the masks exactly as the return instructions specified, and it has been 15 days since they have received them ( I have tracking status to prove they were received.) Their instructions stated it may take 6-10  days to process the return.

Title: As advertised
Review: Great bottles and droppers.  Work like they should.  Were well protected as shipped.  Not sure what else to say about these, other than I would buy again.

Title: Perfect
Review: Love them! Darling and makes me feel thinner

Title: Very upset momma
Review: Inside glass came shattered and made a mess every where with glass shards thru out the entire thing, santa gift to my daughter and was ruined

Title: If you wear half size, order down
Review: I love these, but I gave them 4 stars because they were too big. Going to exchange for smaller size. I wear 7.5-8. I need a 7. Order down

Title: Handy outlet and surge protector! Does a lot!
Review: This is a really nice plug/surge protector. It fits a lot of plugs, without taking up a lot of room. Hugs the outlet and even has a handy shelf on it for me to lay my phone during a charge. I use this on the wall next to my bed so I can charge my cell phone and be able to easily reach if I need it. This would make a unique Christmas present to the person who has everything. Highly recommend.

Title: You'll need an adapter from Apple if you buy a new Mac.
Review: I bought a new Mac Airbook and had to buy an adapter from Apple in order to use this.  When I called Seagate for support, before I figured out I had to use the Apple adapter, Seagate couldn't help me.  Seems like they would know what adapters are needed.  I gave it three stars because of that, and because there's really no way for me at this stage to know how well the unit works.

Title: good quality, well detailed. note: I glued it to a disc wallet
Review: i made no attempt to iron it on or sew it to fabric. looks great though

Title: Really nice way to maintain and lengthen keratin treatments
Review: This is a great, reasonably priced, keratin protecting conditioneer. I have been getting either keratin or agave treatments regularly over the past 10-15 years and I always have to purchase special shampoo to maintain the treatments (sulfate free, etc). This is a comparable product to the more expensive shampoos and conditioners I have been used to buying. My hair stys sleek and shiny and I love it. Highly recommend this conditioner!

Title: Perfect for PS5, even includes slim heatsink. Review: Best price drive and it's FAST.
Moved 450GB of games from internal storage to this M.2 in 6 minutes 47 seconds.
PS5 rated read speed at 6257MB/s when it started. A bit slower than rated, but still should be sufficient for PS5 usage. I've had 0 issues so far.
The PRICE IS UNBEATABLE.
Let's hope the longevity doesn't match the price. But so far so good.

Title: Love this device but I got a bad one..had to return it Review: I really love this device but unfortunately I got a bad one ( apparently it has a problem with video chip) .
The seller is very agreeable & offered to give me a Refund. It's going back but I'll be buying another.
I watch a lot of videos & read news articles and find the larger screen is much easier for me to hold onto in bed especially.
Sound is really so much better than the old models but at least with the iPad Pro I got, I experienced problems with video
Playback ( shadowing & freezing especially with YouTube and some websites. ) After talking with APPLE, it seems like it was probable that mine might have a bad video chip. So now I'm on the hunt again for a replacement.
Amazing how much lighter this is than my old iPad2.

Title: Fits perfect just wear, before washing. Than the entire fit changes. Unfortunately.
Review: The perfect if worn before washing. It’s stretchy and fits snug which is great under a scrub top. It was also longer in length than most undershirts, also great under scrubs. The sheerness was also perfect. Best scrub undershirt do far I’ve tried, however, after one wash that changed drastically. After one wash, it was shorter and smaller, much smaller and the stretchy seemed to disappear. It was like a different undershirt.

Title: Too Dim
Review: I got these to put in my boys' bunks to provide a little light at night. They were just too dim to be of any use. On stairs, they mark the step but don't really illuminate it.

Title: laptop sleeve
Review: I have a really pretty alligator bag I use when I travel (hoping to get to do that again soon!) and I wanted a sleeve to slip my laptop and table in.  This pink bag is pretty and functional. It is padded and velvet inside.  There is an outside side zipper pouch.  The top is also a zipper closure for the main opening.  It's lightweight and is made of a canvas (like?) material that seems easy to wipe off.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful and I will in this case I begin to use it more. (she says hopefully!)

Title: Love the pump container but the scentless lightweight lotion is just average - 2.5 stars Review: This lotion comes in a pump bottle. All I had to do was remove the tab and pump out the desired amount. I do love the dispensing mechanism but the lotion itself is scentless and lightweight. It absorbs quickly and only faintly moisturizes. There is nothing specifically spectacular about this lotion. I personally would not order it again because it does not wow me.

The current price of $32 for a 3.2 fluid ounce pump tube is outrageous.

Title: No returns
Review: There's no way that your hair can cover this whole caterpillar looking thing. It's very difficult to handle and it doesn't work at all, your hair ends up being a big mess. oh and don't forget they don't return your items!

Title: Nice beanie, but big label on front of beanie reads, Made in China! Review: A nice fleese beanie.
Allot of people said this beanie was big, but not for my husband who is slim with a regular size head, and not
Much hair.
Although my husband does not like his beanie hats tight.

The one Big problem that my husband was not going to wear this hat is, the Big label on the front of this beanie!
Omg you can’t miss that label, that says the name of the Co.,ok, then it reads, “Made In China” in the middle of your forehead!
Hubby was not advertising China on his forehead. It took him , then me with a seam ripper over a hour to cut that label off, as
It had tiny stitching, and was double stitched in..
If we could not get that big label, Made in China off the band of this hat it was going to be a throw away hat.

Title: Worked great for a while
Review: I liked that it shuts off when not using thus prolonging battery life. However recently after several months use, it doesn't fully wake up. I have to switch it of and back on. Sometimes it quits working when I'm using it and I have to switch it off and back on. It still  works good other than the occasional nap it like to take though.  I would have given it 5 stars before this happened.

Title: Spend a little more on a different radio.
Review: This radio lasted a whole 8 months.  Volume control stopped working and unit would shut down and restart if you try to adjust the volume.  It's a bare bones radio, but disappointed because of the $165 price tag.  Haven't checked into warranty yet, but I don't have time to hassle with that.  Just going with another brand and getting a new one.

Title: This is only shampoo & no conditioner; fragrance is SUPER INTENSE Review: This is just shampoo and no conditioner. It is supposed to be a moisturizing shampoo but I found it to be super cleansing and I had to use my own conditioner after washing with this. Also, the fragrance is SUPER INTENSE. I love fragrance but the aroma is just okay but very strong and I do not care for that. It lathers extremely well, cleanses well, and leaves my hair feeling squeaky clean. I have short to medium fine curly hair and it did not weigh down my curls. Had the fragrance been better and the product was what it claimed to be (shampoo and conditioner), this would have gotten 5 stars.

The current price of $16 ($20 minus 20%) for a 10.1 fluid ounce bottle is on the high side of competitively priced.

Title: Handy, well made, perfect mirror with light
Review: This is a great 5 inch mirror that lights up. Perfect for keeping in my purse and using when I am out and about (doing makeup touch ups). Also great for travel as it fits almost flat and is perfect for when you need a mirror. Case is sturdy and durable and no need to fear of the mirror cracking/breaking if dropped. This would make a great stocking stuffer during the holidays for the woman/girl you love in your life.

Title: Five Stars
Review: So cute :0)

Title: Poor product.
Review: Impossible to open the bobbie pins as they twist as soon as you attempt it. Returned for refund.

Title: I can't say I am pleased with this router
Review: I can't say I am pleased with this router. It does not handle multiple devices as well as my old 5 year old apple router. I need to restart both modem and this router frequently. Perhaps I got a dud (reviews suggest this happens). It also does not handle interference from other items in the house using electrical current--when my AC kicks on, this router bogs down immediately. When I get a chance, I'll buy a 50' ethernet cord and extension cord and move this router around the house to try and find a better location. But, I should'nt have to do that w a router that costs upwards of $150...

Title: It works
Review: This thing Actually Works!!! It takes time to learn at what angle to stamp it but otherwise it works as stated. For more longevity and to resist smudging I apply powder to my eye area.

Title: nighttime bath
Review: I am always looking for a good bath additive for night time... this one is nice.. but probably not my favorite - the scent is too light for me.  Everyone likes something different and I consider that a personal choice so I don't add or take away rating for that. I don't like bubbles so I add it after my bath is run.  I always update with any issues.

Title: Awful. Fit poorly - interfered with the opening and ...
Review: Awful.  Fit poorly - interfered with the opening and closing of the MacBook.  Adds bulk and awkwardness.  Had to abandon the bottom half all together.  Even then, my MacBook would no longer fit in its case.  Also, while enclosed in this ridiculous thing, the Mac couldn't close!  It's outrageous and impossible to reassemble to even return!  STAY AWAY!

Title: PERFECT LITTLE GIRL'S SHRUG
Review: I bought this for my almost 6 year old granddaughter & it is ADORABLE!  She looks cute in it and it goes with all her pretty dresses.

Title: Lenses were loose and were difficult to keep in frames ...
Review: Lenses were loose and were difficult to keep in frames. In all fairness, the frames had previous prescription lenses which were thicker.

Title: Great hair color
Review: Great color and great product for an 80 year old

Title: No comfort
Review: I'm sorry but these are very uncomfortable.  The toes are rubber which make them look like kid shoes. Absolutely NO support and cheap looking.

Title: Dream lotion
Review: Out out out time to order more this lotion helped me relax after a shower and ready for a little light reading and off to bed.

Title: Cheap looking
Review: Don't fit well or present itself well. Cheap synthetic material.  No quality

Title: Perfect
Review: These were just what we needed for my son's Spring concert at school. Fit and look great

Title: Short Cable
Review: Cord isn’t long enough to reach the outlet from a side table.

Title: Attractive swimdress but skirt is irregularly cut & unhemmed; static cling is awful
Review: This swimdress is very colorful, flattering, and attractive. It goes on easily and covers any problem areas. The bra pads are not too thick. My main disappointment stems from the skirt.  The skirt is irregularly cut as if someone just arbitarily cut out a flap of material to hang down around the waist. Also, it is not hemmed and has a few strings hanging. In addition, the static cling in the skirt area is awful. It just clings to the legs.  If they hemmed the skirt, this would be an almost perfect swimdress. However, I am disappointed that an otherwise perfect garment is slightly ruined by this imperfect detail and extreme static cling.

Title: best i've found
Review: I wish I could find this locally, but so far must order it online.  It is nice that it is not just "white" and blends in with your hair.  I highlight my hair about every 2 months... I find that this dry shampoo really extends that time as it sort of blends the roots!  A bonus I wasn't expecting!

Title: Rose Gold
Review: These are pretty!

Title: Precut Mat Frames
Review: The Pacon precut mat frames are good for quick matting of elementary school students' artwork. The mats are not of the best quality, but do put a finishing touch to student artwork you may want to display.

Title: Boots off other wifi devices Review: It's fine for what it does but I was severely disappointed by a few factors, largely originating with the fact that ”direct connect” does *not*
exist with this model! It only connects through wifi with occasional shakes and pauses in buffering (annoying!), plus it BOOTS OFF ANY OTHER CONNECTIONS TO WIFI! Really? Like these days no one uses wifi for more than one device at a time?! That's bad enough, but if it's going to hog the connection, it could at least do it without the drag in buffering. I'm so disgusted. Returned!

Title: computer carry bag Review: I actually was thinking this bag was smaller... had planned on using it to carry my various tablets, kindles.. I have 3 separate devices. But it's a big too large. I will have to re think my useage... it is a neoprin or like material... spongy. And it has a very, very strong odor if you are sensitive to that. I am going to air it in the sunshine for a few days and hopefully that helps. It was bagged in a cellophane bag which would keep the odor all trapped in. The sun should help. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE: 9/17/2018.... *MEH* That odor is just not clearing up... I really didn't think it was going to be a big deal... but it is SO strong. A heavy petroleum/rubber odor that sometimes these neoprene material items can have. At this point I will probably just donate it.. :(

Title: For mild winters only; comfortable; soft; but over 100% too pricey
Review: These mittens are true to size and just slightly snug on me as I usually take a large. They are comfortable and are made of felt-type material with some faux fur around collar and fake leather in the palm area. The felt material is extremely thin even though it is double-lined. After having tried these, I cannot recommend them at the current price of $50. In my opinion, these are not worth more than $20. Also, since they are so thin, they are good for mild winters and not for super cold temperatures.

Title: Dyafin natural faux lashes
Review: I like these because they are longer toward the outer eye, shorter to the inner eye.  And they are not just one long band of lashes... they are spread out a bit - not clumpy - but it makes them easier to see.  Gives you body and length.  I will buy them again for every day use.  They aren't for real drama, but I don't do that every day.  :)  I wish there  more than 4 pairs for the price.

Title: Slipper
Review: Runs small and not as comfortable and soft as I thought it would be.

Title: Ok cleansing bar with great ingredients
Review: I use a lot of Dead Sea products in my daily regimen. When I saw this, I was really excited to try it. After using it exclusively in my shower daily for the past 3 weeks, I can honestly say that I  am not thrilled. First, it's a small bar and I am just about finished with it. Second, I don't feel that clean or refreshed after using it. I am thinking that maybe it's not meant to be a true 'soap' product, but I do like when I come out of the shower feeling clean and this bar is just leaving me feeling blah. I am still rating this as 4 stars as I do like the ingredients and feel it may work for others.

Title: Not large enough to fit over bigger shoes
Review: I bought the largest size they had which supposedly would fit a boot up to a size 13 1/2. I couldn’t even get my hiking boot halfway into it even my tennis shoes would not fit. I believe their idea of shoe size doesn’t conform to American sizes. If you wear a size 10 shoe, or smaller, get the extra large one and your shoe might fit inside it. don’t count on getting any kind of high top shoe into it. You’ll just have to use your own judgment and try them and if they don’t work, you can always return them. I have yet to find anything on the market that will fit over my size 13 hiking boots. I’m sure they’ll work fine for people with smaller feet if they buy the largest one.

Title: It smells bad and didn't work for me at all
Review: It smells bad.  I can't describe the smell almost like the smell  of a wet dog.  Who wants that under their nose?  If they can get rid of the bad smell, I would probably rate it higher.  Although it smells bad, I bit the bullet and left it on to see if it would plump my lips.  It did not. I put it on half my lips, top and bottom and on the other side, I put regular lip gloss.  It didn't plump my lips at all.  No difference, not even 10 or 15 minutes later.  No tingle, no burn, didn't feel it at all.  I do not recommend this product.  Either I received a bad batch or it just doesn't work.

Title: sparkly leather fitbit 3 band Review: This band is surprisingly comfort... maybe because it is much narrower than the black rubber one that comes with your fitbit 3. There are plenty of holes for easy adjustment. It is black leather and sparkly - the sparkly doesn't rub off. I've taken to wearing it most of the time. The ends snap on very securely. I actually purchased two of these... one for me, one for my mom. She likes it too. It will probably last longer than my fitbit 3. Having said that.. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful and I hope my review and pic was helpful to you!
UPDATE: 9/7/2019.... After wearing this band for several months... I have to say that the extra long length of the band is kind of annoying... it's just too long. I have an average wrist - so it's not like a have a super small wrist. You could cut the extra length - but that would effect the look for sure. Title: Pretty pullover with a very soft bodice; wrist opening is large; dry cleaning is recommended Review: This shirt gets 3.4 stars from me rounded down to 3 stars. I orderd this in an XL which fits me comfortably and loose enough to look great. The sleeves are nicely designed and the key-hole opening in the back is a nice touch especially for women with shorter hair. I also love how soft the torso area is which feels very sweater like. 

This is made in China of 95% polyester and 5% spandex. Although, it says to wash separately and has a wash label for cool water, the label says dry cleaning is recommended. Had I known this, I would not have ordered this shirt. 

Also, the cinching at the wrist is way too loose. When I fasten the button, it is almost as if it were not buttoned because there is a lot of space between my wrists and the wrist collar. On another note, there are loose threads around those buttons as can be seen in in the attached photo.

Other than the dry cleaning recommendation, loose button threads, and the large space at the wrists, this is a very nice business-like shirt that is comfortable to wear.

Title: Great laptop backpack!
Review: I was searching for a sturdy backpack for school that would allow me to carry my laptop as well as schoolbooks. After reading many of the reviews of this bag, I placed my order and crossed my fingers. I shouldn't have worried; it's a great bag! Solidly built and traveler-friendly with a ton of compartments for every little thing one might need to stow away. While this backpack is slightly larger than your average backpack, it is comfortable to wear trekking cross campus. Also, another aspect of this bag that I love is that it stands upright. I know that sounds kinda crazy, but I find it annoying when your backpack flops over next to your desk and stuff kind of just falls out, or if you need to grab something quickly out of the bag you have to awkwardly curl your body around the side of your chair and then on the way up, smash your head against the desk. So yeah, lazy girl (points to self) loves the convenience of a bag that stands upright for easy grabbage. I plan to travel with this backpack when I fly home this Christmas instead of bringing a bulky tote bag on the plane.

Title: Tiny oval brush that glides & detangles my hair, wet or dry; price is outrageous Review: First of all, I love the two-tone color of this brush. The small size makes it a bit difficult to hold but that is to be expected. Note that I have fine short to medium curly hair. The nylon bristles on this brush are sturdy enough for both fine and thick hair.

I love this brush; however, the current price of $16.99 is insane as brushes like this can be purchased in my local Home Goods for $3.99. This is the only reason I took off two stars. If it were $5.99 or less, I would have rated this 5 stars as I do expect an online price to be higher.

Title: Mirror magnifies well; lights up; but cheaply made Review: I was going to rate this mirror 3 stars until I saw the price of $39.99. There is no way this mirror is worth more than $12 at the absolute most. Nevertheless, it does magnify well on one side. It's great for extracting pimples and tweezing. The other side is just a regular mirror great for putting on makeup. This mirror lights up, but four (4) AAA batteries are needed (NOT INCLUDED). Just twist the cheap housing to expose the battery compartment (see 1st and 2nd photos). If the light flickers, then the batteries are not seated fully into the slot. Twist on the mirror housing and flip the switch for lights.

Overall, this is a very cheaply made mirror with stand. It feels cheap as well. Nevertheless, it does the job it was designed to do but the price of $39.99 is ABSOLUTELY outrageous.

Title: Will keep your feet nice and toasty
Review: Love these.  They will keep your feet plenty warm in the cold weather.

Title: Nice lighter weight beanies

These are great for the cooler weather in Virginia during November and December. I am deducting a star because I like my beanies  little more plush and thick. I don't think these are as warm as some other beanies I have purchased, but they are nice for cooler (not freezing cold) wear and they are economical in a two pack that makes them a great gift for the holidays.

It came as part of a bundle, though, so I'll 3⭐️ the review. * I will say, for someone who might be on their device in darker conditions, or with vision issues that make brilliance and brightness something you're wanting to mute (I have heard individuals with albinism say that too much brilliance from devices hurts their eyes, for example) then this would be a product to consider.

Title: Really cleansed my hair & has a decent lather but smells like laundry detergent from yesteryear Review: This shampoo is lightly creamy but smells like laundry detergent from yesteryear. I do not particularly care for the aroma. It lathers relatively well and is super cleansing. I used a little conditioner after shampooing. My hair came out clean and it did not weigh down my curls. I have short to medium fine curly hair and my curls were still visible.

At $26.69 ($31.40 minus 15%) for 8.4 fluid ounces, this is expensive. Also note that it is supposedly vegan. Unfortunately, I would never order this again both because of the off-putting fragrance and the high price.

Title: Great overnight collagen treatment for your skin!
Review: I love L'Oreal products. This overnight moisturizer is one of my all time favorites! I have been using it nightly now for over a month and my skin looks incredible. This does go on a little thick, but it is absorbed relatively quickly. My skin feels and looks satiny and definitely has minimized the crows feet around my 60 something aging eyes. Highly recommend! Would make a great, reasonably priced, stocking stuff for the holidays, too.

Title: Basic manicure set; it’s difficult to close case & implements are tightly seated Review: This set is a basic set of decent but not great quality. It has nine tools, most of which I use.

I use all the clippers the most and they cut well. The tweezers are aligned and pull chin and eyebrow hairs easily. The scissors are sharp, although I am not crazy about the curled angle of the blade. I do not use the ear pick. However, my biggest complaint is that the case is hard to close because it really is not big enough for all the tools. In addition, it is difficult to remove the tools from their elastic sleeves due to the tight arrangement.

The current price of $16.99 is too expensive for this due to the case. Nevertheless, the tools work relatively well.

Title: Wonderful coconut fragrance but is so drying on my hands as to cause them to itch Review: I love the coconut fragrance of this [[ASIN:B01AVE8FEW Live Clean Coconut Milk Moisturizing Liquid Hand Soap, 17 Fluid Ounce]] (not the product pictured) but my hands feel dry after using this and not moisturized as the product claims. Also, I find that it is difficult to wash off. It's made with 98% plant ingredients that are "Eco Friendly" but based on my results, this is not a hand wash I would purchase mostly because it feels too drying on my hands. In fact, my hands started to itch after using this.

Title: Doesn't focus on what you want Review: I have a hard time with this camera. Maybe I'm just not camera savvy enough, but I seriously just wanted a simple point and shoot that would produce good quality photos. This camera comes with a ridiculous amount of fancy settings which I'm sure a lot of people enjoy.

A big reason we got it was to replace our DSLR which I never really learned how to use and I wanted something simpler. I try to take photos of birds in the back yard and this camera is completely hopeless with that. It will not focus on anything you want it to focus on, especially if there's any movement. It'll focus right next to the bird or behind the bird or under the bird or wherever. So you have to try to zoom in to the bird so the camera focuses on it, then zoom out again and hope that it stays focused on your bird (or whatever).

If you're looking to take photos of wildlife or anything of that sort, I'd find something else. We've switched back to the DSLR for wildlife photos so this camera will sit around to be used once a year with family or something. Hopefully it takes good landscape photos but I haven't seen a setting for that yet.

Title: Love the artistic look & feel of this bar; also cleans and lathers well; pregnant woman precaution Review: This bar of soap comes with a warning of "If under the age of 18 or pregnant, consult your doctor before use." Nevertheless, I absolutely love the look of this bar. It is hard and feels like a piece of molded stone. This is so artistic that it would look great in a home with marble or granite countertops. As for performance, it lathers and cleans well and I noticed no irritation or ill effect from using this. This can be used on the face and body.

The current price of $18.99 is outrageous, however. This and the warning are the main reason I marked this down to 3 stars. Otherwise, I love this soap. The subtle fragrance is nice too.

Title: Has allot of zippers, and is roomy. Not a fan of this faux leather. Review: This purse is a nice color of Turquoise if you like that color.

On the back is another zipper pocket that is roomy, with a zipper pull.
Inside is another pocket zipper , and to large open pockets.
The middle of the inside is roomy.

On the bottom there is Not any little tabs for the purse to sit on.
Strap is long.
The hardware , zipers are in a gold color.

This is faux leather, to me, like a cheesy faux, that smells, although I think that scent will go away after it’s used..
The faux leather has a texture to it..

Title: Long Enough for Most Uses; Not Bulky; Works Good
Review: I like to keep a variety of lengths of Ethernet Cables, as I never know when I might want to relocate something.  Unfortunately most long cables tend to take up a lot of space.  This flat cable is much more compact.  The flat design makes it nice to place up against a wall and there are included mounting clips for a wall or baseboard, that have a small nail that you just hammer in.  I don't know what the maximum length limit is for Ethernet.  I suspect that after a certain length, speed might be impacted, but I didn't see any degradation in speed or performance with this over 65 foot long cable.  I am very satisfied with this and while I don't quite yet need a cable this long, I may some day.  If you don't need the full length, it is very easy to coil up a portion of the cable; easier than round cables.  I like it and would buy this again if I should need another.

Title: Label on front of each FUNCTIONAL file ruins the beauty of this set; NOT GIFTABLE TO ME Review: There are two beautiful files in this set with black sleeves. The files work gently on the nails and can be rinsed off. My big disappointment is that they put the label on each file on the front (that is that gold circular thing). I had trouble removing it. However, the files look terrible now because the glue and flecks of gold are left behind. They should have put the label on the back of the file or on the back of the black sleeves.

The current price of $9.45 ($9.95 minus 5%) is competitively priced for these files but I do not recommend ordering these as a gift until they get rid of that label, which just ruins the beauty of the file. There is nothing more irritating to me than a decorative and gorgeous file with what looks like a price sticker on it even though these files are functional and gentle on my nails.

Title: Doesn't last long Review: I've had this for a year and a half and only used it a handful of times to burn mixed music cds. Half the time when I plug it into my laptop it doesn't even recognize the device. When I can finally get it to show up, when I try to burn a playlist iTunes says "cd player or software not recognized" or something like that even if the cd player shows up in My Computer. Maybe it's an iTunes problem, I don't know (but I think not).
When I finally, FINALLY get the playlist to burn, it pops it out halfway through and says it couldn't do it. So I pop it back in to try again, and iTunes tells me that all the songs are on there. Oooook.....so I go test it out in the car which is where I'll actually be using the cd, and it only burned a few songs. When I try to reuse the same cd--even after formatting it or emptying it, whatever--it refuses to burn onto the same cd. I can't do anything with it. I've had to trash two cds this way which is my limit for waste. This is going in the trash.

The current price of $10.61 for 4 ounces is on the high side of competitively priced based on how thin this lotion is.

Title: Smells like rice rinse water to me; very earthy; no coconut; too astringent on my hair Review: I never heard of shampoo bars until recently. This lathers exceptionally well as have the several others I tried previously. However, it strips my hair of everything and it is not hydrating at all. I am also not crazy about the scent--the aroma is not pretty but not offensive either. It actually smells like the water left behind after I wash my rice in it; it's an earthy scent and not at all like coconut to my senses.

The current price of $13.99 for this bar is also very expensive. I personally prefer liquid shampoo and conditioner; it's a better deal with better results and also leaves my hair more vibrant. However, this has a purpose when travelling as it could be used to wash one's hair and shower at the same time. I know I will be showering with this shampoo bar to get rid of it.

Goes on easily with the applicator and dries relatively fast. I love the sparkle, I used this on top of my normal eye cover and it enhanced the shading and looks great. Title: Face tools are too tiny and hard to be effective; brush cleaners are okay but unnecessary Review: I have really been getting into silicone spatulas/brush sets for applying face creams, bacitracin on a scar, etc. However, this set comes with two silicone face cleaners on a "stick" and two brush cleaners. The face cleaners are way too tiny, hard, and inflexible to be useful. Perhaps they can be used to apply a pimple cream in spots, but other than this, I find them useless.

The two brush cleaners, which look like covers for the face cleaner, are okay. The purpose is to soap up a make-up brush to be cleaned and then rub it on the ribbed side of the silicone cleaner. It provides a good surface against which to agitate brushes to be cleaned. However, I find this unnecessary as using this requires I now clean the silicone cap and I am able to get brushes clean just by rubbing them with soap and water between my hands.

In summary, the brush cleaners are useful but I do not care for them and the face cleaners are useless. I personally hate this set.

Review: Bought my size 46D, runs very small - had side breast exposure, also has a seam that runs through the breast area of the bra that shows (even through a loose black t-shirt. Returned!

Title: I Like the case itself
Review: I Like the case itself. It's durable and stays in place. However, it says it fits the 13' macbook pro, but the one I got in the mail doesn't line up on the top row. The media buttons are wrong. I didn't notice until I was using iTunes and went to mute something and realized the mute button on the silicon cover is in the wrong place...now when I am trying to use my keyboard for music I have to life the keyboard and peek under it to make sure it's the correct button.

Title: Fit is Okay
Review: I really don't like this blouse. The fit is okay, but that's where it ends. There are a couple of things I don't like about it. First, the product description says it's polyester. It's not. The tag on it says 100% cotton. I am a fan of cotton products, but in tops, they wrinkle easily and don't flow as well as polyester or polyester blends. Also, I don't iron very often. I don't buy clothes that require regular ironing. Secondly, I don't like the sleeves. Their length is good. They just start about a quarter down the arm. It makes it look super puffy. I felt like a pirate in this shirt! I'm a plus size woman and I don't need a lot of extra puff! I am giving it 3 stars. I don't feel like I could go lower because it is my taste in shirts is personal to me and others may like it.

Title: 30 years I used this, it is not the real thing.
Review: For years this is and will be favorite. But the one I purchased from Amazon,  does not smell like the old bottles I purchased for years. The bottle is cheap and has a plastic cover, Jessica Mcclintock never had cheap looking bottles. Mine just set here. Now I was looking for buying the real thing, and read all these reviews which I agree with. I just added mine. After 30 years Jessica McClintock would never go cheap.

Title: Disappointed, had to return....
Review: Take your tag and look at the silver cap.  That silver cap turns a very slight bit and then comes off to expose the internal battery.  This is where this tag holder has a major design flaw.  The holder holds the tag but doesn't cover the edges of silver cap.  If the silver cap turns just a little, the cap falls off and it's gone.  I had the cap fall off after being in my jeans pocket for 15 minutes.  What a stupid design....

Title: This product sounds amazing but when I went to to apply the second ...
Review: This product sounds amazing but when I went to to apply the second part (the mascara) my cheeks, and under my eyes were tiny little flakes of the fiber particles. I had to use tweezers to get them off.  I am not impressed.

Review: My shoe lace broke off the third time I wore them. I didn't even pull that hard and it just tore off. Shoe lace is made of cheap product.

Title: great and warm.
Review: This is a great hoodie for someone who does not like wearing a conventional jacket. Rain just falls off and snow rarely sticks to it. Wear it in Ohio with a tee in sub 20 weather. 6'4 xxl is a bit bigger than in used to, but I enjoy the extra room.

Title: Order a Size Up
Review: This ugly sweater is bright and vibrant. The image is printed well and is very clear. I've washed it once and there was minimal fading if any at all.  The wording of "The Birthday Boy" isn't very visible when wearing it because it's at the bottom of the sweatshirt and that blouses a little. The sweatshirt itself, is light weight and runs small. I wear a misses large, so I thought a unisex large would be more than roomy enough, but it wasn't. I could get it on, but it was way too tight and then once it was on, I was not able to move freely. It's also shorter than I prefer. I like my sweatshirts to cover more of my back side and I felt that I had to keep pulling this down. Overall, it's okay, but you might have better luck at the local discount chain store.

my hanes 11 from walmart are to big 🤔

Title: Buyer beware!
Review: I received a jacket that does not match the description (it is visually different).  It is also dirty and the zipper doesn't want to work.  Just found a hole in the leather.  Extremely disappointed!

Title: Antennas Direct Micron-R ClearStream Micron Indoor UHF DTV Antenna with Reflector Screen
Review: This product can work.My review is not to knock this product in a negative way but more to warn folks that if you do not live near the city (or where the TV towers are) then buy at your own risk.  I was really looking forward to cancelling my Comcast subscription so I purchased this antenna in lieu of a Comcast payment each month. I purchased the 35 mile radius as I live 25 miles from downtown Seattle. After installation and setup I received only 1 channel.  I have to admit the clarity of that one channel was fantastic however I do not speak Spanish so it was a let down. I believe this product works but not if you are on the outskirts of town. I would suggest only buying this if you live 20 miles or less away from city towers. Or if you live up on a hill that faces the city. Just my opinion for us more rural folks. I can tell (from the one channel I did get) that if I lived closer to the city this antenna would simply do the trick.  Hope this helps.

Title: NO!!!!
Review: SAVE YOURSELF! This vile piece of junk lasted 3-ish weeks.

Title: runs small
Review: Nice item but they run so small in sizing that they are too tight. I gave them to my daughter.

Title: This has an odd design flaw
Review: Looks and feels very nice in the hand. Seems of decent quality, but the Kindle is held in with elastic which will eventually lose elasticity. The flaw I mention is the clasp: when there is no Kindle in it, an invisible magnetic clasp (as in embedded inside the product) holds it closed, making the front "stick" to the back. However, when the Kindle is in it, this clasp does nothing, and the unit does not stay closed. Not sure how wise it is to have a magnet in such close proximity to the Kindle either, but that is another story. Glad I got this for 50% off on a promo. Was a gift. So far so good.

Title: Beautiful earrings, well made and lightweight
Review: These are super cute earrings. I wasn't sure what to expect when I ordered them, but I really love them. They are a great size (larger than I thought they would be), lightweight for the size (no pulling on the ears), and look great on. I wore them last Saturday night and got a load of comments. They look almost like something from the Caribbean and are great for summer time wear. They looked beautiful with an off-white top I had on with a great pop of color. Highly recommend!

Title: Heavy but good quality
Review: I purchased this to go on top of my monopod but when it came I was surprised at how heavy it was.  I liked how it worked, and it is a quality product but it was about twice as heavy as the monopod so I ordered a simpler ball head.  I kept this one because it is a good quality product but if you are looking at this product, just know it is heavy.

Review: The smell, scent of this product is cheap and overpowering. Totally disappointed given brand name. Will never buy this again. Conditioner does give softness, but leaves an obvious film. Not great for sensitive scalps. Itchiness and almost greasy within a day.

Title: Great laser hair removal!
Review: Super easy to use laser hair removal. I love the cooling device, makes the device relatively painless. I used this on my legs for almost two months now and the hair is basically gone. I am usually helpless when it comes to figuring stuff like this out, but I found this device super easy to figure out and use. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a laser hair removal device. A tad pricey, but totally worth it.

It was too strong for me but I used it anyway. It went on thin so I used 3 coats. It dries very fast and has a great shine. That was yesterday. Today there arent many chips at the tips of my nails. I did my dishes and looked at my nails...most of the shine is gone but the polish didnt peel away.. Its an ok polish if you dont mind that smell.

I have super dry legs and feet (blame the Florida sun) and this body butter is great. My legs feel soft and smooth after using this for the past two weeks. I even rub my hands and arms after I apply to my legs so I get the full benefit. This is a great moisturizer and I highly recommend.

Other then that, this is not a bad looking blouse, and it’s lined, No see through.
The blouse does not unbutton , I had to pull this over my head, then try and get it off.

I was thrilled when I saw the jasmine and other light floral scents which I thought would make a discreet soft smelling fragrance. I was totally wrong. I find this to be too strong for me, I like perfumes that are barely there and even when I applied this sparingly it was too strong for my taste. Disappointed to say the least. Maybe it's my skin type or body chemistry, but this didn't work well on me.

Title: Another great Revlon product - a real quality straightening iron!
Review: This is a perfect flat iron for me. I have naturally wavy hair and I need to use a straightener every time I wash it. This Revlon iron is a great size and width and helps me straighten my hair quickly in the morning before leaving for work. Revlon makes quality items overall and this ceramic flat iron is no exception. Heating element heats up quickly and evenly throughout the bed of the iron. No complaints, just good things to say. Kudos!

Title: Heavy Moisturizer
Review: Moisturizer is an important part of my daytime and night time beauty routine. I do like that this is one product that can be used for both occasions. It's a thick cream but it absorbs pretty quickly. It is definitely heavier than what I usually use in the morning and more similar to my night time creams. I have used facial masks like this before, so I knew that it wasn't going to turn into t a peel off mask or harden. It has a soft, light scent. I love that it's a plant based product. I tend to gravitate toward those. Some moisturizers leave my skin red, but this did not. I did however, have issues with acne after using this. I'm almost 50 and I do tend to get a zit every now and then. Usually it's related to hormones and my time of the month. I realize that at my age, I am approaching perimenopause, but these came mid-cycle and were completely unexpected. It is a much heavier cream than I usually use, so that's the only thing I can attribute to this unwanted acne.

Title: Stiff button covers.
Review: The included screen protectors are a bit of a pain to put on. Most screen protector kits include a liquid to help prevent bubbles. This kit did not. Also, the button covers are rather stiff, making it a little tough to turn the screen on and off.

I used this recently when I was on a cruise instead of using my purse all the time. I was able to pack most of what I needed when off ship (including my boarding card for the boat) and I could shop without carting everything around. This is thin and is perfect for both men and women!

Another thing is that I bought this jacket for the rain and the fabric does not seem to be water resistant at all. It is useful overall for mild cold but I would not buy this again.

Title: This is a great idea, but unfortunately I am not getting the ... Review: This is a great idea, but unfortunately I am not getting the expected/advertised quality. I would say it needs some improvement for consistent quality and is not currently worth the $139 price tag

PROS:
1. Easy to pair via bluetooth
2. Low to Hi volume range is great
3. Large buttons - easy to use
4. Music played on my Android HTC phone sounds good thru the device
5. auto-syncs everytime I come home if phone's blue tooth is 'on'

CONS:
1. Only has 1 ring tone (followed instructions, but there is no other ring tone on this device)
2. Outgoing phone calls are not immediately available on the device. There is a significant lag time and if the person on the other end answers in 1 ring, they cannot hear me until the device syncs-up
3. Sound when on a phone call goes in-and-out (not consistent)
4. the Arrows on the devise do not control you Songs
5. there is no way to keep the antenna in the upright position (keeps falling over, laying flat on the counter top)

Just didn't work as a "stain" at all. Won't buy it again.  Now, your personal experience may be different than mine, and I respect that.  Try for yourself if you'd like.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Sizing is very small; this just barely fits my10.2” iPad with case Review: The lion on this padded case is gorgeous. The case is also simple. It just has a central compartment, one zippered compartment on the exterior (also with lion picture on interior as shown in photo), and the ability to use the carry handles or supplied adjustable shoulder strap.

This case just barely fits my 10.2" ipad with its case (see photo w/green case). It will not fit much larger than that. I am personally fine with that but if one is looking to fit something over 11" in this case, I doubt it will  fit.

The current price of $17.99 is competitive. I do wish this was a bit larger than it is and that it would at least fit up to a12.9" iPad Pro with case (see photo with black case).

Title: I use this exclusively now, this is a great soap from Italy!
Review: I need to start out by saying I love all things Italian (I am Irish by heritage but was raised in a predominantly Italian neighborhood in NY). Having been to Italy on vacation 5 times now, I am always looking to buy and bring things home with me as a remembrance. When I saw Amazon was now selling Via Mercato products I was elated! I love the fragrance of this soap. It lathers richly and is gentle on my skin. I must say that after having used it for almost a month now, my skin glows, looks healthier and as softer and smoother to the touch. This is now a staple in my house and I have it in my master as well as guest baths. Great product, wouldn't use anything else now.

The streaming video options were appealing when I bought this unit, but honestly this feature has never worked from day one locking up or buffering so often it's impossible to watch anything.

This is the first truely awful piece of equipment I have got from Samsung in a long time, but thought it was worth sharing.
For BluRay players .. look elsewhere

Title: Great way to remove facial hair easy and flawlessly!
Review: This is a great facial hair remover. Since I am now using this I figure I am saving $10 a month (at least) on getting my upper lip waxed. This is super easy to use and in seconds the peach fuzz is gone and my skin is smooth. I think this makes a great gift for the woman in your life who seems to have everything. I highly recommend.

Title: weekend like bra.
Review: I purchased 3 different sets of this "type" of bra... I am a 38 DDD, wear 14/16 0x/1x.  I was looking for a comfy, weekend like bra... these are really soft... and ALL three sets were exactly the same bra - the only difference 2 or 3 dollars... so if you're going to try them definitely go for the cheapest set... they are literally exactly the same. Just make sure to get the 3 set and not the 2 to get the most bang for you buck. They do have removable pads.  I personally leave them in - wash on delicate, in a lingerie bag and the dry them flat in my dryer closet.  So I don't have an issue with the pads.  They are a pain to take out and put back - but while in they cover "nips" for modesty. There are obviously no underwires so there is little to no support... but I wear battle bras with severe underwires all week.. sometimes you just need a break.. however... I was hoping a little more.  The bottom does roll up as you're wearing them.. BUT the wide straps are super comfortable. These are are in NO WAY "sports" bra - but possibly a yoga bra -  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Earbuds, Stereo, Mic, Remote Control Compatible, (Red) by Wensty
Review: I love the RED color. Decent sound but these earphones do not have silicone tips so they are not lodging in my ear comfortably.

Title: Foamy Lather
Review: This cleanser has a nice, fruity scent. I also detect an almost minty tone to it, too, but I can't figure out what it is. It's a clear, orange cleanser that produces a foamy lather. The quantity of lather isn't too much. It rinses nicely and leaves my skin feeling clean and refreshed. The reason for the 3 stars is that it stings my eyes. I have pretty sensitive eyes. I'm very careful to avoid the eye area when using skincare products. I have tried this multiple times and I'm confident that I did not get any cleanser in my eyes on each of those occasions. I'm assuming one of the ingredients in it is wafting up to my eyes and causing the stinging. It's happened with other products, I just haven't figured out what that ingredient is or if it's only one single ingredient. My skin can be sensitive, too, but I didn't have any troubles with that. It did not cause any redness or dryness.

Title: So many problems that I switched to Apple Watch
Review: FitBit software, subscription model, and overall design functionality has deteriorated. The subscription is over priced for access to basic things they call advanced, like sleeping heart rate. Sleep score appears to be a lure for an expensive subscription trap.  Step and stair counts are inaccurate.  Application screens are boring and minimalist, forcing lots of taps and swipes to see information. The FitBit software development team ignores user feedback, almost all recent reviews are negative due to their recent changes. Watch bluetooth connection is unreliable. Battery life is good as long as no auxiliary apps or features are used. Daily recharging of Apple Watch is better than putting up with the bad experiences provided by FitBit. My FitBit Versa is so bad that I won't even give it or sell it to someone else. I simply tell them to get a better product (Samsung, Garmin, Apple Watch), like I did.

Title: Shower Steamer
Review: I'm more of a shower person than a bath person, so I used to feel almost left out because bath bombs. I think they're wonderful, but I rarely use them. So when I started seeing shower steamers, I was eager to jump on board. I have tried several and some are better than others. This one is just average. The scent is supposed to be pink grapefruit, but I couldn't detect any grapefruit scent to it. There was a floral scent. Once the shower was on, I couldn't even smell that scent. It's possible that the scent from my shampoo and other products over powered the scent from this shower steamer. It was a bit crumbly and powdery when opened. It dissolved very quickly, especially when compared to other shower steamers that I have used. There's a gemstone inside which was fun to receive. Overall I found it under whelming.
