Review: This applicator looks complicated but i wanted to try it aside from the fact its metal i works well would be better plastic.

Title: Runs Very small. Size is way off. Review: These seemed made well, and have a flat pocket on each side. My iphone fits in the pocket.

I received a XL. I wear a size 10, and do not wear a XL. But these are like a Medium.
They run Small.

The material is very Slick, shinny, and I think would snag easy.

Title: Finally a quality moisturizer with everything my skin needs!
Review: This is a really nice moisturizer. Contains everything I need in one jar (hyalauronic acid and vitamins E and C). Creamy, goes on smoothly and is absorbed quickly into the skin. I apply first thing in the morning after showering and I apply my makeup right afterwards. My skin is smooth and glowing all day. Highly recommend this for men and women and for all skin types.

Title: Looking for a deep clean? Kenra's got you!
Review: I am a big fan of Kenra products, so I knew I'd like this one. It really does clarify & give you a nice deep clean. The smell is a little manish, but I use this to clarify. I then use Kenra Luxe shampoo to wash again & then condition with Kenra Luxe conditioner. So I don't have that manish smell to my hair. I only use this once a week, twice if really needed, since it is a clarifying shampoo & those tend to dry the hair out. I highly recommend this product & would definitely buy again!

Title: Decent for the price. Review: For the price this is decent earbuds for the following key positive reasons:
1. Easy to syn to your Bluetooth phone, worked for both Samsung and iPhone.
2. Compact, and easy to,use with phone calls too.
3. Bass is not great but that is due to the small size, otherwise, music, audio books, phone calls were all decent and clear
4. Once synced, experienced no drop offs
5. Not noise cancelling! But did okay on noisy street, not so great on subways
6. Extremely light, and stayed in ears even when I had to run to catch the bus!

To improve:
1.Volume control that Is on one of the bud was hard to locate and press. I had to take them off, press and adjust again.
2. Button to connect to call was also hard to see/locate, grey it?

Title: Good value for your money!
Review: Always wondered if these belts really worked.  Well, this one does.  I have worn it a lot since over the past month and a half and I love it.  I will probably get rid of my other belts.

Title: Perfect
Review: Love it for my hubbies golf!!! Stay away from that sunburn!!!

Title: Really nice hairbrush!
Review: This is a nice hairbrush and my husband absolutely loves it. It fits ergonomically well in his hand and he is able to maneuver over his hair easily. It has great bristles which are not overly rough but do grip the hair, which is wonderful for styling. I love the way it is quality made, too. Highly recommend this brush for men or women!

Title: Works perfectly
Review: As expected, no issues!

Title: Works well bet smells bad
Review: I’ve never used Jamaican Black Castor Oil before, so I wasn’t sure what to expect. However I have a bottle of regular castor oil that I use daily as a body moisturizer after the shower. This Black Castor Oil smells very different than the regular Castor oil. It has a very strong pungent, smokey, smell. It is not something I want to be smelling like. I tried rubbing some on the back of my hand and it felt very hydrating like my regular castor oil and the smell seemed to go away quickly on my skin. The smell is pretty repulsive out of the bottle and I tried to find an email address for this company so I could ask if this is how it’s supposed to smell but couldn’t find an email address anywhere. I don’t feel 100% comfortable using something on my body from a company with no contact info.

Title: Worth the money
Review: They weren’t what I expected they’re more yellow tone than gold tone but they’re still cute!

Title: Nothing wrong with my TV
Review: The reason I give it a 5 is I buy this warranty on everything I had a lap top and Amazon gave me a box and picked it up it was returned fixes and returned in days. This warranty is great and good like Amazon. I would never recommend anything if it was was good or even great.

Title: Great ear buds for my students
Review: I purchased these for my 4th graders.  The kids like the fun colors and they have held up.

Title: Wonderful rash guard and sun protector for the child in your life!
Review: This is a great wetsuit for kids. I have an 8 year old grandson who has been wearing this since I gave it to him about a month ago. It fits him great and is not overly tight. Assists in protecting his delicate young skin with 50 SPF protection and also helps with rash guarding. He is an avid beginning surfer and skimmer and using this suit helps him in many different ways in protecting him. He loved this blue color, too. Highly recommend!

Title: Not what I expected
Review: These were more like a tube top with sleeves..way too short

Title: Decent mesh puff back brush; handle is sufficiently long Review: There are two mesh bath mesh back brushes with cloth loops for hanging.

I love mesh puffs because they lather well and that has become my goto shower "sponge." These puffs with a handle offer the same sudsy experience and the handle is long enough for me to reach all areas of my back when working from both the top and bottom. The airy mesh allows copious suds to be produced in the shower. The only thing I do not like about these brushes is that the mesh is not as soft as some mesh puffs. Other than this they work the same.

Only time will tell if they unravel or not in less than three months. I think 3-6 months is all the use that can be gotten out of back brushes like these if used daily for two showers per day. Also, since the handle is plastic, it tends to break in the shower during use. I already broke two back brushes like these with vigorous scrubbing.

The current price of $14.99 is pricey for this as it comes to $7.50 each. I can get ones like these at my local Walmart for about $4 and the handle on those feels a bit stronger.

Title: I've owned this recorder, the Olympus vn-7200, since 2016.
Review: The price on Amazon says $150 but I don't remember paying that. Maybe I did.  I use this device to record when I do tours and interviews. This year, 2021, I purchased a 32gb digital recorder that transfers data and recharges via USB-C. I transferred the files from the Olympus to the Evida v618 by audio cable and may find a new home for it since getting data off of the recorder is not simplistic.

Title: STOP the Visual Ads!!
Review: STOP STOP STOP!!! The visual ads are just the worst.  It never stops.  If the ads were not there all the time the Alexa Show 8 would be great.

Title: Waste of time and money.
Review: All this did was make the mascara clump.

Title: Shrunk, order up. Review: Nice looking shirt , but shrink, and looks out of shamp!
My husband is slim, and this Large should have fit. Order up.

Title: Good quality.
Review: A little big.  I am 5'2" and 116 lbs.  I length was great but they are cut very generous in the seat, thighs and waist.  Not sloppy or anything bit I will order a 2 instead of a 4 next time.  Good quality.

Title: Great Man's Lotion
Review: This is a perfectly hydrating lotion with a light manly scent. Works great for daily use or weekly if you don't want to use daily. I have been using it for 5 years and it has helped me a ton. Especially in the cold dry winter months.

Title: Does not apply make up like a sponge
Review: Does not apply make up like a sponge, which allows to apply lightly by tapping, With this, you have to ‘rub’ the makeup in - ugh! I threw it away

Title: Cute but…
Review: Shorts inseam is short, shirt looks too big, and hats bill only flips up and looks weird or flips down into my son’s eyes… very weird

Title: Not worth the $$ Review: I bought the red coral version from QVC. American west is a big brand there.
After wearing this almost daily for about a month...I noticed from the under side 1 of the stones lost its dye and had turned white. This was the last American west and Carolyn Pollack I purchased, as it was the 3rd item sold by her that went bad. Her quality of jewelry has gone downhill big time...even though it's beautiful.

Title: Cutest, most comfortable socks!
Review: I absolutely love these socks! Not only are they cute, but they are also comfy & such a great deal. I will be buying more to give as stocking stuffer gifts. I highly recommend these & suggest you get your own ASAP!

Title: Poor connection
Review: Crappy sound quality, poor fit, volume control doesn't work. Low quality item.

Title: I really like this Perfect Hydra lotion!
Review: Contrary to other reviews on here, I really do like the fragrance of this oil. I find it light and youthful (yes, I think it is the olive oil ingredient). Goes on smooth, my 60 year old skin is glowing after using it each morning. Make sure it dries thoroughly before applying any regular makeup. Although, I find just using this with some blush seems to be fine for when I go to work in the morning. I see a definite improvement since using this in the dryness factor of my skin.

Title: Simple, Easy & Gets My Brushes Clean Like New!
Review: I'll admit, I was skeptical...but this little mat sure does work! I usually spend so much time hand washing each brush. With this all I had to do was add a little bit of Ecotools Brush Shampoo & rub the wet brush on the mat in a circular motion...it's that easy. Then rinse & put someplace to dry. (I like to put mine upright in wire basket pencil holders to dry.) You wouldn't believe how clean my brushes got, they look like new!

Title: Great package of shampoo, conditioner and body wash for men!
Review: This is a really nice gift set of toiletry needs for men. My son really liked the shampoo and conditioner, he liked the fragrance and the way it made his hair smell and feel after showering. The body wash was good, too, helping him stay clean throughout the day. No noticeable fragrance afterwards which is nice for him when he uses cologne. A little expensive for the size of these bottles, but it does make a great gift set for holiday giving to the special man in your life.

Title: Another fine quality Gold Toe sock for women!
Review: I love Gold Toe socks and buy them for every member of the family (particularly at Christmas). These crew socks are a great quality multi colored socks. I like to wear them with my jeans and they stay up on my legs (do not roll down) and they are super comfortable to wear. No complaints, only compliments!

Title: High quality and sturdy.
Review: Exactly as advertised.  Worth the money.

Title: Not only for men!
Review: I love this soap! This is a sizable bar, too, so don't look at the price. This will last months in my shower. I love the fragrance and the fact that it has a bit of exfoliating in it as well. I know it says for men but I had to try it since I love mint and eucalyptus. Fragrance is very light (wish it was a little stronger), but it lathers well and makes me feel clean and refreshed after I shower. Highly recommend for men and women.

Title: Four Stars
Review: Love it thank you

Title: Indoor Digital Indoor Antenna
Review: Another piece of junk. Did not work. At all.

Title: Pretty but on the small side
Review: Seems a bit small and thin, but pretty

Title: Every home needs one of these!
Review: I live in a rural area of Florida where most power lines are unfortunately above ground. We quite often lose electric and in a storm sometimes it can be terrifying. This is great transistor radio that I always keep near my bedside so I can turn it on in a moments notice for weather and news updates. Battery powered to me means that I will always have contact with the outside world for updates regardless of whether I have power or not. Sound quality is clear and it picks up all major stations for me. Highly recommend!

Title: Great facial product, needed every day for optimal skin
Review: This is a very light, quickly absorbing, Vitamin C lotion. I live in Florida where the sun totally impacts my skin, and not in a positive way. Using this Revision product first thing in the morning and right before I go to bed, is helping my skin heal and minimize damage. I will say, it is expensive, but I know comparable items in the market today are as expensive and more so. I am in my 60's and am very pleased with the results of using this.

Title: Wonderful that men have their own skin care line!
Review: This is a really nice man's facial wash. It smells great, very manly, and cleans his face thoroughly. Suprisingly, it contains hyaluronic acid, which is kind of unique for a wash product. My husband was a little resistant at first to using something other than his Old Spice body wash, but he really likes this and uses it daily. I just ordered my second bottle of it for him. Highly recommend!

Title: OPI malibu summer collection
Review: I try other brands and always come back to OPI because of the quality and length of wear.  And they always have just the right hue - the perfect, sometimes subtle difference.  Yeah, it's expensive - but when you compare wear and quality of the hues, it seems worth it to me in my personal opinion.

Title: womens santa costume.
Review: I am 5'7"... wear a 14/16 or a 0x/1x... 38DDD.  It is loose... but wanted it to be. I will wear sort of as a tunic... NOT a dress... The white fur is disappointing... it's flat and kinda cheapy looking.  The red is a deep burgundy... nice... and stretchy.  As shown... it's sort of empire waisted.  I guess at this price point I should not have been surprised at the sort of overall cheapness of the look.  It's "ok" in my opinion. It IS just a costume... not a long term item of clothing.  I have not tried to wash it yet.  I will update my review should new info seem useful.

Title: runs small
Review: not very comfortable, too tight

Title: It's Okay
Review: It's okay, but I am not crazy about this leave-in conditioner. I was very concerned that it would leave my hair feeling greasy. I use spray leave-in conditioners daily, but not cream ones. I have coarse, thick hair and conditioner is a necessity. This did not leave my hair looking greasy, but it felt greasy to me. It got better the more I ran my hands through it as the day progressed, but it still felt heavy and just different. It has the consistency of a runny lotion, not thick like most wash-out conditioners. The smell reminds me of perfume. Overall, this just leaves me feeling lukewarm.

Title: Get this for clean, glowing skin!
Review: I love this! It gets my face so much cleaner- and my pores as well. My face is shiny clean and glowing afterwards. Very small- so I will get the larger one. The silicone stays bacteria- free, and it is soft on your skin. The massage vibration helps circulation and gets the blood flowing for glowing skin. I can tell it has gotten rid of dead skin off the surface and in my pores. Love it!!

Title: Great quality
Review: No problems at all. Its great and very easy to adjust

Title: Three Stars
Review: This did not last long the little rubber pad wore of so my phone flys of the stand

Title: Soft and pretty
Review: Super pretty rose color. I love it! It’s soft and fits great

Title: A bit baggy and I'm not sure about the stripes
Review: I didn't think the stripes through on this one. I kind of looks like a prison outfit with the white and gray. The fabric seems a bit cheap and thick. I think is a quality made shirt and will be durable. The bottom waist part of the shirt is very wide, if you have a larger belly this might work very well at concealing it, un-tucked of course. Overall if you like the stripes I think you will like this larger shirt.

Title: Refreshing, great smelling shampoo
Review: This Redken product is pretty cool. First the bottle in comes in is cleverly disguised as a bottle of beer, which makes it a fun gift to give and a wonderful conversation breaker for houseguests. Secondly, the fragrance and minty aroma makes showering fun and you feel refreshed just breathing in the fragrance. Lastly, the menthol in the shampoo is great for scalp stimulation. If I had any complaints at all it's in the size of the bottle (10 ounces) and the price that goes with the size. While I really loved this, I can see where it would get super expensive to keep this in my household with three men using it every day.

Title: Doesn’t really work Review: I don’t like it. It picked up 12 channel but you couldn’t watch bec of buffering.
Don’t waste your money!!!

Title: RCA Ant122F Indoor Antenna
Review: Totally, absolutely worthless. Am I disappointed? Yes, very much so. Did not bring in even one channel.

Title: BUBBLES IN POLISH
Review: WILL NOT USE AGAIN, BUBBLES AND CHIPS. EASILY.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Rather flimsy and thin, sheer fabric

Title: Nasty
Review: This lotion smells like watermelon that has gone bad. There is no coconut scent. It is a good lotion but I can't stand the smell

Title: Bad Quality Stay Away
Review: Easy to operate. Worked on AC adapter for a very short test period.  After sitting for a year, plugged in again and now when on AC the unit goes on and off.  Can charge battery and run off it but does not last very long.  Super poor quality.  Stay away.

Title: Broke immediately
Review: Looked pretty

Title: Not my style Review: Suit is too big but nice bathing suit. Just not my style.

Returned

Title: Love the pump container but the scentless lotion is just average – 2.5 stars Review: This lotion comes in a pump bottle. All I had to do was remove the tab and pump out the desired amount. I do love the dispensing mechanism but the lotion itself is scentless and of medium consistency. It absorbs quickly and moisturizes okay but not deeply. However, there is nothing specifically spectacular about this lotion. I personally would not order it again because it does not wow me.

The current price is not listed for this. However, they priced their 3.2 fluid ounce tube of lightweight moisturizer at $32 that I cannot even fathom what insane price they will charge for this 4.9 fluid ounce heavier moisturizer.

Title: Adequate But Not Stellar
Review: I have these speakers attached to my computer so that I can listen to music while I work.  They are compact and light weight, but the sound they put out is just average.

Title: Nice
Review: Nice basic necklace. Wish the lobster claw clasp was a little bit bigger, but other than that I'm satisfied.

Title: Ok
Review: The color was more red than burgundy like the picture showed, material is a bit thinner than expected. It feels slightly less quality than Target. The fit isn’t as flattering as I hoped, but it still works for a basic summer dress.

Title: organic aloe gel
Review: Organic aloe gel.  Smells good, feels good and doesn't make me itch or other to my sensitive skin.  Slides on. Not sticky.  LIke it.

Title: didn't work.
Review: Total dud.  I returned them right away

Title: I like the case
Review: I like it. Giving it 3 stars because of the cheap clip. It broke after 1 day's use.

Title: Yech!
Review: These are more like XS not XXL!!! Horrible!

Title: I have a broken hand and all I got was this lousy keyboard.
Review: The keyboard works and the mouse ball works but the only mouse button that works is the right click.

Title: Intense menthol fragrance but still does not overpower my scented soaps - 2.5 stars
Review: There are eight(8) methol-smelling shower steamers this size of a kid's bath bomb in this package. The instructions say to put it in a direct stream to activate the steamer and then outside the stream to last the entire shower. Mine lasted for two showers. However, the fragrance is only detectable if I am not actually washing. I have lots of scented soaps and shampoos and I could not smell this steamer at all until I finished my shower and was rinsing. To me this is not worth it. I am also not crazy about the menthol aroma.  At the current price of $13.99 ($19.99 minus $6) this comes to $1.75 per "steamer tablet."

Title: Nice But
Review: Nice band but it keeps falling out of fitbit luxe. Very loose fit to fitbit.

Title: Pretty but has a hole.
Review: Very pretty. It is sheer so you have to wear something underneath. Disappointed mine arrived with a hole in the skirt part

Title: Love the bath sponges; back brush is good too but would have liked a longer handle Review: I love these netted bath "sponges" and the back brush. These types result in a lot of suds, which is my favorite thing about these. My only disappointment is that the back brush handle is short. I would have liked it about two to three inches longer.

The current price of $10.79 ($11.99 minus  10%) is priced about right for this ensemble.

UPDATE 5/17/2021 - I had to throw the back brush out because the loofah really loosened quickly. As a result, I lowered my ranking to 3 stars. This only lasted about one month when I expect to get six months out of these back brushes.

Title: Bad standby life
Review: These batteries during use have a good life. Standby life is poor. They discharge in 7/10 days of standby. For a recreational photographer this limiting.

Title: Don't waste your money
Review: Already had one go bad on me after three weeks of use. It no longer fast charges and it takes forever for anything to finish. I just can't seem to find a cable that will hold up.

Title: Makes my hair look like a greasy mess without much hol Review: I ordered their [[ASIN:B07FWY38SD Decorum Reform Clear Edge Control]] product, which I love. I thought I would love this as well and I do not.

This is a very thick cream as can be seen from the photo. I tried warming it between my hands but it barely spreads. I have fine short to medium curly hair and after using this it left my hair a greasy mess without much hold. In fact, it is more like a wet, damp, minty smelling barely there hold. I guess the greasy look is the alleged shine. This reminds of something "The Fonz" would wear but it is definitely not for me.

Title: Fashionable
Review: My daughter loved these for her Birthday

Title: makeup wedges
Review: These are functional makeup wedges... I just "missed" the part that there are ONLY 16 in this bag... Yikes. I "assumed" I was getting 100.  Whoops. Just to be clear... you are getting SIXTEEN wedges...... for about $3.50.

Title: I am not crazy about the fragrance of the lotion but I love it in the body wash; $$$ Review: At the current price of $9 this is a pricey duo. These are 1.69 ounce bottles of both lotion and body/hand wash.

This moisturizer is lightweight and lightly hydrating; however, I do not like the smell. It is a strong and artificial smelling lemon/lime scent. However, the body/hand wash smells better to me and I like it very much. It lathers and cleans well.

Unfortunately, there is hardly any product in this set. The body wash will only last me about three showers but the lotion (since I use it for my hands only) will last me longer.

UPDATE - I'm lowering my rating from 3 to 2 stars. The body wash lasted me two showers only. Also, the hand cream is impossible to get out of the container. They should have used a squeeze tube for this.

Title: Nice blush to use on skin without makeup
Review: My new favorite makeup accessory. This is a great light blush that I use (to look more natural) on my own skin (without a foundation). Goes on easily, stays present for hours. Does leave your skin looking fresh and clean. Highly recommend for those times when you don't need a foundation and just want a nice healthy glow to your skin.

Title: Nice and warm and comfortable!
Review: These socks are perfect for what I have been looking for. I live in north Florida where winters still get a bit cold (it actually was in the low 40's this morning. I was looking for a good pair of warm socks that I could use when walking the dog. These are perfect. They are super warm and are super comfortable for when I take my long walks. They do not slip down in my sneakers and stay up on my feet. I love the pink and black color, too. These would make a great holiday gift as well. Highly recommend.

Title: Material is a loose weave can see threw this! Review: This is a disappointment!
Although cute, and I like the length of the sleeves.

The material is a loose weave and you can see
Threw it! It does not show up in the pictures.
Where does it say it’s a beach cover-up, or wear a Bralette or a little top
Under this!?

I usually wear a Medium, This I ordered in Large, but I should have
Ordered a medium. It’s a hangy stretchy type of top.
I’m 5’2, 130 lbs, not big busted.
Also this is Not flattering.

Title: Defective.  Don’t be tempted.
Review: Have had two clogg so far.  Cheap garbage.  Do not buy!!

Title: I thought this was the headphones
Review: I bought this thinking it was kids headphones and it’s just stickers for headphones. I returned them.

Title: Sad to see the online color is NOT the color you receive.
Review: Color is NOT as indicated as online photo displays. It is a much paler version. Much more difficult to wear against pale skin. The contrast in color from what should have shipped would have been great on me, blonde and blue eyed.

Title: Didn’t Last Review: I didn’t even realize I didn’t have a wireless adapter for a couple years! Always had wired! This had worked great while dropping the cord. I haven’t been able to tell the difference in speeds!

Update: I’ve had this for a month and a half and it won’t stay connected to the internet. I had to resort back to using an Ethernet cord. Waste of money!

Title: Four Stars
Review: smells great, feels clean and sudsy.

Title: Runs Small
Review: I have several Columbia fleece jackets, spring and winter coat as well.  Been buying Columbia for years.  This purchase was disappointing.  Everything else I have (so far) from Colombia is a true 2X but not this fleece jacket I purchased recently.  It's a little tight in the chest and very tight in the waist - NOT AT ALL like the others that I own.  Did Columbia change where and who is now producing their products?  Even if they are, the sizing shouldn't be this off.  It's uncomfortable to wear and I haven't even washed it yet.  Very disappointing.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Didn't work as well as the orginal ones that came with my LG.

Title: Very comfy
Review: Nice size

Title: Cosplayers: do NOT use! Review: I bought this set for two cosplays as the colors matched what I needed. The description said it would stay in place all day.

What a joke.

Not only did it not stay in place, but it smeared badly. Then when I tired to take it off, it would. Not. Come. Off. I had to go to cosplay repair and it took multiple people helping me and a handful of wipes to remove most of the lipstick. All of my foundation came with it because it had smeared to my cheeks and chin and nose. My face and lips were raw and pink.

This stuff is awful. Do not buy. Do not use.

Title: Cute shoe, not for narrow feet
Review: Great walking around the apartment, but once outside and walking, stepped right out of the sandal. Straps don't stay out if you have a narrow heel.

Title: Attractive, perfect pajamas!
Review: Love, love, love these pajamas. They fit me perfectly and are loose enough that they don't creep up on my during the night or twist and turn when I do. They are made very well and are really soft. I have washed them at least three times now and they still look at fit great. They are actually kind of cute to wear as loungewear, wore them over the holidays in the morning when I was preparing breakfast for the grandkids. Highly recommend these!

Title: What a Joke
Review: This lotion smells horrible. It is very watery. Don't waste your money.

Title: Good looking, good functionality
Review: Very simple design, good quality and support for a laptop.

Title: dot owl stand
Review: I have been watching for a really great dot holder... this is pretty good.  It's dark... and bigger than I thought.  It stands about 6" or so tall (just eyeballing it) and he's pretty chubby.... probably 5 or 6" across... so take that into consideration as to where you'll put him.  I did have dot in a bowl... so this an improvement.  :)  Dot sits all the way down into the owl.. you can see her if you are looking down (obviously) but when I am sitting in the living room where this dot is... the owl is above the area you can see into - it.  There is a slot in top/back for you to stick the charger into.  All in all, Mr. Hooty Who is pretty cool.

Title: The recording capability is fair - hard to program on ...
Review: The recording capability is fair - hard to program on a 24 hour day clock - but the camera picture is clear.

Title: duracell 21/23 batteries
Review: These are great for those little things that take odd batteries.  I always keeps a huge stock of AAA, AA, C and Ds - but there are always those few things that need this size.  Oh, and the coin batteries.  In any case, these are great and hard to find locally for me.

Title: Lightly moisturizing but the fragrance combination has a sour smell to me
Review: This is a summer moisturizer as it is a light cream. It absorbed rapidly but only lightly moisturized my hands. I was going to use this on my body but I can't get over the smell. At first it reminded me of sour milk but now it is just a sour smell. The mixture of lavender and sage and the other stuff in this just does not go. It is disappointing because it is a nice light summer cream but I just can't stand the scent.

Title: Strong fragrance, but nice product
Review: From my daughter: I can't get past the strong fragrance. It smells good, but overpowering for me. It smells similar to some burt's bees products I have tried. It goes on easily like a lotion, then dries like clay and can be washed off. It feels nice on skin and left my skin soft. It seems to be a quality product with lots of beneficial ingredients, but I wouldn't purchase in the future due to the strong fragrance.

Title: husband likes
Review: My husband wanted this straight type of razor to closely trim his moustache hair under his nose.  He reports that the blades are SUPER sharp (oops) and it would be perfect if it were a bit shorter, so he wouldn't cut his cheek in the process.  But that being said, he still likes it.

Title: Not for me
Review: They are not work pants as described, after you wash them fuzz is everywhere... I wish I could return them but I washed them already... they wrinkle... totally not happy with them :(

Title: Comfy and Cute!
Review: I love these shoes! I have a severe knee problem in my right leg. I was tired of wearing tennis shoes with everything at work. I wore them the first day and they are so comfy and cute. Nice to show off my Pedi again.

Title: Great hair trimmer!
Review: This Schon cordless hair clipper and trimmer is really a nice quality set. Lots of attachments and speeds, I can easily help my husband trim his hair, neck and sideburns. He gets a quality trim comparable to going to a salon (of course his hair is not fancy styled). I love the way this fits in my hand and is very maneuverable, making it easy to go around ears and tighter spaces. I highly recommend this if you are in the market for a good quality clipper/trimmer.

Title: Great quality product
Review: Quality fabric, made very well!!  Perfect fit!!!

Title: Unpleasant Sour Smell
Review: Purchased aloe vera gel for the first time. This gel goes on smooth, dries quickly, leaves no sticky residue, BUT it smells horrible. I noted some other reviews said there was little to no smell. Mine has an obvious, indescribable, unpleasant SOUR smell even after it has dried. Did I get a bad bottle? Expiration date is in 2022.

Title: Ear pad
Review: The ear pad doesn’t stay on.

Title: Can't download amazon movies Review: I love this little tablet! I can't give a full review since I've only had time to get started with it and take a few photos. I love it! It's a great size. After going through start-up, I just had to sign into my google account and everything from my google account is available. It's fast and clear. I'm not used to a table so I have a lot more exploring to do.

UPDATE: I went to purchase some movies from amazon and I can't download them on to this device. Apparently, Asus isn't compatible with amazon movie downloads. It is an android device but not manufactured by android. Therefore, I am dropping it down from 5 stars to 2 stars. Very disappointed in this.

Title: 👍👍👍
Review: 👍👍

Title: A little muddy sounding for the money, weak bluetooth Review: I was a little disappointed with these headphones. Perhaps I got a slightly defective set as the sound is very noticeably better with my [[ASIN:B002SSO06M Sennheiser PXC 310 Compact Noise-Canceling Travel Headphones (Black)]]. There is a bit of buzz in the sound and they seem to distort at moderately high levels.

Also, the blue tooth connectivity seems weaker than my PCX 310's. I get a lot of dropouts and 15 foot range from my laptop. I have found that I only use these patched into my work computer with the included cord. I have not been overly impressed with the bluetooth sound quality on these headphones, but they are pretty sleek and comfortable. The bluetooth set up and quick and easy and I have no troubles getting connected to my laptop. I just have issues when I move away from my laptop.

Corded, the sound is fairly good, but does not live up to the sticker price. For $300 dollars I expect stellar sound quality and I'm not getting that from these.

Title: Good purchase
Review: Works great. Son uses it to hold Beats and Jaybirds. Traveled well and protected items.

Title: I do not like the fragrance or the consistency (lack of) of the shampoo Review: This shampoo arrived well-packaged so that no shampoo leaked out. There's an internal seal and the pump mechanism has to be inserted once the seal is broken. It took many pumps to get the shampoo to dispense which was not typical of their other shampoos I tried.

I normally love the scent of vanilla but I do not care for this version. I also do not like is that this is very watery. It has no consistency to it at all. As a result, I did not get the copious amount of suds I expect from a shampoo. I did feel it cleaned my hair very well. However, I did not detect any "thickening" after my hair dried.

Unfortunately, this does not have the consistency, scent, or suds that I desire in a shampoo but it does clean my hair well.

Title: Alright refurbished headseat.
Review: I don't know much about pilot headsets; but I did my research.  The problem I have with this refurbished set is that there's rubber band holding the foam to the mouthpiece.  Seems rather cheesy.  But look it's a refurbished set, otherwise the set seems okay.  I'll update after some more use.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Poor quality fabric.

Title: Delicate yet strong
Review: I was very surprised how nice these are. I bought 2 to use with a snowflake charm I had bought my granddaughters. I was hoping they weren't too delicate since they are 6 and 4 and sometimes kids of that age can be hard on jewelry, but these seem very sturdy while still looking delicate. I need a chain for myself and will probably but it from this company.

Title: Does not moisturize my hands.
Review: Waste of money. Does not moisturize.

Title: To involved with Google.
Review: Not easy to get the apps you need because Google interferes all the time.

Title: Perfect
Review: ❤

Title: Not worth the price tag
Review: The perfume was not what i expected for the price it wears off fairly quick and not worth the money i paid for it, definalty will not purchace again.

Title: Backs don't fit correctly
Review: They are pretty but the backs don't fit on correctly. Also made my ears hurt after an hour. Get what you pay for.

Title: 1" velcro like rollers
Review: I have short hair and once in a blue moon I like a wavy, slightly curly look - so I use these.  They have 1" barrels on the size I chose and they work perfectly.  If you have thick hair, you'll want more rollers.  I already have about a dozen, so these 24 will be more than enough for my head of hair.

Title: PSA TO ALL CRAVING DIRT: CHECK YOUR IRON LEVELS!!!!!!!
Review: I used to work for Sephora. This definitely smells like fresh soil. We never understood why people actually bought it. Decades later, I found out those with anemia and iron deficiency have cravings to eat or smell dirt. They also get cravings to eat ice. Severe anxiety is another symptom and if you drink a lot of caffeine, you are probably low. Please see a hematologist to get your iron ferritin checked, asap.

Title: Great beauty mask, really works!
Review: I have been using this retinol mask for a few weeks now, twice a week. My skin is softer, and fine lines (particularly around my eyes) have been greatly diminished. This all natural mask goes on smoothly and rinses off easily. I also use retinol at night when I go to bed, so I get the optimal impact of the mask and the serum. I am a 60 year old woman and my skin has never looked better. Highly recommend this for all ages to keep your skin looking its best.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Very cute vest

Title: These are extremely short.
Review: The fabric is very light weight which is what I was looking to find. However, they are much to short.

Title: No
Review: These scarves are of very poor quality. They are see through and have no lining. So while they will cover your head, they will not protect your hair. They did fit my 24 inch faux locs but there are better quality ones out there. Get those!

Title: This is my husband's favorite hair spray
Review: This is my husband's favorite hair spray.  The price was great.

Title: Basic Disposable Razor
Review: These are your basic disposable razor. They do the job. They really only last a couple of days before needing replacement. My husband likes to use disposable ones when he travels so he doesn't have to bother with replacement blades for his everyday razor. I do want to note that these arrived in a padded envelope and 3 of the razors were broken because there was nothing to prevent them from being crushed.

Title: Do not use for essential oils.
Review: Description for product included essential oils and their ability to turn into a spray. Did not function as such, therefore, returning.

Title: Nice casual blouse, goes well with jeans and every day wear
Review: Super cute, reminds me of shirts I used to wear in the 1970's (lol, yes I am that old). It has that hippy look to it. Well made, fits my larger frame perfectly (I am a 38C, 5'7" body), nice length (covers most of the booty). I wish the sleeves were a little longer, but other than that, just perfect. I like the lacy look, too. Highly recommend.

Title: Great facial wash, was a big hit with my 12 year old grandaughter!
Review: I love Garnier products. This Foaming Face Wash was a hit with my tween grandaughter. She loved the foaming factor in this and the easy dispenser. As she is prone to beginning acne, her skin is naturally oily. Without drying out her skin, this Garnier keeps her complexion clear and smooth. I am not sure if it's the product itself or if it's just the fact that she is washing her face more faithfully now but, either way, I am sold on this and have already ordered a second bottle for her. I can highly recommend this for folks with oily to normal skin types.

Title: Exquisite design & craftsmanship for comb, brush, & travel bag but boar bristles rough
Review: This set is absolutely exquisite in design and craftsmanship. I love the light wooden comb and the design on the brush. I also love the green suede bag this comes in. Unfortunately, the boar bristles are really rough and strong. I feel like I'm brushing my hair with a wire pipe brush because of this. It just does not work with my fine hair. If there was more "softness" to the brush, I would have rated this 4 or 5 stars. The $120 price tag is a bit much for this as well.

Title: it's horrible, too dry Review: I purchased the deep forest and vintage plum from the store, it's horrible, too dry. It does not blend well, had to apply multiple layers for the color to show, the brush kind of just push it back and forth, leaving me uneven color. It does not fade or crease, and it does last all day, which is a good thing. But....it looks unnaturally dry on my eyelid.

However, the audacious asphalt and bold gold cream gel colors of this eye shadow does show up better, it's also dry, but because of the light shimmer it does not look as obvious. After I wash it off at night, I noticed the eyeshadow had dried out my eyelid where I applied, it was a little pink and itchy. I used some vanicream lotion on it and was fine the next morning.

Throwing it away..
It's $5ish, very cheap for eyeshadow, so it's unfair to say I expect more out of it. But, I will not purchase it again. I would not recommend this product.

Title: 12" black zipties
Review: These are black, 12" zip ties.  They work just exactly as you expect.  My husband uses zip ties on various projects - handy and useful.  They came in plastic bags (we ordered 2 sets) - do wish they would have come in a canister for storage.

Title: Wow Apple Cider Shampoo
Review: I use dry shampoo on occasion and I like how this particular shampoo does such a good job at cleaning residue and doesn't frizz your hair in the process.  It smells clean - not like vinegar.  This is my second purchase of this shampoo. It lasts a long time as you don't need very much - my hair length is just above my shoulders.

Title: cord tamer stick on clips
Review: Purchased these to tame a few cords... I placed them directly on my baseboard - which would be fine, but my old house has a rounded baseboard... flat have worked better - but even still it's works.  I put a satellite cable and an old school land line phone line in it with room to spare.  The sticky back seems to hold even on the slightly rolled surface and is keeping the cords off the floor so the robo vac doesn't become entangled.  It takes a second or two to figure out the opening, but once that's figured out - it's a breeze to set, press and go.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful and I hope my review is helpful to you.

Title: "New" doesn't mean "New Model Year"
Review: Wasn't paying attention that thought "New" meant that it was the new model year and not an entirely new design.  Glasses were fine, but it wasn't what I was looking for so they went back.  These are much smaller then the originals.

Title: Easy to use and really works!
Review: As I had just been using another device for the past few weeks, I had my sister try this one. She really loved it. She, like me, has rather light hair and sometimes it is difficult to remove since it's so fine. She said this device is super easy to use, maneuvers easily in her hands. She has been using it once a week on her legs and she said all of her hair is currently not growing back. She highly recommends this for all women.

Title: Does not seem warm for snowy weather, not sewed well. Review: I live in California in the Sierra's. We have had a lttle snow, and the nights have been cold.
I do not think this hat is going to be warm enough for the cold snowy weather!
My husband is not heavy, or even light in the hair department on the top of his head. The material in the hat is uncomfortable if your bald. Its a thin poleyester / acrylic. It is not cozy type of hat.
This trapper hat is not sewed good. One of the ear flaps is cut crooked, it is not round at the bottom as the other side is.
The flab buttons do not match up to the bottom or top button of the hat
I will not buy real fur of anytype, but this faux fur does not feel soft or thick to me.

It says this is water and snow proof. Has a snap closure under the chin, that is not tight. You will Not feel its chocking you.
If this is warmer when we get more snow, I will be up-dating my review.
Made in china

Title: Not great
Review: A lot were stuck together. When you pull them apart they tear after being stuck to each other. Useless.

Title: it's long. For laying around house
Review: Love the colors and its long.

Title: Run very small. Review: I can only give these Teva 2 star.
These run Very Small..My Granddaughter wears a size 8 to 9..The 9 was really small..
I wear a different Teva, size 6, and it is the same size as my other sandals and shoes. So what is with these Teva's??

The other reason for the two star is, it shows these shoes for 19.99, but there is Not one pair they sell for that price!

Title: Nice quality hairbrush for the money
Review: This is a really nice, well made hair brush. Nice thick sturdy bristles, quality wood handle. Fits well in my hand (ergonomic) and allows me to blow dry my hair quickly and easily. It is a nice round size, too at 2.3 inches (not too wide or too narrow) so it fits a lot of my hair in the same styling motion.  Highly recommend this for anyone in the market for a new hairbrush.

Title: power strip
Review: When you need a power strip it should have surge protector, this fits the bill.  It's not the super expensive ones, and it's only 6 outlets,  but it works for low end equipment. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Ordered these for my husband.  He loves them!
Review: My husband had a pair of these Crocs and loved them.  I just ordered another pair for Christmas.

Title: The sweatshirt was pretty thin as far as material
Review: The sweatshirt was pretty thin as far as material, and I expected better quality when it came to the actual "embroidery". Cheaply done press on lettering and I'm afraid to wash it.

Title: Five Stars
Review: I love using this so much, it's good for anything and totally worth the money spent on it.

Title: A taste of the Caribbean in your shower!
Review: I absolutely love this body scrub. When I use it in the shower the light coffee flavor wakes me up and the coconut makes me feel like I am in the islands! It lathers up easily and leaves me feeling refreshed and clean all day and my skin feels moisturized. I think using the word 'scrub' in the title may be a little misleading as it is not truly a scrub. It does have a few crystals that I can feel, but I would not exactly call this an exfoliating experience. However, the fragrance and the cleansing factor rate this as a 5 star. Highly recommend for men and women!

Title: Yes!!!
Review: I have not bought myself a quality pair of jeans in a very long time. These fit great! Lots of stretch, super soft. I am thrilled 😁

Title: Assemble, add water, shake & 4 ounces turns into 16 ounces of soap per refill; lather not great Review: In an over packaged box is one plastic bottle and two tiny four ounces of concentrated soap. I just twisted the soap bottle onto the empty bottle, squeezed out the liquid, added 12 ounces of water to the 16 ounce fill line, shook the bottle, and used it.

The fragrance of the soap is perfumy, strong, and lovely to my senses. The lather, however, is lackluster.

I like the idea of reducing waste but the packaging it comes in is very wasteful. Also, the end product is not as good as their regular Dove soap. After having tried this, I am disappointed in the results. I like a lot of lather and this does not deliver.

Title: Only plays Region 1 discs Review: Works well. I just wish it could play foreign discs. It's coded to only play movies from Region 1 (USA), so I'm out 30 bucks since it won't play movies from Region 4 (I didn't know about all this "Region" crap until now). From what I've read online, cheaper dvd players make them able to play ALL regions, so why SONY had to go and limit theirs is pretty annoying. I also read that even if you get your dvd player to play a region 4 disc, a sony tv most likely won't play it for you. Wonderful.

Thanks Sony, gonna keep this in mind next time I'm in the market for any dvd players and tv's.

Title: Conditioner good.  Bottle not so great.
Review: The conditioner works good and is a great size for taking with you when you travel.  The only issues is it is a pain to get it out of the bottle.

Title: USB 3 ft charging cables
Review: I purchased these new cords along with an 8 port USB charging station.  They are lightening fast charging. And they come with leather like material snap cord keepers.  This keeps your cords nice and tidy with not in use or when you have extra length. They are about 3ft long as mentioned.  I find the cloth covered cords seem to last longer being coiled and uncoiled - but that is my personal opinion.  They are white with black dashes on the cord, as pictured. The tips are gold colored.  So far, so good.  However, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  And I hope this info was useful to you in some way.

Title: Black screen of death after < 2 months
Review: This TV was great for about 2 months, and then the screen went black and would not turn back on. The only reason this LG gets 2 stars instead of 1 is that they had fast customer support, and were willing to send out a technician (albeit at inconvenient hours). So now they fix it, and I wait for the same problem to happen again after warranty is up. Seriously disappointed, and do not recommend.

Title: Nice at first
Review: As always apple products are very expensiveThe fit started out good. The color started out good. After a short period of normal to light use the leather deteriorated. This is not the sturdy luxurious leather case of previous generations. The leather and finish are too thin and delicate. This is NOT a durable case nor does it provide good protection of screen edges.

Title: sports bra
Review: it's made well and arrived promptly. however it comes up much higher in the neckline than what I purchased at the store. same brand, same size. it's about 2" higher in the front.

Title: Pants are low quality.
Review: Quality of the pants are horrible. It was for a 3 years old kid.

Title: Good product
Review: Worked perfectly.

Title: works, great price
Review: It's cheap, small and easy to use.  I really like that it "auto" mutes after about 4 beeps.  Handy.  Keeps your eyes on the road.  Honestly, I use it as "reminder" to myself to watch my lead foot tendency.  The lights are a bit hard to see even on the brightest  "light" option...(lost a star for that) But, you can definitely hear it.  I honestly don't need to "see" what it is that is tracking.  It is pretty compact, but as I have seen, effective.  It has a cig lighter plug in and fits firmly in it. I have owned several radar detectors over the years, some hundreds and hundreds of dollars and the ones I hold on to are the ones that cost a couple of 20's. Surprisingly, or maybe not so, the cheaper ones seem to last a LOT longer too.  The expensive ones didn't "detect" any more effectively and offered things I would never and did never use.  Just personal choice/observation, everyone chooses for themselves. I will update with any wear or other issues.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Metallic fibers not as comfortable as I would have liked

Title: Perfect Fit
Review: Bought these for my son. He loves them

Title: Dense soap bar; nice fragrance; yellow color rinses off; I don’t believe slimming claims; pricey Review: This is a small bar of soap. The soap is dense and the yellow color comes off during use, which I do not like--meaning it doesn't wash clear. What I also do not like is that there are what look like wire hairs in the soap. However, I really love the fragrance. The soap lathers moderately and cleans well too but the yellow color that comes off is a turnoff to me. I do not believe the slimming or lymphatic/detoxification claims---that is just ridiculous to me.

The ingredients are ginger extract, olive oil, shea butter, glycerin, coconut oil, wormwood, and etc. Who knows what "etc." is.

The current price of $9.99 is expensive for this small bar. After having tried it I would never order it again as the fragrance is pretty much the only thing I like about the bar.

Title: Three Stars
Review: stretch during wear is a bit more than I'd like

Title: Lots of complements
Review: I get lots of compliments. I do not use fabric softener but the dress already has wear and tear on the fabric.

Title: Lightweight brush good for blow drying & detangling but not durable
Review: This brush just glides through my short to medium fine curly hair. It is lightweight and the handle is ergonomically designed; it's easy to hold due to the silicone grip. The brush itself, however, does not feel or look durable. A few of the bristles were bent out of shape just in the package. With daily use this will not last more than a few months, in  my opinion. At the current price of $12.99, I feel this is expensive since I do not consider this high quality. However, as a brush, it does the job it is supposed to do.

Title: Great panties
Review: They fit so well I don’t remember I’m wearing them

Title: A liitle too big, thin material, not sewed good! Review: I like the shorter leggings I can wear them all year.

The waist fit good, and I like the look of the red waist band, and red on the side.
I wear a 8 or 10 in skinny jeans, and the material of these leggings seem thin, and a bit too big!
But this was a strange fit in the crotch, it just did not look right! I have never had this happen before, but I
Think who ever sewed this didn’t sew it the right way!
My daughter tried them on, who is a little heavier, and taller then me, and she had the same problem in the crotch
As I did !

Title: Five Stars
Review: Love all of them the tins are so simply and neat and the shadows are awesome.

Title: NEEDS DIRECTIONS
Review: I WENT THROUGH A TOUGH TIME WITH THIS.  INSTRUCTIONS WOULD HAVE MADE IT SO MUCH EASIER.  I THOUGHT IT WAS BROKEN.  BUT ALL THAT WAS WRONG IS THAT I HAD TO UNSCREW THE SMALL SCREW FROM THE END OF THE LONG SCREW.  PUT THE SCREW THROUGH THE HOLE AND SCREW THE SMALL PLATE BACK ON.  THAT WAS A GOOD HOUR WASTED TRYING TO FIGURE OUT SUCH A SIMPLE THING.  I HAVEN'T USED IT YET.  I'LL REPOST IF I HAVE ANY PROBLEMS.  I CANCELLED THE INSURANCE BEFORE  FIGURED OUT THE PROBLEM, SO I HOPE NOTHING HAPPENS TO IT OR MY STUFF. LOL

Title: Another home run for Amazon Basics!
Review: I love Amazon Basics products and this body wash is no exception. I find it comparable to Old Spice and my husband and sons are crazy for it. We have been using it in our houses for a month now. It is an amazing body wash with a light scent and makes them feel refreshed long after the shower is over. It cleans great and is now a staple in my house for all the men in my life. I highly recommend for anyone who wants something on par with the named brand products but at a significantly lower cost. Kudos!

Title: Runs extremely small in chest
Review: Didn’t like the shiny weird material & it’s way to long for anyone 5’5 or shorter

Title: Birthday gift
Review: My great nephew loved it.

Title: Comfy!
Review: Love! Super comfy!

Title: Really more outer showing than the pretty inside
Review: I was expecting more of what was shown in the photo, but I believe maybe those are the rough stones, like the ones I received, in a more polished state. Unfortunately, I don't have a tumbler, so the stones I received will remain more raw outer brown than opalesque.

Title: Great socks, durable, fade free after multiple washings!
Review: Perfect socks for the man in your life. Quality made, still looks good after multiple washings, remain pull/snag free given hard wear and cleanings. My son is a school teacher, on his feet all day, and these socks remain up (do not roll down) and retain their color vividly. These are a great value and the sock patterns are a great variety from traditional to fun. Highly recommend.

Title: Smaller and more narrow. I would order one size ... Review: Smaller and more narrow. I would order one size up since they don't have 1/2 sizes.
Not nearly as soft in the footbed as some other Crocs.

Title: Nice
Review: Good cord

Title: Does not work.
Review: I live in northwest Omaha, NE. This antenna doesn’t work here half the time, and the stations are not that distant and are all pretty much in line.

Title: Flimsy
Review: This is a flimsy piece of junk.  I ordered several different jewelry organizers and this was the only bad one.  Of course, all but one of the others were from a US company and made in the US by skilled woodworkers.

Title: Don't buy
Review: Used one time then doesn't work anymore, piece of cheap crap

Title: Echo Dot is garbage! I hate it!
Review: Echo dot is trash. Any variation in wifi and the thing will never work again.  The stupid thing will keep repeating go to app, go to app, go to app.  Got me so angry that I smashed the dot on the ground.  Siri is 100 times better!!!

Title: The mouse works fine but the keyboard is useless other than to log ...
Review: Had to replace my previous Wireless Wave keyboard due to getting a new computer with Windows 8.1, however I can't get it to work with the new computer. The mouse works fine but the keyboard is useless other than to log in.

Title: small power strips
Review: I purchased these because I needed a short power strip that included some USB ports and that didn't look too awful on my bathroom counter.  This works.  The cord is a sort of braided silver/gray - goes great on my white/gray marble counter in my bathroom.  The base is basically white - the plug itself is white - so the photos provided are accurate. It's not huge but just makes it a little easier to have more than one thing plugged in.  I am pretty happy with them at this point, however, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Great customer service
Review: I have had to use my extended warranty with Square Trade for my grandson's ipad three times now.  So worth the money.  Even after the 3'd time I've had to make a claim and they are just as friendly and easy to work with as the first claim.  Never give a kid an electronic device without purchasing the warranty plan from Square Trade.  It is not a matter of whether you will use it or not, but how often you will use it.

Title: Flowy cool for summer, I’m 5’2, 123lbs , 125Lbs size medium. Needs ironing. Review: Up date…After washing this dress acouple of times this needs ironing !
Usually when this happens I can spray with water, put it back in the dryer with a dryer
Sheet again. Put in the dryer for a short time, and it would look
Like it was ironed, but not this dress. The wrinkles would not come up!
Want to mention after washing the sewing on the 4th sewing on the sleeves looks cheesy!

——————
Cute summer dress with acute twist.
The different seams give this dress a different look and I like it
I order the medium in black , although it Was a toss up with the other colors, there more summery looking.
I’m 5’2, 123 to 125 lbs. this could be a little tighter under the bust, it would make this more flattering
For me. The length is about med calf for me. I’m not tall but I have long legs.
This dress is not suppose to fit tight. It’s flowy and will be cool for summer.
Maybe a small Could have fit!!!

Title: I'd give it 3.5 stars but no 1/2 star option. Review: Just got the keyboard
I like the individual letter buttons, but there are some drawbacks.
Chord is shorter by a foot than other keyboards.
If you like they keyboard raised, you need to add something underneath as the built in raise is barely noticeable.
The 4 media keys (back-stop-pause/play-forward) share keys with F9-12 & you need to hit Fn at same time (which is annoying)
The other volume media keys are fine & above number area.
Length & width are great & it works fine, but keys are a bit noisy (if that matters)
I'd give it 3.5 stars but no 1/2 star option.

I cannot comment on mouse since it was not in box when delivered.

Title: OK for the price. Keyboard not that great, and the DVD player did not work. Review: Not bad for the price, but there were some issues. The biggest is the Lenovo DVD app for playing DVDs kept crashing. I remedied that by downloading a free player that was stable. The keyboard is atrocious. I purchased this thinking that it had the same, superior, keyboard that my Lenovo T400 has. Sadly it does not. Yes, it's a step up from the "chicklet" style keys that Apple made in vogue, but not by much.

If you are looking for something inexpensive to browse the web and are not ready to commit to a Chromebook, this is probably a decent choice. I do recommend that you lower expectations (especially is a quality keyboard for touch typing is important to you.)

Title: Very smelly
Review: I could not get past the horrid smell and threw them away.

Title: Okay strapping
Review: This was a reorder, the strapping works well.

Title: Comfort
Review: So comfortable!

Title: Favorite scent
Review: My husband’s favorite scent.

Title: Utterly cheap plastic framed mirror; feels like it is going to fall apart Review: This mirror is so cheap that it felt like the mirror itself was going to pop out of the frame when I slid it out of the package. I had to polish it to a shine as it arrived opaque and plastic looking. I used an eyeglass cleaner to clean it.

It is thin and in a plastic frame that feels too light for the mirror itself.  Drop this once and it will likely break. It must be handled gingerly. I personally do not feel this is worth more than $.50 cents or $1.

Title: Light scentless moisturizer; label on bottle in Korean only plastic packaging in English Review: This is a lightweight, almost scentless moisturizer for the face and body. It absorbed quickly into my skin and left if feeling hydrated and soft. The only thing I do not like is that the bottle label is in Korean. Only the plastic packaging includes the English ingredients.

Also, the $32.99 price tag for 10 ounces is outrageous.

Title: Moisturizing and almost scentless lip balm with SPF 15; a bit greasy on the lips Review: There are four tubes of lip balm in this package. The two main ingredients are sunflower seed oil and beeswax with the fourth ingredient being coconut oil. The active sunscreen ingredients are avobenzone 3%, octinoxate 7.5%, octisalate 5%, and octocrylene 5%.

This balm glides easily on my lips and is very moisturizing. It has a very faint spicy scent, but it is so faint that I consider it almost scentless and there is no added flavor. I personally prefer flavored balms. I love that it is rated up to SPF 15. The only negative is that the lip balm feels greasy and it is not waxy like a ChapStick.

The current price of $8.95 comes to a competitively priced $2.24 per tube.

Title: Fell apart on the second day- trash can
Review: Came apart the second time worn. Charm was lost my daughter threw away.

Title: It's OK
Review: Still not sure how best to set it up. It adds some low frequent but still not that much. I guess for the price, it's ok. I wish it could be controlled by the volume control on my Samsung smart TV. I am going to put it on top of a hollow plastic box to see if it makes any difference.

Title: Very pretty rose with bling; chain is thin and will tangle easily and get caught in rose Review: This necklace arrives in a ratty box with bubble wrap inside and on a folded/creased card (see one photo). I would not call the box giftable.

The pendant itself is gorgeous. The rose design is intricate and the added "light pink colored gems" and "gold-colored knobs on the backdrop really make this pop. The chain, however, is thin and will tangle. It also easily gets caught on the ridges of the rose. The chain is 18" long with an addtional 2" extension for a total of a 20" chain. I like that I can choose to wear either length.

This is a nice piece of costume jewelry where the pendant is the star of ths show. I have no idea how much this will cost, but anything over $10 I would consider expensive. It is giftable only if one puts it in another box. The current packaging setup is cheap. Even the card it came on was folded so that there were distracting creases which reduces the presentation.

Title: Does not look like the photo!  Too short and cheaply made!
Review: Flimsy and not like the photo!!

Title: Not The Best
Review: These eye masks don’t do much of anything. They do work okay if you put them in the fridge- but any gel mask would do that. The serum seems like a bunch of nothing. The gel patches aren’t even- they are thicker in some areas than others. They don’t stay on all that well. Again- put them in the fridge and you’ll get some depuffing. But any similar mask or reusable eye mask will do that.

Title: Not for a women there very Wide. Review: I do allot of gardening, and thought these rubber type of sandals would be perfect for
Gardening. They would have been if they where Not so Wide.
My foot slips right threw these. I admit have a narrow foot but these are for a man ,
Not women.
I should have realized that when it said there for Women or Men. !

These are a waste of money for a women , although cute and light weight.
That said, my husband would not wear these. The colors and style are for a women, not a men.

Waste of money.

Title: Did not work.
Review: The USB ports didn't work at all and that is what I bought it for.

Title: Not your typical comfy Merrell hiking shoe
Review: I've had Merrells for years and have been super happy with the fit and cushy comfort when hiking and for use as travel shoes. This pair is really cute, but rather flimsy and thin. I would definitely NOT wear them to go hiking! I wore them for a walking 5K and about 1/2 way through the walk my feet were bothered by the flimsy foot cushion inside the shoe. Not enough cush... Also, there is a slight gap between the foot cushion and the shoe in the inside by the ball of my foot. After a few hours it rubs and becomes tender. The shoes are super cute though so I am keeping them. Going to get new insoles for them to see if that will remedy the discomfort.

Title: Not great sound Review: I'm pretty picky about sound due to tinnitus. These have a wah wah sound like Charlie Brown's adults.
I'll give them to my husband when he loses his.

Title: Color doesn't match
Review: Well it does not stay on like t says. And the dark brown is not brown, it's rust/copper.

Title: Tshirt dress
Review: Ok.. these is more cotton than I was expecting - order up - shrinkage did happen.  And it is not NEARLY long enough to be a dress.  It's more like a general length tunic.  There are pockets, but they are awkward to use because of the odd length.  I liked the black and white stripe - the black is deep, the white is bright.  But... overall I was disappointed in the length and the stiffness of the fabric.

Title: Wonderful facial brush that works amazingly!
Review: I love this UMICKOO facial brush. I keep it in my shower and every morning while I shower I use it to keep my skin super clean. It has multiple speeds to I can concentrate on areas that I need to (like the enlarged poors on my nose). During this pandemic I haven't been able to get facials at the spa, so this is a great alternative. The vibration helps stimulate the collagen in my skin and the brushes really get in and clean off all makeup and dirt. I highly recommend this for men and women and it would make a great gift!

Title: Ehhh?
Review: It looks nice but the buttons and dials don't work

Title: Rustic minimalist wallet that is a bit thick when empty; has pull-tab & RFID protection Review: This is a rustic minimalist wallet but it is a bit thick compared to other minimalist wallets I have. That is because there is an elastic band sewn in-between the layers so that the folded cash compartment can stretch.

It has an ID window on the back side and a credit card slot on the front side that has a pull tab for easy access. That is a great feature except that it requires one put the card back in the wallet in order for the pull tab to be out of the way.

The center compartment has two compartments for two credit cards. A couple more credit cards can be slipped in the slots in the center behind the elastic. Therefore, there is room to squeeze in about six credit cards or four credit cards, an ID, and some folded cash.

It has RFID protection but I have no way of verifying that. It is also made of leather and is definitely rustic looking and cowboy style as the title claims. The box it comes in is also giftable. No price is listed for this wallet, but I would expect this to cost around $8.

Title: Channel button does not work
Review: This worked fine no set up needed. The problem with mine is that all buttons work except the channel buttons. Will not change channels or pull up guide. The 123 button will mot change channels either. I have to rely on the remote given with my cable box for this.

Title: Too small
Review: Smaller isn't always better.  At first I got sold on how tiny it is however its small size makes it hard to remove from USB connections on a laptop. It has a tiny bit of plastic sticking out and unless you have a 5 year olds fingers it's very hard to hold it and pull it out. Definitely learned my lesson and would go for a regular size stick next time. I foresee I'm going to lose it pretty soon anyway.

Title: It’s comfy.  Get it wear it, feel good in it!
Review: It’s a good neutral color, can dress it up or down, and really comfy.  A good chill’axin too.

Title: Works great
Review: Product was as it was described. Didn’t come with earbuds like a brand new iPad though

Title: Too big, not classy looking! Review: The earrings came a nice box..There Sterling silver with a coating so they not tarnished. A plus.
The closure bar is too big, and for me the earrings are also.
The pearl is big, and the earrings including the pearl are not Dainty and classy looking. .But I to not wear big earrings.

I think if these where smaller, with a pretty pearl, and a smaller pearl the earrings might appeal to me.

Title: Confusing instructions, too hard to use.
Review: I am returning this product. Not only is it extremely difficult to maneuver the settings, the instruction booklet is completely confusing. And I can't get the alarm to shut off when I don't need it.

Title: Broke after 2 users
Review: Not quality!  2 broke after using them 2x. Don't waste your money

Title: Runs a Bit Small
Review: My 17 year old daughter wears mediums or 8's in pants. She's 5'7" and weighs about 150 pounds. She was able to get these on, but they were a bit snug on her, but not to the point that they were uncomfortable. They are looser, almost baggy in the thigh area. She likes these enough that she said she'll wear them at home or on weekends. I'm not a fan of lots of distressing in denim, but she likes it.

Title: Big nice mirror is not Magnifying, , comes with a tiny little magnifying mirror on the back. Review: Nice clear mirror that has 3 different color led lights around the whole mirror.
The mirror was a no brainer to put together..very easy.
Seems steady, but kind of cheesy!
The base is large.

When the lights are on, there is are white circle around the black pupil of my blue eyes, its a bit strange.
There is 3 different color shades of light , and 5 buttons to press.
1.color switching .
2. Brightness UP.
3.Charging indicator ( charghing: red/ fully , charged: Green.
4. Brightness down button.
5. Power button.
Comes with only the charging cord.

I thought the big mirror is a magnifying mirror, but its Not! There is a little tiny mirror this comes with this that magnifies, that slips in the back of the big mirror. which Is disappointing. Although I guess you can put it in your purse!

The big mirror is a bigger size then I thought it was going to be! It moves back and forth for your convenience.

Title: Great ingredients
Review: Used a while now and I like it

Title: I would have given 5 stars but was sent the wrong size
Review: I’m so disappointed ... The shirt is great quality with great graphics it’s absolutely adorable and would have given this 5 stars but was sent the wrong size .  I ordered an XL knowing it still might be a little clingy but they didn’t offer XXL so needless to say the large I was sent will be like wearing shrink wrap . I could cry . I’m running my first 5k tomorrow and wanted to dress up and have fun . Bummed out 🙁

Title: Sucks!
Review: This thing really doesn't work.

Title: One Star
Review: Way to small so its a waste.

Title: Good concept but not for me
Review: From my daughter: I like the idea of this product since I have been using jojoba oil to clean my face and moisturize it for several years now. But I didn’t feel like it did a better job than my bottle of jojoba oil for $7. I have had the best results with that. It only takes 3 drops to remove eye makeup by simply rubbing it on eyes and removing the oil and makeup with a wet warm washcloth. Then 3 more drops rubbed over entire face and washed off with a washcloth several times, then I rinse my face and dry it and apply 3 more drops to moisturize. My skin never feels oily after and I no longer have breakouts or dry skin.

Title: loveit
Review: glad i ordered the smaller one  i have to have surgery  and its def big enogh to bring a few things to the hospital with  its really BIG  !!  i originally was gonna order the bigger one  glad i didnt !!

Review: Did not come with a power cord. I made a power cord for the box with a 1 Amp fuse inline and verified that the polarity was correct. The 1Amp fuse blows immediately upon turning on the switch. Very disappointing. Returning.

Review: Great for expanding usb capacity, but best if you are leaving it in one place. The connector is flimsy and wobbly, I would tend to think it would break easily with transport/travel

Review: It’s a great case not as durable but it’s pretty and I love the colors..

Title: Battery life not as advertised, Disappointing
Review: Nice little DVD player. Only one BIG problem.  Says it has a 6 hour battery life. Not even close, Maybe 3 hours. This is very disappointing.  I have had this for several months and the battery life has never lasted over 3 hours, closer to 2 1/2.  When watching a long move over 2 hrs with the credits and previews the battery is Dead at the end of the movie if it doesn't shut off.  I purchased a Sony portable DVD player about 5 yrs ago for my granddaughter and she still uses it.  The battery will last 5+ hours.  What happened to Sonys product.  Paid $$ for this and just does not preform as advertised.

Title: It came in with dead ants inside but for the price it seems okay had a lot of small things and the brush is perfect.
Review: So this came in and in a pretty flimsy package I was a little weirded out by the fact there were some ants inside the package, they were dead and I guess for the price I can't complain but it was a little strange, other than that the product seems ok I just don't like the fact I gotta clean it up from all the ants before use.

Title: Like wearing wooden shoes Review: Cutest shoes, but so stiff and uncomfortable. I have never worn a shoe this hard and inflexible.
Sent them back, very disappointed.

Review: Very very slow processor. Disappointing.

Review: Husband loves his haquil Viking bear necklace. The chain and charm high quality. I bought it to match the ring and did perfectly. I would most definitely recommend this piece of jewelry.

Title: VERY SOLIDLY BUILT; LOTS OF FEATURES Review: PROS: Very study and solid, carrying strap with compass, flashlight is very bright. Unit is rechargeable with USB, Solar or crank. Crank is very easy to turn. Has a weather band. Has SOS button that gives loud alarm and light, has on/off switch. CONS: Slightly heavier and bigger than some emergency radios; sound quality of AM radio is not that good, although FM sounds decent. Does not have regular battery backup (only uses an L-Ion battery, but it can be replaced if the battery goes bad.)

Overall, this is a decent little emergency radio with similar features to other emergency radios.

Title: Not a slim fit. Review: These IZOG mens pants seem to be well made.
The fabric is soft, after being washed, and dryed.
There casual like my husband likes them.
No cuffs.

I washed these IZOG mens pants, I think they shrank a bit in the waist and length, (32,32, 5’9, 165lbs)
although the pants are a bit big and baggy in the tush, and the legs. Kind of looks sloppy!
They are Not a slim fit, but my husband likes them, and there Comfortable.(probably cause they fit baggy!!)

My husband will still wear them, like wearing a pair of worn in jeans.

Title: Cute for Tweens!
Review: These are a bright white, with silver glittery fibers running through. They're not bad looking, but they definitely have a tween look to them. It says they are one size fits most, but I am not sure that's even right. They don't have much stretch to them at all. I could get them on my hands, but it wasn't easy.  And once they were on, they weren't comfortable at all. The fingers are too short. I have large hands, so I thought maybe that was the problem. I had my 17 year old daughter who has small, thin hands and they were too tight on her as well. I will probably end up giving these to my 9 year old niece. There were also a few loose threads that had to be trimmed. Overall, these are just okay.

Title: Wow are these big
Review: Very comfortable and not at all bad looking, but sooo big. I ordered the smallest size they had and they're still too darn big.

Title: black ankle socks with banded tops
Review: I wanted a loose fit sock and these have a 1" band on the top that are too snug.  I will donate these.  If you're looking for a looser fit, pass on these.

Title: We need to bring the product back to the USA where they know how to make them

Review: after receiving the sd card. I used a tester app and found that my sd card came with 48gb. The write speed was no where near the supposed 180. I'm very upset, I thought it would be legitimate because it was sold and shipped by Amazon.

Title: This Bralette has more support then most! But!! Review: This is a pretty Bralette, although I have a couple that are more sexy looking, but this Mae has more support.
Has padded cups, that gives more support.
The straps adjust, but are Too Thin, and not pretty.
There is 4 hooks in the back, that make this difficult to hook. Two hooks are for the bra, and two hooks are for
The bottom lace! Very strange! But have to be hooked which is hard to do.
Since this is big for me, I turned it around in front, hooked it, then moved it to the back, put my arms in the straps.

I wear 36c, wear a size 10. This was big for me, but after adjusting the straps, and hooking this on the last row Of hooks
I can wear this..Although the thin straps are almost a deal breaker!

3 stars.

Title: Nice
Review: Nice quality. Comes with a sticky adhesive to it which was nice. Had a hard time sticking it to drywall though. Overall quality was very nice

Title: Do yourself a favor and buy it!!!!
Review: As I can say  is that I wish I ordered this in a larger quantity. I was hesitant too order  because I have sensitive skin, but glad I did because it helps give my skin a healthy glow and texture. I sprinkle some in my cleanser every third day, as stated in the directions. I will be getting this as small gifts for my friends, they will thank me for it.

Title: No Support
Review: This is the flimsiest, cheapest bra I have ever bought. There is no support at all. The ladies just bounce around like I’m not wearing anything. Serves no purpose at all.

Review: Thumbs down on this product,  runs extremely small and the material was very thin. Poor value for the money.
