Title: Keeps you together
Review: Nice to put on for everyday

Title: Good sound quality, comfortable Review: Love these, but the controls are very sensitive and turns off easily with a light touch.

The sound quality is great and they fit comfortably. No problems with ears getting sore like wire earbuds.

Recommend.

Title: wide tooth combs
Review: I like to use a wide tooth after I wash my hair... these work perfectly.  The short one has teeth that are slightly wider than the taller one, but it's easy to hold on to.  My hair is medium thick, slight wave. These are thick plastic and will last longer than me I think.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Warm and fluffy, hand wash, Review: Cute set for a young child in a soft pink.
The set has a Hat, gloves, and neck warmer, there are all lined in white that is very soft, and warm.
On the front of each idem in the kitty set, it looks like its a hand sewed kitty smile with wiskers. Looks cute.

The set runs a little big, but I think this is more for younger kids.
Hand wash, lay out to dry.

Review: I wanted to love these but sadly the sizing was way off. I ordered my normal size and was super excited when they arrived but sadly they were far too small.

Title: WAY TOO SMALL!
Review: Hate! Ordered a 5xl and they look like an xl. So disappointed. Plus they’re super thin and see through when stretched.

Title: Actual Map Design Was Totally Different From Product Photo Review: This OMOTON KINDLE VOYAGE SMART CASE COVER (CLASSIC BROWN MAP) has random map designs, which wasn't explained in the product description. Mine looked nothing like the product page photo, and I didn't like the countries on it. It is not a cover that I want to carry around with me, so I had to order a different cover.

At the price, I didn't expect real leather. It's made of polyurethane leather, which is a leather backing covered with plastic. The case is just a simple shell. The “built-in light” is built into the Kindle Voyage, not the case. The case does have an automatic wake-sleep feature (a magnet inside the cover).

Title: Not true stomach control
Review: The jury is still out on these. Although I like the fit on the legs and butt on these, not sure about what this is calling Tummy Control'. There is a band up near the waist which, I guess, is supposed to pull something in. But it's not that strong and it doesn't cover my stomach (just my waist). It also has a tendency to roll when seated. I don't think I would ever buy these again.

Title: Seems like a great lip color, just not for me
Review: Although I am rating this as 4 stars, it's highly unlikely I will buy it again. On the plus side, it is an interesting new way to apply and wear lip color. On the downside, I am in my 60's with thinner lips and the color didn't seem to last as long as my normal lip color would. I also had a little difficult time peeling off the product, but again maybe because I am in my 60's I am getting older and didn't do this 100% right. It is a pretty color, though and probably will work better for others.

Title: Small
Review: Very very small. Barely fits my ( not so small ) waist

Title: Buy a Spin Clean Instead
Review: Just buy a spin clean.  I bought one of these when I very first started collecting vinyl and I can say that these have nothing on the Spin Clean.  They do not clean a vinyl like a spin clean can.  If you are serious about collecting, pass up on this and order a Spin Clean immediately, as you will not regret it.

Title: Returned... TWICE
Review: I ordered this bag twice,  as advertised as a small.  NONE of these bags are small.  They are a Timbuk2 medium.

Title: Lasting wear
Review: This nail strengther is lasting but it did not help much.

Review: These are well made, oversized sunglasses that come in a great case and look great on my oval shaped face. Not sure how great they are for super bright sun, because I still am squinting in some of this direct Florida sunlight. I prefer darker lenses than these, so these will be used more for driving and early morning, late day use.

Title: Nothing special
Review: Did an adequate job.  Results were disappointing.  Not worth the money.

Title: (Unless you like looking like a zombie
Review: This left a chalky residue on my already pale skin. My darker complected husband tried it and left him looking an odd grayish blue color. Purchase with caution if your skin is very fair. (Unless you like looking like a zombie...)

Title: Bath bombs the size of gumballs with lackluster performance Review: [[VIDEOID:94473f32466d4f7cee7801155aeba475]] There are 35.27 ounces of gumball-sized bath bombs in this container that are made of epsom salts and tea tree, peppermint, and lavender oils. I used one gumball in four cups of very warm water for a hand soak. The ball fizzed out in a couple of minutes and the results were lackluster. The water was a pale pink but there was no staining.

The current price of $29.99 for this container is definitely not worth it. I do not like the fragrance or the performance. Note that my container arrived broken as can be seen in the photo.

Title: Great, pretty tweezers!
Review: These are a super nice pair of tweezers. Fit's well in my hand, makes doing a tedious job easier. This tweezer comes with a little case, too, which makes it nice for traveling or just for keeping in my handbag. I love this rose gold color, too, makes them look super fancy. I bought another one for my mom and plan to give it to her next weekend as a little surprise gift. Really nice and I highly recommend!

Title: Three Stars
Review: seem ok...just starting using them

Title: Perfect for the king or queen in your life!
Review: This was a silly gift for my grandmother, who is generally regarded as the "Queen" of her retirement community. They got the biggest kick out of the crown and sceptre as they added a regal touch

Title: Good Choice
Review: This carry bag squeezes into its small attached holder sack and it simple to move around.  It also functions as a tote bag that requires no hands/arms to carry.  However its relatively small size limits the amount of groceries that will fit inside.

Title: If I may say so... a total piece of useless crap
Review: As others have mentioned, this wonderful little item conveniently worked nicely between my mini iPad and TV for exactly 3 months (almost on the nose too!), and then without warning.... bam! nada, zip, zero... there are no exposed wires or defective hdmi cable or moving of the unit itself... as I had no reason to touch it.  I'm being kind with the title of my review, because in all honesty, it's a good chunk of money down the drain.  So, thank you so much!

Title: Long-lasting fragrance but not my favorite scent
Review: This one fluid ounce spray bottle is nicely designed into what I call a double-sided triangle. The fragrance is supposed to be musky and floral. I get a hint of the musky but no floral. It actually reminds me a bit of the aroma of Play-Doh, which I like, but am not interested in having as a fragrance. The aroma is just okay to me. I do like that it is long lasting and I was able to detect it several hours later.

Title: It's just okay
Review: Maybe I didn't read descriptions enough? I purchased this for my Samsung ultra 22 for taking pictures of my products and it's awkward for my phone. My phone will fit and it does keep it up...for now anyways (lest see after some wear if the springs for holder hold up)I  have to have my phone hanging half off because it covers my lenses for my camera.

Title: One bottle is thicker product than the other.
Review: I’m not sure if mine are the real deal. One bottle has product that it really thick. So much so, that when you squeeze the bottle some comes out and then the bottle sucks the gloop right back up again. The second bottle is runny. Not even close to the other bottle. Is one fake? Is one older product? Are they different batches that lead to the inconsistencies? I don’t know. They both smell terribly like orange Dial. I expected the smell of coconut or almond. I’m giving a neutral score because I have nothing more to compare this with than these two bottles.

Title: Expensive, but ok
Review: I was looking for a good night time retinol serum to use. I was hoping this would have been a better alternative. As a negative, the applicator pump is a negative. Several times it either didn't pump or, when it did, it sprayed sideways (landing either on my mirror or countertop). As a positive, the serum (which is an orangish color) does go on easy and is absorbed readily. My skin feels a little tacky after use, but I did see good results after using for a month now. I think for $70 you can do better.

Title: Two Stars
Review: not very powerful

Title: Great facial moisturizer!
Review: This is a really nice facial moisturizer. Goes on thick and luxurious and is readily absorbed into my skin. Having used this almost exclusively for over a month now, I honestly can say I see a noticeable improvement in my skin. It feels super soft and hydrated and the skin under my eyes appears plumper and less saggy. Highly recommend for all skin types.

Title: I do not like this cheaply made shoe.  Not a good value at all.
Review: Bought this shoe because,other people gave it good reviews.  However, I returned it because it has zero support and no room for inserts, cheaply made and looks cheap.  Do not waste your money.

Title: Worked great when i first used it
Review: Stamps sometimes. Worked great when i first used it. Now it's hit and miss. Some of the object will stamp sometimes. I have used plates that i have stamped from. I've tried EVERYTHING to try and get it to pick up an whole image.

Review: These dig in around the ankle and are very uncomfortable. I am so disappointed because I love the color!

Title: Good product

Review: Very happy with this alarm. Easy to install and easy instructions. Thinking of purchasing 2 more.

Review: I don't like it at all. I must own 40 hairbrushes, I mean nice very expensive brushes.  Not a Fan !!!

Title: limited use, but ok
Review: I think we might have thought a bit too much of it, we had the original boxee box and loved the thing. They discontinued it and stopped service, so we had to find something else. This box is quite ok, I wish they would have more apps and I also can't seem to find an online browser? I assume they don't have one, so this box is ok to pull movies from your database, therefore only so-so. This box is also no longer supported and the cloud service is gone, so once that one has issues, it is another item to toss in the garbage.

Title: Nice
Review: I like the Navy color, the metal zipper as that seems to be (for most clothing companies) a thing of the past.  It fits well, not snug but not loose to the point of sloppiness.  I did find the price a bit high but because it's a brand name I could understand why.

Title: They actually work!
Review: They work in terms of texting with them on. Downside...really didn't provide much warmth. Very light duty.

Title: Doesn't last long
Review: Lasted about a year before the tops started to wear thru. These just don't hold up.

Title: Returning
Review: Runs large. My pinky toe was escaping. Cute on but I can’t deal

Title: Expected so much more from Henckels.
Review: wow, for the price we were shocked with the quality of the actual pieces.  the nail clippers did nto really clip, the filer was okay and will not be used often and that left us with the nose-hair trimmer .. that worked and lovely leather case.  Cant say that is worth the price!  much disappointed and expected so much more from Henckels.

Title: Order a size or two up.
Review: I found it very uncomfortable. Too tight.

Title: Great Size
Review: This wallet is a great size if you don't have to carry a lot of cards and stuff in your wallet. It has 4 card slots plus an ID window. There's a place for bills and another one, albeit quite small, for coins. I like it, but I've been having issues with the snap.  About one out of every three times I try to snap it closed, it won't snap. I have to end up using both hands and applying a lot of pressure and then it usually snaps. I do think that I discovered the problem. The part of the snap that's on the wallet part (not the flap) is loose and rotates easily. If it's lined up a certain way, it snaps fine. If it's not in the right position, then it won't snap closed. One shouldn't have to work that hard to get it closed. I hope that this is just a faulty wallet and it's not happening with others.

Title: covergirl outlast
Review: Couldn't find this color anywhere... so I ordered.  Meh.  It's super cakey... it dried my lips out.. and you MUST use the white tube that comes with for shine (don't use anything else as it takes the cakey stuff off) - unless you like a very, very matte, dry look.  Too expensive.  I will not purchase again.  Live and learn!

Title: The material is not as soft as I expected & this shirt really holds odor if one sweats Review: This is made in India of 95% Polyester and 5% Spandex. The feel of this shirt is not as soft as I expected. I have ordered other men's shirts that feel better than this. Also, I usually order a men's medium for a very snug fit as I usually wear these as undershirts. However, since this is an XXL, I can wear it as an outer shirt. I do feel it runs about a 1/2 size too small as I expected this to be very loose on me and it is just loose.

I cannot vouch for its sun protection; however, it works well as either an under or outer shirt for me. Nevertheless, it does stink easily if one sweats, especially in the armpits. I sweat a lot so I know even though I use the strongest deodorant with aluminum. My other shirts do not do this but this one does. It washes well in a lingerie bag and I hang dry it.

In summary, this is not a shirt I would order again. This is just okay.

Title: a so-do product
Review: while I like the color,and it goes on smoothly, it doesn't last long like they claim.

Title: Works great
Review: Works well and is easy to set up.  Very light and compact.  You do need a flat surface to put it on, because if you try to use it on your lap, it folds up on you.  Not sure how much I will really use it, as I am so used to an ergonomic (curved) keyboard that it is difficult to type on a flat keyboard and this is flat.  It is full sized and if you have a lot of typing to do on your phone, this will be very helpful.  Charging cord is a little short.  The bonus phone stand that is included is nice, but my phone case is too thick, so it would not fit in the stand.

Title: Cool clock with great features Review: Pros-
I love the sound quality of this clock! The exposed woofer on the back not only looks so cool but it also sounds amazing! The brightness of the front is really good and I can see it in even the brightest of settings! The wireless charging is great and allows for me to charge at the highest allowed capacity for my phone's fast wireless charging setting! The buttons also feel great and are easy to use.
Cons-
I don't like how there is no input for my phone, I'd like to play more than the radio on the speaker but I can't due to the inputs. I also am not a fan of the dimmer, I wish there was a dimmer wheel instead of a buttons, I accidentally hit it constantly and the brightness options aren't great.

Title: Great keyboard and mouse set at a reasonable price!
Review: This is a really nice wireless keyboard and mouse. Sets up quickly and easily (which for someone like me who is in her sixties and is somewhat technically challenged) is saying a lot. This mouse has a great shape and is ergnomically built for easy handheld performance. The keyboard is nice, too, standard keyboard but in a compact size. I love the wireless aspect of this and the fact that the charge is via the usb port. Highly recommend if you are in the market for a new combo set.

Title: Total storage is 3TB set as raid 1 Review: Storage is defaulted at Raid 1 for 3 TB instead of 6 TB. Need to format drive to have access to 6 TB.

Easy to set up, easy to navigate. Browsing for files and folders is easy.

Title: Works great
Review: I really like it and it sounds great. only negative thing I can say is don't really like the futuristic design of the front. old fashion I guess. had to look in the manual to open the cd player, couldn't find it ..

Title: Gorgeous bikini but top is way too small for the size indicated, in my opinion Review: This is a gorgeous bikini. Unfortunately, it does not fit me appropriately. The size large top appears to be for a size medium to small woman, but then again I have a wide back and ample chest. The fact that the bra is padded does not help.

The blue is super attractive and the bottoms are semi-high cut which is very nice.

I would wash this in a lingerie bag and hang dry it. The bra padding is not removable.

Title: Great for cleaning large vegetables, washing cats or dogs, or massaging scalp; best on short hair Review: The brush is lightweight and it is good for shampooing short hair, and washing pets and can also be used to clean large vegetables like corn. It also acts like a gentle scalp massager. However, those with longer hair might find that it tangles the hair if scrubbed too vigorously.

I particularly love how easy this is to hold by slipping the nub on top between the fingers and having it rest in the palm of my hand.

The current price of $10 is about double the price I would expect to pay for this type of brush. It is cheaply made, so any price more than $5 or $6 is way too much.

Title: Smells great dry but there's barely any scent in the shower; last two showers Review: There are eight steamers (jasmine eucalyptus, mint , lavender, rose, chamomile, lemon, grapefruit, and rosemary) in this package. Each tablet is the size of a hockey puck but half the height. These smell absolutely fantastic dry (except for the grapefruit) but in the shower I barely smell anything until I turn the water off.

I kept this tablet in the shower away from the direct stream of water. It slowly dissolves but it is not noticable and one tablet lasts me two showers. I tried the Jasmine and it did not stain my tub.

I have the nose of a bloodhound and I could barely detect any scent. Why anyone would use something like this is beyond me, especially when very little fragrance is present. I already wash my hair and soap up my body with very fragrant shampoo and bath soap, so there is no need for a steamer in my shower.

At the current price of $16.99 ($19.99 minus 15%) for eight tablets, this comes to a pricey $2.12 per steamer which I consider an expensive mistake. Note that they come with a mesh bag for the steamer and a plastic cutter.

Title: Flimsy and hard to unhook for camera charging.
Review: Flimsy and hard to unhook for camera charging. I have had my cameras stolen in the past but weekly I have to re-charge my cameras and need them unhooked from high above. The tiny wire security leash is crazy-hard to get off and on for recharging, especially when its not at eye level. Plus, the wire is string-thin and easy to simply break if someone wants to steal the camera.

Title: Comfortable
Review: These are very comfortable and light weight . They are perfect for everyday and excercise

Title: Not as expected.just,ok
Review: does not give good,coverage.  does not stay long.  do not like.

Title: storage device
Review: Ok... I sent this these back because I didn't understand what I was purchasing and was looking for something else... but I think it will work if you're aware of what it is.  These are basically USB storage devices.  You create the form and then download it onto these card with the port that pops into the USB connection of your computer/laptop or other device.  It will then rest in your wallet and IS bright red.  So... if that is what you are looking for, you're in luck!  The return process for me was quick and efficient.

Title: Ok slippers
Review: They were alright. The bottoms were a little thin.

Title: Wonderful polo shirt!
Review: I am about 20-25 lbs overweight and don't like wearing clothing that clings to me or shirts that are too short. This polo shirt is great. I can wear my XL either with my jeans or with my leggings and it looks and feels great. It's long enough to cover my belly (almost tunic like) and is loose. I highly recommend to anyone looking for a super comfy shirt.

Title: amazon usb cord
Review: I purchased this and didn't need it as the external hard drive I purchased already came with one.  This one is quite a bit longer than the one that came with the drive so I will toss it in our "cord" tub in case we end up needing it.

Title: Not going to remain Rose-gold tone color!! Washes off!
Review: The “ rose gold tone” washed off after a few wears!! It is basically a SILVER RING!

Title: Lovely, Comfortable Gown Review: I received this gown very quickly. I was surprised when I received it.

The color is very nice. I bought the purple one. The fabric is soft and drapes nicely. It is light and nice for warm weather. The fabric is 95% rayon and 5% spandex. It has a good stretch.

I am 5’4” and weight about 170 lbs. I am large chested. I ordered an XL. It was a bit larger than I expected. I could probably have worn a L.

I really like this gown! Thinking of ordering other colors.

Easy care. Wash cold. Hang to dry. Low iron.

Title: Already coming apart. Review: Loved the style but already coming apart in front. Only used for two weeks.
Update: Front is coming apart even more. Love it otherwise.

Title: Works great but tastes gross
Review: This lip treatment works well but tastes gross! And the taste takes forever to go away!!!

Title: It's listening even when it's not suppose to.
Review: Absolutely hate when it starts to speak out of nowhere, as if someone said Alexa. Happens at least twice a day. Kids and adults get scared. Otherwise a good product.

Title: Works fine for conference calls but there is some static in the background Review: [[VIDEOID:7c979a519a5bd77d0ebccd3531a0c40b]] I bought this for my zoom meetings for school and work. It was easy to set up just place the USB in and it starts working.
Sound quality isn't horrible but not great either. The mute button they mention is actually not a mute button but a turn off the mic switch. The problem with this is my computer goes back to the mic from the computer so it really does not mute.
Also I have noticed I do have to talk fairly close to the mic for the other parties to hear me clearly. I'm not able to leave it 1 foot away, they said I sound like I'm on speakerphone.
I would say for the price it is fine to use for everything meetings.

Title: It appears to reduce acne but I do not care for the tan thick solution (2.5 stars) Review: I washed my face as instructed and then applied this to the affected area(s). I did not want to put this on my entire face so I only applied it to my forehead. Unfortunately, I really cannot stand the color and thickness of this. It looks like make-up base and even though I rubbed it in, I could see that the area where it was applied was a bit darker than my regular skin tone.

I did not see the color wear off on to my hat or clothes so that is good; however, this is not for me. It does appear to work and so far I have had no reaction to it. However, I dislike the color and the smell so much that I will not be using this even though it does appear to work to reduce acne. Obviously I am the odd one out as every other reviewer seems to love this.

Title: Curly laces
Review: Eh.  Was thinking it would be nice to just be able to slip on my shoes and not have to tie the laces.  These were awful. They twisted and looked really awkward in the shoe - and weren't long enough to be actually helpful.  I pulled them back out and they would not properly recurl.  I actually tossed them. Lesson learned.

Title: This is good and I like it
Review: This is good and I like it.  It is a shaver.  I shaved the hair off my face so that was my goal.  It doesn't hurt at all.

Title: Easy to Use
Review: This is a 2 pack of green tea stick face mask. It is very easy to use. You can apply it without getting your hands messy, which I like. It glides on easily. I let it dry for the recommended 15 minutes or so. It doesn't make your face crack or harden. Rinsing is simple, too. It comes off with water. I have sensitive skin and it didn't irritate me. I was hoping for some improvement with the pores around my nose, as the picture shows, but it didn't have any effect on my pores. I don't dislike it, but I don't like it either, hence the 3 star rating.

Title: worked for a while and then quit
Review: Not worth the money, didn't last at all.  Sorry I purchased.

Title: Great little computer
Review: For the price it is just what I needed, I take it with me for playing a game and watch movies. Great for a student.

Title: One Star
Review: It looks like a woman's shirt,not very masculine looking. Would not order again.

Title: Damaged roll received
Review: I ordered 6 rolls. One came damaged. No damage to the box.  I believe it was broken before it was put in the box

Title: Completely Useless Review: I bought this for my Samsung Galaxy Tab 2. (7 inch) If you put the tablet in and turn it sideways, it immediately slips out. There is no kind of fastener to hold the tablet in at all. I don't understand the point of this. It barely holds up the tablet when it's open for keyboard use. The back stand does keep it upright, but at a ridiculous angle so that you can barely see the screen.

This is extremely useless and a waste of money.

Title: venus disposable razors
Review: These are great for travel, which is how I use them.  I have a travel case that these fit in. I find them to be as good as the ones on the reusable handles.. These are disposable, you throw the whole thing away after a few uses.

Title: Great buy!
Review: Cute product. Love the color. Easy to connect immediately. Quick charge. Love how small they are. And they have great noise cancelling and volume/bass. I am not one to buy extremely expensive products that I will not use more than 1-3x a week and these is not too pricey but not too cheap and is great quality.

Title: doesn't charge
Review: somehow I didnt note that when I bought it as a gift *sigh* - bad on me but want to put that out there for others.  We have it on the fireplace mantel and is a cute light about 12 inches tall. Casually Elegant but would not have bought for just playing.

Title: decent
Review: I don’t really need to hold much in it, so it works for me personally, but the outside definitely creases and will definitely wear a like through the images in time.

Title: Great moisturizer, not so much for making your lips fuller
Review: This is a really nice moisturizer for my lips. I tend to worry about the regular skin on my face and not my lips. I could honestly feel the difference after using this daily in the softness of my lips. I am deducting a star because I didn't notice any 'plumping'. I do tend to have thinner lips, but there was no difference. Also, for the price, I think you could do much better in purchasing a lip moisturizer.

Title: Very nice boot
Review: Bought these for my husband. I don't hear any complaining so I guess they are good! Ha ha. But they are s nice boot and light weight. Holding up good . He is retired so he doesn't wear them every day.

Title: Very thin cover Review: This iPad cover is very thin and does not offer the kind of protection I was expecting. Plus, it is too large for my iPad!
Do not recommend.

Title: Stopped working. Review: The best speakers out there. You can feel the music but be careful because that bass will have your whole house shaking.

Update. They did not last very long. Invest in better quality speakers. I didn't even have them cranked up very loud and they just stopped working. Cheaply made.

Title: One pair of children’s socks only; these are not for adults & it is not a 2 pair set
Review: I ordered this for me because it says there were two pairs of Christmas socks that would fit adults. Instead, what I received was one pair of children's Christmas socks. These socks are festive and thin as expected. They seem nice for the season. Nevertheless, they are a complete zero to me because the product received is not the product described on Amazon.

Title: Dyes & sulfates in this. Itchy scalp. Review: You get allot of shampoo and conditioner for a good price.
The shampoo suds up well, and conditioner leaves your hair soft.

That said I’m disappointed by all the chemicals that are in both the shampoo and conditioner.
The ingredients are written So small and run together your get the message they do not want you to know what is in this!
And I can’t pronounce them!

The second ingredient in the Shampoo is Sodium laureth sulfate, and the 3rd is the same..
Also Yellow #5, Red # 33, Blue #1 !
Why are there any dyes! They cause cancers.

The conditioner has Yellow #5,and Red #33! Why?
The chamomile, aloe, and passion flower, are just Extracts which to me doesn’t say much!

With all the chemicals and dyes could be the reason my scalp itches from using these!

Title: Good for a bulky tablet cover
Review: It is the thinnest cover I could find for the Lenovo. It is as described but I wish someone would make a cover that the tablet snapped into. The cover makes the tablet bulky and not the tablet to carry in my purse. For what it is and it is described well on the site it does work nicely on the tablet.

Title: No enough cover
Review: Don’t have a pocket at from of the cover 🙁 and don’t cover enough the mini iPad

Title: extra heavy duty zip ties
Review: These are extra heavy duty zip tie like ties.  They worked perfectly.  Used to help attach a bird net in a tree.  I never hesitate to update my review should new info seem useful.

Title: Okay
Review: It was okay

Title: I am getting tired of ordering product and it not ...
Review: I am getting tired of ordering product and it not being as pictured. These were to be blank and some clear

Title: Lil disappointed with this 1 thing
Review: It’s beautiful but won’t stand up well when it’s folded, keeps slipping and falls down.

Title: Good
Review: El vestido es muy lindo respecto a calidad y precio vale la pena

Title: Spacious bi-fold wallet but leather is thin; gift box arrived all smashed Review: This is a bi-fold wallet with a removable ID window. On the left fold there is room for three credit cards and behind that bank of slots is a removable leather ID pocket that can hold one ID and two credit cards on the back side. On the right side is room for four more credit cards and one more behind that. This means 11 cards can be stored nside. There is also a double billfold.

The front of the wallet has a nice lion's head embossing on it.

The wallet also comes with RFID protection to protect the credit cards from scanners. However, I have no way of verifying if this works or not.

It also comes in a super attractive giftable box but the box I got arrived all smashed, so I deducted one star for this.

In summary, the slots in this wallet allow for the easy retrieval of all cards. What I do not like is that the leather is on the thin side. Because of this thin leather, I do feel this will wear easily. As long as the price is $10.99 and under, I think this is a good price but anything over that is expensive simply because the leather is too thin.

Title: Nice curly hair care trio but pump does not work on conditioner Review: This is a nice trio of haircare products for curly hair. I have short to medium fine curly hair and used the shampoo and conditioner. The shampoo lathers and cleans well and the conditioner conditions without weighing down my hair. My hair dried curly and bouncy.

Unfortunately, I am extremely peeved because I cannot get the pump on the conditioner to work. It won't pop up. I had to remove the pump and hit the bottle with my hands to even get a little out and it was almost impossible to do that, which means the conditioner most likely will wind up going in the garbage. It's the inability to get to this product that made me want to rate this one star. These items are great but the pump on the conditioner is useless. I actually would not buy this for that reason only.

Title: Doesn't work! Don't buy!
Review: This product didn't work at all. It literally just doesn't work! I accidentally threw the package away so I couldn't even get my money back. Wouldn't recommend at all.... if I could give this a 0 star I would.

Title: Great but...
Review: Good product, soft-sided with padding and I especially like the velcro on the handles so you're not fighting to grab both or risk dumping it if you grabbed one handle without zipping it shut. There's just one glaring exception and the reason for less than 5 stars - this is not truly big enough for a 13" laptop. I have the newest macbook air (about as slim as it gets) and yes it can slide into the case but you can't zip it shut (bag slightly too short) Then if you add anything to the inner pockets (such as cords!), you can't even get the laptop in the case at all. It does fit the larger 11" iPad with accessories, but seeing as that's not what I bought it for, I'm disappointed.

Title: Jury is still out
Review: Still deciding. Took FOREVER to set up. Not super impressed with quality but maybe I need to spend more time fiddling with adjustments?

Title: will work
Review: I bought this for my Mom to wear with an evening gown on a cruise.  She is sensitive to "tight" things around her head, like headbands, etc... so I thought this might be a good alternative. It's is not stretchy, so therefore not tight and adjustable at the back in regards to drop and fit.  It is a silver color metal...made in china. As others have noted, you probably don't want to sweat too much wearing it as it may turn your skin green or other color?  It is an unknown base metal.  The rhinestones are a slightly sparkly, but not like a quality cz would be..  I think appropriate for the price point.  This is NOT a high dollar item, nor does it look like one at close inspection, however, I believe it will work for the one time wear planned. The photo represents the style and what I received well. It arrived in a bubble pouch via usps in good time and in good condition. I will update with any issues.

Title: It’s ok
Review: It’s ok you have to yell and repeat yourself all the time. Not very loud for listening to music

Title: The mouth of the bottle is very large, which is not convenient to pour
Review: The mouth of the bottle is very large, which is not convenient to pour

Title: The fragrance is nothing special to my senses Review: Periodically I splurge on men's cologne and eau de toilette because I like the deep fragrance of a men's product on me. For example, I absolutely love Eternity for Men and buy it all the time. However, I often like to try something different. I got this at TJX for $59.99 plus tax because the reviews on Amazon were so positive. I tried it and to me the fragrance is just okay. It smells like a typical male after shave and is not a fragrance I will be purchasing again, especially at such a high price.

P. S. The coach emblem on the bottle is attractive and the bottle itself is hefty.

Title: Cute & comfy
Review: This top fit perfect and is so comfy I love it and am ordering more.

Title: Not good
Review: Way too small, not true to size.

Title: Extremely, extremely moisturizing but it took about 20 minutes for the lotion to be absorbed
Review: I used this on my entire face and neck, including my eyelids since it didn't have any warning about the eyes. It's very moisturizing but the lotion feels tacky when drying and it took about 20 minutes to absorb. On wake-up my face and neck felt incredible. If it weren't for the tackiness of this lotion, it actually would be one of several I would buy. However, I can get similar moisturizing affects from [[ASIN:B00HB2JQNM Olay Total Effects 7 in one, Anti-Aging Moisturizer]] without all the tackiness. I do love the fragrance of this lotion, however.

Title: snowflake bobble headbands
Review: You get two headbands... they are just as shown in the ad.  They are not the most comfortable - but I bought them for a fun element in holiday family video chats.  Will work for that.  Not planning to wear them 24/7.  The feather part/area of the headband is not super thick (less than shown in photo) but plenty.

Title: Lives up to the hype
Review: Best purchase for organizing your batteries and the tester alone is worth it! So amazing I bought one for my parents, my best friend and my husband's parents.

Title: Nice, large facial tissue
Review: These are a larger, thicker facial tissue, perfect for wetting and wiping down sticky hands and faces. I like to carry them to help keep my makeup in check after a long day wearing mascara and eyeliner. They can also be used for nose blowing and other typical facial tissues, but not sure how well they will flush (as I stated they are larger and thicker than standard tissues). Recommend if you are looking for a stronger tissue to carry with you.

Title: Hard dollar store brush; not worth the purchase; rips hair instead of detangles
Review: This brush is terrible. The frame color (yellow) is nice but the tines in the brush are a hard plastic that just rips at my hair. It does not detangle well and feels like a cheap $.50 cent or $1 brush one picks up in the dollar store. The current price of $6.99 for this is outrageous. If the "bristles" were softer, then this could be used as a vent blow drying brush. In its current condition, I'd use it to de-fleece a thick haired dog and then throw it out.

Title: Little compression.
Review: Not much compression.  Foot still swells.  Feels like just a sock.

Title: Doorbell
Review: Works great

Title: Fine, though a bit tight.
Review: Works well for my needs. The zippers aren't the best quality, but they haven't ripped nor snagged yet. The organizer is a bit slim; trying to fit a power brick, two wall adapters, and SD card case, and a phone stand proved a bit snug compared to my last organizer, which was only a bifold case. Still, everything fits and the color and feel are great.

Title: Do not waste your money. These are not polarized and do not darken in the sun
Review: I’ve bought better sunglasses from the local Quiktrip or dollar store. Save your money.

Title: Works ok.  Not messy like mascara.
Review: Like that it not smudgy looking.

Title: Currently design but arm holes are awkwardly constricting Review: This is super cute and looks like it is comfy but is strangely uncomfortable and awkward to wear. The arms are too tight at shoulders and hang in a weird uncomfortable spot several inches lower than normal. So it feels like you have a bra strap hanging down and cutting into your arm that you cannot adjust. I love the overall design but wish it was designed for ladies with substance and not stick figures. I put it on and immediately took it off to see where I could cut and sew to make it more comfortable so I could actually wear it. I’m a little chunky in the mid section - but overall, I’m an average size woman and feel like this is designed for a tall, thin person with small boobs and thin arms.

Love the cowl neck design but it’s too constricting and with the arm holes being so unforgiving, it makes me feel trapped in the top half of the garment. It is really long in back and will be great with skinny jeans and boots this fall.

I will figure out a way to alter it so it’s more comfortable. Will probably cut straight down front and stitch it so the cowl is more shawl like.

Title: NOT rfid blocking
Review: My cards can still be read through it

Title: Not good for any hard labor or outdoor hiking
Review: These boots didn't last me too long with the work I do at a shelter. The inner soles began to wear out and the nails came through the bottoms so I had to buy inserts if I wanted to continue to wear them. They are not water resistant at all. If you work walking on concrete all day, I do not recommend these. Also, not good for hiking.

Title: Great for school
Review: Not great for heavy use, but for a inexpensive laptop that is more than a Chromebook but less than a more expensive laptop, it's pretty good. There is NO removable battery, big downfall IMO. With this purchase you should get the warranty, and use it!!  This would make a great kids computer, use for school, research, facebook, email.....all great....Don't download a bunch of stuff and clutter up your storage.  Bottomline: If you want something more than a chromebook but are on a budget? This is your computer.

Title: You can ware them with anything
Review: I love the earring so much they go with my necklace I already had.

Title: Fits true to size. I am 6’3. 195. I purchased an xl
Review: Very good quality and price.

Title: One Star
Review: awful facial lotion I've ever had. Very small size and smell is weird.

Title: Nice camera
Review: Camera works fine.  You do need internet to be able to see it.  I was going to attach it to an out building, but need to attach it to a building with Internet. Clear pictures/video.

Title: Cute but don't size up
Review: Incredibly soft material and beautiful colors but I sized these up to an eight for my seven-year-old. The pants are way too big. If you have a skinny child don't size these up. No adjustable waist band either.

Title: My skin is getting dryer! Review: The more I use this Aveeno Hydrating body wash, the more I notice my skin is getting dryer!
I do use body lotion when I come out of the shower, but still dry.
I will not be buying this again...

Title: We love these Kid Nation shorts!
Review: Nice true to size shorts. These fit my grandson perfectly and they are great for all weather times. Made of terry cloth, they absorb great, too.  First time he wore them we took them to the beach with us and upon leaving the beach, with his wet suit on, he put these shorts over and they were great for keeping my car seats relatively dry. I highly recommend them for all kids, quality made, reasonably priced, vibrant colors and they wash and dry well.

Title: Comfort!
Review: Love the color combo, materials and fit.

Title: they love it.
Review: bought as a gift..they love it.

Title: Amazon, don't ever stop making these...they are AMAZING!
Review: I love these tops & they pair so well with the Amazon joggers. These fit so well & are such a great deal. They are my go to for loungewear. Please Amazon, keep making these!

Title: Another great product from L'oreal!
Review: I am 63 years old and am currently experiencing really sparse eye brows (this is a relatively recent problem within the last few years). Anyway, I love this Unbelieva-Brow product. It is super easy to apply and it covers everything (including my grays). It helps me fill in my aging 'gaps' in eyebrows. I will never use another brow product (unless of course L'Oreal comes out with something newer or more advanced. Just love this and highly recommend!

Title: Middle of the Road Headphones
Review: They're okay. Do you have a kid who's going through two pair of headphones a month? Do you want a pair you can take camping, hiking, skating, and where you knock around and might be rough on your stuff? Then these are good for you. They're not super sturdy. The plastic is thin and feels fragile. These are the very definition of Basics in AmazonBasics. They're a little small so if you have a big head they might be a bit uncomfortable. The padding on the ear cups is okay the stuff on the frame less so. Sound quality is. . . Basic, highs are flat, bass is muddy. These headphones aren't premium equipment and they don't pretend to be. They work and you won't cry if you break or lose them.

Title: Great super shiny gloss
Review: This is a super lip gloss. My lips are hydrated while using it and the shine is amazing. Just what I was looking for. If I had to complain about anything it's that I do have to reapply during the evening, wish it was a little more long lasting. But, outside of that, it's a nice compact applicator and it makes your lips look great.

Title: Overpriced silicone body scrubber; best for cat hair pick-up Review: The current price of $29.99 is INSANE for this scrubber. There is one hand-held silicone brush in this package along with a quick start guide describing how it should be used. It did not work well for me. It is awful with regular soap and better with liquid soap. The liquid soap goes in the center. I like the feel of this against my skin but I do not feel clean. I'll go back to my mesh body puffs which produce copious amounts of suds and cost less than $4.

Nevertheless, I do like the quality, look, and feel of this. It holds easily in the palm of the hand and has a hanging hole too. What this is good for is grabbing hair off surfaces my cats laid on (see one of my photos). It is also good to provide my cats with a massage while using it to brush their hair. Despite the quality of this scrubber, any price more than $12 is beyond ridiculous for this.

In summary, I love the color, quality, and design but it is not useful for what it was intended.

Title: Good Choice for a Small Size TV Review: I deducted 1 star because there is only 1 HDMI port on this TV, when there really should be 2.

I deducted another star because they put a label right on the screen itself that left behind residue upon peeling it off. This is unacceptable on a television.

The TV is lightweight. The picture is pretty good for a $130 TV. I like that it has both RCA audio out jacks and a headphone jack. If you really want a small size TV, this is certainly one to consider.

Title: Aesthetically Appealing Shape Is Impractical for Cable Management Review: This AMAZONBASICS HIGH-SPEED 4 PORT USB 3.0 HUB (with AC Adapter for use with Macbook, Mac Pro, iMac, Surface Pro and more) works fine, and the round shape is aesthetically appealing. My experience with AmazonBasics products is that they generally perform reliably.

However, once I set this disc-shaped hub up, I realized that the port placement (at intervals around a flat disc) causes the USB cables for connected devices to take off in all directions, so that cable management in my computer area becomes difficult. What I do NOT need is another cable tangle that will catch tons of dust.

I can’t recommend this hub. A USB 3.0 hub with ports placed in a straight row is a better choice.

Title: IDance Headphones came in wrong color, 2x colume in one earpiece, and with cheap a Y cable that caused static in earpieces.
Review: First my wife was excited I ordered her the WHITE, SILVER, and PINK IDance headphones she saw depicted on Amazon. Instead she got shipped ORANGE and PINK, and she hates ORANGE.  She still agreed to try them but; 1) the volume in one earpiece was twice the volume in the other earpiece on all songs, and 2) the Y cable attached to both earpieces is really cheap, and moving it around, caused static in the earpiece. Have to find some other brand for a tiny woman's head.

Title: Not Good. Doesn't provide much privacy Review: I don't need ultimate privacy. Just enough so that the person next to me on an airplane can't see exactly what I'm doing. Unfortunately, this doesn't even provide enough protection for that.

The privacy screen clips onto the display via magnets along the top. While the screen is on your laptop, you can still close it, albeit you can tell there something on the screen. Fortunately, the privacy screen comes with a folder you can store it in while you're not using it.

As you can see in my pic, from the extreme side (almost parallel with the display), you can still see pretty clearly what I'm doing. At this angle, I would hope someone wouldn't be able to see anything.

Bottom line: A bad privacy screen. Look elsewhere.

Title: Beautiful lightweight sweatshirt made for a man but loved by a woman EXCEPT for the major shirinkage Review: These are two beautiful lightweight, soft, and comfortable men's sweatshirts that look beautiful on. As a woman, I love the color and ordered these for myself. I take a size large to extra-large in women's and ordered these in a medium. The medium fit was snug but loosened up as I wore it. Unfortunately, after washing one of these on cold, hang drying for several hours, and then tumble drying on low for ten minutes, the sweatshirt shrunk about two inches all around and even more in the sleeves. The label says wash on cold and tumble dry low; I barely tumble dried it. If I ordered a large or extra-large, this would not be a problem as they are big to begin with. However, since the medium just fit, this is a disappointment. Other than major shrinkage, these sweatshirts are gorgeous and at the current price of $20 for the pair, they are competitively priced.

The attached photo shows the new sweatshirt on the bottom and the washed one that I wore once on top.

Title: spa ritual and it is pretty blended rose fragrance.
Review: it is a whole lotta packaging and that being said: the products [fragrance sticks, skin scrub, shower gel, and body moisturizer] are all there to create a spa treatment.  I would probably prefer a bath salt than gel.  The scent is light with a lovely soft rose blend: very calming, and not over the top in intensity.  I do love the body cream as the scent is calming.

Title: Not true to size; leg openings too small for size specified; otherwise comfortable Review: I take a size 6 in underwear which is otherwise known as a medium. However, I ordered these size unknown and they came in a large. I thought these would be too big but lucky they are a large.

The leg holes on these are too tight. Had they been a medium they would have cut off my circulation. The waist, however, is loose like a large is on me so that is correct. These do not ride up and they are comfortable. They wash well in a lingerie bag and I hang dry them.

In summary, I personally prefer more of a high-cut waist in underwear and a little bit more coverage in the stomach area. These just come up to my hips and they do not have as high-cut a waist as I prefer. Nevertheless, the leg hole is not suitable for the sizing specified. Someone who always comfortably wears a medium should not feel like the legs are tight on a large.

Title: OMG!!! STOP THE ADS!!!!
Review: Yes, you can choose your wallpaper and background, but for what purpose? There is a constant non-stop show of ads, requests for your re-ordering of previous purchases, sports events to watch, children's movies to see. OMG!! Stop it!!! I paid enough for this to want some enjoyment from it. Half the time I ask Alexa something, my Echo Dot in the kitchen responds instead of the Echo Show in the living room, where I am sitting within two feet of. You can 'adjust' your preferences and I have, but to no avail. Why am I paying so much for 24 hours worth of Amazon ads flashing before me? You should be paying me for advertising. Not happy! I'm 75, I don't want to see all the 'kiddie' movies available or sports for that matter. I should have the right to choose.

Title: Extremely lightweight moisturizer that penetrates and does not leave me feeling greasy but also does not moisturize enough Review: This moisturizers lightly and is unscented. It soaks into my hands and body without leaving them greasy but I still felt dry after using this. On another note, the push top must need to be re-designed because every time I dispense some lotion, it also comes up through the seams as you can see in the picture. Note that I had already wiped away most of it before taking this picture.

Personally, I prefer thicker and more deeply moisturizing lotions and ones with scents. I do like lightweight lotions for summer but this is really too lightweight for me and not moisturizing enough.

Title: I don't see the need for this & it leaves black spots on my face; lovely fragrance Review: I tried these linens by pressing against my face as described. Title: Back brush is best of the set; puffs are tiny; blue scrubber not for me Review: This set comes with a wooden handled back brush that has a brush on one side and massaging nubs on the other. There are also two buff puffs included. The buff puffs are so small they remind me of the freebies one receives with a liquid soap gift set. Also, included is a silicone scrubber with handles that has different sized nibs on either side.

The silicone item is too rough for me and it is awkward to use on the back. This might work well for some but it is not for me. The back brush is nice but I only use the brush side and I wish the handle was a few inches longer. I do not care for the massaging end. The buffs puffs would be great if they were bigger. I love mesh shower puffs in general but not tiny ones like these.

I have no idea how much this set will cost but I personally recommend buying the items separately unless the entire set will be used. Also, except for the back brush, the items are not high quality.

Title: HORRIBLE EXPERIENCE!!! Review: I never break out, but after using these wipes for only 2 nights, my face broke out horribly! Come to find out, they contain THREE major pore clogging, acne causing ingredients!!! (They're NOT non-comedogenic!!)

Title: Hair Free for Me
Review: This cream is amazing!  In just 8 short minutes this cream completely dissolved all the hair on my face!  I just slather it on the hairy areas under my cheeks and upper lip, wait and wipe.  So easy and my face is so smooth and hair free.  I LOVE this cream and will always use it.

Title: Update… runs big, back covers my butt. Cheesy looking Review: I updated this.
And changed the review.
This is like a silky cheesy shirt.
Runs BIG.
——-
I ordered a medium, but a small might look and fit me Better! This is a big.
Although it’s comfortable , and moving my arms around it’s not pulling
Too tight anywhere.
I'm 5’2, 123, 125lbs. to give you a idea.

The end of the sleeves are not finished well , you have to roll the sleeves up
And button them to stay up, which looks better. It does show in the picture to wear this
Like that.

You can tuck the shirt in, but it’s too bulky I think, as the back of the shirt
Is much longer then the front, and it covers more then my butt. I would rather this not be so long,
And not have my butt covered.

The neck and deep Vee front looks ok, but it keeps sliding back!
I ordered black, and glad I did.
This is all cheesy polyester.

Title: Decent basic shirt Review: Made of a nice material. It isn’t too heavy, but it isn’t cheap and thin. Soft and very comfortable. Doesn’t wrinkle easily, which is nice.

The neck opening is a little large (wide). The shirt is a bit on the larger side. I chose an XL and think a smaller size would have worked. I am 5’4” and weigh about 171 lbs. I am a 38 DDD.

Title: These fit as described. Review: The control is great, especially around the tummy area. The reason for only 3 stars is they roll down on me.

Other than that, they are great.

Title: Nice Fabric, Construction; Odd Sizing Review: This LEVI’S MEN’S SOFT SHELL CLASSIC TRUCKER JACKET runs small; the Large size is simply too small for my husband (who is normally a Large, sometimes an Extra Large). The jacket fits me fairly well as a “car coat”. (I’m a women’s size 10/12; in unisex tees, I wear a men’s Medium.)

The 100% polyester fabric is quite nice. It’s tightly woven, so it’s “water resistant” and provides some rain protection. The styling is traditional Levi’s “jeans jacket” styling, though it has both nylon zipper and snap closings. The overall construction is impeccable.

The cut is straight at the sides, NOT tapered the way it appears in the product page photo. I suspect—but don’t know for sure—that the jacket would be long-waisted on men that it fits in the upper body.

Title: Nice size but quality not up to par
Review: Nice size but quality not up to par, The size is great for a child but the rubber tips pop off easily and have to be placed back in every time you use the umbrella. It has a nice coverage and the children enjoyed seeing the raindrops on it and being able to view the rain from behind their bubble window.

Title: keep looking for a different keyboard Review: It was hard for me to pick a keyboard but I’m generally happy with it thus far! I like that it’s wireless. I don’t need any more wires on my desk. Rechargeable is also great. Working from home I have to buy my own batteries so forget that. I love the keys on this! It feels great to type on.

My only complaint is I can’t charge this if my laptop is sleeping. I had been charging it via usb on my laptop and it wasn’t working out well. To solve this, I had to use a much longer usb cable to connect to the power strip on the floor... it works. Overall, I’m happy with it.

Edit 1/21/21: I’ve been using this keyboard for 5 months now and the battery doesn’t last as long as I would like. It doesn’t last the full work week. Working Monday-Friday, it starts to die by Thursday. I’ve had it go out while typing sometimes but it does turn back on after a few seconds. I usually can make it until end of day Thursday. It takes many hours to charge as well. I plug it in 4pm and it’s still charging when I check it one last time at 9pm.

Title: Smells like chemicals and weighed my hair down Review: I opened the bottles after it arrived so I could use them and they smelt like chemicals instead of something nicer. I ignored the chemical smell since I’ve seen all the reviews saying it made their hair soft and everything. After washing my hair with the shampoo and conditioner my hair felt like it was coated with something like when using a cheap shampoo and conditioner and after my hair dried my hair was so weighed down by the product that my normally curly/wavy fluffy hair was straight and practically stuck to my head like after you wear a helmet or hat for a long time. I’d return the product for a refund but I can’t go to a drop off location and they don’t offer the option to have ups come to you like Amazon offers for many other products.
Mane and tail has lost its quality over the years because this kinda sucked.

Title: Best at home Dip Kit!!!!
Review: I have been doing my nails with the dip for over a year.  This is the best kit out there and the price is right!!!!

Title: One Star
Review: does not work

Title: Colorful and attractive headbands but sizing varies Review: There are a total of four headbands in this set and two of them are very colorful and attractive. The black is also attractive and the checkered one is very nostalgic looking. However, the sizing is off. The multi-colored black one was so tight it gave me a headache and the checkered one so loose it fell off. Except for the one that fell off, these are really made for small heads or perhaps teenagers.

The current price of $9.99 is competitive as it comes to $2.50 per band.

Title: Unhappy
Review: It was broken and a huge disappointment

Title: Great, pretty, handcrafted earrings
Review: These are super cute earrings! Nice, quality made, they hang on my ears lightly but they are substantial enough to see from a distance. I love silver jewelry in general and the fact that these are handcrafted makes them even more special. They come in a cute little box, so they would make for nice gift giving. I have received several compliments since wearing them.  Highly recommend.

Title: Five stars...easy.
Review: It's so so so tiny. I like it because of the size but I also am annoyed at the size. Put it the TV and it's likely to get stuck and be a pain to get out. Still the size is adorable and no weight at all! I would buy again.. SMH. Even knowing how difficult it is to keep track of. I wouldn't recommend it for grade school or even middle school.

Title: Great eyeshadow palette!
Review: This is a great little eye shadow palette, perfect for keeping in my purse with all the warm/brown shades I need. Easy to apply, lasts for hours, includes highlighting colors as well as dark for contouring. I highly recommend this NYX brand for anyone looking for some great neutral colors in a compact case.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Fix without any problems.

Title: it's Slim Profile is Nice
Review: It's nice having so many places to hold cards. Credit cards fit, but most business cards have to be shoved in and may look a bit mangled. Medicare cards must be put into a larger pocket. American money is a tight fit also. It is nice to have a wallet and multi card holder that is longer and therefore stays fairly slim.

Title: So cute!!
Review: My husband and 2 year old look great in these hats! Love love love!

Title: Lots of features for the price - if yours works Review: Someone previously mentioned that maybe there's a bad batch of these going out - I think I got one of them. I followed all the instructions for setup, but the turntable made a horrible grinding sound every time I played it. By wiggling it around I got it to go away mostly, but records skipped pretty badly (records in good condition that play fine on other turntables). So I'm sending it back.

Pros: It's pretty nice looking, made of solid-feeling wood, speakers weren't awful, and lots of features for such a low price.
Cons: Terrible turntable quality, which was the whole reason I bought it in the first place, so it must go.

Title: Good Buy Review: Standard tights, Although cheaper quality, the price justified....am wearing now... don't know how they'll hold up in rewash, but cheap enough not to worry.
Opacity and fit were excellent... will repurchase

Title: Fashionably Chic, But Feels Like Beanie Review: This CALVIN KLEIN JEANS MEN’S DENIM REISSUE LOGO BASEBALL DAD HAT is made from quality fabric, and it has a fully adjustable sizing strap that uses a clamp rather than snaps for sizing. The bill is fashionably shaped and provides good sun protection.

However, it has an extremely shallow crown, so that it sits atop your head like a beanie. When you're wearing it, it feels like a beanie, and like the slightest gust of wind will dislodge it. It may be fashionably chic, but it's not comfortable to wear for active sports or exercise.

Title: Would not buy again Review: Should have bought something else
Oh well

Title: Great for checking on you dog or kids
Review: This indoor camera works good. I can see what the puppy is doing when I leave the room. It works good at night with the lights off. When the heat comes on I can see the dust flying around the room. But you can not point it at the window to see what is happening outside. The camera reflects off the window and you can’t see anything.

Title: Nice fitting pant.
Review: comfortable, washes/drys very well.  Can press if I want, but really not needed.  have 3 pair so far, 2 white and one demin.  will get other colors for sure.  Good purchase.

Title: Not As Powerful as My Former One
Review: I ordered this to replace a Lady Remington trimmer that I have been using for the past couple of years. This one is okay, but it's not as powerful as the Lady Remington. It was difficult to open to install the batteries. I had to get my husband to do it. I mainly use my trimmer to trim hair around a facial mole that I have and above my lip. I find that with this one I have to go over the same hair a couple of times before it gets it sometimes. It's pretty quiet which is nice. Overall, it's okay, and I will continue to use it, but when it needs to be replaced, I will probably go back to the Lady Remington one.

Title: Rinses clean
Review: Liquid body soap is so much more sanitary than bars.  Solimo is nice and silky and rinses off thoroughly.  It doesn’t have the pleasant scent that more expensive soaps have.  That’s a minus for me, but the price makes up for it.

Title: Blades don't shave !
Review: Looks sleek but the blades don't work !

Title: Static and Interference for weak AM stations using supplied AC adapter
Review: Mostly liked this radio, but the deal-breaker was the extra static and interference on weak AM stations when using the supplied AC adapter.  No such issue when using batteries.  A separate single sheet explains that AC switching power supplies can cause AM noise and recommends the radio be at least 1 foot from the power supply, which I did, but I couldn't detect any difference in the extra static using the AC adapter as a function of distance from the radio.  For strong local AM & FM stations, the sound was crystal clear using battery or AC adapter.

Title: Looks cool but not easy to use
Review: It was difficult to use if your challenged by Origami type things.  I sent it back.

Title: They are already falling apart
Review: I bought a pair of these batteries for my 3 year old phones. They are not holding as much charge as initially even they are just a few months old... they were cheap though.

Title: Very small half-sized tissues with lotion; way too expensive Review: There are five packs of 40 tissues each but the packages are not marked for the quantity. At the current price of $6.99 for 200 tissues, this comes to almost $0.04 cents per half tissue as these are the size of half a tissue. This makes these VERY EXPENSIVE TISSUES.

These are nice and strong and soothing. They do feel damp, however, due to the lotion but not wet. I like them and the portable packages they come in but just a box of Puffs Lotion Tissues would be even better.

Title: Ok for the $ but not a good tablet Review: I own the Ipad and I did not like it as an Ereader also too big, I am petite and my bag already weights maybe 7Lbs. so I was looking to dowsize all the bulk which includes, cell, Itouch the Kindle2, first of all I really wish they would have offered a 3G model, like the Ipad, the WIFI is glitchy and slow (it is ok at home) but in many businesses you need to enter an access code, which is a pain. the email app is bare bones, you cannot even see sent messages.
It takes forever to start the device and it is slow on the web.
Really the only thing I like is as an ereader, and I also have uploaded my itunes music so it is an OK MP3 Player.
The design is very nice as is the resolution, but I would have paid $100.00 to have something a bit more functional.

Review: Husband says it does trim or cut worth a darn.  Tugs and pulls hair which is uncomfortable.  He reports he threw in the garbage.  Yikes.  Sorry I invested in the case too - but he says the case is great and will put something else in that. Bummer.

Review: Middle of the road.  Not the best.

Title: Buyer Beware
Review: It arrived well wrapped and packaged, nothing had spilled, however bottle was not full, it was at least 2 inches from the top! Smell is as expected, seemed a bit watery, possibly water added?

Title: Absorbs well and moisturizers; I like the retinol PM one the best Review: There is a 1.7 ounce pump container of collagen and elastin moisturizer for application on the face and neck morning and/or evening. There is also a trial size of Retinol PM which can also be applied on the face and neck. I avoided the eye area for both creams.

The moisturizer absorbs well and is creamy with a bit of light and airy feel. It did leave my face and neck feeling hydrated. The retinol PM is a bit thicker and I really like that. It goes on smooth and is very moisturizing. Both products have a faint aroma but dry scentless.

I personally love Olay Total Effects 7-in-1 Anti Aging Cream more than this combo and it is a lot cheaper. At the current price of $34, this is priced on the high end.

Title: 20 tiny polyester feeling scrunchies; not fo rme – 2.5 stars Review: There are 20 variable design scrunchies in this package. The material feels like polyester, so it is a bit slick which increases the chance these will slip out of the hair. Also, they are tight, so they will not be useful for a person who has long thick hair as the elastic will probably break.

I have medium length hair in the back and these held for the most part. However, I do not like the feel of these at all and the designs / colors are unexciting.

These come to $.50 cents per scrunchie at the current price of $9.99 so that is competitively priced for the quality received.

Made from a good quality leather, this wallet has a sturdy zipper and lots of room inside to place your money and credit cards and even some room for a lipstick or mascara. I really liked using this on a recent international trip I was able to place my most critical items in it and safely hide it in an inside coat pocket (perfrect for security). Highly recommend for when you want a smaller way to carry your money and identity items.

Title: Nice small brush; huge comb; set is not proportional Review: This is a very odd set which I do not consider giftable. There is a lovely mini boar bristle and nylon brush with a tiny handle. It is a brush for an adult purse or for a toddler. I love it. This tiny oval brush glides through & detangles my hair easily.

The negative is the comb. The comb is huge and is not proportional with the tiny brush. It is big and bulky to hold and the finish does not even match. This is the reason I do not consider this giftable. The comb works, but I personally do not care for it.

I love the brush only and the current price of $6.99 ($9.99 minus $3) is reasonable for this ensemble.

Title: Didn't Work with My Hair
Review: I have thick hair that goes at least an inch or two below my shoulders. It's cut in layers. I tried to use this on multiple occasions without any success. I don't know if it's user error on my part, or if my layers caused the trouble. I had my daughter give it a try, too. Her hair is much longer and she "sort of" got it, but it didn't look very good. It's possible that she needs more practice. The piece is much bigger than expected and has wire inside to stiffen it. There are pictures on the description that shows how to work it, but it still was a little confusing. I frequently wear my hair in a sloppy bun on top of my head, so I know my hair is long enough for that. Unfortunately it didn't work for me.

Title: Perfect As Always
Review: Bought these as a replacement thanks to my dog destroying the first pair.  These were exactly like the pair I purchased 2 years ago.  Which to say, the quality on them is amazing.  Aside from them not being able to handle a German Shepherd/Husky mix gnawing the crap out of them, they held up beautifully for 2 years and I'm expecting this new pair to be able to do the same plus some.

Title: So cute!
Review: What a cute hoodie. My grandson is a Paw Patrol fan. I got it for him for his birthday but ending up giving it to him early. He never wants to try clothing on but when he got this hoodie on he didn't want to take it off. Loved it!

Title: Bought, 4 that we are returning. If you're ... Review: Bought, 4 that we are returning. If you're looking for a WiFi wireless connection - forget it. Doesn't pick up well even with more bandwidth and extenders. Battery operated and will not last long if you use the LIVE setting. No way to turn this camera OFF. So unless you hardwire this camera it will be a pain all around between replacing batteries and poking your eye out trying to get all cameras set wireless.

Doesn't it seem fundamental to be able to turn a camera OFF? (It is not enough under the circumstances to turn-off notifications = not the same. Extremely irritating).

Review: Wow. Just used this mask and it cleaned all of the junk in my large pores. I have used other clay masks that i purchased on Amazon but I definitely did not recieve the kind of positive results I got from Redmonds. This product rinsed off my face easily too. It has a different consistency that dries quickly too.

Review: The image quality is great! However, they don't stick the best to my daughters metal TAL brand water bottles. So she is a bit disappointed because I purchased these specifically for her

Title: Easy to install
Review: I needed this for work and it was easy to install, I use it daily.  Have only had it a few weeks but so far, so good.  It comes with a long cord too which is a good feature.

Title: Great for short term use is terrible battery life
Review: We got this during Black Friday because it was such a great deal the only problem is that the battery life is absolutely terrible I thousand percent terrible every night we do need to plug it in but my daughter only uses it for about a half hour and when she’s done the battery life is down to 20%

Title: Expired Product
Review: Aveeno is a brand that I trust. I used this gel moisturizer for the first time without reading the jar. It was nighttime and I was hurrying up so I could go to bed. I did notice that there was no safety seal on it which I thought was odd. It wasn't in a box either. I liked the smell - it has a fresh, clean scent to it. It absorbed nicely. It's hydrating. I really liked it. Then the next day when I was not so tired, I read the jar to make sure that I was using it correctly. I found it alarming that it was already expired. Plus, there's wording on it that it's for sales demonstrations only and not for sale or resale. It's very upsetting to learn that expired products are being sent out.

Title: Low Quality
Review: Very sloppy looking. Also very short.  I'm only 5'7" and this barely comes down to my waist.

Title: I understand why they discontinued this monitor.
Review: I bought this in May and it constantly goes into power saver mode, even though I have it set no never go into that mode, or screen saver or any other mode.  Very frustrating and expensive.

Title: Great bag for shorter trips or a carryon case!
Review: I love TravelPro luggage and I buy it exclusively. This carry on bag is perfect for my use. Suprisingly roomy, I can use this for weekend and short duration getaways as well as use it as a carryon for my laptop and a change of clothes when I check a larger bag for longer trips. Quality made, hard sided, it stands the test of rough handling. The spinners are great and allow me to maneuver easily and make turns without having to struggle with a bag. I love this small bag and it is my new go-to bag for frequent use.

Title: NOT AS PICTURED AT ALL!
Review: The scarf/wrap I received looked nothing like the photo of my " color choice" nor is the fabric " cashmere" like -- it is just some kind of cotton/poly blend... Thin too! Even in the photo the item looks soft and like cashmere! Well it's not!

Title: Has Issues
Review: I was disappointed with this case. This case has covers on the bottom for the charging port and headphone plug. I cut them off before installing the case. The thickness of the case creates a tunnel for the speaker. You have to have the bottom of the phone facing towards you if you want to listen to the speaker.  This case covers up the buttons with rubber buttons. They are very difficult to push. The case makes the phone much bigger than I thought it would. I do like the texture of the case it feels smooth but if set on a slippery surface it won't slide. It's very easy to slide in and out of my pocket. I am still using this case until I find something I like better.
