Playback Time: Up to 8 Hours
Standby Time: 220 Hours

Title: Cleans as good as water but with less fuss; goes on like whipped cream
Review: I attached before, during, and after pictures of cleaning my boyfriend's dirty sneakers. It took some dirt off as can be seen by the dirty paper towels. This dispenses like whipped cream and cleans like water. I do not feel this is anything special; however, it cleans in a pinch when no water is available. I am skeptical if it will clean scuff marks. I have over 15 pairs of sneakers and do not have scuff marks on any of them. My boyfriend's dirty sneakers only have black bottoms and the one that has a white bottom has no scuff marks.

Title: micro usb cable
Review: Micro usb cable.  Oops, I needed a mini!  But can use these.  Time will tell about longevity.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All of my reviews reflect my honest, personal experience with the reviewed item - your experience may be different. I am not influenced by any outside source. I receive/accept NO free products or discounts that are not available to all shoppers- ever. For some reason our shopper ranks are no longer visible - so, to give you a little more info about me, I am a top 50 reviewer (#30 the highest rank achieved). Those numbers used to fluctuate over time - up and down but I noticed that they stopped updating regularly - perhaps to phase them out.  I've been doing reviews for over 25 years with Amazon - nearly 6,000 reviews posted, viewed over 50,000 times, and over 24,000 likes.

Title: It was a recommendation from a YouTuber but......it didn't pan out for me.
Review: I was sooo excited to try this mascara because of a recommendation on YouTube  from a beauty guru.  It was no big deal though.  Not any better than the usual mascara at the store.  I still like L'oreal Telescopic Carbon Black the most as far as drugstore mascaras go and I love Lancôme Definicils the most of all.  I so wanted it to be an excellent mascara but it wasn't for my lashes:{

Title: Great gadget/gift for the person who has everything!
Review: Cute gadget. Gave it to my 28 year old son to try first (as I can sometimes be technically challenged). It was easy to set up an within minutes he was using it (to the delight of his 5 year old daughter). No complaints except for the battery life. Didn't seem like he used it for more than an hour that he had to recharge. I think Parrot should do something to extend on this if they expect to attract a sizeable crowd purchasing same. I will say that it would make a great gift to give the person who seems to have everything as it is clever and definitely a conversation piece. Holiday giving would work especially to be under the tree for the difficult to buy for sure. I would just keep in mind the battery life. As a closing comment, I am now the proud owner of this minidrone and I must admit this 50 something women just loves to play with it (to this dismay of my cat who would love to get her paws on this, lol)

Title: Most comfortable socks I own
Review: After some research, I chose these socks, and boy I'm glad I did. These socks are just awesome. Very comfortable, snug but not tight and great for hiking. Go.ahead and put them in your cart... you won't be disappointed.

Title: professional tweezer
Review: Eh. These really aren't any different that any other tweezers I've tried.  They eventually grab the fine hairs and pulls them.  I use a mag mirror to help.  Was hoping the thinner, slanted edges would allow me to grab even the finer hairs... but eh.  Not really.  So... they are your average tweezers.  They work - but I don't think any better than any other pair.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Better in the photos
Review: This looked like a perfect outfit for my beach trip! Ordered the green one and it didn’t fit over my chest and looked very cheap on. Wouldn’t suggest ordering unless you’re a petite woman. I’m a 38DD and the large was way too small.

Title: Salon results!
Review: This is a nice way to get salon results at home with gel manicures. It is easy to use, the nail dryer works perfectly and there is a good variety of colors. I have used this twice over the past 2 months to do my own nails at home. To be honest, I still would rather the salon as I am not good (especially with my left hand applying to my right hand) getting the polish on smoothly to my nails by myself. However, it is good for me to be able to use this between salon visits for redos and touch ups. Highly recommend!

Title: Definitely not for me, but maybe for my sons
Review: First for pros: This is tiny, maybe about 3/4 inch thick at it's widest. Sleek, attractive and would probably delight any techie who is looking for some kind of new hip gadget. For the cons: It's too small. There are no indentations to grip the mouse and it is difficult to click on any area that you are trying to. Navigation/movement of the mouse is ok, it's the clicking that is difficult to do (and it becomes quite annoying to say the least). Within using this for a full day I, unfortunately, reverted back to my old wireless HP mouse. Maybe I am just old school and set in my ways (I am in my 50's), so I will be 'loaning' this to my techie son to give it a go. Maybe he will appreciate this better and will be able to navigate easier than I could. If that is the case, I will revisit my review and update accordingly.

Title: Mixed review Review: The sun is losing it's strength, and the days are getting shorter, so I purchased this light to help me keep making pendants even in the fall and winter.
It works, sort of. Yes, I read the directions, yes, I applied a thin spread out layer. No matter what I do the sides stay tacky and if they are tacky, I imagine underneath the thin layer isn't quite set either).
It's such a brilliant idea, but for the cost, maybe a UV light from an aquarium store would work better.
I used the magic glos with ZERO complaints in the sun, it works WONDERS, but under this light it's a 50/50 proposition. I even tried leaving them under for extra time and then setting the pendants on their sides so the edges received more directional light, no luck with this lamp.
It works, but hardly perfectly...maybe it's just me, and maybe I can get it to work on something. For now, I'll keep trying, and hope for spring to come again soon.....

Title: Great quality leather checkbook wallet!
Review: This is a really nice checkbook/wallet. First, it is quality made and a beautiful soft leather. Room for 5 credit cards and cash, this checkbook wallet also has a place for a pen to store. I don't know about you, but I am always digging for a pen when it is needed at the bottom of my purse. Having a place to permanently keep my pen allows me definitely a more organized purse. For less than $15 this is a no brainer. If you need a new checkbook wallet this is a great choice. It would also make a great gift for your mom or anyone else that needs to carry a checkbook with them.

Title: Beauty and Comfort
Review: Love these

Title: Save your $
Review: Good looking watch but the functions are non functioning and the gold playing has pitted in less than 2 weeks of regular wear.

Title: Pretty large and clunky
Review: These are large....maybe close to four inches long and the tips are not that fine.  I don't like them.

Title: boys shoes
Review: The shoes ran true to size in my opinion.  HOWEVER... the ad is SO deceptive.  They show the last three letters of the "brand"  as IKE.... Now.  What do you THINK you're buying?  A brand name we all know - NIKE.  BUT YOU ARE NOT getting a nike brand boys shoe.  You're getting a chinese knockoff... something like Vicike... or something - who cares what it says.  I was furious.  I purchased two pairs of the black shoes thinking I was getting something I was not.  They are cheap foreign junk - that isn't cheap.  GRRRRRR.  I am searching for a brand I know and trust and hopefully not fully made in China.  As always - BUYER BEWARE. However when the seller is posting extremely misleading photos - shame on them.  I would pass on these - across the board.

Title: Not the best, but good enough
Review: This card is used to supplement storage on a Walmart/Sero 7 which is used as a home media player. I use Wifi, to sync, and even plugged into the USB cable with the PC. Either my expectations on Class 10 storage is too high, or this could have been a better product. It seems to take forever, especially when synching large quantities of music files.

Title: Only Brand I Have Used That Have Not Had Any Failures
Review: I have burned almost 1,000 DVDs and every brand I have tried has had some failures in a spindle of 100.  With one brand, I had as many as 18 that failed out of 100.  I am on my second spindle of 100 Sony DVD-R reprintables and not a single one has failed so far. (Actually one did, but it was my fault.)  Out of all the brands I have used, they seem the best.  I only use 3 brands now: Sony, HP or Verbatim.  I would buy Sony again anytime.  Note that every brand I have tried fails if I go above the minimum burn speed.  Could be my old slow hardware that causes the problem with not being able to burn at higher speeds.  I have also experienced playback problems with certain brands.  They appear to burn okay, but then have problems playing back.  No issues with any of the Sony disks so far with recording or playback.

Title: Ickey sticky
Review: Color was horrible,  it took two months to ship to me and its sticky

Title: Not Bad, Not Great
Review: For the price, it's ok.  If $50 is a big deal to you, I would advise not getting it as it's not really something of top quality.  I've had this for about six weeks now and have had a little fun with it, but the construction seems to be a little loose as there is already 'debris' underneath the glass....weird since I keep it in the provided pouch and inside my bag whenever I'm not using it....a disappointment indeed.  Nonetheless, you can have some fun with shooting a limited range of stills, although it takes a little bit of a learning curve to compensate for the focus lag when shooting fast moving subjects.

Title: Good Choice
Review: I purchased this pin because it looked attractive and was reasonably priced.  When I received my purchase I was delighted to see the actual item was as attractive as its promotional photo.

Title: Fun lil hat Review: The hat is ok, it is pretty much as I expected...for the price. It's a little large for me, but I have an extra small head. They included some foam self stick padding you can add inside the rim to adjust it and that helps.
It's a cute little hat for casual outings..

Title: ‘Pink’ is not pink
Review: The pink advertised is actually a light orange.

Title: Great daily repair cream!
Review: I try to go at least once a month for a facial and mild dermaplaning. So, when I saw this cream, I definitely thought it would be great to use in between treatments. I love the way it goes on, soft and creamy and my skin absorbs it quickly. It has a very gentle exfoliating factor (urea) and I honestly can see a noticeable difference in my skin (staying smooth and fine lines diminished) after using this for several weeks now. Highly recommend!

Title: Size 15-17 too narrow waisted for 90 pound 10 year old
Review: These would be nice comfortable pajamas for a child if they were proportioned better. I bought these for a 90 pound 10 year old and they were plenty big, maybe a little too big. Everywhere but in the waist. The waist was too narrow and has elastic that does not have much give. Had to send back.

Title: eyelash glue applicator
Review: Honestly, it works about as good as any glue - it dries clear and is tacky in about 30 secs.  Works as I like.  Holds a reasonable amount of time.

Title: Worked great for Chromecast with Google TV.
Review: I bought this for adding wired Ethernet to the Google Chromecast with Google TV and it works perfectly. No more lagging connection.

Title: Aveeno they know what they are doing no more dry skin
Review: Aveeno really knows how to  Moisturize! Their was not one thing in the Sam box I did not love. I believe the prices are right on point and so worth it! I get dry skin in winter and this makes your skin so so smooth the body yogurt love. The sheer hydration lotion on hands not greasy so so soft. I am going to be buying all of these. Totally recommend to anyone with dry skin.

Title: wide jaw clippers
Review: These clippers are definitely wide - the file that comes with it is garbage - just tossed it.  The "file" doesn't file anything  - it's smooth - I think they forgot to attach the grit for filing.  The clippers cut and open wide for thicker nails (my husband). I never hesitate to update my reviews should new seem useful.

Title: Beautiful brush with an ordinary brush head; way too $$$
Review: The brush handle on this brush is beautiful and feels like it is handmade. The wooden handle is easy to grasp and hold during styling. However, the brush head itself is ceramic with typical prickly nylon bristles. This does work well to reduce frizzing and static during blow drying. Although this brush works well, I strongly feel the price of $50 is way too expensive. I know ceramic brushes cost more but it should not be this much more as there are others on the market that I have tried which are excellent and are much cheaper. The price is the only reason I rated this 3 stars.

Title: cotton gloves
Review: In these days, all the latex type gloves should be saved for medical staff... so I am using these instead at night - putting on lotion and then these gloves to help heal my hands from all the washing.  They are comfortable - I think more so than the rubber gloves - so that is nice.  It's like a home spa treatment.

Title: User friendly
Review: This item was very easy to install.  The instructions easy to find and follow.

Title: At first seemed DOA.
Review: Must visually confirm that connector is fully extended by looking at slide groove.  Mine seemed DOA until I realized that  it wasn't making electrical connection.

Title: An okay brush set for detangling; I prefer the detangler brush over the hair brush Review: There are two brushes in this set. One regular brush and one detangling brush. These brushes comb through my hair easily. I had to assemble the detangling brush. This brush is perfect for combing wet hair in the shower. It glided through my hair. 

What I do not like about this set is the regular brush. It is very hard and almost rips at the hair. Also, it is irregular as can be seen in my photo. The brush lanes do not line up straight. 

At the current price of $10.44 ($10.99 minus 5%), this is somewhat pricey for the quality of this set. The detangler is good and typical but the regular brush is not good. The handles on both brushes are good, however, as they have a soft grip to them.

Title: Ok, but not great
Review: This is inexpensive, but I hoped it would look like better quality material.

Title: Safety pink color way off
Review: Purchased the safety pink color due to the hue of pink shown in photos. Not at all hat I received. What I received looks like an 80’s neon pink, but being my kids thought mom chose a “cool” color, I decided to keep it. Unlike most other goodies I’ve purchased by this maker, this one is showing signs of wear very quickly after 2 washes. It looks months old and developed piling already.

Title: Crappy charger cord
Review: So far my first cord used only worked for 4 months.  I am on the second cord.  Hopefully it will last longer.

Title: Suit
Review: I bought this suit for my son. If I went by the recommendation on size, which I didn’t, it would of been way too small. I went up a size and pants were fine, but the jacket was so small it looked like it was a kids size. Highly disappointed!!! I do not recommend.

Title: Waist is too small in the black pants, not too small in the khaki pants
Review: For some reason the black pants' waist is way too small, but the khaki pants fit just fine. Great pants other than that. The khakis were very comfortable and easy to wear, but the black ones don't seem to be made the same.

Title: Lighted keyboard function keeps failing
Review: The main reason I got this keyboard was for the lighted keyboard. But after using it for a while it fails to light. I have to reboot my computer to get the light function to work again. Very inconvenient.

Title: Wonderful noise cancelation
Review: Bought these for 100 dollars used off another website, but I would definitely say they're worth full price. The ability to turn ANC off is a plus, they're very neutral in sound, but there is decent bass. Only bummer is that you cannot customize the EQ with the app.

Title: Five Stars
Review: pretty good for the price.

Title: SEE UPDATE - Description & picture are wrong for this hat; makes my head look like it’s full of air Review: I ordered a fake leather hat as shown in the picture on the Amazon site. However, what I got was a felt cloth type hat with a butterfly pin along the rim. The visor is short and the top of the hat is so large that it makes it look like I blew up my head with air and am about to take off. Not only is this hat unattractive but it is not at all what is advertised.

UPDATE: I changed this from 2 stars to 3 stars because I finally got the correct hat (see last picture). The hat is adjustable via a buckle in the back. However, even though it is fake leather it feels cheaper than that--almost like plastic. It is made in China of 100% polyester with the lining 93% polyester and 7% spandex. I normally look great in these type page boy hats but this one looks so so. Due to its cheap feel and less than attractive look, I am rating the correct hat I received 3 stars. NOTE that there is a chance purchasers will get the wrong cap because the packaging and label on the packaging is the same for both hats I received.

Title: Stiff pants
Review: The pants are very stiff. Like heavily starched that does not come out in the wash

Title: Don't waste your money!
Review: I was pretty disappointed with this product. It doesn't do a very good job of trimming down your eyebrows. You're better off with regular grooming scissors.

Title: Just Right!
Review: At first I thought this pocketbook would be too small, but it’s not. It’s just right. Not too big and bulky and not too small. All of my stuff fits in this beautiful and unique pocketbook. Beautiful!

Title: Smells nice, cleans well, but is too drying for my skin
Review: This body wash smells nice, lathers copiously, and cleans well. However, it is too drying for my skin. I do not use any other acne product, so it is only this soap causing the dryness. I will only be spot using this on acne since I cannot wash my entire body with this due to its drying effect.

Title: excellent and affordable
Review: excellent product. was super easy to use just plug in to the usb port. fast shipping. great price. just what I wanted

Title: Good choice
Review: Just a normal cable, works great for my external monitor!

Title: Great purchase! Loved this product! Will never go back to disposable razors again! A++++
Review: Bought this for my man & he LOVES it! He said he will never go back to disposable razors again! He said there was no learning curve at all switching from disposable to safety razors! Well worth it!

Title: Would be a great set if the brush didn’t smell of shoe polish Review: At the current price of $11.99, this brush set is sort of an excellent deal. It comes with a large boar bristle brush with wooden handle, a wooden comb, a nice satin eye mask, and a "carry" pouch that covers the head of the brush only.

This brush passed through my hair easily. What I absolutely hate is that the brush STINKS of SHOE POLISH. It is probably the finish on the handle, but the smell is somewhat offensive to me. Nevertheless, everything else is fine. The satin sleep mask is comfortable, is slightly padded, and blocks out the light, The carry pouch is nice as well. This set has to be aired out before use, however.

Title: I love these!
Review: The sandals are great! They are cute, they look exactly like the picture. The cushion is fantastic. So comfortable! They fit is as expected. I want to order every color 😁.

Title: Same as expensive Beauty BleNder
Review: I’ve bought the 20.00 blender and these and there is NO difference I can see. This works the same, cleans the same, and you get 4 of them. Get this and try it before you spend 20.00 on 1 because of the brand name. It’s a sponge that works really well- just like the expensive one.

Title: After using this several times, my scalp is still itchy; smells like pine
Review: At the current price of $28.99, I expected a shampoo that worked as designed. However, I already tried this several times and my scalp is still as itchy as previously. It does perform well as a shampoo and strips my hair a bit like detergent, so I do like that periodically. I do not care for the medicinal pine-like scent. The aroma is not offensive but it is not enticing either. I personally would never order this again because it does not live up to its claims.

Title: Terrible quality !!!
Review: It's paper thin. Your label is stamped and can be seen as I have short hair now.  I usually cut my tags off.  Don't buy this !!!!

Title: Not as strong
Review: These batteries come in a nice little holder. I charged all 4 at once but there was one that took way longer than the others. I put 2 in my flashlight and noticed the brightness wasnt very good. They didnt last long in another one I put them in.

Title: Three Stars
Review: First one lasted 3 days. The replacement is working for now

Title: None of the cutouts were centered over their respective buttons
Review: Does not fit well at all.  With the decal centered from edge to edge (top to bottom and side to side),  none of the cutouts weren't centered.  The decal can easily get caught in the laptop bag resulting in the corners being lifted.  On the plus side, Decalrus gave me a refund without any hassle.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Looks nice but causes my son's neck to break out and itch.

Title: Smells clean alright
Review: Ugh....this smells like a scented cleaning product! Even if I liked it, it doesn't last.

Title: Really cute nice cardigan, just a bit short
Review: This cardigan would easily be 5 stars if it was about an inch or so longer. It falls right at the waistline of my granddaughters pants. It is very cute and my granddaughter loves it. It seems well made. It slightly thicker than a lightweight sweater. It washed well and I let it air dry. My granddaughter usually wears a size 5t or xs and she received the small. There is more than enough length on the sleeves.

Title: Good value
Review: I measured the pieces in my diamond art and they measured 2mm but these are a little smaller.  They did work however so I am happy.  Picture shows size in kits and these together.

Title: Cute, very small, minimalist. Review: The picture shows a cute smaller type of bag, but did not give measurements!
So,I was surprised how small this bag is. The longer I looked at it, and handled it the more
I think its functional, but very small, but this can be a cross body. It comes with the strap in side to connect. Also A little material ribbon Handle on the top.

If you do not carry a big purse ( I don’t), leave home with just a small wallet, keys, phone, a few cards etc. you will like this.
For me it is too small.

Has allot of little zipper compartments, although not big. The details ,rings etc. are in silver, the bag is black,
With only the front zipper pocket that is quilted, and gives this a better look to it. All the zippers are large plastic.
They work ok.
On the back is zipper , two on the top, and one zipper pocket inside.
The quilted pocket has a zipper also.
I’m thinking if you do not use this as a corss body you could leave this little bag somewhere in in your cart!

This is Not a fanny pack.

Title: Works well, waterproof.
Review: I have an Olay brand, and this is relatively bigger in size.  That said, it does pretty much the same thing.  Access to the batteries was easier.  Waterproof as I keep this in the shower to remind me to use it regularly.  Not  Travel size friendly. More for use at home.

Title: So So.....
Review: I absolutely love this hard-to-find scent, but this was almost gone from the bar.....

Title: batwing tunic
Review: If you have a bust, this is NOT the blouse for you... after reading other reviews I thought I might get away with it... but I am clearly too busty for this blouse at 38DDD... not huge.. but this blouse is going to work for an A or B best.  I just donated it. A shame because the navy and embroidery was really pretty.

Title: Unbottled disappointment
Review: I don't often leave negative feedback about products - it really has to be a pretty poorly made product for that to happen. Unfortunately, these bottles are super leaky, even with the rollerball tightly secured and the lid properly screwed on. The screw-on lids seem a poor fit for the bottles, and one of them leaked all over a leather purse in which the bottle was being carried, ruining it. (First world problems, I know). I contacted Amazon to see about a refund, but the only way they would refund the purchase is if I returned the bottles - which are filled with essential oil blends, and I would have to dump it all out to send the bottles back, or buy another set of bottles and try to transfer the oil over. For $9 it wasn't worth all that, even with the $5 additional credit they offered, so I had to chalk this up as a loss and a "buyer beware - read the reviews!" So please - read the reviews. I'm not the only one who had this problem! (Also, note the number of people who received a discount or received this product for free in exchange for leaving a review).

Title: Attractive full coverage swimsuit with bra padding and a side tie Review: This swimsuit is very attractive. The spaghetti ties in the back make it easy to expand for a good fit and are easy to tie. I personally do not care for bra padding; however, it stayed in place when putting the swimsuit on. One thing I really did not like is the tie in front. I could not get it to tie in a way that was flattering on me.

The material is thick and not see through. Overall, this is a quality suit. I just really do not like those ties nor the bra padding.

Title: I think I got a bad product
Review: I bought this a while ago I have bought it before at the store as well and this one in particular looked old and even expired for some reason right after I opened it, now I have noticed it looks like this after a lot of use from the many months of using the one I had at home but I honestly did not think I would get a new one that looked like this one, I really don't mind too much but I'm still not happy with my purchase.

Title: Disappointed
Review: I had hoped these would work for me since they have adjustable straps.  Nope, not even close to working for a narrow foot!  Plus they felt more like "plastic" shoes.

Title: Love it! It fits my Chromebook perfectly
Review: Love it!  It fits my Chromebook perfectly.

Title: kind of stiff
Review: My husband has a similar remote for his TV. His buttons are more responsive and easier to use. With my remote I sometimes need to click repeatedly before I get what I'm requesting. I've changed the batteries several times, hoping it would help. I just don't understand why his remote works better, they are identical.

Title: Perfect
Review: The best case I've bought so far. Very lightweight.

Title: Great little gadget!
Review: Works exactly as described!  👍

Title: Great headphones
Review: Got these a few years ago, loved them then and now. Great sound, battery is great, all around 5 star product!

Title: Go up one size
Review: Runs small but cute for basic black cardigan

Title: Nice thin sweater that is perfect for layering but it is super itchy on me Review: Even though this is a men's sweater, I ordered it for me. It is a bit large on me because I normally take a men's large for outerwear or medium for undershirts when I want a snug fit. This is an extra-large. Nevertheless, it is perfect for layering. However, I find it to be very itchy. I do not feel it as much when I put it on top of additional layers but it itches more than other sweaters I have tried recently. As a result, my boyfriend is going to inherit this.

It is made of 100% Merino Wool in China and it has to be dry cleaned.

If it did not itch me, I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: Disappointed!!!
Review: I have loved Meta jackets, in the past......but i do not like this one.  It is longer......the picture did not show that the back was loose......and the fabric is not as nice as the others that I had.  I would not reorder this style and fabric.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Nice product. Covers the Carlo cameras very well.

Title: Nice earrings for casual or dress
Review: These are a really nice pair of evenings. They are not too large, but sizeable enough to be noticed in my ears. They are not heavy and I can wear them all evening with no discomfort. I have received several compliments when wearing these as well. Quality made, reasonably priced,  highly recommend!

Title: Nice for work
Review: These shirts are ok. I mean for the price. they don't fit so great. Not flattering. They get out of shape and they are not a long shirt. ok for work tho

Title: Sizes run very small
Review: Way too small; returned it for a bigger size; but the quality is outstanding

Title: I tried it on before buying it, but I should have worn it for an extended period Review: I had put this on for a bit before buying it, and I really only put it on to check that the cup would fit since I have a larger bust (DD+). Since it did, I continued with the purchase. But man does this thing hurt after a couple of hours, it is TIGHT, even if it's the right size. Also, I am not sure if it shrunk, but this is the only bra that no longer fits me well. I bought multiple bras along with this one (not all natori), so they had all gone through similar amounts of washer/dryer cycles, but this is the only one that feels way too small now.

I'll be donating it since I haven't worn it in about a month and I don't plan to.

Title: Junk
Review: Was a piece of junk I hooked it up and it lite up red and wouldn't work at all. Junk I sent it back.

Title: These feel like uncomfortable tugboats on my feet Review: To me these are not worth the current price of $28. They feel cheap and are a bit oversized. I take a size 9 to 9-1/2 in women's and this large is for a 9-10. However, it feels like a wide width and are swimming on my feet. They fit better if I wear thick socks with these.

Because my feet move around in these slippers, I often find my heel hitting the top of the low back and that is uncomfortable. In addition, if I do not wear socks, the tag in each slipper irritates my arch because it sits directly underneath it. Of course, I could try cutting that out, but I do not know if the "nub" left behind will be even more irritating. Had I tried these in a store, I would not have purchased them. I would have liked them more had they had a full back and were easier to keep them on my feet (meaning were more narrow in width).

Title: Bright but eats batteries
Review: I guess it depends on how long you want to read, right? I haven’t actually timed it, but I only use the light occasionally for an hour or so at a time but have had to replace the batteries several times. Three tiny little Phillips screws (don’t drop em!) and a couple more CR2032 batteries and we’re good to go again. Wish this was rechargeable...

Title: Body wash fragrance smells like a cheap old lady perfume; washes and lathers well Review: I had tried this Finn [[ASIN:B09HR4VKQB body cream]] and loved it so much that I was dying to try this. However, the fragrance of this is so intense and cheap smelling that it is a turnoff. It reminds me of perfume old ladies used to douse themselves with back in the sixties when going to Church.

The body wash lathers and cleans well but the scent is terrible. The current price of $30 for 8 ounces is insane for this, especially because the fragrance is so horrid and I love fragrance.

Title: they stretch out too much
Review: They start off fitting great and after a few hours they start to sag  I gave them to a girl one size larger than I am and she liked them better.

Title: button up sweater Review: First, sizing... it appears to be SUPER SUPER SMALL... asian sizing?? The 3x fits like a large. Eh. I am 38E/F. There is NO way I can wear as a button up. Second, the smell! It has the most horrible petroleum (?) odor. I have no idea what it is but the chemical smell is overwhelming. I am not keeping it so I won't comment on washing. Third, it arrived rolled up in a clear plastic bag with NO tags. Eh.
It contains some portion of spandex and I think polyester of some sort. ? But who knows. What a shame. It's just junk.
The best part? The only positive thing I can say is the color - it is listed as "pink" but it is the perfect coral color. I really, really wanted it to work. I LOVED the color. But sadly the color alone could not "save" it from the garbage bin. Live ... and learn. We hope.

Title: Great water shoes!
Review: These are super cute (I love the colors) water shoes. I took them on a cruise I just completed and got so many compliments! I used them while on the beaches in the Caribbean and even when navigating Dunn's Falls in Jamaica. They fit my feet well and protect them from shells and rocks. Oh, and did I mention how cute they are???? Highly recommend!

Title: Not Seeing The Results Yet
Review: I've been using this neck tightening cream for a month now and I'm not really seeing any results. I've lost over forty pounds in the past six months and my neck skin is pretty saggy. I will keep trying it and if I do start to see any changes, I will update my review. It does not irritate or burn my sensitive skin.

Title: Size up! Review: These do run a tad small. The sole seems fairly durable, they are certainly soft.

If you have a wider foot or on the cusp between sizes, I highly recommend going to size up.

Title: Scent Heavy
Review: This dry shampoo is scent heavy. It smells like you took a bath in body spray. It also doesn’t work really well as dry shampoo. It doesn’t make hair look less oily at all. All it does is make your hair smell like a middle school boy.

Title: Cute style but very cheap material
Review: Cheap quality & super thin material

Title: Had to Hire a Handyman
Review: Trying to get this together and installed was a nightmare. I am disabled so I struggle at a lot of tasks but this was just a royal pain. Glad I've only got a 28" TV on it, would be nervous if it were bigger or more expensive. Got the handyman out, he used some choice words, got it installed properly. Would not buy again. Handyman told me he wouldn't install another if I did.

Title: Adorable
Review: Soo cute! It's a little big!

Title: Christmas
Review: My mother in law loves it

Title: Nice manicure set but case holders rip immediately Review: This set looks impressive and is extremely presentable. It has eight tools, most of which I use.

I use all the clippers the most and they cut well. The tweezers are aligned and pull chin and eyebrow hairs easily. The scissors are sharp, although I am not crazy about the curled angle of the blade. I do not use the ear picks. However, my biggest complaint is that the case is impressive but the holders inside the case are super cheap. One ripped in transit and another was about to rip by pulling out a tool. 

The current price of $19.99 is too expensive for this due to the shoddy case. Nevertheless, the tools work well and are great.

Title: Not pigmented well
Review: Not the shade I was expecting. Been buying for a while but it isn’t very pigmented anymore , hardly shows up

Title: just right
Review: Listen, these are just plastic hair combs, but I need them with my pony tail. The price is great and they work wonderfully.

Title: Love It !
Review: love it  i love the perfume so i knew the body spray had to be great too ...  its a nice sexy smell  not sweet  but bold !

Title: Pretty neat!
Review: I got these because my boyfriend wanted them. It worked great for a while until you lost the piece that actually plugged into your phone. After about 6 months or more of use it started slowly taking longer to charge our phones.

Title: Can't Get Past the Scent
Review: Scent matters to me. I want my skincare products to either smell amazing or have no scent at all. When I opened this, I got a strong earthy smell. It kind of reminded me of some essential oils. I didn't love it, but I didn't hate it either. The more I smelled it, the more I disliked what I was smelling. I finally decided it smelled like dirt! I'm meaning literally like dirt. Maybe that's what ginseng smells like, I don't know. But I just couldn't get past the scent. It has a nice, creamy texture. It felt cooling when applied. It's not greasy or oily. It absorbs well. But because I don't like the way it smells, I can't keep using it. I have tried another product by the brand and it smells very pleasant. Smells can be subjective and what I like may not be the same as what others like.

Title: My go to for loungewear!
Review: I love these joggers & pair them with the Amazon hoodie. They are definitely my go to for loungewear. Comfortable, wash up well & great price. Amazon, keep on making these...I love them!

Title: Good idea, but it doesn't work!
Review: Don't waste your money. I have extremely fast Wi-Fi and it kept saying that the connection speed was the issue. Bottom line, the product doesn't work and now I am out the money and it is going in the garbage.

Title: iPad cover for little girls iPad
Review: It was loved by all, especially the little girl that received it !! :)

Title: not worth the money
Review: i purchased the protection plan for a Bluetooth headset. when i called to get my money back because the product broke they made me do a bunch of research and look up all the information for the product. they want to know if it is still under manufacturers warranty. He wanted information i didn't have and insisted that i call amazon to find out the manufacturer. After i refused to call amazon he transferred me to amazon without my consent. i don't think i should have to jump through hoops and do a bunch of research to find out if there are other warranties in place. I want Assurion to pay me for the product and then if its still under warranty they can do the research and get reimbursed. I don't have time to do all this.

Title: Best Quality, great price
Review: Well made bag which will only get better the older it gets.  Love it, my grandson was thrilled with this bag when I gave it to him.  people who saw it, believed it cost way more than it did.  great purchase.

Title: Cute
Review: Cute outfit to wake up in Christmas morning. I think this will look great on my grandson for pics .

Title: Nice bun
Review: It fast way to put your hair up.

Title: Not recommended Review: The install frame is nice to have and fingerprints weren’t an issue, but that’s about it for this screen protector.

The install items that come with it are just terrible. The wet cloth has an awful odor to it. Then the drying cloth is so linty that it dries but leaves all kinds of particles behind. That would not be so bad it the dust sticker was worth a darn. The sticker barely lifted anything off the screen.

I ended up using my own screen cleaner and canned air to completely clean the screen. I’ve installed many screen protectors over the years and none had so many issues with bubbles as this one did. The upper corner also wouldn’t stay secured to the screen and there was nothing in the way to make that difficult.

Im so disappointed in this product. It will be getting returned.

Title: Nice but cracked
Review: Liked the product but received cracked in 2 places. Still using but needs better packaging.

Title: Great convenient size way to protect your skin!
Review: Great convenient sunscreen stick. I keep it in my purse and use it during the day when I am out and about in this Florida sun. It's a perfect 50 SPF which is perfect especially when I am out on the water and the sun is extra strong to protect my sixty-something skin. It glides on easily and has a light fragrance. I am deducting 1 star because it is a tad on the greasy side but overall, it's a great way to protect your skin.

Title: Not recommended for anything but short fine hair and even then it is practically powerless Review: I am not at all impressed with this hot air styling brush. I have medium length fine hair and tried it on the recommended low setting on damp hair as recommended in the manual. I could barely feel any power or heat. I then raised it to high and it just increases the noise but there is limited heat and air flow.

This has a high, low, and off buttons and a curl release button. The curl release did nothing for me. The styling brush easily removes for easy cleaning by unscrewing the tip (see second photo).

My recommendation is to save your money. A regular roller brush with a blow dryer does a much better job. I had zero results with this. Someone who has very short fine hair might have some success but I doubt it will be worth the purchase. Its only redeeming value is that it can be used like a dollar store brush without the power. This is not worth more than $1 to me and the current price of $39.99 is highway robbery.

Title: Great facial serum, but a little oily
Review: I have been using facial serums on my sixty something skin for about 20 years now, so I have tried many different brands and varieties. This is a nice serum with unique ingredients. I love that it is from Israel where the women have some of the most beautiful skin on the planet (Dead Sea minerals?). I am deducting a star, though, simply because it is kind of oily and takes a while to absorb into my skin. I tend to like a serum I can apply and then almost immediately use other products. Not so here, I have to give it a good 5-7 minutes before I apply anything else. Other than that, it is really nice. Will use it for days when I am home and not having to rush out.

Title: 5 stars but be careful that you get what you paid for Review: Bought four of these to use in a RAID. All four of the boxes had PN: 98D648 - 550 on the box. When I installed one of the drives it was smaller than the others. PN on smaller drive's label was 98J146 - 308 and it was called a Barracuda 7200.10. Larger drives were Barracuda 7200.11 9BX154 - 303 on the drive label. Returned it and will check the replacement when it arrives.

7/3/08 Received replacement drive and it was Barracuda 7200.11 9BX154 - 303.

Title: Darker & redder than expected
Review: Box bottles are very similar in the use and design. Let's say it's just a bit darker and more red undertones than expected. Grey's visible in a month, and previous bleach regions (over a year old) could be seen. Poor consistent saturation of color.

Title: Watch is adorable but time is hard to read and fastening the clasp is difficult - 2.5 stars Review: This watch arrived in a paper envelope in a smashed box. Inside the box was a watch wrapped in a plastic bag and the cushion that the timepiece should be fastened to was thrown off to the side. There is also no manual.

However, this timepiece is adorable. I really love the cute owl face and the ears. The second hand is red and very visible; however, the minute and hour hands are the exact color of the watch and the watch face. It is practically impossible to see those "gold-colored" hands against the "gold-colored" background.

In addition to the above, the clasp is incedibly difficult to fasten because it only opens halfway into a V. The watch is too big on my wrist by a few links. Nevertheless, I have to keep it long beause if I did not, I could not fasten the clasp. The current price of $19.99 plus a 15% coupon is reasonable for a watch. In order to make this worth the purchase, however, it needs to have darker minute and hour hands and the clasp should open all the way or at least 3/4 of the way.

Title: gold plated cross over ring
Review: I was really bummed that the stones are soooo small they have next to zero sparkle.  They are just cz so why are they so small?  The setting is a bit rough - might snag clothing - but I've had rougher rings.  The sizing was fairly accurate.  Just wish that they would have enlarged the stones so there would be some sparkle - right now, there isn't even a tiny bit of sparkle.

Title: Runs small
Review: Runs small

Title: Basic Sound Nothing More
Review: No where near audiophile quality but OK for Kids

Title: Crap Product!
Review: These are absolutely worthless. After spending a frustrating ten minutes trying to figure how to "open" them (yes, I read all the q's & a's) -- of course there were no instructions --  I threw them in the trash where they belong.

Title: Great for traveling or any time!
Review: This was perfect for my most recent 4 day cruise. It contains a facial wash, an exfoliator and a moisturizing cream, everything I needed to keep my regular beauty regimen going while I was away from home. Perfect to pack and use, really nice moisturizer, too. Kept my skin looking optimal! I will be buying another set as I will be doing an extended trip to visit with family in July. Highly recommend!!

Title: Three Stars
Review: short waisted.

Title: Works well
Review: Great addition

Title: A little weak for Turtle Beach Review: Cord is a little short and requires an and requires an adapter to plug into my pc. Mic arm is inflexible.

Not terrible, but not perfect. A little weak for Turtle Beach

Title: Three Stars
Review: Does not hold up well to stand it up. wont buy again.

Title: Mold
Review: Smelled bad soon as I opened it, threw in the garbage

Title: Didn't get all my order.
Review: I would have like to got all the order. Any way that can happen. I love the set that was ordered.  Thanks

Title: So cute!
Review: Theme for my nephews birthday party was dinosaurs. For the cost it was a no brainer

Title: Nail clippers cut well and provide a good grip but clip fell off on first use - 2.5 stars Review: There are three nail clipper tools in this set and they are sharp. In addition, a nail file and what looks like a cuticle pusher or toenail lifter is included. I'm not really familiar with that last tool.

LIKES
- Handles of all the clippers feel great in my hands
- The cutting blade on the clippers are good
- The other implements are nice to have

DISKLIKE
- One of the spring clips on the toenail clippers fell off immediately (see photo). It actually operates better without it but I was able to put it back on.

The current price of 18.04 ($18.99 minus 5%) is way too pricey for this, especially since the spring fell off on first use. Even though this set works well, I hate when product pieces fall off. I would have expected that for a clipper set that was cheaper and not this price.

Title: Great undershirt
Review: Nice  breathable material

Title: Well dressed garbage
Review: Looks cool... that's about it. Don't understand need for magnetic cover. Also, the cover is a tri-fold. Again, no idea why. If it was one piece the Kindle would stay up while watching movies, reading, ect. 2 stars instead of one cause it looks cool or whatever. But losses the rest for lack of functionally.

Title: Nioxin system
Review: I purchased this set and have used it for a couple weeks, so far, I don't notice any significant difference.  It is not meant to 'regrow' hair, but it is suppose to help stop hair loss and make the hair you have look ... thicker.  I purchased the safe for color, level 4.  It smells a little minty (? - maybe minty chemical)...  I don't care for the scent but it's not too bad.  But I will keep using this set until it's gone.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: This is the second bottle of Angel I have purchased ...
Review: This is the second bottle of Angel I have purchased on amazon without the code in the box.  Never will I be duped again.  I thought the fragrance was off the first time, but used it anyway.  I was at a friends house recently and used her angel and wow!  what a difference, so I ordered a fresh bottle.  This box had no code in it either.  Do not buy any angel products until you can be sure it is the real deal.  For myself, this is the last perfume purchase I make on amazon.

Title: Material made me sweat
Review: I didn't care for the material, it didn't breath well (made me sweat).

Title: Cute but very thick material.
Review: These were so cute but the material is very thick and not very soft. It was a little too thick for warm weather.

Title: Comfortable
Review: I dislocated my big toe in a car accident and my Podiatrist suggested Merrill shoes. Like walking on clouds.

Title: Way Too Short
Review: I would say that I'm average as far as how long my torso is. This shirt is practically a crop top on me. The description says that it's fitted at the waist. This shirt doesn't even reach my waist. The shirt is a little snug on me which isn't a surprise. I'm probably right on the border of this size and the next one up. It's not uncomfortable though and if I loose some more weight, it might fit better. I like the color a lot. It seems to be made well. Because of the shortness on me, I probably won't wear it out in public.

Title: Got a clear one by mistake
Review: I do not even remember buying this product but if I did I hate it, I bought the clear one by mistake is what I think because I would NEVER buy a clear lip pencil for any reason :/ I thought it was just weird when it arrived. I am not even sure I can return this because I do not like it and do not want it. I will probably be trashing this out.

Title: Weak Review: I've bought quite a few magnetic cord sets and given as gifts, I'm a big fan of them. But this won't be a gifting cord....
The magnetic connection is very WEAK. With other cords I've bought, you can dangle the phone by the cord....not that I make a habit of it..... It's just to explain the strength of the hold. You will lose a connection with the slightest tug of this cord....But then, maybe I received the only lemon flavoured cord.....

Title: Runs Small
Review: I've always wanted a red wool coat. I think they look smart! I wear a size 18 women's or XXL. The XXL coat was too snug on me. I could get it on, but the arms were too tight and I couldn't get the coat closed. It wasn't as long as I expected, which was actually good. I thought it might be below the knee, but really it was about mid thigh. For reference, I'm 5'6". The material felt pretty thin and cheap to me. I've had several wool pea coats and this definitely felt sub-par compared to them. The red color is nice and looks like the pictures. I like that the hood is removable. There's a belt, too. I didn't see anything wrong with the construction. Overall, it was just okay.

Title: Hanes Men's Pullover EcoSmart Fleece Hooded Sweatshirt
Review: I wear 3XL. . .  good fit, comfortable, but for the sweatshirt, I could have also wear a 4XL. . . . just a little more room, but I like a little bigger . . . .

Title: Not a Fast Charger!
Review: I ordered this a few months ago for my son. He wanted a fast charging cable for his phone. The length was good, but this did not charge faster than his previous slow charging cable. When he moved out of his dorm this spring, he decided to throw it away because it was just too slow.

Title: Absolutely perfect
Review: I love it! Ty soooo much

Title: Go New You won't regret it then
Review: It never worked right from the day I got it.  I sent it back and replaced it with a new Kindle Fire HD that I love!

Title: Soft on hair Review: I like the softnesses of these hair ties. I have fine hair and they do not break my hair like others.
I would love to see them in brighter colors.

Title: i have super fair skin and used to get weird sun rashes ...
Review: i think this has helped me with sun exposure issues.  i have super fair skin and used to get weird sun rashes but these have helped me.  they also look reasonable instead of super akward.  something for fellow fair skinned people- i started taking iodoral and it has helped my skin respond to sun better.  you can find iodoral/ iodine supplement on Amazon

Title: Complete garbage
Review: I’ve been using this for only less than a week and it’s already not working. It scratches several of my rare vinyls, and it stopped playing. Such a bad product

Title: Great purchase
Review: I love that I can rinse it clean and hang in my shower to dry.

Title: Easy set up Review: I like the fact that it set up automatically. It has great noise cancellation and the battery life last a long time.
Excellent product worth the price!

Title: Perfect mouse for my laptop
Review: Great mouse, ergonomically fits my hand perfectly. Battery has lasted in this now for months (I received this back in January and haven't had to replace yet). I love Kensington products, you can depend on the name and the quality.

Title: Substandard quality; one side doesn’t stretch; label crooked; threads hanging off Review: This is a pretty headband with reflective stitching. However, the quality is substandard. Mine arrived with loose threads I had to cut off. The label on the headband is crooked. In addition, the top part of the band does not stretch because there is a thread that goes all around preventing that. The lower part of the band stretches a lot and does not fit snugly around my ears. If I want this to fit snug around my ears, I have to turn the headband upside down (meaning the label is upside down) and put the opening with the non-flexible stitching over my ears.

In summary, I love the color and reflective stitching but the band itself does not stay in place because it is overstretched on one end and rigid on the opening of the other end. It is also not very warm. The current price of $14.99 is too much for such a low quality product.

Title: Not entirely pleased
Review: I very much like the Kindle Paperwhite, but have had issues from the beginning with charging this iteration of the Kindle.  I have attempted everything in the troubleshooting guide, including restarting my Paperwhite sometimes multiple times per day. I quite like the readability of the font, and the ability to change fonts and font size, but the charging issue is beginning to be more trouble than it is worth, as it continues to worsen.

Title: Worked great until it broke
Review: Was a great little cable until the audio connector fell off.

Title: headphone splitter
Review: I purchased this for my husband and I to use on my cell or other device while we zoom or other with our grandsons.  Works as you would hope without issue.  You get only the splitter, not the headsets - so if you don't have the headphones you'll want to get those.

Title: useful
Review: Bought this for a new laptop and I am thrilled about lightweight this case is.  Really nice for travel because it is so light.  There is a really handy zippered side pouch that perfect for the mouse pad, mouse and cords.  There are slots for glasses, note pads, etc.  There is also a band on the back that you can slide the case over a suitcase handle.  It's not super fancy... leather or designer.  But I have to say, it's really functional.  I never hesitate to update with any useful info.

Title: Really nice necklace, looks great on!
Review: Super cute multi-colored necklace. Lays well on my neck and is easy to clasp. I have received several compliments while wearing this. For the money, this is a great necklace and I highly recommend it. It looks great with my summer attire and ties in all my colors together.

Title: good
Review: cetaphil is like the best lotion on planet earth.  enough said.  it sjust plain legit.  super good for sensitive skin

Title: It's okay
Review: A dipole works just as well but this one looks neat.

Title: Does not fit and looks a lot different
Review: It really looks very different from the picture when you try it on, the part at the bottom is weird also looks very strange, I don't like it at all. I may just never wear it because of the bottom part only looks too strange for me, and does not fit well either, it has way too much fluff filling which is great on winter but not good for wear except on winter months probably. If you are curvy I do not recommend if you don't mind the weird fit at the bottom and shape of it as well as it being slightly smaller then go ahead I guess, it is very hot though.

Title: black pull over dress
Review: I am 5'7"... usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x... 38DDD.  I was curious about this dress because of the price.  However, the old adage - you get what you pay for - really is true.  Honestly, it's very heavy.  The "v" neck is terribly low.  I did like the 3/4 length sleeves, but that was about it.  It is a true black.. not a dark charcoal.  It was just not a flattering look for me, I am an hourglass plus size.  I do not wear heels and the dress was a bit too long.  In all honesty, the dress was in the donate bag the day it arrived.  I apologize for not noting the washing directions or material content as I always try to provide that.  Of course, all of this is just my personal experience and opinion... I don't argue that yours may be different.

Title: Would buy again!
Review: Love the feel of the material. Great stretch. Runs a little large. Would buy again!

Title: Another great Pre de Provence product!
Review: To be honest, as of two months ago I had never heard of Pre de Province products. Introduced to the brand by the use of their hand creams, I was immediately smitten with the brand. They seem to always know exactly the kind of products my aging 60 something year old skin is craving. This soap is no exception. Loaded with Shea butter, this soap keeps my skin feeling like silk and the light flowery fragrance. Taking a shower has become an event I truly look forward to because of the way this soap feels. And the beautiful packaging on this Van Gogh is breathtaking and would make a great stocking stuffer gift this year for the woman you love in your life!

Title: HORRIBLE QUALITY!
Review: Terrible quality, had to return and THEY charge you to return it......AVOID this seller!!!

Title: Falling feathers!
Review: Came out during wear - I was careful, but still lost beautiful feathers.  Price for value should not have feathers fall out.

Title: Small and made of plastic, nope
Review: The clip which holds up the ring light is neither metal (made of plastic) nor adjustable, rendering the ring light useless. Poorly made and clearly not for me.

Title: Colorful, fun holiday socks!
Review: These socks were a big hit this past Christmas. I had these plus two others that I bought to give to the men in my house. They all wore them on Christmas and told me how comfortable they were. One of my sons is a school teacher and he told me he was going to save and wear them in class next year in December (thought his 7th grade class would get a kick out of them). I love the colors and the design, too, and they also washed really well.. I am planning a new tradition going forward and will do this every year (of course with different designs). Highly recommend!

Title: Nice overnight moisturizing cream with noticeable results
Review: I wasn't sure if I should try this as there was no internal seal for the product, but I did anyway (I figure that must be how they manufacture this since others have mentioned it). I have been using it nightly now for a good month. I do see a nice difference in my skin: plumper, more radiant and the crows feet under my eyes seem diminished. I can recommend this as a really nice overnight moisturizing cream with retinal. I wish it did have an internal seal, would definitely have made me feel safer.

Title: not a bad product for the price
Review: These are...weird. They're literally lined with rubber material. Which makes them oddly...heavy. (If that's an accurate description for socks!) Hard to walk in because of the bizarre, squishy, thick rubber jelly on your feet.  All in all, not a bad product for the price. Wore once while on a long flight - I can't say they made my feet super soft but they did make them sweat. Haven't worn again because I don't know how to wash them. And the instructions included were in Chinese.

Title: Great daily skin care aid to a beauty regimen!
Review: Nice basic serum to be used daily to help diminish signs of aging. I have been using serums every day in my beauty routine and this hyaloronic serum is really nice. The fact that it also contains vitamin C is a definite plus for my skin regimen and I know that this is good for me.  This is also super reasonably priced. No woman over the age of 30 should be without this in their bathroom. Highly recommend.

Title: These are a good deal and they work well on the iphone
Review: These chargers work well.  They aren't lightening chargers, but they serve the purpose and do what they are made to do and that is to charge the phone.

Title: Fit
Review: Didn’t fit my kindle

Title: Buyer Beware Review: I have been using Boots No7 for several years. This is not the original product! The true serum is slightly creamy, smooth, and lightly scented. This is clear, sticky, and the scent is heady. The packaging is off. In my photos, the knockoff is on the left and the original is on the right. The original is a little shorter and wider and the printing is much more crisp and fine.
If you are looking for the actual Boots No7, this isn't it.

Title: Super cute but a bit costly for what it is
Review: It’s a pretty cute top but with the material it is made of I’d expect to have paid no more than 5$ for it to be honest. It’s very very thin and I don’t think the lettering and image will last many washes/wears. The material isn’t breathable either so I don’t think I’d wear this in the summer.

Title: Did not accept touch in several spots, battery was awful
Review: I ended up returning this product

Title: Overall just okay
Review: Weird, shiny fabric. Would not have purchased if I saw this in the store in person. But, it fits as advertised. Arrived quickly. Good price. Colors were as expected.

Title: Dangerous  May 2021
Review: My earlier review of this product is now nowhere to be found.  I suspect the mfgr has used some underhanded way to get Amazon to remove it.  I was offered up to twice the purchase price if I would remove the negative review I wrote months ago.  I declined, they persisted, but I will not allow them to corrupt my integrity,.  This tool is dangerous.  It slipped off my toenail and gouged the flesh of my cuticle and toe.  Profuse bleeding, but no permanent damage, thank goodness.  Anyway,  buy and use at your own riskj.,

Title: Worked but not for long Review: I used this product for this pair of Nikes, after using the adhesive left both shoes 'pressed' under a heavy end table
leg for 72 hours. All was well, though within about a week they slowly are coming'unglued', thankfully there's plenty more left in the tube to re-apply, which I've done twice now. Still, the shoes are at least wear-able which would not have been the case before.

Title: Don't-will not work long
Review: Liked the bone conduction. Did not hurt ear canal like regular earphones, and was able to hear my music as well as the surrounding noise, which made it easy to hear surrounding noise for safety. And the sound quality was good, and it did not disturb those around me. These bone conduction earphones were great while they worked, but they only worked for about 6 months, I used them maybe 2 times per week, and then they just DIED. Was not able to recharge or use. There was also no protection plan available. Do yourself a favor and pay a little bit more and get something with a protection plan in case of failure.

Title: Not for me.
Review: Horrible shirt. Cut looks like a tent. I ordered XL and it’s huge. The texture feels like a rough rug. Pattern is ok, but design literally looks like a big box.

Title: Holds up to it’s word
Review: The pendant I’d bought this chain for had an opening too small so I fiddled with the loop till I got the pendant on the chain. Not the normal action I take but I liked the chain and was tired of returning items. It looks great, it’s a keeper and let me tell you that you these things are strong material. I wrestled with that loop with my tools, very testy it was.

Title: Great value
Review: Very sturdy but hard to install.

Title: Brush
Review: Works ok not very sturdy.

Title: Five Stars
Review: great product. high quality. fits perfectly.

Title: Too Big, does not show size ! Review: This shirt is very soft and comfortable .

There is not any size in this shirt , And my order does not show a size , but I thought
I ordered a medium ! , and it is Huge.
Around the neck is too big, and the whole shirt is big.

I like the charcoal gray, and the bottom of the sleeves Are turned up, cuffed.

I’m 5’2, 130 lbs. ,36C. to give you a idea of how this fits. Tooo BIG.

Title: Very cheaply made
Review: Not what I was looking for at all. Not study by any means

Title: Maybe I got a bum product Review: Maybe I got a bum product, but we really can't say anything good about this product. Even from the start, it was difficult to get it out of the package. then you are left with a tall, skinny bottle that seems designed for tipping and spilling. We shoot the dickens out of the bottle and it was still watery thin. We shook it again to the point of ridiculousness and still watery. Each time we tried to apply it, it would run down the edges of the nail and bleed every where. When we finally got something of a base layer on, the color was a little along the lines of bruised finger nail.

I really think we got a bum sample so I'll put our experience out there and let customers see if it's a trend.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great pants I get lots of compliment on these....

Title: great for cold care.
Review: I love eucalyptus for when you have a cold.  I sent this along with other "cold" items when my daughter and her family were suffering.  I have not tried the Kneipp brand before, however, my daughter reports it had a great effect and not too strong.

Title: Nice kit containing everything
Review: This is a cute makeup kit containing everything you need. It is super compact and easily can fit in a purse. I think, as this contains small portions of everything, that this would be a terrific gift for a young girl. Big variety of colors and styles, would be nice to travel with, too. I wish it had come in a box (it came bubble wrapped) so it would be better for gift giving. Other than that, cute set of products.

Title: I had trouble cutting my toe nails with this Review: At first glance this looks like a nice nail clipper. The handle is soft and ergonomically designed and the cutting blade is sharp. Unfortunately, it comes with no instructions. It took me a couple of minutes to realize that the left or right wire in the handle is what gives it a spring. I had to use either one or the other by moving it up to the top of the cutting blade as shown in pictures 3 and 4. It does not matter which wire is used. Also, when I tried to cut with the clipper, the cutting blades require that I put my hand at an odd angle. There is certainly an acquired skill required with this clipper.

It comes with a case but mine is bent a bit. Nevertheless, that is a nice touch. Although, I am glad I ordered this, I cannot rave about it either simply because it is awkward to use.

Title: headphone adapter
Review: Husband has an Iphone and needed an adapter for his Bose headphones.  This adapter worked as it should.

Title: silver sapphire ring
Review: Wow.  I am surprised that no one else has noted the sizing.. but I usually wear a 6 1/2 - 7.  I purchased the 8 because the ring is sort of wider... the ring I received SAID "size 8" but it measures just barely over a size SIX (6) on a ring wand!  I am really disappointed.  I ordered a size 9 to compare and then I will decide if I will return them both or not.  I am hoping this was just a mismarked/mistake.  The ring itself is really beautiful in person.  I really hope I can get one that fits.  At this price you would hope the sizing would be more accurate.

Title: Lots of features
Review: One nice feature is that you can run this with a USB cable (included).  The other choice for running is batteries.  Works good, sounds okay.  Comes with earphones.  A good player, but has a lot of different controls, some of which I couldn't quite understand, even with the included manual.  No complaints, except it would have been nice if it had been rechargeable instead of using replaceable batteries.  They do make players that are rechargeable, so if that's what you want, pick a different player.  Otherwise, this is a good choice.

Title: For longer curlier hair then mine. Review: Great for long thick curly hair.
I Was surprised how Big and heavy this diffuser is!
This diffuser can clasp for traveling, but does not go flat.

My hair is a couple inches from my shoulders and a little curly as I get older!
If I had longer curlier hair I would like this more. I’m just not a fan of such a large heavy diffuser.
I have always had smaller easy to handle diffusers.
Fits on my two different hair dryers.
I’m going to keep trying with this diffuser, and If i find this works better for me, I will update my review.

3 stars.

Title: Misleading description
Review: Does not fit 6th gen iPad correctly even though manufacturers description says it fits both. The 6th gen iPad is slightly thicker and prevents case from closing securely.

Title: How did I live without this before?
Review: This was my first experience in using an automated makeup brush. I have to say I was at first a bit skeptical reading the other reviews on here. I pictured this being another useless gadget which probably would end up collecting dust in my powder room. How wrong I was! This is great and I will no longer go back to my old manual application modes (typically my fingers and usually a non-automated brush for applying brush). Using this Allstar Innovations rotating brush has changed everything. Easy to set up and get going, this brush is ergonomically built to fit my hand perfectly. Applying small dabs of foundation in a few places on my face, I begin the automated brush process. My makeup is applied flawlessly and smoothly, helping to cover imperfections and even bringing out a glow in my complexion! You will love adding this to your makeup regimen. Would make a terrific holiday gift to the woman in your life (even if it's just to spoil yourself!

Title: COZY!
Review: This fleece is so nice and cozy for my boy! I wish I could find one for my toddler!! I'd definitely recommend!

Title: Returning
Review: I was looking for a purse that looked more like real leather. This is dull and plastic looking. It is also a lot smaller than pictured. The company should Really update the images.  Iam returning it.

i think i FINALLY found the bluetooth speaker i needed for my google home mini this is the 4th one i got i returned the others ... if the battery lasts as long as it says it does and it recharges for a while ill be even happier with it !!!!!! Amazing sound and its actually bigger than expected but that's OK too

Well its going back it just skips and crackles something awful

Title: Fail
Review: Bought these to allow charging a USB-C equipped iPad Pro via a USB-A brick. No go. Also was hoping to use one to connect my iPad’s HyperDrive dock to my Mac for a needed firmware upgrade. No good there either. Caveat emptor.

Title: Wheel Tilt functionality is too sensitive, only works for about 8 months before breaking. Review: This trackball is a bit small for my hands, and it is difficult to use the "middle mouse click" functionality, but other than that I quite like this trackball.

Clicking the scroll wheel is a quite common user action these days, so I'm quite surprised that it's so difficult to do with this mouse without unwanted scrolling in the process ("Wheel tilt" is too sensitive). I regularly use programs like 3DS Max where the middle mouse button is an absolutely integral part of the functionality. Even in the web browser, where clicking the scroll wheel will open a link in a new tab, or clicking the scroll wheel on a tab will close that tab, I'm constantly being faced with this irritating limitation.

{EDIT] This trackball started acting wonky about six months in, and become almost unusable by eight months. It finally became completely unusable at almost exactly eleven months after purchase.

Title: Poor Imaging.
Review: Too slow.

Title: Works
Review: Good cord

Title: Best Dry Shampoo on Market!!
Review: I have tried them all- you name it and I’ve tried it. This is the best smelling dry shampoo. In addition it’s rice starch not talc which means it’s a little lighter on your hair when you spray it on it disappears. Heavier ones like Oscar Blondo tend to coat the hair and leave it feeling like there’s residue left. This doesn’t do that. I spray and just use my fingers to shake my hair and it looks great.

Title: Really nice facial peel!
Review: For the money, this is a great facial peel. I have been using it weekly for over a month now and I can say my skin is super soft and smooth. I usually get facials at the spa once a month and they usually will apply a light peel. This peel is just as good and, at $15, is a super bargain. Lightly exfoliates my skin and rejuvenates my skin without a heavy peeling factor. Highly recommend.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Very large

Title: WORST setup experience in recent memory Review: First, the good stuff. The picture quality is amazing.

Now the bad stuff. I started trying to set this thing up nearly 8 hours ago. You have to download a smartphone app from your apple or google play store. Once you open it, be prepared to provide every media related password in your entire universe ...which won't be easy because the Chromecast interface is TERRIBLE. The main reason I bought the thing was that I hope to add HBOMax to my lineup, since it went away on Roku. I still have no idea how to do that, since I have so far not found any options by which to search for HBOMax from within the Chromecast interface to download or select it as an option. I've tried to add my Pandora account, which login info works just fine on my laptop and smartphone, but the Chromecast interface rejects it as incorrect.

Still in the process of setup, but I will update later once I've figured this poorly designed mess out...

Title: A really nice touchscreen laptop in the space between tablet and ultrabook
Review: This little 3lb laptop does lightweight computing very well. With a good keyboard, excellent touchscreen, fine screen quality, decent processor speed, and sleek look ... for $400 you get the best combo of a full-sized tablet with a keyboard, lots of memory, excellent screen and decent speed.  There are some knocks like that it runs a little warm and it doesn't have a lighted keyboard (got a USS LED lamp for $15), but for $400 it can't be beat!!

Title: Great Value for a collar necklace
Review: This is a simple and impressive collar necklace.  It is heavy when you pick it up, but does not feel so when you wear it.

Title: Disappointed
Review: Totally disappointed in this computer vacuum cleaner.  The little attachments would not stay on the body of the vacuum and kept falling off.

Title: Great style and comfort Review: This is a great little dress. It can be casual or dressed up. There are several color choices. The orange caught my eye.

I am 5’4” and weigh about 170 lbs. I am large chested and have a belly. I ordered a large and it fit great. It even camouflages the belly.

The material is nice. It isn’t thin. It doesn’t wrinkle easily. The material is 95% cotton and 5% spandex. It has a nice stretch.

Care instructions say to wash cold. Do not bleach. Hang dry. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron. Do not dry clean. I did iron it and everything was fine.

I have NEVER accepted free products and/or money to review items and/or change my reviews. I so accept discounts that are available to any shopper.

Title: Great comfy dress!
Review: I love this dress! It’s so comfy and sheik. I’m only 5’3” so it’s just a tad long, but it’s doable. Sometimes I tie the front like in to product photo. I have already bought 2 and I think I will buy 1 or 2 more.

Title: Works with Iphone, couldn't get it to work with Alexa
Review: Well, I have kind of given up on setting this up. First, I must admit I am a 50 something technically challenged woman (often times), so maybe it was just me. I easily was able to download the apps and get it to work with my IPhone. It was cool asking Siri to turn it on and off. I really wanted this for Echo and Alexa. Try as I might, I couldn't do it. I downloaded Wink and synced Alexa with Wink. And then synced IHome with Wink. Could not get Alexa to find the smart plug at all (and I spent hours today on and off trying to do this). I will try again tomorrow. However, I will tell you nothing is easy with this. I found no instructions for use with Alexa in the package and had to surf the web for solutions. Seems like a lot of work to be able to simply turn on a light with my phone. Also, I could not get Siri to do this remotely (while I was out and about), so I assume it only works if you are in the proximate area for programming. Seems expensive for what it really gives me.

Title: better than I expected!
Review: Awesome product, fits well on my mac. Would definitely recommend.

Title: Cute and practical
Review: The striped addition to the sleeves and bottom is cute, but not as seamless as it appeared to me in the photos. Still a cute top though.

Title: good either way
