Title: They are OK, nothing special.
Review: I always start at 3 stars and adjust as the product performs.

Title: Hard Pass
Review: I really do not like this lip gloss. The color is nothing like the picture. In the picture, it looks fuschia. In person, it is a faded mulberry with copper glitter. On the lips, it is just clear, slightly mulberry tinted with some random glitter flecks. It looks fine. Nothing special. It feels and smells like lip glosses I owned twenty years ago. It has that waxy makeup smell. It tingles on the lips. Not a mint tingle, but a thick old lip gloss tingle, like maybe I’m allergic to this tingle. It is really goopy and sticky. The kind your hair gets stuck in and it drives you crazy. When you pull the flattened doe Foot applicator out of the tube, product flies everywhere. It isn’t long lasting at all. I usually like Rimmel products, but this one is a miss. It is like they found a case of old gloss and repackaged it.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Very nice, fits well and isn't too tight.  Light weight, warming.  Love the saying as well "dog mom."

Title: This has a phenomenal scent I LOVE, LOVE, LOVE but it dissipates after a couple of hours Review: I buy men's fragrances for me and particularly love Eternity for Men. This fragrance is right up there with my favorite. The aroma is phenomenal and a pleasure to inhale. It smells great on too. This reminds me of the Bath & Body Works men's shower gels I use to buy before they discontinued them. Some men might remember Glacier Bay, Woodland, Mountain Frost and Cool Springs Shower Gels. I used to buy them by the carload until they discontinued them.

This Eau De Toilette reminds me of one of those fragrances. Unfortunately, it has to be reapplied every couple of hours because the scent dissipates. If the aroma lasted all day or half a day, this would have received 5 stars from me even at the current high price of $74.

Title: Love this company's jeans
Review: I do love this company's jean products. That being said, these capris fit as expected until the calves. My legs are smaller given my waist size, so it was surprising that the fit at the calves were slightly snug. If you have rather generous calves, these might not be a good choice for capris. Otherwise, comfortable, soft, and fit based on the size charts.

Title: Soft Material, But Too Loose in the Waist
Review: I have the Vassarette Sensational Stretch Bikini panties in the same size and I love them. The waist band on these hipster ones is much looser. They fit well everywhere except the waist. I had to readjust these several times during the day. It became really annoying after a while. That's not something I want to be doing when it comes to my underwear. Aside from that, I love the material that these are made from. It's very soft. I wear a size 14 pants and the size 7 fits well (except in the waist as mentioned above). They are a bit sheer. The bikini ones are super comfortable to wear all day, so I was a bit disappointed with these.

Title: Nothing glimmering
Review: Not good quality.  The print/picture is poor quality.  Just not appealing.

Title: Every household should own this clipper set!
Review: I am writing this in the midst of the current pandemic. Both my husband, son and two grandsons were desperately in need of a haircut by the time June came. When I got this clipper set I was a little hesitant as I have never given a haircut before (nor even used a set like this). I decided to start on my two grandsons (in the likely event I screwed up, my grandsons might not notice, lol). Surprisingly, this was super easy to use. It has a lot of changeable heads which are easily interchanged and make customizing a cut easily. These clippers fit well in my hand and are easy to maneuver. I highly recommend these to everyone.

Title: Need another part to work with GoPro
Review: We bought this for my daughter's GoPro, as it said in the description of the item that it would work with a GoPro. It doesn't work. The screw top pushes the adhesive connector off every time we try to put it on. You'll need another adaptor to be able to use this with the GoPro. It will not work as is.

Title: type c charger cords
Review: I needed a variety of lengths of the type c usb cord and so I purchased this set.  Seems to work - the cords are thick and a woven material on the outside.  I chose the gold color and they are light gold. Cords don't last forever - I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Chemical smell
Review: Looks cute but has a weird chemical smell. I’m hoping it will come out after a wash.

Title: Magnifies fine lines
Review: The color is very pasty light. And it does so k into fine lines as the day goes on with its chalkyness.

Title: Small, lightly fragrant bath bombs with lackluster performance Review: [[VIDEOID:ad61558ee8e2b33009b683bc2fac51fa]] There are nine one-ounce bath bombs in this container that are made of sodium bicarbonate, sodium carboate, citric acid, polyethylene glycol 400, ginger extract, lavender extract, tea tree essential oil, rose essential oil, and perfumes. I used one in very warm water. The bomb originally had a nice foam when adding water to the foot bath but it fizzed out in less than five minutes after which the foot bath looked like it only had water in it. The water was clear and non-staining (see photo).

I do like the fragrance of these and that lasted the entire foot bath. I only bathed my feet for ten minutes and the results were softening.

The current price of $18.99 ($19.99 minus 5%) for this is too expensive as it comes to $2.11 per baby bomb.

Title: Looks like, feels, and moisturizes like hard Vaseline Review: This looks like a sheet of glass but as I dig in, it reminds me of a harder version of Vaseline. It moisturizes well and absorbs some, but does leave my skin feeling greasy. I use it only on the problem areas because of that such as elbows, heels, and hands.

The current price of $9.99 for 4 ounces comes to $2.50 per ounce. Note that it does include sunscreen with the active ingredient of zinc oxide 20% and allantoin 2% as a skin protectant.

Title: Lightweight, does not absorb well, smells sour, & no avocado in the mix
Review: This cream is lightweight. It smells slightly sour to me but that dissipates quickly. I applied this to my feet and it still did not absorb after a half hour. I get better results with regular body cream. Also, there is no avocado in the ingredients list--not sure why it is called this. I'll pass.

Title: Eight soap refill tablets for a foaming soap dispenser Review: Unfortunately, I do not have the correct dispenser for this. Nevertheless, there are eight Tum-sized tablets in this set. I actually had to cut it in half to get it in my dispenser. The lather is light but good and the soap is unscented. It is also cleansing. All I had to do was add water, which is tricky when the soap starts to bubble. The tablet takes a while to dissolve.

For the current price of $19.99, one essentially gets the ability to make eight 12-ounce bottles of hand soap, which comes to $2.50 per bottle. All that has to be done is add water.

Title: Women's Nike top
Review: I purchased this a size up and it is still really too snug across the bust.  Sorta gives you a very top heavy look - which I hate.  I will be donating it as it is not worth returning.  Very disappointed.  It looks like it may have been the last one.  It is a very dirty ivory - so beigy ivory (?) The dots are fuzzy.  The neck doesn't fold because the print is on the outside. So you have to wear it sort of loosy goosey - which isn't awful but I would have liked to loosed fold it.  Overall, not Nike's best effort - especially in sizing.  I have dozens of their women's tops and they usually all fit the same.  I am 5'7" usually wear a 14/16 or ox/1x - 38DDD.  The other thing I noticed is that it is very short.  It's not crop - but BARELY long enough.  Eh.

FYI...It does come in many color and fragrance options. I also find that this color helps me extend the time I need to go in for a touch up to my blonde highlights.  An unexpected bonus. Title: Just Okay
Review: I am a fan of the Tommy Hilfiger brand. I have ordered a few different bags in the past and this one has to be my least favorite. It's just okay. The bag just doesn't have the look or feel of the Tommy brand in my opinion. The quality of the bag is fine. The nylon bag is easy to clean. I don't care for the camouflage print but that's a personal issue. The straps are sturdy and seem to be secured well. I would prefer a little longer straps, but these do fit over my shoulder satisfactorily. I do like the inside lining. There are some inner pockets with one being a zippered one. There's a key strap so you won't lose your keys. There's an outer pocket as well. It's a good size tote, but my 17 inch laptop does not fit in it, though it was close. You could easily fit a tablet, magazine, book, and more inside. The only exterior branding is a TH tag clipped onto one of the straps. As I said, it's okay, I'm just not crazy about it.

Title: Not easy to get product on the top.
Review: This product is not easy to use I thought it would be since I've never bought anything like this before, wrong! This is so hard to get product on the tip part of it and once it's there it just spreads around the top without getting anything on your face, I tried turning it many times even pushing on it afterwards and really trying to get it there but it doesn't even come out no matter how hard I try and believe me ! I really tried!, I did manage to get some out but barely enough to cover my eyebags or circles under my eyes which makes me think this product is a total failure since you do have to rub it on very hard and that could stretch the skin under your eyes, I do not recommend this product, specially not for underneath your eyes. Will have to use a bit more to see if I can finally get at least SOME product to show up or just get enough to actually USE! Dissapointed.

Title: Not really seeing a difference
Review: Not alot of information came with the device

Title: Nice exercise pant, a little on the short side for me
Review: These pants fit really well (I am 5'8" and 155 and I ordered a large). They stretch really well and conform nicely to my body. I deducted a star as, to me, they are an awkward length (not at the ankle, yet not a capri). Not sure if I will be buying any more, but they are nicely made and a good soft stretchy material. If you are a little shorter than me, you may like the fit better.

Title: Good variety of styles, not all of them I was able to use
Review: Great variety of some cheaper made earrings. I did have trouble with two of the pairs actually getting them to 'click' once they were in my ears (they are two difficult to be able to snap shut once in your ears, even difficult outside your ears). The others (no click to close ones) were fine. Different styles, I was able to use them on several different occasions and did receive several compliments. For the money, this is a great set to expand your wardrobe, just be aware that they are not the highest quality.

Title: Unbalanced presentation or not complimentary presentation between the band and stone
Review: The picture makes it look more balanced than the actual product itself is.  The band is thin and very pretty.  Where it lost me is that the stone is too big for the thin band so it really looks tacky.  Sorry to have to say that but it's true.  I bought it for my daughter, in her twenties, she wears coordinating jewelry to go with her outfits and I thought this would be perfect ... but when I actually saw it I couldn't give it to my daughter as a gift. It's actually sitting in my bookcase and not quite sure what I will do with it.

Title: Nice but liner is big
Review: Nice shorts but liner is too big. Not sure if these were designed for hippopotamus legs or what but liners are huge. My legs aren't exactly small either so not probably would be baggy for most. Other than that nice shore and even though the liner is baggy I can still use them, will just need to wear my own compression shorts underneath.

Title: brush on super glue
Review: Very useful for nail tips... but a lot of different things.  The brush helps in control.

Title: Nope
Review: Like the color, not smudge proof and dries out my lips which is something I have never had an issue with before. Will not be purchasing again.

Title: Has nylon stiching around the waist band, cant wear them. Its poking me.. Review: I tried the pants on before I washed them. It felt like something around the waist band was sticking me!
I washed them, tried them on again, but the something was still sticking me!
Above the regular stitching is nylon curly stitching I see now, I, and two of my daughters cannnot wear these pants unfortunately,
As there so uncomfortble.

Around the top there is a second stitching of nylon thread that makes these pants Unwearable.
Other then that, there like jean leggings.
I'm 135 lbs, 5'2, the lengh was good, not short, not long either. Not tight at the ankles..I think a size larger wouldfit better, but this size
The front pockets are just for looks, but the back pockets are real.
I would wear these if the waist band didnt have nylon Stitching that is so uncomfortable. The reason for the 2 star, or
I would have given these maybe 4 stars.

Title: Feels amazing but leaves a very greasy feeling afterwards.
Review: Not sure how to explain this but this is great for your face I tried to use it on my whole body for some reason because I love doing this while I shower and honestly it's way too greasy made my whole bathroom floor slippery so just be careful not to use this in the shower. Just in general I did notice the greasy feeling afterwards but it does work great for the face ironically even with the greasy feeling I think it smells incredible and works great but maybe just for the face.

Title: Mouse for dummies
Review: Plug it in and add a battery and it works. Five stars.

Title: Didn’t work for me
Review: I love the idea of a clenditioner, but it left me a bit underwhelmed. From the reviews it sounds like it works great for some and not for others. For me it left the back of my head feeling greasy and weighed down. I followed the directions exactly as written. Maybe I needed to repeat the process or leave it in longer since my hair is on the slightly thicker side. My scalp also felt a bit itchy after. It smells really nice though.

Title: handmade faux mink eyelashes
Review: These are not super long, but the alternating clumps add to the drama, but make them wearable every day.  6 pairs.  trimmable.  Easy to use.

Title: Nice non-drying facial cleanser
Review: This is a really nice facial cleanser. I really like that it is not one of the foam types I have used in the past which tend to leave my face feeling dry. This cleanser goes on easily and rinses off completely leaving my skin clean and healthy looking. I have been using it twice daily now for the past three weeks and I am really happy with this Airare cleanser. Highly recommend.

Title: . Did not stay on.
Review: Could rub this liner off my eye immediately after applying, with my fingers. Did not stay on.

Title: Great when it works, doesn't work for long
Review: Pretty unreliable. I've ordered three of these, and I think the longest I've had one last so far is about eight months. The last one I ordered only lasted three months. It's really a shame that nobody makes reliable trackball devices anymore.

Title: Not a product I will continue to use.
Review: This product seems to suffer from an identity crisis. The name says "AM Replenish," so maybe it's a morning moisturizer? But then it also touts its "Skin Firm Technology," so maybe it's care for aging skin? But "Primer" is in the name, so maybe it's for use under make-up? The "Drug Facts" on the tube, though, say specifically - "Purpose: Sunscreen," and to re-apply it every 2 hours (which, if I'm using it as a moisturizer or primer, why would I do that?). I just found the product & packaging either confusing or misleading. The one positive is that the light tint does blend in well with my skin tone, but unlike other reviewers, it felt heavy on me and I didn't like wearing it. This is not a product I will continue to use.

Title: Too complicated
Review: It's hard to remember what all the buttons are for and getting the preferred radio station to be your choice...oh heck I don't know... I gave up on it. I did change the time due to daylight's saving time and that took forever.

Title: Slow
Review: If you don't mind waiting.... my sister bought this and hers works better. No idea. It takes some times 60 seconds to connect up. Sit there for 60 seconds and tell me if you love it. I almost never use opting for hunt and peck on the screen.

Title: No regrets
Review: So there was a ton of them, they’re super lightweight, which makes them really comfortable. And the price is amazing for how many you get. I didn’t need that many varieties so I ended up giving some away as gifts. Would buy again

Title: Really pretty and fit as expected
Review: Classy blouse at a low price!

Title: Thick and creamy; leaves my face and neck super silky but I do not care for the fragrance
Review: This face moisturizer is thick and creamy and left my face and neck feeling super silky. I absolutely LOVE the results. However, I do not like the fragrance and that, besides the high $69 price, is the only reason I rated this 3 stars.

Title: Decent player, good value
Review: It does its job, though it could use a little more polish. I love it except for the shuffle feature which I’ve seen try to play the same track twice in a row. If you use shuffle a lot, you might not like this player. Otherwise it’s exactly what I needed and is reasonably easy to use.

Title: Dual dash cam
Review: wife wasn't satisfied with overall operation. . . .I liked it tho, but had to put it back in the box

Title: Covers streaky.. Review: I like the color, but the polish goes on streaky, and polish is thin.
It takes 3 coats to look good, and a long time to dry.

I used a base coat, and Opi rapi dry.
As far as this Sally Hansen strengthening my nails I didn’t notice that.

Do not recommend.

Title: Great Colors - Just Not for Me
Review: I was really excited to try this. The videos that I have seen of people using the powder dip method make it look so easy! I found it to be very challenging with awful results! I don't do much with my nails. Even painting them with traditional polish looks just so-so on me. This comes with an instruction booklet that was easy to follow. I just found it to be messy, both on my hands and on the work surface. After the second coat of the powder, it looked like I had taken chewed up gum and tried covering my nails with it. I ended up getting lots on my skin and not just on my nails. Powder was all over my desk. It really was just a big mess! The kit comes with everything needed, but the quantities are small. The colors are great!  For a more experienced nail person and someone with a steadier hand, this may work well for you. It's just not for me.

Title: I've tried them all
Review: I have tried all the dry shampoos out there and I find this one to be the best working, best smelling for me.  I am naturally a dark blonde that highlights and find that this even helps with roots between highlights. My hairdresser recommends a dry shampoo and washing 2x a week at the most.  It's better for you hair and color.  My daughter is brunette and thought the brunette version was ok, but she is not as picky as I am I guess!  It's subjective, but this is the only dry shampoo I use.  Highly recommend.  *NOTE:  I have checked the prices at Ulta and depending on the seller, you can get it for the same price or less.  Hope this is helpful!

Title: I could hear my footsteps
Review: I think these were great for the price, and I haven’t had a lot of experience with wireless ear buds. I put them in and tried to walk and I could hear my footsteps very loudly through the ear phones. I didn’t think they were super comfortable, so I did end up returning them. I think they’re a good value and if you don’t have those issues you’re probably very happy with those!

Title: Thinner Cups Than Expected
Review: The sizing fits well. My only issue with these bras is that the cups are not as thick as other similar bras are so the look isn't as smooth. The thinness was the first thing I noticed. With that being said, it's still smoother than what you might get from a lace bra.  I started wearing this style bra so I would be smooth underneath my blouses and shirts. The straps are comfortable and they seem to be well made.

Title: This is easy to set up
Review: This is easy to set up. However, the connection is terrible. It is constantly buffering. I would not recommend it.

Title: Ahava hits another home run! This time for my eyes. Love it, love it, love it!
Review: I am a pure Ahava enthusiast having first found their products while touring Massada in Isreal back in 2009. I love the mineral ingredients which specifically come from the Dead Sea. My skin, and under eyes, have improved dramatically in the last 3 weeks since using this Time to Revitalize. Less puffiness and dark circles are beginning to fade. I will be purchasing more!

Title: Absolutely NOT for big chested women NOR correct sizing Review: There are so many things I do not like about this adhesive bra that I don't know where to begin.
1. This is absolutely not intended for bigger chested women!
2. I ordered a c cup and it looks like a small b cup.
3. The adhesiveness is not sticky enough to stay on your skin, but is over the top sticky if it touches your clothing and it leaves a nasty goo behind.
4. These are cheaply made and poorly constructed.
5. Need I list any more?

Title: Look great & wear well, but not for sweat! Review: These bracelets look awesome and they fit comfortably with my charge 3. There were no issues when attaching them to my charge 3 and they stayed clipped during vigorous activity. A better color selection then the Fitbit models and for a fraction of the price. I would highly recommend them to anybody!
However, if you are going to sweat a lot they're not very breathable. So if that is the case I would not suggest this brand. But for the Casual Wear these look exactly like the original Fitbit bracelets, with nor color options.

Title: Chanel - Gentle Eye Make Up Remover
Review: I bought the Chanel - Gentle Eye Make Up Remover and it works great. Not greasy & actually removes my waterproof mascara & eyeliner easily. No raccoon eyes. Just make sure you shake it to mix before each use

Title: I found this not to be a great product.
Review: Very difficult to use with the bendable cord almost impossible to shape for use! Being a women, with strong hands even, I found this not to be a great product... It even broke off at the clip-on area!!

Title: Definitely worked to smooth my skin but left me looking windburned Review: The directions say to use this morning and night. Because I know I have sensitive skin, I only used this in the morning for almost 9 days. After the 9 days my face was smooth and it definitely worked as designed. However, almost my entire face looked windburned or as if I was out in the cold for a few hours. It is mostly for this reason I do not like this and will not be using it. The other reason is that $115 is a bit steep. However, for someone who does not have a reaction to this, this product might be worth a try over more radical beauty treatments. Unfortunately, this is not for me.

On another note, this is appears to be fragrance free to my nose. I prefer a highly perfumed product but for those who do not like fragrance, the aroma is barely detectable.

Title: Incomplete gift.
Review: No chain included, missing.

Title: Beats
Review: Sound is good but not better than apple pods.

Title: Great st. Michael pendant
Review: It was just as pictured. I am very pleased I love it and the person I gave it to does as well good quality very happy! Thank you very much

Title: Cream is as solid as a rock; like Turtle Wax for cars
Review: I kept running my warm fingers over the solid "cream" and was able to get a whisper of cream on my finger.  What I did use was very good but this reminds me of Turtle Wax for cars. If this were more easily spreadable, I probably would have rated this 5 stars. Since it is almost impossible to extract any product to use, it is disappointing to me.

Title: Fits great
Review: Great

Title: Scentless hydrating cream but it has a green tint to it
Review: I am so repulsed by creams that are anything other than white or clear. It is some weird aversion that I have. This cream has a light green tint to it that I dislike. Other than this, it left my face and neck hydrated. It is scentless as well. If it did not have that tint, I would have rated this 4 stars. The current price of $29 is also a bit pricey. It's a good cream if one does not mind the faint green color. This is made in Korea.

Title: Too small for me....
Review: The material is nice, however, they are too small to go around my head.....

Title: The large is more like a women’s size 9-10 and not a men’s 9-12; otherwise nice socks
Review: I ordered these in a large for my boyfriend because he wears diabetic socks even though he is not a diabetic. He likes the looseness of socks like these. Unfortunately, these are too small for him. They do have some stretch and they are very comfortable and not constricting. However, they fit me. He takes a 12-13 shoe and I take a 9-10 shoe. If this was true to size, they would have gotten 4.5 stars. The current price of $13.99 is steep for one pair of socks like these as they are thin on top. Nevertheless, they do have more padding in the sole of the foot area.

Title: Super soft but colour completely off
Review: This t shirt was absolutely gorgeous. It was super soft and fit like a dream but the colour was horrible and not like the photo at all. I wish it had been as I would have ordered more because it was so comfortable. Real shame.

Title: I
Review: Just adorable. Cant comment on the fit because it a Christmas gift but just looking at it I'm pretty sure that it runs true to size. Well made.

Title: Good price, deffusers did not stay on! Review: I like that this Remington hair dryer comes with two deffusers, has a cold shot to lock
In a curl, or keep my hair straight ,
Has 3 heat settings,,and 2 speeds , and the price is very good.

This is a home hair dryer as the heat does not get as Hot as a salon dryer that actually burns
Your hair and scalp, but does dry your hair fast, and is needed if you have long thick hair.

My problem with this dryer is the two Deffusers would not screw in, and could not be
Pushed on, which makes this basically unless for me.
I have a lighter smaller dryer that blows my hair ( shoulder length ) just as fast, and refusers
Are magnetic and are easy to use and the deffusers stay on.

I did not buy the oil to use this hair dryer with, I do not have a comment about that

Title: Good exfoliator for dry skin patches but product is almost as hard as a rock
Review: This is a good exfoliator for dry skin patches but the scrub is almost as hard as a rock. I dug some out of this jar and used it on the scaly patches of my skin like my elbows and heels and it left my skin soft. I cannot say I am crazy about massaging myself with what feels like sticky sand, but it works. I just wish the scrub was easier to portion out. If I shake the container, I can hear it rattle against the plastic as if there is a rock inside.

Title: PAINFUL!!!!!
Review: These are PAINFUL to wear....look really cute....but PAINFUL!!!!!!!

Title: Great everyday riding boot
Review: Husband loves these great for every day riding. They are comfortable and look great. Boots are durable I highly recommend!

Title: Don't buy this - it only worked for 3 months Review: REVIEW EDITED: After 2-3 months of this working pretty well, people started saying they were unable to understand me. At first I thought it only happened when the battery was very low, so I started charging it more frequently, but then it started happening all the time, even after charging. I don't use these anymore. Waste of money that's headed to electronics recycling. Wouldn't recommend you buy.

ORIGINAL REVIEW: Works perfectly. With products like this, my biggest concern going into a purchase is whether bluetooth disconnection and reconnection will be reliable. I am able to toggle easily between Google Voice and my regular phone line on my cell plus Zoom and Slack on my PC. Sound quality is great and all recipients of my calls have been able to hear me clearly through the mic. Went with this headset after having a great experience with the Tecknet mouse and now I think I've established some brand loyalty with them.

Title: Booooooo
Review: Reception sucks.

Title: Refurb unit gives muffled audio
Review: Purchased as a backup, which became my primary BT phone headset after my other unit flew out a car window at 70 MPH. Refurb unit functions well except the audio is muffled compared to  the identical unit this replaced. Good for price paid

Title: Another great Revision product! Love your skin!
Review: I live in Florida and I am in my 60's. After years of ignoring my skin, I have finally understood the need to shade my skin from excessive sun damage to avoid excessive aging. So, in addition to always applying sun block, I am now using retinol products first thing in the morning when I wake up and in the evening before I go to sleep. I really like this Revision retinol product. It is non-greasy and absorbs quickly into the skin and it makes my skin glowing and youthful all throughout the day. I highly recommend this Revision product for anyone who loves their skin. No need for a prescription, you can now get clinical strength on line for optimal results.

Title: Great for golf on a cool day.
Review: Fits true to size. Very comfortable and warm, allows me to swing the golf club without restriction. Nice looking also.

Title: Lightweight
Review: Very lightweight material. Need to wash a few times to soften prior to wearing.

Title: Absolutely perfect for the netbook!
Review: As mentioned in another review, I purchased my son a netbook (to replace his broken Mac). Anyway, I was concerned with the size of his netbook to properly do school work. So, I bought a mouse and also got this Logitech compact keyboard. It is absolutely perfect for this use. A great compact size to work on his desktop. I use the netbook with a monitor, mouse, docking station and this keyboard and you would never know he wasn't working from a full size set up. He loves the number pad on the keyboard (something he missed on the netbook). I would definitely recommend this keyboard for anyone in the market for a new one. It's compact, but has everything you need. The 'action' is great, it's lightweight, I can't say enough good things about it!

Title: Very nice, well made, but chain is To Long & its silly looking. Review: I was surprised how nice this Lotus necklace is.
The diamonds are sparkly and are not dull..

The Lotus is done nice with the fine chain connected on both sides of the Lotus flower.
It said it was a rope chain, It is Not a rope chain, which I would prefer it not to be a rope.
The chain is very fine, with a silly long extender

It is gold over sterling. The gold is on the side of looking like costume jewelry, but I used a old soft tooth brush, with
Simple green cleaner deluded with water, and it toned the gold color down to look more real.

That said, the chain is ridiculously too long for such a small pendant, beside then it looks very out of date.
This type of pendent should come to your throat. Probably the chain should be 15 1/2 inches to maybe 16 inches.
Because of this terrible mistake, I’m giving this 3 stars.
My jeweler would charge to shorten both sides, more then this is worth. And to me I cannot wear it.

Title: - STAYS ON - NONE DIMMING - NO OFF SWITCH...
Review: DID NOT STATE ANY OF THIS...

Title: Crappy
Review: Goes on awful and awful to get off

Title: they look nothing like the picture
Review: I want my money back these are nothing like the picture at all.. They look like crap!!!!!!

Title: Return Policy isn't good
Review: Needed to return for shoe not being designed properly in the arch area, made me pay for return shipping. This is their error, the shoe is not designed improperly.....

Title: Great daily moisturizing gel!
Review: I have been using this Positively Radiant moisturizing gel daily for almost three weeks now. I use it in addition to my daily serum routine and I love the way it makes my skin feel. Goes on as a gel and gets absorbed into the skin readily (my skin actually drinks this up). My skin looks and feels younger, smoother and it does seem to glow. For the money, you can't go wrong. I will be buying more. Highly recommend.

Title: Tight
Review: I dont know This is tight because of the thick material Or just sized too small. The elastic waist band at the very top is tighter than the rest of the pants which gives it a kind of a binding feeling. This material is very thick and stretchy And catches on the little hairs on your legs every so often And pools them.Might be good for workouts but not everyday wearing.

Title: Disappointed
Review: The tablet takes forever to charge and dies fast and now it is randomly turning off

Title: Made feet itch
Review: I really wanted to love these and was looking forward to sleeping in them but had to take them off after a couple hours cause they made my feet itch really bad. Not sure what in them irritated my feet but hopefully they work for some.

Title: Too Tight in the Calves for Me
Review: I currently wear a size 16 jeans, unfortunately for me these did not work for me. I have thick calves and some jeans just don't work for me. Usually a women's cut (as opposed to misses) will work for me because they are cut a little roomier, but these weren't. I think part of the issue is that they are straight cut. I was able to get these on, but they were just too tight for me to wear out in public. The waist, hips, and other areas fit fine on me. I like the dark wash color. The jeans seem to be made well.

Title: The little steamer that really could!
Review: When I was younger, I used to use a large (at least 15 inch) device where I would place my face inside to use the steam. It was big, bulky, tough to store and I didn't use it as often as I wanted (or should have). When I first saw this one I thought I would give it a shot, not expecting much. Boy, was I pleasantly surprised! This is a compact device that really packs a punch. Takes about 30 seconds to heat up but when it does it helps me keep my skin and pores clean and refreshed. Only advise would be to rinse your skin with cool water and use a toner afterwards to help close your pores. This would make a great Christmas gift to the woman in your life (think even teenagers to help keep skin clean from acne). Highly recommend if you want to keep your skin in optimum condition!

Title: I love this
Review: This item has gotten nothing but 5 star reviews, and I am giving it that too. Its a cute little outfit. Nicely made and I thought my granddaughter could wear a turtle neck under it if it was a little cool/cold and look adorable. Red for Christmas or Valentine's Day. Green for St. Patrick's Day...Orange for Halloween. Anyway you get the picture. Thought it would look beautiful with a turquoise shirt underneath it too.

Title: Pretty comfortable
Review: I ordered a small and it was quite long on me (5’3). Pretty comfortable and nice to have the pockets.

Title: Medium-weight cream that is moisturizing but not firming to me Review: This is a 1.69 ounce jar of firming-lifting cream; however, it does not feel firming to me. It has a nice but subtle rose-like fragrance and is of medium-weight. It goes on easily and took about five minutes to mostly absorb but left a hydration barrier on my skin. I like how soft and moisturized my face and neck felt after using this.

In summary, as a regular face cream, I like this but do not love it because it does not firm. Also, at the current price of $40 ($45 minus $5), this is a bit overpriced. This is made in France.

Title: Saved my fried hair
Review: My hair was so fried after bleaching it. This stuff saved my hair from breaking completely off. And it smells amazing

Title: Runs smaller than advertized. Kinda compresses the goods. Review: So I like these bras. Dont love them. But theyre okay. Ive been wearing the wrong size bra for over a year, very similar to this, and thought it time to live more comfortably.

I was really excited about how they looked, until I put a shirt on, and saw that the padding looked like little hats on top of my boobs. Just too small in relation to my boobs.

So I took the padding out, and of course, my boobs look... pretty compressed. Im a 46/48C, got the 3X, which adversizes 47-51DD, and thought there would just be more room in the cups, or that the cups would be more giving.

The bra itself is also a bit snug. Not too tight. but tight enough that it kinda feels like I'm wearing a sports bra rather than a comfort bra. Also the material isnt the softest. Its kinda... meh.

Title: Nice vent brush w/nylon & boar bristles; a bit too curved; OK for blow drying Review: There is a nice boar/nylon vent brush with synthetic bristles. The brush is attractive and functional as a brush. The curve of the brush cradles my scalp when detangling but I do find it is a little bit too curved for my taste.

The brush is easy to hold and passes through my short to medium-length curly hair relatively easily. Since this is a vent brush, it is good for blow drying as well and would be best used by those who have very long hair. However, the vents are not as wide as some other vet brushes I tried previously.

The current price of $8.99 is slightly pricey for this.

Title: Don't bother. Buy a better quality one.
Review: Piece of junk. Doesn't work and has a defective plug that goes into headset. Granddaughter disappointed. Ended up buying a better one (a pink Minnie Mouse one for 30.00) at Best Buy. Returning this junk and annoyed I have to make an effort to return it.

Title: Does reduce wrinkle depth but this is only a partial eye cream – 2.5 stars Review: When a product is advertised as an eye cream, I expect to be able to use it on my lids, under the brow, and under my eye. This cream CANNOT be used on the lids. It is a nice cream that appears to be scent free to me. It does tighten a bit to give an appearance of less wrinkles but I could not use this on the lids, which is a BIG disappointment to me.

At the current price of $33.60 ($42 minus 20%), this is competitively priced.

Title: Fragrance is strong and lovely; lotion is lightweight but leaves a barrier on skin Review: I love the fragrance of this cream. I ordered the grapefruit citrus and it is strong and smells divine to me. The lotion is lightweight but it dries with a film on my skin. By film I mean that it feels as if I have a protective barrier. I would have preferred if it soaked in instead feeling like something is covering my body. This is the only reason I rated this 3 stars.

The current price of $17.10 ($18 minus 5%) is competitively priced.

Title: Reasonably priced set; hair brush is the best part Review: This is a four piece set. There is a nice boar/nylon wooden paddle brush, a comb that is used mostly for teasing hair, a massage brush for the shower, and a metal rake to clean the hair out of the brush.

The brush is easy to hold and passes through my short to medium-length curly hair easily. I like the brush but it does have a smell to it that I do not like. The massage brush is good for those who have short hair. This can be used to suds up the hair and massage the scalp in the shower. With longer hair, one has to be careful not to tangle their locks. I like that the massage is pliable and soft and easy to hold but it is not something I will use.

The comb is okay but nothing I use. It is good for detangling.  The rake marginally works. These usually do not work well to remove hair from a brush; they are just okay and never anything better.

The current price of $9.97 is reasonable for this set but the brush is the best part; I just wish it did not smell.

Title: took much longer than expected but love product
Review: Yes I was not happy with shipping time, probably holidays, anyway once I received the product, It seems to be well constructed and durable and fit the camera perfect.

Title: very soft but weird fit
Review: These are okay for the cost, they are soft and the sizing is good.  however, I found them to be a little ill fitting on top which makes them pull up around the ankle.

Title: No instructions
Review: Small hard plastic ruler; difficult to hold and use . It does not come with instructions .

Title: Great if you order the right size
Review: These capris are buttery soft. Definitely use the size chart. I ordered a size larger than I normally do using the chart and they fit well. The Capri length is a little long, but not a big deal.

Title: It Works
Review: This tripod works. However, it is very cheaply made. The shutter button also works. It paired quickly and easily. However, this is not a good tripod. It is very cheap and flimsy. It will get the job done- but for how long? It does come with a bag. I think it does best on the tabletop as the telescoping legs are super thin and flimsy.

Title: Just like getting a spa pedicure at home!
Review: I have extremely rough and dry heels and feet. I tend to get pedicures every 2-3 weeks and it seems like within a day or two of having one done, my feet are back to being rough. I wanted to try one of these home pedicure callous removers and this one is exceptional! I love how it makes my feet feel and look, and it is actually really neat that the built in vacuum helps keep my bathroom clean while using it. Highly recommend if you are in the market for a home pedicure tool!

Title: Leaves my skin silky & hydrated but fragrance is more spicy than rose – 3.5 stars
Review: I love fragrant rose in soaps, body washes, etc. However, the fragrance of this cream is not as I expected as it smells more like a spice with a hint of rose. Nevertheless, it is lightweight, absorbs quickly, and leaves my skin feeling hydrated. I just wish I loved the scent and that it actually smelled like rose.

Title: Just ok
Review: Don't be fooled by the description. I was freezing my butt off at 40 degrees! These are very thin, so to call them "fleece-lined" feels deceptive. Not a fan! I'd rather pay for a pair of Kerrits, which are truly warm! I ordered a medium but could have sized down to small.

Title: HIGHLY RECOMMEND
Review: VERY GOOD QUALITY,  GREAT PRICE

Title: Too soft
Review: they're a little bigger than I thought. Too soft and flimsy to use for scrubbing under my nails. They just bend. Could be used as a toothbrush for a horse I guess.

Title: It is great.
Review: Love the silky feel of the shirt.  A little short but looks good on.

Title: Not Very Noticeable
Review: I purchased the white water line pencil to brighten my eyes. It glides pretty well, but it's not very noticeable at all. For the most part, I can't even tell that I have it on. It doesn't cause any irritation to my eyes.

Title: Great for gift giving!
Review: This is a nice box of soaps which is definitely suitable for gift giving. I did find my skin was really clean after using and definitely softer/moisturized. I didn't really care for the fragrance for myself (too floral), so I will not be buying more. But this might make a great gift package for a child's teacher or coach for the holidays.

Title: Returned for credit
Review: Could not sync headset with my Bluetooth TV set, returned for credit.

Title: Unique earrings!
Review: I wasn't sure what to expect with these earrings given the pictures on the page. However, once I opened the box, I loved them. These are a nice size (on the larger size, but not overly so) and not heavy at all on the earlobes.  They are a really nice quality and very unique design. The silver is shiny and the pearl is perfect. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a nice size pair of silver earrings.

Title: I love this tunic top!
Review: This is a really cute tunic top. I wear it with my leggings and I got a lot of compliments with it (I got the shirt in black). It is just long enough to cover my tummy and is very flattering of my slightly overweight body (I'm 5'7 and weigh about 155-160). Material is very soft and shirt is well made. First time I wore it (to dinner) my boyfriend gave me an immediate compliment (something he hardly ever does). Highly recommend this to all. I am now ordering this in white as well since I really am impressed.

Title: GE Personal Security Window/Door Alarm
Review: The buzzer is loud enough to alert me when someone is coming through the screen door on my sun porch. The second in the package has never worked after I installed it on a window in the back of our house.

Title: Tiny gel-like bar; moisturizing but nothing overly special for the price Review: At the current price of $24.29 ($26.99 minus 10%), this is ridiculously expensive face soap. It is made in Japan and the only English instructions on the package say not to use this on any wound or eczema. As to why that is, I have no idea.

Nevertheless, I tried this and it lathers okay and feels very oily and moisturizing. I personally prefer a bar with more lather, less oily feeling, and certainly more reasonably priced. I also want to be able to read the packaging and ingredients and not have that in another language as is the case on this box

Title: Five Stars
Review: Love it

Title: Comfy and cute!
Review: Comfy and cute! Soft material and covers enough.

Title: Five Stars
Review: WORTH THE MONEY; VERY GOOD BACK-UP AMP; LIKE ALL THE EXTRAS. . .

Title: Leaves my hair with a vibrant shine but weighs down my curls too much
Review: This review is for the 2.4 ounce travel-sized bottle that is currently priced at $10. I used a small amount about the size of a quarter on my short to medium fine, wet, just washed curly hair and waited two minutes before rinsing. This left my hair conditioned and moderately soft. My hair also glistened and had a vibrant shine to it but it weighed down my curls too much.  That fact and the price tag for such a small amount caused me to rate this 3 stars.

Title: Quality
Review: This is a higher-priced External Hard Drive, but based on previous experience it is also a higher-quality item.  For external drives that save important data, quality is most important.

Review: Not as easy to apply as liquid eyeliner.

Title: Pulls hair !!
Review: Omg..I tried this and as soon as it hit the few hairs, they got caught in it! Ouch! I have never had this happen with any other trimmer. I gave it to someone else to try and the same thing happened to them. I dont know if I did something wrong but it seems pretty common to use.

Title: Nice detangling brushes but too pricey; silicone grip on handles provide me with a good hold Review: There are two nylon detangling brushes with hollow silicone handles. There is also one cloth carry case.

Each brush is medium-sized. The brush glides through my hair wet or dry and detangles it as well. It also feels great in my hands and does not slip out like some brushes do. Note that I have fine short to medium curly hair.  Although I really like these brushes, I would never buy them because they are no better than what I can buy locally at half the price.

The current price of $16.99 is too expensive for these as I can get one brush like this at my local store for $3.99 each.

Title: Beautiful well made light tunic, perfect for layering
Review: These are great every day tunics. I use these in the office, usually with a light flouncy open sweater and I get a lot of compliments. These are well made and a light material, terrific for layering. I favor the black one which I wear with a grey sweater and it looks great. Does not cling to my little  occasional 'muffin top' and gives me plenty of room to breath. Great idea for layering in clothing.

Review: Washed when then arrived. As pulled out of dryer, one had hole on back of arm.

Title: Awesome sound Review: this was purchased as a gift i have 3 in my house (one in bedroom, one in kitchen and one in the computer room) and a friend wanted one but was short $$$ and i sent it to her for a belated birthday and early christmas gift she was so happy :) i just love my Alexas' !!

this is my 3rd dot the other two are 2nd generation this one has a MUCH better sound quality i have the other two on external speakers one on my computer and the other on an external wired speaker this 3rd generation doesnt need one the only thing is as easy as it was to pair my Alexa Fire remote with the 2nd generation one in my office ... this new one is not pairing with my alexa fire remote in my bedroom i am gonna look around for a stand for it and probably get a decal skin so many nice ones to pick from

Title: Not Impressed
Review: I didn't notice any difference in my nails.  And after about a week of the first use the product started having a bad smell.  I ended up throwing the remainder away.  It smelled like something was growing in it.

Title: Not the best
Review: I tried this for the first time and was not too impressed I would never buy it again I’ve had other lip scrubs and they were much butter ! cheap smelling didn’t enjoy using it!

Review: It keeps time so I always know what time it is

Title: I didn't notice a difference.
Review: I don't think this really helped my lashes look any better and I one tube was not a 6 month supply.  It definitely wasn't enough for 6 months.  I didn't notice a difference in my lashes.

Title: Soap slippery when wet & disintegrates easily; bars are small but they lather copiously - 2.5 stars Review: This soap is packaged nicely but, for the size, it is over packaged. There are four bars of soap - rinse (aloe); shampoo (sulfur), body (noni), soap (eoseongcho).

These bars have a great lather. However, all the bars are soft and sticky and they disintegrate easily in the shower. In addition, they are slippery. Luckily this soap is very small as each bar fits in the palm of my hand. Of course at the current price of $40, this comes to $10 a bar which is about $6 too much in my opinion.

Although I like the lather and the fragrance of each bar, I am not pleased with the slipperiness of the bars, the size, and how they turn gunky easily.

Title: Cute logo on one side
Review: Basic bandanna with awesome bts logo.

Title: You get what you pay for Review: Batteries die way too quickly and at this rate i would spend way more on batteries than it would be to get a higher quality mouse.

Looks great thought..

Title: Cute Bag
Review: This purse is cute. It's divided into 3 compartments. In the center, there is a zippered pocket and a slip pocket. Prior to ordering this, I was unfamiliar with Tom Clovers. I'm still pretty clueless. I tried looking online, but I didn't find anything helpful. The bag has no markings that indicate that it's a Tom Clovers product. The interior lining says beibooboo all over, whatever that means. I just found that to be very odd.

Title: Fragrant steamers when dry; barely fragrant when wet; dissolved quickly & left no stains Review: There are six Lavender with Menthol Crystal shower steamers in this package. In the package, the steamers smell strong but in the shower they are barely detectable.

I tried one in my shower and made sure to put it away from the full stream of water at first. Note that it did start to fall apart some when I removed the plastic wrapper on the steamer. After a few minutes in the shower of being outside a direct stream of water, hardly any scent was generated even though it started to dissolve from some water droplets. I then put it in the direct stream of water. It dissolved in about 10 minutes but the fragrance was still barely detectable. My shampoo, body wash, and soap that I used in the shower generated more fragrance than this.

One thing I love is that it did not stain my tub. The purple color just washed away.

The current price of $23.95 comes to a very expensive $3.99 per steamer. Not only is this too expensive, but it does not perform well from a fragrance perspective.

Title: Won’t charge
Review: Bought two pairs Have left them on charger for two days still keeps dying after connecting to device

Title: Cords
Review: Very chip made but does the job

Title: Feels like cooking flour
Review: It feels like you are rubbing flour in your hands,which I'm not too fond of...but it fits my kindle,and I've yet to use it.

Title: Super small
Review: Way too small! Too expensive to ship back so I'll give it to good will.

Title: Beware.
Review: Lasted 3 months.

Title: This is definitely for men with short hair; feels sturdy in the hands Review: This is definitely not a brush for me. However, it is a nicely made brush and would be good for very short hair like most men wear. It did not work well on my hair. This is one of those brushes that should last a long time.

I rated this three stars because the box says this is for medium to long hair that is regular to thick. Well I have short to medium fine curly hair and did not feel it worked for me at all. Also, for the current price of $25.95, the box it comes in has a plastic window that slides around. It is kind of not nice if one is gifting this.

Title: Why is this bag for men?
Review: I have to say, not sure why this bag says it's for men. I am a woman and absolutely love it. This is a great bag to transport my laptop in. But, in addition to carrying a laptop, it has lots of storage for a bunch of other stuff. When I travel, I will actually pack a spare set of clothes in here (leggings, t-shirt) to use as an airplane carry on. Plenty of storage, compartments. Well made, lightweight, water resistant, I can take this anywhere I go (for business or pleasure). This bag would make a great gift during the holidays for men or women. Highly recommend!

Title: Excellent and Not-So-Excellent Review: I deducted 2 stars because at this price, this 2022 Sony TV really should be 1080p instead of 720p, there really should be HDMI CEC (Sony calls this Bravia Sync), and because the remote control is way too long. There's a lot of empty space. The remote takes up more space on your table than it has to.

The TV is very easy to set up from start to finish. It's a nice-looking TV, and seems of good build quality. If you input a high-quality signal into the HDMI port, you'll be very happy with the picture.

The speaker quality on this TV is perfectly fine.

Title: Meh
Review: Ripped on week one In the space between thumb and index finger. Not flexible at all. We’re warm while they lasted

Title: Love it
Review: Warm and cozy....looks great

Title: Like a compact brush head without handle; base provides decent grip Review: This detangler feels cheap. I tried a different brand previously and it had a non-slip base. This one does not but it still provides a decent grip. This brush is like having a full-size detangling brush but without the long handle.

There are two sizes of bristles. It glides easily through my fine curly short to medium-length hair. This is even better in the shower on wet hair. The current price of $6.99 is a little pricey for this brush especially since it is not high quality and feels like cheap plastic. I feel any price higher than $3.99 is too much for the quality of this brush.

Title: Failed in Samsung Galaxy Tab 2 7.0 after 35 days
Review: Failed in Samsung Galaxy Tab 2 7.0 after 35 days.  Got a notification on the tablet that the SD card was empty.  Could not mount the card.  Using card reader on Windows 7 PC it did show the device as Removable Drive F: and that it needed to be formatted.  But the card would not format.  Called Sandisk tech support.  Based on the markings on the card it appeared to be genuine; however, the serial number was very faint and hard to read.  Seller was "Everything But Stromboli".  Though outside the 30 day return window, Amazon is allowing me to return it as a courtesy since so close to the 30 day return window.  Was the card bad?  Or did the Galaxy Tab fry it?  Or did some Android system software or Android App on the Galaxy irreparably corrupt the card?  Your guess is as good as mine.

Title: No stretch
Review: Super uncomfortable. The stitching in the butt are meant for the super skinny people who have no bum at all. They aren’t stretchy at all and shaped oddly.

Title: Recommended
Review: Super happy and got it on promo! Would recommend

Title: Love the scent, No sulfates Review: I love the scent of roses in this .

The word on the bottle says, Sans sulfate, which Sans in french means, Without..
The Pantene rose water shampoo and conditioner is Free of sulfate that drys out your hair, and coats your hair that it loses all the moisturize.

My hair has a blonde weave ,and I noticed the color has stayed the same since I had it weaved acouple of weeks ago.
That said I did not care for the texture of my hair after I shampooed, and condition with this Pantene!
This is a good price for this set of shampoo, and conditioner, but it just does not leave my hair the same as soft and frizz free as Pureology does, although I sure wish it did, as Pureology is pricey.

Title: Runs large.
Review: Barely stays on feet.  At the edge of velcro.  Ordered normal shoe size

Title: A different way to style your hair!
Review: This is an easy to use brush with a hair dryer built in. The brush has multiple settings for heat and power. I will say, it is nice to only have to have one device to work with (instead of having to hold a brush and dryer at the same time). I deducted a star, though, as I just feel it took longer to dry my hair than usual. I am not sure if it is the power lacking what my regular hair dryer has (I mean it certainly sounded as strong). I still am using my regular set up when I am in a rush, but I will keep this around as a back-up.

Title: Two bars of delicate soap w/one foaming net; light lather ; way too $$$ Review: There are two 3.25-ounce bars of soap in this package along with a foaming net to use with each bar. This soap is touted as one for personal/private areas of the body. There are two different versions--exfoliating cranberry and daily ritual oatmeal. I do not care for the smell of the cranberry but the daily ritual oatmeal bar smells nice.

The soap provides only a light lather but it does gently cleanse. However, the current price of $29 comes to $14.50 per 3.25-ounce bar which I consider prohibitively expensive even with a foaming net. This is the main reason I rated this 3 stars besides my dislike of the cranberry aroma. I personally prefer this 5.3-ounce [[ASIN:B09SY55FKJ bar]] of intimate soap with foaming net that currently costs $5.99 over this.

Title: One Star
Review: Very cute but not much of a bristle count but i guess you get what you pay for.

Title: flame resistant cotton twill overalls
Review: Sadly, even though we followed the guidelines for size and then ordered 2 sizes larger, they were still WAY too small. As they are 100% cotton twill they would have shrunk too. We had to return them.  It could be the color of the material ran small - we had ordered the "tan."

Title: Doesn't Irritate My Sensitive Skin
Review: When I squeeze a little cleanser into my hand and bring it up to my nose to smell, it smells really nice. It's a light, sweet watermelon scent. But when I start using it on my face, the smell is artificial and slightly unpleasant. It makes me want to wash my face as quickly as possible to get it away from my nose. I don't think I've ever had a skincare product that did that before. Very strange. I've been using this for several days now just to make sure that it wasn't just a one time thing, but it happens every time. Now the actual cleanser (minus the scent) seems to be pretty gentle. My skin can be sensitive at times, but this did not cause any irritations or problems. I had troubles with one of the products in the same brand's Tomato line which caused my face to turn red after using it, but no problems with this. The cleanser is a clear and foams up well. It does a good job of cleaning my skin without over drying it. But because of the issues that I have with the smell of it, it's just an okay product for me. Product scents are important to me!
Title: Not for fire HD 10 does not fit Review: This does not fit a fire HD 10. Not even close.

Title: White Accents Aren’t Piping; Stretchy Fabric Makes Robe Difficult to Put On Review: This MAE WOMEN’S FRENCH TERRY KIMONO KNEE LENGTH ROBE (Large, Navy Blue) was a big disappointment. The white accents seen in the product page photo are NOT white piping; instead they are white sewing machine thread applied in a seam-overcasting pattern. To my eye, this makes the kimono look very cheap.

The Large robe is generously sized—almost too large for me (a size 10/12) even though I prefer a big, loose bathrobe. The knit cotton/polyester/spandex fabric is thick and heavy, so the robe is soft, warm, and snuggly. (It almost feels like you’re wearing some kind of fleece.)

However, the fabric’s weight, coupled with the spandex content, makes the robe very stretchy, so that it’s hard to put on. Once it’s on, the robe feels good, but I don’t care for the daily struggle to get into it.

Title: Holds hair well
Review: Love this hair stick. I have very thick, heavy hair that most hair sticks fall out of... this one does not fall out. The teeth on the inside of the legs keep the stick from falling out.... they also make it a bit difficult to remove the stick. You have to wiggle it out when you are taking it out of the bun.

Title: You get what you pay for
Review: If you’re desperate for cotton swabs and don’t have a dollar store near you-buy these. If you can spend the extra couple of bucks then spring for the name brand ones. While the cotton is ok on these, the stick is super flimsy and bends way too easily.

Title: Not like the oldies
Review: Very poor construction and they will probably not last more than a year. The rollers I used 55 years ago were almost indestructible. These are far inferior for the price.

Title: Cords break within a week or two- not worth it!
Review: Cords break within week or two. Went through all three of them and I purchased a few weeks ago.

Title: Great tablet!
Review: This replaced an old Ipad that I had and it is so much better.  Really fast and has a crisp/clear display

Title: Strange fit
Review: This tunic is so cute that I bought it in multiple colors, but I returned it because the fit was off.  The top was tight at the bust and in the upper arms but flowed really nicely around the hips.  The sleeves were way too long.

Title: Typical thin, small satin scrunchies; don’t like that they are tied together Review: There are three thin and small satin scrunchies in this package; two in black and one in mauve (pinkish).

These hold my hair well but as is expected of satin, can easily slide out. These are best on long hair because the potential to slide off is not as great.

The current price of $10 comes to $3.33 per band which is insanely priced and the reason I took off one star from the four-star rating I was going to give. Note that they need to do away with the sewn ribbon around the three scrunches that has to be cut off. They can save some money there and pass that onto the consumer. I actually needed a scissor to separate these scrunchies because of the ribbon.

Review: Won't work with most newer apps because it's old.... very, very, old technology.... but one of the little kids likes to play with it.

Title: Cleans and lathers well but smells like liquid plastic and for that reason only I dislike it
Review: I expect three things from a body wash. It has to smell incredibly good, clean effectively, and produce a good lather.  This cleans effectively and produces a good lather but the fragrance smells like liquid plastic. After having tried this, I would never buy it. A wonderfully fragrant body wash causes me to rejoice in the shower. This body wash makes me dread my shower only because of the "plasticky" aroma.

Title: Didn’t work for my radio
Review: This cable did not work for my Baofeng GT-3TP Mark III ham radio. I just ordered another cable on eBay today and that cable will work for me.

Title: Great body wash, my new bathroom staple!
Review: This is a great body wash. First, and most importantly, is the fragrance of coconut. It is light and makes me feel like I am in the Caribbean every time I shower, lol. Secondly is the overall fact that it is a great body wash. I am left clean and fresh and my skin is smooth and nourished. I have no complaints, but lots of kudos for another great Amazon product. The fact that it is reasonably priced and comes in a handy 6 pack is icing on the cake.

Title: Zero customer support Review: Liked it a lot until I had a glitch that wasn’t addressed on the website.
Waited for chat support over two hours.
I guess the important thing for them is to get your money.
I’m getting mine back.

Review: Good radio but cheep ac adaptor that I fixed after two months and went after a year so l had to buy another from the same company, not happy but no adaptor no radio.

Review: Definitely moisturizing when shaving. Less razor burn or bumps. Hard to get out of your razor. Have to bang mine in the shower to get the crap out.

Title: Not a good fit
Review: I bought this for my Nikon 18mm- 10 mm lens. The are a bunch of these replacement hoods out there and this one seemed reasonable.  I received it today and put it on the lens.  It is a screw on hood,  not a bayonet mount like the Nikon HB32.  It took a while to get it on right as the threads are not a perfect fit.  I get it on the lens and look through the viewfinder.  There were a couple of dark spots sheer you can see the hood at 18mm up to about 24mm.  I tried talking off the filter and it was even worse,  then I tried to screw it in even tighter, but nothing worked.  The lens cap holder and brush are nice,  but the hood is useless.

Title: Color.
Review: Perfect fit to the phone.

Title: Good value for the $$$
Review: My son love all the pieces Made him smile.. worth it.. along with the selfie stick.. :)

Title: Not Great

Review: I was sure this little thing would have been perfect for us we are within 10 miles of the towers but no without the booster we get nothing and with it we should get 22 stations we get 9 but you can only watch 3 of them. Beware of this!!!!!!

Title: Good quality
Review: Didn't see the sweatshirt because I sent it to my daughter, but she said it was really nice quality and that my grandson loved it.

Title: Size runs small
Review: Runs small in waste! Too tight elastic band

Title: Excelente
Review: Huele rico y es super grande y vino sellado

Title: Nice pomade but you can probably do better in the market
Review: Had my 35 year old son who typically uses pomades try it. His review gave it an 'ok' rating. He said that the pomade did not control his hair as well as his usual hair products, however he did like the smooth texture of it and how his hair felt while using it.  The container is attractive and very masculine looking. I deducted a star simply because of the $25 price, not sure it's honestly worth it, especially when there are other products out there that do the same at a lesser cost (or with more product).

Title: Great for hands which are dry and need some TLC
Review: This is a great soothing moisturizer. Have to admit, the idea of using snail goo really kind of grossed me out. But once I looked at the ingredients and saw all the great natural ingredients I was sold. Aloe vera, lemon and orange oils, apple and carob seed extract and hyaluronic acid (something my dermatologist swears by), I decided to try this. I am thrilled with how great my skin feels after using this for almost 2 weeks. I exclusively used this on my hands and I can see an incredible difference. I highly recommend this for extremely dry skin. My hands are 62 years old and and after using this for almost 2 weeks I see less crepeness and my dry skin seems to be improving dramatically. I will be buying more when this is finished as I am so impressed with the results!

Title: Easy to put on iPad .
Review: My iPad color is gold and with the back being a clear background the flowers and butterflies look really pretty.

Title: Awkward fit
Review: This shirt has an awkward fit. Quite tight at the top and somewhat big at the bottom. I have other shirts from this brand that fit a lot better. I’m not sure what body type this is meant for. Material is too sweater like. Disappointed since I really like other shirts from this brand.

Title: Copious suds & cleansing but burns eyes & aroma almost like Play-Doh to me Review: This body wash produces a very good lather and feels cleansing. However, I do not care for the aroma, which reminds me of Play-Doh. Also, it burns the eyes. I accidentally got some suds in my eyes and did not like the sting.

The current price of $26 is also pricey for 13 ounces. If I loved the aroma and it didn't burn my eyes , I would have felt as if I was having a spa experience and rated this 5 stars.

Title: Adjustable, sturdy, great for my kindle tablet.
Review: I was curious about this tablet stand because my tablet case has a built in stand when you fold it up, but it slips sometimes when I type and play games. I just got this stand and my tablet fits perfectly in it. It doesnt wobble or move so it is very secure. It raises my tablet about 3 inches off of the table. It is adjustable so you can lean it forward or backward if glare becomes an issue, and you can adjust the height as needed too.This is made from a very thick sheet of metal..it is sturdy and makes it easier to type with out any wrist strain. I only wish I had gotten this earlier! Love using it!!!

Title: Not sharp or tight enough for cuticles; best for cutting price tags off clothes Review: I ordered these due to the 5-star reviews and unfortunately, these are subpar. They cut paper fine and the plastic price tags off clothes. However, they do not cut cuticles well at all. The handle has a lot of play in it so I used a screwdriver to tighten the center screw. That still did not help much. I recommend them for cutting thread and other small tasks but not for what they were intended. There is nothing premium about these cuticle scissors.

The best part of this ensemble is the leather case.

Review: Warm, soft and thick.  Comfy!

Title: But it does do a good job, would buy it again
Review: Does the job for the money, I though I could match it to my keyboard, since it is the same brand. But it did not work. But it does do a good job, would buy it again. Logitech is a great name.

Title: Hailey loves unicorns!
Review: Bought this for my granddaughter.  Her entire family including her 4 siblings & mom & dad love doing these.

Title: So so would not purchase again if
Review: Would not buy if really wanting to use projector as it is backwards on the ceiling.

Title: My son liked it, applies it sparingly
Review: My husband wasn't interested in this, so I had my 35 year old son try it. He actually liked it, although he said he thought it was a little strong, so he applied it sparingly. He was most impressed with the box (which is probably why the cost of this is high). I did smell it on him and I did like the musky scent. This would probably make a great gift for the holidays for the Mercedes owner in your life (or for someone who wishes they owned one).

Title: These facial moisturizers are too small, too expensive, and too smelly for me Review: I so wanted to like this but I do not. There are three very cute and very tiny facial moisturizers in this tube.

There's a 0.5 ounce face and neck cream that is thick and very moisturizing. It felt great on my face. However, that cream smells like dirty pool water to me.

There is a 0.27 ounce eye and lip cream that is a bit thin. I like my eye cream thick. I tried it on my eyes and it was mildly moisturizing. I was not willing to try it on my lips because this cream smells like some sort of meat cold cut that I cannot name.

There is also a 0.33 ounce face oil with eyedropper top that is also moisturizing. I put this on my face and neck. However, it smells like cheap rubber to me.

At the current price of $55, this is super expensive. The smell of these three items are a big turnoff. I will never use this again. I do not hate the results but I hate the smell. The eye/lip cream is the least effective and most revoltingly stinky item of the three.

Title: Doesnt have any nasty stuff, is vegan, didn't work for me. Review: I have used Biolage shampoo and conditioner before, and have always liked them, but not RAW color care like this one, and I’m assuming its new!
The R.A.W conditioner does not have any nasty stuff in it, and is Not tested on animals as it’s Vegan.

I have been coloring my hair since high schools with blonde weaves, and now have Grandkids etc. My hair is not in the best condition, and I decided to Let my natural color grow out. Its only grown out about 3 inches or more, to a shinny nice silver color.
That said I thought this would make my dyed hair shinier. And even my natural color, That did not happen.
I do have thick hair with a slight curl.
My hair felt matted down, and dirty!
I wash my Hair everyday, it is to my shoulders.

I might be the only one this happened to, but it just didn’t work for me.

Title: It's useless.
Review: It worst thing I ever bought from Amazon.

Title: Died in months, wouldn't order again
Review: They stop charging my phones within a few months. When they worked they worked well, disappointing.

Title: Customer service is not okay
Review: Set up is very easy. The video is pretty good. I paid for a year of CAM Plus and I am still only getting 12 second videos. The 12 second videos tend to be the person walking away. Not helpful. I did a chat with Wyze support. Their suggestion did not help. I called and talked with support. Their suggestions did not help. He told me he would send a request to “tier 2” and they will contact me by email. They never did. It’s been a full week. Customer service is a huge deal. I don’t want this camera if I can’t get more than 12 seconds of video.

Review: Eh.  I've been using for several weeks.  I am not sure I see ANY difference.  But it feels nice going on and doesn't burn my eyes so I gave it 3 stars.  I probably won't buy it again.

Title: Too Tight in the Calves
Review: I was so excited to get these since it's finally jean season! I currently wear a size 16 and usually Lee jeans fit just fine. I don't usually go for petite, but at 5'6", the Lee brand has been a little long on me in recent years. The length of these was fine. I might prefer them to be a tad longer, but they didn't drag on the floor. The straight leg fit was just too tight on me. They fit like I imagine skinny jeans would. It was not a good look on me. I do have thick calves and have run into that problem with other pants before. I felt that this was excessive in the amount of tightness though. The quality of the pants seems to be pretty good. I'm just disappointed that I will not be able to wear them.

Title: Very short in toe room and narrow. I would ...
Review: Very short in toe room and narrow. I would order 1 size up since they don't have half sizes. Tried the heat idea and it didn't help.

Title: Decent looking bag. Only issue is after you put ... Review: Decent looking bag. Only issue is after you put a few things in the main compartment (which is deceptively small) there is no room for anything else unless you are forcefully shoving things in. I'd never take this on an airplain because I have a plain duffle sack thats halve the size and fits more.

Decent bag, decent price; but you get what you pay for.

Title: Couldn't get it to run at CL16 at 3600 MHz Review: When I installed this RAM (by itself) in my PC, I could not get it to run at 3600 MHz at CL16 (even with XMP enabled). It was getting speeds of CL18-22-22-42. I've attached a screenshot of CPU-Z showing the timings. I tinkered with the RAM, my BIOS, etc. for several hours and could not get it to run at CL16, which is unfortunate. The best I could get was CL18. When I installed this RAM alongside my existing CL16, RAM, it reduced the speed of my memory for 1066 MHz.

I would not recommend this RAM.

Review: I have not had any problems with these headphones.  They actually fit in my ears. Some are too big, but these fit me nicely and the sound is nice.  I've only been using them for a couple of days, but as of now, they are great!

Review: Great 5 pack set of extra warm wool socks. One of my sons lives in the northwest and is always complaining of how cold it gets there in the winter. When I saw these I knew they would be perfect for him. They are super warm and soft and fit him great. He can use them whether he is just off and walking around town or if he goes skiing or even just hiking in snow. They are really well made, too, and wash well. These would make a great holiday gift or stocking stuffer for the man in your life.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Beautiful,  very happy!!

Title: Hand & foot moisturizing oil that works well; the warnings makes me pause Review: This looks like a face serum but is actually a hand and foot oil. I tried a tiny bit on my hands and a little goes a long way. It absorbs quickly and feels silky and non-greasy. It left my hands feeling smooth and hydrated. I like the results but the warnings make one question whether it should be used at all.

The ingredients are caprylic/capric, triglycerides, isopropyl myristate, Di caprylyl, carbonate, Argania spinosa kernel oil, Vitis vinifera seed oil, citrus limon peel oil, Lavandula angustifolia oil, Cymbopogon martini oil, Cananga odorata flower oil, Daucus carota sativa seed oil, limonene, linalool, and eugenol.

Precautions
- Not recommended during pregnancy.
- Avoid exposure to the sun after use.
- Keep out of reach of children.
- Avoid contact with the eyes. Rinse immediately in case of contact.
- Do not ingest.
- Store in a cool place & protect from light.

The current price of $17.99 for this 1.01 fluid ounce bottle with eyedropper dispenser is competitively priced since a little goes a long way.

Title: Good fit, great dress. Review: This dress is really nice. It packs wells. Washes well. Looks great on me. I bought the green one to wear for Thanksgiving with a fall scarf and can use again at Christmas with a
Christmas scarf. A little thin fabric so if you get cold easy wear a cardigan with it. I bought a size up so it was more roomy.

Title: ARE THESE REALLY EASY SPIRITS
Review: I have approximately 20 pairs of these shoes. Different colors and florals. I had one pair that I wore for 3 years until they almost fell of of my feet. I wore them almost everyday. They lasted forever. This pair of shoes was purchased on the 13th of June, this year. Although the shoe is still intact, the part on the toes is peeling and coming off. How is that even possible? It's only been a month. I do not believe Easy Spirit would put something out like this! Is EASY SPIRIT making a cheaper shoe? This is horrible, never thought I would see the day a shoe by this company would fall apart in a month. I would not recommend that anyone buy these shoes at this point. Too flimsy .
