Title: Provides pretty good correction but must be blended well Review: This does reduce some of the blotchiness I have on my face from pimples, etc.; however, the color is a bit too dark for my skin. Also, it has to be blended well and once it is blended, the coverage is reduced a bit. I prefer correctors that are more skin toned. Nevertheless, this works if blended well and covered with foundation.

I do, however, love the name of this product.

Title: Used this to add a better subwoofer to my soundbar and it works perfectly! Review: I have an LG SK9Y and I ran the speaker level inputs from the stock subwoofer out of that and into one channel of this device, then ran a short Shielded RCA to the LFE input on the Klipsch 12" 450 watt home audio subwoofer and it works wonderfully.
The sound bar was miles beyond the amount of bass that was provided by the stock 100 watt sub. I did lower the Sub output to -6 so that I don't feed too much power to the converter and it works great.
It's not the most elegant setup but it's outta site in the corner behind my couch and it sounds superb so I don't care.

Title: Picture Q GOOD Sound Not So
Review: Very compact product easy install and video quality is good but the microphone seems to be affected and doesn't get out clearly.

Title: Don't Believe The Bulbs Are CRI 96+ Review: Likes:

Dislikes:

Title: Cheap quality travel bottles that dispenses a fine mist of whatever liquid one puts in there Review: There are four clear bottles in this set with just a whisper of color in the caps. The words "SWEET DAY" are written in color on the front of each bottle.

These bottles are tiny but good enough to fill with hand sanitizer, perfume, or any liquid that needs to be sprayed in a fine mist. The pump spray dispenses a very fine mist. The negative to me is that they feel very cheap and do not have the quality feel I prefer.

Other than this, they work as designed and are portable for travel. The current price of $9.99 is a very pricey $2.50 per bottle.

Title: Looked good, but adhesive is not good
Review: I got these originally for a cruise I was taking in July. They came in a really cute box and I thought they would be just perfect for me. Well, once I figured out how to apply them, they just didn't stay on me. I mean, it was warm and humid in the Caribbean so I am assuming the glue they came with just doesn't work well (giving them the benefit of the doubt). They did look cute, but lasted less than an hour and I felt myself pushing the lashes to my eyes to be sure they didn't come off. I finally took them off and went back to mascara. Sorry, can't recommend.

Title: Comfortable

Title: Great Jeans That Actually Fit Review: Lee Jeans are my go to for jeans since they fit my curves & come in short, which is great for those of us that are vertically challenged.

They come in a wide variety of colors & sizes...I'm always pleased with my purchases.

Dress them up, dress them down, just get yourself a pair. You won't be disappointed.

Title: Perfect for Teens or Tweens Review: Updated 5/2/2019: Necklace broke in half the second time it was worn. Would not recommend.

While it is a pretty necklace, it's really small. The pictures in the description must be enlarged. In person, you really can't see the individual diamonds at all. You can see sparkles, but not the stones. I wouldn't even call them stones because they're so small. It's definitely a dainty piece of jewelry. It seems a little fragile, too. It is perfect for teens or tweens. My 17 year old daughter really likes it and it looks nice on her.

Title: So-so product
Review: Not as good as I expected, but does trim okay.  I would prefer if it cut the hair down to the skin line, but I guess you can't have everything.

Title: Stings My Sensitive Skin
Review: I have sensitive skin and this caused some stinging on my face. I tried it a couple of times just to make sure that it wasn't a one time issue. It did not cause any redness or anything like that. The product has a unique scent to it. I can detect the pineapple smell, but there's something else, too. I am neutral about how it smells - it's neither good or bad in my opinion. Other than the stinging, I didn't have any other reactions. There's a little bit of grit to it, but it isn't harsh. It feels a bit sticky and I had to wash my hands after applying it. On the few times I used it, I didn't notice any "wow" results, but I am a regular user of all kinds of anti-aging products that my skin is in pretty good shape for my age. The bottle/dispenser is nice and it gives the feel of a high end product.

Title: cheap spray nozzle!
Review: One of the sprayer nozzles never worked and the other broke after 2 weeks!??? Going to contact seller to see if they will replace nozzles. The glass bottle part seems to be fairly substantial though.

Title: great find
Review: Works great

Title: Not sturdy in the long run Review: I reserved writing a review as the comb arrived bent/warped. Yes, it’s wood but it’s two pieces of wood held together with metal pieces. One of mine was crooked so the comb never sat completely straight. I didn’t overly care as long as it worked.

I’ve had this comb a little over a year and it’s done okay. I only use it while traveling so it’s gotten roughly two months of use. Over time, the bent piece has weakened the wood. Yesterday, it finally snapped off. So, now I have most of a comb. I’m not thrilled so I’m writing the review. I’ll buy a sturdier comb next time.

Title: Very Nice!
Review: These are very nice! I will embroider them for Father's Day!  Super soft and they will get even better after a few washes! Will definitely buy again!

Title: Love, Love, Love
Review: This dryer will literally blow you away. Dries my hair in no time. Easy to hold and buttons are in a convenient place. Good heat as well as a great cold shot button to set your style. Also I love the orange/copper color that I ordered. Such a fun color.

Title: Nice speaker but better options out there
Review: This is a nice little boombox that’s great for low to mid level sound with decent bass. Also has a cool light and can be paired with other doss speakers for fuller/louder sound. My review is based on the one DOSS party boom speaker. It’s light weight which may save your arm but probably contributes to distortion if you try to crank the volume. My biggest grip is there is no battery level indicator. I have a ION block rocker that $20 more than this is currently selling for. It cam with a microphone and the sound is better cranked up. It also tells you how much battery is left. The only thing the DOSS has over the ION is the lights, weight it’s $20 cheaper. Do your research find out which one works best for you. If $20 is a too much and you need something lighter with cool lighting than this box may be for you.

Title: Disappointed!!
Review: Japanese cherry blossom is a beautiful fragrance unfortunately this was either extra old or a knockoff.  It smelled more of rubbing alcohol than anything.  Very disappointed.

Title: revlon lipbalm stain
Review: This is NOT a  lipstain in ANY stretch of the imagination.  Disappointing.  Comes off really quickly and I was really looking for a lipstain.  Not sure HOW they call it that.  Meh.  I bought 3 different colors.  Dang it.

Title: Pretty but expensive for some cellophane
Review: I'm not sure if I like the packaging or not. It's tiny. Once you open it, all the sheets are loose inside so there's no good way to store them, especially since they all stick together. The sheets are a little smaller than I expected but it's still a good amount considering I'm using it for nail art. The colors are really pretty & there's a good assortment. Lastly, I don't really understand why or how a very small amount of cellophane could cost $11. You can go to the dollar store & get 3 huge sheets of cellophane for $1. 🤷🏻‍♀️

Title: Not Neon!
Review: This is not neon! Its more pastel and the bag is super tiny! Returning.

Title: Quality made versatile suitcase, holds a lot
Review: Nice light weight suitcase. Wheels are wonderful and the suitcase spins on a dime. This will be a breeze to maneuver through the airport with on my next trip. Inside the suitcase, there is lots of room and pockets and the suitcase unzips and expands to allow for more contents. I read some other reviews here where folks were saying that the bag will not go through the airport for carry on. This bag looks small enough for me and looks as though it should pass. I will know more when I travel next and I will update this review then.

Title: Runs Small
Review: I ordered this cute peeking cat shirt for my son in the 3X size. It's not a 3X! I wear a women's size 18 and it's snug on me. I usually wear a 1X or XL in brand name items or a 2XL in unfamiliar brands. The shirt quality is pretty basic. It's not particularly soft, but it's not scratchy either. The cat is cute, but it is a decal so it's a little stiff feeling and noisy.

Title: Highly fragrant when dry but not so much when wet; lasted entire shower & left no stains - UPDATE Review: There are 12 grapefruit tangerine shower steamers in this package. The fragrance is intense when dry and very pleasant to my senses.

I put one slightly outside a direct stream of water and I could detect only a little fragrance because my scented soaps overpowered the steamer. It lasted the entire shower. I love that it did not stain my tub. The pink color just washed away.

The current price of $29.99 comes to $2.50 per steamer. This is overpriced and the performance is just okay. I personally would not order this again after having tried them as the performance does not warrant such a high price. Also, the steamers do not hold together well when removing the plastic as some powder falls off.

UPDATE - I gave these to a friend to try because she LOVES steamers. However, she rates these 2 stars. She says they dissolve to quickly and the scent us subtle.

Title: So much fun!
Review: Bought this for my Sister. She have 5 feral cats that visit every need and she feeds them. She is loving this camera. It notifies her when the cats show up outside at 2:30 am in the morning. She gets up and opens cans of cat food and pours cereal for them. She watches them eat and play on her front porch. She said it provides great entertainment. Well worth the money.

Title: Adequate for the price point! Review: Bought one for my daughter for $30 and this price point was much better… However, it is not nearly as strong of motor as the higher price point. My son with teen acne wanted to try- hence the cheaper version.
I wouldn’t know the difference if we didn’t own two of them. But, this seems to work. The outside case is open and close cell, I recommend popping the lid and leaving it unlocked. Brushes are easy to change out and I see replacements are also available as needed which is a perk. I feel it’s a helpful tool to get into a routine of washing their face and the fact it waterproof is also a plus. Nice to know you could use in the shower while doing your morning routine! Especially teenage boys that don’t care to have a beauty regiment, especially one that takes time… But, they also don’t appreciate going to high school with acne!!

Title: Cruise Ready and Stylin'
Review: Bought this for my cruise.  I was looking for something that wasn't huge but could still hold a decent amount of stuff.  I was able to fit (without it even flinching) my SeaPass and Cash in the back pocket, separate from everything else so I wouldn't loose it. Then, I was able to fit a full normal size bottle of sunscreen, lip balm, a smaller sunscreen, sunglasses, and lotion in the large pocket.  It never looked bulky and it was perfect.  The strap is too small in my opinion to go around your body but it could be done, I just didn't like it since I wanted the freedom of it being at my hip and off my shoulders. It held up great for 7 days and I'm expecting to be able to use it on all my vacations now.

Title: good product at a decent price

Title: wig cap

I would give it a better rating if the consistency was more solid like a Burts Bees and maybe less of it would end up in my mouth.

Review: I really wanted to give this sweater 5 stars because it fits perfectly, is the perfect length to wear with black leggings, is extremely soft and comfortable, and is a great twist on a basic grey sweater, but it sheds terribly. It leaves grey fuzz all over my black leggings and left fuzz on all my black clothing when I washed it. It says not to put in a dryer, but I tried drying it anyway in hopes that it would get rid of the excess fuzz, but it still shed onto other clothing. This is a moderately priced sweater so it shouldn’t have this problem. Pretty disappointed. (From my daughter)

Review: This is NOT the same product you get if you order from the company direct. This product clumps as you apply it and you end up with a huge layer of sticky deodorant all over you and the outside of the container.

Title: Cheaply made body brush set; wand does not seat fully
Review: I am disappointed in this set. There are two interchangeable body brush heads, one wand, and one face brush. There is also a burlap carry bag. The white bristled body brush feels softer than the sand colored head. My main disappointment is with the wand. The wand point does not seat well into the body brushes. I cannot fit it all the way. I pushed it as much as it will go and it wobbles with vigorous brushing. Of course the brushes can be used with the hand-held elastic. Nevertheless, I wanted to use the wand and am disappointed in its connection with the brush. Other than this major flaw, the brushes are basic and bargain basement, but they work as designed.

Title: AWESOME  !!!!!!!!
Review: got today  it connected to my computer and it sounds amazing  im ordering the 2nd one  i loveeeeee it !! so small and amazing sound

Title: It's Okay
Review: This nightshirt didn't really do anything for me. It's kind of boring looking when wearing it. It reminded me of things my Grandmother used to wear. The material is not particularly soft. It's not rough or scratchy, just so-so. It's light weight and good for the summer, but it's almost see-through. The sizing is good. I usually wear size 16 and the XL fits fine. Overall, it's just okay in my opinion.

Title: Great facial cleanser brush!
Review: This is a small, quality made facial brush. I love the size of this, in minutes my face is fresh and clean. Easy to charge using the USB port, set up and clean the brush. I love how my skin feels after using this, cleaning and stimulating collagen production in my 60 something year old skin. I have been using this twice daily for a few weeks now and I highly recommend to all.

Title: Not the kind of cleanser I typically use
Review: Not a great fan of this cleanser. First, it's not like cleansers I have used in the past. I guess sometimes that's a good thing because this cleanser has an added benefit of moisturizing. This cleanser is thick and gel like and it goes on to my skin easily. Problem is, I don't feel like my skin is clean after I rinse it off (even though I am sure it is). I guess, I prefer my cleansers to clean and then I use serums and moisturizing creams after to moisturize my skin. Of course, this may work well for you so I am still rating it as 4 stars. Just not the type of cleanser I like. Also, the exfoliating is not in the cleanser, it's in the cloth you use, not part of my daily regimen.

Title: Nice for traveling
Review: This is a handy little set to take with you when traveling. It has everything you need for a manicure or pedicure fix up between visits. It also comes in a really nice pack which is perfect for gift giving. I am thinking I may buy another one of these next year for a stocking stuff for my son.  Of course, this is not a professional set and you could buy a better one for more $$. But I think this is a great set to have around and take when you are on the go.

Title: This is an ok flat iron. Use on thin/fine hair and it'll be great.
Review: This flat iron is in the "ok" range.  Nothing spectacular about it. I would actually put it in the category within a $12=$15 range flat iron.  I would add a little more money and go for something a little better unless you have thin, easy to manage hair.  I used it on my daughter's thick hair and I could only do tiny pieces in order for it to work decent.

Title: These do not work well for me; a bit too thick & not good for shoes with a lip Review: These have a good cushion but they crowd the shoe. Also, if one has a rim around their shoe (as I do on my Van's sneaker), they sit too low in the shoe. I pulled them out of that shoe and tried another and it still did not work. It kept getting unstuck and just did not feel right. I'll pass on these. Perhaps they will work for someone else.

UPDATE: I had my boyfriend try these and they did not work for him either. They just did not stay put and came off on his socks.

Another thing I forgot to mention is that the photo on the front of the package shows the heel guards going into the ball of the shoe and the instructions are in broken English. For instance, one instruction says "Remove the mucous on the back."

Title: poor quality and too tight
Review: I've ordered Mephistos in the past, but for some reason these loafers seem a size too small.  As a result, the stitching is coming apart after only a half dozen times of wearing these.  However, at this price point, the shoes shouldn't be coming apart.  Too bad because the style is nice.

Title: Great spa day package and giftable!
Review: This is an absolutely lovely gift basket for the woman in your life. Contains everything she needs for a great spa experience.  This makes a wonderful gift for any woman. Great presentation in a super giftable box. Would be perfect for a school teacher, mail person, nail technician or any woman.  Highly recommend!

Title: Solid sub with astounding bass! Review: This replaced a 12" JBL venue sub from about 15 years ago. I have always liked Klipsch but this is the first home audio product I have owned of theirs and I am super happy.
I use this in conjunction with my LG SK9Y sound bar. I removed the speaker cables and fed them into a Low level line converter and that runs to the LFE input on the subwoofer.
It works wonderfully and really fills in as much as or better than the Venue did before. MILES BEYOND the stock 8 inch on for the sound bar.
I would recommend this sub for any home audio system. It's not small though so make sure you have room.

Title: Not so great. Mine didn't work very well Review: The sound was not great. I think it doesn't have enough bass and it was also very hard to see what channel you were on.
For around the same price get the JENSEN CD Sport . It has excellent sound and better features.

Title: Great keyboard for extended writing / typing. Review: I had previously been using an [[ASIN:B00GH0N1LM New Trent Airbender Mini 1.0 - Clamshell Wireless Bluetooth iPad Mini Keyboard case. Compatible: 1st & 2nd Gen iPad Mini (polycarbonate, matte case)]] for a travel keyboard, but with a cramped layout, it wasn't conducive for typing for extended periods on my iPad Mini, so when I was offered the Kensington Wired iPad Keyboard, I jumped at the chance.

No setup is required other than plugging the lightning connector into the iPad.

The full-size keyboard is responsive (no sticking / dead keys) and perfect for composing e-mails or documents on the go. It feels like a regular full-size keyboard and is sturdy (unlike other travel / portable keyboards I've tried). The only downside for those intending to use this with an iPad Mini is that you will need a separate stand for your iPad, but as a writer I really appreciate the feel and responsiveness of this versus smaller travel keyboard cases.

The plastic is sturdier than you might imagine, however they could be broken if not kept laid flat in storage. They are larger than I thought they would be, which is preferable as I had been concerned that they might be much smaller than the photo lead me to believe and thus leave me with microscopic shapes which had marginal use.  So, I am super happy with them and find the variety of sizes more than applicable per a variety of projects.

Title: Cleans & lathers well; smells nice to me; mediocre results; not sure about anti-breakage Review: I actually thought I was going to like this more than I do. I do like the fragrance a lot as it is atypical but hard for me to describe. It also lathers and cleans well but only time will tell how well this works to stop hair breakage.

I have fine, short-to-medium curly locks. My hair dried feeling soft but did look just a tad lackluster compared to my other shampoos and my curls were not as defined as usual.

The current price of $11.99 ($15.99 minus 25%) is competitively priced for 13.5 fluid ounces. I like the fragrance the most and the lather and cleaning ability but I am not ecstatic about the results. It is okay but not great and not a shampoo I would order again.

Title: No Manual with Product and Poor Sound Quality
Review: The product paired easily with my phone but after that, I was not happy. I had no manual to refer to for the operation of the earbuds. I went to the vendor website and it kept trying to get me to register for a "prize." When I would click out of it, I was not directed to home page for the website, the annoying offer kept reloading. I could not find any support for this product. Even during a test run, my call quality was poor and sound like I was far off (speakerphone sounded better), the music did not have the bass sound as promoted either. The battery gave up almost as quickly as I have. I am returning this product and requesting a refund.

This soap is very gentle on my skin and has a moderate lather. It is also scentless. I personally love scents but for those with sensitive skin, scentless is the way to go.

For me this is just okay. The bar is too small and I suspect this will be priced very high (meaning over $6).

Title: Doesn't support 2 displays, even for Intel Macs Review: I am quite disappointed in this dock. It had lots of positive reviews, but for my Intel (not M1/M2) Macbook Pro (2018), it only lets you output to 1 unique monitor (if you have more than 1 monitor plugged in, they will all show the same thing), even if your laptop lid is closed.

The description said that for M1/M2 Macs, all the external monitors would show the same thing. But this is apparently the case for Intel Macs as well.

Would NOT recommend if you have an Intel Mac and want to use 2 unique external monitors.

Title: Not what I expected.
Review: I had a pair of "beach shoes" 13 or 14 years ago that I absolutely loved.  They were so comfortable, and I could wear them all the time, whether at home or to the grocery store.  Unfortunately, they only lasted a few years, and the store I bought them from no longer carried them.  When I found these, I was very happy, and ordered a pair.  I was very excited to receive them, but was very disappointed after receiving them.  The sole lining is at least one size too large, and is uncomfortable on my feet, and I cannot walk in them because my feet slide around so much, I'm afraid I'll turn or break an ankle.  It's like how I imagine trying to walk on ice in nylon stockings would be: very dangerous.

Title: Do not buy.  Worse than Gummies.
Review: I hardly even got to break these in before they were trash.  I haven't had much of a chance to use them since I'm usually in work environments where good quality headphones will only get broken within a matter of weeks.  I had purchased these for home use.  I normally use a bluetooth headset so these sat on the shelf for a while only to be used for the special occasion.  The sound was really nice and although the ear bud placement can be tricky to get it in the perfect spot, they really lacked bass.  I was hoping this would change once I got a chance to break them in.  Plugged them in a couple days ago and the left one is completely out.  I tried multiple jacks so its definitely the headphones.  Do not buy if you want quality headphones.  Save yourself the headache.

Title: THE WORST!!! Review: Long story short: it's crap don't buy it.

When I opened my kit to do my nails for the very FIRST TIME, the brush on gel bottle seemed kind of empty but I was willing to over look that since it was my first time and I was retrieving product. But I noticed as my use of the gel continued that it was drying out while I was in the middle of using it. Even though I continually caped the bottle. However I was able to just BARELY finish the application process, so I was still willing to overlook the gel issuse. I thought maybe I happened to get a kit that sat on the self too long. My real qualm with this product came ten hours later when I realized it STILL HADN'T DRIED!!!! I did my nails a couple hours before I went to bed. Which should of given them ample time to dry, but they were still a little soft before sleeping, I figured after eignt hours of me literally doing nothing, they'd stiffen up...but NOPE. I awoke to smashed and gashed nails that I now have spend my morning removing because I will not leave the house looking like this. So the moral of my story is, this product is horrible, save yourself the money.

Title: Rugged! Review: *Updated 9/22: My husband has had these for about 6 months. He has worn them less than once a week. He's a computer guy and would wear these on weekends when doing projects around the house or just as regular pants. Yesterday he noticed what he thought was the sound of Velcro through out the day. He thought maybe there were Velcro pockets and didn't think much about it. Then in the evening, he heard the sound again, but this time he realized that the pants were ripping. The rip was down the side, but not on the seams. It was about a half an inch away from the seam. It's really a shame because he really liked these pants. I have higher expectations from the Levis Brand.

Original review: These pants are rugged and durable. They seem like they will offer some protection from scratches. I ordered these for my husband. I thought they would be good for weekend projects around the house. They are a little snug in the waist. He wears a 34/34 pant size, so that's what I ordered for him. There's no stretch in the waist band at all. He's hoping they will stretch over time. He usually wears Dockers pants and the 34/34 is usually a perfect fit.

Title: nice products - challenge to open though
Review: the design of the lid/top made it super challenging to pull open, and it does not get easier after multiple use.  That aside, the lipstick is smooth to apply and I like the matte finish.  It does not stay oil for 24 hours , more like a few hours if you are not eating.  It does provide a decent protection against the winter cold and hence, i dont need to apply chap stick on top.

Title: Excellent quality bag... Review: Purchased for my daughter who is now into 'retro' bands for school. The size is good. The strap isn't adjustable but on a 5' 4" girl it sits on her hip in the right area. No flap, only a button closure but I don't foresee that being an issue with everyday use. The screen print is very good...I'll wait to see how long it lasts but as of now it looks pretty good.
Also, very good seller. Responds quickly. Extremely understanding and very fast turnaround when a problem arose. Would buy from again.

Title: Great Unisex Gardener’s Hat Review: This 28 PALMS (Amazon Brand) MEN’S STRAW LIFEGUARD SUN HAT is actually a unisex, one-size-fits-all hat. It makes a great gardener’s hat. I liked it a lot, until I noticed a break in the straw fiber at the top of the crown. That break has now expanded into a noticeable hole.

The hat wasn’t mistreated at all--I only put it on a few times. It will still work as a sunshade when I’m working in the garden, but it doesn’t look great.

The hat has a useful cord that you can tighten below your chin. It holds the hat on in windy weather.

Title: These look great, but unfortunately did not provide enough support or ...
Review: Five stars for looks, unfortunately I found these tremendously uncomfortable from the get go. I have orthotics that I wear in my regular sneakers, but you cannot remove the insoles in these shoes so I tested them out as is. They claim to have gel cushioning, but unfortunately I found these tremendously uncomfortable from the get go. I have orthotics that I wear in my regular sneakers, but you cannot remove the insoles in these shoes. Within 15 minutes of wearing them, I begin to feel pain in my right foot. It felt as though there was no cushioning at all and I was walking directly on the concrete. I tried wearing them a second time all day in Yokohama, and my feet and back were aching and sore within a couple of hours.  These look great, but unfortunately did not provide enough support or cushioning for me.

Title: Great sulfate free shampoo with a wonderful Herbal Essences fragrance!
Review: I get Keratin treatments a few times a year and I typically buy some pretty expensive shampoo to help retain and prolong the keratin. One thing I cannon use on my hair is sulfates (or it strips the keratin). When I saw that this Herbal Essences shampoo was sulfate free, I thought I would try it. I always loved Herbal Essences and used to have it exclusively in the shower back many years ago. This shampoo is wonderful, leaves my hair soft and shiny and smells wonderful (lightly coconut fresh fragrance) and I don't have to worry about stripping my hair. Highly recommend for anyone who wants the best for their hair!

Title: These jeans run kind of small
Review: These jeans are super cute, but they run small.  I'm short and the length was a little long for me, but they are still cute.  They are well made, but overpriced.

Title: Not " Truly Seamless"
Review: Not as expected or pictured! There are seams on the toes, they are not "truly seamless" like they say! My 4 year old likes them, but $11 for 1 pair!!!

Title: Not what I expected
Review: Maybe theses sound good to some people. Did not meet expectations nor advertised claims.

Title: Either I receive a dud or it doesn't work with Windows 7 Review: I picked this external hard drive due to the reasonable price and because it said in the description that it's compatible with Windows 7. What a disappointment. It worked for all of about 30 seconds. Then I got the "A drive is not formatted" error and it shut down completely. I've never been able to get it to do anything since, my computer doesn't even recognize it now. I tried our laptops too, and they don't "see" the it either. It's as if it died.

I don't know if I got a dud or not. The pamphlet in the box said it's compatible up to XP. So why say it's compatible up to Windows 7 in the description here? Seems a bit dishonest. I would have looked for another external drive if I'd known. In any case, I'm returning for a refund and looking for a better product. I'd proceed with extreme caution when considering purchasing this. It's a shame because TEAC is otherwise a brand I've had good experience with.

Title: My hair felt dry & sticky. Review: I have used Joico products for years, and liked them.
I used a little of This Joico mouse mainly on my roots when my hair was wet, and a little on the roots when dry.
And my hair felt stiff, sticky, and dry.
I used the brush to blow it again too get this out but still felt dry.
I like my hair to have movement.

My hair is not long , but not a short shaved pixie, also I have a blonde weave, with the top of my hair being longer.
I’m not a fan of using allot of this type of product in my hair, as I have allot of hair, and body.
For other people with different hair this could work well.

Shake can before using this.

Title: Easy and plentiful
Review: Stick great to my desk and provide ample spaces for all of my cords. The color coding is more useful than I thought originally. Since each one has two spots, I had enough for my desk and bed night stand.

Title: Perfect
Review: First laptop bag that I have bought that my laptop fits perfectly. Thank you. I get compliments on how nice it looks too.

Title: Difficult to use. The pin keeps twisting.
Review: Very difficult to open with one hand(while holding hair to be pinned) The pine twists. Really wasted my money. It is not always holding the "hair " I am working to put twist tie curlers in a wig to look fully. I hope they hold for what I have to do in the show. Very disappointed.

Title: Small bar; hardly any lather; nothing special; bar arrived w/partial fingerprint on it; PRICEY Review: At the current price of $11.99, this small bar of soap is way too expensive. I do like the earthy aroma of the soap. However, there is hardly any lather and lather is very important to me. It cleans but is nothing special.

Note that my bar (see photo) arrived with an indentation with a fingerprint on it along the edge as if it was touched heavily when it was molded.

Title: ightly plumping but nothing spectacular Review: This is the first time I ever tried a face mist and I do not find this spectacular. At the current price of $56, this should be outstanding.

After my shower, I closed my eyes and sprayed this on my face and neck. My skin felt a bit hydrated and I did like the subtle flowery fragrance. My face and neck also felt a bit softer. However, I do not feel this brightened or improved my skin elasticity in any way. To me this is just not worth the price. If it were $13 or less, then I would feel this is worth applying for extra hydration in addition to applying a face cream; however, I am not personally wowed by this mist. 

This is made in the USA.

Title: razor case
Review: Husband hated the razor, but loves the case.  Sigh. But it's a good case. Zipper close.

Title: Good but short life. Review: I've had this for about two years and last year it was dead. It resides in a portable enclosure and the enclosure suddenly wouldn't read the SSD. Before contacting customer service, I tried different cables, machines, and ports. Finally, after contacting customer service, I was informed it needed to be replaced, which Crucial did without issue.

But when it works, it works great. It's fast and doesn't cause problems between devices.

Title: Perfect
Review: These water shoes are well made, look just like the photos, are comfortable.  I will definitely buy again.

Title: Great body wash, leaves my skin feeling clean, soft and moisturized
Review: I have to start by saying that I have been using Dove products for years. They always make quality products focusing on a woman's skin. I am a 63 year old woman and my facial skin has a tendency to be dry in some areas and oil in others and my body skin tends to be dry. I love this new Dove Body Wash. I keep it in my shower and use it daily. First, it works for all areas of my skin so it easily keeps my skin in good health. Second, my skin feels amazing when I come out of the shower, clean and refreshed. Third I love the new style container it comes in with the pump. The pump keeps the dispenser clear from clogging and works great to dispense the was easily onto my washcloth. This is, by far, one of the best body washes I have ever used. I highly recommend this to all woman with all skin types.

Title: Lightweight oil that absorbs quickly and leaves face only slightly moisturized
Review: This is made in Korea. I rubbed a few drops into my face and neck. It absorbed quickly and left my face feeling slightly moisturized.  The eye dropper does not pick up much oil but not much is needed. The watery oil has a very faint fragrance that is almost imperceptible but it is a clean aroma. This is just okay. Its performance is average but the current price of $25 is expensive but still competitively priced. After having tried this, it is not an oil I would order again as it does not have enough of a WOW factor for me.

Title: Total confusion on why I bought this
Review: This has been compared to the wet brush and I am completely lost as to why. This is like trying to put a fork through your hair. A fork that is made of flimsy plastic. Totally confused as to who could brush their hair with this and why. My hair is long and thick and maybe it can get through baby fine hair but why bother when the wet brush exists

Title: Charge 4 braided band
Review: I have purchased several different bands for my charge 4 - I personally prefer the slip on kind.  This comes with challenges.  You have to be able to adjust them to size for each human wrist.  Then I have found that the 'smooth' bands don't stay adjusted - they slip.  This one is sort of thicker, has some texture and body. I am calling it braided, but it isn't - just sorta looks like it is.  I have found this one to stay adjusted fairly well.  Much better than the smooth bands.  I bought 2 different color variations and I like them.  They were well represented in the photos - meaning what you see is what you get.  All in all, these are good in my opinion. Of course, time will tell.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. All my reviews reflect my personal experience with the reviewed item and I receive NO free products or discounts that are available to all shoppers.

Title: Nice bra and does minimize a larger bust which is ...
Review: Nice bra and does minimize a larger bust which is nice but I cannot wear it longer than a couple hours before it really starts to hurt.

Title: Soft scrunchies that hold well but embroidery is not discernable
Review: There are two scrunchies in this package. Both ties are velvety soft and the elastic in the ties are tight and provide a good grip on my hair. However, the embroidery of the woman's face is very nice but impossible to discern off or on the hair. The scrunchie has to be flattened out in order to see what it looks like. The current price of $7.20 comes to $3.60 per tie which is pricey.  Although these ties feel wonderful and work well, paying for embroidery that can't be seen is foolish, in my opinion.

Review: My son wears a 6 in youth and they are still a little big, these are a men’s 7 and they are way to small, more like a boys 4 or 5, could NOT get them closed. Horrible fit. So disappointed.

Title: Clippers & cuticle cutter are great; nail file is not so great Review: I ordered this nail set because I loved the color of the clippers. There is one sturdy nail clipper, one metal file, and a cuticle cutter/pusher in this set.

The nail clipper is strong and sharp and I LOVE that there is no spring wire to seat to get this to work. It does, however, take getting used to its curved blade. The cuticle cutter is also sharp and the pusher does what it is supposed to do.

I have never been a fan of metal nail files and this one is terrible. This nail file does not file at all as the surface is not rough enough.

I like that this comes in a protective case.

Overall, this is a relatively nice set. Nevertheless, the current price of $19.99 ($23.99 minus $4) is pricey for this set especially with such a lousy metal nail file. I do love the other tools though.

Title: Use other body lotion over this to absorb. Seems to work pretty good. Review: The Nivea oil to me is the same consistency as baby oil, and has a very soft lite scent that does not last long at all.
I have to be carful pouring a little bit into my hand, so the oil does not spill on the dressing room carpet.

When I came out of the shower, and dried off, I put it on my legs and body. It did not absorb as fast an other review has mentioned.
My legs looked like they had baby oily on them after 10 mins.
Then I used my regular body lotion all over this, it all absorb into my skin then.
I have noticed my skin did not seem as dry as it has been and felt smoother.

I can only figure out what 3 of the ingredients are. Which is Macadamia oil and Avocado oil.
Although they look like a chemical to me!
Also the cotton seed oil. If that is real cotton seed oil, it is full of sprayed chemicals!!

Because what this is made of, I can only give it a 3 star, plus I have to use other body lotion for this to absorb.

After washing a second time, I noticed the breast part has a seam that makes the center stick out. It looks like nipples. It doesn't lay correctly.

Title: Great alternative to traditional iron straighteners for your hair
Review: This is a great product. I have been using straightening irons for years now to keep my typically wavy shoulder length hair. So, using a heated brush was anew experience for me. I admit it works a little different than an iron. So if you are looking for a super straight look, stick with the iron. But if you are trying to minimize the wave in your hair and do multiple layers at one time, you really need to try this. I find my hair looks flawlessly smooth and the brush really makes my hair more manageable and easier to dry. I highly highly recommend if you are looking for an alternative to a damaging iron (tends to give me split ends and dry hair), try  this.

Otherwise, it's a fantastic set of tools you can use from taking pictures of market items to hobbyist indulgences.

This is even better in the shower on wet hair.  The only reason I rated this 3 stars is because I feel the current price of $8.99 is about $5 too much for this brush. If it were not so expensive, it would have received 4 stars from me.

Title: Gave me a seasick feeling
Review: I was so excited to try these and wanted to love them. I’m a hardcore Tacx user and have used a Neo most weeks for 5-10 hours/week for the past several years. They were definitely easy to unbox and install, it took about 5 minutes to get it set up. But after several hour rides, I couldn’t get used to the feeling of rocking back and forth. It made me feel a little bit nauseous, similar to the feeling I get on boats. If I kept my power really low and smooth, I would sometimes forget the plates were there. But any time my power increased, I felt a little sick.  Any large surge from sprinting was especially bad, but even small surges in power from shifting were enough to make me feel seasick from the rocking. Also looking down at the ground and seeing the bike move back and forth wasn’t great either. I tried to get used to it, but after several rides decided it wasn’t worth it to try to get used to something that is so expensive when I was happy with the trainer before. Thankfully popping off the plates and returning it was an easy process, so I don’t regret trying them.

Title: Wow
Review: I havent had a relaxer in over 2 years. I was Very hesitant about this product but brought it on a whim for $8 at Dollar General. As soon as I put the product on my hair it immediately removed 80% of my frizz. I almost cried because the day before I was Seriously considering cutting my hair all off. I was unable to get to the salon and even at 33, am still figuring out which products work for my hair. But this was a Pleasant surprise. It was the Perfect weight for my hair and smelled Wonderful!! After applying the product I was able to do one pass through my hair with the flat iron and my hair went from dry and unmanageable (a little rain Also got on it during the day) to shiny and soft. I was Amazed and will try out the other products in the line. I only took away one star away because I just wrapped my hair and am unsure how it will look in the morning. I will update later. :-)

Title: Scent is okay; it’s a bit spicy; aroma lasts several hours Review: I wish I liked this more. This is a nicely packaged perfume in an attractive bottle with a lacy top. The scent does not smell like lemongrass or rose as described but is spicy and vintage. It is okay but definitely not my favorite.

The current price of $44.99 ($49.99 minus $5) is competitively priced for perfume like this but it is not one I would order again as I have to really love it to pay that much.

Title: Dusty waste of money
Review: When I think of Almay, I don't immediately think of them having amazing eyeshadow, but they're decent for a drugstore brand. I saw that a couple of these little quads were priced at $2.50 so I snagged "The world is my oyster" and "Here goes nothing". Neither are even worth $2.50. Zero pigment, flaky shimmer that just falls off of your skin and the shades are so close together, you might as well just use it as a single shadow color. If you want some cheap, drugstore eyeshadow, just get Wet n Wild.

Title: Did NOT last long at all !!!
