Title: Nice moisturizer - not strictly hyaluronic acid
Review: I use hyaluronic acid products daily so when I saw this I wanted to try it. For the positives, it contains not only the hyaluronic acid, but also a moisurizer. It has a light fragrance and is easy to apply. For the negatives (in my opinion) I didn't like the consistency of the cream, I found it more of a moisturizer than an HA product. Usually HA is more of a serum, and is light and absorbs quickly. This definitely is more of a moisturizing product with the benefit of having hyaluronic acid as a side ingredient. Anyway, for the money, it is not a bad product. I will just be using this a lot more for overnight bedtime cream than a morning/daytime product.

Title: Very affordable
Review: Color and  comfortable

Title: Small lightly fragrant bath bombs; performance mediocre; bomb dissolved in 10 min Review: [[VIDEOID:bb5edda514909261ac36f99d8cf04678]] There are 12 individually wrapped small bath bombs in this set in different fragrances. The fragrances are subtle and are rose, coconut, mint, lavender, lemon, strawberry, green tea, rosemary, lily, peach, orange, ocean.

The bombs dissolve in about 10 minutes but the suds only hold for about 8 minutes; at least in a foot bath. The bath fragrance is mild and lasts the same amount of time. I tried the lily bomb and it dissolved into lemon-colored water.

Since I personally do not like the color rings caused by bath bombs in my bath, I used this in a foot bath. The color of this bomb, which was a flourescent yellow, did not adhere to my skin, my foot bath, or my towels-- at least the color of the lily one I tried.

In summary, these are not the best performaing bath bombs around but they are nice. The current price of $29.99 is really expensive for this as it comes to $2.50 per small bath bomb which, considering the performance, is about double what I would expect to pay.

Title: Worked great for about two weeks once it finally set up
Review: It took forever and many MANY tries to get it to link to the bridge. In fact I’d completely forgotten it until I was in the room doing something else and decided to try again for s&g and it actually linked up. So I installed it in the mailbox (YES the bridge couldn’t find the sensor even with it sitting ON it) and even set up Alexa to tell us when the mail arrives. Then I noticed it wasn’t announcing anymore. Checked in the app And it’s dun dun dun “offline.” Nothing is bringing it back online, not even new batteries. I just gave up. So frustrating to try and deal with anymore.

Title: but made from very poor quality fabric Review: It's very cute, but made from very poor quality fleece (worse than the $5 fleece blanket from Walmart), definitely not flannel, the tail is glued on... and theres no care instruction. It's definitely not worth 50 bucks, but cute anyways.

I weight 120 lbs, 5'2, purchased a medium, it is baggy.

Title: Dissatisfaction from the start needs more time for better development and programming. Review: We bought 2 of these one for our livingroom and the other for the bedroom. My issues with these are they will automatically just chirp on like you are asking it a question and your not even in the room.

My other issue is, its very limited on what it does with streaming from your lets say your phone to the cube itself. You have to eother install an app on the phone or an app on the cube itself. We went back to our 4k firesticks they work great and without the constant interuption of the box false activating questions.

Title: Works gently but effectively on the dry skin on my feet; rinse w/water to clean Review: This file is not as easy to hold as this [[ASIN:B096XV8F8T one]] and it is almost double the price at the current cost of $17.99.

Only one side of this flat file is usable and that is the side without the writing on it. It files my heels gently. Some files are like cheese graters and this one is gentler. When I was done, I just rinsed the file under warm water and the dead skin that was removed was easily rinsed off. The file looked brand new afterward.

There are only two reasons I rated this 3 stars. First, it is not as easy to hold as the same type file with a handle. Second, the ones with handles are about $8 cheaper.

Title: great feeling
Review: This facial scrub is wonderful.  Makes my skin feel great.

Title: I'm super annoyed that it was broken when it came to ...
Review: Came to me just in time for my trip to Europe and ended up not working.  I had to send it in to Nikon to be fixed, so it cost another 200$ on top of what I already spent. I'm super annoyed that it was broken when it came to me!!

Title: Light Weight
Review: These sunglasses are pretty basic. They're light weight. They are comfortable enough to wear, but they do feel a bit cheap. They do an adequate job of blocking sun. Overall, they're okay.

Title: 🚽
Review: I really didn't like these. They're too big!

Title: works well
Review: works very well.  Has a very small USB nub, which you can store inside the mouse, or leave on your computer.  Says "red"... but it's more like a deep fuschia to me.  It arrived quickly (I have Prime) and in good condition.

Title: Had to return, seller charges you to print return ...
Review: Had to return, seller charges you to print return label and ship back to them. They run one size to small an very narrow

Title: This mask is small Review: The mask is cute, but it's small. It washes well and maintains it's shape and color. I washed it in a lingerie bag.

It's more the size of a child's mask than an adults.

Title: universal post
Review: I purchased this along with a weather station - which was good because the weather station did not come with ANY type of post.  This one is adjustable. - you will need a wrench.  It helps to have 2 people when installing and adjusting.  The post itself is weighty in my opinion.  Feels like it will last for a few seasons on the north oregon coast front.  It is painted (I believe) - a gray color - it's not shiny, but not matte either.  Time will tell how long it lasts and having said that,  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Oster blade 000
Review: Have used these blades with their clipper for about 20 years.  They last a long time, are reliable and always available.  I am happy to buy them over and over again.

Title: Does not work
Review: Do not buy this product. It does not pick up any signal. TV is set to the proper air configuration. This is not a good product.

Title: NOT MUCH OF ANYTHING
Review: THIS  hair serum is not much of anything.  Oils should work on repairing and stopping split ends.  Olaplex and Oribe. The only two that are amazing and do what they are meant to do. Pricey but if you have color treated hair, the only patened hair oil and product line is Olaplex. Just a girl with bleached damaged hair who has tried Everything

Title: Don't Understand What's So Special
Review: I think the Echo Show is better. The only thing that makes it special is how it connects Alexa devices. I wish they could add that to Echo Show.

Title: AWESOME and simple to set up
Review: i have hemmed and hawed for quite a while  about  a Fire Stick or a Roku ......do i, dont i, do i dont i ........i barely watch TV and my TV in the room where i spend most of my time in has only one HDMI port .. so i finally got it on prime day for only 20 bucks and put it on my bedroom TV .. the thing is when im watching TV i fall asleep !!!  but it was SIMPLE to set up and  i only downloaded a few apps so far  like Netflix, Youtube and FB  HAHA  .. i already pay enough for cable  so now i gotta figure out is it worth it to dump cable and get hulu or sling i dont want to lose the channels i have now though  I have to investigate as to what hulu and sling actually offer as far as channels go  and of course the reg channels  cuz then if that's the case i'd buy another Fire Stick for my other 2 TVS and toss the cable bill !

Title: 50 pc hair clips
Review: These are the typical hair curl clips, but pretty low quality and the edges are SUPER sharp.  I would say, spend a bit more to get a better quality - less sharp edges.  the surfaces a shiny, flat.  No teeth, smooth.

Title: Combs
Review: The combs are for my 7 yr old great nephew. He is just growing his hair out. He loves the comb. It is very sturdy plastic.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Fits great

Title: POOR QUALITY - NOT WOOL BLEND AT ALL!
Review: BOUGHT FOR XMAS GIFT = RETURNED FOR BETTER QUALITY.  THIS IS NOT EVEN LINED.

Title: ok bra but to expensive
Review: About the same quality as the ones in Target. Was hoping to finally fine a leisure bra that actually fits....but no such luck. Not worth returning.

Title: Super Item for Traveling!
Review: My husband used this for his travels to another country and kept his wallet, passport, and IDs in it.  He loved that he could keep his important items around his neck and tucked under his shirt for added security, as opposed to keeping it in his pocket.

Title: Colorful show cap whose loose “bow” looks silly on my head Review: This shower cap is vibrant with the leaf design against the black background. Although it does not feel like this would be waterproof, it is also waterproof as it should be. The cap stays on and I have short to medium length hair. I love the feel of the fabric and its gorgeous color combination. What I do not like is that strip of ties on top. No matter how I tie it, it just flops around and looks incredibly silly on me.

I do like the cap very much but the piece on top ruins for me. Also, the current price of  $15.29 is a bit pricey for this.

Title: Great picture, easy remote and fair price!
Review: Just right for the bedroom! Nice picture! Love that it shuts off if left alone too long.

Title: Perfect for your car, great entertainment for the kids!
Review: Great little device, works with almost all gadgets (I have paired it with my Ipad, Ipod and Samsung laptop, in addition to my IPhone 5). I wish it had been easier to install on my own (I needed to get it done professionally), so it did cost me $129 to get it set up. But, what a great device, and my grandkids absolutely love it. I like the idea of something like this bluetooth enabled device in lieu of having monitors for tv/movie viewing in a minivan. Not much else to say (I have read most of the other reviews and I agree wholeheartedly). Picture/monitor is hi-def and entertained my grandkids watching a movie while I drove from my home in PBG to Orlando last weekend. Can't say enough. I love it.

Title: rewritable cds
Review: I'll admit it... I purchased these to record my own music cds... My car has a cd player and while I do have satellite radio, sometimes the signal isn't so great.  And I like a lot of different music.  So, I make my own mix CDs.  Hahaha!  I'm so a baby boomer.  Pack of 25.  And you can re write them.

Title: Bad Sizing.
Review: Fits in the hip but too large on top. Bought the larger size XL because they said larger size for baggy.  Not sure a large would have worked. Do not like returning so I took in two tucks in neck side in the front. Wearing it now and like the feel of the fabric. I have two other tops made like this one from two different manufacturers. Both in xl. Of course, I know manufacturer sizes are all different.

Title: Nice material oversized and comfy
Review: The neck area is weird and stands up the shirt is cute and oversized and I loved that I cut the neck to make a bow neck and loooove it

Title: Large and full, BUT they are not well made.
Review: Nice loofahs! Will recommend!.....UPDATE, these are falling apart by second use. Don't bother.

Title: Mine were way too small
Review: I ordered a size 1X (16).  I didn't even try them on because they looked waaaay too small---maybe a 10 or 12.  Nice material though.

Title: Works wonderfully
Review: It works great!  I'd lost mine for a laptop and was worried I'd lost all my data.

Title: Not clumpy, not water proof, but no black eyes. Review: Nice black mascara. Not clumpy. Not water proof-but not messy also, and I didn’t get black under my eyes from this, but I also
Did not put it on my lower lashes. Put a little liner on my lower lashes.
I’m a older women. This did Not curl my lashes in any way. I had to use a eye lash curler to get any up left to my lashes.
Put this mascara on before puting on liner. I got a bit of mascara on my eye lid, wiped it off, but and when I did put
Liner on, it would not go on where I wiped the mascara off!!
Never thought my eyes were sensitive to eye make up, but my eyes are a Little itchy the next day.

This is not my favorite mascara, but better then most.
3 1/2 stars..

Title: ... looks a little cheap but watch itself is really nice.
Review: Strap looks a little cheap but watch itself is really nice.

Title: Seems good
Review: Ordered a bunch of tops for work. Have not worn this one really. Looks nice feels nice. Maybe when it warms up I'll wear more.

Title: Sent L, Instead of S, but cheesy material, not like jeans should be. Review: I ordered a size S, Slim, and received a Large, long!?
Of course this does not fit my slim husband that is older, weights 140lbs, 5’8.

That said the material is thin and cheesy.
The material is not Jean material . It is 80% Cotten , 15% Polyester, and 5%fiber!
It is cheesy looking jeans .

I thought my grandson would wear these, he will not wear them at all

Title: ... but used a friends and it leaves my hair like a grease
Review: Amazon lost my order but used a friends and it leaves my hair like a grease pit

Title: good product at a decent price
Review: haven't used any yet. . . .needed some extra cables when I'm ready to install more SSD's. . .

Title: Not very impressed about the capacity.
Review: I use this sd card in a dash camera and for some reason the card does not hold the capacity it reads. Normally about 20 or 19 GB are recorded. I have formatted the card before and seems it holds a little more but not close to 32 GB. I was thinking somewhere around 30 GB would be acceptable,but I barely get 25.

Title: Nice sweats, XL is a Med , size up 3 times Review: I like these jogging sweatpants.
When I recieved them for my son who is almost 6 ft, about 190 lbs.
There is size zippers on both pocket, which is nice as when you walking or jogging you won’t lose your phone etc.
The waist is a wide elastic with fabric over it, and a pull tie. The ankles are knit, and fit tight.

That said, this was supose to be a XL!
This runs so small.
My husband weighs 155 lbs, 5’8 and these sweats fit him good, and there Not big at all. He wears a Medium.
Guess our son missed out on these sweats.

Title: Fabulous birthday backdrop
Review: Beautiful birthday background. Really made my dining room look bright and beautiful 😍

Title: Bad Lee pants
Review: These are big and get bigger the longer you wear them. Horrible. Should have tried on before I wore them but was going on vacation now stuck with them.

Title: Black-like rash
Review: I bought the Bergamot/Lime deodorant at Walmart. As others stated I liked the scent and it lasted pretty well through the day. I did see some of the reviews and pictures mentioned a reaction to this deodorant, but decided to try it anyways. After about 3 weeks of use I also have a large area under my right arm pit that is black in color and a bit sore. My left arm pit has a smaller black-like patch that is also a tad bit sore. I stopped using immediately. I’m allowing one of my daughters to try it as I know everyone reacts differently. I will try another natural deodorant after my armpits heal. I’m bummed it didn’t work out for me as I really liked the smell.

Title: Not a Flattering Style
Review: This shirt is made from a heavy cotton material. It's not very soft, but it's not rough either. The shirt itself is made well with secure and even stitches. I wear Large to Extra Large in shirts. This XL fits already, but it is much shorter than I would prefer. I like my shirts to be long enough to cover my backside if I reach up or sit down. The first picture of the shirt in the description makes it look like a regular t-shirt. The second one that shows the back side does a better job of showing the actual style. It comes in a bit at the waist, then flares out over the hips. I have other Dolman tops and are very different and are more fitted at the waist. The style reminds me of a 90's women's wedding suit. It's not a flattering look on me.

Title: Doesn’t last long.
Review: I liked this product in the beginning but it doesn’t last long. I’ve had it almost a year and now the metal piece that goes in my iPad has broken off inside it. It’s not even used that much because I bought it for traveling. Such a bummer.

Title: One Star
Review: Product arrived with hole in crotch area.

Title: Love the headphones - great range
Review: These are fantastic headphones and I love that i can have my cell phone plugged in at a central location in my house and walk around the house and still listen to music or my book. the range for me is about 30' and the headphones will disconnect if i go outside and then reconnect when i get close to my phone again. If my phone is in my pocket it will stay connected where ever i go. I love listening to things without being attached or tethered to my phone. It also makes it harder for my kids to pull the earphones out of my ears when there is no long cord attached to my phone. I love the 1 click pause feature so i can quickly pause what i am listening to talk to someone (i don't have to go find my phone and swipe and pause). They are comfortable and stay on really well for my ears. I have taken them running and they stayed on as well. I had an issue about 1 year after I bought the headphones and the customer service was wonderful and understanding. really great product and I will continue to purchase and recommend these to my friends.

Title: Shoes are cute, but not comfortable
Review: I wanted to love these shoes, but they are not comfortable.  They gave me blisters.  I feel a shoe should be comfortable when you first put them on, not after breaking in.  They ran a little big for me.

Title: hasn't even lasted 6 months!
Review: I bought 2:  1 in brown and 1 in black.  The black band's strap loop has already broken.  I didn't expect the band to last a year, but at least 6 months!

Title: No Batteries Included!
Review: Notice!! No Batteries are included, only a cheap plastic container! What a disappointment…Don’t waste your money! Very Disappointed

Title: Great for skincare Review: An esthetician recommended these to me. I sort of blew the suggestion off. Cotton pads are cotton pads, right? Why pay more for cotton pads?

I tend to run through skin care products quickly. I decided to try these and now use them faithfully.

Regular cotton pads tend to soak up all the product, leaving it in the cotton, instead of on your face. These don’t soak it all up. They allow you to put the product on your skin. Less waste of products.

They are soft on your skin.

Title: better than expected
Review: I bought this hoping to pick up a channel that was dropped by dish network, internet sites claimed it couldnt be pick up over 50 miles away. Well to my surprise it picks it up in high def along with 38 other free channels. would recommend this product. it appears to be flimsy when you put together but sure works great.

Title: Runs small
Review: It runs a little small but its a stretchy denim. Size up if you want a perfect fit.

Title: Not great
Review: I bought this because my regular kind was out of stock (thanks COVID!) I wanted to love this, the price was comparable to what I normally pay and a friend recommended it. It was great the first couple of times I used it, but then it became super clumpy. Luckily my regular L’Oreal voluminous (black tube) came back in stock and I picked one up and tossed this. L’Oreal definitely makes great products, but this isn’t one of them.

Title: pretty much junk
Review: These were purchased for a one-time, funny wear.  Good thing, because 1/2 of them were broken when they arrived.  If you're ok with a pretty poor overall quality (meaning: No more than one time use), these are probably ok.

Title: supernight bluetooth keyboard
Review: this was a gift. . . he said he liked it. . . . .that's all the info I have on this item. . :(

Title: Nice while it lasted
Review: Liked the storage space. Was great for bringing to court. BUT the strap broke when I was walking down the street. This took about 10 months of using it most days as my work bag for a desk job, but still it’s disappointing. It’s great if you don’t plan on carrying a laptop with a large coffee bottle and some files on a daily basis because the weight will be too much for it

Title: I love the fragrance of this shampoo but it is too watery to me Review: I paired this shampoo with their [[ASIN:B07G14PZZT shine-restoring conditioner in the vanilla scent]] because that was all I had available. This arrived well-packaged so that no shampoo leaked out. There's an internal seal and the pump mechanism has to be inserted once the seal is broken.

I love, love, love the coconut fragrance. However, what I do not like is that this is very watery. It has no consistency to it at all. As a result, I did not get the copious amount of suds I expect from a shampoo. I did feel it cleaned my hair very well. I also felt it made my hair more vibrant looking.

Unfortunately, this does not have the consistency and suds that I desire in a shampoo but the fragrance is wonderful and it ships well as packaged.

Title: Never recieved this!
Review: Never recieved this?

Title: It's OK, angle adjustment leaves a bit to be desired, switching views not intuitive
Review: In general this is a serviceable work unit, its not intuitive nor is the angle adjustment easy or stable when set. The unit is temperature sensitive at the suction cup, which causes it to fall off easily in the cooler weather. The cord power placement is clunky.

Title: Great luggage piece, perfect for weekend travel and more
Review: This is a great duffel bag. Almost hate calling it a 'duffel' as it conjures up memories of military gear. This is attractive, quality made and perfect for airline carry on. Carried for me two pairs of jeans, 4 t-shirts, 1 sweater, 1 pair of heels and a spare set of sneakers (not to mention underwear and shampoo, toothpaste, etc, etc) and there was plenty of room to spare that I could easily have taken more. This is great for college students, too, for them to store their stuff in when traveling home for the weekend or spring break. Just a perfect luggage companion for use when regular suitcases are too big (or as a supplement to a suitcase). I highly recommend for women, men, old and young. Perfect for everyone.

Title: heart ring
Review: who doesn't like heart. I have the necklace,  bracelets,  💍 & earrings

Title: Perfect for A Hurricane...short of that- Skip It!! Review: BEWARE!! This is great hairspray BUT only if you want your hair NOT TO MOVE- EVER!! This spray gets all kinds of stylist awards but I have long, fine hair (a lot of it) and this is like cement. To the point where when I went to brush my hair- 12
hours later to get ready for bed-it started breaking my hair. My stylist told me to stop using the level 25 and switch to the 17. She said she only uses this for special events or "up do-s" because you CANNOT comb through this hairspray at the end of the day. Just be warned. It needs to be washed out of your hair before you can really comb through this. I did get the level 17 and it's much better. It doesn't have the hold of this, but I also don't find half my hair in my brush anymore.

Title: The watch works well.  It's big and a bit bulky
Review: I didn't have it connected to a service. You need a separate cell phone line in order for this to work.

Title: Finite Case IPad Mini 4
Review: I would actually give the rating closer to a 4 , it is a nice attractive case that is secure and protective of my Ipad Mini 4....but it is much thicker than I thought, it is like holding a book. I really wanted a thinner one. It opens and closes nicely. I have Arthritis in my hands and this will be a little harder for me to use on some days. The design is also very nice. ++++ 4 plus signs.  Next time I will have to make sure I ordered a thinner one.

Title: Great for face protection, light tint seals the deal!
Review: At first, I wasn't sure what to expect when they mentioned in the product that this is tinted. I was waiting to see a color choice, or something that would replicate a chart of some kind to match a skin tone. Well, when I received it I know why. It basically is a light tint, used for a minimal foundation for your face, but really does the trick and adapts to all tones. I love the fact that, if I am spending the day outside (as I do very often in the Florida sun with golf, tennis and just being outdoors) I do not need to use a foundation and layer it with sunscreen (I never know which to apply first). Fallene solves this problem with protecting your skin with an SPF 50 and also providing a light foundation for your skin. As others mentioned,, it does tend to be a little greasy (as do many sunscreen products), which is why I rated this 4 instead of 5 stars. But I honestly think the pros outweigh the cons with this product. Use this only for when you are spending the day out in the sun and you will love it!

Title: Five Stars
Review: Very satisfied!

Title: Terrible
Review: These are really terrible. There is no smell at all. They are wrapped in aluminum foil and then wrapped in plastic. They are beasts to get into. They are small bath bombs. But they really do nothing in terms of softening you skin or anything. None of them have a distinct smell. It really feels better to just put plain Epsom salt in the water. Very disappointing product.

Title: Cute but sizing runs small!
Review: Very cute, not as soft as I'd like. And they do run small.

Title: dull blue beads throughout
Review: My product doesn't look like any of the photos shown.  The predominant beads are all a dull aqua color.  The Chakra beads are colorful, but most of the necklace has the dull aqua colored beads.  I would have much rather had a more colorful necklace - either multi-colored or one solid, but vibrant color.

Title: Great collagen shampoo and conditioner set!
Review: This is a really nice shampoo and conditioner set. I typically get keratin treatments a few times a year, so I am always looking for a good moisturizing product to help prolong the treatments. This is lightly fragranced, shampoo lathers up nicely and the conditioner leaves my hair soft and smooth with no frizzies. I highly recommend this shampoo for all hair types man/woman.

Title: Unfortunately poor stitching
Review: Very nice looking hat and other than the obvious bad stitching looks to be good quality.  I hate to give this a bad review but because my husband wore it a total of two times before it broke I have no other choice . Bummed out but I’ll fix it myself so he can enjoy it at the Army vs. Navy game party we’ll attend tomorrow .

Title: Great product
Review: Bought it for my father since he would sit with his laptop on his lap he loves that its more easier and comfortable this way

Title: No
Review: Drys my hair out after initial application. Smells good and the consistency is thick, just not for my hair. I struggle with dry hair already.

Title: The design is the best thing about this!
Review: Design is beautiful but it’s slippery to hold and doesn’t have magnets to keep it held shut so your battery doesn’t run down. I really wanted to love this because the tree is beautiful but this is protecting a 260.00 Kindle. It needs to have basic functions like a magnet close on the flap and perhaps a handle to hold it.

Title: Not Impressed Review: No noticeable difference to photographs with or without the filter on. The claims that "pictures gain brilliance"
and "elimination of the unwanted blue cast" didn't happen. As a something to protect your expensive camera lens, fine. Also found it extremely hard to clean. Slight scratches or flubs in the coating could be seen around the edge. Could feel the glass moving about in the frame when cleaning. Returned.

Title: Stings My Eyes
Review: Not only do I have sensitive skin, but I have super sensitive eyes. I am very careful when using products and keep them as far as  I can away from my eyes. Of course, products specifically for the eyes do have to be somewhat near them. This eye cream has something in it that burns and stings my eyes. It's not noticeable at first, but over the course of the day, it would happen. I tend to rub my eyes a lot and I have dry eyes that water a lot which don't help. It's also summer time, so sweat sometimes causes products to get too close to my eyes. This eye cream has a creamy consistency. There's a slight smell which I think it's just the ingredients. I am disappointed that I am not able to use this.

Title: Use with thick dead skin.  Only.
Review: It works, but I would make sure you soak your feet for at least 10 minutes before hand, and you apply cream to your feet afterwards.  And don’t scrap too hard as it can be quite sharp.  What I didn’t love about it:  scrapes up the skin and without an alternative filer to soften the skin afterwards, my heel sticks to the bedding sheets.  It is big, and it does not have to be this huge.  Can’t be used regularly as it scrapes a lot of skin off.

Title: Good. But battery has short life
Review: Good headphones, sound is good. Battery last a few hours

Title: boys rain jacket
Review: For a name brand like Columbia - I expected a better quality.  The sizing runs a little small and the zipper is very temperamental.  I probably wouldn't purchase again due to the zipper failure rate.  I end up having to do the zipper for my grandson because it is so troublesome more often than not.  The inner lining zips up into the zipper and the zipper head often doesn't pull up properly - won't grab the start teeth.  Eh.

Title: Purse
Review: It's cool

Title: It works a little
Review: This is an ok eye gel, not necessarily worth the money, though. I keep it in the refrigerator and put it on about 30 minutes before I am going out. I will say that it goes on easily and is absorbed relatively quickly. I didn't really see an 'amazing' difference after using this for almost three weeks now. And, I am not sure if the fact that the product is cold is what brings down the swelling and the bags a bit (similar to when I used to cut up cold cucumbers). Didn't really see any long lasting progress though. Not sure if I would order again.

Title: Runs big, long, sleeves are a bat wing, neck is a loose. Turtle neck. Review: Didn’t know what what to expect with this sweater, as the model is wearing it with the new tucked in look, although
This sweater is too big to just tuck in a little bit on the side.

I recieved a large, and it is Big. It says its a drop shoulder, it is, but it is like a big Bat wing on me.
The neck is not a tight turtle neck, it like a loose turtle neck that I like and is not chocking ..
The sleeves are Long, and arms are big..
The sweater will be nice for the winter, but it is a little thin.

Made in China.

Title: Fragrant but feels like it is burning my skin; I use as a hand soak Review: I tried several of their other fragrances and find them hit or miss. This tropical fragrance is wonderful but it is strong with the eucalyptus oil and almost menthol-like making this difficult to inhale. I use this as a hand soak instead of a body soak and my skin felt like it was burning. It was almost like I had cuts on my hands and there was salt in the wounds.

There are about two to four servings in this 16 ounce package. I used about a half cup.

The current price of $11.99 ($12.99 minus $1) is expensive. This is not my favorite soak as I prefer the  [[ASIN:B07797LLNL Vitabath Lavender Chamomile Epsom Salts]]  instead.

Title: One Star
Review: NOT MY favorite lotion, not very good, I'm an avid tanner, very knowledgeable,  but this one disappointed me.

Title: Not so hot spot.
Review: I spent several hours trying to get it running with a sim card from my t-mobile phone, changing every setting I could think of, but nothing worked.  I then pulled the sim from my t-mobile tablet and it worked as soon as I swapped it over.  I was hoping it would go against my unlimited data, but it appears to treat all data passed thru it as hotspot data on my t-mobile tablet plan.  Not a huge concern, but I only 10GB of 4G LTE hotspot per month on the tablet, as opposed to unlimited 4G when not hot spotting.  I would give it 5 stars If I could get it to work on a t-mobile phone sim AND go against the device data (unlimited 4G) versus the hot spot data (throttled after 10GB).  As is, it offers no advantage over using the hotspot on my phone or tablet.  Final note, it is impressively small and light weight.

Title: Great soaps for men!
Review: I gave these to my son to use in his bathroom. He loves the fragrances and he says his hands and face feel clean and refreshed after use. They are definitely fragranced for men (not flowery) so these are perfect for gift giving (would have made a great stocking stuffer). Highly recommend!

Title: Great sulfate free shampoo for treated hair!
Review: With my typically wavy hair, I tend to get Agave (preferred) or Keratin treatments at least every 3 months. With treated hair, I have to use sulfate free shampoos and the ones I typically get are very expensive and don't always work as well as they should to keep my hair optimal between treatments. I was pleasantly surprised and pleased with this Carols Daughter product. My hair appears smoother and softer than it has in weeks. Only complaint I might have is that this is not in stores around me, so I guess I will continue to purchase through Amazon.

Title: fine mist.  easy to use
Review: Perfect for misting your plants, as well as using it for 'fragrance' spray for cloth covered furniture.  It provides a very fine mist and the spray mechanism is very easy to use - did not require much pressure.  As to its durability - it is all plastic - so I am not sure how long the spray mechanism will last from continuous use.

Title: Perfect
Review: ❤

Title: Usefull gadgets
Review: They fit my Fire tablet and phone cable perfectly. They click together and for fun, you can change characters that click in place over white protector.  They are way tooo small to fit my lap top cable. I received a nice variety of fun charactors with 2 caption marvel. I don't mind because I intend to give them to my Grandsons for their cables. Other reviews mentioned they pop off. After attaching mine I felt the same so I immediately put a dab of Hot glue on them. Thank you Amazon.

Title: Not a knee sock
Review: Great color and feel BUT these are not knee socks. They come about halfway up my calf, and they slouch down.  Very disappointing.

Title: They won’t fit a normal sized human.
Review: The fit is strange. Even pulled up as far as they go my buttcrack is still showing out of the top and they feel like they’re falling down all the time. Once they were laundered they couldn’t be pulled up at all. There’s not nearly enough fabric in the top part of these. I have a regular-sized bottom for an XL fit. These are XL around what should be the waist but it only goes half way up my bottom. My hubby even checked to be sure we didn’t accidentally buy a children’s product.,

Title: Run
Review: I don't press hard but all the types broke in short order,  not worth buying

Title: Great for thick heavy hair.
Review: These clips are fantastic! One clip will hold my slippery, heavy hair up all day! Not for thin hair.

Title: A bit on the large side but keeps a dirty blender sponge from soiling everything
Review: This is a large silicone holder for a blender sponge. It is a bit large but fits the typical blender sponge and keeps it from soiling my counter or other items. The only negative besides the size is that the silicone picks up lint and pet hair easily. The current price of $5 ($9.99 minus 50%), is pricey for this as well. Unless this will be carried around, I actually recommend [[ASIN:B0BBRCJZ9V these holders]] for the counters.

Title: Didn’t work after the first day
Review: Worked for a day. Then kept connecting to WiFi. I tried everything and still didn’t work. When it did it was great. However I’ve had issues with my amazon products as of late.

Title: Good outside and inside.
Review: The shell part is really good but they keyboard cover... Not so much.

Title: Great product!
Review: Love these storage boxes!

Title: You get what you pay for
Review: Did they change this formula from what it used to be back in the day, when Infusium was a higher end salon brand? (Wayyyyy back) I wanted to give this 3.5 stars but had to go with 3 since half stars aren't an option. Scent was decent, not overpowering or perfume-y. Fresh not fruity. It did detangle yet felt a bit thicker than other leave-in sprays. I have fine textured hair and this definitely left it a little oily and flat.

Title: Don't buy for audiobooks!
Review: This audio player has a firmware problem that occurs when playing back Audiobooks. When audiobooks are played at normal speed the sound is mono, meaning you can only hear it in one ear. The sound only comes out of one earbud. You can only hear the audio in stereo when you are in the fast, or slow modes for audiobook playback. If that doesn't bother you then fine. The music and podcasts work well. You can google and see this in a problem with all Clip Jams.

Title: Well...
Review: Well....this is a hard one. I like how this leaves my skin feeling after applying it, but the smell is so bad I'm not sure I can continue using it. It smells like nail polish remover. And it's a very strong smell. It doesn't linger, thankfully. I'm wondering if I got a bad batch.  With ingredients listed such as grapefruit oil, I was expecting a much more pleasant scent. I've tried many different vitamin C serums and they usually do smell a little citrusy. It has a slightly oily feel to it but it doesn't leave behind any oiliness. It leaves my skin feeling very soft afterwards. I put some on the back of one of my hands and the side with the serum not only feels softer, but it looks smoother, too. So right now, I'm undecided as to whether or not I will continue using.

Title: Oster classic 76 clipper
Review: Had to finally replace one we bought about 10 years ago.  These are built to last.  I wouldn't and did not hesitate to purchase a new one.  Use on husband's head and beard.  Solid, hard working and sharp. I do recommend using the oil after cleaning to extend the life of the clipper. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Love these nail files
Review: This is a must for anyone who files their nails or just to have on hand. I love giving as a stocking stuffer and have done so many times. I keep one in my purse and a couple around the house. My daughter, son and husband like them as well. They stay sharp, they do not wear down and they are great quality.

Title: Zipper is dumb
Review: Did anyone QC these before putting them on the market?  When I wear a size 8.5, the left zipper keeps going down; when I wear a size 9, it's too big, the zipper stays up, but I dont feel safe in the shoes. There were on sale at Marshalls for $59.99 today, 9-16-2, and I can see why; it's just sitting there; countless of times people are trying it on all the different sizes and returning it back on the racks bc there is no work-around to keep the zipper up unless you sew in a hook to keep the zipper up.

Title: POOR
Review: POOR

Title: easy to use selection of free and borrowed books not ... Review: light, easy to use

selection of free and borrowed books not so hot

Title: Nothing Special in these sandals
Review: I bought them because of an ad I read on fashion. I bought them but find that they are just ordinary in every

Title: disappointed
Review: so disappointed  the one sleeve was cut bigger than the other...poor quality....using as a present and am embarrassed to give it... too late to send for a new one...

Title: tshirt set
Review: Whoa.  REALLY shiny.  Not a fan.  Then there's the fit.  I am 38 E/F - usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x.  I ordered these in the 1x - SUPER too tight over the bust.  The body is looser, but the tightness over the bust area is not ok for me. Then, they are see thru!  The only positive is that the 'V' neck is nicely not really low - BUT then they are very poorly sewn so the 'V' is crooked!  I would say if you're determined to purchase, size up at least one size, but personally I would pass on these.  Just too poor quality to recommend.

Title: Jabra supreme bluetooth headset
Review: works well... fairly comfortable... charges reasonably quickly... syncs easily.  I am not a huge fan of headsets, however, this one is pretty easy.  I keep in a charger most of the time.. I will update my review should new info seem useful.

Title: Best trimmer on the market by far!
Review: This is a great nose, ear and eyebrow trimmer! Super easy to use, attachments are easy to interchange. I love the way it feels in my hands as it is super easy to maneuver. It also is compact enough to take for travel and the battery life is amazing (I only charged it once and it is still working flawlessly today without recharge). For the money, you can't buy a better set out there. Highly recommend for men or women. Would even make a great Mother's or Father's Day gift!

Title: Totally awesome
Review: Will buy em again

Title: Great quality non-slip socks
Review: These are nice no-show low socks. First, they are colorful and come in a great variety of colors. They are soft and made with good quality. I wear them in the morning when I job and then throughout the day when running errands. They hold true to their non-slip claim and have not bunched up in my shoes when wearing. I highly recommend these socks and they would make a great holiday gift for the athlete in your life.

Title: Five Stars
Review: For the price of these I couldn't believe the quality sound that they produced.

Title: Wasn't impressed it all.
Review: I wasn't impressed with this item at all.  The huge label on it has a ton of writing that makes no sense and looked just plain stupid.  The overall product looked like it won't hold up to the daily use i need it for.

Title: A must have for every household!
Review: I love Dove products and have been using them for years. I love this value set of products! Moisturizing and cleanses my skin amazingly. The shampoo and conditioner is really nice as well. I already ordered another set for my son in college. Everyone should own one of these sets for complete and total body care.

Title: Pink fire wires
Review: 1of the 3 died immediately after purchase. It lasted maybe a week. The others are fine & I haven’t had a problem with them. But I bought 3 because I needed 3, not 2.

Title: Really Big Stencils!
Review: These are for people who want big brows that looked unnatural on me.  I have decent eyebrows but, all of these except for 1, are just to big for most people.

Title: Good Shade
Review: The shade of this foundation was pretty good. It will probably be too light for summer wear, but for the time being, it's a good match. It is a heavier foundation than I expected. It's definitely a full coverage product. The first time I applied it, I put it on as is. It was too heavy for me. I cleaned my face and tried again. This time I used less and mixed it with some moisturizer. It was still too heavy for me. I'm in my early fifties and I typically use a tinted moisturizer or BB Cream rather than straight foundation. This may be better suited to younger skin. I had settling in my fine lines. I also found it a little greasy feeling which I've never experienced with foundation. It took hot water and soap to get my hands cleaned after applying it. The bottle is lovely and I like the brand. My daughter is coming home this weekend, so I am going to see what she thinks of it.

Title: Great for the price!
Review: The only reason I gave this 4 stars is that it fits a bit narrow through the trunk. Otherwise, it's soft and comfy.

Title: Could’ve been perfect but….
Review: [[VIDEOID:9b1cde67c5e78dab6e92475fddb1b67b]] I picked this up to use with my Sony A7 iii unfortunately the mount of this flexpod is too large to fit my Sony. Now this isn’t to detract from the quality of the tripod it’s small and feels sturdy enough to likely accommodate my full frame Sony with and 85mm attached.  Great for on-the-go shooting just be sure the mount fits what you’re using gear wise.

Title: Lots of goodies = not sure how to use them all
Review: Should have instruction sheet showing where everything goes and what its for .

Title: Worked for one time need of unknown sized laptop screws Review: First off a flap broke - it’s a pretty flimsy box. If you’re planning on using many screws you’d likely end up getting another container.

I was missing two screws on my laptop so my battery kept sliding out. I ordered this assuming one size would match my needs. It wasn’t a perfect match, but it worked. I hope they stay in there.

Title: Great for splits in hand
Review: Always heals the cracks in my hand.

Title: Nice watch, good gift
Review: Got this for my boyfriend for Christmas, he loves it. In person you can really see the quality and attention to detail. The face has an inner and outer circle that look great when the light hits them

Title: BE WARNED!
Review: Just got this printer. The set up for the printer itself was easy enough. Then I tried to connect it wirelessly. The Canon app could never find my printer. (Had just disconnected my Canon MX492.) Spent over an hour on the phone with Canon tech support and nothing we tried worked. He asked me try to reconnect my MX492, which the app found immediately and reconnected. He said it was obviously a printer error and told me to send it back. No way would I recommend this printer. So be warned. You might get lucky but, then again.........

Title: Not for me
Review: These do not stay on my feet.  They wind up rolling down into my shoes and off my feet without shoes.

Title: Pretty to Look At - THAT IS ALL
Review: If I were a little grade school girl this could be my first Training Bra.....and I'm 5' 5"/115 lbs  AND IT'S  STILL TOO SMALL!  Should have just purchased colorful Band-Aids....would have fit better and cost LESS!!

Title: Disappointed
Review: Shirt is so cute. Glitter does come off. Fit is nice but on the short side. Nice material.

Title: Okay
Review: I use spray on conditioners daily. This one is just okay. The smell is natural. I can detect some of the individual items. I swear that I smell cassia/cinnamon, but it's not listed as one of the ingredients. The smell isn't bad, it's just spicy/natural. The product combs well in my hair. I don't notice much difference between using this or nothing at all though.

Title: great sunscreen stick
Review: I bought this to protect my tattoo from the sun and I think it's going to do a great job. The stick is easy to apply, feels nice against my skin, and even smells nice. Zinc oxide is the way to go when you want strong uv protection.

Title: Don't know what is setting these off during the night
Review: Installed on 3 windows and 1 sliding glass door I arm them when we head to bed. Unfortunately, they are going off during the night, for no apparent reason. Great idea, but not working for us. We live in a condo development.

Title: Not very sturdy.
Review: Am disappointed in this laptop stand. It is not sturdy! The top droops as well. It only cost around $30. but it is not as sturdy as I had hoped.

Title: Sweet fragrance perfect for a young girl but outrageously expensive & what I rec'd is not pictured
Review: This is a nice eyeliner-tube-sized bottle of Ariel Disney fragrance that has sweet notes and is pleasant smelling. The sleek bottle allows this to be easily carried in one's purse and is perfect for travel. As a fragrance, this gets 4 stars. However, I did not receive the bottle pictured. The packaging on mine gets 2 stars. I also personally feel the $88 price tag is outrageous for .27 fluid ounces especially for such a nondescript tube that is being sent out instead of what is pictured on the Amazon site (see my photo). The pricing gets 1 star.

Title: Comes w/3 in package.  Great for gifts
Review: Works much better than wrapping a big towel around my head, but little snug.  The elastic  part could have been about 1-2” longer

Title: Splitter
Review: In description it did not say use is for only cable users so it wasn't something I needed but looked like it was good quality and well built make sure u need it cuz it doesn't work with antenna s things so it u don't pay for cable only have. Over air boxes it won't work then u lose money when habe to send it back I would think being a prime membership you wouldn't lose so much money on returning things I had 2 18. Dollars items which I spent 36 i got 22 dollars back and if they are all going back to main hub why can't we put all in one box and other items in that one box save on Amazon's having to pay more Shi]ing plus it saves use of more cardboard i want to leave as little of footprint as I can. It just seems waste of monies and more stuff for our landfills Amazon needs to get on board with saving on paper and stuffing pillows cuz I know they don't break down

Title: Packaging isn't all
Review: I found this product subpar I am not sure what to say, I've used a lot of creams before but when I saw this at first I was happy that it came in such a nice packaging and it was very fancy but when I opened it I was immediately displeased. The top part was covered by some cheap aluminum foil which immediately made me think of cheaper products, but I was willing to look past that and into the actual product, another failure, the cream looks AND SMELLS like an actual cheap cream you buy at the dollar store, I was so surprised that it actually smelled like every other cheap cream I've smelled before like I'm sure I can recognize the smell, I grabbed a bit just to check how good it was and honestly I was not surprised by the quality either. It's just a cheap cream branded and sold like a high quality product, such a rip off this is, I don't know what else to say. Also I should note that I am sure I actualy bought the peel off mask cream of this same product but I received the moisturizer cream instead.

Title: Lasts Long, but Sticky.
Review: My favorite lip gloss was discontinued a few years ago and I have been searching ever since for a new favorite. I ordered the Everlasting Blossom shade which was a little lighter than I expected, but not too bad. It stays on for a while, but it feels sticky. And since it lasts a while, so does the stickiness. I was pleased that it lasted as long as it did, but I really didn't like the stickiness. It does have to be reapplied, but not as often as some lip products. It has a very pleasant scent - a mild fruity one.

Title: Not no show socks
Review: These socks are ankle socks and aren't "no show" socks.  You can definitely see them with tennis shoes.  They are on the thin side so they don't work for me when walking for long distances. They are fine for short distances.

Title: goose neck mirror
Review: This mirror has a great magnification power... the light is helpful to get a better depth of view.  It sticks to my bathroom mirror very well... my one complaint is that the goose neck is... bit loosy goosy... (sorry - couldn't resist)... but seriously, the neck part is bit wonky which means you kind of have to adjust the height for that - but eventually you get it to a position that works - with the wonkiness.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  And I hope this info was helpful to you.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Hard to get zipped. Takes some practice.

Title: Love the scent but this lotion is too sticky to me & takes long to absorb
Review: I do not like this. First of all it is a gel. The scent is lovely but after applying it to my hands and feet, it didn't fully absorb and it left my appedage sticky. I'll pass.

Title: delivery
Review: First one came on time and was too small. Needed it for a last minute ring bearer. Delivery date kept changing and it was too late for wedding. Last minute shopping trip to outlet mall to find a different outfit. If the seller can't get them out on time, they should not make promises.

Title: my Big Sister loved it
Review: purchased for my Big Sister's birthday ...  she's not blood related but she's my big sister and she loved it !!!

Title: Three Stars
Review: Doest sit upright comfortable.

Title: Not special
Review: This is not worth it!

Title: Three Stars
Review: It works at a minimal level. Just O.K.

Title: They are definitely soft
Review: A very soft house shoe.

Title: When at first you don't succeed, try try again
Review: Ok, so although after several disasterous attempts, I got it to work somewhat. I am rating this as three stars for that very reason. Honestly, this is just too much work for day to day makeup. I guess if I really wanted something special for a special occasion, I might go out of my way to set this up and use it. I found myself applying and reapplying as I couldn't get it to go on even (needed to smooth it manually afterwards). I hate to criticize this too much and maybe others may have a much easier time with it. However, when I finally was able to get it on halfway decently, I did see the benefit of using an airbrush (over using a standard foundation). However, I still think it's a lot of work and I will save it for times where I really want to look professionally done (wedding, New Years, Christmas, etc).

Title: Arm width/length is weird; material is slinky; bodice is too short Review: I purchased several different front closure bras (including this set) to try to reduce post surgery inflammation. First of all, the design of this is not the quality I expected. The sleeves are both too narrow and too short for the size specified and fit me weirdly. Secondly, the bodice is too short for my body type. I also do not like the slinky material. The entire bra is completely unattractive. The only good thing about it is the ability to adjust the compression based on the hooks in front.

I was so utterly disappointed in this bra, that I returned this as a result. I really loved the [[ASIN:B07GV8LSG3 this ohlyah bra]] the best and that is the only front zip bra I kept because it fit me well in the same size compared to the others I tried.

Title: More like a men’s tie; it is too narrow for my taste Review: I have [[ASIN:B08794YWYK this version]] of the UPTOUP head scarf and it is wider than this one, which I prefer.

This is a colorfully-designed head scarf with a bear and flower at the edges. However, the scarf is only the width of a large men's tie and has a depth of 3.5 inches. Therefore, this only wraps around my head like the headband of the 1960s. It is very attractive and feels like it is made of Polyester without any stretch. Note that there is no tag on the scarf to say what it is made of.

The price of $6.99 for this is competitive but due to its narrow size, it can double as a men's tie.

Title: Works fine on regular women's hair Review: It charged quickly. Maybe, it was because if was already partially charged, not sure. I'll update that part after a few uses. Works fine on regular women's hair. I have found a hairy man that I will give it a try on and update in a few days. It feels sturdy in the hand, not cheap but not overly heavy. Love the different size combs.

Update: I used this on a hairy back. It did an ok job. I had to keep going over spots several times. This is not the shaver for you if you are looking for a clean shave. It does a decent job but you do have to keep removing hair from the shaver. Just don't expect that close shave.

Title: I got this to replace a gold band wedding ring ...
Review: I got this to replace a gold band  wedding ring that was getting to tight on my finger. I have been married 20 years and I couldn't see spend big money on a new ring. I have been wearing it for months and it still looks brand new. No scratches, and its still very shiny. Everyone thinks its white gold until I tell them its not.

Title: Nice Gift : Review: Was a gift. Recipient was glad to have received the Hawaiian T shirt. He did say he was glad it wasn't a heavy shirt though.
No feedback as of yet on wearing or washing ect.!

Title: KEEPS ANYTHING IN PLACE.
Review: Do not expect to get this tape off within 24hrs of putting it on. Someone had a frayed hem for a wedding I went to and I was able to use this to HEM her top to her shoulder so it stayed in place. It WILL damage very delicate lace or clothing so be careful where you put it. Other than that, it did its' job of keeping the top of my dress in place very nicely. And I only used a few pieces out of the HUNDRED in the pack.

Title: Garbage! Review: If someone offered me this for free..I would say “No thank you, why do you hate me?”

It feels even worse to have paid for it.

Not only is it ridiculously complex and time consuming to set up but it’s extremely loud and doesn’t even beat my Kraken M22 120mm aio.

Save yourself from the torture and buy something, anything, else.

I would seriously recommend a stock air cooler over this. That’s how bad it is.

I don’t know what Tom’s Hardware was thinking when they gave it 4.5/5 stars.

Title: Over-Sized
Review: These over-sized sunglasses are very trendy looking. They frames don't feel very sturdy, but so far they've held up fine. They don't offer as much sun protection as I would like because of the lightly tinted glasses, but they do look good. I do find it a little strange because my eyes are visible when wearing them. They come with a little case and a cleaning cloth.

Title: Large barely fragrant bath bombs w/zero performance; blue ones turned water to ink Review: [[VIDEOID:3482010a495bd8c3b851961d35eb4fa2]] There are 12 individually wrapped bath bombs in this set divided into 3 boxes of the yellow/pink ones, blue ones, and green/orange ones. The only fragrance I like is the blue ones; however, the performance is terrible.

I dissolved one blue bomb in close to hot water and there were no suds created, only a fizzing action. The water immediately looked black--see photo. The water was an inky blue. Since I personally do not like the color rings caused by bath bombs in my bath, I use them in a foot bath. One bath bomb dissolves in about five minutes in close to hot water. The fragrance is nice but that is the limit of the experience. I personally would never want to bathe with these. I am glad, however, that the color did not adhere to my skin, my foot bath, or my towels.

The current price of $19.99 comes to $1.67 per lackluster bath bomb. The only good things about these bombs is the giftable packaging, the fragrance of the blue bombs, and the fact that the color is non-staining. Other than this, I'll pass.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Very comfortable

Title: I love this gift set!!!!
Review: I love this lavender gift set!!! It has everything you need for a great at-home spa experience. The lavender scent is light, but definitely there and my bathroom had a great fragrance. My favorite was the body scrub (which I would love to get more of). It comes in a nice wrap and is perfect as a gift from children for teachers or other women in their lives. This would great around the holidays for gift giving (especially with the current 40% off coupon). The little basket it comes in also makes a nice way to organize countertop products. Highly recommend!

Title: Does NOT Pair with Alexa Echo!
Review: I tried everything humanly possible and I cannot get this remote to pair with Alexa Echo!......Amazon for whatever reason could not figure it out after over an hour in chat!

Title: Versitile
Review: I love the different lengths. Long for bedside, short for car,  medium for work.

Title: Awful sandals! Review: These are just awful. First off, the sizing is wrong. About two sizes too small. I am typically an 11-11.5 in shoes but in sandals I go up to a 12, so got these in a 12 and they don’t fit at all. If I had to guess, they may be more like a 10.

Even if they did fit, I still wouldn’t keep them. The quality of these are terrible. If these were like 10 bucks, it would be more understandable. But I paid close to $30 for these and they are just gross. Weird plastic type material is used for the straps, when you try to adjust the straps, the glitter just comes off in chunks and flakes everywhere. You can go to Walmart and spend $12 on better sandals.

Title: Oil
Review: Works well

Title: Has spacious “head cabin” but most likely not merino wool & visor is too curved Review: This hat fits me well but does not look as great as I had hoped because the visor is curved downward like a C on my head. It is warm and has a large enough "head cabin" to allow me to pull this over my ears. Note that I normally take a size small hat which is around 6-3/4 or 7 in an adult size.

As for the claim that this is merino wool, I cannot be sure. There is no tag saying it is wool and it just feels like typical knitted cotton but I cannot be absolutely sure. My rating is based on how it looks on me and not on whether it is or is not merino wool as advertised.

Title: There are some things to like about it, but the pedometer is only minimally useful.
Review: The main reason for having the watch is for the pedometer.  Not that I don’t use the other features because I do.  I check the weather, sunup, sundown.  I receive texts and answer them, as well as phone calls. However, the pedometer function is greatly lacking.  As long as you are swinging your arm, the watch records ur steps.  But if u r carrying something or pushing a shopping cart it records 0.  I manually counted my steps at Sams today while shopping with a cart.  The total was approx 2700.  The iwatch 4 recorded 50 steps.  I just think that for $400 it should be more accurate.

Title: not for me
Review: I don't wear makeup... it takes 2-3 pumps to clean my face...I need to massage it over my face for at least 2 minutes to feel clean. My skin is not as dry after washing comparing to other face washes, however, I am breaking out in cysts. Which are painful, looks horrible, and takes looonnnnggg to heal. Now I only use it to wash my hand. I give 2 stars because it smells nice and a ok hand soap...

Title: Super fast wifi antenna. Good price.
Review: Wanted a fast wifi antenna to connect to my broadcast signal that is upstairs. This little dual-antenna wifi unit works great - speedy. Plug and play install with windows 10.

Title: Cleans and softens
Review: I really liked this body wash.  It has a nice smell and thickness and washes off your body easily.  Will buy again.

Title: Attractive and thick headband but cheaply made Review: This headband is attractive and looks great on my head. It is also a wide band. Unfortunately, this is cheaply made. One of the jewels arrived dislodged and I had to glue it back on. Also, one other part on the decorative top was loose. This also comes with a moon barrette that acts more like a hair accent piece as it holds a little bit of hair.

The current price of $22.99 is way too expensive for this. I do not feel this is worth more than $8.

Title: Love the simplicity of this riser & that it unfolds; but it could be better Review: This laptop stand has a small footprint when it folds up and I love that. It unfolds easily and holds my LG 14" laptop fine. It will also hold a larger laptop. There is room underneath to store a keyboard or folders, etc. However, what I do not like is that the hooks that hold the computer on the stand are in the way of my wrists if I am typing using the laptop keyboard. I hold my hands/arms toward the outer edge of either side of my computer to type and these hooks land right in the middle of my wrist. Of course, this is not a problem if using a separate keyboard.

The other issue is that the rubberized runners are just stickers they put on the bottom to keep the stand from slipping. The stand I received had the runners partially off in spots (see photo). I had to reset the "tape."

The current price of $19.99 is reasonable for this. I love this stand's simplicity and small footprint when not in use. It comes with a one-year warranty.

Title: poor design
Review: Poor design- speakers fire up & down in relation to ipod or only one speaker fires at you at 90* rotation. No power lite so easy to forget its on, low volume and tinny at max input. OK for a quiet environment but even low background noise will wash it out. Keep looking- there are better front firing units here for about $10 more- very well worth spending the extra money.

Title: Came in peices - already fallen apart - into the trash
Review: Was already in a million peices when my daughter received she threw out waste and horrible craftsmanship. Still finding beads and crap all over the house. Wasn’t cheap other.

Title: These shoes are really look cute on.
Review: I like the fabric and the height of the shoes. The platform makes the shoes more comfortable than shoes without a platform.  I didn't like the smell of the shoes.  it was a strong smell when I opened the box.  The smell is starting to go away, but it was pretty powerful.

Title: Does not have the sleep mode! Review: The color blue is a blue with a grayish to it.

This is vinyl , although the inside is a different type but still vinyl. Soft inside and out.
The part that your iPad is sitting into is a hard plastic. Does keep your iPad safe.
This has all the holes for picture taking, turning it off on, and all.
The magnet seems to keep this closed tight enough.
You can stand your iPad up side ways, and tall.

That said, I do not care for this case. To me it is not as simple to use as my other case.
I also think this is pricey for this type of plastic vinyl case..

Does not have the sleep mode!

Title: Very comfy
Review: Don’t wash very well but for me, it’s worth the money to wear them for a year, with a couple washes throughout.

Title: My husband loved it Review: Edit: They seller had great customer service. They really want you to be happy with your purchase!! I wasn’t quite sure about this top when it came. The material is thin and wrinkles easily. I thought it might look cheap.

The top drapes over the body. You must wear a good fitting, Tshirt bra with this shirt.

I paired it with a pair of printed leggings. It did look good. My husband really liked it.

The shirt fit well. I ordered an XL. I weigh about 171 lbs. I am 5’4”. I am a 38 DDD.

Title: HELP!!!
Review: Unless you want copper-colored hair - RUN!!!

Title: Waste my
Review: It is definitely gentle to wash my face. But it is not enough to remove all my foundation. It does not work at all. Waste my money

Title: Too Abrasive For Me
Review: I ordered these for myself. I was excited to find a large bag of them at such an affordable price. The shape and size is very good for using on your face. I personally found these to be way too abrasive. I don't consider my skin to be that sensitive, but these are just too rough for me. It leaves my face red after using it.  I've tried using different levels of pressure to see if that helped. If I apply minimal pressure, I don't feel that it does anything for my face at all. I need some kind of exfoliation which is why I ordered these.  I really wanted to love them!! I ended up ordering a Buff Puff Gentle and have found that to be much better for me.

Title: Basic foundation set; definitely NOT giftable - 2.5 stars Review: These arrived all squished in a plastic bag. In fact, I could not get the creases out of the brush or sponge. This set includes three synthetic blush brushes, two larger hand held kabuki brushes for foundation that each come with their own case, four blender spongers each with a flat angle, and one oval powder brush which is my favorite.

The blenders are good with liquids and the rest of the brushes are good with powder. I like the larger brushes for dusting on translucent powder or bronzer. I prefer using everything but the blenders with powders only.

This is a basic set but the presentation is awful and definitely not giftable.

For someone who likes to change their brushes and blenders frequently, this is an okay set. However, the current price of $21.98 is too pricey for this as it comes to $2.20 per item for this 10-piece set. I expect better for that price.

Title: Didn't work for long
Review: Stopped working in less than 2 months

Title: Pants that make no sense Review: I am normally a 16/18 and size XL. I'm pregnant and wanted to find some alternatives to maternity leggings so decided to just size up to a 2X to test them out. I'm still pretty early and haven't changed much in the stomach area and they were close to snug in the waistline, and the legs were oddly baggy in spots. Which never happens with me, I have pretty sturdy legs and never have issues with leggings being baggy on me.

The most ridiculous part of these pants though is that they have these mesh cutouts in strange spots, like a long triangular section right on the hip that starts about mid-top of the thigh and goes clear up to the waistband. So you either need to wear black underwear with it or none at all, because it will absolutely show through.

Title: Trash, Save Your Money!
Review: The design printed on the shirt is dramatically smaller than what was depicted, it is also crooked and not centered on the tshirt!

Review: Loved it for 5 times using the truck over 2 months when towing the RV. Now you engage reverse, the picture is very cloudy and looks like your staring at the sun. Can’t believe my return time is up with Amazon !!!!

Title: Junk

Title: Useless!  These have massive gaps at pump nozzle.
Review: Tops the list for worst purchase. Tried these for alcohol inks.  Half won’t spray. My mistake was not checking that every bottle would spray before filling them. I only checked 2. They both sprayed so I proceeded. What a nightmare. There is a gap where the pump is so if you shake your ink up and down it literally comes out the top which is why these are such a mess and if you knock it over the ink escapes.  Luckily I worked over my sink or the mess would have been worse, but I’m still wearing  a lot of ink days later.  These were a debacle start to finish.  I should have checked the bottles better before putting my ink in. 1/4 work okay, but will still spill ink if knocked over or shaken. 1/4 spray, but the spray is like a diagonal slash pattern not a nice round spray pattern  1/2 won’t spray at all.  Literally worst amazon purchase ever & now my inks are trapped in an item I need to return!!!  Ugh.

Title: Good green deodorant!
Review: This is a good deodorant. I love that there is no plastic here (Tom's has cornered the market on being a green company). These are relatively small containers, but a little goes a long way. Has a pleasant smell, works relatively well.  Recommend.

Title: Ok

Title: Not crazy about the sleeves
Review: Cute sweatshirt, true to size. It is a very soft cotton material. I am deleting a star because of the puffy sleeve. I don't like it on me, makes the shirt look kind of weird. Might be fine for others. Shirt is a nice quality and fits well, just that the puffy sleeves make my arms look full and I don't find it very flattering on myself.

Title: Size is Fine
Review: I was excited about getting this key ring. I like the idea of slipping it on my wrist, however, in reality, it isn't comfortable to wear. It slips off easier than I would like, so I have to grasp it when wearing it. When I put it in my purse, it is easy enough to find quickly. I don't keep a lot of keys with me, but it easily accommodates all that I need. The bracelet portion feels like plastic. It looks like the print is just a sticker that covers it and the seams aren't lined up very well. Overall, it's okay.

Title: Cool

The scent is not over powering.

I’m a older, and this makes my hands feel soft, but not younger looking, as another hand cream I have does.

I like it, but do not love this. I think it’s a bit pricey for a 2.6 oz.tube $19.00. Although my other hand cream is
a little more expensive but my hands and cuticles I notice look better right away.

Title: Buttons are dull and faded......Very hard to read!
Review: The buttons on the remote are dull and faded!....(NOT white) like in the picture ....therefore they are hard to read!

Title: Great
Review: Fit as expected

Title: Good Sounding, Poor Fitting (on me) Review: I debated between three and four stars these do sound quite good; fairly good highs and the bass isn't bad with a large 50mm driver. My problem is the fit. the headband is somewhat narrow which makes the bottom of the ear cups (these are on not over the ear) feel looser at the bottom as if they're rocking from a point just above the top of your ear. You can adjust the length of both ear cups but not the width of the of the band. They're a bit narrow for my head. At first I thought these hadn't come with the cable mentioned on the box but eventually I did. These come with a somewhat short 4.2 foot braided nylon cable that's not supposed to tangle. There's a one button controller that sits on me at about the top of the shoulder, the controls supposedly only operate with the iOS operating system (Apple iPhones) and not with Android or Windows operating systems.
So in the end, they sound good but fit poorly on me. I do have a fairly large head so there's a majority of people whom these would fit just fine.

Title: Great wall-mounted for the technically inclined
Review: I used this mound for a television in my new house in my bedroom. It was easy to install and I think it's great that I don't have a television stand cluttering up my bedroom. I should've done this years ago in my old house. Understand that I am not technical at all and I was easily able to set this up right out of the box. Nice easy wall-mounted makes the walls look clean television looks almost transparent hanging with no wires hanging. I love how easily the television adjusts I can pull it out push it back turn it, it''s just perfect for my room. And it's also a great deal. I highly recommend this.

Review: Was unaware this was an older model when purchased. These models topple over easily when standing upright. The new models are much nicer and sturdy.

I had to use some screws that came with a Rosewill I had bought earlier that I decided not to use (not as low profile as this). Title: Nice stretchy shirt but it runs about one size too small & doesn't hang low enough
Review: I love the feel and design of this shirt. Unfortunately, I thought it was cotton and it is made of 60% Polyester, 35% Cotton, and 5% Spandex. It is stretchy and shows every bulge, so in that sense it can be considered shapely too. I like it and was considering ordering another one in the fuchsia color but have since changed my mind. What I do not like is that the XL just fits me. Normally an XL is big on me. I would have to size up to an XXL. In addition, the shirt does not hang low enough, so even if I sized up, it is not the length I like. As a result, I am no longer interested in ordering another one. I was hoping to love this but it is just okay and that is because I dislike the sizing, material, and length.

Title: Completely healed my lips
Review: I brought a lipstick and was allergic to the ingredients. I went to the dermatologist who prescribed medication to clear it, but afterwards my lips became extra sensitive to salt and hot food. It turns out the medication damaged the surface of my lips. I initially brought this on a whim because it said it could heal lips. Well, it DEFINITELY did!! Before my lips were always reddish/swollen. This chapstick completely healed my lips in about a week. And they are not as sensitive. It’s creamy, lasts overnight, and has a very light coconut scent. I wish it tasted good, but other than that I am completely satisfied and brought some in bulk so I always have it.

Title: Rough shirt
Review: Ordered a large and it fits like a standard large. The material is stiff and rough to the touch. It also has a tag even though it was advertised tag less

Title: Light moisturizer that hydrates but smell is highly offensive to me Review: First off, I would never use this on my entire body. It comes in a small pump bottle that it would both take forever to pump and it would not last long. However, this would be great for the hands if I didn't hate the smell so much.

The cream is lightweight and hydrating. Unfortunately, the lotion smells foul to me; almost like someone's unwashed behind.

Title: VERY LIGHT COVERAGE. Review: I returned this item because it had terrible coverage, similar to using a skin tone primer. The consistency is high in dimethicone/silicone ingredients and very low on pigment.

Save your money and buy Kryolan brand makeup instead. Their heaviest coverage covers tattoos and bruises which is exactly what I was looking for.

Title: Love these
Review: Best shoe I have found  for my picky son

Title: A  wasted mess!!
Review: The 1st bottle had spilled all over the bag it was in leaving the bottle less than 1/2 full. Then the replacement bottle they sent me had the same, exact issue. You would think, after the same problem happening over & over again, that they would learn to pack the item correctly, by locking the pump dispenser and taping it shut!! It's really not that difficult!!🙄

Title: Little capsules that pack a punch!
Review: I really like this Borghese Power-C Firming & Brightening Serum product. I love the the little capsules. I tear the little top and then place little drops all over my face and with small circles, smooth it in to my face. Within seconds, the serum is absorbed. Having used this now for well over a month now, my skin actually feels amazing and does look like it has a real healthy glow! I love these little vials and I will be ordering more soon. Highly recommend!

Title: Great thick facial tissue for clean ups!

I carry several with me in my purse at all times and use them whether it be for spending the day with my two young grandsons or simply to remove and retouch makeup after a long day of wear. They can also be used as facial tissue but keep in mind they are on the thicker side. I think all moms (and grandmoms) should carry these with them at all times.

This bra is amazingly comfortable & I love that it doesn't have underwires. If you're looking for an everyday bra that provides coverage, comfort & quality...pick one up, or even two!

Title: I LOVE these
Review: I've been wearing Keens for the past 25 years and these are my most favorite pair so far. They are cute, comfortable and I can dress them up a bit and of course they are great for hiking and trails walking. I plan on getting more pairs in other colors.
