Title: Always Get Compliments On This
Review: A great little dress, I have it in two colors and get compliments on both.  Very comfy...I love them!!!

Title: Nice fitting active capri/yoga pants!
Review: I really like these capris and I wear them several times a week. They are flattering and hug your body and I also like the higher waist on the pants. I am in the process of trying to lose some weight and these are great to wear when I walk in the morning and all day as I run my errands. I have received compliments on these and have already ordered another pair in a different color to be able to alternate. Highly recommend these for everyone and every body shape.

Title: Cute
Review: I really like this style of shirt. I wear similar shirts all the time. This one is cute but I  just found it to be oddly shaped. It's really wide. It's wider than it is long. It's a little short on me, but not to the point that I wouldn't wear it but every time I bend over or stretch, skin is visible. The arms are a bit snug. It seems to be made well.

Title: Failed when needed
Review: Took on vacation cruise and found it simply can NOT do what it is represented to do on Apple products.

Title: Nice hat, may buy another Review: This is a lovely very lightweight hat, the cap portion is thin and stretchy and the brim is stiff, a bit heavy compared to the rest of the hat but feels comfortable. Less like a traditional baseball hat, more like a brim with a stretchy fabric that goes around your head. Good design.

I got the slightly obnoxious high viz yellow to wear while road running and would consider getting another in a more attractive color for wearing all the time! It is definately visible though!

Title: Presentable manicure set; some implements difficult to remove from case & case is difficult to close Review: This set looks impressive and is extremely presentable. It has a lot of tools, many of which I do not use.

I use all the clippers the most and they cut well. The tweezers are aligned and pull chin and eyebrow hairs easily. Both scissors are sharp and the cuticle cutter and file are good. I do not use the rest of the implements. However, because these tools are packed in the case, the case is very difficult to close and some implements are difficult to remove. Yes the case is gorgeous and rich looking but it needs to be bigger.

The current price of $11.99 is reasonable for this. However, the two negatives with the case really annoy me.

Title: I wanted this product to work but it doesnt.
Review: This product did not work for me. All I wanted was to improve the look of my lids. I wasn't looking for a miracle. The strips show, are obvious, and do not look natural at all. I read all the instructions and tried several positions on my eye lids.  I would recommend that you do not waste your money. I am tired of companies making money off people who just want to feel a little better about how they are aging.

Title: Nothing like the quality of my first JABRA PRO
Review: Not impressed! In fact dissapointed! Hard to keep attached to the ear and I am told when speaking into it my caller reports a lot of static! Nothing like the quality of my first JABRA PRO!

Title: works

I bought 2 to have a back up.  It was easy to program as advertised. It is an okay size... I would prefer a bit larger size.  If you're fond of a smallish remote I think you would like this.  It arrived quickly (I have prime) and in good condition.  I will definitely update if there are any issues.

Title: I am not crazy about the curved tip for grooming facial hair Review: I find these awkward to work with when cutting facial hair. Another reviewer said these were manicure scissors and perhaps they are. However, the curve design is not effective for facial hair based on my results as they do not cut close enough and the angle is awkward.

The scissors come with a faux leather sheath. These personally do not work for me and I have no need for a pair of manicure scissors.

Title: Decent
Review: Super cheeky if you have a butt but over all okay if that’s your kinda thing

Title: Great for volumizing and giving your hair incredible shine!
Review: Very nice moisturizing shampoo. Chock full of vitamins (Vitamins C, E and B5) this shampoo leaves my normally fine hair soft and fuller. I love the light scent,  my hair looks like I just came out of a salon with enhanced volume and shine. If I had any complaints at all, it's the size of the tube (like a tube of toothpaste). Typically, I prefer a larger bottle, especially for the cost/oz., but I guess you get what you pay for. Outside of the size and the value, this is a really good shampoo (sulfate free as well).

Title: Uncomfortable and irritating
Review: No luck with this one. I need a true comfort bra. And way overpriced.

Title: Okay for the price
Review: These brushes are okay for the price. The bristles aren't as stiff as I would like, but they do the job.

Title: May or may not last
Review: It's lightweight and works the way it's supposed to, for now, but I just got it and it seems kind of flimsy. I got a paper cut from the edges, if that tells you anything. Something tells me it's not going to have a long life but we'll see. It's Nov, 2018, I'll update if it falls apart.

Title: Great lather, intensely moisturizers, and cleans well but it STINKS!
Review: I love Method body washes because they lather up better than most shower gels on the market. This lathers copiously, cleans well, intensely moisturizers, but smells terrible. The scent reminds me of a stale dishcloth. The aroma is light but it is enough to be off-putting. This body wash is exceptional in every other way but this. I canceled my subscription due to the scent. If it had a good aroma, I would continue to buy this. I will use what I have because the scent does not linger after the shower is over, but the shower is less enjoyable with a scent such as this.

Title: ALexa and the smart plug work.
Review: It works as promised.  I bought mine as a combined item with Echo.  As a stand alone plug, it seems expensive.

Title: Cute, comfortable tunic Review: I originally ordered this top hoping it was more brown. The color wasn’t what I wanted, but I liked the top and kept it. I like the lace detail on the bottom edge.

This is made with a nice material. It isn’t cheap and thin. Soft. Doesn’t wrinkle real easy.

It is a trapeze fit top, so fits more loosely towards the hips. It fit as expected. I ordered an XL. I am 5’4” and weigh about 171 lbs. I am a 38 DDD.

Title: Perfect gift for the woman you love!
Review: I have been using Neutrogena products for years now.  This Hydro Boost gift set is one of my favorites. I love the moisturizing gel, it goes on lightly and is absorbed quickly into my skin. The moisturizing mask is something that I have used in the past and I really like. After using both, my skin looks younger and glowing. This is a great gift set to give to someone as it gives them a kick start into getting their skin in optimum condition and you can always trust Neutrogena for the best beauty products. Any woman would love to get this set.

Title: cables
Review: I purchased these cables to help with a specific technical issue... they did work... however, I don't need them any more.  The pricing was little high, but I live in a rural area and appreciate that I can shop globally for stuff that I might need.

Title: Scent not strong enough, but nice
Review: I wanted this to really have a strong scent and it does not.  But it does have a rose scent that is notable.  I take salt baths for pain and this was as good as any that I use.  It is a tool in my pain relief bag and I will probably buy it again and add some rose oil to it.

Title: Not worth it
Review: Did not work well and broke apart instantly

Title: wireless mouse
Review: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: poncho from china
Review: A couple of things..... This poncho arrived without ANY labels. No content... no washing directions... from CHINA.  The picture shows a much different color than what arrived.  It is NOT the ivory shown... it is a heathered brown with some ivory. Pics on the ad page are very misleading.  I have included pics I hope will be helpful to you.  It is small - "junior" sized.  I am 5'7"... 38DDD and usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x.  I did not expect this to be plus sized in any way, however, I really expected it to be a bit more "normal" in size. It is very loose knit - so it will snag if not super careful.  The buttons are cheesy looking plastic.  It feels like it is acrylic, however, with no labels of any kind, I really can't say.  I washed it on hand wash cycle and laid flat to dry just in case.  I will keep it because it was fairly inexpensive and the hassle of returning it would cost more than the sweater is worth both in terms of dollars and in terms of the hassle.  I would NOT order from this seller again.

Title: Not great but not terrible.
Review: They do not do well in acrylic. Could have potential for nail art though.

Title: Not Worth the Price!
Review: I applied the mascara and primer as directed, on one eye. On the other I used my favorite, cheap, drugstore brand in the  "pink and green" container. You could not tell the difference!!! I am so upset that I spent so much money on this gimmick. Also, the next day, despite two face washings, I was constantly picking little black specks from my face left from the tiny fibers that are in the mascara.

Title: Buy beware.  Hard to make WiFi connection
Review: I bought this camera even after I read the other negative reviews because I thought I could follow the helpful hints that others left in there review.  NO use.  If you are not computer saavy do not buy this camera.  You will not be able to connect it easily.  I have two other wifi cameras that were easy to set up.  I bought this one because I needed two way audio.  It is horrible to set up.  I will return it tomorrow as soon as the post office opens.

Title: Works great
Review: This wire works great.  I recommend it.  It's well made and good quality.

Title: smells good, and is a good value
Review: This hairspray holds hair very well, smells good, and is a good value.

Title: Wool Socks - good fit Review: Decent Socks, lose their stretch a bit after a few washings.
I use them w/ a silk sock liner to wick moisture which helps increase the warmth.
in the winter cold of Colorado Mountains or just shoveling snow these are good socks at very good prices.

Title: Great pearl necklace for the price!
Review: Bought these for a Kentucky Derby party I was going to (needed to dress the part, lol). I must say they were stunning and I got a lot of compliments for them. I didn't particularly care for the clasp, I think with relatively light loose this will break eventually (would have preferred a lobster claw). But, for a relatively cheap accessory, that looks more expensive than it is, these are for you.

Title: Don't Buy
Review: 24 nails and only the largest and 3 smallest sizes were matches, the rest were different sizes. How does this company figure these are nail sets?

Title: Meh!

Title: Great sound quality - poor dock locations. Review: This dock has great sound quality. What I don't like about it is that if I wanted to have my ipad plugged into the rear top dock the guard for the front dock blocks the view of the ipad. In addition, there are time when I would like to have my ipad plugged into the rear top dock and watch something on netflix. I can't do it because the netflix app runs in landscape mode and the ipad must be up & down to be plugged in. The guard on the front dock needs to be removable and the plugs should turn in some way so you can run your phone or tablet in the landscape view.

So, if you want the dock to play music its great. The sound quality is awesome. Unfortunately I can't do the other things I really wanted to with this dock.

Title: BEST. SOCK. LINERS. EVER Review: Bought these as sock liners to wear under my hiking socks for a week long backpacking trip.

For me, these are a complete game changer. After a week in the mountains, absolutely no blisters, and very happy feet. I've worn them since as regular socks, and they are by far the most comfortable pairs I own.

As for durability. These are toe socks. If you try to yank them on, you will eventually RIP them. You have to take the extra 2-3 seconds to make sure your toes go into the right holes. Just think of them like putting gloves on your feet, well, because that's exactly what they are.

Great job Amazon, smart tech. A pocket watch is smarter than this device.

Title: Very soft and stylish stretch jeans but about 2 sizes too small Review: These jeans would have gotten five stars from me had they fit but they are definitely about two sizes too small. This size 36W x 33L fits like a 32W x 32L.

I ordered these for my boyfriend with the understanding that if they did not fit him that they would at least fit me. They do not fit either one of us. He takes a size 36W x 30L. He does sometimes take a 38W. I take a 34W-36W depending on the cut. However, these did not fit him around the waist even though they stretch. I then tried them on and got them up fine but could not close the waist no matter how much I stretched them. Other than this, these are a beautiful pair of jeans. I love the color, the feel, the softness, and the stretch. However, these are definitely not true to size. At least the pair I got is not true to size. Even the length is wrong. A 33L on me usually hits the floor, this fell just a little bit below my ankle which is what a 32L fits like on me.

Title: Not the worst, but also not the same old Asiscs
Review: These are not the supportive asics gels of old. These new ones are quite the opposite in bads ways and good. While the older off-the-shelf models had ankle roll support, foot side support, a wide sole, and a confortable fit, these new ones forgo all that in favor of something else. For example, If you're overpronating, these shoes will expose this where as others just allow you to keep doing it. In spite of being available in assorted widths, these seemed a half size too tight. The low cut on the heel cup, a Asics signature, is still there which those with achilles tendinosis may welcome.

Title: Good for games, but not great in other areas Review: Pros:
1. Better handling when playing games, especially driving games.
2. Easy availability of AA batteries when you can't stop to charge.
3. Protection from accidental tumbles.
4. Stands on its side for watching movies
5. Longer game play with trickle charge

Cons:
1. Batteries are inconveniently positioned, as you have to remove the iPod from the game case to replace them.
2. Doing the above leads to tons of fingerprints on the screen.
3. The battery cover feels flimsy, and is a bit of a pain to open.
4. The docking connector looks likely to break off if handled roughly.
5. Difficult to insert iPod properly.
6. Too bulky for anything else but game playing.

Recommended for gaming with your iPod, keeping in mind that the gains in portability from the AA batteries are somewhat offset by the bulkiness of the unit.

Amanda Richards, July 4, 2010

Title: For decoration only; soap not great smelling; presentation excellent but one wrong word Review: I was going to rate this one star but increased the rating because there is some quality in this set.

The presentation is superb. The soap roses are delicate and beautiful. The gold foil rose is a nice keepsake. The packaging is attractive but the saying on front is not typed correctly as it says:

Sweet Love
Please always
know that
I love you
mave than
anything else
in the world.

Note that the word should be "more" and not "mave." That is the first mistake.

The second issue I have is that the soap is like glue (see photos). I tried to wash my hands with it and it lathers okay but it is sticky and gunks up my hands and the sponge. Therefore, I would not use this as soap.

The third issue is that I do not feel the soap smells enticing. It has a lackluster aroma that I would not even call floral.

The presentation of roses in the open box is awesome; for that they get five stars. For everything else, this is one star. The current price of $11.99 is a bit pricey for what one gets.

Title: Cute Bag but it smells like… Review: I’m in the military and I travel a lot for work. I’m always going from wearing civilian clothes to military uniform. I needed something more versatile while traveling.
This bag is beautiful, I love all the pockets and my computer fits perfectly inside and all it’s accessories while still in regs (took off the tassel attached).
The only thing I did not like was the horrendous smell it came with. I received it the day I was flying out and only had a few hours to try and air it out.
I tried spraying it as well but it still reeks!
I do hope that quality control gets on this and they do something about the smell.
I also hope they take into account that some people are very sensitive to smells.
I mean for $40, this bag shouldn’t be smelling like that.
It’s really bag, like on the spectrum of thrift store and dog/cat pee.

Title: They wash great! I have 7 pairs and they look great ...

Title: Could’ve been perfect Review: This product is almost perfect and probably could be if they fixed two issues. The first, and main, issue I faced was the microphone quality. I was extremely disappointed in the quality. People have repeatedly commented that I am very scratchy on calls and I’ve recorded myself multiple times on Voice Memos using these and the quality was subpar. They actually had worse quality than my iPhone’s built-in microphone and even the Lightning Connector Earpods that came with my phone. I’ve tried troubleshooting this multiple ways including, forgetting the device completely and pairing it again (exactly according to instructions in box) and turning my phone completely off and on again to no avail.
I also found that the volume level was somewhat lower than I expected. It isn’t extremely quiet, but to me it just seems a bit low.
Now, I don’t know if I am just unlucky and I’ve received a dud or if my expectations for this product are unreasonable, but I’d just like to see these problems resolved if not for my sake, then for the sake of others.
Other than those issues, I love the noise cancellation and the battery life is phenomenal.

Title: Results are superb but it takes 15 minutes to absorb on my skin Review: In the package is a 0.247 ounce whip hydrating moisturizer and a 1.7-ounce jar of regenerist. I tried the regenerist cream and it is lightweight--almost airy. It goes on slick and takes 15 minutes to absorb on my face and neck. However, once absorbed my face feels great and my skin feels super hydrated and plump with moisturizer. I love the cream but hate the absorption rate.

The current price of $29.99 ($34.99 minus $5) is competitively priced for this.

Title: Strong smelling foot soak; stings my feet a bit Review: Tea tree oil is extremely strong smelling and this smells like it is loaded with it. This oil has anti-bacterial and anti-fungal properties. I used three tablespoons per the instructions in my foot bath. The soak is both soothing and stinging. It does soften my feet and leave them feeling refreshed. Unfortunately, the tea tree oil fragrance with the other menthol-type oils (eucalyptus, peppermint, spearmint, etc.) added is just too much for my senses.

This is a 20-ounce jar of foot soak that should last me about two weeks as there are about 40 tablespoons in 20 ounces of product.

The current price of $14.48 ($16.48 minus $2) is competitively priced. I would personally prefer to make my own soak with a few drops of tea tree oil to one cup of Epsom Salt and bypass all those other menthol-type oils.

Title: Ordinary lightweight cream; nothing special except it is scentless Review: To me there is nothing special about this lotion. It is a lightweight cream that is mildly moisturizing and is scentless. It is no better than a lot of cheaper creams on the market. In fact I like creams like Jergens better because they have a nice scent and are thicker.

The current price of $20 for 6.8 fluid ounces is a lot for this. Also, everything on the bottle is written in Korean. The box is also written mostly in Korean with one side in English. Nowhere on the bottle or box does it say the fluid ounces; that is only displayed on the Amazon site.

Title: Very basic travel brush set with case; short handles makes these hard to hold Review: There are eight very basic and small make-up brushes in this set. The bristles are soft but I do not care for their nylon feel. There was no shedding. Their soft bristles feel good against my skin and work like many other brushes I tried previously. However, since the brushes are small, this is really for travel. Because the handles are short, these can be difficult to hold and work with; however, since these are for a purse or carry-on, that is to be expected.

One of the handles on the brushes I received was chipped (see photo), so the quality is basic. I do love the case, however.

The current price of $7.22 ($8.49 minus 15%) is competitively priced for this set of nine pieces (eight brushes and one case).

I wish they were a little thicker. I fear that they won't last as long as thicker ones. Plus, thin ones are easier to be grabbed and stolen. The straps are adjustable. I have them at the maximum length and that's perfect on me. The zippers function well. There are 3 different compartments. One of them has credit card slots, but they go down into the bag and the lower ones are difficult to access. The compartments don't open all the way up which makes it challenging to reach the bottom of them. Overall the bag is okay.

Review: These are great. I previously had a plastic attached version which were almost impossible to get on and take off my luggage. These wrap on my handle and connect by screwing the two ends together. Secure fit and easy to remove. Can't wait to use them on my cruise in April!

Title: This one is flexible and does charge my phone however so it was not a waste of money
Review: It does not fit my Kindle Fire snugly, it is very loose. I have to hold it just right to get it to work. Next time I will just save myself the trouble and get the original cord. This one is flexible and does charge my phone however so it was not a waste of money. I gave it 3 stars because although it does not do what I ordered it for it is still useful and it is always good to have a spare around.

Title: Questionable quality
Review: I'm very pale, and 4 out of the 6 eyeshadows look pretty much the same on me. They all are very dusty and not pigmented at all. The blush doesn't show up at all. The lip products are ok. For the price, I think this would be a nice set for a young teen who is just getting started with makeup. For someone more experienced, using an eye primer may help with the shadows.

Title: Blink mounts
Review: We own a whole bunch Blink cameras and we have found that these mounts are the best so far.  Makes the camera easy to adjust - easy to install.

Title: Kindle
Review: Love this kindle so much and works so well when I’m outside.

Title: Big heavy, and can’t get to my lashes. Review: So many new Gimmicks to sell the same-old, same-old stuff.
I’m not a fan of this Revlon heavy eye lash curler, and do not find it much different then most of them, so save your money, or buy a new silicone liner for your old one.

I notice the medal on this Revlon eye lash curler is, thick, heavy, and the finger holes are not any more comfortable
then the older ones.
But the main problem for me is, the top of the curler is big/taller then my other lash curlers, and its harder to get in and grab your eye lashes to curl them!

Years ago, I found a battery run eye lash curler that heated up, and it was great. Kept a Curl in my lashes aIl day., and it was Not expensive, and easier to use then this one, and it was a white plastic.
Now Sometimes I’llI use a warm hair dryer to heat this with, it curls your lashes much better..
But make sure the medal is Not hot, it will burn you..

I’m being generous and giving this a two star!

Title: Beautiful set
Review: It’s a beautiful set but the diamonds fell out after one use.  It doesn’t look as nice anymore. The other two rings are still lovely and I wear it daily.

Title: Great for working out
Review: Fits as expected. Soft/comfortable. Great for working out.

Title: almost didnt order because of reviews sending wrong item
Review: product quality is great but  reviews were right on.  you don't get what you order either w color or pull over versus zip up.  i have decided to get fabric paint and make it look as i wanted.  way easier than the process of replacing.  its ok  need a project.  spent $70 for a hoodie i wanted to buy  but not worth  it to try again. keep the one i have and make it my own

Title: Functions just like Epsom Salt and dissolves instantaneously Review: I used this to bathe my feet. This dissolves faster than Epsom Salt so that what I am left with is a bath of clear water almost immediately after running the water.

I did not notice anything special about this salt. Although it is scentless, I did detect a faint aroma that I like. Perhaps it is just the smell of the salt. My feet came out feeling clean but no better or worse than if I had just used Epsom salt which is cheaper.

At the current price of $16.99, this comes to $3.40 per pound. My local Walmart sells 8 pounds of Epsom salt for $8, so that is much cheaper.

Title: Stunning red earrings!
Review: These are a nice size earring, noticeable on my ears, with a really colorful red tint. Super light weight, I wore them all evening and didn't even know I had them one. Super cute pattern on the drops as well. Highly recommend these to add to your wardrobe.

Title: This is a bare bones basic curling iron; good for tight curls on very short hair; kickstand lousy Review: I have short to medium fine curly hair and this iron allows me to get a slightly tighter curl. However, it is a bare bones model. There is a light telling the user when it has reached a certain temperature (meaning it stopped blinking). The temperature control goes from 225 to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. The kickstand is awful as it keeps collapsing. Therefore, it is important to wear the supplied glove when using this. I do love the 360 degree swivel cord ability as it keeps it from tangling.

In summary, this is perfect for short hair and makes my curls tighter because of the small barrel. If one is looking for a tight curl and wants a super basic curling iron, then this is it. The current price of $24.99 is competitively priced.

Title: Three Stars
Review: works fine

Title: Nice
Review: Love the colors

Title: great for traveling
Review: we got this for my missionary who has to use his phone to send emails most of the time.  He is very happy with it. He says the size is perfect

Title: Two Stars
Review: Broke on first wearing :( , spare did too!

Title: I have MANY pairs of Merrill Jungle Mocs and have been wearing them for over 20 years. Review: When the shoe fits get it in every color has long been my motto. Unfortunately companies change their products up without notice.

I own over 12 pairs of Merrell Jungle Mocs in different colors and textures. I practically live in them since my work requires me to walk a lot and I still have to look somewhat fashionable.

This latest pair although very nice looking is tighter and shorter than many of my other pairs in the same size. I've reordered a 1/2 size larger. Hopefully they will fit better.

Fingers are crossed.

Title: Nice scent but not very strong
Review: These have a nice scent, but they aren't very strong.  You don't get much of an aroma while taking a shower.  I've tried 2 tablets so far and it's just not very aromatic.

Title: No good
Review: These are no good. They take batteries and the red light is always on so I can’t imagine how quickly they go through batteries. They also look pretty fake. I ended up returning them.

Title: Great Product but NOT cotton!
Review: I love these shorts for wearing around the house and originally I purchased them as they were listed as cotton. They arrived and they are NOT cotton. I thought about returning them but they are a great fit and super comfy so will be keeping but I am annoyed with amazon yet again for another wrong listing. Would have been five stars if had been cotton as the listing states.

Title: Odd fit. Didn't care for it
Review: Sent it back. Fit was odd.

Title: Don’t buy this
Review: This product will not last long. If you have a dog or cat their nails will pull it apart. This is how thin it is. It smelled so bad when I opened the package. I returned it.

Title: Foot torture
Review: Ordered my regular size and can’t wear these for more than 10 minutes. Feels like my foot is being squeezed in a vice.  Never had a pair of nikes that I couldn’t wear. Real bummer. They will sit as returns are a real pain in the ….

Title: Not a true red
Review: Was disappointed that this red has a lot of orange in it.

Title: Not what was advertised
Review: Not what was advertised

Title: They're just ok
Review: I am not that crazy about these slippers. I do not feel they've kept their comfort as I've broken them in. I don't feel the memory foam is that good of quality, I've had other slippers that held their shape and comfort inside a lot longer. I would not buy these again.

Title: Cards are difficult to remove from slots; extreme minimalist wallet Review: This leather wallet is super minimal and stiff. The front has an ID pocket with room for two more cards. The back has room for four cards and the center can hold some folded bills. I found it difficult to remove the cards from the card slots.

There's a metal loop on top where keys can be clipped on. The color is a deep forest green and the leather is textured.

The wallet also comes with RFID protection to protect your credit cards from scanners. However, I have no way of verifying if this works or not.

It does not come in a giftable box.

Personally, I feel the current price of $11.99 is too expensive for this. It is super minimal and difficult to extract the cards out of some of the slots. When it is full it is even tighter. Although it is functional, this would not be my first wallet choice.

Title: Two thumbs up
Review: Nice and warm. The fit is slightly, and I mean ever so slightly, larger than expected. Inseam was perfect for a 31. Soft, durable, and would buy again!

Title: Handle carefully
Review: My old thinning shears only cut about one out of 100 hairs so I assumed this one would too but I was wrong. They cut a huge chunk of my hair  right on the front side where it is very noticeable. I'll be more careful now, but the damage is done until my hair grows out again...watch out, the shears are more like regular shears. Other than that, both shears are of good quality and I'm happy to have them.

Title: Nice, but expensive, eye cream
Review: I found this to be a really nice eye cream. Thick and luxurious, it comes impressively packaged and would be perfect for gift giving. I apply it to my eye area in dabs and gently smooth it in. My under eye skin feels smoother and softer definitely. Not sure about the 'lifting' impact though, don't see a difference after almost 3 weeks of use. I am deducting a star simply because of the price. I have had Olay products which have similar effects for 25% of the price.

Title: Better than ever Review: Wow - we like the gray color. The sound has definitely improved and the smaller profile fits my wife's desires for the room.
We're still learning how to really use this and also tie it to our dot in the bedroom.

We recommended the Echo 1 and really recommend the 2d Gen version.

Title: Wonderful way for a woman to look her best!
Review: Great hair remover. I keep it in my shower using it several times a week. It's strong enough for leg hair, but gentle enough for my underlip and chin areas. Lots of attachments and speeds and my skin feels super soft and smooth after using it.  Comes in a great box so it is also good for gift giving. Highly recommend.

Title: It is what it is
Review: It's not the worst conditioner I've used, it's not VO5 or anything. But it's also not very amazing. I'd say on par with Tressme or something. The value for the money is pretty spot on and I wouldn't be upset if this is what my gym was offering instead of the nothing they offer now. But it won't bought by me again for personal use.

Title: Too subtle a color to be useful; only good to tone down richer hues Review: This review is for the Cashmere Craving eyeshadow.

It is packaged as a single small bar without a case because this single is for use in a [[ASIN:B07DR9579W Buxom Empty Eyeshadow Bar Palette Case]]. In this sense it is a neat idea because I can build a personalized palette all my own just by ordering the colors I like.

Unfortunately, this hue is too subtle to be useful. I normally use three colors on my eyes with a base color over the entire lid. I figured this would be a great base color. However, it looks no different than my fair skin and I cannot tell I even put any powder on my lid. The only thing I can use this for is to tone down a darker hue. However, after having tried this color, I would never purchase it simply because it is as if nothing has been applied to my lids.

Title: Korean eye cream; no English on the package; nice subtly scented cream Review: This is a very small tube of eye cream no size listed except for what is on the Amazon site (20ml). The writing on the package and tube is all in Korean. Since this is an eye cream, I applied this after a shower to my lids, under the brow, and under my eye. It has a nice thick texture that absorbs quickly and has a subtly pleasant fragrance. I would not say it is brightening but it is anti-wrinkle.

However, at the current price of $33.76, this is pricey for such a small tube. Also, I hate that there is no English anywhere on the package. In fact, I would not even know this was eye cream without the Amazon UPC tag that says so.

Title: Nice lip color, lighter/pinker than anticpated.
Review: I was hoping this lip color would have been a little darker/redder as the picture seemed to indicate it would be. It is definitely a pink color. Would have also liked it a little more glossy as it is a flatter sheen. Rating it as 4 stars as it is L'Oréal and I normally love their products given the quality. I found this to be pretty long lasting. Just wish it were shinier and darker.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Love color on this  better

Title: So confident they didn't even ask for a review.
Review: Samsung is hit or miss with their products. The brand name begs for the higher prices but the physical products have a wide margin of what they consider quality.

Title: I bought two batteries and I was not so happy with them
Review: I bought two batteries and I was not so happy with them. The shipper  sent me an e-mail asking me how I liked them. They were concerned that I was not happy with their product and they sent me two more. The new batteries work great.

Title: Nice looking shoes
Review: This look nice but I'm a bit concerned about  the quality. When I first put my foot in, it pushed down back heel area and it took forever to get it back up. Like the material just quashed down. Other than that it looks and feels like a shoe that would cost 4 times as much. Good cushion and plenty of room for toes. A nice shoe for walking or casual wear.

Title: Order a size up
Review: I bought this as a Christmas gift for my 8yo. I ordered the gray(wolf) suit in a medium. The medium is meant for 8-9yo. He’s of average weight and height and the suit BARELY fits him. It’s a bit too fitted for what I was hoping for. I wish I would have bought a size up(large) for him to be able to be more comfortable and for him to be able to wear it for more than a season.

Title: Smelly
Review: Although this bag is really cute and seems quite well made it smells  horrible . I needed this for an outdoor event I was attending ,  when it arrived I noticed the fishy smell. Thankfully  I didn't panic , I opened it up fully and placed several dryer sheets in  various compartments and hung it outdoors to air out.  Unfortunately the fishy smell still lingers today months later . I would never recommend buying this bag

Title: These are really cute... but run VERY ...
Review: These are really cute... but run VERY VERY small.  I wear an 8 and the 10's are very snug.  They are knit, with some stretch, however, they are lined with a faux fur of some kind... so there isn't a lot of give.  The top of the foot is a bit too snug... but hoping with a little wear they will stretch some.  The bottoms would be ok to wear outside.. but dry only as the rubber/plastic bottom covers only the bottom of the slipper... so you wouldn't want to wade through any moisture... They are cute... Just wish they were not so snug. Also the gray is a bit lighter and maybe a bit more taupey than the blue gray of the photo provided.  I will update if new info would be helpful later.

Title: Card was DOA Review: Card was DOA .. had to return
I have 2 of the non-raid cards and they work great for additional sata ports
Wanted to try RAID .. but never got past boot up
Amz refunded promptly though

Title: Three Stars
Review: Goes on smooth.

Title: turned mynails orange
Review: my nails are still brittle.product sucks.waste of money
